Matthew1:1 BUKU la kubadwa kwa Yesu Kristu, mwana wa Davide, mwana wa Abrahamu." 
Matthew1:2 Abrahamu anabala Isake; ndi Isake anabala Yakobo; ndi Yakobo anabala Yuda ndi abale ace; 
Matthew1:3 ndi Yuda anabala Farese ndi Zara mwa Tamare; ndi Farese anabala Ezronu; ndi Ezronu anabala Aramu; 
Matthew1:4 ndi Aramu anabala Aminadabu; ndi Aminadabu anabala Naasoni; ndi Naasoni anabala Salimoni; 
Matthew1:5 ndi Salimoni anabala Boazi mwa Rahabe; ndi Boazi anabala Obede mwa Rute; ndi Obede anabala Jese; 
Matthew1:6 ndi Jese anabala Davide mfumuyo. Ndipo Davide anabala Solomo mwa mkazi wa Uriya; 
Matthew1:7 ndi Solomo anabala Rehabiamu; ndi Rehabiamu anabala Abiya; ndi Abiya anabala Asa; 
Matthew1:8 ndi Asa anabala Yosafate; ndi Yosafate anabala Yoramu; ndi Yoramu anabala Uziya; 
Matthew1:9 ndi Uziya anabala Yotamu; ndi Yotamu anabala Ahazi; ndi Ahazi anabala Hezekiya; 
Matthew1:10 ndi Hezekiya anabala Manase; ndi Manase anabala Amoni; ndi Amoni anabala Yosiya; 
Matthew1:11 ndi Yosiya anabala Yekoniya ndi abale ace pa nthawi yakutengedwa kunka ku Babulo. 
Matthew1:12 Ndipo pambuyo pace pa kutengedwako ku Babulo, Yekoniya anabala Salatieli; ndi Saiatieli anabala Zerubabele;" 
Matthew1:13 ndi Zerubabele anabala Abiyudi; ndi Abiyudi anabala Eliyakimu; ndi Eliyakimu anabala Azoro; 
Matthew1:14 ndi Azoro anabala Sadoki; ndi Sadoki anabala Akimu; ndi Akimu anabala Eliyudi; 
Matthew1:15 ndi Eliyudi anabala Eleazara; ndi Eleazara anabala Matani; ndi Matani anabala Yakobo; 
Matthew1:16 ndi Yakobo anabala Yosefe, mwamuna wace wa Mariya, amene Yesu, wochedwa Kristu, anabadwa mwa iye." 
Matthew1:17 Motero mibadwo yonse kuyambira pa Abrahamu kufikira kwa Davide ndiyo mibadwo khumi ndi inai; ndi kuyambira pa Davide kufikira pa kutengedwa kunka ku Babulo mibadwo khumi ndi inai; ndi kuyambira pa kutengedwa kunka ku Babulo kufikira kwa Kristu mibadwo khumi ndi inai. 
Matthew1:18 Ndipo kubadwa kwace kwa Yesu Kristu kunali kotere: Amai wace Mariya anapalidwa ubwenzi ndi Yosefe, koma asanakomane iwowo, anapezedwa iye ali ndi pakati mwa Mzimu Woyera." 
Matthew1:19 Koma Yosefe, mwamuna wace, anali wolungama, ndiponso sanafuna kunyazitsa iye, nayesa m'mtima kumleka iye m'tseri," 
Matthew1:20 Koma pakusinkhasinkha iye zinthu izi, onani, mngelo wa Ambuye anaonekera kwa iye m'kulota, nanena, Yosefe, mwana wa Davide, usaope kudzitengera wekha Mariya mkazi wako; pakuti ico colandiridwa mwa iye ciri ca Mzimu Woyera." 
Matthew1:21 Ndipo adzabala mwana wamwamuna, ndipo udzamucha dzina lace Yesu; pakuti Iyeyo adzapulumutsa anthu ace ku macimo ao." 
Matthew1:22 Ndipo zonsezi zinakhala kuti cikacitidwe conenedwa ndi Ambuye mwa mneneri, ndi kuti," 
Matthew1:23 Onani namwali adzaima, Nadzabala mwana wamwamuna, Ndipo adzamucha dzina lace, Emanueli; ndilo losandulika, Mulungu nafe." 
Matthew1:24 Ndipo Yosefe anauka tulo tace, nacita monga anamuuza mngelo wa Ambuye, nadzitengera yekha mkazi wace;" 
Matthew1:25 ndipo sanamdziwa iye kufikira atabala rriwana wace; namucha dzina lace Yesu. 
Matthew2:1 Ndipo pa kubadwa kwace kwa Yesu m'Betelehemu wa Yudeya m'masiku a Herode mfumu, onani, Anzeru a kum'mawa anafika ku Yerusalemu," 
Matthew2:2 nati, Ali kuti amene anabadwa Mfumu ya Ayuda? cifukwa tinaona nyenyezi yace kum'mawa, ndipo tinadzera kudzamlambira Iye." 
Matthew2:3 Ndipo Herode mfumuyo pakumva ici anabvutika, ndi Yerusalemu yense pamodzi naye." 
Matthew2:4 Ndipo pamene anasonkhanitsa ansembe akuru onse ndi alembi a anthu, anafunsira iwo, Adzabadwira kuti Kristuyo?" 
Matthew2:5 Ndipo anamuuza iye, M'Betelehemu wa Yudeya; cifukwa kunalembedwa kotere ndi mneneri, kuti," 
Matthew2:6 Ndipo iwe: Betelehemu, dziko la Yudeya, Sukhala konse wamng'onong'ono mwa akuru a Yudeya. Pakuti Wotsogolera adzacokera mwaiwe, Amene adzaweta anthu anga Aisrayeli." 
Matthew2:7 Pomwepo Herode anawaitana Anzeruwo m'tseri, nafunsitsa iwo nthawi yace idaoneka nyenyeziyo." 
Matthew2:8 Nawatumiza ku Betelehemu, nati, Yendani mufunitsitse za kamwanako; ndipo pamene mudzampeza, mundibwezere mau, kuti inenso ndidzadze kudzamlambira Iye." 
Matthew2:9 Ndipo iwo, m'mene anamva mfumu, anamuka; ndipo onani, nyenyezi ija anaiona kum'mawa, inawatsogolera iwo, kufikira inadza niima pamwamba pomwe panali kamwanako." 
Matthew2:10 Ndipo iwo poona nyenyeziyo, anakondwera ndi kukondwera kwakukuru." 
Matthew2:11 Ndipo pofika ku nyumba anaona kamwanako ndi Mariya amace, ndipo anagwa pansi namgwadira Iye; namasula cuma cao, nampatsa Iye mitulo, ndiyo golidi ndi libano ndi mure." 
Matthew2:12 Ndipo iwo, pocenjezedwa m'kulota kuti asabwerere kwa Herode, anacoka kupita ku dziko lao pa njira yina." 
Matthew2:13 Ndipo pamene iwo anacoka, onani, mngelo wa Ambuye anaonekera kwa Yosefe m'kulota, nati, Tauka, nutenge kamwanako ndi amace, nuthawire ku Aigupto, nukakhale kumeneko kufikira ndidzakuuza iwe; pakuti Herode adzafuna kamwana kukaononga Iko." 
Matthew2:14 Ndipo iye ananyamuka natenga kamwana ndi amace usiku, nacoka kupita ku Aigupto;" 
Matthew2:15 nakhalabe kumeneko kufikira atamwalira Herode; kuti cikacitidwe conenedwa ndi Ambuye mwa mneneri kuti, Ndinaitana Mwana wanga aturuke m'Aigupto." 
Matthew2:16 Pamenepo Herode, poona kuti anampusitsa Anzeruwo, anapsa mtima ndithu, natumiza ena kukaononga tiana tonse ta m'Betelehemu ndi ta m'miraga yace yonse, takufikira zaka ziwiri ndi tating'ono tonse, monga mwa nthawi imeneyo iye anafunsitsa kwa Anzeruwo." 
Matthew2:17 Pomwepo cinacitidwa conenedwa ndi Yeremiya mneneri, kuti," 
Matthew2:18 Mau anamveka m'Rama, Maliro ndi kucema kwambiri; Rakele wolira ana ace, Wosafuna kusangalatsidwa, Cifukwa palibe iwo." 
Matthew2:19 Koma pakumwalira Herode, onani, mngelo wa Ambuye anaonekera m'kulota kwa Yosefe m'Aigupto," 
Matthew2:20 nati, Tauka, nutenge kamwana ndi amace, nupite ku dziko la Israyeli: cifukwa anafa uja wofuna moyo wace wa kamwanako." 
Matthew2:21 Ndipo anauka iye, natenga kamwana ndi amace, nalowa m'dziko la Israyeli." 
Matthew2:22 Koma pakumva iye kuti Arikelao anali mfumu ya Yudeya m'malo mwa atate wace Herode, anacita mantha kupita kumeneko; ndipo pamene anacenjezedwa ndi Mulungu m'kulota, anamuka nalowa ku dziko la Galileya," 
Matthew2:23 nadza nakhazikika m'mudzi dzina lace Nazarete kuti cikacitidwe conenedwa ndi aneneri kuti, Adzachedwa Mnazarayo." 
Matthew3:1 Ndipo masiku aja anadza Yohane Mbatizi, nalalikira m'cipululu ca Yudeya," 
Matthew3:2 nanena, Tembenukani mitima; cifukwa Ufumu wa Kumwamba wayandikira." 
Matthew3:3 Pakuti uyu ndiye ananenayo Yesaya mneneri, kuti, Mau a wopfuula m'cipululu, Konzani khwalala la Ambuye, Lungamitsani njira zace." 
Matthew3:4 Ndipo Yohane yekhayo anali naco cobvala cace ca ubweya wangamila, ndi lamba lacikopa m'cuuno mwace; ndi cakudya cace cinali dzombe ndi uci wa kuthengo." 
Matthew3:5 Pamenepo panamturukira iye ku Yerusalemu, ndi Yudeya lonse, ndi dziko lonse loyandikana ndi Yordano;" 
Matthew3:6 nabatizidwa ndi iye mu mtsinjewo wa Yordano, alikuulula macimo ao." 
Matthew3:7 Ndipo iye pakuona ambiri a Afarisi ndi a Asaduki akudza ku ubatizo wace, anati kwa iwo, Obadwa a njoka inu, ndani anakulangizani kuthawa mkwiyo ulinkudza?" 
Matthew3:8 Onetsani inu zipatso zakuyenera kutembenuka mtima: 
Matthew3:9 ndipo musamayesa kunena mwa inu nokha, Atate wathu tiri naye Abrahamu; pakuti ndinena kwa inu kuti mwa miyala iyi Mulungu akhoza kuukitsira Abrahamu ana." 
Matthew3:10 Ndiponso tsopano lino nkhwangwa yaikidwa pa mizu ya mitengo; cifukwa cace mtengo uli wonse wosabala zipatso zabwino udulidwa nuponyedwa pamoto," 
Matthew3:11 Inetu ndikubatizani inu ndi madzi kuloza ku kutembenuka mtima; koma Iye wakudza pambuyo panga, ali wakundiposa mphamvu, amene sindiyenera kunyamula nsapato zace: Iyeyu adzakubatizani inu ndi Mzimu Woyera ndi moto:" 
Matthew3:12 couluzira cace ciri m'dzanja lace, ndipo adzayeretsa padwale pace; ndipo adzasonkhanitsa tirigu wace m'ciruli, koma mankhusu adzatentha ndi moto wosazima." 
Matthew3:13 Pamenepo Yesu anacokera ku Galileya nadza ku Yordano kwa Yohane, kudzabatizidwa ndi iye." 
Matthew3:14 Koma Yohane anati amkanize, nanena, Ndiyenera ine kubatizidwa ndi Inu, ndipo Inu mudza kwa ine kodi?" 
Matthew3:15 Koma Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iye, Balola tsopano: pakuti kuyenera ife kukwaniritsa cilungamo conse motero. Pamenepo anamlola Iye." 
Matthew3:16 Ndipo Yesu, pamene anabatizidwa, pomwepo anaturuka m'madzi: ndipo onani, miyamba inamtsegukira Iye, ndipo anapenya Mzimu wa Mulungu wakutsika ngati nkhunda nudza nutera pa Iye;" 
Matthew3:17 ndipo onani, mau akucokera kumiyamba akuti, Uyu ndiye Mwana wanga wokondedwa, mwa Iyeyu ndikondwera." 
Matthew4:1 Pamenepo Yesu anatengedwa ndi Mzimu kumka kucipululu kukayesedwa ndi mdierekezi. 
Matthew4:2 Ndipo pamene Iye analibe kudya masiku makumi anai usana ndi usiku, pambuyo pace anamva njala." 
Matthew4:3 Ndipo woyesayo anafika nanena kwa Iye, Ngati muli Mwana wa Mulungu, tauzani kuti miyala iyi isanduke mikate." 
Matthew4:4 Koma Iye anayankha nati, Kwalembedwa, Munthu sadzakhala ndi moyo ndi mkate wokha, koma ndi mau onse akuturuka m'kamwa mwa Mulungu." 
Matthew4:5 Pamenepo mdierekezi anamuka naye ku mzinda woyera; namuika Iye pamwamba pa cimbudzi ca Kacisi," 
Matthew4:6 nanena naye, Ngati muli Mwana wa Mulungu, mudzigwetse nokha pansi: pakuti kwalembedwa, kuti, Adzauza angelo ace za iwe, Ndipo pa manja ao adzakunyamulaiwe, Ungagunde konse phazi lako pamwala." 
Matthew4:7 Yesu ananena naye, Ndiponso kwalembedwa, Usamuyese Ambuye Mulungu wako." 
Matthew4:8 Pomwenso mdierekezi anamuka naye ku phiri lalitari, namuonetsa maiko onse a dziko lapansi, ndi ulemerero wao;" 
Matthew4:9 nati kwa Iye, Zonse ndikupatsani Inu, ngati mudzagwa pansi ndi kundigwadira ine." 
Matthew4:10 Pomwepo Yesu ananena kwa iye, Coka Satana, pakuti kwalembedwa, Ambuye Mulungu wako udzamgwadira, Ndipo Iye yekha yekha udzamlambira." 
Matthew4:11 Pomwepo mdierekezi anamsiya Iye, ndipo onani, angelo anadza, namtumikira Iye." 
Matthew4:12 Ndipo pamene Yesu anamva kuti anampereka Yohane, anamuka kulowa ku Galileya;" 
Matthew4:13 ndipo anacoka ku Nazarete nadza nakhalitsa Iye m'Kapernao ira pambali pa nyanja, m'malire a Zebuloni ndi Nafitali:" 
Matthew4:14 kuti cikacitidwe conenedwa ndi Yesaya mneneri, kuti," 
Matthew4:15 It Dziko la Zebuloni ndi dziko la N afitali, Njira ya kunyanja, kutsidya lija la Yordano, Galileya la anthu akunja," 
Matthew4:16 Anthu akukhala mumdima Adaona kuwala kwakukuru, Ndi kwa iwo okhala m'malo mthunzi wa imfa, Kuwala kunaturukira iwo." 
Matthew4:17 Kuyambira pamenepo Yesu anayamba kulalikira, ndi kunena, Tembenukani mitima, pakuti Ufumu wa Kumwamba wayandikira." 
Matthew4:18 Ndipo pamene Yesu analikuyenda m'mbali mwa nyanja ya Galileya, anaona abale awiri, Simoni wonenedwa Petro, ndi Andreya, mbale wace, analikuponya psasa m'nyanja; popeza anali asodzi a nsomba." 
Matthew4:19 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Tiyeni pambuyo panga, ndidzakusandutsani asodzi a anthu." 
Matthew4:20 Ndipo iwo anasiya pomwepo makokawo, namtsata Iye." 
Matthew4:21 Ndipo popitirirapo Iye anaona abale ena awiri, Yakobo mwana wa Zebedayo, ndi Yohane mbale wace, m'ngalawa, pamodzi ndi Zebedayo atate wao, analikusoka makoka ao; ndipo anaitana iwo." 
Matthew4:22 Ndipo anasiya pomwepo ngalawayo ndi atate wao, namtsata Iye." 
Matthew4:23 Ndipo Yesu anayendayenda m'Galileya monse, analikuphunzitsa m'masunagoge mwao, nalalikira uthenga wabwino wa Ufumu, naciritsa nthenda zonse ndi kudwala konse mwa anthu." 
Matthew4:24 Ndipo mbiri yace inabuka ku Suriya konse: ndipo anatengera kwa Iye onse akudwala, ogwidwa ndi nthenda ndi mazunzo a mitundu mitundu, ndi ogwidwa ndi mizimu yoipa, ndi akhunyu, ndi amanjenje; ndipo Iye anawaciritsa." 
Matthew4:25 Ndipo inamtsata mipingo mipingo ya anthu ocokera ku Galileya, ndi ku Dekapole ndi ku Yerusalemu, ndi ku Yudeya, ndi ku tsidya lija la Yordano." 
Matthew5:1 Ndipo m'mene Iye anaona makamu, anakwera m'phiri; ndipo m'mene Iye anakhala pansi, anadza kwa Iye ophunzira ace;" 
Matthew5:2 ndipo anatsegula pakamwa, nawaphunzitsa iwo, nati:" 
Matthew5:3 Odala ali osauka mumzimu; cifukwa uli wao Ufumu wa Kumwamba. 
Matthew5:4 Odala ali acisoni; cifukwa adzasangalatsidwa. 
Matthew5:5 Odala ali akufatsa; cifukwa adzalandira dziko lapansi. 
Matthew5:6 Odala ali akumva njala ndi ludzu la cilungamo; cifukwa adzakhuta. 
Matthew5:7 Odala ali akucitira cifundo; cifukwa adzalandira cifundo. 
Matthew5:8 Odala ali oyera mtima; cifukwa adzaona Mulungu. 
Matthew5:9 Odala ali akucita mtendere; cifukwa adzachedwa ana a Mulungu. 
Matthew5:10 Odalaaliakuzunzidwacifukwa ca cilungamo: cifukwa uli wao Ufumu wa Kumwamba. 
Matthew5:11 Odala muli inu m'mene adzanyazitsa inu, nadzazunza inu, nadzakunenerani monama zoipa ziri zonse cifukwa ca Ine." 
Matthew5:12 Sekerani, sangalalani: cifukwa mphotho yanu ndi yaikuru m'Mwamba: pakuti potero anazunza aneneri anakhalawo musanabadwe inu." 
Matthew5:13 Inu ndinu mcere wa dziko lapansi; koma mcerewo ngati uka: sukuluka, adzaukoleretsa ndi ciani? Pamenepo sungakwanirenso kanthu konse, koma kuti ukaponyedwe kunja, nupondedwe ndi anthu." 
Matthew5:14 Inu ndinu kuunika kwa dziko lapansi. Mudzi wokhazikika pamwamba pa phiri sungathe kubisika. 
Matthew5:15 Kapena sayatsa nyali, ndi kuibvundikira m'mbiya, koma aiika iyo pa coikapo cace; ndipo iunikira onse: ali m'nyumbamo." 
Matthew5:16 Comweco muwalitse inu kuunika kwanu pamaso pa anthu, kuti pakuona nchito zanu zabwino, alemekeze Atate wanu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew5:17 Musaganize kuti ndinadza Ine kudzapasula cilamulo kapena ane, neri: sindinadza kupasula, koma kukwaniritsa." 
Matthew5:18 Pakuti indetu ndinena kwa inu, Kufikira litapitirira thambo ndi dziko, kalemba kakang'ono kamodzi kapena kansonga kace kamodzi sikadzaeokera kucilamulo, kufikira zitacitidwa zonse." 
Matthew5:19 Cifukwa cace yense wakumasula limodzi la malangizo amenewa ang'onong'ono, nadzaphunzitsa anthu comweco, adzachulidwa wamng'onong'ono mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba; koma yense wakucita ndi kuphunzitsa awa, iyeyu adzachulidwa wamkuru mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew5:20 Pakuti ndinena ndi inu, ngati cilungamo canu sicicuruka coposa ca alembi ndi Afarisi, simudzalowa konse mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew5:21 Munamva kuti kunanenedwa kwa iwo akale, Usaphe; koma yense wakupha adzakhala wopalamula mlandu:" 
Matthew5:22 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, kuti yense wokwiyira mbale wace wopanda cifukwa adzakhala wopalamula mlandu; ndipo amene adzanena ndi mbale wace, Wopanda pace iwe, adzakhala wopalamula mlandu wa akuru: koma amene adzati, Citsiru iwe: adzakhala wopalamula gehena wamoto." 
Matthew5:23 Cifukwa cace ngati ulikupereka mtulo wako pa guwa la nsembe, ndipo pomwepo ukakumbukira kuti mbale wako ali ndi kanthu pa iwe," 
Matthew5:24 usiye pomwepo mtulo wako kuguwako, nucoke, nuyambe kuyanjana ndi mbale wako, ndipo pamenepo idza nupereke mtulo wako." 
Matthew5:25 Fulumira kuyanjana ndi mnzako wamlandu, pamene uli naye panjira; kapena mnzako wamlandu angakupereke iwe kwa woweruza mlandu, ndi woweruzayo angapereke iwe kwa msilikari, nuponyedwe iwe m'nyumba yandende." 
Matthew5:26 Indetu ndinena ndi iwe, sudzaturukamo konse, koma utalipa kakobiri kakumariza ndiko." 
Matthew5:27 Munamva kuti kunanenedwa, Usacite cigololo;" 
Matthew5:28 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, kuti yense wakuyang'ana mkazi kumkhumba, pamenepo watha kucita naye cigololo mumtima mwace." 
Matthew5:29 Koma 1 ngati diso lake lamanja likulakwitsa iwe, ulikolowole, nulitaye; pakuti nkwabwino kwa iwe, kuti cimodzi ca ziwalo zako cionongeke, losaponyedwa thupi lako lonse m'gehena." 
Matthew5:30 Ndipo 2 ngati dzanja lako lamanja likulakwitsa iwe, ulidule, nulitaye; pakuti nkwabwino kwa iwe kuti cimodzi ca ziwalo zako cionongeke, losamuka thupi lako lonse kugehena." 
Matthew5:31 Kunanenedwanso, Yense wakucotsa mkazi wace 3 ampatse iye cilekaniro:" 
Matthew5:32 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, kuti 4 yense wakucotsa mkazi wace, kosati cifukwa ca cigololo, amcititsa cigololo: ndipo amene adzakwata wocotsedwayo acita cigololo." 
Matthew5:33 Ndiponso, munamva kuti kunanenedwa kwa iwo akale, 5 Usalumbire konama, koma udzapereka kwa Ambuye zolumbira zako:" 
Matthew5:34 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, 6 Musalumbire konse, kapena kuchula Kumwamba, cifukwa kuli cimpando ca Mulungu;" 
Matthew5:35 7 kapena kuchula dziko lapansi, cifukwa liri popondapo mapazi ace; kapena kuchula Yerusalemu, cifukwa kuli mzinda wa Mfumu yaikurukuru." 
Matthew5:36 8 Kapena usalumbire ku mutu wako, cifukwa sungathe kuliyeretsa mbu kapena kulidetsa bii tsitsi limodzi." 
Matthew5:37 9 Kama manenedwe anu akhale, Inde, inde; Iai, iai; ndipo coonjezedwa pa izo cicokera kwa woipayo." 
Matthew5:38 Munamva kuti kunanenedwa, 10 Diso kulipa diso, ndi dzino kulipa dzino:" 
Matthew5:39 koma ndinena kwa inu, 11 Musakanize munthu woipa; koma amene adzakupanda iwe pa tsaya lako Lamanja, umtembenuzire linanso." 
Matthew5:40 Ndipo kwa iye wofuna kupita nawe kumlandu ndi kutenga malaya ako, umlolezenso copfunda cako." 
Matthew5:41 Ndipo 12 amene akakukakamiza kumperekeza njira imodzi, upite naye ziwiri." 
Matthew5:42 Kwa iye wopempha iwe umpatse, ndipo kwa iye 13 wofuna kukukongola usampotolokere." 
Matthew5:43 Munamva kuti kunanenedwa, 14 Uzikondana ndi mnansi wako, ndi kumuda mdani wako:" 
Matthew5:44 koma Ine ndinena kwa inu, 15 Kondanani nao adani anu, ndi 16 kupempherera iwo akuzunza inu;" 
Matthew5:45 kotero kuti mukakhale ana a Atate wanu wa Kumwamba; cifukwa Iye amakwezera dzuwa lace pa oipa ndi pa abwino, namabvumbitsira mvula pa olungama ndi pa osalungama." 
Matthew5:46 Cifukwa kuti 17 ngati muwakonda akukondana ndi inu mphotho yanji muli nayo? kodi angakhale amisonkho sacita comweco? 
Matthew5:47 Ndipo ngati mulankhula abale anu okha okha, mucitanji coposa ena? Kodi angakhale anthu akunja sacita comweco?" 
Matthew5:48 Cifukwa cace inu 18 mukhale angwiro, monga Atate wanu wa Kumwamba ali wangwiro." 
Matthew6:1 Yang'anirani kuti musacite zolungama zanu pamaso pa anthu kuti muonekere kwa iwo; pakuti ngati mutero mulibe mphotho ndi Atate wanu wa Kumwamba. 
Matthew6:2 Cifukwa cace pamene pali ponse upatsa mphatso zacifundo, usamaomba lipenga patsogolo pako, monga amacita onyenga m'masunagoge, ndi m'makwalala, kotero kuti atamandidwe ndi anthu. Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Iwo alandiriratu mphotho zao." 
Matthew6:3 Koma iwe popatsa mphatso zacifundo, dzanja lako lamanzere lisadziwe cimene licita dzanja lako lamanja;" 
Matthew6:4 kotero kuti mphatso zako zacifundo zikhale zam'tseri; ndipo Atate wako wakuona m'tseri adzakubwezera iwe. 
Matthew6:5 Ndipo pamene mupemphera, musakhale monga onyengawo; cifukwa iwo akonda kuimirira ndi kupemphera m'masunagoge, ndi pa mphambano za makwalala, kuti aonekere kwa anthu. Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Iwo alandiriratu mphotho zao." 
Matthew6:6 Koma iwe popemphera, Iowa m'cipinda cako, nutseke citseko cako, nupemphere Atate wako ali m'tseri, ndipo Atate wako wakuona m'tseri adzakubwezera iwe." 
Matthew6:7 Ndipo popemphera musabwereze-bwereze cabe iai, monga amacita anthu akunja, cifukwa ayesa kuti adzamvedwa ndi kulankhula-lankhula kwao." 
Matthew6:8 Cifukwa cace inu musafanane nao: pakuti Atate wanu adziwa zomwe muzisowa, inu musanayambe kupempha Iye." 
Matthew6:9 Cifukwa cace pempherani inu comweci: Atate wathu wa Kumwamba, Dzina lanu liyeretsedwe." 
Matthew6:10 Ufumu wanu udze. Kufuna kwanu kucitidwe, monga Kumwamba comweco pansi pano." 
Matthew6:11 Mutipatse ife lero cakudya cathu calero. 
Matthew6:12 Ndipo mutikhululukire mangawa athu, monga ifenso takhululukira amangawa anthu." 
Matthew6:13 Ndipo musatitengere kokatiyesa, koma mutipulumutse kwa woipayo." 
Matthew6:14 Pakuti ngati mukhululukira anthu zolakwa zao adzakhululukira inunso Atate wanu wa Kumwamba. 
Matthew6:15 Koma ngati simukhululukira anthu zolakwa zao, Atate wanunso sadzakhululukira zolakwa zanu." 
Matthew6:16 Ndipo pamene ponse musala kudya, musakhale ndi nkhope yacisoni, ngati onyengawo; pakuti aipitsa nkhope zao, kuti aonekere kwa anthu kuti alimkusala kudya. Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Iwo alandiriratu mphotho zao." 
Matthew6:17 Koma iwe, posala kudya, dzola mutu wako, ndi kusamba nkhope yako:" 
Matthew6:18 kuti usaonekere kwa anthu kuti ulikusala kudya, koma kwa Atate wako ali m'tseri: ndipo Atate wako wakuona m'tseri adzakubwezera iwe." 
Matthew6:19 Musadzikundikire nokha cuma pa dziko lapansi, pamene njenjete ndi dzimbiri ziononga; ndi pamene mbala ziboola ndi kuba:" 
Matthew6:20 koma mudzikundikire nokha cuma m'Mwamba, pamene njenjete kapena dzimbiri siziononga, ndipo mbala siziboola ndi kuba;" 
Matthew6:21 pakuti kumene kuli cuma cako, komwe udzakhala mtima wakonso." 
Matthew6:22 Diso ndilo nyali ya thupi; cifukwa cace ngati diso lako liri la kumodzi, thupi lako lonse lidzakhala lowalitsidwa." 
Matthew6:23 Koma ngati diso lako liri loipa, thupi lako lonse lidzakhala lodetsedwa. Cifukwa cace ngati kuwala kumene kuli mwa inu kuli mdima, mdimawo ndi waukuru ndithu!" 
Matthew6:24 Palibe munthu angathe kukhala kapolo wa ambuye awiri: pakuti pena adzamuda mmodziyo, ndi kukonda winayo; pena adzakangamira kwa mmodzi, nadzanyoza wina. Simungathe kukhala kapolo wa Mulungu ndi wa Cuma." 
Matthew6:25 Cifukwa cace ndinena kwa inu, Musadere nkhawa moyo wanu, cimene mudzadya ndi cimene mudzamwa; kapena thupi lanu, cimene mudzabvala. Kodi moyo suli woposa cakudya, ndi thupi loposa cobvala?" 
Matthew6:26 Yang'anirani mbalame za kumwamba, kuti sizimafesa ai, kapena sizimatema ai, kapena sizimatutira m'nkhokwe; ndipo Atate wanu wa Kumwamba azidyetsa. Nanga inu mulibe kusiyana nazo kuziposa kodi?" 
Matthew6:27 Ndipo ndani wa inu ndi kudera nkhawa angathe kuonjezera pa msinkhu wace mkono umodzi? 
Matthew6:28 Ndipo muderanji nkhawa ndi cobvala? Tapenyetsani maluwa a kuthengo, makulidwe ao; sagwiritsa nchito, kapena sapota:" 
Matthew6:29 koma ndinena kwa inu, kuti angakhale Solomo mu ulemerero wace wonse sanabvala monga limodzi la amenewa." 
Matthew6:30 Koma ngati Mulungu abveka cotero maudzu a kuthengo, akhala lero, ndi mawa oponyedwa pamoto, nanga si inu kopambana ndithu, inu akukhulupirira pang'ono?" 
Matthew6:31 Cifukwa cace musadere nkhawa, ndi kuti, Tidzadya ciani? kapena, Tidzamwa ciani? kapena, Tidzabvala ciani?" 
Matthew6:32 Pakuti anthu akunja azifunitsa zonse zimenezo; pakuti Atate wanu wa Kumwamba adziwa kuti musowa zonse zimenezo. 
Matthew6:33 Koma muthange mwafuna Ufumu wace ndi cilungamo cace, ndipo zonse zimenezo zidzaonjezedwa kwa inu." 
Matthew6:34 Cifukwa cace musadere nkhawa za mawa; pakuti mawa adzadzidera nkhawa iwo okha, Zikwanire tsiku zobvuta zace." 
Matthew7:1 Musaweruze, kuti mungaweruzidwe." 
Matthew7:2 Pakuti ndi kuweruza kumene muweruza nako, inunso mudzaweruzidwa; ndipo ndi muyeso umene muyesa nao, kudzayesedwa kwa inunso." 
Matthew7:3 Ndipo upenya bwanji kacitsotso kali m'diso la mbale wako, koma mtanda uli m'diso la iwe mwini suuganizira?" 
Matthew7:4 Kapena udzati bwanji kwa mbale wako, Tandilola ndicotse kacitsotso m'diso lako; ndipo ona, mtandawo ulimo m'diso lakoli." 
Matthew7:5 Wonyenga iwe! tayamba kucotsa m'diso lako mtandawo, ndipo pomwepo udzapenyetsa kucotsa kacitsotso m'diso la mbale wako." 
Matthew7:6 Musamapatsa copatulikaco kwa agaru, ndipo musamaponya ngale zanu patsogolo pa nkhumba, kuti zingazipondereze ndi mapazi ao, ndi potembenuka zingang'ambe inu." 
Matthew7:7 Pemphani, ndipo cidzapatsidwa kwa inu; funani, ndipo mudzapeza; gogodani, ndipo cidzatsegulidwa kwa inu;" 
Matthew7:8 pakuti yense wakupempha alandira; ndi wakufunayo apeza; ndi kwa wogogodayo citsegulldwa. 
Matthew7:9 Kapena munthu ndani wa inu, amene pompempha mwana wace mkate, adzampatsa mwala?" 
Matthew7:10 Kapena pompempha nsomba, adzampatsa iye njoka kodi?" 
Matthew7:11 Comweco, ngati inu, muli oipa, mudziwa kupatsa ana anu mphatso zabwino, kopambana kotani nanga Atate wanu wa Kumwamba adzapatsa zinthu zabwino kwa iwo akumpempha Iye?" 
Matthew7:12 Cifukwa cace zinthu ziri zonse mukafuna kuti anthu acitire inu, inunso muwacitire iwo zotero; pakuti ico ndico cilamulo ndi aneneri." 
Matthew7:13 Lowani pa cipata copapatiza; cifukwa cipata ciri cacikuru, ndi njira yakumuka nayo kukuonongeka iri yotakata; ndipo ali ambiri amene alowa pa ico." 
Matthew7:14 Pakuti cipata ciri copapatiza, ndi icepetsa njirayo yakumuka nayo kumoyo, ndimo akucipeza cimeneco ali owerengeka." 
Matthew7:15 Yang'anirani mupewe aneneri onyenga, amene adza kwa inu ndi zobvala zankhosa, koma m'kati mwao ali afisi alusa." 
Matthew7:16 Mudzawazindikira ndi zipatso zao. Kodi achera mphesa paminga, kapena nkhuyu pamtula?" 
Matthew7:17 Comweco mtengo wabwino uli wonse upatsa zipatso zokoma; koma mtengo wamphuci upatsa zipatso zoipa," 
Matthew7:18 Sungathe mtengo wabwino kupatsa zipatso zoipa, kapena mtengo wamphuci kupatsa zipatso zokoma." 
Matthew7:19 Mtengo uli wonse wosapatsa cipatso cokoma, audula, nautaya kumoto." 
Matthew7:20 Inde comweco pa zipatso zao mudzawazindikira iwo. 
Matthew7:21 Si yense wakunena kwa Ine, Ambuye, Ambuye, adzalowa mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba; koma wakucitayo cifuniro ca Atate wanga wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew7:22 Ambiri adzati kwa Ine tsiku lomwelo, Ambuye, Ambuye, kodi sitinanenera mau m'dzina lanu, ndi m'dzina lanunso kuturutsa mizimu yoipa, ndi kucita m'dzina lanunso zamphamvu zambiri?" 
Matthew7:23 Ndipo pamenepo ndidzafukulira iwo, Sindinakudziwani inu nthawi zonse; cokani kwa Ine, inu akucita kusayeruzika." 
Matthew7:24 Cifukwa cimeneci yense amene akamva mau anga amenewa, ndi kuwacita, ndidzamfanizira iye ndi munthu wocenjera, amene anamanga nyumba yace pathanthwe;" 
Matthew7:25 ndipo inagwa mvula, nidzala mitsinje, ndipo zinaomba mphepo, zinagunda pa nyumbayo; koma siinagwa; cifukwa inakhazikika pathanthwepo." 
Matthew7:26 Ndipo yense akamva mau anga amenewa, ndi kusawacita, adzafanizidwa ndi munthu wopusa, yemwe anamanga nyumba yace pamcenga;" 
Matthew7:27 ndipo inagwa mvula, nidzala mitsinje, ndipo zinaomba mphepo, zinagunda pa nyumbayo; ndipo inagwa; ndi kugwa kwace kunali kwakukuru." 
Matthew7:28 Ndipo panakhala pamene Yesu anatha mau amenewa, makamu a anthu anazizwa ndi ciphunzitso cace:" 
Matthew7:29 pakuti anawaphunzitsa monga mwini mphamvu, wosanga alembiao." 
Matthew8:1 Ndipo pakutsika pace paphiripo, inamtsata mipingo yambiri ya anthu." 
Matthew8:2 Ndipo onani, wakhate anadza namgwadira Iye, nanena, Ambuye ngati mufuna mungathe kundikonza." 
Matthew8:3 Ndipo Yesu anatambalitsa dzanja lace, namkhudza iye, nati, Ndifuna; takonzedwa. Ndipo pomwepo khate lace linacoka." 
Matthew8:4 Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Ona, iwe, usauze munthu; koma muka, udzionetse wekha kwa wansembe, nupereke mtulo umene anaulamulira Mose, ukhale mboni kwaiwo." 
Matthew8:5 Ndipo m'mene Iye analowa m'Kapernao anadza kwa Iye kenturiyo, nampemba Iye," 
Matthew8:6 nati, Ambuye, mnyamata wanga ali gone m'nyumba wodwala manjenje, wozunzidwa koopsa," 
Matthew8:7 Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Ndifika Ine, ndidzamciritsa iye." 
Matthew8:8 Koma kenturiyoyo anabvomera nati, Ambuye, sindiyenera kuti mukalowe pansi pa chindwi langa iai; koma mungonena mau, ndipo adzaciritsidwa mnyamata wanga." 
Matthew8:9 Pakuti inenso ndiri munthu wakumvera ulamuliro, ndiri nao asilikari akundimvera ine: ndipo ndinena kwa uyu, Muka, namuka; ndi kwa wina, Idza, nadza; ndi kwa kapolo wanga, Cita ici, nacita." 
Matthew8:10 Ndipo pakumva ici, Yesu anazizwa, nati kwa iwo akumtsata, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, ngakhale mwa Israyeli, sindinapeza cikhulupiriro cotere." 
Matthew8:11 Ndipo ndinena ndi inu, kuti ambiri a kum'mawa ndi a kumadzulo adzafika, nadzakhala pamodzi ndi Abrahamu, ndi Isake, ndi Yakobo, mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba;" 
Matthew8:12 koma anawo a Ufumu adzatayidwa ku mdima wakunja; komweko kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano. 
Matthew8:13 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa kenturiyoyo, Pita, kukhale kwa iwe monga unakhulupirira. Ndipo anaciritsidwa mnyamatayo nthawi yomweyo." 
Matthew8:14 Ndipo pofika Yesu ku nyumba ya Petro, anaona mpongozi wace ali gone, alikudwala malungo." 
Matthew8:15 Ndipo anamkhudza dzanja lace, ndipo malungo anamleka mkaziyo; ndipo anauka, namtumikira Iye." 
Matthew8:16 Ndipo pakudza madzulo, anabwera nao kwa Iye anthu ambiri ogwidwa ndi mizimu yoipa; ndipo Iye anaturutsa mizimuyo ndi mau, naciritsa akudwala onse;" 
Matthew8:17 kotero kuti cikwaniridwe conenedwa ndi Yesaya mneneri, kuti, Iye yekha anatenga zofoka zathu, Nanyamula nthenda zathu." 
Matthew8:18 Ndipo Yesu, poona makamu ambiri a anthu akumzungulira Iye, analamulira ophunzira amuke ku tsidya lina," 
Matthew8:19 Ndipo anadza munthu mlembi, nati kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, ndidzakutsatani Inu kuli konse mumukako." 
Matthew8:20 Ndipo Yesu ananena kwa iye, Ankhandwe ali nazo nkhwimba zao, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga zisa zao, koma Mwana wa munthu alibe potsamira mutu wace." 
Matthew8:21 Ndipo wina wa ophunzira ace anati kwa Iye, Ambuye, mundilole ine nditange ndamuka kuika maliro a atate wanga." 
Matthew8:22 Koma Yesu ananena kwa iye, Tsata Ine, nuleke akufa aike akufa ao." 
Matthew8:23 Ndipo pamene Iye atalowa m'ngalawa, ophunzira ace anamtsata Iye." 
Matthew8:24 Ndipo onani, m panauka namondwe wamkuru panyanja, kotero kuti ngalawa inapfundidwa ndi mafunde: koma Iye anali m'tulo." 
Matthew8:25 Ndipo iwo anadza, namuutsa Iye, nanena, Ambuye, tipulumutseni, tirikutayika." 
Matthew8:26 Ndipo ananena Iye kwa iwo, Muli amantha bwanji, okhulupirira pang'ono inu? Pomwepo Iye anauka, nadzudzula mphepo ndi nyanja, ndipo panagwa bata lalikuru." 
Matthew8:27 Ndipo anazizwa anthuwo nanena, Ndiye munthu wotani uyu, pakuti ngakhale mphepo ndi nyanja zimvera Iye?" 
Matthew8:28 Ndipo pofika Iye ku tsidya lina, ku dziko la Agadara, anakomana naye awiri ogwidwa ndi ziwanda, akuturuka kumanda, aukali ndithu, kotero kuti sangathe kupitapa munthu pa njira imeneyo." 
Matthew8:29 Ndipo onani, anapfuula nati, Tiri nanu ciani, inu Mwana wa Mulungu? mwadza kuno kodi kutizunza ife, nthawi yace siinafike?" 
Matthew8:30 Ndipo panali patari ndi iwo gulu la nkhumba zambiri zirinkudya. 
Matthew8:31 Ndipo mizimuyo inampempha Iye ninena, Ngati mutiturutsa, mutitumize ife tilowe m'gulu la nkhumbazo." 
Matthew8:32 Ndipo anati kwa iyo, Mukani. Ndipo inaturuka, nimuka, kukalowa m'nkhumbazo; ndipo onani, gulu lonse linathamangira kunsi kuphompho m'nyanjamo, ndipo linafa m'madzi." 
Matthew8:33 Koma akuziweta anathawa, namuka kumidzi, nauza zonse, ndi zakuti zao za aziwanda aja." 
Matthew8:34 Ndipo onani, mudzi wonse unaturukira kukakumana naye Yesu, ndipo m'mene anamuona Iye, anampempha kuti acoke m'malire ao." 
Matthew9:1 Ndipo Iye analowa m'ngalawa, naoloka, nadza kumudzi kwao." 
Matthew9:2 Ndipo onani, anabwera naye kwa Iye munthu wamanjenje, wakugona pachika: ndipo Yesu pakuona cikhulupiriro cao, anati kwa wodwalayo, Limba mtima, mwana, macimo ako akhululukidwa." 
Matthew9:3 Ndipo onani, ena a alembi ananena mumtima mwao, Uyu acitira Mulungu mwano." 
Matthew9:4 Ndipo Yesu, pozindikira maganizo ao, anati, Cifukwa canji mulinkuganizira zoipam'mitimayanu?" 
Matthew9:5 pakuti capafupi nciti, kunena, Macimo ako akhululukidwa; kapena kunena, Tanyamuka nuyende?" 
Matthew9:6 Koma kuti mudziwe kuti ali nazo mphamvu Mwana wa munthu pansi pano za kukhululukira macimo (pomwepo ananena kwa wodwalayo), Tanyamuka, nutenge chika lako, numuke kunyumba kwako." 
Matthew9:7 Ndipo ananyamuka, napita ku nyumba kwace." 
Matthew9:8 Ndipo m'mene anthu a makamu anaciona, anaopa, nalemekeza Mulungu, wakupatsa anthu mphamvu yotere." 
Matthew9:9 Ndipo Yesu popita, kucokera kumeneko, anaona munthu, dzina lace Mateyu, alinkukhala polandirira msonkho, nanena kwa iye, Nditsate Ine. Ndipo iye anauka, namtsata." 
Matthew9:10 Ndipo panali pamene Iye analinkukhala pacakudya m'nyumba, onani, amisonkho ndi ocimwa ambiri anadza nakhala pansi pamodzi ndi Yesu ndi ophunzira ace." 
Matthew9:11 Ndipo Afarisi, pakuona ici, ananena kwa ophunzira ace, Cifukwa ninji Mphunzitsi wanu alinkudya pamodzi ndi amisonkho ndi ocimwa?" 
Matthew9:12 Ndipo m'mene Yesu anamva anati, Olimba safuna sing'anga ai, koma odwala." 
Matthew9:13 Koma mukani muphunzire nciani ici: Ndifuna cifundo, si nsembe ai; pakuti sindinadza kudzaitana olungama, koma ocimwa." 
Matthew9:14 Pomwepo anadza kwa Iye ophunzira ace a Yohane, nati, Cifukwa ninji ife ndi Afarisi tisala kudya kawiri kawiri, koma ophunzira anu sasala?" 
Matthew9:15 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Nanga anyamata a nyumba ya ukwati angathe kulira kodi nthawi imene mkwati akhala nao? koma adzafika masiku, pamene mkwati adzacotsedwa kwa iwo, ndipo pomwepo adzasala kudya." 
Matthew9:16 Ndipo kulibe munthu aphathika cigamba ca nsaru yaiwisi pa copfunda cakale; pakuti cigamba cace cizomoka ku copfundaco, ndipo cicita ciboo cacikuru." 
Matthew9:17 Kapena samathira vinyo watsopano m'matumba akale; akatero, matumba aphulika, ndi vinyo atayika, ndi matumba aonongeka: koma athira vinyo watsopano m'matumba atsopano, ndi zonse ziwiri zisungika." 
Matthew9:18 M'mene Iye analikulankhula nao zinthu zimenezo, onani, anadza munthu mkuru, namgwadira Iye, nanena, Wamwalira tsopanolimwana wanga wamkazi, komatu mudze muike dzanja lanu pa iye, ndipo adzakhala ndi moyo." 
Matthew9:19 Ndipo Yesu ananyamuka namtsata iye, ndi ophunzira ace omwe." 
Matthew9:20 Ndipo onani, mkazi, anali ndi nthenda yacidwalire zaka khumi ndi ziwiri, anadza pambuyo pace, nakhudza mphonje ya copfundacace;" 
Matthew9:21 pakuti analikunena mwa iye yekha, Ngati ndingakhudze copfunda cace cokha ndidzacira." 
Matthew9:22 Koma Yesu potembenuka ndi kuona iye anati, Limba mtima, mwana wamkaziwe, cikhulupiriro cako cakuciritsa. Ndipo mkaziyo anacira kuyambira nthawi yomweyo." 
Matthew9:23 Ndipo Yesu polowa m'nyumba yace ya mkuruyo, ndi poona oyimba zitoliro ndi khamu la anthu obuma," 
Matthew9:24 ananena, Turukani, pakuti kabuthuko sikanafa koma kali m'tulo. Ndipo anamseka Iye pwepwete." 
Matthew9:25 Koma pamene khamulo linaturutsidwa, Iye analowamo, nagwira dzanja lace; ndipo kabuthuko kadauka." 
Matthew9:26 Ndipo mbiri yace imene inabuka m'dziko lonse limenelo. 
Matthew9:27 Ndipo popita Yesu kucokera kumeneko, anamtsata Iye anthu awiri akhungu, opfuula ndi kuti, Muticitire ife cifundo, mwana wa Davide." 
Matthew9:28 Ndipo m'mene Iye analowa m'nyumbamo, akhunguwo anadza kwa Iye; ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Mukhulupirira kodi kuti ndikhoza kucita ici? Anena kwa Iye, Inde, Ambuye." 
Matthew9:29 Pomwepo anakhudza maso ao, nati, Cicitidwe kwa inu monga cikhulupiriro canu." 
Matthew9:30 Ndipo maso ao anaphenyuka. Ndipo Yesu anawauzitsa Iwo, nanena, Yang'anirani, asadziwe munthu ali yense." 
Matthew9:31 Koma iwo anaturukamo, nabukitsa mbiri yace m'dziko lonselo." 
Matthew9:32 Ndipo pamene iwo analikuturuka, onani, anabwera naye kwa Iye munthu wosalankhula, wogwidwa ndi ciwanda." 
Matthew9:33 Ndipo m'mene cinaturutsidwa ciwandaco, wosalankhulayo analankhula, ndipo makamu a anthu anazizwa, nanena, Kale lonse sicinaoneke comweco mwa Israyeli." 
Matthew9:34 Koma Afarisi analinkunena, Aturutsa ziwanda ndi mphamvu zace za mfumu ya ziwanda." 
Matthew9:35 Ndipo Yesu anayendayenda m'mizinda yonse ndi m'midzi, namaphunzitsa m'masunagoge mwao, nalalikira uthenga wabwino wa Ufumuwo, naciritsa nthenda iri yonse ndi zofoka zonse." 
Matthew9:36 Koma Iye, poona makamuwo, anagwidwa m'mtima ndi cisoni cifukwa ca iwo, popeza anali okambululudwa ndi omwazikana, akunga nkhosa zopanda mbusa." 
Matthew9:37 Pomwepo ananena kwa ophunzira ace, Zotuta zicurukadi koma anchito ali owerengeka." 
Matthew9:38 Cifukwa cace pempherani Mwini zotuta kuti akokose anchito kukututakwace. 
Matthew10:1 Ndipo pamene Iye anadziitanira ophunzira ace khumi ndi awiri, anapatsa iwo mphamvu pa mizimu yoipa, yakuiturutsa, ndi yakuciza nthenda iri yonse ndi zofoka zonse." 
Matthew10:2 Ndipo maina ao a atumwiwo khumi ndi awiri ndi awa: woyamba Simoni wochedwa Petro, ndi Andreya mbale wace; Yakobo mwana wa Zebedayo, ndi Yohane mbale wace;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipo, ndi Bartolomeyo; Tomasi, ndi Mateyu wamsonkhoyo; Yakobo mwana wa Alifeyo, ndi Tadeyo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simoni Mkanani, ndi Yudasi Isikariote amenenso anampereka Iye." 
Matthew10:5 Awa amene, khumi ndi awiriwa, Yesu anawatumiza, nawalangiza ndi kuti, Musapite ku njira ya kwa anthu akunja, ndi m'mudzi wa Asamariya musamalowamo:" 
Matthew10:6 koma makamaka mupite ku nkhosa zosokera za banja la Israyeli. 
Matthew10:7 Ndipo pamene mulikupita lalikani kuti, Ufumu wa Kumwamba wayandikira." 
Matthew10:8 Ciritsani akudwala, ukitsani akufa, konzani akhate, turutsani ziwanda: munalandira kwaulere, patsani kwaulere." 
Matthew10:9 Musadzitengere ndalama zagolidi, kapena zasiliva, kapena zakobiri m'malamba mwanu;" 
Matthew10:10 kapena thumba la kamba la kunjira, kapena malaya awiri, kapena nsapato, kapena ndodo; pakuti wanchito ayenera kulandira zakudya zace." 
Matthew10:11 Ndipo m'mzinda uliwonse, kapena m'mudzi mukalowamo, mufunsitse amene ali woyenera momwemo; ndipo bakhalani komweko kufikira muturukamo." 
Matthew10:12 Ndipo polowa m'nyumba muwalankhule. 
Matthew10:13 Ndipo ngati nyumbayo iri yoyenera, mtendere wanu udze pa iyo, koma ngati siiri yoyenera, mtendere wanu ubwerere kwa inu." 
Matthew10:14 Ndipo yemwe sadzakulandirani inu, kapena kusamva mau anu, pamene mulikuturuka m'nyumbayo, kapena m'mudzimo, sansani pfumbi m'mapazi anu." 
Matthew10:15 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti, tsiku la kuweruza, mlandu wao wa Sodomu ndi Gomora udzacepa ndi wace wa mudzi umenewo." 
Matthew10:16 Taonani, Ine ndikutumizani inu monga nkhosa pakati pa afisi; cifukwa cace khalani ocenjera monga njoka, ndi oona mtima monga nkhunda." 
Matthew10:17 Koma cenjerani ndi anthu; pakuti adzakuperekani inu kwa akuru a mlandu, nadzakukwapulani inu m'masunagoge mwao;" 
Matthew10:18 Ndiponso adzamuka nanu kwa akazembe ndi mafumu cifukwa ca Ine, kukhala mboni ya kwa iwo, ndi kwa anthu akunja." 
Matthew10:19 Koma pamene pali ponse angakuperekeni inu, musamadera nkhawa mudzalankhule bwanji kapena mudzanene ciani; pakuti cimene mudzacilankhula, cidzapatsidwa kwa inu nthawi yomweyo;" 
Matthew10:20 pakuti wolankhula si ndinu, koma Mzimu wa Atate wanu akulankhula mwa inu." 
Matthew10:21 Ndipo mbale adzapereka mbale wace kuimfa, ndi atate mwana wace: ndipo ana adzatsutsa akuwabala, nadzawafetsa iwo." 
Matthew10:22 Ndipo adzada inu anthu onse cifukwa ca dzina langa; koma iye wakupirira kufikira cimariziro, iyeyu adzapulumutsidwa." 
Matthew10:23 Koma pamene angakuzunzeni inu m'mudzi uwu, thawirani mwina: indetu ndinena kwa inu, Simudzaitha mizinda ya Israyeli, kufikira Mwana wa munthu atadza." 
Matthew10:24 Wophunzira saposa mphunzitsi wace, kapena kapolo saposa mbuye wace." 
Matthew10:25 Kumkwanira wophunzira kuti akhale monga mphunzitsi wace, ndi kapolo monga mbuye. Ngati anamucha mwini banja Beelzebule, sadzaposa kodi kuwatero apabanja ace?" 
Matthew10:26 Cifukwa cace musaopa iwo; pakuti palibe kanthu kanabvundikiridwa, kamene sikadzaululidwa; kapena kanthu kobisika, kamene sikadzadziwika." 
Matthew10:27 Cimene ndikuuzani inu mumdima, tacinenani poyera; ndi cimene mucimva m'khutu, mucilalikire pa macindwi nyumba." 
Matthew10:28 Ndipo musamaopa amene akupha thupi, koma moyo sangathe kuupha; koma makamaka muope Iye, wokhoza kuononga moyo ndi thupi lomwe m'gehena." 
Matthew10:29 Kodi mpheta ziwiri sizigulidwa kakobiri? ndipo imodzi ya izo siigwa pansi popanda Atate wanu: 
Matthew10:30 komatu inu, matsitsi onse a m'mutu mwanu awerengedwa." 
Matthew10:31 Cifukwa cace musamaopa; inu mupambana mpheta zambiri. 
Matthew10:32 Cifukwa cace yense amene adzabvomereza Ine pamaso pa anthu, Inenso nelidzambvomereza iye pamaso pa Atate wanga wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew10:33 Koma 1 yense amene adzandikana Ine pamaso pa anthu, Inenso nelidzamkana iye pamaso pa Atate wanga wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew10:34 2 Musalingalire kuti nelidadzera kuponya mtendere pa dziko lapansi; sinelinadzera kuponya mtendere, koma lupanga." 
Matthew10:35 3 Pakuti ndinadza kusiyanitsa munthu ndi atate wace, ndi mwana wamkazi ndi amace, ndi mkazi wokwatiwa ndi mpongozi wace:" 
Matthew10:36 ndipo 4 apabanja ace a munthu adzakhala adani ace. 
Matthew10:37 5 Iye wakukonda atate wace, kapena amace koposa Ine, sayenera Ine, ndipo iye wakukonda mwana wace wamwamuna, kapena wamkazi koposa Ine, sayenera Ine." 
Matthew10:38 Ndipo 6 iye amene satenga mtanda wace, natsata pambuyo panga, sayenera Ine." 
Matthew10:39 7 Iye amene apeza moyo wace, adzautaya; ndi iye amene ataya moyo wace, cifukwa ca Ine, adzaupeza." 
Matthew10:40 8 Iye wakulandira inu, andilandira Ine, ndi wakundilandira Ine, amlandira Iye amene ananditumiza Ine." 
Matthew10:41 9 Iye wakulandira mneneri, pa dzina la mneneri, adzalandira mphotho ya mneneri; ndipo wakulandira munthu wolungama, pa dzina la munthu wolungama, adzalandira mphotho ya munthu wolungama." 
Matthew10:42 Ndipo 10 amenealiyense adzamwetsa mmodzi wa ang'ono awa cikho cokha ca madzi ozizira, pa dzina la wophunzira, indetu ndinena kwa inu, iye sadzataya mphotho yace." 
Matthew11:1 Ndipo panali, pamene Yesu anatha kuwafotokozera ophunzira ace khumi Ndi awiri, Iye anacokera kumeneko kukaphunzitsa Ndi kulalikira m'midzi mwao." 
Matthew11:2 Koma Yohane, pakumva m'nyumba yandende nchito za Kristu, anatumiza ophunzira ace mau," 
Matthew11:3 nati kwa Iye, Inu ndinu wakudza kodi, kapena tiyembekezere wina?" 
Matthew11:4 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nanena nao, Mukani mubwezere mau kwa Yohane zimene muzimva ndi kuziona:" 
Matthew11:5 akhungu alandira kuona kwao, Ndi opunduka miyendo ayenda, akhate akonzedwa, indi ogontha akumva, ndi akufa aukitsidwa, ndi kwa aumphawi ulalikidwa uthenga wabwino." 
Matthew11:6 Ndipo wodala iye amene sakhumudwa cifukwa ca Ine. 
Matthew11:7 Ndipo m'mene iwo analikumuka, Yesu anayambonena Ndi makamu a anthu za kwa Yohane, Munaturuka kunka kucipululu kukapenyanji? Bango logwedezeka nd: mphepo kodi?" 
Matthew11:8 Koma munaturuka kukaona ciani? Munthu wobvala zofewa kodi? Onani, akubvala zofewa alim'nyumba zamafumu." 
Matthew11:9 Koma munaturukiranji? Kukaona mneneri kodi? Indetu, ndinena kwa inu, wakuposa mneneri." 
Matthew11:10 Uyu ndiye amene kunalembedwa za iye, kuti, Onani Ine nditumiza mthenga wanga pa nkhope yanu, Amene adzakonza njira yanu m'tsogolo mwanu." 
Matthew11:11 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Sanauke wakubadwa mwa akazi munthu wamkuru woposa Yohane Mbatizi; koma iye amene ali wocepa mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba amkulira iye." 
Matthew11:12 Ndipo kuyambira masiku a Yohane Mbatizi, kufikira tsopano lino, Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wokangamizidwa, ndipo okangamirawo aukwatula ndi mphamvu." 
Matthew11:13 Pakuti aneneri onse ndi cilamulo cinanenera kufikira pa Yohane. 
Matthew11:14 Ndipo ngati mufuna kulandira, uyu ndiye Eliya amene amati akudza." 
Matthew11:15 Amene ali ndi makutu akumva, amve." 
Matthew11:16 Koma ndidzafanizira ndi ciani obadwa awa a makono? Ali ofanana ndi ana akukhala m'mabwalo a malonda, amene alikuitana anzao," 
Matthew11:17 ndi kuti, Tinakulizirani inu zitoliro, ndipo inu simunabvina; tinabuma maliro, ndipo inu simunalira." 
Matthew11:18 Pakuti Yohane anadza wosadya, wosamwa, ndipo iwo amati, Ali ndi ciwanda." 
Matthew11:19 Mwana wa munthu anadza wakudya, ndi wakumwa, ndipo iwo amati, Onani munthu wakudyaidya ndi wakumwaimwa vinyo, bwenzi la amisonkho ndi ocimwa! Ndipo nzeru iyesedwa yolungama ndi nchito zace." 
Matthew11:20 Pomwepo Iye anayamba kutonza midziyo, m'mene zinacitidwa zambiri za nchito zamphamvu zace, cifukwa kuti siinatembenuke." 
Matthew11:21 Tsoka kwa iwe, Korazini! tsoka kwa iwe, Betsaida! cifukwa ngati zamphamvu zimene zacitidwa mwa inu zikadacitidwa m'Turo ndi m'Sidoni, akadatembenuka mtima kale kale m'ziguduli ndi m'phulusa." 
Matthew11:22 Komanso ndinena kwa inu kuti dzuwa la kuweruza mlandu wao wa Turo ndi Sidoni udzacepa ndi wanu. 
Matthew11:23 Ndipo iwe, Kapernao, udzakwezedwa kodi kufikira kuthambo? udzatsika kufikira ku dziko la akufa: cifukwa ngati zamphamvu zimene zacitidwa mwa iwe zikadacitidwa m'Sodomu, uyo ukadakhala kufikira lero." 
Matthew11:24 Komanso ndinena kwa im kuti dzuwa la kuweruza, mlandu wace wa Sodomu udzacepa ndi wako." 
Matthew11:25 Nyengo imeneyo Yesu anayankha nati, Ndibvomerezana ndi Inu, Atate, Mwini Kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi, kuti munazibisira izo kwa anzeru ndi akudziwitsa, ndipo munaziululira zomwe kwa makanda:" 
Matthew11:26 etu, Atate, cifukwa cotero cinakhala cokondweretsa pamaso panu." 
Matthew11:27 Zinthu zonse zinaperekedwa kwa Ine ndi Atate wanga; ndipo palibe munthu adziwa Mwana, koma Atate yekha; ndi palibe wina adziwa Atate, koma M wana yekha, ndi iye amene Mwana afuna kumuululira." 
Matthew11:28 Idzani kuno kwa Ine nonsenu akulema ndi akuthodwa, ndipo Ine ndidzakupumulitsani inu." 
Matthew11:29 Senzani gori langa, ndipo phunzirani kwa Ine; cifukwa ndiri wofatsa ndi wodzicepetsa mtima: ndipo mudzapeza mpumulo wa miyoyo yanu." 
Matthew11:30 Pakuti 1 gori langa liri lofewa, ndi katundu wanga ali wopepuka." 
Matthew12:1 Nyengo imeneyo Yesu anapita tsiku la Sabata pakati pa minda ya tirigu; ndipo ophunzira ace anali ndi njala, nayamba kubudula ngala, nadya." 
Matthew12:2 Koma Afarisi, pakuona, anati kwa Iye, Tapenyani, ophunzira anu acita cosaloleka tsiku la Sabata." 
Matthew12:3 Koma Iye anati kwa iwo, Kodi simunawerenga cimene anacicita Davide, pamene anali ndi njala, ndi iwo amene anali naye?" 
Matthew12:4 kuti analowa m'nyumba ya Mulungu, nadya mikate yoonetsa, imene yosaloleka kudya iye kapena amene anali naye, koma ansembe okha okha." 
Matthew12:5 Kapena simunawerenga kodi m'cilamulo, kuti tsiku la Sabata ansembe m'Kacisi amaipitsa tsiku la Sabata, nakhala opanda cimo?" 
Matthew12:6 Koma ndinena kwa inu, kuti wakuposa Kacisiyo ali pompano." 
Matthew12:7 Koma mukadadziwa nciani ici: Ndifuna cifundo, si nsembe ai; simukadaweruza olakwa iwo osacimwa," 
Matthew12:8 pakuti Mwana wa munthu ali mwini tsiku la Sabata. 
Matthew12:9 Ndipo Iye anacokera pamenepo, nalowa m'sunagoge mwao;" 
Matthew12:10 ndipo onani, munali munthu wa dzanja lopuwala, Ndipo anamfunsitsa Iye, ndi kuti, Nkuloleka kodi kuciritsa tsiku la Sabata? kuti ampalamulitse mlandu." 
Matthew12:11 Koma Iye anati kwa iwo, Munthu ndani wa inu, amene ali nayo nkhosa imodzi, ndipo ngati idzagwa m'dzenje tsiku la Sabata, kodi sadzaigwira, ndi kuiturutsa?" 
Matthew12:12 Nanga kuposa kwace kwa munthu ndi nkhosa nkotani! Cifukwa ca ici nkuloleka kucita zabwino tsiku la Sabata. 
Matthew12:13 Pomwepo ananena Iye kwa munthuyo, Tansa dzanja Lako. Ndipo iye analitansa, ndipo linabwezedwa lamoyo longa linzace." 
Matthew12:14 Ndipo Afarisi anaturuka, nakhala upo womcitira Iye mwa kumuononga." 
Matthew12:15 Koma Yesu m'mene anadziwa, anacokera kumeneko: ndipo anamtsata Iye anthu ambiri; ndipo Iye anawaciritsa iwo onse," 
Matthew12:16 nawalimbitsira mau kuti asamuulule Iye; 
Matthew12:17 kuti cikacitidwe conenedwa ndi Yesaya mneneri uja, kuti," 
Matthew12:18 Taona mnyamata wanga, amene ndinamsankha, Wokondedwa wanga, amene moyo wanga ukondwera naye; Pa Iye ndidzaika Mzimu wanga, Ndipo Iye adzalalikira ciweruzo kwa akunja." 
Matthew12:19 Sadzalimbana, sadzapfuula; Ngakhale mmodzi sadzamva mau ace m'makwalala;" 
Matthew12:20 Bango lophwanyika sadzalityola, Ndi nyali yofuka sadzaizima, Kufikira Iye adzatumiza ciweruzo cikagonjetse," 
Matthew12:21 Ndipo akunja adzakhulupirira dzina lace. 
Matthew12:22 Pomwepo anabwera naye kwa Iye munthu wogwidwa ndi ciwanda, wakhungu ndi wosalankhula; ndipo Iye anamciritsa, kotero kuti wosalankhulayo analankhula, napenya." 
Matthew12:23 Ndipo makamu onse a anthu anazizwa, nanena, Uyu si mwana wa Davide kodi?" 
Matthew12:24 Koma Afarisi pakumva, anati, Uyu samaturutsa ziwanda koma ndi mphamvu yace ya Beelzebule, mkuru wa ziwanda." 
Matthew12:25 Ndipo Yesu anadziwa maganizo ao, nati kwa iwo, Ufumu uti wonse wogawanika pa wokha sukhalira kupasuka, ndi mudzi uti wonse kapena banja logawanika pa lokha silidzakhala;" 
Matthew12:26 ndipo ngati Satana amaturutsa Satana, iye agawanika pa yekha; ndipo udzakhala bwanji ufumu wace?" 
Matthew12:27 Ndipo ngati Ine ndimaturutsa ziwanda ndi mphamvu yace ya Beelzebule, ana anu amaziturutsa ndi mphamvu ya yani? cifukwa cace iwo adzakhala oweruza anu." 
Matthew12:28 Koma ngati Ine ndimaturutsa ziwanda ndi mphamvu yace ya Mzimu wa Mulungu, pomwepo Ufumu wa Mulungu unafika pa inu." 
Matthew12:29 Kapena akhoza bwanji munthu kulowa m'banja la munthu wolimba, ndi kufunkha akatundu ace, ngati iye sayamba kumanga munthu wolimbayo? ndipo pamenepo adzafunkha za m'banja lace." 
Matthew12:30 Iye wosakhala pamodzi ndi Ine akana Ine, ndi iye wosasonkhanitsa pamodzi ndi Ine amwazamwaza." 
Matthew12:31 Cifukwa cace ndinena kwa inu, Macimo onse, ndi zonena zonse zamwano, zidzakhululukidwa kwa anthu; koma camwano ca pa Mzimu Woyera sicidzakhululukidwa." 
Matthew12:32 Ndipo amene ali yense anganenere Mwana wa munthu zoipa, adzakhululukidwa; koma amene ali yense anganenere Mzimu Woyera zoipa sadzakhululukidwa nthawi yino kapena irinkudzayo." 
Matthew12:33 Ukakoma mtengo, cipatso cace comwe cikoma; ukaipa mtengo, cipatso cace comwe ciipa; pakuti ndi cipatso cace mtengo udziwika." 
Matthew12:34 Akubadwa inu a njoka, mungathe bwanji kulankhula zabwino, inu akukhala oipa? pakuti m'kamwa mungolankhula mwa kusefuka kwace kwa mtima." 
Matthew12:35 Munthu wabwino aturutsa zabwino m'cuma cace cabwino, ndi munthu woipa aturutsa zoipa m'cuma cace coipa." 
Matthew12:36 Ndipo ndinena kwa inu, kuti mau onse opanda pace, amene anthu adzalankhula, adzawawerengera mlandu wace tsiku la kuweruza." 
Matthew12:37 Pakuti udzayesedwa wolungama ndi mau ako, ndipo ndi mau ako omwe udzatsutsidwa." 
Matthew12:38 Pomwepo alembi ndi Afarisi ena anayankha Iye nati, Mphunzitsi, tifuna kuona cizindikiro ca Inu." 
Matthew12:39 Koma Iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Akubadwa oipa acigololo afunafuna cizindikiro; ndipo sicidzapatsidwa kwa iwo cizindikiro, komatu cizindikiro ca Yona mneneri;" 
Matthew12:40 pakuti monga Yona anali m'mimba mwa cinsomba masiku atatu ndi usiku wace, comweco Mwana wa munthu adzakhala mumtima mwa dziko lapansi masiku atatu ndi usiku wace." 
Matthew12:41 1 Anthu a ku Nineve adzauka pamlandu pamodzi ndi obadwa amakono, nadzawatsutsa; cifukwa 2 iwo anatembenuka mtima ndi kulalikira kwace kwa Yona; ndipo onani, wakuposa Y ona ali pano." 
Matthew12:42 3 Mfumu yaikazi ya kumwera adzauka pamlandu pamodzi ndi obadwa amakono, nadzawatsutsa; cifukwa iye anacokera ku mathero a dziko lapansi kudzamva nzeru ya Solomo; ndipo onani, wakuposa Solomo ali pano." 
Matthew12:43 Koma mzimu wonyansa, utaturuka mwa munthu, umapitirira malo opanda madzi kufunafuna mpumulo, osaupeza." 
Matthew12:44 Pomwepo unena, ndidzabwerera kunka kunyumba kwanga, konkuja ndinaturukako; ndipo pakufikako uipeza yopanda wokhalamo, yosesedwa ndi yokonzedwa." 
Matthew12:45 Pomwepo upita, nutenga pamodzi ndi uwu mizimu yina inzace isanu ndi iwiri yoipa yoposa mwini yekhayo, ndipo ilowa, nikhalamo. Ndipo 4 matsirizidwe ace a munthu uyo akhala oipa oposa mayambidwe ace. Kotero kudzakhalanso kwa obadwa oipa amakono." 
Matthew12:46 Pamene Iye anali cilankhulire ndi makamu, onani, amace ndi 5 abale ace anaima panja, nafuna kulankhula naye." 
Matthew12:47 Ndipo munthu anati kwa Iye, Onani, amai wanu ndi abale anu aima pabwalo, nafuna kulankhula nanu." 
Matthew12:48 Koma Iye anayankha, nati kwa iye wonenayo, Amai wanga ndani? ndi abale anga ndi ayani?" 
Matthew12:49 Ndipo anatambalitsa dzanja lace pa ophunzira ace, nati, Penyani amai wanga ndi abale anga!" 
Matthew12:50 Pakuti 6 ali yense amene adzacita cifuniro ca Atate wanga wa Kumwamba, yemweyo ndiye mbale wanga, ndi mlongo wanga, ndi amai wanga." 
Matthew13:1 Tsiku lomwelo Yesu anaturuka m'nyumbamo, nakhala pansi m'mbali mwa nyanja." 
Matthew13:2 Ndipo makamu ambiri a anthu anasonkhanira kwa Iye, kotero kuti Iye analowa m'ngalawa, nakhala pansi, ndipo khamu lonse linaima pamtunda." 
Matthew13:3 Ndipo Iye anawauzira zinthu zambiri m'mafanizo, nanena, Onani, wofesa anaturuka kukafesa mbeu," 
Matthew13:4 Ndipo m'kufesa kwace zina zinagwa m'mbali mwa njira, ndipo zinadza mbalame, nizilusira izo." 
Matthew13:5 Koma zina zinagwa pamiyala, pamene panalibe dothi lambiri; ndipo pomwepo zinamera, pakuti sizinakhala nalo dothi lakuya, Ndipo m'mene dzuwa linakwera zinapserera;" 
Matthew13:6 ndipo popeza zinalibe mizu zinafota. 
Matthew13:7 Koma zina zinagwa paminga, ndipo mingayo inayanga, nizitsamwitsa izo." 
Matthew13:8 Koma zina zinagwa pa nthaka yabwino, ndipo zinabala zipatso, zina za makumi khumi, zina za makumi asanu ndi limodzi, zina za makumi atatu." 
Matthew13:9 Amene ali ndi makutu, amve." 
Matthew13:10 Ndipo ophunzirawo anadza, nati kwa Iye, Cifukwa canji muphiphiritsira iwo m'mafanizo?" 
Matthew13:11 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati, Cifukwa kwapatsidwa kwa inu kudziwa zinsinsi za Ufumu wa Kumwamba, koma sikunapatsidwa kwa iwo." 
Matthew13:12 Pakuti yense amene ali nazo, kudzapatsidwa kwa iye, ndimo adzakhala nazo zocuruka; koma yense amene alibe, cingakhale comwe ali naco cidzacotsedwa kwa iye." 
Matthew13:13 Cifukwa cace ndiphiphiritsira iwo m'mafanizo; cifukwa kuti akuona samaona, ndi akumva samamva, kapena samadziwitsa." 
Matthew13:14 Ndipo adzacitidwa kwa iwo mau adanenera Yesaya, amene ati. Pakumva mudzamva, ndipo simudzazindikira konse; Pakupenya mudzapenya, ndipo simudzaona konse;" 
Matthew13:15 Cifukwa unalemera mtima wa anthuawa, Ndipo m'makutu ao anamva mogontha, Ndipo maso ao anatsinzina; Kuti asaone konse ndi maso, Asamve ndi makutu, Asazindikire ndi mtima wao, Asatembenuke, Ndipo ndisawaciritse iwo." 
Matthew13:16 Koma maso anu ali odala, cifukwa apenya; ndi makutu anu cifukwa amva." 
Matthew13:17 Pakuti indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti aneneri ambiri ndi anthu olungama analakalaka kupenya zimene muziona, koma sanaziona; ndi kumva zimene muzimva, koma sanazimva." 
Matthew13:18 Ndipo tsono mverani inu fanizolo la wofesa mbeu uja. 
Matthew13:19 Munthu ali yense wakumva mau a Ufumu, osawadziwitsai, woipayo angodza, nakwatula cofesedwaco mumtima mwace. Uyo ndiye wofesedwa m'mbali mwa njira." 
Matthew13:20 Koma iye amene afesedwa pamiyala, uyu ndiye wakumva mau, ndi kuwalandira pomwepo ndi kusekera;" 
Matthew13:21 ndipo alibe mizu mwa iye, koma akhala nthawi yaing'ono; ndipo pakudza nsautso kapena zunzo cifukwa ca mau, iye akhumudwa pomwepo." 
Matthew13:22 Ndipo iye amene afesedwa kuminga, uyu ndiye wakumva mau; ndipo kulabadira kwa dziko lapansi, ndi cinyengo ca cuma citsamwitsa mau, ndipo akhala wopanda cipatso." 
Matthew13:23 Ndipo iye amene afesedwa pa nthaka yabwino, uyu ndiye wakumva mau nawadziwitsa; amene abaladi zipatso, nazifitsa, ena za makumi khumi, ena za makumi asanu ndi limodzi, ena za makumi atatu." 
Matthew13:24 Fanizo lina Iye anawafotokozera iwo, nanena, Ufumu wa Kumwamba ufanizidwa ndi munthu, amene anafesa mbeu zabwino m'munda mwace;" 
Matthew13:25 koma m'mene anthu analinkugona, mdani wace anadza, nafesa namsongole pakati pa tirigu, nacokapo." 
Matthew13:26 Koma pamene mmera unakula, nubala cipatso, pomwepo anaonekeranso namsongole." 
Matthew13:27 Ndipo anyamata ace a mwini nyumbayo anadza, nati kwa iye, Mbuye, kodi simunafesa mbeu zabwino m'munda mwanu? nanga wacokera kuti namsongoleyo?" 
Matthew13:28 Ndipo iye ananena kwa iwo, Munthu mdani wanga wacicita ici. Ndipo anyamata anati kwa iye, Kodi mufuna tsopano kuti timuke, tikamsonkhanitse uyo pamodzi?" 
Matthew13:29 Koma iye anati, lai, kuti kapena m'mene mukasonkhanitsa namsongoleyo, mungazulenso tirigu pamodzi naye." 
Matthew13:30 Kazilekeni zonse ziwiri, zikulire pamodzi kufikira pakututa; ndimo m'nyengo yakututa ndidzauza akututawo, Muyambe kusonkhanitsa namsongole, mummange uyu mitolo kukamtentha, koma musonkhanitse tirigu m'nkhokwe yanga." 
Matthew13:31 Fanizo lina Iye anawafotokozera iwo, nanena, Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanafana ndi kambeu kampiru, kamene anakatenga munthu, nakafesa pamunda pace;" 
Matthew13:32 kamene kakhaladi kakang'ono koposa mbeu zonse, koma katakula, kali kakakuru kuposa zitsambazonse, nukhala mtengo, kotero kuti mbalame za mlengalenga zimadza, nizibindikira mu nthambi zace." 
Matthew13:33 Fanizo lina ananena kwa iwo; Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanafana ndi cotupitsa mikate, cimene mkazi anacitenga, nacibisa m'miyeso itatu ya ufa, kufikira wonse unatupa." 
Matthew13:34 Zonsezi Yesu anaziphiphiritsira m'mafanizo kwa makamu anthu; ndipo kopanda fanizo sanalankhula kanthu kwa iwo; 
Matthew13:35 kuti cikacitidwe conenedwa ndi mneneri, kuti, Ndidzatsegula pakamwa panga ndi mafanizo; Ndidzaulula zinthu zobisika ciyambire kukhazikidwa kwace kwa dziko lapansi." 
Matthew13:36 Pomwepo Iye anasiya makamuwo, nalowa m'nyumba; ndimo ophunzira ace anadza kwa Iye, nanena, Mutitanthauzire fanizo lija la namsongole wa m'munda." 
Matthew13:37 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati, Wofesa mbeu yabwino ndiye Mwana wa munthu;" 
Matthew13:38 ndipo munda ndiwo dziko lapansi; ndi mbeu yabwino ndiyo ana a Ufumuwo; ndi namsongole ndiye ana a woipayo; 
Matthew13:39 ndipo mdani amene anamfesa uwu ndiye mdierekezi: ndi kututa ndico cimariziro ca nthawi ya pansi pano; ndi otutawo ndiwo angelo. 
Matthew13:40 Ndipo monga namsongole asonkhanitsidwa pamodzi, natenthedwa pamoto, matero mudzakhala m'cimariziro ca nthawi ya pansi pano." 
Matthew13:41 Mwana wa munthu adzatuma angelo ace, ndipo iwo adzasonkhanitsa pamodzi, ndi kucotsa mu Ufumu wace zokhumudwitsa zonse, ndi anthu akucita kusayeruzika," 
Matthew13:42 ndipo adzawataya iwo m'ng'anjo yamoto; kumeneko kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano. 
Matthew13:43 Pomwepo olungamawo adzawalitsa monga dzuwa, mu Ufumu wa Atate wao. Amene ali ndi makutu amve." 
Matthew13:44 Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanana ndi cuma cobisika m'munda; cimene munthu anacipeza, nacibisa; ndipo m'kucikonda kwace acoka, nagulitsa zonse ali nazo, nagula munda umenewu." 
Matthew13:45 Ndiponso Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanana ndi munthu wa malonda, wakufuna ngale zabwino:" 
Matthew13:46 ndipo m'mene anaipeza ngale imodzi ya mtengo wapatari, anapita, nagulitsa zonse anali nazo, naigula imeneyo." 
Matthew13:47 Ndiponso, Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wofanana ndi khoka loponyedwa m'nyanja, ndi 1 kusonkhanitsa pamodzi za mitundu yonse;" 
Matthew13:48 limene podzala, analibvuulira pamtunda; ndipo m'mene anakhala pansi, anazisonkhanitsa zabwino m'zotengera, koma zoipa anazitaya kuthengo." 
Matthew13:49 Padzatero pa cimariziro ca nthawi ya pansi pano: angelo adzaturuka, 2 nadzawasankhula oipa pakati pa abwino," 
Matthew13:50 nadzawataya m'ng'anjo yamoto; komweko kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano. 
Matthew13:51 Mwamvetsa zonsezi kodi? lwo anati kwa Iye, inde." 
Matthew13:52 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Cifukwa cace, mlembi ali yense, wophunzitsidwa mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba, ali wofanana ndi munthu mwini banja, amene aturutsa m'cuma cace zinthu zakale ndi zatsopano." 
Matthew13:53 Ndipo panali, pamene Yesu anatha mafanizo awa, anacokera kumeneko." 
Matthew13:54 Ndipo 3 pofika ku dziko la kwao, anaphunzitsa iwo m'sunagoge mwao, kotero kuti anazizwa, nanena, Uyu adazitengakuti nzeru zimenezi ndi zamphamvu izi?" 
Matthew13:55 4 Kodi uyu si mwana wa mmisiri wa mitengo? kodi dzina lace la amace si Mariya? ndi 5 abale ace si Yakobo ndi Yosefe ndi Simoni ndi Yuda? 
Matthew13:56 Ndipo alongo ace sali ndife onsewa? Ndipo iyeyo adazitenga zinthu zonsezi kuti? 
Matthew13:57 Ndipo iwo anakhumudwa cifukwa ca Iye. Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, 6 Mneneri sakhala wopanda ulemu koma ku dziko la kwao ndiko, ndi kubanja kwace." 
Matthew13:58 Ndipo Iye, cifukwa ca kusakhulupirira kwao, sanacita kumeneko zamphamvu zambiri." 
Matthew14:1 Nthawi imeneyo Herode mfumu anamva mbiri ya Yesu," 
Matthew14:2 nanena kwa anyamata ace, U yo ndiye Yohane Mbatizi; anauka kwa akufa; ndipo cifukwa ca ici zamphamvuzi zilimbalimba mwa iye." 
Matthew14:3 Pakuti Herode adamgwira Yohane, nammanga, namuika m'nyumba yandende cifukwa ca Herodiya, mkazi wa mbale wace Filipo." 
Matthew14:4 Pakuti Yohane ananena kwa iye, Sikuloledwa kwa iwe kukhala naye." 
Matthew14:5 Ndipo pofuna kumupha iye, anaopa khamu la anthu, popeza anamuyesa iye mneneri." 
Matthew14:6 Koma pakufika tsiku la kubadwa kwace kwa Herode, mwana wamkazi wa Herodiya anabvina pakati pao, namkondweretsa Herode." 
Matthew14:7 Pomwepo iye anamlonjeza cilumbirire, kumpatsa iye cimene ciri conse akapempha." 
Matthew14:8 Ndipo iye, atampangira amace, anati, Ndipatseni ine kuno m'mbizi mutu wa Yohane Mbatizi. Ndipo mfumuyo anagwidwa ndi cisoni;" 
Matthew14:9 koma cifukwa ca malumbiro ace, ndi ca iwo anali naye pacakudya, analamulira upatsidwe;" 
Matthew14:10 ndipo anatumiza mnyamata, namdula mutu Yohane m'nyumba yandende." 
Matthew14:11 Ndipo anautenga mutu wace m'mbizimo, naupatsa buthulo: ndipo iye anamuka nao kwa amace." 
Matthew14:12 Ndipo ophunzira ace anadza, natola mtembo, nauika; ndipo anadza nauza Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Ndipo Yesu pakumva, anacokera kumeneko m'ngalawa, kunka ku malo acipululu pa yekha; ndipo makamu, pamene anamva, anamtsata Iye mumtunda kucokera m'midzi." 
Matthew14:14 Ndipo Iye anaturuka, naona khamu lalikuru la anthu, nacitira iwo cifundo, naciritsa akudwala ao." 
Matthew14:15 Ndipo pamene panali madzulo, ophunzira ace anafika kwa Iye, nanena, Malo ano nga cipululu, ndipo nthawi yapita tsopano; kauzeni makamuwo amuke, apite ku midzi kukadzigulira okha kamba." 
Matthew14:16 Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, Iwo alibe cifukwa ca kumukira, apatseni ndinu adye." 
Matthew14:17 Koma iwo ananena kwa Iye, Ife tiribe kanthu pano koma mikate isanu, ndi nsomba ziwiri." 
Matthew14:18 Ndipo Iye anati, Mudze nazo kuno kwa Ine." 
Matthew14:19 Ndipo Iye analamulira makamu a anthu akhale pansi pamaudzu; ndipo Iye anatenga mikate isanuyo ndi nsomba ziwirizo, ndipo m'mene anayang'ana kumwamba, anadalitsa, nanyema, napatsa mikateyo kwa ophunzira, ndi ophunzira kwa makamuwo." 
Matthew14:20 Ndipo anadya onse, nakhuta; ndipo anatola makombo otsala, mitanga khumi ndi iwiri yodzala." 
Matthew14:21 Ndipo anadyawo anali amuna monga zikwi zisanu, kuwaleka akazi ndi ana." 
Matthew14:22 Ndipo pomwepo Iye anafulumiza ophunzira alowe m'ngalawa, ndi kumtsogolera Iye ku tsidya lija, kufikira Iye atauza makamu amuke." 
Matthew14:23 Ndipo pamene Iye anawauza makamuwo, anakwera m'phiri pa yekha, kukapemphera: ndipo pamene panali madzulo, Iye anakhala kumeneko yekha." 
Matthew14:24 Koma pomwepo ngalawa idafika pakati pa nyanja, yozunzika ndi mafunde; pakuti mphepo inadza mokomana nao." 
Matthew14:25 Ndipo pa ulonda wacinai wa usiku, Iye anadza kwa iwo, nayenda pamwamba pa nyanja." 
Matthew14:26 Koma m'mene ophunzirawo anamuona Iye, alikuyenda pamadzi, ananthunthumira, nati, ndi mzukwa! Ndipo anapfuula ndi mantha." 
Matthew14:27 Koma pomwepo Yesu analankhula nao, nati, Limbani mtima; ndine; musaope." 
Matthew14:28 Ndipo Petro anamyankha Iye nati, Ambuye, ngati ndinutu, mundiuze ndidze kwa lou pamadzi." 
Matthew14:29 Ndipo Iye anati, Idza, Ndipo Petro anatsika m'ngalawa, nayenda pamadzi, kufika kwa Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Koma m'mene iye anaiona mphepo, ana, opa; ndipo poyamba kunura, anapfuula, nati, Ambuye, ndipulumutseni ine!" 
Matthew14:31 Ndipo pomwepo Yesu anatansa dzanja lace, namgwira iye, nanena naye, Iwe wokhulupirira pang'ono, wakayikiranji mtima?" 
Matthew14:32 Ndipo pamene iwo analowa m'ngalawamo, mphepo inaleka." 
Matthew14:33 Ndipo iwo amene anali m'ngalawamo anamgwadira, nanena, Zoonadi, ndinu Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Matthew14:34 Ndipo pamene iwo anaoloka, anafika kumtunda, ku Genesarete." 
Matthew14:35 Ndipo m'meneamuna a pamenepo anamzindikira, anatumiza konse ku dziko lonse lozungulira, nadzanao kwa Iye onse akukhala ndi nthenda;" 
Matthew14:36 ndipo anampempha Iye, kuti akhudze yokha mphonje ya cobvala cace; ndipo onse amene anamkhudza anaciritsidwa." 
Matthew15:1 Pomwepo anadza kwa Yesu Afarisi ndi alembi, ocokera ku Yerusalemu, nati," 
Matthew15:2 Ophunzira anu alumphiranji miyambo ya makolo? pakuti sasamba manja pakudya. 
Matthew15:3 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Inunso mulumphiranji lamulo la Mulungu cifukwa ca miyambo yanu?" 
Matthew15:4 Pakuti Mulungu anati, Lemekeza atate wako ndi amako; ndipo, Wakunenera atate wace ndi amace zoipa, afe ndithu." 
Matthew15:5 Koma inu munena, Amene ali yense anena kwa atate wace kapena kwa amace, Ico ukanathandizidwa naco, neoperekedwa kwa Mulungu;" 
Matthew15:6 iyeyo sadzalemekeza atate wace. Ndipo inu mupeputsa mau a Mulungu cifukwa ca miyambo yanu. 
Matthew15:7 Onyenga inu! Yesaya ananenera bwino za inu, ndikuti," 
Matthew15:8 Anthu awa andilemekeza Ine ndi milomo yao; Koma mtima wao uli kutari ndi Ine. 
Matthew15:9 Koma andilambira Ine kwacabe, Ndi kuphunzitsa maphunzitso, malangizo a anthu." 
Matthew15:10 Ndipo Iye anaitana makamuwo nati kwa iwo, Imvani, nimudziwitse;" 
Matthew15:11 si cimene cilowa m'kamwa mwace ciipitsa munthu; koma cimene cituruka m'kamwa mwace, ndico ciipitsa munthu." 
Matthew15:12 Pomwepo anadza ophunzira, nanena kwa Iye, Mudziwa kodi kuti Afarisi anakhumudwa pakumva conenaco?" 
Matthew15:13 Koma Iye anayankha nati, Mmera wonse, umene Atate wanga wa Kumwamba sanaubzala, udzazulidwa." 
Matthew15:14 Kawalekeni iwo, ali atsogoleri akhungu. Ndipo ngati wakhungu amtsogolera wakhungu, onse awiri adzagwa m'mbuna." 
Matthew15:15 Ndipo Petro anayankha nati kwa Iye, Mutifotokozere ife fanizoli." 
Matthew15:16 Ndipo Iye anati, Kodi inunso mukhala cipulukirire?" 
Matthew15:17 Simudziwa kodi kuti zonse zakulowa m'kamwa zipita m'mimba, ndipo zitayidwa kuthengo?" 
Matthew15:18 Koma zakuturuka m'kamwa zicokera mumtima; ndizo ziipitsa munthu. 
Matthew15:19 Pakuti mumtima mucokera maganizo oipa, zakupha, zacigololo, zaciwerewere, zakuba, za umboni wonama, zamwano;" 
Matthew15:20 izi ndizo ziipitsa munthu, koma kudya osasamba manja sikuipitsa munthuai." 
Matthew15:21 Ndipo Yesu anaturukapo napatukira ku mbali za Turo ndi Sidoni. 
Matthew15:22 Ndipo onani, mkazi wa ku Kanani anaturuka m'malire, napfuula, nati, Mundicitire ine cifundo Ambuye, mwana wa Davide; mwana wanga wamkazi wagwidwa koopsa ndi ciwanda." 
Matthew15:23 Koma Iye sanamyankha mau amodzi. Ndipo ophunzira ace anadza, nampempha, nati, Mumuuze amuke; pakuti apfuula pambuyo pathu." 
Matthew15:24 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati, Sindinatumidwa kwa ena koma kwa nkhosa zotayika za banja la Israyeli." 
Matthew15:25 Koma iye anadza, namgwadira Iye, nanena, Ambuye, ndithangateni ine." 
Matthew15:26 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati, Sicabwino kutenga mkate wa ana, ndi kuuponyera tiagaru." 
Matthew15:27 Koma iye anati, Etu, Ambuye, pakutinso tiagaru timadya nyenyeswa zakugwa pagome pa ambuye ao." 
Matthew15:28 Pomwepo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iye, Mkaziwe, cikhulupiriro cako ndi cacikuru; cikhale kwa iwe monga momwe wafunira. Ndipo mwana wace anacira nthawi yomweyo." 
Matthew15:29 Ndipo Yesu anacoka kumeneko, nadza ku nyanja ya Galileya, nakwera m'phiri, nakhala pansi pamenepo." 
Matthew15:30 Ndipo makamu ambiri a anthu anadza kwa Iye, ali nao opunduka miyendo, akhungu, osalankhula, opunduka ziwalo, ndi ena ambiri, nawakhazika pansi pa mapazi ace: ndipo Iye anawaciritsa;" 
Matthew15:31 kotero kuti khamulo linazizwa, pakupenya osalankhula nalankhula, opunduka ziwalo nacira, ndi opunduka miyendo nayenda, ndi akhungu napenya, ndipo iwo analemekeza Mulungu wa Israyeli." 
Matthew15:32 Ndipo Yesu anaitana ophunzira ace, nati, Mtima wanga ucitira cifundo khamu la anthuwa, pakuti ali cikhalire ndi Ine masiku atatu, ndipo alibe kanthu kakudya, ndipo sindifuna kuwauza iwo amuke osadya, kuti angaziye panjira," 
Matthew15:33 Ndipo ophunzira ananena kwa Iye, Tiione kuti mikate yotere m'cipululu yakukhutitsa unyinji wotere wa anthu?" 
Matthew15:34 Ndipo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Muli nayo mikate ingati? Ndipo iwo anati, Isanu ndi iwiri, ndi tinsomba pang'ono." 
Matthew15:35 Ndipo Iye analamulira anthuwo akhale pansi onse; 
Matthew15:36 natenga mikateyo isanu ndi iwiri ndi nsombazo; nayamika Mulungu, nanyema, napatsa kwa ophunzira, ndi ophunzira kwa anthu." 
Matthew15:37 Ndipo onsewa anadya, nakhuta: ndipo anatola makombo otsala malicero asanu ndi awiri odzala." 
Matthew15:38 Ndipo anadyawo anali amuna zikwi zinai kuwaleka akazi ndi ana. 
Matthew15:39 Ndipo m'mene Iye anauza makamuwo amuke, analowa m'ngalawa, nafika m'malire Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Ndipo Afarisi ndi Asaduki anadza, namuyesa, namfunsa Iye awaonetse cizindikiro ca Kumwamba." 
Matthew16:2 Koma Iye anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Madzulo munena, Kudzakhala ngwe; popeza thambo liri laceza." 
Matthew16:3 Ndipo m'mawa, Lero nkwa mphepo; popeza thambo liri la ceza codera. Mudziwa kuzindikira za pa nkhope ya thambo; koma zizindikiro za nyengo yin o, simungathe kuzindikira." 
Matthew16:4 Obadwa oipa ndi acigololo afunafuna cizindikiro; ndipo sadzalandira cizindikiro cina, koma cizindikiro ca Yona. Ndipo Iye anawasiya, nacokapo." 
Matthew16:5 Ndipo ophunzira anadza ku tsidya linalo, naiwala kutenga mikate." 
Matthew16:6 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Yang'anirani mupewe cotupitsa mkate ca Afarisi ndi Asaduki." 
Matthew16:7 Ndipo iwo anafunsana wina ndi mnzace, nati, Sitinatenga mikate." 
Matthew16:8 Koma Yesu, m'mene anadziwa, anati, Ha, inu okhulupirira pang'ono, mufunsana cifukwa ninji wina ndi mnzace, kuti simunatenga mikate?" 
Matthew16:9 kodi cikhalire simudziwa, ndipo simukumbukira mikate isanu ija ya anthu aja zikwi zisanu, ndi mitanga ingati munaitola?" 
Matthew16:10 Penanso mikate isanu ndi iwiri ija ya anthu zikwi zinai, ndi malicero angati munawatola?" 
Matthew16:11 Bwanji nanga simudziwa kuti sindinanena kwa inu za mikate? Koma pewani cotupitsa ca Afarisi ndi Asaduki. 
Matthew16:12 Pomwepo anadziwitsa kuti sanawauza kupewa cotupitsa ca mikate, koma ciphunzitso ca Afarisi ndi Asaduki." 
Matthew16:13 Ndipo Yesu, pamene anadza ku dziko la ku Kaisareya wa Filipi, anafunsa ophunzira ace, kuti, Anthu anena kuti Mwana wa munthu ndiye yani?" 
Matthew16:14 Ndipo iwo anati, Ena ati, Yohane Mbatizi; koma ena, Eliya; ndipo enanso Yeremiya, kapena mmodzi wa aneneri." 
Matthew16:15 Iye ananena kwa iwo, Koma inu mutani kuti Ine ndine yani?" 
Matthew16:16 Ndipo Simoni Petro anayankha nati, Inu ndinu Kristu, Mwana wa Mulungu wamoyo." 
Matthew16:17 Ndipo Yesu anayankha iye, nati, Ndiwe wodala, Simoni Bar-Yona: pakuti thupi ndi mwazi sizinakuululira ici, koma Atate wanga wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew16:18 Ndiponso Ine ndinena kwa iwe, kuti iwe ndiwe Petro, ndipo pa thanthwe ili ndidzakhazika Mpingo wanga; ndipo makomo a dziko la akufa sadzaulaka uwo." 
Matthew16:19 Ndidzakupatsa mafungulo a Ufumu wa Kumwamba; ndipo cimene ukamanga pa dziko lapansi cidzakhala comangidwa Kumwamba: ndipo cimene ukacimasula pa dziko lapansi, cidzakhala comasulidwa Kumwamba." 
Matthew16:20 Pamenepo analamulira ophunzira kuti asauze munthu kuti Iye ndiye Kristu. 
Matthew16:21 Kuyambira pamenepo Yesu anayamba kuwalangiza ophunzira ace, kuti kuyenera Iye amuke ku Yerusalemu, kukazunzidwa zambiri ndi akuru, ndi ansembe akuru, ndi alembi; ndi kukaphedwa, ndi tsiku lacitatu kuuka kwa akufa." 
Matthew16:22 Ndipo Petro anamtenga Iye, nayamba kumdzudzula, kuti, Dzicitireni cifundo, Ambuye; sicidzatero kwa Inu ai." 
Matthew16:23 Koma Iye anapotoloka, nati kwa Petro, Pita kumbuyo kwanga, Satana iwe; ndiwe condikhumudwitsa Ine; cifukwa sumasamalira za Mulungu, koma za anthu." 
Matthew16:24 Pomwepo Yesu anati kwa ophunzira ace, Ngati munthu afuna kudza pambuyo panga, adzikane yekha, natenge mtanda wace, nanditsate Ine." 
Matthew16:25 Pakuti iye amene afuna kupulumutsa moyo wace adzautaya: koma iye amene ataya moyo wace cifukwa ca Ine, adzaupeza." 
Matthew16:26 Pakuti munthu adzapindulanji, akalandira dziko lonse, nataya moyo wace? kapena munthu adzaperekanji cosintha ndi moyo wace?" 
Matthew16:27 Pakuti Mwana wa munthu adzabwera mu ulemerero wa Atate wace, pamodzi ndi angelo ace; ndipo pomwepo Iye adzabwezera kwa anthu onse monga macitidwe ao." 
Matthew16:28 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti alipo ena a iwo aima pane sadzalawa ndithu imfa, kufikira adzaona Mwana wa munthu atadza mu ufumu wace." 
Matthew17:1 Ndipo atapita masiku asanu ndi limodzi, Yesu anatenga Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane mbale wace, napita nao pa okha pa phiri lalitari;" 
Matthew17:2 ndipo Iye anasandulika pamaso pao; ndipo nkhope yace inawala monga dzuwa, ndi zobvala zace zinakhala zoyera mbu monga kuwala." 
Matthew17:3 Ndipo onani, Mose ndi Eliya anaonekera kwa iwo, alinkulankhula ndi Iye." 
Matthew17:4 Ndipo Petro anayankha, nati kwa Yesu, Ambuye, kuli bwino kuti ife tikhale pano; ngati mulola ndidzamanga pane misasa itatu; umodzi wa Inu, ndi wina wa Mose, ndi wina wa Eliya." 
Matthew17:5 Akali cilankhulire, onani, mtambo wowala unawaphi mba iwo: ndipo onani, mau alikunena mumtambo, Uyu ndiye Mwana wanga wokondedwa, mwa iyeyu ndikondwera, mverani Iye." 
Matthew17:6 Ndipo pamene ophunzira anamva, anagwa nkhope zao pansi, naopa kwakukuru." 
Matthew17:7 Ndipo Yesu anadza, nawakhudza nati, Ukani, musaopa," 
Matthew17:8 Ndipo iwo, pokweza maso ao sanaona munthu, koma Yesu yekha." 
Matthew17:9 Ndipo pamene anali kutsika paphiri, Yesu anawalangiza iwo kuti, Musakauze munthu coonekaco, kufikira Mwana wa munthu adadzauka kwa akufa." 
Matthew17:10 Ndipo ophunzira ace anamfunsa, nanena, Ndipo bwanji alembi amanena kuti Eliya ndiye atsogole kudza?" 
Matthew17:11 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati, Eliya akudzatu, nadzabwezera zinthu zonse;" 
Matthew17:12 koma ndinena kwa inu, kuti Eliya anadza kale, ndipo iwo sanamdziwa iye, koma anamcitira zonse zimene anazifuna iwo. Ndipo conconso Mwana wa munthu adzazunzidwa ndi iwo." 
Matthew17:13 Pomwepo ophunzira anazindikira kuti analankhula nao za Yohane Mbatizi. 
Matthew17:14 Ndipo pamene iwo anadza ku khamu la anthu, kunafika kwa Iye munthu, namgwadira Iye, nati," 
Matthew17:15 Ambuye, citirani mwana wanga cifundo; cifukwa adwala khunyu, kuzunzika koipa: pakuti amagwa kawiri kawiri pamoto, ndi kawiri kawiri m'madzi." 
Matthew17:16 Ndipo ndinadza naye kwa ophunzira anu, koma iwo sanathe kumciritsa." 
Matthew17:17 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati, Ha, obadwa osakhulupirira ndi amphulupulu, ndidzakhala ndi inu nthawi yanji? ndidzalekerera inu nthawi yanji? mudze naye kwa Ine kuno." 
Matthew17:18 Ndipo. Yesu anamdzudzula; ndipo ciwanda cinaturuka mwa iye; ndipo mnyamatayo anacira kuyambira nthawi yomweyo. 
Matthew17:19 Pamenepo ophunzira anadza kwa Yesu, ali pa yekha, nati, Nanga ife sitinakhoza bwanji kuciturutsa?" 
Matthew17:20 Ndipo Iye ananena kwa iwo, Cifukwa cikhulupiriro canu ncacing'ono: pakuti indetu ndinena kwa inu, Mukakhala naco cikhulupiriro monga kambeu kampiru, mudzati ndi phiri ili, Senderapo umuke kuja; ndipo lidzasendera; ndipo palibe kanthu kadzakulakani kosacitika. [" 
Matthew17:21 ] 
Matthew17:22 Ndipo m'mene anali kutsotsa m'Galileya, Yesu ananena nao, Mwana wa munthu adzaperekedwa m'manja a anthu;" 
Matthew17:23 ndipo adzamupha Iye, ndipo Iye adzauka tsiku lacitatu. Ndipo iwo anali ndi cisoni cacikuru." 
Matthew17:24 Ndipo pofika ku Kapernao arnene aja akulandira ndalama za kukacisi anadza kwa Petro nati, Kodi Mphunzitsi wanu sapereka rupiyalo?" 
Matthew17:25 Iye anabvomera, Apereka, Ndipo polowa iye m'nyumba, Yesu anatsogola kunena naye, nati, Simoni, uganiza bwanji? mafumu a dziko lapansi alandira msonkho kwa yani? kwa ana ao kodi, kapena kwa akunja?" 
Matthew17:26 Ndipo m'mene iye anati, Kwa akunja, Yesu ananena kwa iye, Cifukwa cace anawo ali aufulu." 
Matthew17:27 Koma kuti ife tisawakhumudwitse, pita iwe kunyanja, ukaponye mbedza, nuitole nsomba yoyamba kuwedza; ndipo ukaikanula pakamwa pace udzapezamo rupiya; tatenga limeneli, nuwapatse ilo pamtu pa iwe ndi Ine." 
Matthew18:1 Nthawi yomweyo ophunzira anadza kwa Yesu, nanena, Ndani kodi ali wopambana mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba?" 
Matthew18:2 Ndipo pamene Yesu anaitana kamwana, anakaimitsa pakati pao," 
Matthew18:3 nati, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Ngati simutembenuka, nimukhala monga tianato, simudzalowa konse mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew18:4 Cifukwa cace yense amene adzicepetsa yekha monga kamwana aka, yemweyo ali wopambana mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew18:5 Ndipo amene adzalandira kamwana kamodzi kotereka cifukwa ca dzina langa, alandira Ine;" 
Matthew18:6 koma yense amene adzakhumudwitsa kamodzi ka tiana iti, takukhulupirira Ine, kumuyenera iye kuti mphero yaikuru ikolowekedwe m'khosi mwace, namizidwe poya pa nyanja." 
Matthew18:7 Tsoka liri hdi dziko lapansi cifukwa ca zokhumudwitsa! pakuti sikutheka kuti zokhumudwitsa zileke kudza, koma tsoka liri ndi munthu amene cokhumudwitsaco cidza ndi iye." 
Matthew18:8 Ndipo ngati dzanja lako, kapena phazi lako likukhumudwitsa iwe, ulidule, nulitaye; nkwabwino, kuti ulowe m'moyo wopunduka dzanja kapena phazi, koposa kuponyedwa m'moto wa nthawi zonse, uli ndi manja awiri kapena mapazi awiri." 
Matthew18:9 Ndipo ngati diso lako likukhumudwitsa, ulikolowole, nulitaye: nkwabwino kuti ulowe m'moyo ndi diso limodzi koposa kuponyedwa m'gehena wamoto, uli ndi maso awiri." 
Matthew18:10 Yang'anirani kuti musanyoze mmodzi wa ang'ono awa; pakuti ndinena kwa inu, kuti angelo ao apenya cipenyere nkhope ya Atate wanga wa Kumwamba. [" 
Matthew18:11 ] 
Matthew18:12 Nanga muyesa bwanji? ngati munthu ali nazo nkhosa makumi khumi, ndipo ikasokera imodzi ya izo, kodi saleka zija makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu manu ndi zinai, napita kumapiri, kukafuna yosokerayo?" 
Matthew18:13 Ndimo akaipeza, indedi ndinena kwa inu, akondwera nayo koposa ndi makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu zisanu ndi zinai zosasokera." 
Matthew18:14 Comweco siciri cifuniro ca Atate wanu wa Kumwamba kuti mmodzi wa ang'ono awa atayike. 
Matthew18:15 Ndipo ngati mbale wako akucimwira iwe, pita, numlangize pa nokha iwe ndi iye; ngati akumvera iwe, wambweza mbale wako." 
Matthew18:16 Koma ngati samvera, onjeza kutenga ndi iwe wina mmodzi kapena awiri, kuti atsimikizidwe mau onse pakamwa pa mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu." 
Matthew18:17 Ndipo ngati iye samvera iwo, uuze Mpingo; ndipo ngati iye samveranso Mpingowo, akhale kwa iwe monga wakunja ndi wamsonkho." 
Matthew18:18 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Ziri zonse mukazimanga pa dziko lapansi zidzakhala zomangidwa Kumwamba: ndipo ziri zonse mukazimasula pa dziko lapansi, zidzakhala zomasulidwa Kumwamba." 
Matthew18:19 Ndiponso ndinena kwa inu kuti ngati awiri ainu abvomerezana pansi pano cinthu ciri conse akacipempha, Atate wanga wa Kumwamba adzawacitira." 
Matthew18:20 Pakuti kumene kuli awiri kapena atatu asonkhanira m'dzina langa, ndiri komweko pakati pao." 
Matthew18:21 Pamenepo Petro anadza, nati kwa Iye, Ambuye, mbale wanga adzandilakwira kangati, ndipo ine ndidzamkhululukira iye? kufikira kasanu ndi kawiri kodi?" 
Matthew18:22 Yesu ananena kwa iye, Sindinena kwa iwe kufikira kasanu ndi kawiri, koma kufikira makumi ananu ndi awiri kubwerezedwa kasanu ndi kawiri." 
Matthew18:23 Cifukwa cace Ufumu wa Kumwamba ufanizidwa ndi munthu, mfumu, amene anafuna kuwerengera nao akapolo ace." 
Matthew18:24 Ndipo pamene anayamba kuwerengera, anadza kwa iye ndi wina wamangawa wa ndalama za matalente zikwi khumi." 
Matthew18:25 Koma popeza iye anasowa kanthu kombwezera, mbuye wace analamulira kuti iye agulitsidwe, ndi mkazi wace ndi ana ace omwe, ndi zonse ali nazo, kuti akabwezedwe mangawawo." 
Matthew18:26 Cifukwa cace kapoloyo anagwadapansi, nampembedzera, nati, Mbuye, bakandiyembekezani ine, ndipo zonse ndidzazibwezera kwa inu." 
Matthew18:27 Ndipo mbuye wa kapoloyo anagwidwa ndi cisoni mumtima, nammasula iye, namkhululukira ngongole." 
Matthew18:28 Koma kapolo uyu, poturuka anapeza wina wa akapolo anzace yemwe anamkongola iye marupiya atheka makumi khumi, namgwira, namkanyanga pakhosi, nati, Bwezera cija unacikongola." 
Matthew18:29 Pamenepo kapolo mnzaceyu anagwada pansi, nampempha iye, nati, Bakandiyembekeza ine, ndipo ndidzakubwezera." 
Matthew18:30 Ndipo iye sanafuna; koma anamuka, namponya iye m'nyumba yandende, kufikira abwezere ngongole." 
Matthew18:31 Cifukwa cace m'mene akapolo anzace anaona zocitidwazo, anagwidwa cisoni cacikuru, nadza, nalongosolera mbuye wao zonse zimene zinacitidwa." 
Matthew18:32 Pomwepo mbuye wace anamuitana iye, nanena naye, Kapolo iwe weipa, ndinakukhululukira iwe mangawa onse aja momwe muja unandipempha ine;" 
Matthew18:33 kodi iwenso sukadamcitira kapolo mnzako cisoni, monga inenso ndinakucitira iwe cisoni?" 
Matthew18:34 Ndipo mbuye wace anakwiya, nampereka kwa azunzi, kufikira akambwezere iye mangawa onse." 
Matthew18:35 Comweconso Atate wanga adzacitira inu, ngati inu simukhululukira yense mbale wace ndi mitima yanu." 
Matthew19:1 Ndipo panali pamene Yesu anatha mau amenewa, anacokera ku Galileya, nadza ku malire a Yudeya, a ku tsidya lija la Yordano." 
Matthew19:2 Ndipo makamu akuru a anthu anamtsata; ndipo Iye anawaciritsa kumeneko. 
Matthew19:3 Ndipo Afarisi anadza kwa Iye, namuyesa, nanena, Kodi nkuloledwa kuti munthu acotse mkazi wace pa cifukwa ciri conse?"
