Matthew19:4 Ndipo Iye anayankha, nati, Kodi simunawerenga kuti Iye amene adalenga anthu paciyambi, anawalenga iwo mwamuna ndi mkazi," 
Matthew19:5 nati, Cifukwa ca ici mwamuna adzasiya atate wace ndi amace, nadzaphatikizana ndi mkazi wace, ndipo awiriwo adzakhala thupi limodzi?" 
Matthew19:6 cotero kuti salinso awiri koma thupi limodzi. Cifukwa cace ici cimene Mulungu anacimanga pamodzi, munthu asacilekanitse." 
Matthew19:7 Iwo ananena kwa Iye, Nanga cifukwa ninji Mose analamulira kupatsa kalata wa cilekaniro, ndi kumcotsa?" 
Matthew19:8 Iye ananena kwa iwo, Cifukwa ca kuuma mtima kwanu, Mose anakulolezani kucotsa akazi anu; koma paciyambi sikunakhala comweco." 
Matthew19:9 Ndipo Ine ndinena kwa inu, Amene ali yense akacotsa mkazi wace, kosakhala cifukwa ca cigololo, nadzakwatira wina, acita cigololo: ndipo iye amene akwatira wocotsedwayo, acita cigololo." 
Matthew19:10 Ophunzira ananena kwa Iye, Ngati mlandu wa munthu ndi mkazi wace uti wotere, sikuli kwabwino kukwatira." 
Matthew19:11 Koma Iye anati kwa iwo, Onse sangathe kulandira conena ici, koma kwa iwo omwe capatsidwa." 
Matthew19:12 Pakuti pali osabala, amene anabadwa otero m'mimba ya amao: ndipo pali osabala anawafula anthu; ndipo pali osabala amene anadzifula okha, cifukwa ca Ufumu wa Kumwamba. Amene angathe kulandira ici acilandire." 
Matthew19:13 Pamenepo anadza nato tiana kwa Iye, kuti Iye aike manja ace pa ito, ndi kupemphera: koma ophunzirawo anawadzudzula." 
Matthew19:14 Koma Yesu anati, Tilekeni tiana, musatikanize kudza kwa Ine: cifukwa Ufumu wa Kumwamba uli wa totere." 
Matthew19:15 Ndipo Iye anaika manja ace pa ito, nacokapo." 
Matthew19:16 Ndipo onani, munthu anadza kwa Iye, nati, Mphunzitsi, cabwino nciti ndicicite, kuti ndikhale nao mayo wosatha?" 
Matthew19:17 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iye, Undifunsiranji za cinthu cabwino? alipo Mmodzi ndiye wabwino: koma ngati ufuna kulowa m'moyo, sunga malamulo." 
Matthew19:18 Iye ananena kwa Iye, Otani? Ndipo Yesu anati, Usaphe, Usacite cigololo, Usabe, Usacite umboni wonama," 
Matthew19:19 Lemekeza atate wako ndi amako, ndipo, Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda iwe mwini." 
Matthew19:20 Mnyamatayo ananena kwa Iye, Zonsezi ndinazisunga, ndisowanso ciani?" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu ananena naye, Ngati ufuna kukhala wangwiro, pita, kagulitse zomwe uli nazo, nupatse aumphawi, ndipo udzakhaia ndi cuma Kumwamba; ndipo ukadze kuno, unditsate." 
Matthew19:22 Koma mnyamatayo m'mene anamva conenaco, anamuka wacisoni; pakuti anali naco cuma cambiri." 
Matthew19:23 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa ophunzira ace, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti munthu mwini cuma adzalowa mobvutika mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew19:24 Ndiponso ndinena kwa inu, Nkwapafupi kuti ngamila ipyole diso la singano, koposa mwini cuma kulowa Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew19:25 Ndipo ophunzira, pamene anamva, anazizwa kwambiri, nanena, Ngati nkutero angapulumuke ndani?" 
Matthew19:26 Ndipo Yesu anawayang'ana, nati kwa iwo, ici sicitheka ndi anthu, koma zinthu zonse zitheka ndi Mulungu." 
Matthew19:27 Pomwepo Petro anayankha, nati kwa Iye, Onani, ife tinasiya zonse ndi kutsata Inu; nanga tsono tidzakhala ndi ciani?" 
Matthew19:28 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti inu amene munanditsata Ine, m'kubadwanso, pamene Mwana wa munthu adzakhala pa cimpando ca ulemerero wace, inunso, mudzakhala pa mipando khumi ndi iwiri, kuweruza mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israyeli." 
Matthew19:29 Ndipo onse amene adasiya nyumba, kapena abale, kapena alongo, kapena atate, kapena amai, kapena ana, kapena minda, cifukwa ca dzina langa, adzalandira zobwezeredwa zambirimbiri, nadzalowa moyo wosatha." 
Matthew19:30 Koma ambiri oyamba adzakhala akuthungo, ndi akuthungo adzakhala oyamba." 
Matthew20:1 Pakuti Ufumu wa Kumwamba ufanana ndi munthu mwini banja, amene anaturuka mamawa kuka lembera anchito a m'munda wace wampesa." 
Matthew20:2 Ndipo parnene adapangana ndi anchito, pa rupiya latheka limodzi tsiku limodzi, anawatumiza ku munda wace." 
Matthew20:3 Ndipo anaturuka dzuwa litakwera, naona ena ataima cabe pabwalo;" 
Matthew20:4 ndipo kwa iwo anati, Pitani inunso kumunda, ndipo ndidzakupatsani cimene ciri coyenera. Ndipo iwo anapita." 
Matthew20:5 Ndiponso anaturuka usana, ndimonso popendeka dzuwa, nacita cimodzimodzi." 
Matthew20:6 Ndipo poyandikira madzulo anaturuka, napeza ena ataima; nanena kwa iwo, Mwaimiranji kuno dzuwa lonse cabe?" 
Matthew20:7 Iwo ananena kwa iye, Cifukwa palibe munthu anatilemba. Iye anati kwa iwo, Pitani inunso ku mundawo wampesa." 
Matthew20:8 Ndipo pamadzulo, mwini munda anati kwa kapitao wace, Kaitane anchito, nuwapatse iwo kulipira kwao, uyambe kwa omarizira kufikira kwa oyamba." 
Matthew20:9 Ndipo pamene iwo olembedwa poyandikira madzulo anadza, analandira munthu ali yense rupiya latheka limodzi." 
Matthew20:10 Ndipo m'mene oyamba anadza, analingalira kuti adzalandira kopambana, ndipo iwonso analandira onse rupiya latheka." 
Matthew20:11 Koma m'mene iwo analilandira, anaderera kwa mwini banja," 
Matthew20:12 nati, Omarizira awa anagwira nchito mphindi yaing'ono, ndipo munawalinganiza ndi ife amene tinapirira kuwawa kwa dzuwa ndi: kutentha kwace." 
Matthew20:13 Koma iye anayankha, nati kwa mmodzi wa iwo, Mnzanga, sindikunyenga iwe; kodi iwe sunapangana ndi ine pa rupiya latheka limodzi?" 
Matthew20:14 Tenga lako, numuke; pakuti ine ndifuna kupatsa kwa uyu womarizira monga kwa iwe." 
Matthew20:15 Sikuloleka kwa ine kodi kucita cimene ndifuna ndi zanga? Kapena diso lako laipa kodi cifukwa ine ndiri wabwino? 
Matthew20:16 Comweco omarizira adzakhala oyamba, ndipo oyamba adzakhala omarizira." 
Matthew20:17 Ndipo pamene Yesu analikukwera ku Yerusalemu, anatenga ophunzira khurni ndi awiri napita nao pa okha, ndipo panjira anati kwa iwo," 
Matthew20:18 Onani, tikwera ku Yerusalemu; ndipo Mwana wa munthu adzaperekedwa kwa ansembe akuru ndi alembi, ndipo iwo adzamweruza kuti ayenera imfa," 
Matthew20:19 nadzampereka kwa anthu akunja kuti amnyoze ndi kumkwapula, ndi kumpacika; ndipo Iye adzaukitsidwa tsiku lacitatu." 
Matthew20:20 Pomwepo anadza kwa Iye amace a ana a Zebedayo ndi ana ace omwe, namgwadira, ndi kumpempha kanthu." 
Matthew20:21 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iye, Ufuna ciani? Iye ananena, Lamulirani kuti ana anga awiri amenewa adzakhale, wina ku dzanja lanu lao manja, ndi wina kulamanzere, mu ufumu wanu." 
Matthew20:22 Koma Yesu anayankha nati, Inu simudziwa cimene mupempha, Kodi mukhoza kumwera cikho nditi ndidzamwere Ine? Iwo ananena kwa Iye, Ife tikhoza." 
Matthew20:23 Iye ananena kwa iwo, Cikho canga mudzamweradi; koma kukhala ku dzanja lamanja kwangandi kulamanzere, sikuli kwanga kupatsa, koma kuli kwa iwo omwe kwakonzedweratu ndi Atate wanga." 
Matthew20:24 Ndipo m'mene khurniwo anamva, anapsa mtima ndi abale awiriwo." 
Matthew20:25 Koma Yesu anawaitana, nati, Mudziwa kuti mafumu a anthu amadziyesa okha ambuye ao, ndipo akuru ao amacita ufumu pa iwo." 
Matthew20:26 Sikudzakhala comweco kwa inu ai; koma amene ali yense akafuna kukhala warnkuru mwa inu, adzakhala mtumiki wanu;" 
Matthew20:27 ndipo amene ali yense akafuna kukhala woyamba mwa inu, adzakhala kapolo wanu:" 
Matthew20:28 monga Mwana wa munthu sanadza kutumikiridwa koma kutumikira, ndi kupereka moyo wace dipo la anthu ambiri." 
Matthew20:29 Ndipo pamene iwo analikuturuka m'Yeriko, khamu lalikuru la anthu linamtsata Iye." 
Matthew20:30 Ndipo onani, anthu akhungu awiri anakhala m'rnphepete mwa njira; m'mene iwo anamva kuti Yesu analikupitirirapo, anapfuula nati, Muticitire ife cifundo, Inu Mwana wa Davide." 
Matthew20:31 Ndipo khamulo linawaletsa, kuti atonthole: koma anakuwitsa, nanena, Ambuye, muticitire cifundo, Inu Mwana wa Davide." 
Matthew20:32 Ndipo Yesu anaima, nawaitana, nati, Mufuna kuti ndikucitireni ciani?" 
Matthew20:33 Ananena kwa Iye, Ambuye, kuti maso athu apenye," 
Matthew20:34 Ndipo Yesu anagwidwa ndi cifundo, nakhudza maso ao; ndipo pornwepo anapenyanso, namtsata Iye." 
Matthew21:1 Ndipo parnene iwo anayandikira ku Yerusalemu, nafika ku Betefage, ku phiri la Azitona, pamenepo Yesu anatumiza ophunzira awiri," 
Matthew21:2 nanena kwa iwo, Mukani ku mudzi wopenyana ndi inu, ndipo pomwepo mudzapeza buru womangidwa, ndi mwana wace pamodzi nave, masulani iwo, mudze nao kwa Ine." 
Matthew21:3 Ndipo munthu akanena kanthu ndi inu, mudzati, Ambuye asowa iwo, Ndipo pomwepo adzawatumiza." 
Matthew21:4 Ndipo ici cinatero, kuti cikacitidwe conenedwa ndi mneneri kuti," 
Matthew21:5 Tauzani mwanawamkazi wa Ziyoni, Taona, Mfumu yako idza kwa iwe, Wofatsa ndi wokwera pa buru, Ndi pa kaburu, mwana wa nyama yonyarnula katundu." 
Matthew21:6 Ndipo ophunzirawo anamuka, nacita monga Yesu anawauza;" 
Matthew21:7 nabwera ndi buru ndi mwana wace, naika pa iwo zobvala zao, nakhala Iye pamenepo." 
Matthew21:8 Ndipo ambirimbiri a mpingowo anayala zobvala zao panjira; Ndipo ena anadula nthambi za mitengo, naziyala m'njirarno." 
Matthew21:9 Ndipo mipingo yakumtsogolera ndi yakumtsatira, inapfuula, kuti, Hosana kwa Mwana wa Davide! Wolemekezeka ndiye wakudza m'dzina la Ambuye! Hosana m'Kumwambamwamba!" 
Matthew21:10 Ndipo m'mene adalowa m'Yerusalemu mudzi wonse unasokonezeka, nanena, ndani uyu?" 
Matthew21:11 Ndipo makamu a anthu anati, Uyu ndi mneneri Yesu wa ku Nazarete wa ku Galileya." 
Matthew21:12 Ndipo Yesu analowa ku Kacisi wa Mulungu naturutsira kunja onse akugulitsa ndi kugula malonda, nagubuduza magome a osintha ndalama, ndi mipando ya ogulitsa nkhunda;" 
Matthew21:13 nanena kwa iwo, Calembedwa, Nyumba yanga idzanenedwa nyumba yakupemphera; koma inu mwaiyesa phanga la acifwamba." 
Matthew21:14 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye kuKacisiko akhungu ndi opunduka miyendo, naciritsidwa." 
Matthew21:15 Koma ansembe akuru ndi alembi, m'mene anaona zozizwitsa zomwe Iye anazicita, ndi ana alinkupfuula kuKacisiko kuti, Hosana kwa Mwana wa Davide, anapsa mtima," 
Matthew21:16 nanena kwa Iye, Mulinkumva kodi cimene alikunena awa? Ndipo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Inde: simunawerenga kodi, M'kamwa mwa makanda ndi oyamwa munafotokozera zolemekeza?" 
Matthew21:17 Ndipo Iye anawasiya, naturuka m'mzinda, napita ku Betaniya, nagona kumeneko." 
Matthew21:18 Ndipo mamawa, m'mene Iye analinkunkanso kumzinda, anamva njala," 
Matthew21:19 Ndipo pakuona mkuyu umodzi panjira, anafika pamenepo, napeza palibe kanthu koma masamba okha okha; nati Iye kwa uwo, Sudzabalanso cipatso ku nthawi zonse. Ndipo pomwepo mkuyuwo unafota." 
Matthew21:20 Ndipo ophunzira poona ici anazizwa, nati, Mkuyuwo unafota bwanji msanga?" 
Matthew21:21 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Indedi ndinena kwa inu, Ngati mukhala naco cikhulupiriro, osakayika-kayika, mudzacita si ici ca pa mkuyu cokha, koma ngati mudzati ngakhale ku phiri ili, Tanyamulidwa, nuponyedwe m'nvania, cidzacitidwa." 
Matthew21:22 Ndipo zinthu ziri zonse mukazifunsa m'kupemphera ndi kukhulupirira, mudzazilandira." 
Matthew21:23 Ndipo m'mene Iye analowa m'Kacisi, ansembe akuru ndi akuru anthu anadza kwa Iye analikuphunzitsa, nanena, Mucita izi ndi ulamuliro wotani? Ndipo ndani anakupatsani ulamuliro wotere?" 
Matthew21:24 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Inenso ndikufunsani mau amodzi, amene ngati muneliuza, Inenso ndikuuzani ndi ulamuliro wotani ndizicita izi:" 
Matthew21:25 Ubatizo wa Yohane, ucokera kuti? Kumwamba kodi kapena kwa anthu? Koma iwo anafunsana wina ndi mnzace, kuti, Tikati, Kumwamba, Iye adzati kwa ife, Munalekeranji kumvera iye?" 
Matthew21:26 Koma tikati, Kwa anthu, tiopa khamulo la anthu; pakuti onse amuyesa Yohane mneneri." 
Matthew21:27 Ndipo anamyankha Yesu, nati, Sitidziwa ife. Iyenso ananena nao, lnenso sindikuuzani ndi ulamuliro wotani ndizicita izi." 
Matthew21:28 Nanga mutani? Munthu anali cao ana awiri; nadza iye kwa woyamba nati, Mwanawe, kagwire lero nchito ku munda wampesa." 
Matthew21:29 Koma iye anakana, nati, Sindifuna ine; koma pambuyo pace analapa mtima napita." 
Matthew21:30 Ndipo anadza kwa winayo, natero momwemo. Ndipo iye anabvomera, nati, Ndipita mbuye; koma sanapita." 
Matthew21:31 Ndani wa awiriwo anacita cifuniro ca atate wace? Iwo ananena, Woyambayo. Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kuti amisonkho ndi akazi aciwerewere amatsogolera inu, kulowa mu Ufumu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew21:32 Popeza Yohane anadza kwa inu m'njira ya cilungamo, ndipo simunamveraiye; koma amisonkho ndi akazi aciwerewere anammvera iye; ndipo inu, m'mene munaciona, simunalapa pambuyo pace, kuti mumvere iye." 
Matthew21:33 Mverani fanizo lina: Panali munthu, mwini banja, amene analima munda wamphesa, nauzunguniza linga, nakumba umo moponderamo mphesa, namanga nsanja, naukongoletsa kwa olima munda, namuka kwina." 
Matthew21:34 Ndipo pamene nyengo ya zipatso inayandikira, anatumiza akapolo ace kwa olima mundawo, kukalandira zipatso zace." 
Matthew21:35 Ndipo olimawo anatenga akapolo ace, nampanda mmodzi, wina namupha, wina namponya miyala." 
Matthew21:36 Anatumizanso akapolo ena, akucuruka oposa akuyambawa; ndipo anawacitira iwo momwemo." 
Matthew21:37 Koma pambuyo pace anatumiza kwa iwo mwana wace, nati, Adzacitira mwana wanga ulemu." 
Matthew21:38 Koma olimawo m'mene anaona mwanayo, ananena wina ndi mnzace, Uyo ndiye wolowa; tiyeni, timuphe, ndipo ife tidzatenga colowa cace." 
Matthew21:39 Ndipo anamtenga iye, namponya kunja kwa munda, namupha." 
Matthew21:40 Tsono atabwera mwini munda, adzacitira olimawo ciani?" 
Matthew21:41 Iwo ananena kwa Iye, Adzaononga koipa oipawo, nadzapereka mundawo kwa olima ena, amene adzambwezera iye zipatso pa nyengo zace." 
Matthew21:42 Yesu ananena kwa iwo, 1 Kodi simunawerenga konse m'malembo, Mwala umene anaukana omanga nyumba Womwewu unakhala mutu wa pangondya: ici cinacokera kwa Ambuye, Ndipo ciri cozizwitsa m'maso mwathu?" 
Matthew21:43 Cifukwa cace ndinena kwa inu, 2 Ufumu wa Mulungu udzacotsedwa kwa inu, nudzapatsidwa kwa anthu akupatsa zipatso zace." 
Matthew21:44 Ndipo 3 iye wakugwa pa mwala uwu adzaphwanyika; koma pa iye amene udzamgwera, udzampera iye." 
Matthew21:45 Ndipo ansembe akuru ndi Afarisi, pakumva mafanizo ace, anazindikira kuti alikunena za iwo." 
Matthew21:46 Ndipo pamene anafuna kumgwira, anaopa makamu a anthu, 4 cifukwa anamuyesa mneneri." 
Matthew22:1 Ndipo Yesn anayankha, nalankhulanso kwa iwo m'mafanizo, nati," 
Matthew22:2 Ufumu wa Kumwamba ufanafana ndi munthu, mfumu, amene anakonzera mwana wace phwando la ukwati," 
Matthew22:3 natumiza akapolo ace kukaitana oitanidwa ku ukwati umene; ndipo iwo sanafuna kudza. 
Matthew22:4 Pomwepo anatumizanso akapolo ena, nanena, Uzani oitanidwawo, Onani, ndakonza phwando langa; ng'ombe zanga, ndi zonona ndinazipha, ndi zinthu zonse zapsya: idzani kuukwati." 
Matthew22:5 Koma iwo ananyalanyaza, nacoka, wina ku munda wace, wina ku malonda ace:" 
Matthew22:6 ndipo otsala anagwira akapolo ace, nawacitira cipongwe, nawapha." 
Matthew22:7 Koma mfumu inakwiya; nituma asilikari ace napululutsa ambanda aja, nitentha mudzi wao." 
Matthew22:8 Pomwepo inanena kwa akapolo ace, Za ukwati tsopano zapsya, koma oitanidwawo sanayenera." 
Matthew22:9 Cifukwa cace pitani inu ku mphambano za njira, ndipo amene ali yense mukampeze, itanani kuukwatiku." 
Matthew22:10 Ndipo akapolo ao anaturukira kunjira, nasonkhanitsa onse amene anawapeza, ngakhale oipa, ngakhale abwino; ndipo ukwatiwo unadzala ndi okhala pacakudya." 
Matthew22:11 Koma mfumuyo m'mene inadza kuwaona akudyawo, anapenya momwemo munthu wosabvala cobvala ca ukwati;" 
Matthew22:12 nanena kwa iye, Mnzangawe, unalowa muno bwanji wosakhala naco cobvala ca ukwati? Ndipo iye analibe mau." 
Matthew22:13 Pomwepo mfumu inati kwa atumiki, Mumange iye manja ndi miyendo, mumponye ku mdima wakunja; komweko kudzali kulira ndi kukukuta mano." 
Matthew22:14 Pakuti oitanidwa ndiwo ambiri, koma osankhidwa ndiwo owerengeka." 
Matthew22:15 Pomwepo Afarisi anamuka, nakhala upo wakumkola Iye m'kulankhula kwace." 
Matthew22:16 Ndipo anatumiza kwa Iye ophunzira ao, pamodzi ndi Aherode, amene ananena, Mphunzitsi, tidziwa kuti muli woona, ndipo muphunzitsa njira ya Mulungu moona ndithu, ndipo simusamala munthu ali yense; pakuti simuyang'anira pa nkhope ya anthu." 
Matthew22:17 Cifuka cace mutiuze ife, muganiza ciani? Kuloledwa kodi kupatsa msonkho kwa Kaisara, kapena iai?" 
Matthew22:18 Koma Yesu anadziwa kuipa kwao, nati, Mundiyeseranji Ine, onyenga inu?" 
Matthew22:19 Tandionetsani Ine ndalama yamsonkho. Ndipo iwo anadza nalo kwa Iye rupiya latheka. 
Matthew22:20 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Nca yani cithunzithunzi ici, ndi kulemba kwace?" 
Matthew22:21 Nanena iwo, Ca Kaisara. Pomwepo Iye anati kwa iwo, Cifukwa cace patsani kwa Kaisara zace za Kaisara, ndi kwa Mulungu zace za Mulungu." 
Matthew22:22 Ndipo pamene iwo anamva, anazizwa, namsiya Iye, nacokapo." 
Matthew22:23 Tsiku lomwelo anadza kwa Iye Asaduki, amene amanena kuti palibe kuuka kwa akufa; namfunsa Iye," 
Matthew22:24 nanena, Mphunzitsi, Mose anati, Ngati munthu akafa wopanda mwana, mphwace adzakwatira mkazi wace, nadzamuukitsira mbale wace mbeu." 
Matthew22:25 Tsono panali ndi ife abale asanu ndi awiri; ndipo wakuyamba anakwatira, namwalira wopanda mbeu, nasiyira mphwace mkazi wace;" 
Matthew22:26 cimodzimodzi waciwiri, ndi wacitatu, kufikira wacisanu ndi ciwiri." 
Matthew22:27 Ndipo pomarizira anamwaliranso mkaziyo. 
Matthew22:28 Cifukwa cace m'kuuka kwa akufa, iye adzakhala mkazi wa yani wa asanu ndi awiriwo? pakuti onse anakhala naye." 
Matthew22:29 Koma Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Mungolakwa a osadziwa malembo, kapena mphamvu za Mulungu." 
Matthew22:30 Pakuti m'kuuka kwa akufa sakwatira, kapena kukwatiwa, koma akhala ngati angelo a Kumwamba." 
Matthew22:31 Koma za kuuka kwa akufa, simunawerenga kodi comwe cinanenedwa kwa inu ndi Mulungu, kuti," 
Matthew22:32 Ine ndiri Mulungu wa Abrahamu, ndi Mulungu wa Isake, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo? Sali Mulungu wa akufa koma wa amoyo." 
Matthew22:33 Ndipo pamene makamu a anthu anamva, anazizwa ndi ciphunzitso cace." 
Matthew22:34 Koma Afarisi, pakumva kuti Iye anatontholetsa Asaduki, anasonkhana." 
Matthew22:35 Ndipo mmodzi wa iwo, mphunzitsi wa cilamulo, anamfunsa ndi kumuyesa Iye, nati," 
Matthew22:36 Mphunzitsi, lamulo lalikuru ndi liti la m'cilamulo?" 
Matthew22:37 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Uzikonda Ambuye Mulungu wako ndi mtima wako wonse, ndi moyo wako wonse, ndi nzeru zako zonse." 
Matthew22:38 Ili ndilo lamulo lalikuru ndi loyamba. 
Matthew22:39 Ndipo laciwiri lolingana nalo ndili, Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda iwe mwini." 
Matthew22:40 Pa malamulo awa awiri mpokolowekapo cilamulo conse ndi aneneri. 
Matthew22:41 Ndipo pamene Afarisi anasonkhana, Yesu anawafunsa," 
Matthew22:42 nati, Muganiza bwanji za Kristu? ali mwana wa yani? Iwo ananena kwa Iye, Wa Davide." 
Matthew22:43 Iye anati kwa iwo, Ndipo Davide mu Mzimu amchula Iye bwanji Ambuye, nanena," 
Matthew22:44 Ambuye ananena kwa Ambuye wanga, Ukhale pa dzanja lamanja langa, Kufikira Ine ndidzaika adani ako pansi pa mapazi ako." 
Matthew22:45 Cifukwa cace ngati Davide amchula Iye Ambuye, ali mwana wace bwanji? Ndipo panalibe mmodzi anatha kumyankha mau." 
Matthew22:46 Ndipo sanalimbika mtima munthu ali yense kumfunsa kanthu kuyambira tsiku lomwelo. 
Matthew23:1 Pomwepo Yesu analankhula ndi makamu a anthu ndi ophunzira ace," 
Matthew23:2 nanena, Alembi ndi Afarisi akhala pa mpando wa Mose;" 
Matthew23:3 cifukwa cace zinthu ziri zonse zimene iwo akauza inu, citani nimusunge; koma musatsanza nchito zao; pakuti iwo amalankhula, komasamacita." 
Matthew23:4 Inde, amanga akatundu olemera ndi osautsa ponyamula, nawasenza pa mapewa a anthu; koma iwo eni okha safuna kuwasuntha amenewo ndi cala cao." 
Matthew23:5 Koma amacita nchito zao zonse kuti aonekere kwa anthu; pakuti akulitsa citando cace ca njirisi zao, nakulitsa mphonje," 
Matthew23:6 nakonda malo a ulemu pamapwando, ndi mipando ya ulemu m'masunagoge," 
Matthew23:7 ndi kulankhulidwa m'misika, ndi kuchedwa ndi anthu, Rabi." 
Matthew23:8 Koma inu musachedwa Rabi; pakuti Mphunzitsi wanu ali mmodzi, ndipo inu nonse muli abale." 
Matthew23:9 Ndipo inu musachule wina atate wanu pansi pano, pakuti alipo mmodzi ndiye Atate wanu wa Kumwamba." 
Matthew23:10 Ndipo musachedwa atsogoleri, pakuti alipo mmodzi Mtsogoleri wanu, ndiye Kristu." 
Matthew23:11 Koma wamkuru wopambana wa inu adzakhala mtumiki wanu. 
Matthew23:12 Ndipo amene ali yense akadzikuza yekha adzacepetsedwa; koma amene adzicepetsa mwini yekha adzakulitsidwa. 
Matthew23:13 Koma tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! cifukwa mutsekera anthu Ufumu wa Kumwamba pamaso pao; pakuti inu nokha simulowamo, Ndipo muwaletsa amene alikulowa, kuti asalowemo. [" 
Matthew23:14 ] 
Matthew23:15 Tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! cifukwa mupitapita kunyanja ndi kumtunda kuyesa munthu mmodzi mtembenuki; ndipo m'mene akhala wotere, mumsandutsa mwana wa gehena woposa inu kawiri." 
Matthew23:16 Tsoka inu, atsogoleri akhungu, amene munena, Amene ali yense akalumbira kuchula Kacisi, palibe kanthu; koma amene akalumbira kuchula golidi wa Kacisi, wadzimangirira." 
Matthew23:17 Inu opusa, ndi akhungu: pakuti coposa nciti, golidi kodi, kapena Kacisi amene ayeretsa golidiyo?" 
Matthew23:18 Ndiponso, Amene ali yense akalumbira kuchula guwa la nsembe, palibe kanthu; koma amene akalumbira kuchula mtulo wa pamwamba pace wadzimangirira." 
Matthew23:19 Inu akhungu, pakuti coposa nciti, mtulo kodi, kapena guwa la nsembe limene liyeretsa mtulowo?" 
Matthew23:20 Cifukwa cace wakulumbira kuchula guwa la nsembe, alumbira limenelo ndi zonse za pamwamba pace." 
Matthew23:21 Ndipo wakulumbira kuchula Kacisi, alumbira ameneyo ndi Iye wakukhala momwemo." 
Matthew23:22 Ndipo wakulumbira kuchula Kumwamba, alumbira cimpando ca Mulungu, ndi Iye wakukhala pomwepo." 
Matthew23:23 Tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! cifukwa mupereka limodzi la magawo khumi la timbeu tonunkhira, ndi katsabola, ndi la citowe, nimusiya zolemera za cilamulo, ndizo kuweruza kolungama, ndi kucitira cifundo, ndi cikhulupiriro; koma zijazo munayenera kuzicita, osasiya izi zomwe." 
Matthew23:24 Atsogoleri akhungu inu, akukuntha udzudzu, koma ngamila mummeza." 
Matthew23:25 Tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! cifukwa mutsuka kunja kwace kwa cikho ndi mbale, koma m'katimo iwo adzala ndi kulanda ndi kusadziletsa." 
Matthew23:26 Mfarisi iwe wakhungu, yambotsuka m'kati mwa cikho ndi mbale, kuti kunja kwace kukhalenso koyera." 
Matthew23:27 Tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! cifukwa mufanafana ndi manda opaka njereza, amene aonekera okoma kunja kwace, koma adzala m'katimo ndi mafupa a anthu akufa ndi zonyansa zonse." 
Matthew23:28 Comweco inunso muonekera olungama pamaso pa anthu, koma m'kati muli odzala ndi cinyengo ndi kusayeruzika." 
Matthew23:29 Tsoka inu, alembi ndi Afarisi, onyenga! cifukwa mumanga nyumba za pa manda a aneneri, ndipo mukonza manda a anthu olungama," 
Matthew23:30 ndi kuti, Ife tikadakhala m'masiku a makolo anthu, sitikadakhala oyanjana nao pa mwazi wa aneneri." 
Matthew23:31 Pomwepo mutsimikiza nokha, kuti muli ana a iwo amene anapha aneneri." 
Matthew23:32 Dzazani inu muyeso wa makolo anu. 
Matthew23:33 Njoka inu, obadwa inu a mamba, mudzatha bwanji kuthawa kulanga kwace kwa gehena?" 
Matthew23:34 Cifukwa ca ici, onani, ndituma kwa inu aneneri ndi anzeru ndi alembi; ena a iwo mudzawapha, mudzawapacika; ndi ena a iwo mudzawakwapula m'masunagoge mwanu, ndi kuwazunza, kucokera ku mudzi umodzi, kufikira ku mudzi wina;" 
Matthew23:35 kotero kuti udzafika pa inu mwazi wonse wotayidwa pa dziko lapansi, kuyambira ku mwazi wa Abele wolungamayo, kufikira ku mwazi wa Zakariya mwana wa Barakiya, amene munamupha pakati pa Kacisi ndi guwa la nsembe." 
Matthew23:36 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Zinthu zonse izi zidzafika pa mbadwo uwu wamakono." 
Matthew23:37 Ha, Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu, amene umapha aneneri, ndi kuwaponya miyala iwo otumidwa kwa iwe! Ine ndinafuna kangati kusonkhanitsa pamodzi ana ako, inde monga thadzi lisonkhanitsa anapiye ace m'mapiko ace, koma inu simunafuna ai!" 
Matthew23:38 Onani, nyumba yanu yasiyidwa kwa inu yabwinja." 
Matthew23:39 Pakuti ndinena kwa inu, Simudzandionanso Ine, kuyambira tsopano, kufikira mudzanena, Wolemekezedwa Iye amene akudza m'dzina la Ambuye." 
Matthew24:1 Ndipo Yesu anaturuka kuKacisi; ndipo ophunzira ace anadza kudzamuonetsa cimangidwe ca Kacisiyo. 
Matthew24:2 Koma Iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Simuona izi zonse kodi? indetu ndinena kwa inu, Sipadzakhala pano mwala umodzi pa unzace, umene sudzagwetsedwa." 
Matthew24:3 Ndipo pamene Iye analikukhala pansi pa phiri la Azitona, ophunzira anadza kwa Iye pa yekha, nanena, Mutiuze ife zija zidzaoneka liti? ndipo cizindikiro ca kufika kwanu nciani, ndi ca mathedwe a nthawi ya pansi pano?" 
Matthew24:4 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Yang'anirani, asasokeretse inu munthu." 
Matthew24:5 Pakuti ambiri adzafika m'dzina langa, nadzanena, Ine ndine Kristu, nadzasokeretsa anthu ambiri." 
Matthew24:6 Koma inu mudzayamba kumva za nkhondo, ndi mbiri za nkhondo; onani, musadere nkhawa; pakuti kuyenera kuti izi zioneke; koma citsiriziro sicinafike." 
Matthew24:7 Pakuti mtundu umodzi wa anthu udzaukirana ndi mtundu wina, ndi ufumu ndi ufumu wina; ndipo kudzakhala njala ndi zibvomezi m'malo akuti akuti." 
Matthew24:8 Koma ndizo zonsezi zowawa zoyamba. 
Matthew24:9 Pamenepo adzakuperekani kunsautso, nadzakuphani; ndipo anthu a mitundu yonse adzadana nanu, cifukwa ca dzina langa." 
Matthew24:10 Ndipo pomwepo ambiri adzakhumudwa, nadzaperekana wina ndi mnzace, nadzadana wina ndi mnzace." 
Matthew24:11 Ndipo aneneri onama ambiri adzauka, nadzasokeretsaanthuambiri." 
Matthew24:12 Ndipo cifukwa ca kucuruka kwa kusayeruzika, cikondano ca anthu aunyinji cidzazirala." 
Matthew24:13 Koma iye wakulimbika cilimbikire kufikira kucimariziro, yemweyo adzapulumuka." 
Matthew24:14 Ndipo uthenga uwu wabwino wa Ufumu udzalalikidwa pa dziko lonse lapansi, ukhale mboni kwa anthu h mitundu yonse; ndipo pomwepo cidzafika cimariziro." 
Matthew24:15 Cifukwa cace m'mene mukadzaona conyansa ca kupululutsa, cimene cidanenedwa ndi Danieli mneneri, citaima m'malo oyera (iye amene awerenga m'kalata azindikire)" 
Matthew24:16 pomwepo iwo ali m'Yudeya athawire kumapiri: 
Matthew24:17 iye ali pamwamba pa chindwi, asatsikire kunyamula za m'nyumba mwace;" 
Matthew24:18 ndi iye wa m'munda asabwere kutenga copfunda cace. 
Matthew24:19 Koma tsoka ali nalo iwo akukhala ndi pakati, ndi akuyamwitsa ana m'masiku awo!" 
Matthew24:20 Ndipo pempherani kuti kuthawa kwanu kusakhale pa nyengo yacisanu, kapena pa Sabata;" 
Matthew24:21 pakuti pomwepo padzakhala masauko akuru, monga sipadakhale otero kuyambira ciyambi ca dziko, kufikira tsopano, inde ndipo sipadzakhalanso." 
Matthew24:22 Ndipo akadaleka kufupikitsidwa masiku awo, sakadapulumuka munthu ali yense: koma cifukwa ca osankhidwawo masiku awo adzafupikitsidwa." 
Matthew24:23 Pomwepo munthu akanena kwa inu, Onani, Kristu ali kuno, kapena uko musambvomereze;" 
Matthew24:24 cifukwa Akristu onama adzauka, ndi aneneri onama nadzaonetsa zizindikiro zazikuru ndi zozizwa: kotero kuti akanyenge, ngati nkotheka, osankhidwa omwe. Onani ndakuuziranitu pasadafike." 
Matthew24:25 Cifukwa cace akanena kwa inu, Onani, Iye ali m'cipululu; musamukeko." 
Matthew24:26 Onani, ali m'zipinda; musabvomereze." 
Matthew24:27 Pakuti monga mphezi idzera kum'mawa, nionekera kufikira kumadzulo; kotero kudzakhalanso kufika kwace kwa Mwana wa munthu." 
Matthew24:28 Kumene kuli konse uli mtembo, miimba Idzasonkhanira konko." 
Matthew24:29 Koma pomwepo, atapita masauko a masiku awo, dzuwa lidzadetsedwa, ndi mwezi sudzaonetsa kuwala kwace, ndi nyenyezi zidzagwa kucokera kumwamba, ndi mphamvu za kumwamba zidzagwedezeka:" 
Matthew24:30 ndipo pomwepo padzaoneka m'thambo cizindikiro ca Mwana wa munthu; ndipo mitundu yonse ya pa dziko lapansi idzadziguguda pacifuwa, nidzapenya Mwana wa munthu alinkudza pa mitambo ya kumwamba, ndi mphamvu ndi ulemerero waukuru." 
Matthew24:31 Ndipo Iye adzatumiza angelo ace ndi kulira kwakukuru kwa lipenga, ndipo iwo adzasonkhanitsa osankhidwa ace ku mphepo zinai, kuyambira malekezero a thambo kufikira malekezero ace ena." 
Matthew24:32 Koma phunzirani ndi mkuyu fanizo lace; pamene tsopano nthambi yace iri yanthete, nipuka masa-i mba ace, muzindikira kuti dzinja liyandikira;" 
Matthew24:33 comweconso inu, pamene mudzaona zimenezo, zindikirani kuti Iye ali pafupi, inde pakhomo." 
Matthew24:34 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, mbadwo uwu sudzatha kucoka, kufikira zinthu zonsezi zidzacitidwa." 
Matthew24:35 Thambo ndi dziko lapansi zidzacoka, koma mau anga sadzacoka ai." 
Matthew24:36 Koma za tsiku ilo ndi nthawi yace sadziwa munthu ali yense, angakhale angelo a Kumwamba, kapena Mwana, koma Atate yekha." 
Matthew24:37 Ndipo 1 monga masiku a Nowa, kotero kudzakhala kufika kwace kwa Mwana wa munthu." 
Matthew24:38 Pakuti monga m'masiku aja, cisanafike cigumula, anthu analinkudya ndi kumwa, analikukwatira ndi kukwatiwa, kufikira tsiku limene Nowa analowa m'cingalawa," 
Matthew24:39 ndipo iwo sanadziwa kanthu, kufikira kumene cigumula cinadza, cinapululutsa iwo onse, kotero kudzakhala kufika kwace kwa Mwana wa munthu." 
Matthew24:40 Pomwepo 2 adzakhala awiri m'munda; mmodzi adzatengedwa, ndi wina adzasiyidwa:" 
Matthew24:41 awiri adzakhala opera pamphero; mmodzi adzatengedwa, ndi wina adzasiyidwa." 
Matthew24:42 3 Cifukwa cace dikirani, pakuti simudziwa tsiku lace lakufika Ambuye wanu." 
Matthew24:43 Koma 4 dziwani ici, kuti mwini nyumba akadadziwa nthawi yiti mbala ikudza, iye akadadikira, ndipo sakadalola kuti nyumba yace ibooledwe." 
Matthew24:44 Cifukwa cace 5 khalani inunso okonzekeratu; cifukwa munthawi m'mene simuganizira, Mwana wa munthu adzadza." 
Matthew24:45 6 Ndani kodi ali kapolo wokhulupirika ndi wanzeru, amene mbuye wace anamkhazika woyang'anira banja lace, kuwapatsa zakudya pa nthawi yace?" 
Matthew24:46 Wodala kapolo amene mbuye wace, pakufika, adzampeza iye alikucita cotero." 
Matthew24:47 Indetu, ndinena kwa inu, kuti 7 adzamkhazika iye woyang'anira zinthu zace zonse." 
Matthew24:48 Koma kapolo woipa akanena mumtima mwace, Mbuye wanga wacedwa;" 
Matthew24:49 nadzayamba kupanda akapolo anzace, nadya ndi kumwa pamodzi ndi oledzera;" 
Matthew24:50 mbuye wa kapoloyo adzafika tsiku losamuyembekeza iye, ndi nthawi yosadziwa iye," 
Matthew24:51 nadzamdula, nadzaika pokhala pace ndi anthu onyenga; 8 pomwepo padzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano." 
Matthew25:1 Pomwepo Ufumu wa Kumwamba udzafanizidwa ndi anamwali khumi, amene anatenga nyali zao, naturuka kukakomana ndi mkwati." 
Matthew25:2 Ndipo asanu a iwo anali opusa, ndi asanu anali ocenjera." 
Matthew25:3 Pakuti opusawo, m'mene anatenga nyali zao, sanadzitengeranso mafuta;" 
Matthew25:4 koma anzeruwo anatenga mafuta m'nsupa zao, pamodzi ndi nyali zao." 
Matthew25:5 Ndipo pamene mkwati anacedwa, onsewo anaodzera, nagona tulo." 
Matthew25:6 Koma pakati pa usiku panali kupfuula, Onani, mkwati! turukani kukakomana naye." 
Matthew25:7 Pomwepo anauka anamwali onse amenewo, nakonza nyali zao." 
Matthew25:8 Ndipo opusa anati kwa ocenjera, Tipatseniko ena a mafuta anu; cifukwa nyali zathu zirikuzima." 
Matthew25:9 Koma ocenjera anayankha nati, Kapena sangakwanire ife ndi inu; koma makamaka mukani kwa ogulitsa malonda, mukadzigulire inu nokha." 
Matthew25:10 Ndipo pamene iwo analikumuka kukagula, mkwati anafika; ndipo okonzekawo, analowa naye pamodzi muukwati; ndipo anatseka pakhomo." 
Matthew25:11 Koma pambuyo pace anadzanso anamwali enawo, nati, Mbuye, Mbuye, mutitsegulire ife." 
Matthew25:12 Koma iye anayankha nati, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, sindikudziwani." 
Matthew25:13 Cifukwa cace dikirani, pakuti simudziwa tsiku lace, kapena nthawi yace." 
Matthew25:14 Pakuti monga munthu, wakunka ulendo, aitana akapolo ace, napereka kwa iwo cuma cace." 
Matthew25:15 Ndipo mmodzi anampatsa ndalama za matalente zisanu, ndi wina ziwiri, ndi wina imodzi; kwa iwo onse monga nzeru zao; namuka iye." 
Matthew25:16 Pomwepo uyo amene analandira ndalama zisanu, anapita kugula nazo malonda, napindulapo ndalama zina zisanu." 
Matthew25:17 Cimodzimodzinso uyo wa ziwirizo, anapindulapo zina ziwiri." 
Matthew25:18 Koma uyo amene analandira imodziyo anamuka, nakumba pansi, naibisa ndalama ya mbuye wace." 
Matthew25:19 Ndipo Itapita nthawi yaikuru, anabwera mbuye wa akapolo awo, nawerengera nao pamodzi." 
Matthew25:20 Ndipo uyo amene adalandira ndalama za matalente zisanu anadza, ali nazo ndalama zina zisanu, nanena, Mbuye, munandipatsa ndalama za matalente, zisanu, onani ndapindulapo ndalama zisanu zina." 
Matthew25:21 Mbuye wace anati kwa iye, Cabwino, kapolo iwe wabwino ndi wokhulupirika; unali wokhulupirika pa zinthu zazing'ono, ndidzakhazika iwe pa zinthu zambiri; Iowa iwe m'cikondwero ca mbuye wako." 
Matthew25:22 Ndipo wa ndalama ziwiriyo anadzanso, nati, Mbuye, munandipatsa ine ndalama ziwiri; onani, ndapindulapo ndalama zina ziwiri." 
Matthew25:23 Mbuye wace anati kwa iye, Cabwino, kapolo iwe wabwino ndi wokhulupirika; unali wokhulupirika pa zinthu zazing'ono, ndidzakhazika iwe pa zinthu zambiri; Iowa iwe m'cikondwero ca mbuye wako." 
Matthew25:24 Ndipo uyonso amene analandira ndalama imodzi, anadza, nati, Mbuye, ndinakudziwani inu kuti ndinu munthu wouma mtima, wakututa kumene simunafesa, ndi wakusonkhanitsa kumene simunawaza;" 
Matthew25:25 ndinaopa ine, ndinapita, ndinabisa pansi ndalama yanu: onani, siyi yanu." 
Matthew25:26 Koma mbuye wace anayankha, nati kwa iye, Kapolo iwe woipa ndi waulesi, unadziwa kuti ndimatuta kumene sindinafesa, ndi kusonkhanitsa kumene sindinawaza;" 
Matthew25:27 cifukwa cace ukadapereka ndalama zanga kwa okongola ndalama, ndipo ine pobwera ndikadatenga zanga ndi phindu lace." 
Matthew25:28 Cifukwa cace cotsani kwa iye ndalamayo, muipatse kwa amene ali nazo ndalama khumi." 
Matthew25:29 Pakuti kwa yense amene ali nazo, kudzapatsidwa, ndipo iye adzakhala nazo zocuruka: koma kwa iye amene alibe, kudzacotsedwa, cingakhale cimene anali naco." 
Matthew25:30 Ndipo ponyani kapoloyo wopanda pace ku mdima wakunja; kumene kudzakhala kulira ndi kukukuta mano. 
Matthew25:31 Koma pamene Mwana wa munthu adzadza mu ulemerero wace, ndi angelo onse pamodzi naye, pomwepo Iye adzakhala pa cimpando ca kuwala kwace:" 
Matthew25:32 ndipo adzasonkhanidwa pamaso pace anthu a mitundu yonse; ndipo Iye adzalekanitsa iwo wina ndi mnzace, monga mbusa alekanitsa nkhosa ndi mbuzi;" 
Matthew25:33 nadzakhalitsa nkhosa ku dzanja lace lamanja, koma mbuzi kulamanzere." 
Matthew25:34 Pomwepo Mfumuyo idzanena kwa iwo a ku dzanja lace lamanja, Idzani kuno inu odalitsika a Atate wanga, lowani mu Ufumu wokonzedwera kwa inu pa cikhazikiro cace ca dziko lapansi:" 
Matthew25:35 pakuti ndinali ndi njala, ndipo munandipatsa Ine kudya; ndinali ndi ludzu, ndipo munandimwetsa Ine; ndinali mlendo, ndipo munacereza Ine;" 
Matthew25:36 wamarisece Ine, ndipo munandibveka; ndinadwala, ndipo munadza kuceza ndi Ine; ndinali m'nyumba yandende, ndipo munadza kwa Ine." 
Matthew25:37 Pomwepo olungama adzamyankha Iye kuti, Ambuye, tinakuonani Inu liti wanjala, ndi kukudyetsani? kapena waludzu, ndi kukumwetsani?" 
Matthew25:38 Ndipo tinaona Inu liti mlendo, ndi kukucerezani? kapena wamarisece, ndi kukubvekani?" 
Matthew25:39 Ndipo tinakuonani Inu liti wodwala, kapena m'nyumba yandende, ndipo tinadza kwa Inu?" 
Matthew25:40 Ndipo Mfumuyo idzayankha nidzati kwa iwo, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Cifukwa munacitira ici mmodzi wa abale anga, ngakhale ang'onong'ono awa, munandicitira ici Ine." 
Matthew25:41 Pomwepo Iye adzanena kwa iwo a ku dzanja lamanzere, Cokani kwa Ine otembereredwa inu, ku mota wa nthawi zonse wokolezedwera mdierekezi ndi amithenga ace:" 
Matthew25:42 pakuti ndinali ndi njala, ndipo simunandipatsa Ine kudya: ndinali ndi ludzu, ndipo simunandimwetsa Ine:" 
Matthew25:43 ndinali mlendo, ndipo simunandilandira Ine; wamarisece ndipo simunandibveka Ine; wodwala, ndi m'nyumba yandende, ndipo simunadza kundiona Ine." 
Matthew25:44 Pomwepo iwonso adzayankha kuti, Ambuye, tinakuonani liti wanjala, kapena waludzu, kapena mlendo, kapena wamarisece, kapena m'nyumba yandende, ndipo ife sitinakutumikirani Inu?" 
Matthew25:45 Pomwepo Iye adzayankha iwo kuti, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Cifukwa munalibe kucitira ici mmodzi wa awa ang'onong'ono, munalibe kundicitira ici Ine." 
Matthew25:46 Ndipo amenewa adzacoka kumka ku cilango ca nthawi zonse; koma olungama ku moyo wa nthawi zonse. 
Matthew26:1 Ndipo panali pamene Yesu anatha mau onse amenewa, anati kwa ophunzira ace," 
Matthew26:2 Mudziwa kuti akapita masiku awiri, Paskha ufika, ndipo Mwana wa munthu adzaperekedwa kupacikidwa pamtanda." 
Matthew26:3 Pomwepo anasonkhana ansembe akuru, ndi akuru a anthu, ku bwalo la mkuru wa ansembe, dzina lace Kayafa;" 
Matthew26:4 nakhala upo wakuti amgwire Yesu ndi cinyengo, namuphe." 
Matthew26:5 Koma ananena iwo, Pa dzuwa la cakudya iai, kuti pasakhale phokoso la anthu." 
Matthew26:6 Ndipo pamene Yesu anali m'Betaniya, m'nyumba ya Simoni wakhate," 
Matthew26:7 anadza kwa Iye mkazi, anali nayo nsupa yaalabastero ndi mafuta onunkhira bwino a mtengo wapatari, nawatsanulira pamutu pace, m'mene Iye analikukhala pacakudya." 
Matthew26:8 Koma m'mene ophunzira anaona, anada mtima, nanena, Cifukwa ninji kuononga kumeneku?" 
Matthew26:9 Pakuti mafuta awa akadagulitsa ndalama zambiri, ndi kuzipatsa anthu aumphawi." 
Matthew26:10 Koma Yesu podziwa, anati kwa iwo, Mumbvutiranji mkaziyu? popeza andicitira Ine nchito yabwino." 
Matthew26:11 Pakuti nthawi zonse muli nao aumphawi pamodzi nanu; koma simuli ndi Ine nthawi zonse. 
Matthew26:12 Pakuti mkaziyo, m'mene anathira mafuta awa pathupi panga, wandicitiratu ici pa kuikidwa kwanga." 
Matthew26:13 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, kumene kuli konse uthenga uwu wabwino udzalalikidwa m'dziko lonse lapansi, ici cimene mkaziyo anacitaci cidzakambidwanso cikumbukiro cace." 
Matthew26:14 Pomwepo mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, dzina lace Yudase Isikariote, anamuka kwa ansembe akuru," 
Matthew26:15 nati, Mufuna kundipatsa ciani, ndipo ine ndidzampereka Iye kwa inu? Ndipo iwo anamwerengera iye ndalama zasiliva makumi atatu." 
Matthew26:16 Ndipo kuyambira pamenepo iye anafunafuna nthawi yabwino yakuti ampereke Iye. 
Matthew26:17 Ndipo tsiku loyamba la mkate wopanda cotupitsa, ophunzira anadza kwa Yesu, nati, Mufuna tikakonzere kuti Paskha, kuti mukadye?" 
Matthew26:18 Nati Iye, Mukani kumzinda kwa munthu wangana, mukati kwa iye, Mphunzitsi anena. Nthawi yanga yayandikirai ndidzadya Paskha kwanu pamodzi ndi ophunzira anga." 
Matthew26:19 Ndipo ophunzira anacita monga Yesu anawauza, nakonza Paskha." 
Matthew26:20 Ndipo pakufika madzulo, Iye analikukhala pacakudya pamodzi ndi ophunzira khumi ndi awiri;" 
Matthew26:21 ndipo m'mene analinkudya, Iye anati, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, mmodzi wa inu adzandipereka Ine." 
Matthew26:22 Ndipo iwo anagwidwa ndi cisoni cacikuru, nayamba kunena kwa Iye mmodzi mmodzi, Kodi ndine, Ambuye?" 
Matthew26:23 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati, Iye amene asunsa pamodzi ndi Ine dzanja lace m'mbale, yemweyu adzandipereka Ine." 
Matthew26:24 Mwana wa munthu acokatu, monga kunalembedwa za Iye; koma tsoka ali nalo munthu amene Mwana wa munthu aperekedwa ndi iye! kukadakhala bwino kwa munthuyo ngati sakadabadwa." 
Matthew26:25 Ndipo Yudase, womperekayo anayankha nati, Kedi ndine, Rabi? Iye ananena kwa iye, Iwe watero." 
Matthew26:26 Ndipo pamene iwo analinkudya, Yesu anatenga mkate, nadalitsa, naunyema; ndipo m'mene anapatsa kwa ophunzira, anati, Tengani, idyani; ici ndi thupi langa." 
Matthew26:27 Ndipo pamene anatenga cikho, anayamika, napatsa iwo, nanena, Mumwere ici inu nonse," 
Matthew26:28 pakuti ici ndici mwazi wanga wa pangano, wothiridwa cifukwa ca anthu ambiri ku kucotsa macimo." 
Matthew26:29 Ndipo ndinena kwa inu, sindidzamwanso cipatso ici campesa, kufikira tsiku limene ndidzamwa catsopano, pamodzi ndi inu, mu Ufumu wa Atate wanga." 
Matthew26:30 Ndipo pamene anayimba nyimbo, anaturuka kunka ku phiri la Azitona." 
Matthew26:31 Pamenepo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Inu nonse mudzakhumudwa cifukwa ca Ine usiku uno; pakuti kwalembedwa, Ndidzakantha mbusa, Ndipo zidzabalalika Nkhosa za gulu." 
Matthew26:32 Koma nditauka ndidzatsogolera inu ku Galileya. 
Matthew26:33 Koma Petro ananena kwa Iye, Ngakhale onse adzakhumudwa cifukwa ca Inu, ine sindidzakhumudwa nthawi zonse." 
Matthew26:34 Yesu anati kwa iye, Indetu ndinena kwa iwe, kuti usiku uno, tambala asanalire, udzandikana Ine katatu." 
Matthew26:35 Petro ananena kwa Iye, Ngakhale ine ndikafa ndi Inu, sindidzakukanani Inu iai. Anateronso ophunzira onse." 
Matthew26:36 Pomwepo Yesu anadza ndi iwo ku malo ochedwa Getsemane, nanena kwa ophunzira ace, Bakhalani inu pompano, ndipite uko ndikapemphere." 
Matthew26:37 Ndipo anatenga Petro ndi ana awiria Zebedayo pamodzi naye, nayamba kugwidwa ndi cisoni ndi kuthedwa nzeru." 
Matthew26:38 Pamenepo ananena kwa iwo, Moyo wanga uti wozingidwa ndi cisoni ca kufika naco kuimfa; khalani pano mucezere pamodzi ndi Ine." 
Matthew26:39 Ndipo anamuka patsogolo pang'ono, nagwa nkhope yace pansi, napemphera, nati, Atate, ngati nkutheka, cikho ici cindipitirire Ine; koma si monga ndifuna Ine, koma lou." 
Matthew26:40 Ndipo anadza kwa ophunzira, nawapeza iwo ali m'tulo, nanena kwa Petro, Nkutero kodi? simukhoza kucezera ndi Ine mphindi imodzi?" 
Matthew26:41 Cezerani ndi kupemphera, kuti mungalowe m'kuyesedwa: mzimutu uti wakufuna, koma thupi liri lolefuka." 
Matthew26:42 Anamukanso kaciwiri, napemphera, nati, Atate wanga, ngati ici sicingandipitirire, koma ndimwere ici, kufuna kwanu kucitidwe." 
Matthew26:43 Ndipo anabweranso, nawapeza iwo ali m'tulo, pakuti zikope zao zinalemera ndi tulo." 
Matthew26:44 Ndipo anawasiyanso, napemphera kacitatu, nateronso mau omwewo." 
Matthew26:45 Pomwepo anadza kwa ophunzira, nanena kwa iwo, Gonani nthawi yatsalayi, mupumule; onani, nthawi yafika, ndipo Mwana wa munthu aperekedwa m'manja ocimwa." 
Matthew26:46 Ukani, timuke; taonani, iye wakundipereka wayandikira." 
Matthew26:47 Ndipo Iye ali cilankhulire, onani, Yudase, mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, anadza, ndi pamodzi ndi iye khamu lalikuru la anthu, ndi malupanga ndi mikunkhu, kucokera kwa ansembe akuru ndi akuru a anthu." 
Matthew26:48 Koma wompereka Iye anawapatsa cizindikiro, nanena, Iye amene ndidzampsompsona ndiyeyo, mumgwire Iye." 
Matthew26:49 Ndipo pomwepo anadza kwa Yesu, nati, Tikuoneni, Rabi; nampsompsonetsa." 
Matthew26:50 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Mnzanga, wafikiranji: iwe? Pomwepo iwo anadza, namthira Yesu manja, namgwira Iye." 
Matthew26:51 Ndipo onani, mmodzi wa iwo anali pamodzi ndi Yesu, anatansa dzanja lace, nasolola Iupanga lace, nakantha kapolo wa mkuru wa ansembe, nadula khutu lace." 
Matthew26:52 Pomwepo Yesu ananena kwa iye, Tabweza Iupanga lako m'cimakemo, pakuti onse akugwira lupanga adzaonongeka ndi Iupanga," 
Matthew26:53 Kapena uganiza kuti sindingathe kupemphera Atate wanga, ndipo Iye adzanditumizira tsopano lino mabungwe a angelo oposa khumi ndi awiri?" 
Matthew26:54 Koma pakutero malembo adzakwaniridwa bwanji, pakuti kuyenera comweco?" 
Matthew26:55 Nthawi yomweyo Yesu anati kwa makamuwo a anthu, Kodi munaturukira kundigwira Ine ndi malupanga ndi mikunkhu, ngati wacifwamba? Tsiku ndi tsiku ndimakhala m'Kacisi kuphunzitsa, ndipo simunandigwira." 
Matthew26:56 Koma izi zonse zinacitidwa, kuti 1 zolembedwa za aneneri zikwaniridwe. Pomwepo ophunzira onse anamsiya Iye, nathawa." 
Matthew26:57 Ndipo iwo akugwira Yesu anaaka naye kwa Kayafa, mkuru wa ansembe, kumene adasonkhana alembi ndi akuru omwe." 
Matthew26:58 Koma Petro anamtsata kutari, kufikira ku bwalo la mkuru wa ansembe, nalowamo, nakhala pansi ndi anyamata, kuti aone cimariziro." 
Matthew26:59 Ndipo ansembe akuru ndi akuru mirandu onse mafunafuna umboni wonama wakutsutsa Yesu, kuti amuphe Iye;" 
Matthew26:60 koma sanaupeza zingakhale 2 mboni zonama zambiri zinadza. Koma pambuyo pace anadza awiri," 
Matthew26:61 nati, Uyu ananena kuti, 3 Ndikhoza kupasula Kacisi, ndi kummanganso masiku atatu." 
Matthew26:62 Ndipo mkuru wa ansembe anaimirira, nati kwa Iye, Subvomera kanthu kodi? nciani ici cimene awa akunenera Iwe?" 
Matthew26:63 Koma 4 Yesu anangokhala cete. Ndipo mkuru wa ansembe ananena kwa Iye, Ndikulumbiritsa Iwe pa Mulungu wamoyo, kuti utiuze ife ngati Iwe ndiwe Kristu, Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Matthew26:64 Yesu anati kwa iye, Mwatero, koma ndinenanso kwa inu, 5 Kuyambira tsopano mudzaona Mwana wa munthu ali kukhala ku dzanja lamanja la mphamvu, ndi kufika pa mitambo ya kumwamba." 
Matthew26:65 Pomwepo mkuru wa ansembe 6 anang'amba zobvala zace, nati, Acitira Mulungu mwano; tifuniranji mboni zina? onani, tsopano mwamva mwanowo;" 
Matthew26:66 muganiza bwanji? lwo anayankha nati, 7 Ali woyenera kumupha," 
Matthew26:67 8 Pomwepo iwo anathira malobvu pankhope pace, nambwanyula Iye; ndipo ena anampanda kofu," 
Matthew26:68 nati, 9 Utilote ife, Kristu Iwe; wakumenya Iwe ndani?" 
Matthew26:69 Ndipo 10 Petro adakhala pabwato: ndipo mdzakazi anadza kwa iye, nanena, Iwenso unali ndi Yesu wa ku Galileya." 
Matthew26:70 Koma iye anakana pamaso pa anthu onse, kuti, Cimene unena sindicidziwa." 
Matthew26:71 Ndipo pamene iye anaturuka kunka kucipata, mkazi wina anamuona, nati kwa iwo a pomwepo, Uyonso anali ndi Yesu Mnazarayo." 
Matthew26:72 Ndipo anakananso ndi cilumbiro, kuti, Sindidziwa munthuyo." 
Matthew26:73 Ndipo popita nthawi yaing'ono, iwo akuimapo anadza, nati kwa Petro, Zoonadi, iwenso uli wa iwo; pakuti malankhulidwe ako akuzindikiritsa iwe." 
Matthew26:74 11 Pamenepo iye anayamba kutemberera ndi kulumbira, kuti, Sindidziwa munthuyo. Ndipo pompo tambala analira." 
Matthew26:75 Ndipo Petro anakumbukira mau amene Yesu adati, 12 Asanalire tambala udzandikana katatu. Ndipo anaturukira kunja, nalira ndi kuwawa mtima." 
Matthew27:1 Ndipo pakudza mamawa, ansembe akuru ndi akuru a anthu onse anakhala upo wakumcitira Yesu, kuti amuphe;" 
Matthew27:2 ndipo anammanga Iye, namuka naye, nampereka Iye kwa Pilato kazembeyo." 
Matthew27:3 Pamenepo Yudase yemwe anampereka Iye, poona kuti Iye anatsutsidwa kuti afe, analapa, nabweza ndalama zija zasiliva makumi atatu kwa ansembe akuru ndi akuru," 
Matthew27:4 nanena, Ndinacita koipa ine, pakupereka mwazi wosalakwa. Koma iwo anati, Tiri naco ciani ife? udzionere wekha." 
Matthew27:5 Ndipo iye anataya pansi ndalamazo paKacisi, nacokapo, nadzipacika yekha pakhosi." 
Matthew27:6 Ndipo ansembe akuru anatenga ndalamazo, nati, Sikuloledwa kuziika m'cosonkhera ndalama za Mulungu, cifukwa ndizo mtengo wa mwazi." 
Matthew27:7 Koma anapangana, nazigula munda wa woumba mbiya, ukhale manda a alendo." 
Matthew27:8 Cifukwa cace munda umenewu anaucha, Munda-wa-mwazi, kufikira lero lino." 
Matthew27:9 Pamenepo cinakwaniridwa conenedwa ndi Yeremiya mneneri, ndi kuti, Ndipo iwo anatenga ndalamazo zasiliva makumi atatu, Mtengo wa uja wowerengedwa mtengo wace, Amene iwo a ana a Israyeli anawerenga mtengo wace;" 
Matthew27:10 Ndipo anazipereka kugula munda wa woumba mbiya, Monga anandilamulira ine Ambuye." 
Matthew27:11 Ndipo Yesu anaimirira pamaso pa kazembe, ndipo kazembeyo anamfunsa Iye kuti, Kodi Iwe ndiwe mfumu ya Ayuda? Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Mwatero." 
Matthew27:12 Ndipo pakumnenera Iye ansembe akuru ndi akuru, Iye sanayankha kanthu." 
Matthew27:13 Pomwepo Pilato ananena kwa Iye, Sukumva kodi zinthu zambiri zotere akunenera Iwe?" 
Matthew27:14 Ndipo sanayankha Iye, ngakhale mau amodzi, kotero kuti kazembe anazizwa ndithu." 
Matthew27:15 Ndipo pa Paskha kazembe adazolowera kumasulira anthu mmodzi wandende, amene iwo anafuna." 
Matthew27:16 Ndipo pa nthawi yomweyo anali ndi wandende wodziwika, dzina lace Baraba." 
Matthew27:17 Cifukwa cace pamene anasonkhana, Pilato ananena kwa iwo, Mufuna kuti ndikumasulireni yani? Baraba kodi, kapena Yesu, wochedwa Kristu?" 
Matthew27:18 Pakuti anadziwa kuti anampereka Iye mwanjiru. 
Matthew27:19 Ndipo pamene Pilato analikukhala pa mpando wakuweruza, mkazi wace anatumiza mau kwa iye, kunena, Musacite kanthu ndi munthu wolungamayo; pakuti lero m'kulota ine ndasauka kwambiri cifukwa ca Iye." 
Matthew27:20 Koma ansembe akuru anapangira anthu kuti apemphe Baraba, koma kuti aononge Yesu." 
Matthew27:21 Koma kazembe anati kwa iwo, Mufuna kuti ndikumasulireni uti wa awa awiri? Ndipo iwo anati, Baraba." 
Matthew27:22 Pilato ananena kwa iwo, Nanga ndidzacita ciani ndi Yesu, wochedwa Kristu?" 
Matthew27:23 Onse anati, Apacikidwe pamtanda. Ndipo iye anati, Cifukwa ninji? anacita coipa cotani? Koma iwo anapfuulitsa kopambana, Apacikidwe pamtanda." 
Matthew27:24 Koma Pilato poona kuti sanafitse, koma kuti linapambana phokoso, anatenga madzi, nasamba manja pamaso pa khamulo, nati, Ine ndiribe kucimwira mwazi wa munthu uyu wolungama, mudzionere nokha." 
Matthew27:25 Ndipo anthu onse anabvomereza, ndi kuti, Mwazi wace uli pa ife ndi pa ana athu." 
Matthew27:26 Pomwepo iye anamasulira iwo Baraba, koma anakwapula Yesu, nampereka Iye kuti akampacike pamtanda." 
Matthew27:27 Pomwepo asilikari a kazembe anamuka naye Yesu ku bwalo la mirandu, nasonkhanitsa kwa iye khamu lao lonse." 
Matthew27:28 Ndipo anabvula malaya ace, nambveka malaya ofiira acifumu." 
Matthew27:29 Ndipo analuka korona waminga, nambveka pamutu pace, namgwiritsa bango m'dzanja lamanja lace; ndipo anagwada pansi pamaso pace, namcitira cipongwe, nati, Tikuoneni, Mfumu ya Ayuda!" 
Matthew27:30 Namthira malobvu, natenga bango, nampanda Iye pamutu." 
Matthew27:31 Ndipo pamene anatha kumcitira Iye cipongwe, anabvula malaya aja, nambveka Iye malaya ace, namtsogoza Iye kukampacika pamtanda." 
Matthew27:32 Ndipo pakuturukapao anapeza munthu wa ku Kurene, dzina lace Simoni, namkangamiza iye kuti anyamule mtanda wace." 
Matthew27:33 Ndipo pamene anadza kumalo dzina lace Golgota, ndiko kunena kuti, Malo-abade," 
Matthew27:34 anamwetsa Iye vinyo wosanganiza ndi ndulu; ndipo Iye, m'mene analawa, sanafuna kumwa." 
Matthew27:35 Ndipo pamene anampacika Iye, anagawana zobvala zace ndi kulota maere:" 
Matthew27:36 nakhala iwo pansi, namdikira kumeneko." 
Matthew27:37 Ndipo anaika pamwamba pamutu pace liwongo lace lolembedwa: UYU NDI YESU MFUMU YA AYUDA. 
Matthew27:38 Pamenepo anapacika pamodzi ndi Iyeacifwamba awiri, mmodzi ku dzanja lamanja, ndi wina kulamanzere." 
Matthew27:39 Ndipo anthu akupitirirapo 1 anamcitira mwano Iye ndi kupukusa mitu yao," 
Matthew27:40 nati, Nanga 2 Iwe, wopasula Kacisi, ndi kummanganso masiku atatu, tadzipulumutsa wekha; 3 ngati uli Mwana wa Mulungu, tatsika pamtandapo." 
Matthew27:41 Comweconso ansembe akuru, pamodzi ndi alembi ndi akuru anamcitira cipongwe, nati," 
Matthew27:42 Anapulumutsa ena, sangathe kudzipulumutsa yekha. Ndiye Mfumu ya Ayuda; atsike tsopano pamtandapo, ndipo tidzamkhulupirira Iye." 
Matthew27:43 4 Amakhulupirira Mulungu; Iye ampulumutse tsopano, ngati amfuna; pakuti anati, Ine ndine Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Matthew27:44 Ndiponso 5 acifwambawo opacikidwa pamodzi ndi Iye, anamlalatira Iye mau amodzimodzi." 
Matthew27:45 Ndipo 6 ora lacisanu ndi cimodzi panali mdima pa dziko lonse, kufikira ora lacisanu ndi cinai." 
Matthew27:46 Ndipo poyandikira ora lacisanu ndi cinai, Yesu 7 anapfuula ndi mau akuru, kunena, Eli, Eli, lama sabakitani? ndiko kunena kuti, Mulungu wanga, Mulungu wanga, mwandisiyiranji Ine?" 
Matthew27:47 Ndipo ena a iwo akuimirira komweko, pamene anamva, ananena, Uyo aitana Eliya." 
Matthew27:48 Ndipo pomwepa mmodzi wa iwo anathamanga, 8 natenga cinkhupule, nacidzaza ndi vinyo wosasa, naciika pabango, namwetsa Iye." 
Matthew27:49 Koma ena anati, Taleka, tione ngati Eliya adzafika kudzampulumutsa." 
Matthew27:50 Ndipo Yesu, 9 pamene anapfuula ndi mau akuru, anapereka mzimu wace." 
Matthew27:51 Ndipo onani, 10 cinsaru cocinga ca m'Kacisi cinang'ambika pakati, kucokera kumwamba kufikira pansi; ndipo dziko linagwedezeka, ndi miyala inang'ambika;" 
Matthew27:52 ndi Manda anatseguka, ndi mitembo yambiri ya anthu oyera mtima, akugona kale, inauka;" 
Matthew27:53 ndipo anaturuka m'manda mwao pambuyo pa kuuka kwace, nalowa m'mzinda woyera, naonekera kwa anthu ambiri." 
Matthew27:54 Ndipo pamene mkuru wa asilikari, ndi iwo anali naye 11 akudikira Yesu, anaona cibvomezi, ndi zinthu zimene zinacitidwa, anaopa kwambiri, nanena, Indedi Uyo ndiye Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Matthew27:55 Ndipo anali pomwepo akazi ambiri, akuyang'anira patari, 12 Omwe anatsata Yesu kucokera ku Galileya, namatumikira Iye;" 
Matthew27:56 mwa iwo 13 amene munali Mariya wa Magadala, ndi Mariya amace wa Yakobo, ndi wa Yose, ndi amace wa ana a Zebedayo." 
Matthew27:57 Ndipo pamene panali madzulo, anadza munthu wacuma wa ku Arimateya, dzina lace Yosefe, amene analinso wophunzira wa Yesu;" 
Matthew27:58 yemweyo anapita kwa Pilato, napempha mtembo wa Yesu. Pomwepo Pilato analamula kuti uperekedwe." 
Matthew27:59 Ndipo Yosefe anatenga mtembo, naukulunga m'nsaru yabafuta yoyeretsa," 
Matthew27:60 14 nauika m'manda ace atsopano, osemedwa m'mwala, nakunkhunizira mwala waukuru pakhomo pa manda, nacokapo," 
Matthew27:61 Ndipo Mariya wa Magadala anali pamenepo, ndi Mariya winayo, anakhala pansi popenyana ndi mandawoo" 
Matthew27:62 Ndipo m'mawa mwace, ndilo dzuwa lotsatana ndi tsiku lokonzera, ansembe akuru ndi Afarisi anasonkhanira kwa Pilato," 
Matthew27:63 nanena, Mfumu, takumbukira ife kuti wonyenga uja anati, pamene anali ndi moyo, 15 Ndidzaukapofikamasikuatatu." 
Matthew27:64 Cifukwa cace mulamule kuti asindikize pamandapo, kufikira tsiku lacitatulo, kuti kapena ophunzira ace angadze, nadzamuba Iye, nadzanena kwa anthu, kuti Iye anauka kwa akufa: ndipo cinyengo comariza cidzaposa coyambaco." 
Matthew27:65 Pilato anati kwa iwo, Tengani alonda; mukani, kasungeni monga mudziwa." 
Matthew27:66 Ndipo iwo anamuka, nasunga manda, 16 nasindikizapo cizindikiro pamwalapo, iwo pamodzi ndi alondawo." 
Matthew28:1 Ndipo popita dzuwa la Sabata, mbanda kuca, tsiku lakuyamba la sabata, anadza Mariya wa Magadala, ndi Mariya winayo, kudzaona manda." 
Matthew28:2 Ndipo onani, panali cibvomezi cacikuru; pakuti mngelo wa Ambuye anatsika Kumwamba, nafika kukunkhuniza mwalawo, nakhala pamwamba pace." 
Matthew28:3 Kuonekera kwace kunali ngati mphezi, ndi cobvala cace coyeretsa ngati matalala;" 
Matthew28:4 ndipo ndi kuopsa kwace alondawo ananthunthumira, nakhala ngati anthu akufa." 
Matthew28:5 Koma mngelo anayankha, nati kwa akaziwo, Musaope inu; pakuti ndidziwa inu mulikufuna Yesu, amene anapacikidwa." 
Matthew28:6 Iye mulibe muno iai; pakuti anauka, monga ananena. Idzani muno mudzaone malo m'mene anagonamo Ambuye." 
Matthew28:7 Ndipo pitani msanga, muuze ophunzira ace, kuti, Wauka kwa akufa; ndipo onani, akutsogolerani ku Galileya; mudzamuona Iye komweko; onani, ndakuuzani inu." 
Matthew28:8 Ndipo iwo anacoka msanga kumanda, ndi mantha ndi kukondwera kwakukuru, nathamanga kukauza ophunzira ace." 
Matthew28:9 Ndipo onani, Yesu anakomana nao, nanena, Tikuoneni. Ndipo iwo anadza, namgwira Iye mapazi ace, namgwadira." 
Matthew28:10 Pomwepo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Musaope; pitani, kauzeni abale anga kuti amuke ku Galileya, ndipo adzandiona Ine kumeneko." 
Matthew28:11 Ndipo pameneiwo analikupita, onani, ena a alonda anafika kumzinda, nauza ansembe akuru zonse zimene zinacitidwa." 
Matthew28:12 Ndipo pamene anasonkhana pamodzi ndi akuru, anakhala upo, napatsa asilikariwo ndalama zambiri," 
Matthew28:13 nati, Kazinenani, kuti ophunzira ace anadza usiku, namuba Uja m'mene ife tinali m'tulo." 
Matthew28:14 Ndipo ngati ici cidzamveka kwa kazembe, ife tidzamgwetsa mtima, ndipo tidzakukhalitsani opanda nkhawa." 
Matthew28:15 Ndipo iwo analandira ndalamazo, nacita monga anawalangiza: ndipo mbiri iyo inabuka mwa Ayuda, kufikira lero lomwe." 
Matthew28:16 Koma ophunzira khumi ndi mmodziwo anamuka ku Galileya, kuphiri kumene Yesu anawapangifa." 
Matthew28:17 Ndipo pamene anamuona Iye, anamlambira; koma ena anakayika." 
Matthew28:18 Ndipo Yesu anadza nalankhula nao, nanena, Mphamvu zonse zapatsidwa kwa Ine Kumwamba ndi pa dziko lapansi." 
Matthew28:19 Cifukwa cace mukani, phunzitsani anthu a mitundu yonse, ndi kuwabatiza iwo m'dzina la Atate, ndi la Mwana, ndi la Mzimu Woyera:" 
Matthew28:20 ndi kuwaphunzitsa, asunge zinthu zonse zimene ndinakulamulirani inu; ndipo onani, Ine ndiri pamodzi ndi inu masiku onse, kufikira cimariziro ca nthawi ya pansi pano." 
Mark1:1 CIYAMBI cace ca Uthenga Wabwino wa Yesu Kristu, Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Mark1:2 Monga mwalembedwa m'Yesaya mneneri, Ona, ndituma mthenga wanga patsogolo pa nkhope yanu, Amene adzakonza njira yanu;" 
Mark1:3 Mau a wopfuula m'cipululu, Konzani khwalala la Ambuye, Lungamitsani njira zace;" 
Mark1:4 Yohane anadza nabatiza m'cipululu, nalalikira ubatizo wa kutembenuka mtima wakuloza ku cikhululukiro ca macimo." 
Mark1:5 Ndipo anaturuka a ku dziko lonse la Yudeya, ndi a ku Yerusalemu onse; nadza kwa iye nabatizidwa ndi iye mumtsinje Yordano, poulula macimo ao." 
Mark1:6 Ndipo Yohane anabvala ubweya wa ngamila, ndi lamba lacikopa m'cuuno mwace, nadya dzombe ndi uci wa kuthengo." 
Mark1:7 Ndipo analalikira, kuti, Wondipambana ine mphamvu akudza pambuyo panga, sindiyenera kuwerama kumasula lamba la nsapato zace ine." 
Mark1:8 Ndakubatizani inu ndi madzi; koma Iye adzakubatizani ndi Mzimu Woyera. 
Mark1:9 Ndipo kunali masiku omwewo, Yesu anadza kucokera ku Nazarete wa ku Galileya, nabatizidwa ndi Yohane m'Yordano." 
Mark1:10 Ndipo pomwepo, alimkukwera poturuka m'madzi, anaona Iye thambo litang'ambika, ndi Mzimu alikutsikira pa Iye monga nkhunda:" 
Mark1:11 ndipo mau anaturuka m'thambo, Mwana wanga wokondedwa ndiwe, mwa Iwe ndikondwera bwino." 
Mark1:12 Ndipo pomwepo Mzimu anamkangamiza kunka kucipululu. 
Mark1:13 Ndipo anakhala m'cipululu masiku makumi anai woyesedwa ndi Satana; nakhala ndi zirombo, ndipo angelo anamtumikira." 
Mark1:14 Ndipo ataperekedwa Yohane, Yesu anadza ku Galileya, nalalikira uthenga wabwino wa Mulungu," 
Mark1:15 nanena, Nthawi yakwanira, ndipo Ufumu wa Mulungu wayandikira; tembenukani mtima, khulupirirani uthenga wabwino." 
Mark1:16 Ndipo pakuyenda m'mbali mwa nyanja ya Galileya, anaona Simoni ndi Andreya, mbale wace wa Simoni, alinkuponya psasa m'nyanja; pakuti anali asodzi." 
Mark1:17 Ndipo Yesu ananena nao, Idzani pambuyo panga, ndipo ndidzakusandutsani inu asodzi a anthu." 
Mark1:18 Ndipo pomwepo anasiya makoka ao, namtsata Iye." 
Mark1:19 Ndipo atapita patsogolo pang'ono, anaona Yakobo, mwana wa Zebedayo, ndi Yohane mbale wace, iwonso anali m'combo nakonza makoka ao." 
Mark1:20 Ndipo pomwepo anawaitana: ndipo anasiya atate wao Zebedayo m'combomo pamodzi ndi anchito olembedwa, namtsata." 
Mark1:21 Ndipo iwo analowa m'Kapemao; ndipo pomwepo pa dzuwa la Sabata iye analowa m'sunagoge naphunzitsa," 
Mark1:22 Ndipo anazizwa ndi ciphunzitso cace; pakuti anaphunzitsa monga mwini mphamvu, si monga alembi." 
Mark1:23 Ndipo pomwepo panali munthu m'sunagoge mwao ali ndi mzimu wonyansa; ndipo anapfuula iye 
Mark1:24 kuti, Tiri ndi ciani ife ndi Inu Yesu wa ku Nazarete? Kodi mwadza kudzationonga ife? Ndikudziwani, ndinu Woyerayo wa Mulungu." 
Mark1:25 Ndipo Yesu anaudzudzula, kuti, Khala uli cete, nuturuke mwa iye." 
Mark1:26 Ndipo mzimu wonyansa, pomng'amba, ndi kupfuula ndi mau akuru, unaturuka mwa iye." 
Mark1:27 Ndipo anazizwa onse, kotero kuti anafunsana mwa iwo okha, kuti, Ici nciani? ciphunzitso catsopano! ndi mphamvu alamula ingakhale mizimu yonyansa, ndipo imvera Iye." 
Mark1:28 Ndipo mbiri yace inabuka pompaja ku dziko lonse la Galileya lozungulirapo. 
Mark1:29 Ndipo pomwepo, poturuka m'sunagoge, iwo analowa m'nyumba ya Simoni ndi Andreya pamodzi ndi Yakobo ndi Yohane," 
Mark1:30 Ndipo mpongozi wace wa Simoni anali gone wodwala malungo; ndipo pomwepo anamuuza za iye: 
Mark1:31 ndipo anadza namgwira dzanja, namuutsa; ndipo malungo anamleka, ndipo anawatumikira iwo." 
Mark1:32 Ndipo madzulo, litalowa dzuwa, anadza nao kwa Iye onse akudwala, ndi akugwidwa ndi ziwanda." 
Mark1:33 Ndipo mudzi wonse unasonkhana pakhomo. 
Mark1:34 Ndipo anaciritsa anthu ambiri akudwala nthenda za mitundu mitundu, naturutsa ziwanda zambiri; ndipo sanalola ziwandazo zilankhule, cifukwa zinamdziwa Iye." 
Mark1:35 Ndipo m'mawa mwace anauka usikusiku, naturuka namuka kucipululu, napemphera kumeneko." 
Mark1:36 Ndipo Simoni ndi anzace anali naye anamtsata," 
Mark1:37 nampeza, nanena naye, Akufunani inu anthu onse." 
Mark1:38 Ndipo ananena nao, Tiyeni kwina, ku midzi iri pafupi apa, kuti ndilalikire komwekonso; pakuti ndadzera nchito imene." 
Mark1:39 Ndipo analowa m'masunagoge mwao m'Galileya monse, nalalikira, naturutsa ziwanda." 
Mark1:40 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye wodwala khate, nampempha Iye, namgwadira, ndi kunena ndi Iye, Ngati mufuna mukhoza kundikonza." 
Mark1:41 Ndipo Yesu anagwidwa cifundo, natansa dzanja namkhudza iye, nanena naye, Ndifuna; khala wokonzedwa." 
Mark1:42 Ndipo pomwepo khate linamcoka, ndipo anakonzedwa." 
Mark1:43 Ndipo anamuuzitsa, namturutsa pomwepo," 
Mark1:44 nanena naye, Ona, usati unene kanthu kwa munthu ali yense: koma muka, ukadzionetse kwa wansembe, nupereke pa makonzedwe ako 1 zimene adalamulira Mose, zikhale mboni kwa iwo." 
Mark1:45 Koma 2 iye anaturuka nayamba kulalikira ndithu, ndi kubukitsa mauwo, kotero kuti Yesu sanadziwa kulowansopoyera m'mudzi, koma anakhala padera m'mapululu; ndipo anadza kwa Iye anthu a ku malo onse." 
Mark2:1 Ndipo polowanso Iye m'Kapernao atapita masiku ena, kunamveka kuti ali m'nyumba." 
Mark2:2 Ndipo ambiri anaunjikana, kotero kuti anasowa malo, ngakhale pakhomo pomwe; ndipo analankhula nao mau." 
Mark2:3 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye otenga munthu wodwala manjenje, wonyamulidwa ndi anthu anai." 
Mark2:4 Ndipo pamene sanakhoza kufika kuli Iye, cifukwa ca khamu la anthu, anasasula chindwi pokhala Iye; ndipo pamene anatha kuliboola, anatsitsa mphasa m'mene alinkugonamo wodwala manjenjeyo," 
Mark2:5 Ndipo Yesu pakuona cikhulupiriro cao ananena ndi wodwala manjenje, Mwana, macimo ako akhululukidwa." 
Mark2:6 Koma anakhalapo ena a alembi akuganizira mumtima mwao," 
Mark2:7 Munthu amene atero bwanji? acita mwano; akhoza ndani kukhululukira macimo, koma mmodzi, ndiye Mulungu?" 
Mark2:8 Ndipo pomwepo Yesu pozindikira mumtima mwace kuti alikuganizira comweco mwa iwo okha, ananena nao, Muganiza bwanji zinthu izi m'mitima yanu?" 
Mark2:9 Capafupi nciti, kapena kuuza wodwala manjenje kuti, Macimo ako akhululukidwa; kapena kuti, Nyamuka, senza mphasa yako, nuyende?" 
Mark2:10 Koma kuti mudziwe kuti Mwana wa munthu ali mwini ulamuliro wakukhululukira macimo pa dziko lapansi (ananena ndi wodwala manjenje)," 
Mark2:11 Ndikuuza iwe, Nyamuka, senza mphasa yako, numuke kwanu." 
Mark2:12 Ndipo ananyamuka iye pomwepo, nasenza mphasa, naturuka pamaso pa iwo onse; kotero kuti anadabwa onse, nalemekeza Mulungu, nanena kuti, Zotere sitinaziona ndi kale lonse." 
Mark2:13 Ndipo anaturukanso kunka m'mbali mwa nyanja; ndipo linadza kwa Iye khamu lonse la anthu, ndipo anawaphunzitsa." 
Mark2:14 Ndipo pakumuka, anaona Levi mwana wa Alifeyu alikukhala polandira msonkho, ndipo ananena naye, Tsata Ine." 
Mark2:15 Ndipo ananyamuka namtsata Iye. Ndipo kunali kuti anakhala pakudya m'nyumba mwace, ndipo amisonkho ndi ocimwa ambiri anakhala pansi pamodzi ndi Yesu ndi ophunzira ace, pakuti anali ambiri, ndipo anamtsata Iye." 
Mark2:16 Ndipo alembi a kwa Afarisi, pakuona kuti alinkudya nao ocimwa ndi amisonkho, ananena ndi ophunzira ace, Uyu akudya ndi kumwa nao amisonkho ndi ocimwa." 
Mark2:17 Ndipo pamene Yesu anamva ici, ananena nao, Akulimba safuna sing'anga, koma odwala ndiwo; sindinadza kudzaitana olungama, koma ocimwa." 
Mark2:18 Ndipo ophunzira a Yohane ndi Afarisi analinkusala kudya; ndipo anadza, nanena ndi Iye, Bwanji asala kudya ophunzira a Yohane, ndi ophunzira a Afarisi, koma ophunzira anu sasala kudya?" 
Mark2:19 Ndipo Yesu ananena nao, Kodi akhoza kusala kudya anyamata a ukwati pamene mkwati ali pamodzi nao? pokhala ali naye mkwati pamodzi ndi iwo sakhoza kusala." 
Mark2:20 Koma adzadza masiku, pamene mkwati adzacotsedwa kwa iwo, ndipo pamenepo adzasala kudya tsiku lomwelo." 
Mark2:21 Palibe munthu asokerera cigamba ca nsaru yaiwisi pa copfunda cakale; pena cimene coti cidzakonza cizomolapo, catsopanoco cizomoka pa cakaleco, ndipo ciboo cikulapo." 
Mark2:22 Ndipo palibe munthu amatsanulira vinyo watsopano m'matumba akale: pena vinyo adzaphulitsa matumba, ndipo aonongeka vinyo, ndi matumba omwe: koma vinyo watsopano amatsanulira m'matumba atsopano." 
Mark2:23 Ndipo kunali kuti anapita Iye pakati pa minda dzuwa la Sabata; ndipo ophunzira ace poyenda anayamba kubudula ngala za dzinthu. 
Mark2:24 Ndipo Afarisi ananena ndi Iye, Taona, acitiranji cosaloleka kucitika dzuwa la Sabata?" 
Mark2:25 Ndipo ananena nao, Simunawerenga konse cimene anacicita Davide, pamene adasowa, namva njala, iye ndi iwo amene anali pamodzi naye?" 
Mark2:26 Kuti, analowa m'nyumba ya Mulungu masiku a Abyatara, mkulu wa ansembe, ndipo anadya mikate yoonetsera, yosaloleka kudya ena, koma ansembe okha, ndipo anawapatsanso iwo amene anali naye?" 
Mark2:27 Ndipo ananena nao, Sabata linaikidwa cifukwa ca munthu, si munthu cifukwa ca Sabata;" 
Mark2:28 motero Mwana wa munthu ali mwini dzuwa la Sabata lomwe. 
Mark3:1 Ndipo analowanso m'sunagoge; ndipo munali munthu m'menemo ali ndi dzanja lace lopuwala. 
Mark3:2 Ndipo anamuyang'anira Iye, ngati adzamciritsa dzuwa la Sabata; kuti ammange mlandu." 
Mark3:3 Ndipo ananena ndi munthu ali ndi dzanja lopuwala, Taimirira pakati." 
Mark3:4 Ndipo ananena kwa iwo, Kodi nkuloledwa dzuwa la Sabata kucita zabwino, kapena zoipa? kupulumutsa moyo kapena kupha? Koma anakhala cete." 
Mark3:5 Ndipo m'mene anawaunguza ndi mkwiyo, ndi kumva cisoni cifukwa ca kuuma kwa mitima yao, ananena kwa munthuyo, Tambasula dzanja lako. Ndipo analitambasula; ndipo linacira dzanja lace." 
Mark3:6 Ndipo Afarisi anaturuka, ndipo pomwepo anamkhalira upo ndi Aherode, wakumuononga Iye." 
Mark3:7 Ndipo Yesu anacokako pamodzi ndi ophunzira ace nanka kunyanja: ndipo linamtsata khamu lalikuru la a ku Galileya, ndi aku Yudeya," 
Mark3:8 ndi a ku Yerusalemu, ndi a ku Idumeya, ndi a ku tsidya lina la Y ordano, ndi a kufupi ku Turo ndi Sidoni, khamu lalikuru, pakumva zazikuruzo anazicita, linadza kwa Iye." 
Mark3:9 Ndipo anati kwa ophunzira ace, kuti kangalawa kamlinde Iye, cifukwa ca khamulo, kuti angamkanikize Iye," 
Mark3:10 pakuti adawaciritsa ambiri; kotero kuti onse akukhala nazo zowawa anakanikiza Iye, kuti akamkhudze." 
Mark3:11 Ndipo mizimu yonyansa, m'mene inamuona Iye, inamgwadira, nipfuula, niti, Inu ndinu Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Mark3:12 Ndipo anailimbitsira mau kuti isamuulule Iye. 
Mark3:13 Ndipo anakwera m'phiri, nadziitanira iwo amene anawafuna Iye mwini; ndipo anadza kwa Iye." 
Mark3:14 Ndipo anaika khumi ndi awiri, kuti akhale ndi Iye, ndi kuti akawatume kulalikira," 
Mark3:15 ndi kuti akhale nao ulamuliro wakuturutsa ziwanda. 
Mark3:16 Ndipo Simoni anamucha Petro; 
Mark3:17 ndi Yakobo mwana wa Zebedayo, ndi Yohane mbale wace wa Yakobo, iwo anawacha Boanerge, ndiko kuti, Ana a bingu;" 
Mark3:18 ndi Andreya, ndi Filipo, ndi Bartolomeyo, ndi Mateyu, ndi Tomasi, ndi Yakobo mwana wa Alifeyo, ndi Tadeyo, ndi Simoni Mkanani," 
Mark3:19 ndi Yudase Isikariote, ndiye amene anampereka Iye. Ndipo analowa m'nyumba." 
Mark3:20 Ndipo anthu ambiri anasonkhananso, kotero kuti sanathe iwo konse kudya." 
Mark3:21 Ndipo pamene abale ace anamva, anadza kudzamgwira Iye; pakuti anati adayaruka." 
Mark3:22 Ndipo alembi amene adatsika ku Yerusalemu ananena kuti, Ali naye Beelzibule, ndipo, Ndi mkuru wao wa ziwanda aturutsa ziwanda." 
Mark3:23 Ndipo m'mene adawaitana iwo, ananena nao m'mafanizo, Satana angathe bwanji kuturutsa Satana?" 
Mark3:24 Ndipo ufumu ukagawanika pa uwu wokha, sukhoza kukhazikika." 
Mark3:25 Ndipo nyumba ikagawanika pa iyo yokha, siikhoza kukhazikika nyumbayo," 
Mark3:26 Ndipo Satana akadziukira mwini yekha, nagawanika, sakhoza kukhazikika, koma atsirizika." 
Mark3:27 Komatu palibe munthu akhoza kulowa m'nvumba ya mwini mphamvu, ndi kufunkha akatundu ace, koma athange wamanga mwini mphamvuyo; ndipo pamenepo adzafunkha za m'nyumba mwace." 
Mark3:28 Indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Adzakhululukidwa macimo onse a ana a anthu, ndi zamwano ziri zonse adzacita mwano nazo;" 
Mark3:29 koma ali yense adzacitira Mzimu Woyera mwano alibe kukhululukidwa nthawi yonse, koma anaparamuladi cimo losatha;" 
Mark3:30 pakuti adanena, Ali ndi mzimu wonyansa." 
Mark3:31 Ndipo anadza amace ndi abale ace; naima kunja, namtumira uthenga kumuitana." 
Mark3:32 Ndipo anthu ambiri anakhala pansi pomzinga; nanena kwa Iye, Onani, amanu ndi abale anu ali kunja akufunani Inu." 
Mark3:33 Ndipo anawayankha nanena, Amai wanga ndi abale anga ndani?" 
Mark3:34 Ndipo anawaunguza-unguza iwo akumzingawo, nanena, Taonani, amai wanga ndi abale anga." 
Mark3:35 Pakuti ali yense acita cifuniro ca Mulungu, yemweyo ndiye mbale wanga, ndi mlongo, ndi amai." 
Mark4:1 Ndipo anayambanso kuphunzitsa pambali pa nyanja, Ndipo anasonkhana kwa Iye khamu lalikurukuru, kotero kuti analowa Iye mungalawa, nakhala m'nyanja; ndipo khamu lonse linakhala pamtunda m'mbali mwa nyanja." 
Mark4:2 Ndipo anawaphunzitsa zinthu zambiri m'mafanizo, nanena nao m'ciphunzitso cace," 
Mark4:3 Mverani: taonani, wofesa anaturuka kukafesa;" 
Mark4:4 ndipo kunali, m'kufesa kwace, zina zinagwa m'mbali mwanjira, ndi mbalamezinadza ndi kuzitha kudya," 
Mark4:5 Ndipo zina zinagwa pa nthaka yathanthwe, pamene panalibe nthaka yambiri; ndipo pomwepo zinamera, cifukwa zinalibe nthaka yakuya;" 
Mark4:6 ndipo litakwera dzuwa zinapserera; ndipo popeza zinalibe mizu zinakhwinyata. 
Mark4:7 Ndipo zina zinagwa paminga, ndipominga inakula, nizitsamwitsa, ndipo sizinabala zipatso." 
Mark4:8 Ndipo zina zinagwa m'nthaka yabwino, ndipo zinapatsa zipatso, ndi kukula ndi kucuruka; ndipo zinabala kupindula makumi atatu, ndi makumi asanundi limodzi, ndi makumi khumi." 
Mark4:9 Ndipo ananena, Amene ali nao makutu akumva amve." 
Mark4:10 Ndipo pamene anakhala pa yekha, iwo amene anali pafupi ndi Iye pamodzi ndi khumi ndi awiriwo anamfunsa za mafanizo." 
Mark4:11 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Kwa inu kwapatsidwa cinsinsi ca Ufumu wa Mulungu; koma kwa iwo ali kunja zonse zicitidwa m'mafanizo;" 
Mark4:12 kuti kupenya apenye, koma asazindikire; ndipo kumva amve, koma asadziwitse; kuti pena angatembenuke, ndi kukhululukidwa." 
Mark4:13 Ndipo ananena nao, Simudziwa kodi fanizo ili? mukazindikira bwanji mafanizo onse?" 
Mark4:14 Wofesa afesa mau. 
Mark4:15 Ndipo iwo ndiwo a m'mbali mwa njira mofesedwamo mau; ndipo pamene anamva, pomwepo akudza Satana nacotsa mau ofesedwa mwa iwo." 
Mark4:16 Ndipo momwemonso iwo ndiwo amene afesedwa pathanthwe, atamva mau, awalandira pomwepo ndi kusekera;" 
Mark4:17 ndipo alibe mizu mwa iwo okha, koma akhala kanthawi; pamenepo pakudza masautso kapena mazunzo cifukwa ca mau, pomwepo akhumudwa." 
Mark4:18 Ndipo ena ndiwo akufesedwa kuminga; iwo ndiwo amene adamva mau," 
Mark4:19 ndipo malabadiro a dziko lapansi, ndi cinyengo ca cuma, ndi kulakalaka kwa zinthu zina, zilowamo, zitsamwitsa mau, ndipo akhala opanda cipatso." 
Mark4:20 Ndipo iwo ofesedwa pa nthaka yabwino ndiwo oterewa akumva mau, nawalandira, nabala zipatso zakupindula makumi atatu, ndi makumi asanu ndi limodzi, ndi makumi khumi." 
Mark4:21 Ndipo ananena ndi iwo, Kodi atenga nyali kuti akaibvundikire mbiya, kapena akaiike pansi pa kama, osati kuti akaiike pa coikapo cace?" 
Mark4:22 Pakuti kulibe kanthu kobisika, koma kuti kaonetsedwe; kapena kulibe kanthu kanakhala kam'tseri, koma kuti kakaululidwe." 
Mark4:23 Ngati munthu ali nao makutu akumva, amve." 
Mark4:24 Ndipo ananena nao, Yang'anirani cimene mukumva; ndi muyeso umene muyesera nao udzayesedwa kwa inu; ndipo kudzaonjezedwa kwa inu." 
Mark4:25 Pakuti kwa iye amene ali nako kanthu, kadzapatsidwa; ndipo kwa iye amene alibe kanthu, kadzacotsedwa ngakhale kanthu kali konse ali nako." 
Mark4:26 Ndipo ananena, Ufumu wa Mulungu uli wotero, monga ngati munthu akataya mbeu panthaka;" 
Mark4:27 nakagona ndi kuuka, usiku ndi usana, ndipo mbeu zikamera, ndi kukula, iye sadziwa umo zicitira." 
Mark4:28 Nthaka ibala zipatso zace yokha; uyamba mmera, zitsata ngala, pamenepo maso okhwima m'ngalamo." 
Mark4:29 Pakucha zipatso, pamenepo atumiza zenga, pakuti nthawi yakumweta yafika." 
Mark4:30 Ndipo ananena, Tidzafaniziranji Ufumu wa Mulungu? kapena tidzaulinganiza ndi fanizo lotani?" 
Mark4:31 Ngati mbeu yampiru, imene ikafesedwapanthaka, ingakhale icepa ndi mbeu zonse za padziko," 
Mark4:32 koma pamene ifesedwa, imera nikula koposa zitsamba zonse, nicita nthambi zazikuru; kotero kuti mbalame za m'mlengalenga zikhoza kubindikira mumthunzi mwace." 
Mark4:33 Ndipo ndi mafanizo otere ambiri analankhula nao mau, 1 monga anakhoza kumva;" 
Mark4:34 ndipo sanalankhula nao wopanda fanizo: koma m'tseri anatanthauzira zonse kwa ophunzira ace. 
Mark4:35 Ndipo dzuwa lomwelo, pofika madzulo, ananena kwa iwo, Tiolokere tsidya lina." 
Mark4:36 Ndipo posiya khamulo anamtenga apite nao, monga momwe anali, mungalawa. Ndipo panali ngalawa zina pamodzi ndi Iye." 
Mark4:37 Ndipo panauka namondwe wamkuru wa mphepo, ndi mafunde angabvira mungalawa, motero kuti ngalawa inayamba kudzala." 
Mark4:38 Ndipo Iye mwini anali kutsigiro, nagona tulo pamtsamiro; ndipo anamuutsa Iye nanena kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, kodi simusamala kuti titayika ife?" 
Mark4:39 Ndipo anauka, nadzudzula mphepo, nati kwa nyanja, kuti, Tonthola, khala bata. Ndipo mphepo inaleka, ndipokunagwa bata lalikuru." 
Mark4:40 Ndipo ananena nao, Mucitiranji mantha? kufikira tsopano mulibe cikhulupiriro kodi?" 
Mark4:41 Ndipo iwo anacita mantha akuru, nanenana wina ndi mnzace, Uyu ndani nanga, kuti ingakhale mphepo ndi nyanja zimvera Iye?" 
Mark5:1 Ndipo anafika tsidya lina la nyanja, ku dziko la Agerasa," 
Mark5:2 Ndipo pameneadaturuka mungalawa, pomwepo anakomana naye munthu woturuka kumanda wa mzimu wonyansa," 
Mark5:3 amene anayesa nyumba yace kumanda; ndipo palibe munthu anakhoza kummanganso, inde ngakhale ndi unyolo;" 
Mark5:4 pakuti adafomangidwa kawiri kawiri ndi matangadza ndimaunyolo, ndipo anamwetula maunyolo, naduladula matangadza; ndipo palibe munthu anali ndi mphamvu yakumfuya." 
Mark5:5 Ndipo masiku onse, usiku ndi usana, anakhala m'manda ndi m'mapiri, napfuula, nadzitematema ndi miyala." 
Mark5:6 Ndipo pakuona Yesu kutali, anathamanga, namgwadira Iye;" 
Mark5:7 ndipo anapfuula ndi mau olimba, nanena, Ndiri ndi ciani ine ndi Inu, Yesu Mwana wa Mulungu Wamkurukuru? Ndikulumbirirani pa Mulungu, msandizunze." 
Mark5:8 Pakuti ananena kwa iye, Turuka iwe, mzimu wonyansa, kwa munthuyu." 
Mark5:9 Ndipo anamfunsa, Dzina lako ndani? Ndipo ananena kwa Iye, Dzina langa ndine Legio; cifukwa tiri ambiri." 
Mark5:10 Ndipo anampempha Iye kwambiri kuti asaiturutsire kunja kwace kwa dziko. 
Mark5:11 Ndipo panali pamenepo gulu lalikuru la nkhumba zirinkudya kuphiri. 
Mark5:12 Ndipo inampempha Iye, kuti, Titumizeni ife mu nkhumbazo, kuti tilowe mu izo." 
Mark5:13 Ndipo anailolao Ndipo mizimu yonyansa inaturuka, nilowa mu nkhumba; ndipo gulu linatsika liwiro potsetsereka ndi kulowa m'nyanja, ndizo ngati zikwi ziwiri; ndipo zinatsamwa m'nyanja." 
Mark5:14 Ndipo akuziweta anathawa, nauza m'mudzi, ndi kwninda. Ndipo anadza kudzaona cocitikaco." 
Mark5:15 Ndipo anadza kwa Yesu, napenya wogwidwa ziwandayo alikukhala pansi, wobvala ndi wa nzeru zace zabwino, ndiye amene anali ndi legio; ndipo anaopa iwo." 
Mark5:16 Ndipo adapenyawo adawafotokozera umo anacitira ndi wogwidwa ziwandayo, ndi za nkhumbazo." 
Mark5:17 Ndipo anayamba kumpempha Iye kuti acoke m'malire ao," 
Mark5:18 Ndipo m'mene Iye analikulowa mungalawa, anampempha waziwanda uja kuti akhale ndi Iye." 
Mark5:19 Ndipo sanamlola, koma ananena naye, Muka kwanu kwa abale ako, nuwauze zinthu zazikuru anakucitira Ambuye, ndi kuti anakucitira cifundo." 
Mark5:20 Ndipo anamuka nayamba kulalikira ku Dekapoli zinthu zazikuru Yesu adamcitira iye; ndipo anthu onse anazizwa. 
Mark5:21 Ndipo pamene Yesu anaolokanso mungalawa tsidya lina, khamu lalikuru linasonkhana kwa Iye; ndipo Iye anali pambali pa nyanja." 
Mark5:22 Ndipo anadzako mmodzi wa akuru a sunagoge, dzina lace Yairo; ndipo pakuona Iye, anagwada pa mapazi ace, nampempha kwambiri," 
Mark5:23 nanena, kuti, Kamwana kanga kabuthu kalimkutsirizika; ndikupemphani Inu mufikeko, muike manja anu pa iko, kuti kapulwnuke, ndi kukhala ndi moyo." 
Mark5:24 Ndipo ananka naye pamodzi; ndipo khamu lalikuru linamtsata Iye, ndi kumkanikiza Iye." 
Mark5:25 Ndipo munthu wamkazi amene anali ndi nthenda yacidwalire zaka khwni ndi ziwiri," 
Mark5:26 ndipo anamva zowawa zambiri ndi asing'anga ambiri, nalipira zonse anali nazo osacira pang'ono ponse, koma makamaka nthenda yace idakula," 
Mark5:27 m'mene iye anamva mbiri yace ya Yesu, anadza m'khamu kumbuyo kwace, nakhudza cobvala cace." 
Mark5:28 Pakuti ananena iye, Ngati ndikakhudza ngakhale zobvala zace ndidzapulumutsidwa." 
Mark5:29 Ndipo pomwepo kasupe wa nthenda yace adaphwa; ndipo anazindikira m'thupi kuti anaciritsidwa cibvutiko cace. 
Mark5:30 Ndipo pomwepo Yesu, pamene anazindikira mwa Iye yekha kuti mphamvu idaturuka mwa Iye, anapotoloka m'khamu, nanena, Ndani anakhudza zobvala zanga?" 
Mark5:31 Ndipo ophunzira ace ananena kwa Iye, Muona kuti khamu lirikukanikiza Inu, ndipo munena kodi, Wandikhudza ndani?" 
Mark5:32 Ndipo Iye anaunguza-unguza kumuona iye amene adacita ici," 
Mark5:33 Koma mkaziyo anacita mantha, ndi kunthunthumira, podziwa cimene anamcitira iye, nadza, namgwadira, namuuza coona conse." 
Mark5:34 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Mwana wamkaziwe, cikhulupiriro, cako cakupulumutsa; muka mumtendere, nukhale wocira cibvutiko cako." 
Mark5:35 M'mene iye ali cilankhulire, anafika a ku nyumba ya mkuru wa sunagoge, nanena, kuti, Mwana wako wafa; ubvutiranjinso Mphunzitsi?" 
Mark5:36 Koma Yesu wosasamala mau olankhulidwawo, ananena kwa mkuru wa sunagoge, Usaope, khulupirira kokha." 
Mark5:37 Ndipo sanalola munthu yense kutsagana naye, koma Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane mbale wace wa Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Ndipo anafika ku nyumba kwace kwa mkuru wa sunagoge; ndipo anaona cipiringu, ndi ocita maliro, ndi akukuwa ambiri" 
Mark5:39 Ndipo m'mene atalowa, ananena nao, Mubuma ndi kulira bwanji? Mwana sanafa, koma ali m'tulo." 
Mark5:40 Ndipo anamseka Iye pwepwete, Koma Iye anawaturutsa onse, natenga atate wa mwana, ndi amace, ndi ajawo anali naye, nalowa m'mene munali mwanayo." 
Mark5:41 Ndipo anagwira dzanja lace la mwana, nanena kwa iye, Talita koumi; ndiko kunena posandulika, Buthu, ndinena ndi iwe, Uka." 
Mark5:42 Ndipo pomwepo buthulo linauka, niliyenda; pakuti linali la zaka khumi ndi ziwiri. Ndipo anadabwa pomwepo ndi kudabwa kwakukuru." 
Mark5:43 Ndipo anawalamulira kwambiri kuti asadziwe ici munthu mmodzi, nawauza kuti ampatse iye kudya." 
Mark6:1 Ndipo Iye anaturuka kumeneko; nafika ku dziko la kwao; ndipo ophunzira ace anamtsata. 
Mark6:2 Ndipo pofika dzuwa la Sabata, anayamba kuphunzitsa m'sunagoge; ndipo ambiri anamva Iye, nazizwa, nanena, Uyu adazitenga kuti izi? Nzeru yopatsidwa kwa munthuyu njotani, ndi zamphamvu zotere zocitidwa ndi manja ace?" 
Mark6:3 Si mmisiri wa mitengo uyu, mwana wa Mariya, mbale wao wa Yakobo, ndi Yose, ndi Yuda, ndi Simoni? Ndipo alongo ace sali nafe pano kodi? Ndipo anakhumudwa ndi Iye." 
Mark6:4 Ndipo Yesu ananena kwa iwo, Mneneri sakhala wopanda ulemu, koma m'dziko la kwao ndimo, ndi pakati pa abale ace, ndi m'nyumba yace." 
Mark6:5 Ndipo kumeneko sanakhoza Iye kucita zamphamvu konse, koma kuti anaika manja ace pa anthu odwala owerengeka, nawaciritsa." 
Mark6:6 Ndipo anazizwa cifukwa ca kusakhulupirira kwao. Ndipo anayendayenda m'midzi yozungulirapo, naphunzitsa." 
Mark6:7 Ndipo anadziitanira khumi ndi awiriwo, nayamba kuwatumiza Iwo awiri awiri; nawapatsa mphamvu pa mizimu yonyansa;" 
Mark6:8 ndipo anawauza kuti asatenge kanthu ka paulendo, koma ndodo yokha; asatenge mkate, kapena thumba, kapena ndalama m'lamba lao;" 
Mark6:9 koma abvale nsapato; ndipo anati, Musabvale malaya awiri." 
Mark6:10 Ndipo ananena nao, Kumene kuli konse mukalowa m'nyumba, khalani komweko kufikira mukacokako." 
Mark6:11 Ndipo pamalo ponse sakulandirani, kapena kumvera inu, pakucoka kumeneko, sansani pfumbi liri ku mapazi anu, likhale mboni ya kwa iwo." 
Mark6:12 Ndipo anaturuka nalalikira kuti anthu atembenuke mitima. 
Mark6:13 Ndipo anaturutsa mizimu yoipa yambiri, nadzoza mafuta anthu ambiri akudwala, nawaciritsa." 
Mark6:14 Ndipo mfumu Herode anamva izi; pakuti dzina lace lidamveka; ndipo ananena, kuti, Yohane Mbatizi wauka kwa akufa, ndipo cifukwa cace mphamvu izi zicitacita mwa Iye." 
Mark6:15 Koma ena ananena, kuti, Ndiye Eliya, Anati enanso, Ndiye mneneri, monga ngati mmodzi wa aneneriwo," 
Mark6:16 Koma Herode pamene anamva, ananena, Yohane amene ndamdula mutu, wauka iyeyo."
