Mark6:17 Pakuti Herode, mwini yekha, adatuma anthu namgwira Yohane, nammanga m'nyumba yandende, cifukwa ca Herodiya, mkazi wa Filipo mbale wace; cifukwa adamkwatira iye." 
Mark6:18 Pakuti Yohane adanena kwa Herode, Si kuloledwa kwa inu kukhala naye mkazi wa mbale wanu." 
Mark6:19 Ndipo Herodiya anamuda, nafuna kumupha; koma sanakhoza;" 
Mark6:20 pakuti Herode anaopa Yohane, podziwa kuti ali munthu wolungama ndi woyera mtima, ndipo anamsunga iye. Ndipo pamene anamva iye anathedwa nzeru, oakondwa kumva iye." 
Mark6:21 Ndipo pamene panafika tsiku loyenera, tsiku la kubadwa kwace kwa Herode, iye anawakonzera phwando akuru ace ndi akazembe ace ndi anthu omveka a ku Galileya;" 
Mark6:22 ndipo pamene mwana wamkazi wa Herodiya analowa yekha nabvina, anakondwetsa Herode ndi iwo akukhala naye pacakudya; ndipo mfumuyo inati kwa buthulo, Tapempha kwa ine ciri conse ucifuna, ndidzakupatsa iwe." 
Mark6:23 Ndipo anamlumbirira iye, kuti, Ciri conse ukandipempha ndidzakupatsa, kungakhale kukugawira ufumu wanga." 
Mark6:24 Ndipo anaturuka, nati kwa amace, Ndidzapempha ciani? Ndipo iyel anati, Mutu wace wa Yohane Mbatizi." 
Mark6:25 Ndipo pomwepo analowa m'mangu m'mangu kwa mfumu, napempha kuti, Ndifuna kuti mundipatse tsopano apa, mutu wace wa Yohane Mbatizi mumbizi." 
Mark6:26 Ndipo mfumu inamva cisoni cacikuru; koma cifukwa ca malumbiro ace, ndi ca iwo akukhala pacakudya, sanafuna kumkaniza." 
Mark6:27 Ndipo pomwepo mfumu inatuma mnyamata, namlamulira akatenge mutu wace; ndipo iye anamuka namdula mutu m'nyumba yandende;" 
Mark6:28 natengera mutu wace mumbizi, naupereka kwa buthulo; ndipo buthu linaupereka kwa amace." 
Mark6:29 Ndipo m'mene ophunzira ace anamva, anadza nanyamula mtembo wace nauika m'manda." 
Mark6:30 Ndipo atumwi anasonkhana kwa Yesu; namuuza ziri zonse adazicita, ndi zonse adaziphunzitsa," 
Mark6:31 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Idzani inu nokha padera ku malo acipululu, mupumule kamphindi, Pakuti akudza ndi akucoka anali piringu piringu, ndipo analibe nthawi yokwanira kudya." 
Mark6:32 Ndipo anacokera m'ngalawa kunka ku malo acipululu padera. 
Mark6:33 Ndipo anthu anawaona alikumuka, ndipo ambiri anawazindikila, nathamangira limodzi kumeneko pamtunda, ocokera m'midzi monse, nawapitirira." 
Mark6:34 Ndipo anaturuka Iye, naona khamu lalikuru la anthu, nagwidwa cifundo ndi iwo, cifukwa anali ngati nkhosa zopanda mbusa; ndipo anayamba kuwaphunzitsa zinthu zambiri." 
Mark6:35 Ndipo pamene dzuwa lidapendeka ndithu, anadza kwa Iye ophunzira ace, nanena, Malo ana nga cipululu, ndi dzuwa lapendeka ndithu;" 
Mark6:36 muwauze kuti amuke, alowe kumiraga ndi ku midzi yozungulira, akadzigulire okha kanthu kakudya." 
Mark6:37 Koma Iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Apatseni kudya ndinu. Ndipo iwo ananena naye, Kodi tikapita ife ndi kugula mikate ya pa marupiya atheka mazana awiri, ndi kuwapatsa kudya?" 
Mark6:38 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, kuti, Muli nayo mikate ingati? pitani, mukaone. Ndipo m'mene anadziwa ananena, lsanu, ndi nsomba ziwiri." 
Mark6:39 Ndipo anawalamulira kuti akhalitse pansi onse magulu magulu pamsipu. 
Mark6:40 Ndipo anakhala pansi mabungwe mabungwe a makumi khumi, ndi a makumi asanu." 
Mark6:41 Ndipo Iye anatenga mikate isanuyo ndi nsomba ziwirizo nayang'anakumwamba, nadalitsa, nagawa mikate; napatsa kwa ophunzira kuti apereke kwa iwo; ndi nsomba ziwiri anagawira onsewo." 
Mark6:42 Ndipo anadya iwo onse, nakhuta." 
Mark6:43 Ndipo anatola makombo mitanga khumi ndi iwiri, ndiponso za nsomba." 
Mark6:44 Ndipo amene anadya mikate iyo anali amuna zikwi zisanu. 
Mark6:45 Ndipo pomwepo Iye anakangamiza ophunzira ace alowe rri'ngalawa, ndi kumtsogolera kutsidya lija ku Betsaida, m'mene Iye yekha alimkuuza khamulo kuti amuke." 
Mark6:46 Ndipo atalawirana nao, anacoka Iye, nalowa m'phiri kukapemphera," 
Mark6:47 Ndipo pofika madzulo ngalawa inali pakati pa nyanja, ndi Iye yekha pamtunda." 
Mark6:48 Ndipo pakuwaona ali kubvutidwa ndi kupalasa, pakuti mphepo inadza nikomana nao, pa uionda wacinai wa usiku Iye anadza kwa iwo, alikuyenda pamwamba pa nyanja; nati awapitirire;" 
Mark6:49 koma iwo, pamene anamuona alikuyenda panyanja, anayesa kuti ndi mzukwa, napfuula:" 
Mark6:50 pakuti iwo onse anamuona Iye, nanthunthumira. Koma pomwepo anawalankhula nanena nao, Limbani mtima; ndinetu, musaope," 
Mark6:51 Ndipo Iye anakwera, nalowa kwa iwo m'ngalawa, ndipo mphepo inaleka; ndipo anadabwa kwakukuru mwa iwo okha;" 
Mark6:52 pakuti sanazindikira za mikateyo, kama mitima yao inauma." 
Mark6:53 Ndipo ataoloka iwo, anafika pamtunda ku Genesarete, nakoceza padooko." 
Mark6:54 Ndipo pamene anaturuka m'ngalawa anamzindikila pomwepo," 
Mark6:55 nathamangira dziko lonselo nayamba kunyamula anthu odwaia pa akama ao, kufika nao kumene anamva kuti analiko Iye." 
Mark6:56 Ndipo kumene konse adalowa Iye m'midzi, kapena m'mizinda, kapena m'miraga, anthu anagoneka odwala pamisika, 1 nampempha Iye kuti akakhudze ngakhale mphonje yokha ya cobvala cace; ndipo onse amene anamkhudza anaciritsidwa." 
Mark7:1 Ndipo anasonkhana kwa Iye Afarisi, ndi alembi ena, akucokera ku Yerusalemu," 
Mark7:2 ndipo anaona kuti ophunzira ace ena anadya mkate ndi m'manja mwakuda, ndiwo osasamba." 
Mark7:3 Pakuti Afarisi, ndi Ayuda onse sakudya osasamba m'manja ao, kuti asungire mwambo wa akuru;" 
Mark7:4 ndipo pakucoka kumsika, sakudya osasamba m'thupi; ndipo ziripo zinthu zina zambiri anazilandira kuzisunga, ndizo matsukidwe a zikho, ndi miphika, ndi zotengera zamkuwa." 
Mark7:5 Ndipo Afarisi ndi alembi anamfunsa Iye, kuti, Bwanji ophunzira anu satsata mwambo wa akuru, koma akudya mkate wao ndi m'manja mwakuda?" 
Mark7:6 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Yesaya ananenera bwino za inu onyenga, monga mwalembedwa, Anthu awa andilemekeza Ine ndi milomo yao, Koma mtima wao ukhala kutari ndi ine." 
Mark7:7 Koma andilambira Ine kwacabe, Ndi kuphunzitsa maphunzitso, malangizo a anthu." 
Mark7:8 Musiya lamulo la Mulungu, nimusunga mwambo wa anthu." 
Mark7:9 Ndipo ananena nao, Bwino mukaniza lamulo la Mulungu, kuti musunge mwambo wanu," 
Mark7:10 Pakuti Mose anati, Lemekeza atate wako ndi amako; ndipo iye wakunenera zotpa atate wace kapena amai wace, afe ndithu;" 
Mark7:11 koma inu munena, Munthu akati kwa atate wace, kapena amai wace, Karban, ndiko kuti Mtulo, cimene ukadathandizidwa naco ndi ine," 
Mark7:12 simulolanso kumcitira kanthu atate wace kapena amai wace; 
Mark7:13 muyesa acabe mau a Mulungu mwa mwambo wanu, umene munaupereka: ndi zinthu zotere zambiri muzicita." 
Mark7:14 Ndipo anadziitaniranso khamu la anthu, nanena nao, Mverani Ine nonsenu, ndipo dziwitsani:" 
Mark7:15 kulibe kanthu kunja kwa munthu kakulowa mwa iye, kangathe kumdetsa: koma zinthu zakuturuka mwa munthu, ndizo zakumdetsa munthu.[" 
Mark7:16 ] 
Mark7:17 Ndipo m'mene Iye adalowa m'nyumba kusiyana ndi khamulo, ophunzira ace anamfunsa Iye faruzolo." 
Mark7:18 Ndipo ananena nao, Mutero inunso opanda nzeru kodi? Kodi simuzindikira kuti kanthu kali konse kocokera kunja kakulowa mwa munthu, sikangathe kumdetsa iye;" 
Mark7:19 cifukwa sikalowa mumtima mwace, koma m'mimba mwace, ndipo katurukira kuthengo? Ndipo potero anayeretsa zakudya zonse." 
Mark7:20 Ndipo anati, Coturuka mwa munthu ndico cidetsa munthu." 
Mark7:21 Pakuti m'kati mwace mwa mitima ya anthu, muturuka maganizo oipa, zaciwerewere," 
Mark7:22 zakuba, zakupha, zacigololo, masiriro, zoipa, cinyengo, cinyanso, diso loipa, mwano, kudzikuza, kupusa:" 
Mark7:23 zoipa izi zonse zituruka m'kati, nizidetsa munthu." 
Mark7:24 Ndipo Iye anauka nacoka kumeneko, nanka ku maiko a ku Turo ndi Sidoni, Ndipo analowa m'nyumba, nafuna kuti asadziwe anthu; ndipo sanakhoza kubisika." 
Mark7:25 Koma pomwepo mkazi, kabuthu kace kanali ndi mzimu wonyansa, pamene anamva za Iye, anadza, nagwa pa mapazi ace." 
Mark7:26 Koma mkaziyo anali Mhelene, mtundu wace MsuroFonika. Ndipo anampempha Iye kuti aturutse ciwanda m'mwana wace." 
Mark7:27 Ndipo ananena naye, Baleka, athange akhuta ana; pakuti si kwabwino kuti titenge mkate wa ana ndi kuutayira tiagaru," 
Mark7:28 Koma iye anabvomera nanena ndi Iye, inde Ambuye; tingakhale tiagaru ta pansi pa gome tikudyako nyenyeswa za ana." 
Mark7:29 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Cifukwa ca mau amene, muka; ciwanda caturuka m'mwana wako wamkazi." 
Mark7:30 Ndipo anacoka kunka kunyumba kwace, napeza mwana atamgoneka pakama, ndi ciwanda citaturuka." 
Mark7:31 Ndipo anaturukanso m'maiko a ku Turo, nadzera pakati pa Sidoni, cufikira ku nyanja ya Galileya, ndi cupyola pakati pa maiko a ku Dekapolio" 
Mark7:32 Ndipo anadza naye kwa Iye munthu wogontha, ndi wacibwibwi; ndipo anampempha Iye kuti aike dzanja pa iye." 
Mark7:33 Ndipo anampatula pa khamu la anthu pa yekha, nalonga zala zace m'makutu mwace, nalabvula malobvu, nakhudza lilime lace:" 
Mark7:34 nagadamira kumwamba, nausa moyo, nanena naye, Elata, ndiko, Tatseguka." 
Mark7:35 Ndipo makutu ace anatseguka, ndi comangira lilime lace cinamasulidwa, ndipo analankhula cilunjikire." 
Mark7:36 Ndipo anawalamulira kuti asauze munthu, ali yense; koma monga momwe Iye anawalamulitsa momwenso makamaka analalikira kopambana." 
Mark7:37 Ndipo anadabwa kwakukurukuru, nanena, Wacita Iye zonse bwino; angakhale ogontha awamvetsa, ndi osalankhula awalankhulitsa." 
Mark8:1 Masiku ajawo pakukhalanso khamu lalikuru la anthu, ndipo analibe kanthu kakudya, iye anadziitanira ophunzira ace, nanena nao," 
Mark8:2 Ndimva nalo cifundo khamulo, cifukwa ali ndi Ine cikhalire masiku atatu, ndipo alibe kanthu kakudya:" 
Mark8:3 ndipo ngati ndiwauza iwo amuke kwao osadya kanthu, adzakomoka panjira; ndipo ena iwo acokera kutali." 
Mark8:4 Ndipo ophunzira ace anamyankha Iye, kuti, Munthu adzatha kutenga kuti mikate yakukhutitsa anthu awa m'cipululu muno?" 
Mark8:5 Ndipo anawafunsa, Muli nayo mikate ingati? Ndipo anati, Isanu ndi iwiri." 
Mark8:6 Ndipo analamulira anthu a khamulo akhale pansi; natenga mikate isanu ndi iwiriyo, nayamika, nanyema, napatsa ophunzira ace, kuti apereke kwa iwo; ndipo anapereka kwa khamulo." 
Mark8:7 Ndipo anali nato tinsomba towerengeka; ndipo Iye anatidalitsa, nati atipereke itonso." 
Mark8:8 Ndipo anadya nakhuta; ndipo anatola makombo malicero asanu ndi awiri. 
Mark8:9 Ndipo iwo anali ngati zikwi zinai; ndipo Iye analawirana nao. 
Mark8:10 Ndipo pomwepo analowa m'ngaiawa ndi akhupunzira ace, nafika ku mbali ya ku Dalmanuta." 
Mark8:11 Ndipo Afarisi anaturuka, nayamba kufunsana naye, ndi kufuna kwa Iye cizindikilo cocokera Kumwamba, namuyesa Iye." 
Mark8:12 Ndipo anausitsa moyo m'mzimu wace, nanena, Anthu a mbadwo uno afunafuna cizindikilo bwanji? indetu ndinena kwa inu, ngati cizindikilo cidzapatsidwa kwa mbadwo uno!" 
Mark8:13 Ndipo anawasiya iwo, nalowanso m'ngalawa, nacoka kunka ku tsidya lija." 
Mark8:14 Ndipo ophunzira adaiwala kutenga mikate, ndipo analibe mkate m'ngalawa koma umodzi wokha." 
Mark8:15 Ndipo Iye anawalamula, nanena, Yang'anirani, penyani kuti mupewe cotupitsa mkate ca Afarisi, ndi cotupitsa mkate ca Herode." 
Mark8:16 Ndipo anatsutsana wina ndi mnzace, nanena kuti, Tiribe mikate." 
Mark8:17 Ndipo Yesu pamene anazindikira, ananena nao, Bwanji mutsutsana cifukwa mulibe mkate? kodi kufikira tsopano simuzindikira, nisimudziwitsa? kodi muli nayo mitima yanu youma?" 
Mark8:18 Pokhala nao maso simupenya kodi? ndi pokhala nao makutu simukumva kodi? ndipo simukumbukila kodi? 
Mark8:19 Pamene ndinawagawira anthu zikwi zisanu mikate isanu ija, munatola mitanga ingati yodzala ndi makombo? Ananena naye, Khumi ndi iwiri." 
Mark8:20 Ndipo mikate isanu ndi iwiri kwa anthu zikwi zinai, munatola malicero angati odzala ndi makombo? Ndipo ananena naye, Asanu ndi awiri." 
Mark8:21 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Simudziwitsa ngakhale tsopano kodi?" 
Mark8:22 Ndipo anadza ku Betsaida. Ndipo anadza naye kwa Iye munthu wakhungu, nampempha Iye kuti amkhudze." 
Mark8:23 Ndipo anamgwira dzanja munthu wakhunguyo, naturukira naye kunja kwa mudzi; ndipo atamthira malobvu m'maso mwace, naika manja pa iye, anamfunsa, Uona kanthu kodi?" 
Mark8:24 Ndipo anakweza maso, nanena, Ndiona anthu; pakuti ndiwapenya ayendayenda ngati mitengo." 
Mark8:25 Pamenepo anaikanso manja m'maso mwace; ndipo anapenyetsa, naciritsidwa, naona zonse mbee." 
Mark8:26 Ndipo anamtumiza amuke kwao, nanena, Usalowe konse m'mudzi." 
Mark8:27 Ndipo anaturuka Yesu, ndi ophunzira ace, nalowa ku midzi ya ku Kaisareya wa Filipi; ndipo panjira anafunsa ophunzira ace, nanena nao, Kodi anthu anena kuti Ine ndine yani?" 
Mark8:28 Ndipo ananena, nati, Yohane Mbatizi; ndi ena, Eliya; koma ena, Mmodzi wa aneneri." 
Mark8:29 Ndipo Iye anawafunsa, Koma inu munena kuti ndine yani? Petro anayankha nanena naye, Ndinu Kristu." 
Mark8:30 Ndipo anawauzitsa iwo kuti asanene kwa munthu mmodzi za Iye. 
Mark8:31 Ndipo anayamba kuwaphunzitsa, kuti kuyenera kuti Mwana wa munthu akamve zowawa zambiri, nakakanidwe ndi akuru ndi ansembe akulu, ndi alembi, nakaphedwe, ndipo mkuca wace akauke." 
Mark8:32 Ndipo mauwo ananena poyera. Ndipo Petro anamtenga Iye, nayamba kumdzudzula." 
Mark8:33 Koma Iye anapotoloka, napenya ophunzira ace, namdzudzula Petro, nanena, Coka, pita kumbuyo kwanga, Satana iwe; popeza susamalira zinthu za Mulungu, koma za anthu." 
Mark8:34 Ndipo anadziitanira khamulo la anthu pamodzi ndi ophunzira ace, nati kwa iwo, Ngati munthu afuna kudza pambuyo panga, adzikanize yekha, nanyamule mtanda wace, nanditsate Ine." 
Mark8:35 Pakuti yense wakufuna kupulumutsa moyo wace adzautaya; ndipo yense wakutaya moyo wace cifukwa ca Ine, ndi cifukwa ca Uthenga Wabwino, adzaupulumutsa." 
Mark8:36 Pakuti munthu apindulanji akadzilemezera dziko lonse, natayapo moyo wace?" 
Mark8:37 Pakuti munthu akapereka ciani cosintha naco moyo wace? 
Mark8:38 Pakuti yense wakucita manyazi cifukwa ca Ine, ndi ca mau anga mu mbadwo uno wacigololo ndi wocimwa, Mwana wa munthu adzacitanso manyazi cifukwa ca iyeyu, pamene Iye adzafika nao angelo ace oyera, mu ulemerero wa Atate wace." 
Mark9:1 Ndipo ananena nao, Ndithu ndinena ndi inu kuti, Alipo ena akuimirira pano, amene sadzalawa imfa konse, kufikira akaona Ufumu wa Mulungu utadza ndi mphamvu." 
Mark9:2 Ndipo atapita masiku asanu ndi limodzi, Yesu anatenga Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane, nakwera nao pa phiri lalitali padera pa okha; ndipo anasandulika pamaso pao:" 
Mark9:3 ndipo zobvala zace zinakhala zonyezimira, zoyera mbu; monga ngati muomba wotsuka nsaru pa dziko lapansi sangathe kuziyeretsai." 
Mark9:4 Ndipo anaonekera kwa iwo Eliya ndi Mose, alikulankhulana ndi Yesu." 
Mark9:5 Ndipo Petro anayankha, nanena ndi Yesu, Rabi, kutikomera ife kukhala pano; ndipo timange misasa itatu; umodzi wa inu, ndi wina wa Mose, ndi wina wa Eliya." 
Mark9:6 Pakuti sanadziwa cimene adzayankha; cifukwa anacita mantha ndithu. 
Mark9:7 Ndipo panadza mtambo wakuwaphimba iwo; ndipo mau munaturuka m'mtambomo, kuti, Uyu ndiye Mwana wanga wokondedwa; mverani Iye." 
Mark9:8 Ndipo dzidzidzi pounguzaunguza, sanapenya munthu wina yense, koma Yesu yekha, ndi iwo eni." 
Mark9:9 Ndipo pakutsika iwo paphiri, Iye anawalamulira kuti asauze munthu zinthu zimene adaziona, koma pamene Mwana wa munthu akadzauka kwa akufa ndipo." 
Mark9:10 Ndipo anasunga mauwo, nafunsana mwa iwo okha, kuti, Kuuka kwa akufa nciani?" 
Mark9:11 Ndipo anamfunsa Iye, nanena, Nanga alembi anena kuti adzayamba kufika Eliya?" 
Mark9:12 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Eliya ayamba kudza ndithu, nadzakonza zinthu zonse; ndipo kwalembedwa bwanji za Mwana wa munthu, kuti ayenera kumva zowawa zambiri ndi kuyesedwa cabe?" 
Mark9:13 Koma ndinena ndi inu kuti anafikadi Eliya, ndipo anamcitiranso ziri zonse iwo anazifuna, monga kwalembedwa za iye." 
Mark9:14 Ndipo pamene anadza kwa ophunzira, anaona khamu lalikuru la anthu ozungulira iwo, ndi alembi alikufunsana nao." 
Mark9:15 Ndipo pomwepo anthu onse a khamulo, pakumuona Iye, anazizwa kwambiri, namthamangira Iye, namlankhula." 
Mark9:16 Ndipo anawafunsa iwo, Mufunsa na nao ciani?" 
Mark9:17 Ndipo wina wa m'khamulo anamyankha Iye, kuti, Mphunzitsi, ndadza naye kwa Inu mwana wanga, ali nao mzimu wosalankhula;" 
Mark9:18 ndipo ponse pamene umgwira, umgwetsa; ndipo acita thobvu, nakukuta mano, nanyololoka; ndipo ndinalankhula nao ophunzira anu kuti auturutse; koma sanakhoza." 
Mark9:19 Ndipo Iye anawayankha nanena, Mbadwo wosakhulupirira inu, ndidzakhala ndi inu kufikira liti? ndidzakulekererani nthawi yanji? Mudze naye kwa Ine." 
Mark9:20 Ndipo anadza naye kwa Iye; ndipo pakumuona, pomwepo mzimuwo unamng'amba koopsya; ndipo anagwa pansi nabvimbvinika ndi kucita thobvu." 
Mark9:21 Ndipo Iye anafunsa atate wace, kuti, Cimeneci cinayamba kumgwira liti? Ndipo anati, Cidamyamba akali mwana." 
Mark9:22 Ndipo kawiri kawiri ukamtaya kumoto ndi kumadzi, kumuononga; koma ngati mukhoza kucita kanthu mtithandize, ndi kuticitira cifundo." 
Mark9:23 Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Ngati mukhoza! Zinthu zonse zitheka ndi iye wakukhulupirira." 
Mark9:24 Pomwepo atate wa mwana anapfuula, nanena, Ndikhulupirira; thandizani kusakhulupirira kwanga." 
Mark9:25 Ndipo pamene Yesu anaona kuti khamu la anthu lirikuthamangira pamodzi, anadzudzula mzimu woipawo, nanena ndi uwo, Mzimu wosalankhula ndi wogontha iwe, Ine ndikulamula iwe, turuka mwa iye, ndipo usalowenso mwa iye." 
Mark9:26 Ndipo pamene unapfuula, numng'ambitsa, unaturuka; ndipo mwana anakhala ngati wakufa; kotero kuti ambiri ananena, Wamwalira." 
Mark9:27 Koma Yesu anamgwira dzanja lace, namnyamutsa; ndipo anaimirira." 
Mark9:28 Ndipo pamene Iye adalowa m'nyumba, ophunzira ace anamfunsa m'tseri, kuti, Nanga bwanji sitinakhoza ife kuuturutsa?" 
Mark9:29 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Mtundu uwu sukhoza kuturuka ndi kanthu kena konse, koma ndi kupemphera." 
Mark9:30 Ndipo anacoka iwo kumeneko, napyola pakati pa Galileya; ndipo Iye sanafuna kuti munthu adziwe." 
Mark9:31 Pakuti anaphunzitsa ophunzira ace, nanena nao, kuti, Mwana wa munthu aperekedwa m'manja a anthu, ndipo adzamupha Iye; ndipo ataphedwa, adzauka pofika masiku atatu." 
Mark9:32 Koma iwo sanazindikira mauwo, naopa kumfunsa." 
Mark9:33 Ndipo iwo anadza ku Kapernao; ndipo pamene anakhala m'nyumba, Iye anawafunsa, Munalikutsutsana ninji panjira?" 
Mark9:34 Koma iwo anakhala cete; pakuti anatsutsana wina ndi mnzace panjira, kuti, wamkuru ndani?" 
Mark9:35 Ndipo m'mene anakhala pansi anaitana khumi ndi awiriwo; nanena nao, Ngati munthu afuna kukhala woyamba, akhale wakuthungo wa onse, ndi mtumiki wa onse." 
Mark9:36 Ndipo anatenga kamwana, nakaika pakati pao, nakayangata, nanena nao," 
Mark9:37 Munthu ali yense adzalandira kamodzi ka tiana totere cifukwa ca dzina langa, alandira ine; ndipo yense amene akalandira Ine, salandira Ine, koma Iye amene anandituma Ine." 
Mark9:38 Yohane anati kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, tinaona munthu alikuturutsa ziwanda m'dzina lanu; ndipo tinamletsa, cifukwa sanalikutsata ife." 
Mark9:39 Koma Yesu anati, Musamamletsa iye; pakuti palibe munthu adzacita camphamvu m'dzina langa, nadzakhoza msanga kundinenera Ine zoipa." 
Mark9:40 Pakuti iye wosatsutsana ndi ife athandizana nafe. 
Mark9:41 Pakuti munthu ali yense adzakumwetsani inu cikho ca madzi m'dzina langa cifukwa muli ace a Kristu, indetu ndinena ndi inu, kuti iye sadzataya konse mphotho yace." 
Mark9:42 Ndipo yense amene adzalakwitsa kamodzi ka tiana timeneto takukhulupirira Ine, kuli kwabwino kwa iye makamaka kuti mwala waukuru wamphero ukolowekedwe m'khosi mwace, naponyedwe iye m'nyanja." 
Mark9:43 Ndipo ngati dzanja lako likulakwitsa iwe, ulidule: nkwabwino kwa iwe kulowa m'moyo wopunduka dzanja, koposa kukhala ndi manja ako awiri ndi kulowa m'gehena, m'moto wosazima.[" 
Mark9:44 ] 
Mark9:45 Ndipo ngati phazi lako likulakwitsa, ulidule; kulowa iwe m'moyo wopunduka mwendo, kuli kwabwino koposa ndi kukhala ndi mapazi ako awiri ndi kuponyedwa m'gehena.[" 
Mark9:46 ] 
Mark9:47 Ndipo ngati diso lako likulakwitsa ulikolowole; kulowa iwe m'Ufumu wa Mulungu ndi diso limodzi kuli kwabwino koposa ndi kukhala ndi maso awiri ndi kuponyedwa m'gehena; 
Mark9:48 kumeneko mphutsi yao siikufa, ndi mota suzimidwa." 
Mark9:49 Pakuti onse adzathiridwa mcere wamoto," 
Mark9:50 Mcere uli wabwino; koma ngati mcere unasukuluka, mudzaukoleretsa ndi ciani? Khalani nao mcere mwa inu nokha, ndipo khalani ndi mtendere wina ndi mnzace." 
Mark10:1 Ndipo ananyamuka Iye kumeneko, nadza ku maiko a ku Yudeya ndi ku tsidya lija la Yordano; ndipo anasonkhananso kwa Iye makamu a anthu; ndipo monga anazolowera, anawaphunzitsanso." 
Mark10:2 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye Afarisi, namfunsa Iye ngati kuloledwa kuti munthu acotse mkazi wace, namuyesa Iye." 
Mark10:3 Ndipo Iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi Mose anakulamulirani ciani?" 
Mark10:4 Ndipo anati, Mose analola kulembera kalata wakulekanira, ndi kumcotsa." 
Mark10:5 Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, Cifukwa ca kuuma kwa mitima yanu anakulemberani lamulo ili." 
Mark10:6 Koma kuyambira pa ciyambi ca malengedwe anawapanga mwamuna ndi mkazi. 
Mark10:7 Cifukwa cace mwamuna adzasiya atate wace ndi amai wace, ndipo adzaphatikizana ndi mkazi wace;" 
Mark10:8 ndipo awiriwa adzakhala thupi limodzi: kotero kuti salinso awiri, koma thupi limodzi." 
Mark10:9 Cifukwa cace cimene Mulungu anacimanga pamodzi, asacilekanitse munthu." 
Mark10:10 Ndipo m'nyumba ophunzira anamfunsanso za cinthu ici. 
Mark10:11 Ndipo Iye ananena nao, Munthu ali yense akacotsa mkazi wace, nakakwatira wina, acita cigololo kulakwira mkaziyo;" 
Mark10:12 ndipo ngati mkazi akacotsa mwamuna wace, nakwatiwa ndi wina, acita cigololo iyeyu." 
Mark10:13 Ndipo analinkudza nato kwa Iye tiana, kuti akatikhudze; ndipo ophunzirawo anawadzudzula." 
Mark10:14 Koma pamene Yesu anaona anakwiya, ndipo anati kwa iwo, Lolani tiana tidze kwa Ine; musatiletse: pakuti Ufumu wa Mulungu uli wa totere." 
Mark10:15 Ndithu ndinena ndi inu, Munthu ali yense wosalandira Ufumu wa Mulungu ngati kamwana, sadzalowamo konse." 
Mark10:16 Ndipo Iye anatiyangata, natidalitsa, ndi kuika manja ace pa ito." 
Mark10:17 Ndipo pamene Iye anaturuka kutsata njira, anamthamangira munthu, namgwadira Iye, namfunsa, Mphunzitsi wabwino, ndidzacita ciani kuti ndilandire moyo wosatha?" 
Mark10:18 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Undicha Ine wabwino bwanji? palibe wabwino koma mmodzi, ndiye Mulungu." 
Mark10:19 Udziwa malamulo: Usaphe, Usacite cigololo, Usabe, Usacite umboni wakunama, Usanyenge, Lemekeza atate wako ndi amako." 
Mark10:20 Ndipo iye anati kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, zonsezi ndinazisunga kuyambira ndiri mwana." 
Mark10:21 Ndipo Yesu anamyang'ana, namkonda, nati kwa iye, Cinthu cimodzi cikusowa: pita, gulitsa zonse uli nazo, nuzipereke kwa anthu aumphawi, ndipo cuma udzakhala naco m'mwamba; ndipo ukadze kuno, unditsate Ine." 
Mark10:22 Koma nkhope yace inagwa pa mau awa, ndipo anacoka iye wacisoni; pakuti anali mwini cuma cambiri." 
Mark10:23 Ndipo Yesu anaunguzaunguza, nanena ndi ophunzira ace, Okhala naco cuma adzalowa mu Ufumu wa Mulungu ndi kubvuta nanga!" 
Mark10:24 Ndipo ophunzirawo anazizwa ndithu ndi mau ace. Koma Yesu anayankhanso nanena nao, Ananu, nkobvuta ndithu kwa iwo akutama cuma kulowa mu Ufumu wa Mulungu!" 
Mark10:25 Nkwa pafupi kuti ngamila ipyole diso la singano koposa kuti mwini cuma alowe mu Ufumu wa Mulungu. 
Mark10:26 Ndipo anadabwa, nanena kwa Iye, Ndipo angathe kupulumuka ndani?" 
Mark10:27 Yesu anawayang'ana iwo nati, Sikutheka ndi anthu, koma kutheka ndi Mulungu; pakuti zinthu zonse zitheka ndi Mulungu." 
Mark10:28 Petro anayamba kunena naye, Onani, ife tinasiya zonse, ndipo tinakutsatani Inu." 
Mark10:29 Yesu anati, Ndinena ndi inu ndithu, Palibe munthu anasiya nyumba, kapena abale, kapena alongo, kapena amai, kapena atate, kapena ana, kapena minda, cifukwa ca Ine, ndi cifukwa ca Uthenga Wabwinowo," 
Mark10:30 amene sadzalandira makumi khumi tsopano nthawi yino, nyumba, ndi abale, ndi alongo, ndi amai, ndi ana, ndi minda, pamodzi ndi mazunzo; ndipo nthawi irinkudza, moyo wosatha." 
Mark10:31 Koma ambiri akuyamba adzakhala akuthungo, ndi akuthungo adzakhala oyamba." 
Mark10:32 Ndipo iwo anali m'njira alinkukwera kunka ku Yerusalemu; ndipo Yesu analikuwatsogolera; ndipo iwo anazizwa; ndipo akumtsatawo anacita mantha. Ndipo Iye anatenganso khumi ndi awiriwo, nayamba kuwauza zinthu zimene zidzamfikira Iye," 
Mark10:33 nati, Taonani, tikwera ku Yerusalemu; ndipo Mwana wa munthu adzaperekedwa kwa ansembe akuru ndi alembi; ndipo iwo adzamweruza kuti ayenera imfa, nadzampereka Iye kwa anthu a mitundu;" 
Mark10:34 ndipo adzamnyoza Iye, nadzamthira malobvu, nadzamkwapula Iye, nadzamupha; ndipo pofika masiku atatu adzauka." 
Mark10:35 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye Yakobo ndi Yohane, ana a Zebedayo, nanena naye, Mphunzitsi, tifuna kuti mudzaticitire cimene ciri conse tidzapempha kwa Inu." 
Mark10:36 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, Mufuna kuti ndidzakucitireni inu ciani?" 
Mark10:37 Ndipo iwo anati kwa Iye, Mutipatse ife kuti tikhale mmodzi ku dzanja lanu lamanja, ndi wina kulamanzere, m'ulemerero wanu." 
Mark10:38 Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, Simudziwa cimene mucipempha, Mukhoza kodi kumwera cikho cimene ndimwera Ine? kapena kubatizidwa ndi ubatizo umene ndibatizidwa nao Ine?" 
Mark10:39 Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Tikhoza. Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Cikho cimene ndimwera Ine mudzamwera; ndipo ubatizo umene ndibatizidwa nao Ine, mudzabatizidwa nao;" 
Mark10:40 koma kukhala ku dzanja langa lamanja, kapena kulamanzere sikuli kwanga kupatsa; koma kuli kwa iwo amene adawakonzeratu," 
Mark10:41 Ndipo pamene khumiwo anamva, anayamba kupsa mtima cifukwa ca Yakobo ndi Yohane." 
Mark10:42 Ndipo Yesu anawaitana, nanena nao, Mudziwa kuti iwo amene ayesedwa ambuye a mitundu ya anthu amacita ufumu pa iwo; ndipo akuru ao amacita ulamuliro pa iwo." 
Mark10:43 Koma mwa inu sikutero ai; kama amene ali yense afuna kukhala wamkuru mwa inu adzakhala mtumiki wanu; 
Mark10:44 ndipo amene ali yense afuna kukhala woyamba mwa inu adzakhala kapolo wa onse. 
Mark10:45 Pakuti ndithu, Mwana wa munthu sanadza kutumikiridwa, koma kutumikira, ndi kupereka moyo wace dipo la kwa anthu ambiri." 
Mark10:46 Ndipo iwo anafika ku Yeriko; ndipo m'mene Iye analikuturuka m'Yeriko, ndi ophunzira ace, ndi khamu lalikuru la anthu, mwana wa Timeyu, Bartimeyu, wopempha wakhungu, analikukhala pansi m'mbali mwa njira." 
Mark10:47 Ndipo pamene anamva kuti ndi Yesu wa ku Nazarete, anayamba kupfuula, ndi kunena, Yesu, Inu Mwana wa Davide, mundicitire ine cifundo." 
Mark10:48 Ndipo ambiri anamuyamula kuti atonthole: koma makamaka anapfuulitsa kuti, Inu Mwana wa Davide, mundicitire cifundo." 
Mark10:49 Ndipo Yesu anaima, nati, Mwitaneni. Ndipo anaitana wakhunguyo, nanena naye, Limba mtima; nyamuka, akuitana." 
Mark10:50 Ndipo iye anataya copfunda cace, nazunzuka, nadza kwa Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Ndipo Yesu anamyankha, nati, Ufuna kuti ndikucitire ciani? Ndipo wakhunguyo anati kwa Iye, Raboni, ndilandire kuona kwanga." 
Mark10:52 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Muka; cikhulupiriro cako cakupulumutsa iwe. Ndipo pomwepo anapenyanso; namtsata Iye panjira." 
Mark11:1 Ndipo pamene iwo anayandikira ku Yerusalemu, ku Betefage ndi Betaniya, pa phiri la Azitona, anatuma awiri a ophunzira ace," 
Mark11:2 nanena nao, Mukani, lowani m'mudzi wapandunji ndi inu; ndipo pomwepo pakulowamo mudzapeza mwana wa buru womangidwa, amene palibe munthu anakhalapo kale lonse; mmasuleni, ndipo mubwere naye." 
Mark11:3 Ndipo munthu akati kwa inu, Mutero bwanji? Katini, Ambuye amfuna iye; ndipo pomwepo adzamtumiza kuno." 
Mark11:4 Ndipo anacoka, napeza mwana wa buru womangidwa pakhomo, pabwalo m'khwalala, nammasula iye." 
Mark11:5 Ndipo ena akuima kumeneko ananena nao, Mucita ciani ndi kumasula mwana wa buru?" 
Mark11:6 Ndipo anati kwa iwo monga momwe ananena Yesu: ndipo anawalola iwo apite naye. 
Mark11:7 Ndipo anabwera naye mwana wa buru kwa Yesu, naika zobvala zao pa iye, ndipo Iye anakhala pamenepo." 
Mark11:8 Ndimo ambiri anayala zobvala zao panjira; ndi ena zitsamba, anazidula m'minda." 
Mark11:9 Ndipo akutsogolera, ndi iwo akutsata, anapfuula, Hosana; Wolemekezeka Iye wakudza m'dzina la Ambuye:" 
Mark11:10 Wolemekezeka Ufumu ulinkudza, wa atate wathu Davide; Hosana m'Kumwamba-mwamba." 
Mark11:11 Ndipo Iye analowa m'Yerusalemu, m'Kacisi; ndipo m'mene anaunguza zinthu zonse, popeza ndi madzulo, anaturuka kupita ku Betaniya pamodzi ndi khumi ndi awiriwoo." 
Mark11:12 Ndipo m'mawa mwace, ataturuka ku Betaniya, Iye anamva njala." 
Mark11:13 Ndipo anaona mkuyu kutali, uli ndi masamba; ndipo anadza Iye, kuti kapena akapezapo kanthu: ndipo m'mene anafikako anapeza palibe kanthu koma masamba okha; pakuti siinali nyengo yace ya nkhuyu." 
Mark11:14 Ndipo anayankha nanena ndi uwo, Munthu sadzadyanso zipatso zako nthawi zonse. Ndipo ophunzira ace anamva," 
Mark11:15 Ndipo anafika iwo ku Yerusalemu; ndipo Iye analowa m'Kacisi, nayamba kuturutsa akugulitsa ndi akugula malonda m'Kacisimo, nagubuduza magome a osinthana ndalama, ndi mipando yaogulitsa nkhunda;" 
Mark11:16 ndipo sanalola munthu ali yense kunyamula cotengera kupyola pakati pa Kacisi. 
Mark11:17 Ndipo anaphunzitsa, nanena nao, Sicilembedwa kodi, Nyumba yanga idzachedwa nyumba yakupempheramo anthu a mitundu yonse? koma inu mwaiyesa phanga la acifwamba." 
Mark11:18 Ndipo ansembe akuru ndi alembi anamva, nafunafuna momuonongera Iye; pakuti anamuopa, cifukwa khamu lonse la anthu linazizwa ndi ciphunzitso cace." 
Mark11:19 Ndipo masiku onse madzulo anaturuka Iye m'mudzi. 
Mark11:20 Ndipo m'mene anapitapo m'mawa mwace, anaona kuti mkuyu uja unafota, kuyambira kumizu." 
Mark11:21 Ndipo Petro anakumbukila, nanena naye, Rabi, onani, wafota mkuyuwo munautemberera." 
Mark11:22 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nanena nao, Khulupirirani Mulungu," 
Mark11:23 Ndithu ndinena ndi inu, kuti, Munthu ali yense akanena ndi phiri ili, Tanyamulidwa, nuponyedwe m'nyanja; wosakayika mumtima mwace, koma adzakhulupirira kuti cimene acinena cicitidwa, adzakhala naco." 
Mark11:24 Cifukwa cace ndinena ndi inu, Zinthu ziri zonse mukazipemphera ndi kuzipempha, khulupirirani kuti mwazilandira, ndipo mudzakhala nazo." 
Mark11:25 Ndipo pamene muimirira ndi kupemphera, kholulukirani, ngati munthu wakulakwirani kanthu; kuti Atate wanunso ali Kumwamba akhulolukire inu zolakwa zanu." 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Ndipo iwo anadzanso ku Yerusalemu; ndipo m'mene Iye anali kuyenda m'Kacisi, anafika kwa Iye ansembe akuru, ndi alembi ndi akuru;" 
Mark11:28 nanena naye, Izi muzicita ndi ulamuliro wotani? Kapena anakupatsani ndani ulamuliro uwu wakucita izi?" 
Mark11:29 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Ndikufunsani mau amodzi, mundiyankhe Ine, ndipo ndidzakuuzani ulamuliro umene ndicita nao zinthu zimenezi." 
Mark11:30 Ubatizo wa Yohane ucokera Kumwamba kodi, kapena kwa anthu? Mundiyankhe." 
Mark11:31 Ndipo anatsutsana mwa iwo okha, nanena, Tikati, Kumwamba; adzanena iye, Ndipo simunakhulupirira iye bwanji?" 
Mark11:32 Koma tikati, Kwa anthu —anaopa anthuwo; pakuti onse anamuyesa Yohane mneneri ndithu." 
Mark11:33 Ndipo iwo anamyankha Yesu, nanena, Sitidziwa. Ndipo Yesu ananena nao, Inenso sindikuuzani ulamuliro umene ndicita nao zinthu zimenezi." 
Mark12:1 Ndipo Iye anayamba kulankhula nao m'mafanizo. Munthu analima munda wamphesa, nauzunguniza ndi linga, nakumba moponderamo mphesa, namanga nsanja, naukongoletsa kwa olima munda, namuka kwina." 
Mark12:2 Ndipo m'nyengo yace anatuma kapolo kwa olimawo, kuti alandireko kwa olimawo zipatso za m'munda wamphesa." 
Mark12:3 Ndipo iwo anamtenga iye, nampanda, namcotsa wopanda kanthu." 
Mark12:4 Ndipo anatumanso kapolo wina kwa iwo; ndipo ameneyu anamlasa mutu, namcitira zomcititsa manyazi." 
Mark12:5 Ndipo anatuma wina; iyeyu anamupha; ndi ena ambiri; ena anawapanda, ndi ena anawapha." 
Mark12:6 Anamtsalira mmodzi, ndiye mwana wace wokondedwa; potsiriza anamtuma iye kwa iwo, nanena, Adzamcitira ulemu mwana wanga." 
Mark12:7 Koma olima ajawo, ananena mwa iwo okha, Ameneyu ndiye wolowa nyumba; tiyeni timuphe iye, ndipo mundawu udzakhala wathu." 
Mark12:8 Ndipo anamtenga, namupha iye, namtaya kunja kwa munda." 
Mark12:9 Pamenepo mwini munda adzacita ciani? Adzafika, nadzaononga olimawo, nadzapereka mundawo kwa ena." 
Mark12:10 Kodi simunawerenga ngakhale lembo ili; Mwala umene anaukana omanga nyumba, Womwewu unayesedwa mutu wa pangondya:" 
Mark12:11 Ici cinacokera kwa Ambuye, Ndipo ciri cozizwitsa m'maso mwathu?" 
Mark12:12 Ndipo anayesa kumgwira Iye; koma anaopa khamu la anthu, pakuti anazindikira kuti Iye anakamba fanizo ili kuwatsutsa iwo; ndipo anamsiya Iye, nacoka." 
Mark12:13 Ndipo anatuma kwa Iye ena a Afarisi ndi a Aherode, kuti akamkole Iye m'kulankhula kwace." 
Mark12:14 Ndipo pamene anafika, ananena naye, Mphunzitsi, tidziwa kuti muli woona, ndipo simusamala munthu; pakuti simuyang'ana nkhope ya anthu, koma muphunzitsa njira ya Mulungu moona: Nkuloleka kodi kupereka msonkho kwa Kaisara, kapena iai?" 
Mark12:15 Kodi tipereke kapena tisapereke? Koma Iye anadziwa cinyengo cao, nati kwa iwo, Mundiyeseranji? Nditengereni rupiya latheka, kuti ndilione. Ndipo analitenga." 
Mark12:16 Ndipo ananena nao, Cithunzithunzi ici, ndi cilembo cace ziri za yani? Ndipo anati kwa Iye, Za Kaisara." 
Mark12:17 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Perekani zace za Kaisara kwa Kaisara, ndi zace za Mulungu kwa Mulungu. Ndipo anazizwa naye kwambiri." 
Mark12:18 Ndipo anadza kwa Iye Asaduki, amene amanena kuti palibe kuuka kwa akufa; ndipo anamfunsa Iye, nanena," 
Mark12:19 Mphunzitsi, Mose anatilembera, kuti, Akafa mbale wace wa munthu, nasiya mkazi, wosasiyapo mwana, mbale wace atenge mkazi wace, namuuldtsire mbale waceyo mbeu." 
Mark12:20 Analipo abale asanu ndi awiri; woyamba anakwatira mkazi, nafa, wosasiya mbeu;" 
Mark12:21 ndipo waciwiri anamkwatira, nafa, wosasiya mbeu; ndipo wacitatunso anatero momwemo;" 
Mark12:22 ndipo asanu ndi awiriwo analibe kusiya mbeu. Potsiriza pace pa onse mkazinso anafa. 
Mark12:23 Pakuuka adzakhala mkazi wa yani wa iwowa? Pakuti asanu ndi awiriwo adamuyesa mkazi wao. 
Mark12:24 Yesu ananena nao, Simusocera nanga mwa ici, popeza mulibe kudziwa malembo, kapena mphamvu yace ya Mulungu?" 
Mark12:25 Pakuti pamene adzauka kwa akufa, sakwatira, kapena sakwatiwa; koma akhala ngati angelo a Kumwamba. Koma za akufa, kuti akauldtsidwa;" 
Mark12:26 simunawerenga m'kalata wa Mose kodi, za Citsambaco, kuti Mulungu anati kwa iye, nanena, Ine Ndine Mulungu wa Abrahamu, ndi Mulungu wa Isake, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo?" 
Mark12:27 Sali Mulungu wa akufa, koma wa amoyo: musocera inu ndithu." 
Mark12:28 Ndipo anadza mmodzi wa alembi, namva iwo alikufunsana pamodzi, ndipo pakudziwa kuti anawayankha bwino, anamfunsa Iye, Lamulo la m'tsogolo la onse ndi liti?" 
Mark12:29 Yesu anayankha, kuti, La m'tsogolo ndili, Mvera, Israyeli; Ambuye Mulungu wathu, Ambuye ndiye mmodzi;" 
Mark12:30 ndipouzikonda Ambuye Mulungu wako ndi mtima wako wonse, ndi moyo wako wonse, ndi nzeru zako zonse, ndi mphamvu yako yonse." 
Mark12:31 Laciwiri ndi ili, Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda mwini. Palibe lamulo lina lakuposa awa." 
Mark12:32 Ndipo mlembiyo anati kwa Iye, Cabwino, Mphunzitsi, mwanena zoona kuti ndiye mmodzi; ndipo palibe wina, koma Iye:" 
Mark12:33 ndipo, kumkonda Iye ndi mtima wonse, ndi nzeru yonse, ndi mphamvu yonse, ndi kukonda mnzace monga adzikonda mwini, ndiko kuposa nsembe zopsereza zamphumphu zonse, ndi nsembe zophedwa." 
Mark12:34 Ndipo palmona kuti anayankha ndi nzeru, Yesu anati kwa iye, Suli kutali ndi Ufumu wa Mulungu. Ndipo palibe munthu analimbanso mtima kwnfunsa Iye kanthu." 
Mark12:35 Ndipo Yesu pamene anaphunzitsa m'Kacisi, anayankha, nanena, Bwanji alembi anena kuti Kristu ndiye mwana wa Davide?" 
Mark12:36 Davide mwini yekha anati mwa Mzimu Woyera, Ambuye anati kwa Ambuye wanga, Khala ku dzanja langa lamanja, kufikira ndiwaika adani ako popondapo mapazi ako." 
Mark12:37 Davide mwini yekha amchula Iye Ambuye; ndipo ali mwana wace bwanji? Ndipo anthu a makamuwo anakondwa kumva Iye. 
Mark12:38 Ndipo m'ciphunzitso cace ananena, Yang'anirani mupewe alembi, akufuna kuyendayenda obvala miinjiro, ndi kulankhulidwa pamisika," 
Mark12:39 ndi kukhala nayo mipando yaulemu m'sunagoge, ndi malo aulemu pamapwando:" 
Mark12:40 amenewo alusira nyumba za akazi amasiye, napemphera monyenga mau ambiri; amenewa adzalandira kulanga koposa." 
Mark12:41 Ndipo Iye anakhala pansi pandunji pa mosungiramo zopereka, napenya kuti khamu la anthu alikuponya ndalama mosungiramo; ndipo eni cuma ambiri anaponyamo zambiri." 
Mark12:42 Ndipo anadza mkazi wamasiye waumphawi, ndipo iye anaponyamo tindalama tiwiri tanng'ono tofa kakobiri kamodzi." 
Mark12:43 Ndipo anaitana ophunzira ace, nati kwa iwo, Ndithu ndinena ndi inu, Mkazi wamasiye amene waumphawi anaponya zambiri koposa onse akuponya mosungiramo:" 
Mark12:44 pakuti anaponyamo onse mwa zocuruka zao; koma iye anaponya mwa kusowa kwace zonse anali nazo, inde moyo wace wonse." 
Mark13:1 Ndipo pamene analikuturuka Iye m'Kacisi, mmodzi wa ophunzira ace ananena kwa Iye, Mphunzitsi, onani, miyala yotere ndi nyumba yotere." 
Mark13:2 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Kodi waona nyumba izi zazikuru? Sudzasiyidwa pano mwala umodzi pamwamba pa unzace, umene sudzagwetsedwa." 
Mark13:3 Ndipo pamene anakhala Iye pa phiri la Azitona, popenyana ndi Kacisi, anamfunsa Iye m'tseri Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane, ndi Andreya, kuti," 
Mark13:4 Tiuzeni, zinthu izi zidzacitika liti? Ndi cotani cizindikilo cace cakuti ziri pafupi pa kumarizidwa zinthu izi zonse?" 
Mark13:5 Ndipo Yesu anayamba kunena nao, Yang'anirani kuti munthu asakusoceretseni." 
Mark13:6 Ambiri adzafika m'dzina langa, nadzanena, Ine ndine Iye; nadzasoceretsa ambiri." 
Mark13:7 Ndipo m'mene mudzamva za nkhondo ndi mbiri zace za nkhondo, musamadera nkhawa: ziyenerakucitika izi; koma sicinafike cimariziro." 
Mark13:8 Pakuti mtundu wa anthu udzayambana ndi mtundu wina, ndipo ufumu ndi ufumu unzace: padzakhaia zibvomezi m'malo m'malo; padzakhala njala; izi ndi zoyambira za zowawa." 
Mark13:9 Koma inu mudziyang'anire inu nokha; pakuti adzakuperekani inu kwa akuru a mirandu; ndipo adzakukwapulani m'masunagoge; ndipo pamaso pa akazembe ndi mafwnu mudzaimirira cifukwa ca Ine, kukhale umboni kwa iwo." 
Mark13:10 Ndipo Uthenga Wabwino uyenera uyambe kulalikidwa kwa anthu a mitundu yonse. 
Mark13:11 Ndipo pamene adzapita nanu kumlandu, nadzakuperekani, musada nkhawa usanayambe mrandu ndi cimene mudzalankhula; koma ci mene cidzapatsidwa kwa inu m'mphindi yomweyo, mucilankhule; pakuti olankhula si ndinu, koma Mzimu Woyera." 
Mark13:12 Ndipo mbale adzapereka mbale wace kuti amuphe, ndi atate mwana wace; ndi ana adza yambana ndi akuwabala, nadzawaphetsa," 
Mark13:13 Ndipo adzada inu anthu onse cifukwa ca dzina langa: koma iye wakupirira kufikira cimariziro, yemweyo adzapulumutsidwa." 
Mark13:14 Ndipo pamene mukaona conyansa ca kupululutsa cirikuima pomwe siciyenera (wakuwerenga azindikile), pamenepo a m'Yudeya athawire kumapiri;" 
Mark13:15 ndi iye amene ali pamwamba pa chindwi asatsike, kapena asalowe kukaturutsa kanthu m'nyumba mwace;" 
Mark13:16 ndi iye amene ali kumunda asabwere kudzatenga Malaya ace. 
Mark13:17 Koma tsoka iwo akukhala ndi pakati, ndi akuyamwitsa ana masiku awol" 
Mark13:18 Ndipo pempherani kuti kusakhale m'nyengo yacisanu. 
Mark13:19 Pakuti masiku aja padzakhala cisautso, conga sicinakhala cinzace kuyambira ciyambi ca cilengedwe cimene Mulungu anacilenga ndi kufikira tsopano, ndipo sicidzakhalanso nthawi zonse." 
Mark13:20 Ndipo Ambuye akadapanda kufupikitsa masikuwo, sakadapulumuka munthu mmodzi yense; koma cifukwa ca osankhidwa amene anawasankha, anafupikitsa masikuwo." 
Mark13:21 Ndipo pamenepo wina akati kwa inu, Onani Kristu ali pano; kapena, Onani, uko; musabvomereze;" 
Mark13:22 pakuti adzauka Akristu onyenga ndi aneneri onyenga, ndipo adzacita zizindikilo ndi zozizwitsa, kuti akasoceretse, ngati nkutheka, osankhidwa omwe." 
Mark13:23 Koma yanganirani; onani ndakuuziranitu zinthu zonse, zisanafike." 
Mark13:24 Koma m'masikuwo, citatha cisautso cimeneco, dzuwa lidzadetsedwa, ndi mwezi sudzapatsa kuunika kwace," 
Mark13:25 ndi nyenyezi zidzagwa kucokera m'mwamba ndi mphamvu ziri m'mwamba zidzagwedezeka. 
Mark13:26 Ndipo pamenepo adzaona Mwana wa munthu alinkudza m'mitambo ndi mphamvu yaikuru, ndi ulemerero." 
Mark13:27 Ndipo pamenepo adzatuma angelo, nadzasonkhanitsa osankhidwa ace ocokera ku mphepo zinai, kuyambira ku malekezero ace a dziko lapansi, ndi kufikira ku malekezero a thambo." 
Mark13:28 Ndipo phunzirani ndi mkuyu fanizo lace; pamene pafika kuti nthambi yace ikhala yanthete, ndipo anaphuka masamba ace, muzindikira kuti layandikira dzinja;" 
Mark13:29 comweco inunso, pamene muona zinthu izi zirikucitika, zindikirani kuti ali pafupi pakhomo." 
Mark13:30 Indetu ndinena ndi inu, Mbadwo uno sudzapita kufikira zinthu izi zonse zitacitika." 
Mark13:31 Thambo ndi dziko lapansi zidzapita; koma mau anga sadzapita. 
Mark13:32 Koma za tsiku ilo, kapena nthawi yace sadziwa munthu, angakhale angelo m'Mwamba, angakhale Mwana, koma Atate ndiye." 
Mark13:33 Yang'anirani, dikirani, pempherani: pakuti simudziwa nthawi yace." 
Mark13:34 Monga ngati munthu wa paulendo, adacoka kunyumba kwace, nawapatsa akapolo ace ulamuliro, kwa munthu ali yense nchito yace, nalamulira wapakhomo adikire." 
Mark13:35 Cifukwa cace dikirani; pakuti simudziwa inu nthawi yace yakubwera mwini nyumba, kapena madzulo, kapena pakati pausiku, kapena pakulira tambala, kapena mamawa;" 
Mark13:36 kuti angabwere balamantha nakakupezani muli m'tulo. 
Mark13:37 Ndipo cimene ndinena ndi inu ndinena kwa onse, Dikirani." 
Mark14:1 Ndipo popita masiku awiri kuli phwando la Paskha ndi mikate yopanda cotupitsa; ndipo ansembe akuru ndi alembi anafunafuna momcitira ciwembu, ndi kumupha:" 
Mark14:2 pakuti anati, Paphwando ai, kuti pangakhale phokoso la anthu." 
Mark14:3 Ndipo pakukhala iye ku Betaniya m'nyumba ya Simoni wakhate, m'mene anaseama kudya, anadzapo mkazi ali nayo nsupa yaalabastero ya mafuta onunkhira bwino a nardo weni weni a mtengowapatali; naswa nsupayo, nawatsanulira pamutu pace." 
Mark14:4 Koma anakhalako ena anabvutika mtima mwa iwo okha, ndi kuti, Mafutawo atayidwa cifukwa ninji?" 
Mark14:5 Pakuti mafuta amene akadagula marupiya atheka mazana atatu ndi mphambu zace, ndi kupatsa aumphawi. Ndipo anadandaulira mkaziyo." 
Mark14:6 Koma Yesu anati, Mlekeni, mumbvutiranji? wandicitira Ine nchito yabwino." 
Mark14:7 Pakuti muli nao aumphawi pamodzi ndi inu masiku onse, ndipo pali ponse pamene mukafuna mukhoza kuwacitira zabwino; koma Ine simuli nane masiku onse." 
Mark14:8 Iye wacita cimene wakhoza; anandidzozeratu thupi langa ku kuikidwa m'manda. 
Mark14:9 Ndipo ndithu ndinena ndi inu, Ponse pamene padzalalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino ku dziko lonse lapansi, icinso cimene anacita mkazi uyu cidzanenedwa, cikhale comkumbukira naco." 
Mark14:10 Ndipo Yudase Isikariote, ndiye mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, anacoka napita kwa ansembe akuru, kuti akampereke Iye kwa iwo." 
Mark14:11 Ndipo pamene iwo anamva, anasekera, nalonjezana naye kuti adzampatsa ndalama. Ndipo iye anafunafuna pompereka Iye bwino." 
Mark14:12 Ndipo tsiku loyamba la mikate yopanda cotupitsa, pamene amapha Paskha, ophunzira ace ananena naye, Mufuna tinke kuti, tikakonze mkadyereko Paskha?" 
Mark14:13 Ndipo anatuma awiri a ophunzira ace, nanena nao, Lowani m'mzinda, ndipo adzakomana nanu munthu wakusenza mtsuko wa madzi; mumtsate iye;" 
Mark14:14 ndipo kumene akalowako iye, munene naye mwini nyumba, Mphunzitsi anena, Ciri kuti cipinda ca alendo canga, m'menemo ndikadye Paskha ndi ophunzira anga?" 
Mark14:15 Ndipo iye yekha adzakusonyezani cipinda ca pamwamba cacikuru coyalamo ndi cokonzedwa; ndipo m'menemo mutikonzere. 
Mark14:16 Ndipo ophunzira anaturuka, nafika m'mzinda, napeza monga anati kwa iwo; ndipo anakonza Paskha." 
Mark14:17 Ndipo pofika madzulo anadza Iye pamodzi ndi khumi ndi awiriwo. 
Mark14:18 Ndipo pamene anaseama iwo kudya, Yesu anati, Ndithu ndinena ndi inu, Mmodzi wa inu adzandipereka Ine, ndiye wakudya ndi Ine pamodzi." 
Mark14:19 Anayamba iwo kukhala ndi cisoni, ndi kunena naye mmodzi mmodzi, kuti, Ndine kodi?" 
Mark14:20 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, ndiye wakusunsa pamodzi ndi Ine m'mbale." 
Mark14:21 Pakuti Mwana wa munthu amukadi, monga kwalembedwa za Iye; koma tsoka munthuyo amene apereka Mwana wa munthu! Kukadakhala bwino kwa munthu ameneyo ngati sakadabadwa iye." 
Mark14:22 Ndipo pamene iwo analikudya, Iye anatenga mkate, ndipo pamene anadalitsa, ananyema, napereka kwa iwo, kuti, Tengani; thupi langa ndi ili." 
Mark14:23 Ndipo anatenga cikho, ndipo pamene adayamika, anapereka kwa iwo; ndipo iwo onse anamweramo." 
Mark14:24 Ndipo Iye anati kwa iwo, ici ndi mwazi wanga wa cipangano, wothiridwa cifukwa ca anthu ambiri." 
Mark14:25 Ndithu ndinena nanu, Sindidzamwanso cipatso ca mpesa, kufikira tsiku lijalo, limene ndidzamwa ico catsopano mu Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Mark14:26 Ndipo atayimba nyimbo, anaturuka, namuka ku phiri la Azitona." 
Mark14:27 Ndipo Yesu ananena nao, Mudzakhumudwa nonsenu; pakuti kwalembedwa, Ndidzakantha mbusa, ndi nkhosa zidzamwazika." 
Mark14:28 Komatu nditadzauka ndidzatsogolera inu ku Galileya. 
Mark14:29 Koma Petro ananena naye, Angakhale adzakhumudwa onse, komatu ine iai." 
Mark14:30 Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Ndithu ndinena ndi iwe, kuti lero, usiku uno, tambala asanalire kawiri, udzandikana Ine katatu." 
Mark14:31 Koma iye analimbitsa mau cilimbitsire, kuti, Ngakhale ndidzafa nanu, sindidzakana Inu. Ndipo onsewo anatero." 
Mark14:32 Ndipo iwo anadza ku malo dzina lace Getsemane; ndipo ananena kwa ophunzira ace, Bakhalani pano, kufikira ndikapemphera." 
Mark14:33 Ndipo anatenga pamodzi ndi Iye Petro, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane, nayamba kudabwa kwambiri, ndi kusauka mtima ndithu." 
Mark14:34 Ndipo ananena nao, Moyo wanga uli wa cisoni cambiri, kufikira imfa. Bakhalani pano, nimudikire." 
Mark14:35 Ndipo Iye anapita m'tsogolo pang'ono, nagwa pansi, napemphera kuti ngati nkutheka nthawi imene impitirire." 
Mark14:36 Ndipo ananena, Abba, Atate, zinthu zonse zitheka ndi Inu; mundicotsere cikho ici; komatu si cimene ndifuna Ine, koma cimene mufuna Inu." 
Mark14:37 Ndipo anadza nawapeza iwo ali m'tulo, nanena ndi Petro, Simoni, ugona kodi? unalibe mphamvu yakudikira ora limodzi kodi?" 
Mark14:38 Dikirani, pempherani, kuti mungalowe m'kuyesedwa; mzimutu uli wakufuna, koma thupi liri lolefuka." 
Mark14:39 Ndipo anacokanso, napemphera, nanena mau omwewo." 
Mark14:40 Ndipo anadzanso nawapeza ali m'tulo, pakuti maso ao analemeradi; ndipo sanadziwa comyankha Iye." 
Mark14:41 Ndipo anadza kacitatu, nanena nao, Gonani tsopano, nimupumule; cakwanira; yafika nthawi; onani Mwana wa munthu aperekedwa m'manja a anthu ocimwa." 
Mark14:42 Ukani, tizimuka; onani wakundiperekayo ali pafupi." 
Mark14:43 Ndipo pomwepo, Iye ali cilankhulire, anadza Yudase, mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, ndipo pamodzi naye khamu la anthu, ali nao malupanga ndi mikunkhu, ocokera kwa ansembe akuru ndi alembi ndi akuru." 
Mark14:44 Ndipo wakumpereka Iye anawapatsa cizindikilo, nanena, Iye amene ndidzampsompsona, ndiyetu; mgwireni munke naye cisungire." 
Mark14:45 Ndipo atafika, pomwepo anadza kwa Iye, nanena, Rabi; nampsompsonetsa." 
Mark14:46 Ndipo anamthira manja, namgwira." 
Mark14:47 Koma mmodzi wina wa iwo akuimirirapo, anasolola lupanga lace, nakantha kapolo wace wa mkulu wa ansembe, namdula khutu lace." 
Mark14:48 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi mwaturuka ndi malupanga ndi mikunkhu kundigwira ine monga wacifwamba?" 
Mark14:49 Masiku onse ndinali nanu m'Kacisi ndirikuphunzitsa, ndipo simunandigwira Ine; koma ici cacitika kuti malembo akwanitsidwe." 
Mark14:50 Ndipo iwo onse anamsiya Iye, nathawa." 
Mark14:51 Ndipo mnyamata wina anamtsata Iye, atapfundira pathupi bafuta yekha; ndipo anamgwira;" 
Mark14:52 koma iye anasiya bafutayo, nathawa wamarisece." 
Mark14:53 Ndipo ananka naye Yesu kwa mkulu wa ansembe; ndipo anasonkhana kwa iye ansembe akuru onse ndi akuru a anthu, ndi alembi," 
Mark14:54 Ndipo Petro adamtsata Iye kutali, kufikira kulowa m'bwalo la mkulu wa ansembe; ndipo anali kukhala pansi pamodzi ndi anyamata, ndi kuotha moto." 
Mark14:55 Ndipo ansembe akuru ndi akuru a milandu onse anafunafuna umboni wakutsutsa nao Yesu kuti amuphe Iye; koma sanaupeza. 
Mark14:56 Pakuti ambiri anamcitira umboni wonama, ndipo umboni wao sunalingana." 
Mark14:57 Ndipo ananyamukapo ena, namcitira umboni wakunama, nanena kuti," 
Mark14:58 Ife tinamva Iye alikunena, kuti, Ine ndidzaononga Kacisi uyu wopangidwa ndi manja, ndi masiku atatu ndidzamanga wina wosapangidwa ndi manja." 
Mark14:59 Ndipo ngakhale momwemo umboni wao sunalingana. 
Mark14:60 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe ananyamuka pakati, namfunsa Yesu, nanena, Suyankha kanthu kodi? Nciani ici cimene awa alikucitira mboni?" 
Mark14:61 Koma anakhala cete, osayankhakanthu. Mkulu wa ansembe anamfunsanso, nanena naye, Kodi Iwe ndiwe Kristu, Mwana wace wa Wolemekezeka?" 
Mark14:62 Ndipo Yesu anati, Ndine amene; ndipo mudzaona Mwana wa munthu alikukhala ku dzanja lamanja la mphamvu, ndi kudza ndi mitambo ya kumwamba." 
Mark14:63 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe anang'amba maraya ace, nanena, Tifuniranjinso mboni zina?" 
Mark14:64 Mwamva mwano wace; muyesa bwanji? Ndipo onse anamtsutsa Iye kuti ayenera kufa. 
Mark14:65 Ndipo ena mayamba kumthira malobvu Iye, adi kuphimba nkhope yace, ndi cumbwanyula, ndi kunena naye, Lota; ndipo anyamatawo ananpanda Iye kofu." 
Mark14:66 Ndipo pamene Petro anali iansi m'bwalo, anadzapo mmodzi va adzakazi a mkulu wa ansembe;" 
Mark14:67 ndipo anaona Petro alikuotha noto, namyang'ana iye, nanena, wenso unali naye Mnazarene, Yesu." 
Mark14:68 Koma anakana, nanena, Sindidziwa kapena kumvetsa cimene ucinena iwe; ndipo anaturuka kunka kucipata; ndipo tambala analira." 
Mark14:69 Ndipo anamuona mdzakaziyo, nayambanso kunena ndi iwo akuimirirapo, Uyu ngwa awo." 
Mark14:70 Koma anakananso. Ndipo patapita kamphindi, akuimirirapo ananenanso ndi Petro, Zedi uli wa awo; pakutinso uti Mgalileya." 
Mark14:71 Koma iye anayamba kutemberera, ndi kulumbira, Sindimdziwa munthuyu mulikunena." 
Mark14:72 Ndipo pomwepo tambala analira kaciwiri. Ndipo Petro anakumbukila umo Yesu anati kwa iye, kuti, Tambala asanalire kawiri udzandikana katatu. Ndipo pakuganizira ici analira misozi." 
Mark15:1 Ndipo pomwepo mamawa anakhala upo ansembe akuru, ndi akuru a anthu, ndi alembi, ndi akuru a milandu onse, namanga Yesu, namtenga, nampereka kwa Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Ndipo Pilato anamfunsa Iye, Kodi ndiwe Mfumu ya Ayuda? Ndipo anayankha, nanena naye, Mwatero." 
Mark15:3 Ndipo ansembe akuru anamnenera Iye zinthu zambiri. 
Mark15:4 Ndipo Pilato anamfunsanso, nanena, Suyankha kanthu kodi? taona, akunenera Iwe zinthu zambiri zotere." 
Mark15:5 Koma Yesu sanayankhanso kanthu; kotero kuti Pilato anazizwa. 
Mark15:6 Ndipo adafuwamasulira paphwando wandende mmodzi, amene iwo anampempha," 
Mark15:7 Ndipo analipo wina dzina lace Baraba, womangidwa pamodzi ndi opanduka, amene anapha munthu mumphandumo." 
Mark15:8 Ndipo khamu la anthu anabwera nayamba kupempha kuti acite monga adafuwacitira. 
Mark15:9 Ndipo Pilato anawayankha, nanena nao, Kodi mufuna kuti ndikumasulireni Mfumu ya Ayuda?" 
Mark15:10 Pakuti anazindikira kuti ansembe akuru anampereka Iye mwanjiru. 
Mark15:11 Koma ansembe akuru anasonkezera khamulo, kuti makamaka awamasulire Baraba." 
Mark15:12 Ndipo Pilato anawayankhanso, nati kwa iwo, Pamenepo ndidzacita ciani ndi Iye amene mumchula Mfumu ya Ayuda?" 
Mark15:13 Ndipo anapfuulanso, Mpacikeni pamtanda." 
Mark15:14 Ndipo Pilato ananena nao, Pakuti Iye anacita coipa cotani? Koma iwo anapfuulitsatu, Mpacikeni Iye." 
Mark15:15 Ndipo Pilato pofuna kuwakhazika mtima anthuwo, anawamasulira Baraba, napereka Yesu, atamkwapula, akampacike pamtanda." 
Mark15:16 Ndipo asilikari anacoka naye nalowa m'bwalo, ndilo Pretorio; nasonkhanitsa gulu lao lonse." 
Mark15:17 Ndipo anambveka Iye cibakuwa, naluka korona waminga, nambveka pa Iye;" 
Mark15:18 ndipo anayamba kumlankhula Iye, kuti, Tikuoneni, Mfumu ya Ayuda!" 
Mark15:19 Ndipo anampanda Iye pamutu pace ndi bango, namthira malobvu, nampindira maondo, namlambira." 
Mark15:20 Ndipo atatha kumnyoza anambvula cibakuwaco nambveka Iye zobvala zace. Ndipo anaturuka naye kuti akampacike Iye pamtanda. 
Mark15:21 Ndipo anakangamiza wina wopitirirapo, Simoni wa ku Kurene, alikucokera kuminda, atate wao wa Alesandere ndi Rufu, kuti anyamule mtanda wace." 
Mark15:22 Ndipo anamtenga kunka naye ku malo Golgota, ndiwo, osandulika, Malo-a-bade." 
Mark15:23 Ndipo anampatsa vinyo wosanganiza ndi mure; koma Iye sanamlandira. 
Mark15:24 Ndipo anampacika Iye, nagawana zobvala zace mwa iwo okha, ndi kucita maere pa izo, kuti adziwe yense adzatengaciani." 
Mark15:25 Ndipo panali ora lacitatu, ndipo anampacika Iye." 
Mark15:26 Ndipo lembo la mlandu wace linalembedwa pamwamba, MFUMU YAAYUDA." 
Mark15:27 Ndipo anapacika pamodzi ndi Iye acifwamba awiri; mmodzi ku dzanja lace lamanja ndi wina kulamanzere.[ 
Mark15:28 ] 
Mark15:29 Ndipo iwo akupitirirapo anamcitira mwano, napukusa mitu yao, nanena, Ha! iwe wakupasula Kacisi, ndi kummanga masiku atatu," 
Mark15:30 udzipulumutse mwini, nutsike pamtanda." 
Mark15:31 Moteronso ansembe akuru anamtonza mwa iwo okha pamodzi ndi alembi, nanena, Anapulumutsa ena; sakhoza kudzipulumutsa yekha." 
Mark15:32 Atsike tsopano pamtanda, Kristu Mfumu ya Israyeli, kuti tione, ndi kukhulupirira. Ndipo iwo akupacikidwa naye anamlalatira." 
Mark15:33 Ndipo pofika ora lacisanu ndi cimodzi, panali mdima pa dziko lonse, kufikira ora lacisanu ndi cinai." 
Mark15:34 Ndipo pa ora lacisanu ndi cinai Yesu anapfuula ndi mau okweza, Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakitani? ndiko kusandulika, Mulungu wanga, Mulungu wanga, mwandisiyiranji Ine?" 
Mark15:35 Ndipo ena akuimirirapo, paku mva, ananena, Taonani, aitana Eliya" 
Mark15:36 Ndipo anathamanga wina, nadzaza cinkhupule ndi vinyo wosasa naciika pabango, namwetsa Iye nanena, Lekani; tione ngati Eliys adza kudzamtsitsa." 
Mark15:37 Ndipo Yesr anaturutsa mau okweza, napereka mzimu wace." 
Mark15:38 Ndipo cinsart cocinga ca m'Kacisi cinang'ambika pakati, kuyambira kumwamba kufikira pansi." 
Mark15:39 Ndipo pamene kenturiyo, woimirirapo popenyana ndi Iye, anaona kuti anapereka mzimu kotero, anati, Zoonadi, munthu uyu anali Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Mark15:40 Ndipo analinso kumeneko akazi akuyang'anira kutali; mwa iwo anali Maliya wa Magadala, ndi Maliya amace wa Yakobo wamng'ono ndi wa Yose, ndi Salome;" 
Mark15:41 amene anamtsata Iye, pamene anali m'Galileya, namtumikira; ndi akazi ena ambiri, amene anakwera kudza ndi Iye ku Yerusalemu." 
Mark15:42 Ndipo atafika tsono madzulo, popeza mpa tsiku lokonzera, ndilo la pambuyo pa Sabata," 
Mark15:43 anadzapo Y osefe wa ku Arimateya, mkulu wa mirandu womveka, amene yekha analikuyembekezera Ufumu wa Mulungu; nalimba mtima nalowa kwa Pilato, napempha mtembo wace wa Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Ndipo Pilato anazizwa ngati adamwaliradi; naitana kenturiyo, namfunsa ngati adamwalira kale." 
Mark15:45 Ndipo pamene anacidziwa ndi kenturiyo, anamninkha Yosefe ntembowo." 
Mark15:46 Ndipo anagula oafuta, namtsitsa Iye, namkulunga n'bafutamo, namuika m'manda osenedwa m'thanthwe; nakunkhunicira mwala pa khomo la manda." 
Mark15:47 Ndipo Maliya wa Magadala ndi Maliya amace wa Yose anapenya pomwe anaikidwapo. 
Mark16:1 Ndipo litapita Sabata, Maliya wa Magadala, ndi Maliya amace wa Yakobo, ndi Salome, anagula zonunkhira, kuti akadze kumdzoza Iye." 
Mark16:2 Ndipo anadza kumanda mamawa tsiku loyamba la Sabata, litaturuka dzuwa." 
Mark16:3 Ndipo analikunena mwa okha, Adzatikunkhunizira ndam mwalawo, pa khomo la manda?" 
Mark16:4 Ndipo pamene anakweza maso anaona kuti mwala wakunkhunizidwa pakuti unali waukuru ndithu. 
Mark16:5 Ndipo pamene analowa m'manda, anaona mnyamata alikukhala ku mba li va ku dzanja lamanja, wobvala mwinjiro woyera; ndipo iwo anadabwa." 
Mark16:6 Ndipo iye ananena nao, Musadabwe: mulikufuna Yesu Mnazarene amene anapacikidwa: anauka; sali pano; taonani, mbuto m'men e anaikamo Iye!" 
Mark16:7 Koma mukani, uzani ophunzira ace, ndi Petro, kuti akutsogolerani inu ku Galileya; kumeneko mudzamuona Iye, monga ananena ndi inu." 
Mark16:8 Ndipo anaturuka iwo, nathawa kumanda; pakuti kunthunthumira ndi kudabwa kwakukuru kudawagwira; ndipo sanauza kanthu kwa munthu ali yense; pakuti anacitamantha." 
Mark16:9 Ndipo pamene Iye adauka mamawa tsiku loyamba la sabata, anayamba kuonekera kwa Maliya wa Magadala, amene Iye adamturutsira ziwanda zisanu ndi ziwiri." 
Mark16:10 Iyeyu anapita kuwauza iwo amene adafokhala naye, ali ndi cisoni ndi kulira misozi." 
Mark16:11 Ndipo iwowo, pamene anamva kuti ali moyo, ndi kuti adapenyeka kwa iye, sanamvera." 
Mark16:12 Ndipo zitatha izi, anaonekanso Iye m'maonekedwe ena kwa awiri a iwo alikuyenda kupita kumiraga," 
Mark16:13 Ndipo iwowa anacoka nawauza otsala; koma iwo omwe sanawabvomereza. 
Mark16:14 Ndipo citatha ico anaonekera kwa khumi ndi mmodzi iwo okha, alikuseama pacakudya; ndipo anawadzudzula cifukwa ca kusabvomereza kwao ndi kuuma mtima, popeza sanabvomereza iwo amene adamuona, atauka Iye." 
Mark16:15 Ndipo ananena nao, mukani ku dziko lonse lapansi, lalikirani Uthenga Wabwino kwa olengedwa onse." 
Mark16:16 Amene akhulupirira nabatizidwa, adzapulumutsidwa; koma amene sakhulupirira adzalangidwa." 
Mark16:17 Ndipo zizindikilo izi zidzawatsata iwo akukhulupirira; m'dzina langa adzaturutsa ziwanda; adzalankhula ndi malankhulidwe atsopano; 
Mark16:18 adzatola njoka, ndipo ngakhale akamwa kanthu kakufa nako, sikadzawapweteka; adzaika manja ao pa odwala, ndipo adzacira." 
Mark16:19 Pamenepo Ambuye Yesu, ata-tha kulankhula nao, analandiridwa Kumwamba, nakhala pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu." 
Mark16:20 Ndipo iwowa anaturuka, nalalikira ponse ponse, ndipo Ambuye anacita nao pamodzi, natsimikiza mau ndi zizindikilo zakutsatapo, Amen." 
Luke1:1 POPEZA ambiri anayesa kulongosola nkhani ya zinthu zinacitika pakati pa ife," 
Luke1:2 monga anazipereka kwa ife iwo amene anakhala mboni ndi atumiki a mau," 
Luke1:3 kuyambira paciyambi, ndinayesa nkokoma inenso, amene ndinalondalonda mosamalitsa zinthu zonse kuyambira paciyambi, kulembera kwa iwe tsatane tsatane, Teofilo wabwinotu iwe;" 
Luke1:4 kuti udziwitse zoona zace za mau amene unaphunzira. 
Luke1:5 Masiku a Herode, mfumu ya Yudeya, kunali munthu wansembe, dzina lace Zakariya, wa gulu la ansembe la Abiya; ndi mkazi wace wa ana akazi a pfuko la Aroni, dzina lace Elisabeti." 
Luke1:6 Ndipo onse awiri anali olungama mtima pamaso pa Mulungu, namayendabe m'malamulo onse ndi zoikika za Ambuye osacimwa." 
Luke1:7 Ndipo analibe mwana, popeza Elisabeti anali wouma, ndipo onse awiri anakalamba." 
Luke1:8 Ndipo panali, pakucita iye nchito yakupereka nsembe m'dongosolo la gulu lace, pamaso pa Mulungu, monga mwa macitidwe a kupereka nsembe," 
Luke1:9 adamgwera maere akufukiza zonunkhira polowa iye m'Kacisi wa Ambuye. 
Luke1:10 Ndipo khamu lonse la anthu Iinalikupemphera kunja nthawi ya zonunkhira. 
Luke1:11 Ndipo anamuonekera iye mngelo wa Ambuye, naimirira ku dzanja lamanja la guwa la nsembe la zonunkhira." 
Luke1:12 Ndipo Zakariya anadabwa pamene anamuona, ndipo mantha anamgwira." 
Luke1:13 Koma mngelo anati kwa iye, Usaope Zakariya, cifukwa kuti lamveka pemphero lako, ndipo mkazi wako adzakubalira mwana wamwamuna, ndipo udzamucha dzina lace Yohane." 
Luke1:14 Ndipo udzakhala nako kukondwera ndi msangalalo; ndipo anthu ambiri adzakondwera pa kubadwa kwace. 
Luke1:15 Pakuti iye adzakhala wamkuru pamaso pa Ambuye, ndipo sadzamwa konse vinyo kapena, kacasu; nadzadzazidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, kuyambira asanabadwe." 
Luke1:16 Ndipo iye adzatembenuzira ana a Israyeli ambiri kwa Ambuye Mulungu wao. 
Luke1:17 Ndipo adzamtsogolera iye, ndi mzimu ndi mphamvu ya Eliya, kutembenuzira mitima ya atate kwa ana ao, ndi osamvera kuti atsate nzeru ya olungama mtima; kukonzeratu Ambuye anthu okonzeka." 
Luke1:18 Ndipo Zakariya anati kwa mngelo, Ndidzadziwitsa ici ndi ciani? Pakuti ndine nkhalamba, ndipo zaka zace za mkazi wanga zacuruka." 
Luke1:19 Ndipo mngelo anayankha, nati kwa iye, ine ndine Gabrieli, woimirira pamaso pa Mulungu; ndipo ndinatumidwa kwa iwe kudzalankhula nawe, ndi kuuza iwe uthenga uwu wabwino." 
Luke1:20 Ndipo taona, udzakhala wotonthola ndi wosakhoza kulankhula, kufikira tsiku limene zidzacitika izi, popeza kuti sunakhulupirira mau, anga, amene adzakwanitsidwa pa nyengo yace." 
Luke1:21 Ndipo anthu analikulindira Zakariya, nazizwa ndi kucedwa kwace m'kacisimo." 
Luke1:22 Koma m'mene iye anaturukamo, sanatha kulankhula nao; ndipo anazindikira kuti iye adaona masomphenya m'Kacisimo. Ndipo iye analinkukodola iwo, nakhalabe wosalankhula." 
Luke1:23 Ndipo kunali, pamene masiku a utumiki wace anamarizidwa, anamuka kunyumba kwace." 
Luke1:24 Ndipo atatha masiku awa, Elisabeti mkazi wace anaima; nadzibisa miyezi isanu, nati," 
Luke1:25 Ambuye wandicitira cotero m'masiku omwe iye anandipenyera, kucotsa manyazi anga pakati pa anthu." 
Luke1:26 Ndipo mwezi wacisanu ndi cimodzi mngelo Gabrieli anatumidwa ndi Mulungu kunka ku mudzi wa ku Galileya dzina lace N azarete," 
Luke1:27 kwa namwali wopalidwa ubwenzi ndi mwamuna, dzina lace Yosefe, wa pfuko la Davine; ndipo dzina lace la namwaliyo ndilo Mariya." 
Luke1:28 Ndipo pakulowa mngelo anati kwa iye, Tikuoneni, wocitidwa cisomo, Ambuye ali ndi iwe." 
Luke1:29 Koma iye ananthunthumira ndi mau awa, nasinkhasinkha kulankhula uku nkutani." 
Luke1:30 Ndipo mngelo anati kwa iye, Usaope, Mariya; pakuti wapeza cisomo ndi Mulungu." 
Luke1:31 Ndipo taona, udzakhala ndi pakati, nudzabala mwana wamwamuna, nudzamucha dzina lace Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Iye adzakhala wamkuru, nadzachedwa Mwana wa Wamkurukuru: ndipo Ambuye Mulungu adzampatsa iye mpando wacifumu wa Davine atate wace:" 
Luke1:33 ndipo iye adzacita ufumu pa banja la Yakobo ku nthawi zonse; ndipo ufumu wace sudzatha. 
Luke1:34 Koma Mariya anati kwa mngelo, ici cidzacitika bwanji, popeza ine sindidziwa mwamuna?" 
Luke1:35 Ndipo mngelo anayankha, nati kwa iye, Mzimu Woyera adzafika pa iwe, ndi mphamvu ya Wamkulukulu idzakuphimba iwe: cifukwa cacenso Coyeraco cikadzabadwa, cidzachedwa Mwana wa Mulungu." 
Luke1:36 Ndipo taona, Elisabeti mbale wako, iyenso ali ndi pakati pa mwana wamwamuna m'ukalamba wace; ndipo mwezi uno uli wacisanu ndi cimodzi wa iye amene ananenedwa wouma." 
Luke1:37 Cifukwa 1 palibe mau amodzi akucokera kwa Mulungu adzakhala opanda mphamvu. 
Luke1:38 Ndipo Mariya anati, Onani, mdzakazi wa Ambuye; kukhale kwa ine monga mwa mau anu. Ndipo mngelo anacoka kwa iye." 
Luke1:39 Ndipo Mariya ananyamuka masiku amenewa, namuka ndi cangu ku dziko la mapiri ku mudzi wa Yuda;" 
Luke1:40 nalowa m'nyumba ya Zakariya, nalankhula Elisabeti." 
Luke1:41 Ndipo panali pamene Elisabeti anamva kulankhula kwace kwa Mariya, mwana wosabadwayo anatsalima m'mimba mwace; ndipo Elisabeti anadzazidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera;" 
Luke1:42 nakweza mau ndi mpfuu waukuru, nati, 2 Wodalitsika iwe mwa akazi, ndipo codalitsika cipatso ca mimba yako," 
Luke1:43 Ndipo ici cicokera kuti kudza kwa ine, kuti adze kwa ine amace wa Ambuye wanga?" 
Luke1:44 Pakuti ona, pamene mau a kulankhula kwako analowa m'makutu anga, mwana anatsalima ndi msangalalo m'mimba mwanga." 
Luke1:45 Ndipo wodala ali iye amene anakhulupirira; cifukwa zidzacitidwa zinthu zimene Ambuye analankhula naye. 
Luke1:46 3 Ndipo Mariya anati, Moyo wanga ulemekeza Ambuye," 
Luke1:47 Ndipo mzimu wanga wakondwera mwa Mulungu Mpulumutsi wanga. 
Luke1:48 Cifukwa iye anayang'anira umphawi wa mdzakazi wace; Pakuti taonani, kuyambira tsopano, anthu a mibadwo yonse adzandichula ine wodala." 
Luke1:49 Cifukwa iye Wamphamvuyo anandicitira ine zazikuru; 4 Ndipo dzina lace liri loyera. 
Luke1:50 5 Ndipo cifundo cace cifikira anthu a mibadwo mibadwo Pa iwo amene amuopa iye. 
Luke1:51 Iye anacita zamphamvu ndi mkono wace; 6 Iye anabalalitsa odzitama ndi mlingaliro wa mtima wao," 
Luke1:52 iye anatsitsa mafumu pa mipando yao yacifumu, Ndipo anakweza aumphawi," 
Luke1:53 7 Anawakhutitsa anjala ndi zinthu zabwino, Ndipo eni cuma anawacotsa opanda kanthu." 
Luke1:54 Anathangatira Israyeli mnyamata wace, Kuti akakumbukile cifundo," 
Luke1:55 8 (Monga analankhula kwa makolo athu) Kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa mbeu yace ku nthawi yonse. 
Luke1:56 Ndipo Mariya anakhala ndi iye ngati miyezi itatu, nabweranso kunyumba kwace." 
Luke1:57 Ndipo inakwanira nthawi ya Elisabeti, ya kubala kwace, ndipo anabala mwana wamwamuna." 
Luke1:58 Ndipo anansi ace ndi abale ace anamva kuti Ambuye anakulitsa cifundo cace pa iye; 9 nakondwera naye pamodzi. 
Luke1:59 Ndipo panali 10 tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu iwo anadza kudzadula kamwanako; ndipo akati amuche dzina la atate wace Zakariya. 
Luke1:60 Ndipo amace anayankha, kuti, lai; koma 11 adzachedwa Yohane." 
Luke1:61 Ndipo iwo anati kwa iye, Palibe wina wa abale ako amene achedwa dzina ili." 
Luke1:62 Ndipo anakodola atate wace, afuna amuche dzina liti?" 
Luke1:63 Ndipo iye anafunsa colemberapo, nalemba, kuti, Dzina lace ndi Yohane. Ndipo anazizwa onse." 
Luke1:64 Ndipo 12 pomwepo panatseguka pakamwa pace, ndi lilume lace linamasuka, ndipo iye analankhula, nalemekeza Mulungu." 
Luke1:65 Ndipo panagwa mantha pa iwo onse akukhala oyandikana nao; ndipo analankhulalankhula nkhani izi zonse m'dziko: lonse la mapiri a Yudeya," 
Luke1:66 Ndipo onse amene anazimva anazisunga m'mtima mwao, nanena, Nangamwana uyu adzakhala wotani? Pakuti 13 dzanja la Ambuye linakhala pamodzi ndi iye." 
Luke1:67 Ndipo atate wace Zakariya anadzazidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, nanenera za Mulungu, nati," 
Luke1:68 Wolemekezeka Ambuye, Mulungu wa Israyeli; 14 Cifukwa iye anayang'ana, nacitira anthu ace ciombolo," 
Luke1:69 Ndipo iye anatikwezera ife nyanga ya cipulumutso, Mwa pfuko la Davine mwana wace," 
Luke1:70 15 (Monga iye analankhula ndi m'kamwa mwa aneneri ace oyera mtima, a kale lomwe)," 
Luke1:71 Cipulumutso ca adani athu, ndi pa dzanja la anthu onse amene atida ife;" 
Luke1:72 16 Kucitira atate athu cifundo, Ndi kukumbukila pangano lace lopatulika;" 
Luke1:73 Cilumbiro cimene iye anacilumbira kwa Abrahamu atate wathu," 
Luke1:74 Kutipatsa ife kuti titalanditsidwa ku dzanja la adani athu, 17 Tidzamtumikira iye, opanda mantha," 
Luke1:75 18 M'ciyero ndi cilungamo pamaso pace, masiku athu onse." 
Luke1:76 19 Eya, ndipo iwetu kamwanawe, udzanenedwa mneneri wa Wamkulukulu: 20 Pakuti udzatsogolera Ambuye, kukonza njira zace;" 
Luke1:77 Kuwapatsa anthu ace adziwitse cipulumutso, 21 Ndi makhululukidwe a macimoao," 
Luke1:78 Cifukwa ca mtima wacifundo wa Mulungu wathu. M'menemo mbanda kuca wa kumwamba udzaticezera ife; 
Luke1:79 22 Kuwalitsira iwo okhala mumdima ndi mthunzi wa imfa; Kulunjikitsa mapazi athu mu njira ya mtendere. 
Luke1:80 Ndipo mwanayo anakula, nalimbika mu mzimu wace, ndipo 23 iye anali m'mapululu, kufikira masiku akudzionetsa yekha kwa Israyeli." 
Luke2:1 Ndipo kunali masiku aja, kuti lamulo linaturuka kwa Kaisara Augusto kuti dziko lonse lokhalamo anthu lilembedwe;" 
Luke2:2 ndiko kulembera koyamba pokhala Kureniyo kazembe wa Suriya. 
Luke2:3 Ndipo onse anamuka kulembedwa, munthu ali yense ku mudzi wace." 
Luke2:4 Ndipo Yosefe yemwe anakwera kucokera ku Galileya, ku mudzi wa Nazarete, kunka ku Yudeya, ku mudzi wa Davine, dzina lace Betelehemu, cifukwa iye anali wa banja ndi pfuko lace la Davine;" 
Luke2:5 kukalembedwa iye mwini pamodzi ndi Mariya, wopalidwa naye ubwenzi; ndi uyu anali ndi pakati," 
Luke2:6 Ndipo panali pokhaia iwo komweko, masiku ace a kubala anakwanira." 
Luke2:7 Ndipo iye anabala mwana wace wamwamuna woyamba; namkulunga iye m'nsaru, namgoneka modyera ng'ombe, cifukwa kuti anasowa malo m'nyumba ya alendo." 
Luke2:8 Ndipo panali abusa m'dziko lomwelo, okhala kubusa ndi kuyang'anira zoweta zao usiku." 
Luke2:9 Ndipo mngelo wa Ambuye anaimirira pa awo, ndi kuwala kwa Ambuye kunawaunikira kozungulira: ndipo anaopa ndi mantha akuru." 
Luke2:10 Ndipo mngelo anati kwa iwo, Musaope; pakuti onani, ndikuuzani inu uthenga wabwino wa cikondwero cacikuru, cimene cidzakhala kwa anthu onse;" 
Luke2:11 pakuti wakubadwirani inu lero, m'mudzi wa Davide, Mpulumutsi, amene ali Kristu Ambuye." 
Luke2:12 Ndipo ici ndi cizindikilo kwa inu: Mudzapeza mwana wakhanda wokuta ndi nsaru atagonamodyera. 
Luke2:13 Ndipo dzidzidzi panali pamodzi ndi mngeloyo ambirimbiri a gulu la Kumwamba, natamanda Mulungu, nanena," 
Luke2:14 Ulemerero ukhale kwa Mulungu Kumwambamwamba, Ndi mtendere pansi pano mwa anthu amene akondwera nao." 
Luke2:15 Ndipo panali, pamene angelo anacokera kwa iwo kunka Kumwamba, abusa anati wina ndi mnzace, Tipitiretu ku Betelehemu, tikaone cinthu ici cidacitika, cimene Ambuye anatidziwitsira ife." 
Luke2:16 Ndipo iwo anadza ndi cangu, napeza Mariya, ndi Yosefe, ndi mwana wakhanda atagona modyera." 
Luke2:17 Ndipo iwo, m'mene anaona, anadziwitsa anthu za mau analankhulidwa kwa iwo a mwana uyu." 
Luke2:18 Ndipo anthu onse amene anamva anazizwa ndi zinthu abusa adalankhula nao. 
Luke2:19 Koma Mariya anasunga mau awa onse, nawalingalira mumtima mwace." 
Luke2:20 Ndipo abusawo anabwera, nalemekeza ndi kutamanda Mulungu pa zinthu zonse anazimva, naziona, monga kunalankhulidwa kwa iwo." 
Luke2:21 Ndipo pamene panakwanira masiku asanu ndi atatu akumdula iye, anamucha dzina lace Yesu, limene anachula mngeloyo asanalandiridwe iye m'mimba." 
Luke2:22 Ndipo pamene anakwanira masiku a kukonza kwao, monga mwa cilamulo ca Mose, iwo anakwera naye kunka ku Yerusalemu, kukamsonyeza iye kwa Ambuye," 
Luke2:23 (monga mwalembedwa m'cilamulo ca Ambuye, kuti mwamuna ali yense wotsegula pa mimba ya amace adzanenedwa wopatulika wa kwa Ambuye)" 
Luke2:24 ndi kukapereka nsembe monga mwanenedwa m'citamulo ca Ambuye, njiwa ziwiri, kapena maunda awiri." 
Luke2:25 Ndipo onani, m'Yerusalemu munali munthu, dzina lace Simeoni; ndipo munthu uyu, wolungama mtima ndi wopemphera, analikulindira matonthozedwe a Israyeli; ndipo Mzimu Woyera anali pa iye." 
Luke2:26 Ndipo anamuululira Mzimu Woyera kuti sadzaona imfa, kufikira adzaona Kristu wace wa Ambuye." 
Luke2:27 Ndipo iye analowa kuKacisi ndi Mzimu: ndipo pamene atate ndi amace analowa ndi kamwanako Yesu, kudzamcitira iye mwambo wa cilamulo," 
Luke2:28 pomwepo iye anamlandira iye m'manja mwace, nalemekeza Mulungu, nati," 
Luke2:29 Tsopano, Ambuye, monga mwa mau anu aja, Lolani ine, kapolo wanu, ndicoke mumtendere;" 
Luke2:30 Cifukwa maso anga adaona cipulumutso canu," 
Luke2:31 Cimene munakonza pamaso pa anthu onse," 
Luke2:32 Kuunika kukhale cibvumbulutso ca kwa anthu a mitundu, Ndi ulemerero wa anthu anu Israyeli." 
Luke2:33 Ndipo atate ndi amace anali kuzizwa ndi zinthu zolankhulidwa za iye. 
Luke2:34 Ndipo Simeoni anawadalitsa, nati kwa Mariya amace, Taona, Uyu waikidwa akhale kugwa ndi kunyamuka kwa anthu ambiri mwa. Israyeli; ndipo akhale cizindikilo cakutsutsana naco;" 
Luke2:35 eya, ndipo lupanga lidzakupyoza iwe moyo wako; kuti maganizo a m'mitima yambiri akaululidwe." 
Luke2:36 Ndipo panali Anna, mneneri wamkazi, mwana wa Fanueli, wa pfuko la Aseri; amene anali wokalamba ndithu, nakhala ndi mwamuna wace, kuyambira pa unamwali wace," 
Luke2:37 zaka zisanu ndi ziwiri, ndipo anali wamasiye wa kufikira zaka zace: makumi asanu ndi atatu mphambu zinai, amene sanacoka kuKacisi, wotumikira Mulungu ndi kusala kudya ndi kupemphera usiku ndi usana." 
Luke2:38 Ndipo iye anafikako pa nthawi yomweyo, nabvomerezanso kutama Mulungu, nalankhula za iye kwa anthu onse 1 akuyembekeza ciombolo ca Yerusalemu." 
Luke2:39 Ndipo pamene iwo anatha zonse monga mwa cilamulo ca Ambuye, anabwera ku Galileya, ku mudzi kwao, ku Nazarete." 
Luke2:40 Ndipo 2 mwanayo anakula nalimbika, nalikudzala ndi nzeru; ndi cisomo ca Mulungu cinali pa iye." 
Luke2:41 Ndipo atate wace ndi amace 3 akamuka caka ndi caka ku Yerusalemu ku Paskha. 
Luke2:42 Ndipo pamene iye anakhala ndi zaka zace khumi ndi ziwiri, anakwera iwo monga macitidwe a phwando;" 
Luke2:43 ndipo pakumariza masiku ace, pakubwera iw, mnyamatayo Yesu anatsala m'mbuyo ku Yerusalemu. Ndipo atate ndi amace sanadziwa;" 
Luke2:44 koma iwo anayesa kuti iye ali m'cipiringu ca ulendo, nayenda ulendo wa tsiku limodzi; ndipo anayamba kumfunafuna iye mwa abale ao ndi mwa anansi ao;" 
Luke2:45 ndipo pamene sanampeza, anabwera ku Yerusalemu, namfunafuna iye." 
Luke2:46 Ndipo pakupita masiku atatu, anampeza iye m'Kacisi, analikukhala pakati pa aphunzitsi, namva iwo, nawafunsanso mafunso." 
Luke2:47 Ndipo 4 onse amene anamva iye anadabwa ndi cidziwitso cace, ndi mayankho ace." 
Luke2:48 Ndipo m'mene anamuona iye, anadabwa; ndipo amace anati kwa iye, Mwanawe, wacitiranji ife cotero; taona, atate wako ndi ine tinalikufunafuna Iwe ndi kuda nkhawa." 
Luke2:49 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Kuli bwanji kuti munalikundifunafuna Ine? Simunadziwa kodi kuti kundiyenera Ine 5 ndikhale m'zace za Atate wanga?" 
Luke2:50 Ndipo 6 sanadziwitsa mau amene iye analankhula nao. 
Luke2:51 Ndipo anatsika nao pamodzi nadza ku Nazarete; nawamvera iwo: ndipo 7 amace anasunga zinthu izi zonse mumtima mwace. 
Luke2:52 Ndipo Yesu 8 anakulabe m'nzeru ndi mumsinkhu, ndi m'cisomo ca pa Mulungu ndi ca pa anthu." 
Luke3:1 Ndipo pa caka cakhumi ndi cisanu ca ufumu wa Tiberiyo Kaisara, pokhala Pontiyo Pilato kazembe wa Yudeya, ndi Herode ciwanga ca Galileya, ndi Filipo mbale wace ciwanga ca dziko la Itureya ndi la Trakoniti, ndi Lusaniyo ciwanga ca Abilene;" 
Luke3:2 pa ukuru wansembe wao wa Anasi ndi Kayafa, panadza mau a Mulungu kwa Yohane mwana wa Zakariya m'cipululu." 
Luke3:3 Ndipo iye anadza ku dziko lonse la m'mbali mwa Yordano, nalalikira ubatizo wa kulapa mtima kuloza ku cikhululukiro ca macimo;" 
Luke3:4 monga mwalembedwa m'kalata wa mau a Yesaya mneneri, kuti, Mau a wopfuula m'cipululu, Konzani khwalala la Ambuye, Lungamitsani njira zace." 
Luke3:5 Cigwa ciri conse cidzadzazidwa, Ndipo phiri liri lonse ndi mtunda uti wonse zidzacepsedwa; Ndipo zokhota zidzakhala zolungama, Ndipo njira za zigoloondo zidzakhala zosalala;" 
Luke3:6 Ndipo anthu onse adzaona cipulumutso ca Mulungu. 
Luke3:7 Cifukwa cace iye ananena kwa makamuwo a anthu amene anaturukira kukabatizidwa ndi iye, Obadwa a njoka inu, anakulangizani inu ndani kuthawa mkwiyo ulinkudza?" 
Luke3:8 Cifukwa cace balani zipatso zakuyenera kulapa mtima, ndipo musayambe kunena mwa inu nokha, Atate wathu tiri naye ndiye Abrahamu: pakuti ndinena kwa inu, kuti ali ndi mphamvu Mulungu, mwa miyala iyi, kuukitsira Abrahamu ana." 
Luke3:9 Ndiponso tsopano lino nkhwangwa yaikidwa pa mizu ya mitengo; cotero mtengo uli wonse wosabala cipatso cabwino udulidwa, nuponyedwa pamoto." 
Luke3:10 Ndipo anthu a makamu anamfunsa iye, nanena, Ndipo tsono tizicita ciani?" 
Luke3:11 Koma iye anayankha nanena kwa iwo, Iye amene ali nao malaya awiri apatse kwa iye amene alibe; ndi iye amene ali nazo zakudya acite comweco." 
Luke3:12 Ndipo amisonkho omwe anadza kudzabatizidwa, nati kwa iye, Mphunzitsi, ife tizicita ciani?" 
Luke3:13 Koma iye anati kwa iwo, Musakapambe kanthu konse kakuposa cimene anakulamulirani." 
Luke3:14 Ndipo asilikari omwe anamfunsa iye, nati, Nanga ife tizicita ciani? Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Musaopse, musanamize munthu ali yense; khalani okhuta ndi kulipira kwanu." 
Luke3:15 Ndipo pamene anthu anali kuyembekezera, ndipo onse anaganizaganiza m'mitima yao za Yohane, ngati kapena iye ali Kristu;" 
Luke3:16 Yohane anayankha, nanena kwa onse, Inetu ndikubatizani inu ndi madzi; koma wakundiposa ine mphamvu alinkudza, amene sindiyenera kumasula lamba la nsapato zace; Iyeyu adzakubatizani inu ndi Mzimu Woyera ndi moto:" 
Luke3:17 amene couluzira cace ciri m'dzanja lace, kuti ayeretse padwale pace, ndi kusonkhanitsa tirigu m'ciruli cace; koma mankhusu adzatentha m'moto wosazima." 
Luke3:18 Coteretu iye anauza anthu Uthenga Wabwino ndi kuwadandaulira zinthu zina zambiri. 
Luke3:19 Koma Herode mfumu ija, m'mene Yohane anamdzudzula cifukwa ca Herodiya, mkazi wa mbale wace, ndi ca zinthu zonse zoina Herode anazicita," 
Luke3:20 anaonjeza pa zonsezi icinso, kuti anatsekera Yohane m'nyumba yandende." 
Luke3:21 Ndipo panali pamene anthu onse anabatizidwa, ndipo Yesu anabatizidwa, nalikupemphera, kuti panatseguka pathambo," 
Luke3:22 ndipo Mzimu Woyera anatsika ndi maonekedwe a thupi lace ngati nkhunda, nadza pa iye; ndipo munaturuka mau m'thambo, kuti, Iwe ndiwe Mwana wanga wokondedwa, mwa Iwe ndikondwera." 
Luke3:23 Ndipo Yesuyo, pamene anayamba nchito yace, anali monga wa zaka makumi atatu, ndiye (monga anthu adamuyesa) mwana wa Yosefe, mwana wa Heli," 
Luke3:24 mwana wa Matati, mwana wa Levi, mwana wa Melki, mwana wa Yanai, mwana wa Yosefe," 
Luke3:25 mwana wa Matatio, mwana wa Amosi, mwana wa Naumi, mwana wa Esli, mwana wa Nagai," 
Luke3:26 mwana wa Maati, mwana wa Matatio, mwana wa Semeini, mwana wa Yosefe, mwana wa Yoda," 
Luke3:27 mwana wa Yoanani, mwana wa Resa, mwana wa Zerubabeli, mwana wa Salatieli, mwana wa Neri," 
Luke3:28 mwana wa Melki, mwana wa Adi, mwana wa Kosamu, mwana wa Elmadama, rrrvana wa Ere," 
Luke3:29 mwana wa Jose, mwana wa Eliezere, mwana wa Yorimu, mwana wa Matati, mwana wa Levi," 
Luke3:30 mwana wa Simeoni, mwana wa Yuda, mwana wa Yosefe, mwana wa Yonamu, mwana wa Eliyakimu," 
Luke3:31 mwana wa Melea, mwana wa Mena, mwana wa Matata, mwana wa Natanu, mwana wa Davine," 
Luke3:32 mwana wa Jese, mwana wa Obede, mwana wa Boazi, mwana wa Salmoni, mwana wa Naasoni," 
Luke3:33 mwana wa Aminadabu, mwana wa Ami, mwana wa Ezronu, mwana wa Farese, mwana wa Yuda," 
Luke3:34 mwana wa Yakobo, mwana wa Isake, mwana wa Abrahamu, mwana wa Tera, mwana wa Nakoro," 
Luke3:35 mwana wa Seruki, mwana wa Reu, mwana wa Pelege, mwana wa Ebere, mwana wa Sala," 
Luke3:36 mwana wa Kainane, mwana wa Arfaksadi, mwana wa Semu, mwana wa Nowa, mwana wa Lameke," 
Luke3:37 mwana wa Metusela, mwana wa Enoke, mwana wa Yaredi, mwana wa Malaleeli, mwana wa Kainane," 
Luke3:38 mwana wa Enosi, mwana wa Seti, mwana wa Adamu, mwana wa Mulungu." 
Luke4:1 Ndipo Yesu, wodzala ndi Mzimu Woyera, anabwera kucokera ku Yordano, natsogozedwa ndi Mzimu kunka kucipululu kukayesedwa ndi mdierekezi masiku makumi anai." 
Luke4:2 Ndipo iye sanadya kanthu masiku awo; ndipo pamene anatha anamva njala. 
Luke4:3 Ndipo mdierekezi anati kwa iye, Ngati muli Mwana wa Mulungu, uzani mwala uwu usanduke mkate." 
Luke4:4 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Kwalembedwa, kuti, Munthu sadzakhala ndi moyo ndi mkate wokha." 
Luke4:5 Ndipo m'mene anamtsogolera anakwera naye, namuonetsa iye maufumu onse a dziko lokhalamo anthu, m'kamphindi kakang'ono." 
Luke4:6 Ndipo mdierekezi anati kwa iye, Ine ndidzapatsa Inu ulamuliro wonse umenewu ndi ulemerero wao: cifukwa unaperekedwa kwa ine; ndipo ndiupatsa kwa iye amene ndifuna." 
Luke4:7 Cifukwa cace ngati Inu mudzagwadira pamaso panga, wonsewo udzakhala wanu." 
Luke4:8 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iye, Kwalembedwa, kuti, Ambuye Mulungu wako uzimgwadira, Ndipo iye yekha yekha uzimtumikira," 
Luke4:9 Ndipo anamtsogolera iye ku Yerusalemu, namuika iye pamwamba pa cimbudzi ca Kacisiyo, nati kwa iye, Ngati muli Mwana wa Mulungu, tadzigwetsani nokha pansi;" 
Luke4:10 pakuti kwalembedwa, kuti, Adzalamulira angelo ace za, iwe, kuti akucinjirize," 
Luke4:11 Ndipo, Pa manja ao adzakunyamula iwe, Kuti ungagunde konse phazi lako pamwala," 
Luke4:12 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iye, Kwanenedwa, Usamuyese Ambuye Mulungu wako," 
Luke4:13 Ndipo mdierekezi, m'mene adamariza mayesero onse, analekana naye kufikira nthawi yina." 
Luke4:14 Ndipo Yesu anabwera ndi mphamvu ya Mzimu ku Galileya; ndipo mbiri yace ya iye inabuka ku dziko lonse loyandikira. 
Luke4:15 Ndipo iye anaphunzitsa m'masunagoge mwao, nalemekezedwa ndi anthu onse." 
Luke4:16 Ndipo anadza ku Nazarete, kumene analeredwa; ndipo tsiku la Sabata analowa m'sunagoge, monga anazolowera, naimiriramo kuwerenga m'kalata." 
Luke4:17 Ndipo anapereka kwa iye buku la Yesaya mneneri. Ndipo m'mene iye adafunyulula bukulo, anapeza pomwe panalembedwa," 
Luke4:18 Mzimu wa Ambuye uli paine, Cifukwa cace iye anandidzoza Ine ndiuze anthu osauka Uthenga Wabwino: Anandituma Ine kulalikira am'nsinga mamasulidwe, Ndi akhungu kuti apenyenso, Kuturutsa ndi ufuru ophwanyika," 
Luke4:19 Kulalikira caka cosankhika ca Ambuye. 
Luke4:20 Ndipo m'mene iye anapinda bukulo, nalipereka kwa mnyamata, anakhala pansi; ndipo maso ao a anthu onse m'sunagogemo anamyang'anitsa iye." 
Luke4:21 Ndipo anayamba kunena kwa iwo, kuti, Lero lembo ili lakwanitsidwa m'makutu anu." 
Luke4:22 Ndipo onse anamcitira iye umboni nazizwa ndi mau a cisomo akuturuka m'kamwa mwace; nanena, Kodi uyu si mwana wa Yosefe?" 
Luke4:23 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Kwenikweni mudzati kwa Ine nkhani iyi, Sing'anga iwe, tadziciritsa wekha: zonse zija tazimva zinacitidwa ku Kapernao, muzicitenso zomwezo kwanu kuno." 
Luke4:24 Ndipo iye anati, Indetu, ndinena kwa inu, kuti, Palibe mneneri alandirika ku dziko la kwao."
