Luke4:25 Koma zoonadi ndinena kwa inu, kuti, Munali akazi amasiye ambiri m'lsrayeli masiku ace a Eliya, pamene kunatsekedwa kumwamba zaka zitatu ndi miyezi isanu ndi umodzi, pamene panakhala njala yaikuru pa dziko lonselo;" 
Luke4:26 ndipo Eliya sanatumidwa kwa mmodzi wa iwo, koma ku Sarepta wa ku Sidoniya, kwa mkazi wamasiye." 
Luke4:27 Ndipo munali akhate ambiri m'Israyeli masiku a Elisa mneneri; ndipo palibe mmodzi wa iwo anakonzedwa, koma Namani yekha wa ku Suriya." 
Luke4:28 Ndipo onse a m'sunagogemo anadzala ndi mkwiyo pakumva izi; 
Luke4:29 nanyamuka na mturutsira Iye kunja kwa mudziwo, nanka naye pamutu pa phiri pamene panamangidwa mudzi wao, kuti akamponye iye pansi." 
Luke4:30 Koma iye anapyola pakati pao, nacokapo." 
Luke4:31 Ndipo iye anatsika nadza ku Kapernao, ndiwo mudzi wa ku Galileya, Ndipo analikuwaphunzitsa iwo pa Sabata; ndipo anadabwa ndi ciphunzitso cace;" 
Luke4:32 cifukwa mau ace anali ndi ulamuliro. 
Luke4:33 Ndipo munali m'sunagoge munthu, wokhala naco ciwanda conyansa; napfuula ndi mau olimba, kuti," 
Luke4:34 Ha! tiri ndi ciani ndi Inu, Yesu wa ku N azarete? kodi munadza kutiononga ife? ndikudziwani Inu muli yani, ndinu Woyera wace wa Mulungu." 
Luke4:35 Ndipo Yesu anamdzudzula iye, nanena, Tonthola, nuturuke mwa iye. Ndipo ciwandaco m'mene cinamgwetsa iye pakati, cinaturuka mwa iye cosampweteka konse." 
Luke4:36 Ndipo anthu onse anadabwa, nalankhulana wina ndi mnzace, nanena, Mau amenewa ali otani? cifukwa ndi ulamuliro ndi mphamvu angolamulira mizimu yonyansa, ndipo ingoturuka." 
Luke4:37 Ndipo mbiri yace ya iye inafalikira ku malo onse a dziko Ioyandikira. 
Luke4:38 Ndipo iye ananyamuka kucokera m'sunagoge, nalowa m'nyumba ya Simoni. Koma momwemo munali mpongozi wace wa Simoni, anagwidwa ndi nthenda yolimba yamalungo; ndipo anampempha Yesu za iye." 
Luke4:39 Ndipo iye anaimirira, naweramira pa iye, nadzudzula nthendayo; ndipo inamleka iye: ndipo anauka msangatu, nawatumikira." 
Luke4:40 Ndipo pakulowa dzuwa anthu onse amene anali nao odwala ndi nthenda za mitundu mitundu, anadza nao kwa iye; ndipo iye anaika manja ace pa munthu ali yense wa iwo, nawaciritsa." 
Luke4:41 Ndi ziwanda zomwe zinaturuka mwa ambiri, ndi kupfuula, kuti, Inu ndinu Mwana wa Mulungu. Ndipo iye anazidzudzula, wosazilola kulankhula, cifukwa zinamdziwa kuti iye ndiye Kristu." 
Luke4:42 Ndipo kutaca anaturuka iye nanka ku malo acipululu; ndi makamu a anthu analikwnfunafuna iye, nadza nafika kwa iye, nayesa kumletsa iye, kuti asawacokere." 
Luke4:43 Koma anati kwa iwo, Kundiyenera Ine ndilalikire Uthenga Wabwino wa Ufumu wa Mulungu ku midzi yinanso: cifukwa ndinatumidwa kudzatero." 
Luke4:44 Ndipo iye analikulalikira m'masunagoge a ku Galileya. 
Luke5:1 Ndipo panali, pakumkanikiza khamu la anthu, kudzamva mau a Mulungu, iye analikuimirira m'mbali mwa nyanja ya Genesarete;" 
Luke5:2 ndipo anaona ngalawa ziwiri zinakhala m'mbali mwa nyanja; koma asodzi a nsomba adaturuka m'menemo, nalikutsuka makoka ao." 
Luke5:3 Ndipo iye analowa m'ngalawa imodzi, ndiyo yace ya Simoni, nampempha iye akankhe pang'ono. Ndipo anakhala pansi m'menemo, naphunzitsa m'ngalawa makamuwo a anthu." 
Luke5:4 Ndipo pamene iye analeka kulankhula, anati kwa Simoni, Kankhira kwa kuya, nimuponye makoka anu kukasodza." 
Luke5:5 Ndipo Simoni anayankha, nati, Ambuye, tinagwiritsa nchito usiku wonse osakola kanthu, koma pa mau anu ndidzaponya makoka." 
Luke5:6 Ndipo pamene anacita ici, anazinga unyinji waukuru wansomba; ndipo makoka ao analinkung'ambika;" 
Luke5:7 ndipo anakodola anzao a m'ngalawa yinayo, adze awathangate. Ndipo anadza, nadzaza ngalawa zonse ziwiri, motero kuti zinalinkumira." 
Luke5:8 Koma Simoni Petro, pamene anaona, anagwa pansi pa mabondo ace a Yesu, nanena, Mucoke kwa ine, Ambuye, cifukwa ndine munthu wocimwa." 
Luke5:9 Pakuti cizizwo cidagwira iye, ndi onse amene anali naye, pa kusodzako kwa nsomba zimene anazikola;" 
Luke5:10 ndipo cimodzimodzinso Yakobo ndi Yohane, ana a Zebedayo, amene anali anzace a Simoni. Ndipo Yesu anati kwa Simoni, Usaope, kuyambira tsopano udzakhala msodzi wa anthu." 
Luke5:11 Ndipo m'mene iwo anakoceza ngalawa zao pamtunda, anasiya zonse, namtsata iye." 
Luke5:12 Ndipo panali, pamene iye anali m'mudzi wina, taona, munthu wodzala ndikhate; ndipopameneanaona Yesu, anagwa nkhope yace pansi, nampempha iye, nanena, Ambuye, ngati mufuna mungathe kundikonza." 
Luke5:13 Ndipo iye anatambalitsa dzanja lace, namkhudza, nanena, Ndifuna, takonzeka, Ndipo pomwepo khate linacoka kwa iye." 
Luke5:14 Ndipo iye anamuuzitsa, kuti asanene kwa munthu ali yense; koma ucoke, nudzionetse wekha kwa wansembe, nupereke nsembe ya pa cikonzedwe cako, monga adalamulira Mose, kukhale umboni kwa iwo." 
Luke5:15 Koma makamaka mbiri yace ya iye inabuka: ndipo mipingo yambiri ya anthu inasonkhanakudzamvera, ndi kudzaciritsidwa nthenda zao." 
Luke5:16 Koma iye anazemba, nanka m'mapululu, nalikupemphera." 
Luke5:17 Ndipo panali tsiku limodzi la masiku awo, iye analikuphunzitsa; ndipo analikukhalapo Afarisi ndi aphunzitsi a malamulo, amene anacokera ku midzi yonse ya ku Galileya, ndi Yudeya ndi Yerusalemu: ndipo mphamvu ya Ambuye inali ndi iye yakuwaciritsa," 
Luke5:18 Ndipo onani, anthu alikunyamulira pakama munthu wamanjenje; nafunafuna kulowa naye, ndi kumuika pamaso pa iye." 
Luke5:19 Ndipo posapeza polowa naye, cifukwa ca unyinji wa anthu, anakwera pamwamba pa chindwi, namtsitsira iye poboola pa chindwi ndi kama wace, namfikitsa pakati pomwe pamaso pa Yesu." 
Luke5:20 Ndipo iye, pakuona cikhulupiriro cao, anati, Munthu iwe, macimo ako akhululukidwa." 
Luke5:21 Ndipo alembi ndi Afarisi anayamba kuyesayesa mumtima mwao, kuti, ndani Uyu alankhula zomcitira Mulungu mwano? Ndani angathe kukhululukira macimo, koma Mulungu yekha?" 
Luke5:22 Koma Yesu anadziwa zoyesayesa zao, nayankha, nati kwa iwo, Muyesayesa bwanji m'mitima yanu?" 
Luke5:23 Capafupi nciti, kunena, Akhululukidwa kwa iwe macimo ako; kapena kunena, Tauka, nuyende?" 
Luke5:24 Koma kuti mudziwe kuti Mwana wa munthu ali nayo mphamvu pa dziko lapansi yakukhululukira macimo, (anati iye kwa wamanjenjeyo), Ndinena kwa iwe, Tauka, nusenze kama wako, numuke kunyumba kwako." 
Luke5:25 Ndipo pomwepo anaimirira pamaso pao, nasenza cimene adagonapo, nacokapo, kunka kunyumba kwace, wakulemekeza Mulungu." 
Luke5:26 Ndipo cizizwo cinagwira anthu onse, ndipo analemekeza Mulungu nadzazidwa ndi mantha, nanena kuti, Lero taona zodabwitsa." 
Luke5:27 Ndipo zitatha izi iye anaturuka, Danna munthu wamsonkho, dzina lace Levi, alikukhala polandira msonkho, nati kwa iye, Unditsate Ine." 
Luke5:28 Ndipo iye anasiya zonse, nanyamuka, namtsata iye." 
Luke5:29 Ndipo Levi anamkonzera iye phwando lalikuru kunyumba kwace; ndipo panali khamu lalikuru la amisonkho, ndi enanso amene analikuseama pacakudya pamodzi nao." 
Luke5:30 Ndipo Afarisi ndi alembi ao anang'ung'udza kwa ophunzira ace nanena, kuti, Bwanji inu mukudya ndi kumwa pamodzi ndi anthu amisonkho ndi ocimwa?" 
Luke5:31 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Amene ali olimba safuna sing'anga; koma akudwala ndiwo." 
Luke5:32 Sindinadza Ine kuitana olungama, koma ocimwa kuti atembenuke mtima," 
Luke5:33 Ndipo iwo anati kwa iye, Ophunzira a Yohane amasala kudya kawiri kawiri, ndi kucita mapemphero; cimodzimodzinso iwo a Afarisi; koma anu amangokudya ndi kumwa." 
Luke5:34 Koma Yesu anati kwa iwo, Kodi mungathe kuletsa anyamata a ukwati asadye, pamene mkwati ali nao pamodzi?" 
Luke5:35 Koma masiku adzafika; ndipo pamene mkwati adzacotsedwa kwa iwo, pamenepo adzasala kudya masiku omwewo." 
Luke5:36 Ndipo iye ananenanso fanizo kwa iwo, kuti, Palibe munthu ang'amba cigamba ca maraya arsopano, naciphatika pa maraya akale; cifukwa ngati atero, angong'ambitsa atsopanowo, ndi cigamba ca atsopanowo sicidzayenerana ndi akalewo." 
Luke5:37 Ndipo palibe munthu atsanulira vinyo watsopano m'matumba akale; cifukwa ngati atero, vinyo watsopanoyo adzaphulitsa matumba, ndipo ameneyo adzatayika, ndi matumba adzaonongeka." 
Luke5:38 Koma kuyenera kutsanulira vinyo watsopano m'matumba atsopano. 
Luke5:39 Ndipo palibe munthu atamwa vinyo wakale afuna watsopano; pakuti anena, Wakale ali wokoma." 
Luke6:1 Ndipo kunali tsiku la Sabata, iye analinkupita pakati pa minda ya tirigu; ndipo ophunzira ace analinkubudula ngala za tirigu, nazifikisa m'manja mwao, nadya." 
Luke6:2 Koma Afarisi ena anati, Mucitiranji cosaloledwa kucitika tsiku la Sabata?" 
Luke6:3 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi simunawerenganso ngakhale cimene anacita Davine, pamene paja anamva Njala, iye ndi iwo anali naye pamodzi," 
Luke6:4 kuti analowa m'nyumba ya Mulungu, natenga mikate yoonetsera, nadya, napatsanso iwo anali naye pamodzi; imeneyi yosaloledwa kudya ena koma ansembe okha?" 
Luke6:5 Ndipo iye ananena kwa iwo, kuti, Mwana wa munthu ali Mbuye wa tsiku la Sabata." 
Luke6:6 Ndipo kunali tsiku lina la Sabata, iye analowa m'sunagoge naphunzitsa. Ndipo munali munthu momwemo, ndipo dzanja lace lamanja linali lopuwala." 
Luke6:7 Ndipo alembi ndi Afarisi analikumzonda iye, ngati adzaciritsa tsiku la Sabata; kuti akapeze comneneza iye." 
Luke6:8 Koma iye anadziwa maganizo ao; nati kwa munthuyo wa dzanja lace lopuwala, Nyamuka, nuimirire pakatipo." 
Luke6:9 Ndipo Iyeananyamuka, naimirira. Ndipo Yesuanati kwa iwo, Ndikufunsani inu, Kodi nkulola tsiku la Sabata, kucita zabwino, kapena kucita zoipa? kupulumutsa moyo, kapena kuuononga?" 
Luke6:10 Ndipo pamene anaunguza-unguza pa iwo onse, anati kwa iye, Tansa dzanja lako, Ndipo iye anatero, ndi dzanja lace lina; bwerera momwe." 
Luke6:11 Koma iwowo anagwidwa misala; nalankhulana wina ndi mnzace kuti amcitire Yesu ciani. 
Luke6:12 Ndipo kunali masiku awa, iye anaturuka nanka kuphiri kukapemphera; nacezera usiku wonse m'kupemphera kwa Mulungu." 
Luke6:13 Ndipo kutaca, anaitana ophunzira ace; nasankha mwa iwo khumi ndi awiri, amene anawachanso dzina lao atumwi:" 
Luke6:14 Simoni, amene anamuchanso Petro, ndi Andreya mbale wace, ndi Yakobo, ndi Yohane, ndi Filipo, ndi Bartolomeyo," 
Luke6:15 ndi Mateyu, ndi Tomasi, ndi Yakobo mwana wa Alifeyo, ndi Simoni wochedwa Zelote," 
Luke6:16 ndi Yuda mwana wa Yakobo, ndi Yudase Isikariote, amene anali wompereka iye." 
Luke6:17 Ndipo iye anatsika nao, naima pacidikha, ndi khamu lalikuru la ophunzira ace, nw unyinji waukuru wa anthu a ku Yudeya lonse ndi Yerusalemu, ndi a ku mbali ya nyanja ya ku Turo ndi Sidoni, amene anadza kudzamva iye ndi kudzaciritsidwa nthenda zao;" 
Luke6:18 ndipo obvutidwa ndi mizimu yonyansa anaciritsidwa," 
Luke6:19 ndi khamu lonse lija linafuna kumkhudza iye; cifukwa munaturuka mphamvu mwa iye, niciritsa onsewa." 
Luke6:20 Ndipo iye anakweza maso ace kwa ophunzira ace, nanena, Odala osauka inu; cifukwa uli wanu ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke6:21 Odala inu akumva njala tsopano; cifukwa mudzakhuta. Odala inu akulira tsopano; cifukwa mudzaseka. 
Luke6:22 Odala inu, pamene anthu adzada inu, nadzapatula inu, nadzatonza inu, nadzalitaya dzina lanu monga loipa, cifukwa ca Mwana wa munthu." 
Luke6:23 Kondwerani tsiku lomweli, tumphani ndi cimwemwe; pakuti onani, mphotho zanu nzazikuru Kumwamba; pakuti makolo ao anawacitira aneneri zonga zomwezo." 
Luke6:24 Koma tsoka inu eni cuma! cifukwa mwalandira cisangalatso canu. 
Luke6:25 Tsoka inu okhuta tsopano! cifukwa mudzamva njala, Tsoka inu, akuseka tsopano! cifukwa mudzacita maliro ndi kulira misozi." 
Luke6:26 Tsoka inu, pamene anthu onse adzanenera inu zabwino! pakuti makolo ao anawatero momwemo ananeri onama." 
Luke6:27 Koma ndinena kwa inu akumva, Kondanani nao adani anu; citirani zabwino iwo akuda inu," 
Luke6:28 dalitsani iwo akutemberera inu, pemphererani iwo akucitira inu cipongwe." 
Luke6:29 Iye amene akupanda iwe pa tsaya limodzi umpatsenso linzace; ndi iye amene alanda copfunda cako, usamkanize malaya ako." 
Luke6:30 Munthu ali yense akakupempha kanthu, umpatse; ndi iye amene alanda zako, usazipemphanso." 
Luke6:31 Ndipo monga mufuna inu kuti anthu adzakucitirani inu, muwacitire iwo motero inu momwe." 
Luke6:32 Ndipo 1 ngati muwakonda iwo akukondana ndinu, mudzalandira ciyamiko cotani? pakuti ocimwa omwe akonda iwo akukondana nao." 
Luke6:33 Ndipo ngati muwacitira zabwino iwo amene akucitirani, inu zabwino, mudzalandira ciyamiko cotani? pakuti anthu ocimwa omwe amacita comweco." 
Luke6:34 Ndipo 2 ngati mukongoletsa kanthu kwa iwo amene muyembekeza kulandiranso, mudzalandira ciyamiko cotani? pakuti inde anthu ocimwa amakongoletsa kwa ocimwa anzao, kuti alandirenso momwemo." 
Luke6:35 Koma 3 takondanani nao adani anu, ndi kuwacitira zabwino, ndipo kongoletsani osayembekeza kanthu konse, ndipo mphotho yanu idzakhala yaikuru, ndipo 4 inu mudzakhala ana a Wamkurukuruyo; cifukwa iye acitira zokoma anthu osayamika ndi oipa." 
Luke6:36 Khalani inu acifundo monga Atate wanu ali wacifundo. Ndipo musamaweruza, ndipo simudzaweruzidwa." 
Luke6:37 Ndipo 5 musawatsutsa, ndipo simudzatsutsidwa. Masulani, ndipo mudzamasulidwa." 
Luke6:38 6 Patsani, ndipo kudzapatsidwa kwa inu; muyeso wabwino, wotsendereka, wokucumuka, wosefukira, anthu adzakupatsani m'manja mwanu. Pakuti 7 kudzayesedwa kwa inu ndi muyeso womwewo muyesa nao inu." 
Luke6:39 Ndipo iye ananenanso nao fanizo, 8 Kodi munthu wakhungu angathe kutsogolera mnzace wakhungu? kodi sadzagwa onse awiri m'mbuna?" 
Luke6:40 9 Wophunzira saposa mphunzitsi wace; koma yense, m'mene atakonzedwa mtima, adzafanana ndi mphunzitsi wace." 
Luke6:41 Ndipo uyang'aniranji kacitsotso kali m'diso la mbale wako, koma mtanda wa m'diso la iwe mwini suuzindikira?" 
Luke6:42 10 Kapena ungathe bwanji kunena kwa mbale wako, Mbale iwe, leka ndicotse kacitsotso kali m'diso lako, wosayang'anira iwe mwini mtanda uli m'diso lako? Wonyenga iwe! thanga wacotsa mtandawo m'diso lako, ndipo pomwepo udzayang'anitsa bwino kucotsa kacitsotso ka m'diso la mbale wako." 
Luke6:43 Pakuti 11 palibe mtengo wabwino wakupatsa zipatso zobvunda; kapenanso mtengo woipa wakupatsa zipatso zabwino," 
Luke6:44 Pakuti 12 mtengo uli wonse uzindikirika ndi cipatso cace. Pakuti anthu samachera nkhuyu paminga, kapena pamtungwi samachera mphesa," 
Luke6:45 13 Munthu wabwino aturutsa zabwino m'cuma cokoma ca mtima wace; ndi munthu woipa aturutsa zoipa m'coipa cace: pakuti m'kamwa mwace mungolankhula mwa kucuruka kwa mtima wace. 
Luke6:46 Ndipo 14 mundichuliranji Ine, Ambuye, Ambuye, ndi kusacita zimene ndizinena?" 
Luke6:47 15 Munthu ali yense wakudza kwa Ine, ndi kumva mau anga, ndi kuwacita, ndidzakusonyezani amene afanana naye." 
Luke6:48 Iye afanafana ndi munthu wakumanga nyumba, amene anakumba pansi ndithu, namanga maziko a nyumbayo pathanthwe; ndipo pamene panadza cigumula, mtsinje unagunda pa nyumbayo, ndipo sunakhoza kuigwedeza; cifukwa idamangika bwino." 
Luke6:49 Koma iye amene akumva, ndi kusacita, afanafana ndi munthu wakumanga nyumba pa nthaka yopanda maziko; pa imeneyo unagunda mtsinje, ndipo inagwa pomwepo; ndipo kugumuka kwace kwa nyumbayo kunali kwakukuru." 
Luke7:1 Pamene Yesu adamariza mau ace onse m'makutu a anthu, analowa m'Kapernao." 
Luke7:2 Ndipo kapolo wa kenturiyo, wokondedwa naye, anadwala, nafuna kutsirizika." 
Luke7:3 Ndipo pamene iye ana-I mva za Yesu, anatuma kwa iye akuru a Ayuda, namfunsa iye kuti adze kupulumutsa kapolo wace." 
Luke7:4 Ndipo iwo, pakufika kwa Yesu, anampempha iye koumirira, nati, Ayenera iye kuti mumcitire ici;" 
Luke7:5 pakuti akonda mtundu wathu, ndipo anatimangira ife sunagoge." 
Luke7:6 Ndipo Yesu anapita nao. Ndipo pakufika iye tsono pafupi panyumba yace, kenturiyo anatuma kwa iye abwenzi ace, kunena naye, Ambuye, musadzibvute; pakuti sindiyenera ine kuti mudzalowe pansi pa chindwi langa;" 
Luke7:7 cifukwa cace ine sindinadziyesera ndekha woyenera kudza kwa Inu: koma nenani mau, ndipo mnyamata wanga adzaciritsidwa." 
Luke7:8 Pakuti inenso ndiri munthu wakumvera akuru anga, ndiri nao asilikari akumvera ine: ndipo ndinena kwa uyu, Muka, namuka; ndi kwa wina, Idza, nadza; ndipo kwa kapolo wanga Tacita ici, nacita." 
Luke7:9 Koma Yesu pakumva zimenezo anazizwa naye, napotolokera kwa anthu a mpingo wakumtsata iye, nati, Ndinena kwa inu, sindinapeza, ngakhale mwa Israyeli, cikhulupiriro cacikuru cotere." 
Luke7:10 Ndipo pakubwera ku nyumba otumidwawo, anapeza kapoloyo wacira ndithu." 
Luke7:11 Ndipo kunali, katapita kamphindi, iye ana pita kumudzi, dzina lace Nayini; ndipo ophunzira ace ndi mpingo waukuru wa anthu anapita nave." 
Luke7:12 Ndipo pamene anayandikira ku cipata ca mudziwo, onani, anthu analikunyamula munthu wakufa, mwana wamwamuna mmodzi yekha, amace ndiye mkazi wamasiye; ndipo anthu ambiri a kumudzi anali pamodzi naye." 
Luke7:13 Ndipo pamene Ambuye anamuona, anagwidwa ndi cifundo cifukwa ca iye, nanena naye, Usalire." 
Luke7:14 Ndipo anayandikira, nakhudza cithatha; ndipo akumnyamulawo anaima. Ndipo iye anati, Mnyamata iwe, ndinena ndi iwe, Tauka." 
Luke7:15 Ndipo wakufayo anakhala tsonga, nayamba kulankhula. Ndipo anampereka kwa amace." 
Luke7:16 Ndipo mantha anagwira onsewo: ndipo analemekeza Mulungu, nanena kuti, Mneneri wamkuru wauka mwa ife; ndipo Mulungu wadzaceza ndi anthu ace." 
Luke7:17 Ndipo mbiri yace imeneyo inabuka ku Yudeya lonse, ndi ku dziko lonse loyandikira." 
Luke7:18 Ndipo ophunzira a Yohane anamuuza iye zonsezi. 
Luke7:19 Ndipo Yohane anaitana awiri a ophunzira ace, nawatuma kwa Ambuye, nanena, Kodi ndinu wakudzayo, kapena tiyang'anire wina?" 
Luke7:20 Ndipo pakufika kwa iye anthu awo, anati, Yohane Mbatizi watituma ife kwa Inu, kuti, Kodi ndinu wakudzayo, kapena tiyang'anire wina?" 
Luke7:21 Nthawi yomweyo iye anaciritsa anthu ambiri nthenda zao, ndi zobvuta, ndi mizimu yoipa; napenyetsanso anthu akhungu ambiri." 
Luke7:22 Ndipo anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Mukani, muuze Yohane zimene mwaziona, nimwazimva; anthu akhungu alandira kuona kwao, opunduka miyendo ayenda, akhate akonzedwa, ogontha akumva, akufa aukitsidwa, kwa aumphawi ulalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino." 
Luke7:23 Ndipo wodala iye amene sakhomudwa cifukwa ca Ine. 
Luke7:24 Ndipo atacoka amithenga ace a Yohane, iye anayamba kunena za Yohane kwa anthu a makamu aja, nati, Munaturuka kunka kucipululu kukapenya ciani? Bango logwedezeka ndi mphepo kodi?" 
Luke7:25 Koma munaturuka kukaona ciani? Munthu wobvala zobvala zofewa kodi? Onani, iwo akubvala zolemera, ndi akukhala odyerera, ali m'makuka a mafumu." 
Luke7:26 Koma munaturuka kukaona ciani? Mneneri kodi? Etu, ndinena kwa inu, ndipo wakuposa mneneri." 
Luke7:27 Uyu ndi iye amene kunalembedwa za iye, Ona, ndituma Ine mthenga wanga akutsogolere, Amene adzakukonzera njira yako pamaso pako." 
Luke7:28 Ndinena kwa inu, kuti, Mwa akubadwa ndi akazi palibe mmodzi wamkuru woposa Yohane; koma iye amene ali wamng'ono mu Ufumu wa Mulungu amposa iye." 
Luke7:29 Ndipo anthu onse ndi amisonkho omwe, pakumva, anabvomereza kuti Mulungu ali wolungama, popeza anabatizidwa iwo ndi ubatizo wa Yohane." 
Luke7:30 Koma Afarisi ndi acilamulo anakaniza uphungu wa Mulungu kwa iwo okha, popeza sanabatizidwa ndi iye." 
Luke7:31 Ndipo, ndidzafanizira ndi ciani anthu a mbadwo uno? ndipo afanana ndi ciani?" 
Luke7:32 Angofanana ndi ana akukhala pamsika, ndi kuitanizana wina ndi mnzace, ndi kunena, Ife tinakulizirani citoliro, ndipo inu simunabvina ai; tinabuma maliro, ndimo simunalira ai." 
Luke7:33 Pakuti Yohane Mbatizi wafika wosadya mkate ndi wosamwa vinyo; ndipo munena, Ali ndi ciwanda." 
Luke7:34 Mwana wa munthu wafika wakudya ndi wakumwa; ndipo munena, Onani, munthu wosusuka ndi wakumwaimwa vinyo, bwenzi la amisonkho ndi anthu ocimwa!" 
Luke7:35 Ndipo nzeru iyesedwa yolungama ndi ana ace onse. 
Luke7:36 Ndipo mmodzi wa Afarisi anamuitana iye kuti akadye naye. Ndipo analowa m'nyumba ya Mfarisi, naseama pacakudya." 
Luke7:37 Ndipo onani, mkazi wocimwa, amene anali m'mudzimo; ndipo pakudziwa kuti Yesu analikuseama pacakudya m'nyumba ya Mfarisi, anatenga nsupa yaalabastero ya mafuta onunkhira bwino," 
Luke7:38 naimirira kumbuyo, pa mapazi ace, nalira, nayamba kukhathamiza mapazi ace ndi misozi, nawapukuta ndi tsitsi la mutu wace, nampsompsonetsa mapazi ace, nawadzoza ndi mafuta onunkhira bwino." 
Luke7:39 Koma Mfarisi, amene adamuitana iye, pakuona, ananena mwa yekha, nati, Akadakhala mneneri uyu akadazindikira ali yani, ndi wotani mkaziyo womkhudza iye, cifukwa ali wocimwa." 
Luke7:40 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Simoni, ndiri ndi kanthu kakunena kwa iwe. Ndipo iye anabvomera, Mphunzitsi, nenani." 
Luke7:41 Munthu wokongoletsa ndalama anali nao amangawa awiri; mmodziyo anali ndi mangawa ace a marupiya mazana asanu, koma mnzace makumi asanu." 
Luke7:42 Popeza analibe cobwezera iwo, anawakhululukira onse awiri. Cotero, ndani wa iwo adzaposa kumkonda?" 
Luke7:43 Simoni anayankha, nati, Ndiyesa kuti, iye amene anamkhululukira zoposa," 
Luke7:44 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Waweruza bwino. Ndipo m'mene iye anaceukira kwa mkaziyo, anati kwa Simoni, Upenya mkazi ameneyu kodi? Ndinalowa m'nyumba yako, sunandipatsa madzi akusambitsa mapazi anga; koma uyu anakonkha mapazi anga ndi misozi, nawapukuta ndi tsitsi lace." 
Luke7:45 Sunandipatsa mpsompsono wa cibwenzi; koma uyu sanaleka kupsompsonetsa mapazi anga, cilowere muno Ine." 
Luke7:46 Sunandidzoza mutu wanga ndi mafuta; koma nyu anadzoza mapazi anga ndimafuta onunkhira bwmo. 
Luke7:47 Cifukwa cace, ndinena kwa iwe, Macimo ace, ndiwo ambiri, akhululukidwa; cifukwa anakonda kwambiri; koma munthu amene anamkhululukira pang'ono, iye akonda pang'ono." 
Luke7:48 Ndipo anati kwa mkazi, Macimo ako akhululukidwa." 
Luke7:49 Ndipo iwo akuseama naye pacakudya anayamba kunena mwa okha, Uyu ndani amene akhululukiranso macimo?" 
Luke7:50 Ndipo Iyeanati kwa mkaziyo, Cikhulupiriro cako cakupulumutsa iwe; muka ndi mtendere." 
Luke8:1 Ndipo kunali, katapita kamphindi anayendayenda kumizinda ndi kumidzi, kulalikira ndi kuwauza U thenga Wabwino wa Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndi pamodzi naye khumi ndi awiriwo," 
Luke8:2 ndi akazi ena amene anaciritsidwa mizimu yoipa ndi nthenda zao, ndiwo, Mariya wonenedwa Magadalene, amene ziwanda zisanu ndi ziwiri zinaturuka mwa iye," 
Luke8:3 ndi Yohana, mkazi wace wa Kuza kapitao wa Herode, ndi Susana, ndi ena ambiri, amene anawatumikira ndi eumacao." 
Luke8:4 Ndipo pamene khamu lalikuru la anthu linasonkhana, ndi anthu a ku midzi yonse anafika kwa iye, anati mwa fanizo:" 
Luke8:5 Anaturuka wofesa kukafesa mbeu zace; ndipo m'kufesa kwace zina zinagwa m'mbali mwa njira; ndipo zinapondedwa, ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga zinatha kuzidya." 
Luke8:6 Ndipo zina zinagwa pathanthwe; ndipo pakumera zinatofa msanga, cifukwa zinalibe mnyontho." 
Luke8:7 Ndipo zina zinagwa pakati pa minga; ndi mingayo inapuka pamodzi nazo, nizitsamwitsa." 
Luke8:8 Ndipo zina zinagwa pa nthaka yokoma, ndipo zinamera, ndi kupatsa zipatso zamakumikhumi. Pakunena iye izi anapfuula, iye amene ali ndi makutu akumva amve." 
Luke8:9 Ndipo ophunzira ace anamfunsa Iye, kuti, Fanizo ili liri lotani?" 
Luke8:10 Ndipo iye anati, Kwapatsidwa kwa inu kuzindikira zinsinsi za Ufumu wa Mulungu; koma kwa ena otsala ndinena nao mwa mafanizo; kuti pakuona sangaone, ndi pakumva sangadziwitse," 
Luke8:11 Koma fanizoli litere: Mbeuzo ndizo mau a Mulungu," 
Luke8:12 Ndipo za m'mbali mwa njira ndiwo anthu amene adamva; pamenepo akudza mdierekezi, nacotsa mau m'mitima yao, kuti angakhulupirire ndi kupulumuka." 
Luke8:13 Ndipo za pathanthwe ndiwo amene, pakumva, alandira mau ndi kukondwera; koma alibe mizu; akhulupirira kanthawi, ndipo pa nthawi ya mayesedwe angopatuka." 
Luke8:14 Ndipo zija zinagwa ku mingazi, ndiwo amene adamva, ndipo m'kupita kwao atsamwitsidwa ndi nkhawa, ndi cuma, ndi zokondweretsa za moyo, ndipo sakhwimitsa zipatso zamphumphu." 
Luke8:15 Ndipo zija za m'nthaka yokoma, ndiwo amene anamva mau nawasunga mu mtima woona ndi wabwino, nabala zipatso ndi kupirira." 
Luke8:16 Ndipo palibe munthu, atayatsa, nyali, aibvundikira ndi cotengera, kapena kuiika pansi pa kama; koma aiika pacoikapo, kuti iwo akulowamo aone kuunikaku." 
Luke8:17 Pakuti palibe cinthu cobisika, cimene sicidzakhala coonekera; kapena cinsinsi cimene sicidzadziwika ndi kubvumbuluka." 
Luke8:18 Cifukwa cace yang'anirani mamvedwe anu; pakuti kudzapatsidwa kwa iye amene ali naco; ndipo kwa iye amene alibe cidzacotsedwa, cingakhale cija aoneka ngati ali naco." 
Luke8:19 Ndipo anadza kwa iye amace ndi abale ace, ndipo sanakhoza ku: mfika, cifukwa ca khamu la anthu." 
Luke8:20 Ndipo anamuuza iye, kuti, Amai wanu ndi abale anu alinkuima kunja, nafuna kuona Inu." 
Luke8:21 Koma iye anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Amai wanga ndi abale anga ndiwo amene akumva mau a Mulungu, nawacita." 
Luke8:22 Ndipo panali limodzi la masiku aja, iye analowa m'ngalawa, ndi ophunzira ace; nati kwa iwo, Tiolokere ku tsidya lija la nyanja; ndipo anakankhiramo." 
Luke8:23 Ndipo m'mene iwo anali kupita pamadzi, iye anagona tulo, Ndipo panyanja panatsikira namondwe wa mphepo; ndipo podzala ndi madzi, analimkuopsedwa." 
Luke8:24 Ndipo anadza kwa iye, namuutsa, nanena, Ambuye, Ambuye, titayika, Ndipo anauka, nadzudzula mphepo ndi mafunde ace a madzi; pomwepo zinaleka, ndipo panagwa batao" 
Luke8:25 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Cikhulupiriro canu ciri kuti? Ndipo m'kucita mantha anazizwa iwo, nanena wina ndi mnzace, Uyu ndani nanga, kuti angolamula mphepo ndi madzi, ndipo zimvera iye?" 
Luke8:26 Ndipo iwo anakoceza kudooko ku dziko la Agerasa, ndilo Iopenyana ndi Galileya." 
Luke8:27 Ndipo ataturuka pamtanda iye, anakomana naye mwamuna wa kumudzi, amene anali nazo ziwanda; ndipo masiku ambiri sanabvala cobvala, nisanakhala m'nyumba, koma m'manda." 
Luke8:28 Ndipo pakuona Yesu, iye anapfuula, nagwa pansi pamaso pace, nati ndi mau akuru, Ndiri naco ciani ndi Inu, Yesu Mwana wa Mulungu Wamkurukuru? Ndikupemphani Inu musandizunze." 
Luke8:29 Pakuti iye adalamula mzimu wonyansa uturuke mwa munthuyo. Pakuti nthawi zambiri unamgwira; ndipo anthu anammanga ndi maunyolo ndi matangadza kumsungira; ndipo anamwetula zomangirazo, nathawitsidwa ndi ciwandaco kumapululu." 
Luke8:30 Ndipo Yesu anamfunsa iye, kuti, Dzina lako ndiwe yani? Ndipo anati, Legio, cifukwa ziwanda zambiri zidalowa mwa iye." 
Luke8:31 Ndipo zinampempha iye, kuti asazilamulire zicoke kulowa kuphompho." 
Luke8:32 Ndipo panali pamenepo gulu la nkhumba zambiri zirinkudya m'phiri. Ndipo zinampempha Iye kuti azilole zilowe mu izo. Ndipo anazilola. 
Luke8:33 Ndipo ziwandazo zinaturuka mwa munthu nizilowa mu nkhumba: ndipo gululo linatsika liwiro potsetsereka ndi kulowa m'nyanjamo, nilitsamwa." 
Luke8:34 Ndipo akuwetawo m'mene anaona cimene cinacitika, anathawa, nauza a kumudzi ndi kumiraga yace." 
Luke8:35 Ndipo iwo anaturuka kukaona cimene cinacitika; ndipo anadza kwa Yesu, nampeza munthuyo, amene ziwanda zinaturuka mwa iye, alikukhala pansi ku mapazi ace a Yesu wobvala ndi wa nzeru zace; ndipo iwo anaopa." 
Luke8:36 Ndipo amene anaona anawauza iwo maciritsidwe ace a wogwidwa ciwandayo. 
Luke8:37 Ndipo anthu aunyinji onse a dziko la Agerasa Ioyandikira anamfunsa iye acoke kwa iwo; cifukwa anagwidwa ndi mantha akuru. Ndipo iye analowa m'ngalawa, nabwerera." 
Luke8:38 Ndipo munthuyo amene ziwanda zinaturuka mwa iye anampempha iye akhale ndi iye; koma anamuuza apite, nanena," 
Luke8:39 Pita kunyumba kwako, nufotokozere zazikuruzo anakucitira iwe Mulungu. Ndipo iye anacoka, nalalikira ku mudzi wonse zazikuruzo Yesu anamcitira iye," 
Luke8:40 Ndipo pakubwera Yesu, khamu la anthu linamlandira iye; pakuti onse analikumlindira iye." 
Luke8:41 Ndipo onani, panadza munthu dzina lace Yairo, ndipo iye ndiye mkuru wa sunagoge; ndipo anagwa pamapazi ace a Yesu, nampempha iye adze kunyumba kwace;" 
Luke8:42 cifukwa anali naye mwana wamkazi mmodzi yekha, wa zaka zace ngati khumi ndi ziwiri, ndipo analinkumwalira iye, Koma pakupita iye anthu a mipingo anakanikizana naye," 
Luke8:43 Ndipo mkazi, anali ndi nthenda yacidwalire zaka khumi ndi ziwiri, amene adasudzula asing'anga za moyo wace zonse, ndipo sanathe kuciritsidwa ndi mmodzi yense," 
Luke8:44 anadza pambuyo pace, nakhudza mphonje yacobvala cace; ndipo pomwepo nthenda yace inaleka." 
Luke8:45 Ndipo Yesu anati, Wandikhudza Ine ndani? Koma pamene onse anakana, Petro ndi iwo akukhala naye anati, Ambuye, anthu aunyinji alikukankhana pa Inu ndi kukanikizana." 
Luke8:46 Koma Yesu anati, Wina wandikhudza Ine; pakuti a ndazindikira Ine kuti mphamvu yaturuka mwa Ine." 
Luke8:47 Ndipo mkaziyo pakuona kuti sanabisika, anadza ndi kunthunthumira, nagwa pamaso pace, nafotokoza pamaso pa anthu onsewo cifukwa cace ca kumkhudza iye, ndi kuti anaciritsidwa pomwepo." 
Luke8:48 Ndipo iye anati kwa iyeyu, Mwana wanga, cikhulupiriro cako cakupulumutsa iwe; muka ndi mtendere." 
Luke8:49 M'mene iye anali cilankhulire, anadza wina wocokera kwa mkuru wa sunagoge, nanena, Mwana wako wafa; usambvute Mphunzitsi." 
Luke8:50 Koma Yesu anamva, namyankha, kuti, Usaope; khulupira kokha, ndipo iye adzapulumutsidwa." 
Luke8:51 Ndipo pakufika iye kunyumbako, sanaloleza wina kulowa naye pamodzi, koma Petro, ndi Yohane, ndi Yakobo, ndi atate wa mwanayo, ndi amace." 
Luke8:52 Ndipo anthu onse analikumlira iye ndi kudzigugudapacifuwa. Koma iye anati, Musalire; pakuti iye sanafa, koma agona tulo." 
Luke8:53 Ndipo anamseka iye pwepwete podziwa kuti anafa. 
Luke8:54 Ndipo iye anamgwira dzanja lace, naitana, nati, Buthu, tauka." 
Luke8:55 Ndipo mzimu wace unabwera, ndipo anauka pomwepo; ndipo iye anawauza kuti ampatse kanthu ka kudya." 
Luke8:56 Ndipo atate wace ndi amace anadabwa; ndipo analamulira iwo asauze munthu ali yense cimene cinacitika. 
Luke9:1 Ndipo iye anaitana pamodzi khumi ndi awiriwo nawapatsa mphamvu ndi ulamuliro pa ziwanda zonse, ndi zakuciritsa nthenda." 
Luke9:2 Ndipo anawatuma kukalalikira Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndi kuciritsa anthu odwala." 
Luke9:3 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Musanyamule kanthu ka paulendo, kapena ndodo, kapena thumba, kapena mkate, kapena ndarama; ndipo musakhale nao malaya awiri." 
Luke9:4 Ndipo m'nyumba iri yonse mukalowemo, khalani komweko, ndipo muzikacokera kumeneko." 
Luke9:5 Ndipo onse amene sakakulandireni inu, m'mene muturuka m'mudzi womwewo, sansani pfumbi la pa mapazi anu, likhale mboni ya paiwo." 
Luke9:6 Ndipo iwo anaturuka, napita m'midzi m'midzi, ndi kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino, ndi kuciritsa ponse." 
Luke9:7 Ndipo Herode ciwangaco anamva mbiri yace ya zonse zinacitika; ndipo inamthetsa nzeru, cifukwa ananena anthu ena, kuti Yohane anauka kwa akufa;" 
Luke9:8 koma ena, kuti Eliya anaoneka; ndipo ena, kuti mneneri wina wa akale aja anauka." 
Luke9:9 Ndipo Herode anati, Yohane ndinamdula mutu ine; koma uyu ndani ndikumva zotere za iye? Ndipo anafunafuna kumuona iye." 
Luke9:10 Ndipo atabwera atumwi, anamfotokozera iye zonse anazicita. Ndipo iye anawatenga, napatuka nao pa okha kunka ku mudzi dzina lace Betsaida." 
Luke9:11 Koma unyinji wa anthu, pamene anadziwa, anamtsata Iye; ndipo iye anawalandira, nalankhula nao za Ufumu wa Mulungu, naciritsa amene anasowa kuciritsidwa." 
Luke9:12 Koma dzuwa lidapendeka; ndipo khumi ndi awiriwo anadza, nati kwa iye, Tauzani makamu a anthu amuke, kuti apite ku midzi yoyandikira ndi kumiraga, kukafuna pogona, ndi kupeza zakudya; cifukwa tiri ku malo acipululu kuno." 
Luke9:13 Koma anati kwa iwo, Muwapatse kudya ndinu. Koma anati, Ife tiribe mikate, koma isanu yokha, ndi nsomba ziwiri zokha; kapena timuke ife kukagulira anthu awa onse zakudya." 
Luke9:14 Pakuti anali amuna ngati zikwi zisanu. Koma iye anati kwa ophunzira ace, Khalitsani iwo pansi magulu magulu, ngati makumi asanu asanu." 
Luke9:15 Ndipo anatero, nawakhalitsa pansi onsewo." 
Luke9:16 Ndipo iye, m'mene anatenga mikate isanu ija ndi nsomba ziwiri anayang'ana kumwamba, nazidalitsa, nanyema, napatsa ophunzira apereke kwa anthuwo." 
Luke9:17 Ndipo anadya, nakhuta onsewo; natola makombo, mitanga khumi ndi iwiri." 
Luke9:18 Ndipo kunali, pamene iye analikupemphera padera, ophunzira anali naye; ndipo anawafunsa iwo, kuti, Makamuwo a anthu anena kuti Ine ndine yani?" 
Luke9:19 Ndipo anayankha nati, Yohane Mbatizi; koma ena, Eliya; ndi ena, kuti anauka mmodzi wa aneneri akale." 
Luke9:20 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Koma inu munena kuti Ine ndine yani? Ndipo anayankha Petro, nati, Kristu wa Mulungu." 
Luke9:21 Ndipo iye anawauzitsa iwo, nalamulira kuti asanene ici kwa munthu ali yense;" 
Luke9:22 nati, Kuyenera kuti Mwana wa munthu amve zowawa zambiri, ndi kukanidwa ndi akuru, ndi ansembe akuru, ndi alembi, ndi kuphedwa, ndi kuuka tsiku lacitatu." 
Luke9:23 Ndipo iye ananena kwa onse, Ngati munthu afuna kudza pambuyo panga, adzikanize yekha, nanyamule mtanda wace tsiku ndi tsiku, nanditsate Ine." 
Luke9:24 Pakutiamene ali yense akafuna kupulumutsa moyo wace, iye adzautaya; koma amene ali yense akataya moyo wace cifukwa ca Ine, iye adzaupulumutsa uwu." 
Luke9:25 Pakuti munthu apindulanji, akadzilemezera dziko lonse lapansi nadzitayapo, kapena kulipapo moyo wace?" 
Luke9:26 Pakuti amene ali yense: adzacita manyazi cifukwa ca Ine ndi mau anga, Mwana wa munthu adzacita manyazi cifukwa ca iye, pamene adzafika ndi ulemerero wace ndi wa Atate, ndi wa angelo oyera." 
Luke9:27 Koma Ine ndinena ndi inu zoonadi, Kuli ena a iwo akuimirira pano, amene sadzalawatu imfa, kufikira kuti adzaona Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke9:28 Ndipo pamene padatha ngati masiku asanu ndi atatu atanena mau amenewa, Iye anatenga Petro ndi Yohane ndi Yakobo apite naye, nakwera m'phiri kukapemphera." 
Luke9:29 Ndipo m'kupemphera kwace, maonekedwe a nkhope yace anasandulika, ndi cobvala cace cinayera ndi kunyezimira." 
Luke9:30 Ndipo onani, analikulankhulana nayeamuna awiri, ndiwo Mose ndi Eliya;" 
Luke9:31 amene anaonekera m'ulemerero, nanenaza kumuka kwace kumene iye ati adzatsiriza ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:32 Koma Petro ndi iwo anali naye analemedwa ndi tulo; koma m'mene anayera m'maso ndithu, anaona ulemerero wace, ndi amuna awiriwo akuimirira ndi iye." 
Luke9:33 Ndipo panali polekana iwo aja ndi iye, Petro anati kwa Yesu, Ambuye, nkwabwino kuti tiri pano; ndipo timange misasa itatu, umodzi wa Inu, ndi wina wa Mose, ndi wina wa Eliya; wosadziwa iye cimene alikunena." 
Luke9:34 Ndipo akadalankhula izi, unadza mtambo, nuwaphimba iwo; ndipo anaopa pakulowa iwo mumtambo." 
Luke9:35 Ndipo munaturuka mau mumtambo nanena, Uyu ndiye Mwana wanga, wosankhidwayo; mverani iye." 
Luke9:36 Ndipo pakutero mauwo, Yesu anapezedwa ali yekha. Ndipo iwo anakhala cete, ndipo sanauza munthu ali yense masiku aja kanthu konse ka izo anaziona." 
Luke9:37 Ndipo panali, m'mawa mwace, atatsika m'phiri, khamu lalikuru la anthu linakomana naye." 
Luke9:38 Ndipo onani, anapfuula munthu wa m'khamulo, nanena, nati, Mphunzitsi, ndikupemphani, yang'anirani mwana wanga; cifukwa ndiye mmodzi yekha wa ine:" 
Luke9:39 ndipo onani, umamgwira iye mzimu, napfuula modzidzimuka; ndipo umamng'amba iye ndi kumcititsa thobvu pakamwa, nucoka pa iye mwa unyenzi, numgola iye." 
Luke9:40 Ndipo ndinapempha ophunzira anu kuti auturutse; koma sanathe. 
Luke9:41 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, nati, Ha! obadwa inu osakhulupirira ndi amphulupulu, ndidzakhala ndi inu nthawi yanji, ndi kulekerera inu? idza naye kuno mwana wako." 
Luke9:42 Ndipo akadadza iye, ciwandaco cinamgwetsa, ndi kumng'ambitsa, Koma Yesu anadzudzula mzimu wonyansawo, naciritsa mnyamata, nambwezera iye kwa atate wace." 
Luke9:43 Ndipo onse anadabwa pa ukulu wace wa Mulungu. Koma pamene onse analikuzizwa ndi zonse anazicita, iye anati kwa ophunzira ace," 
Luke9:44 Alowe mau ame: newa m'makutu anu; pakuti Mwana wa munthu adzaperekedwa m'manja a anthu. 
Luke9:45 Koma iwo sanadziwitse mau awa, ndipo anabisidwa kwa iwo, kuti asawadziwe; ndipo anaopa kumfunsa za mau awa." 
Luke9:46 Ndipo anayamba kutsutsana kuti wamkulu mwa iwo ndani. 
Luke9:47 Koma Yesu pakuona kutsutsana kwa mitima yao, anatenga kamwana, nakaimika pambali pace, nati kwa iwo," 
Luke9:48 Amene ali yense akalandire kamwana aka m'dzina langa alandira Ine; ndipo amene andilandira Ine alandira iye amene anandituma Ine; pakuti iye wakukhala wamng'onong'ono wa inu nonse, yemweyu ndiye wamkuru." 
Luke9:49 Ndipo Yohane anayankha nati, Ambuye, tinaona wina alikuturutsa ziwanda m'dzina lanu; ndipo tinamletsa, cifukwa satsatana nafe." 
Luke9:50 Koma Yesu anati kwa iye, Musamletse, pakuti iye amene satsutsana nanu athandizana nanu." 
Luke9:51 Ndipo panali, pamene anayamba kukwanira masiku akuti alandiridwe iye kumwamba, Yesu anatsimika kuloza nkhope yace kunka ku Yerusalemu," 
Luke9:52 natumiza amithenga patsogolo pace; ndipo ananka, nalowa m'mudzi wa Asamariya, kukamkonzera iye malo." 
Luke9:53 Ndipo iwo sanamlandira iye, cifukwa nkhope yace inali yoloza kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke9:54 Ndipo pamene ophunzira ace Yakobo ndi Yohane anaona, anati, Ambuye, Kodi mufuna kuti ife tiuze mota utsike kumwamba ndi kuwanyeketsa iwo?" 
Luke9:55 Koma iye anapotoloka nawadzudzula. 
Luke9:56 Ndipo anapita kumudzi kwina. 
Luke9:57 Ndipo m'mene iwo analikuyenda m'njira, munthu anati kwa iye, Ine ndidzakutsatani kumene kuli konse mukapitako." 
Luke9:58 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Nkhandwe ziri nazo nkhwimba, ndi mbalame za kumwamba zisa, koma Mwana wa munthu alibe potsamira mutu." 
Luke9:59 Ndipo anati kwa munthu wina, Unditsate Ine. Koma iye anati, Mundilole ine, Ambuye, ndithange ndamuka kuika maliro a atate wanga." 
Luke9:60 Koma anati kwa iye, Leka akufa aike akufa a eni okha; koma muka iwe nubukitse mbiri yace ya Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke9:61 Ndipo winanso anati, Ambuye ndidzakutsatani Inu; koma muthange mwandilola kulawirana nao a kunyumba kwanga." 
Luke9:62 Koma Yesu anati kwa iye, Palibe munthu wakugwira cikhasu, nayang'ana za kumbuyo, ayenera Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke10:1 Zitatha izi Ambuye anaika ena makumi asanu ndi awiri, nawatuma iwo awiri awiri pamaso pace ku mudzi uli wonse, ndi malo ali onse kumene ati afikeko mwini." 
Luke10:2 Ndipo ananena kwa iwo, Dzinthu dzicuruka, koma anchito acepa; potero pemphani Mwini dzinthu, kuti akankhe anchito kukututa kwace." 
Luke10:3 Mukani; taonani, Ine ndituma inu ngati ana a nkhosa pakati pa mimbulu." 
Luke10:4 Musanyamule thumba la ndalama kapena thumba la kamba, kapena nsapato; nimusalankhule munthu panjira." 
Luke10:5 Ndipo m'nyumba iri yonse mukalowamo muthange mwanena, Mtendere ukhale pa nyumba iyi." 
Luke10:6 Ndipo mukakhala mwana wa mtendere m'menemo, mtendere wanu udzapumula pa iye; koma ngati mulibe, udzabwerera kwa inu." 
Luke10:7 Ndipo m'nyumba momwemo khalani, ndi kudya ndi kumwa za kwao; pakuti wanchito ayenera mphotho yace; musacokacoka m'nyumba." 
Luke10:8 Ndipo m'mudzi uli wonse mukalowamo, ndipo alandira inu, idyani zomwezi akupatsani;" 
Luke10:9 ndipo ciritsani odwala ali mamwemonimunene nao, Ufumu wa Mulungu wayandikira kwa inu. Koma ku mudzi uli wonse mukalowako," 
Luke10:10 ndipo salandira inu, m'mene mwaturuka ku makwalala ace nenani," 
Luke10:11 Lingakhale pfumbi locokera kumudzi kwanu, lomamatika ku mapaziathu, tilisansira pa inu; koma zindikirani ici, kuti Ufumu wa Mulungu wayandikira." 
Luke10:12 Ndinena ndi inu kuti tsiku lijalo ku Sodoma kudzapiririka kuposa mudzi umenewo. 
Luke10:13 Tsoka iwe, Korazini! tsoka iwe Betsaida! cifukwa kuti zikadacitika m'Turo ndi Sidoni zamphamvuzi zidacitika mwa inu, akadalapa kale lomwe ndi kukhala pansi obvala ciguduli ndi phulusa." 
Luke10:14 Koma ku Turo ndi Sidoni kudzapiririka m'ciweruziro, koposa inu." 
Luke10:15 Ndipo iwe, Kapernao, kodi udzakwezedwa kufikira Kumwamba? Udzatsitsidwa kufikira ku Hade," 
Luke10:16 iye wakumvera inu, andimvera Ine; ndipo iye wakukana inu, andikana Ine; ndipo iye wakukana Ine amkana iye amene anandituma Ine." 
Luke10:17 Ndipo makumi asanu ndi awiri aja anabwera mokondwera, nanena, Ambuye, zingakhale ziwanda zinatigonjera ife m'dzina lanu." 
Luke10:18 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndinaona Satana alinkugwa ngati mphezi wocokera kumwamba." 
Luke10:19 Taonani, ndakupatsani ulamuliro wakuponda pa njoka ndi zinkhanira, ndi pa mphamvu iri yonse ya mdaniyo; ndipo kulibe kanthu kadzakuipsani konse." 
Luke10:20 Koma musakondwera nako kuti mizimu idakugonjerani, koma kondwerani kuti maina anu alembedwa m'Mwamba." 
Luke10:21 Nthawi yomweyo iye anakondwera ndi Mzimu Wovera, nati, Ndikubvomerezani Inu, Atate, Ambuye wa kumwamba ndi wa dziko, kuti izi munazibisira anzeru ndi ozindikira, ndipo munaziululira ana amakanda; indedi, Atate, pakuti kotero kudakondweretsa pamaso panu." 
Luke10:22 Zonse zaperekedwa kwa Ine ndi Atate wanga; ndipo palibe munthu azindikira Mwana ali yani, koma Atate; ndipo Atate ali yani, koma Mwana, ndi iye amene Mwana afuna kumuululira iye." 
Luke10:23 Ndipo m'mene anapotolokera kwa ophunzira ace, ali pa okha, anati, Odala masowo akuona zimene muona." 
Luke10:24 Pakuti ndinena ndi inu kuti 1 aneneri ndi mafumu ambiri anafuna kuona zimene inu muziona, koma sanaziona; ndi kumva zimene mukumva, koma sanazimva." 
Luke10:25 Ndipo taonani, wacilamulo wina anaimirira namuyesa iye, nanena, 2 Mphunzitsi, ndidzalowa moyo wosatha ndi kucita ciani?" 
Luke10:26 Ndipo anati kwa iye, M'cilamulo mulembedwa ciani? Uwerenga bwanji?" 
Luke10:27 Ndipo iye anayankha nati, 3 Uzikonda Ambuye Mulungu wako ndi mtima wako wonse, ndi moyo wako wonse, ndi mphamvu yako yonse, ndi nzeru zako zonse, ndi mnansi wako monga iwe mwini." 
Luke10:28 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Wayankha bwino; cita ici, ndipo udzakhala ndi moyo." 
Luke10:29 Koma iye, pofuna kudziyesa yekha wolungama, anati kwa Yesu, Ndipo mnansi wanga ndani?" 
Luke10:30 Ndipo Yesu anamlanda mau, nati, Munthu wina anatsika kucokera ku Yerusalemu kunka ku Yeriko; ndipo anagwa m'manja a acifwamba amene anambvula zobvala, namkwapula, nacoka atamsiya wofuna kufa." 
Luke10:31 Ndipo kudangotero kuti wansembe wina anatsika njirayo, ndipo pakumuona iye anapita mbali yina." 
Luke10:32 Momwemonso Mlevi, pofika pamenepo, ndi kumuona, anapita mbali yina." 
Luke10:33 Koma Msamariya wina ali pa ulendo wace anadzapali iye; ndipo pakumuona, anagwidwa cifundo," 
Luke10:34 nadza kwa iye, namanga mabala ace, nathirapo mafuta ndi vinyo; ndipo anamuika iye pa nyama yace ya iye yekha, nadza naye ku nyumba ya alendo, namsungira." 
Luke10:35 Ndipo m'mawa mwace anaturutsa marupiya atheka awiri napatsa mwini nyumba ya alendo, nati, Msungire iye, ndipo ciri conse umpatsa koposa, ine, pobwera, ndidzakubwezera iwe." 
Luke10:36 Uti wa awa atatu, uyesa iwe, anakhala mnansi wa iye uja adagwa m'manja a acifwamba?" 
Luke10:37 Ndipo anati, iye wakumcitira cifundo. Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Pita, nucite iwe momwemo." 
Luke10:38 Ndipo pakupita paulendo pao iye analowa m'mudzi wina; ndipo mkazi wina dzina lace 4 Marita anamlandira iye kunyumba kwace. 
Luke10:39 Ndipo anali ndi mbale wace wochedwa Mariya, ndiye wakukhala pa mapazi a Ambuye, namva mau ace." 
Luke10:40 Koma Marita anatekeseka ndi kutumikira kwambiri; ndipo anadzako nati, Ambuye, kodi simusamala kuti mbale wanga anandisiya nditumikire ndekha? Mumuuze tsono kuti andithandize." 
Luke10:41 Koma Ambuye anayankha nati kwa iye, Marita, Marita, uda nkhawa nubvutika ndi zinthu zambiri;" 
Luke10:42 koma cisoweka cinthu cimodzi, pakuti Mariya anasankha dera lokoma limene lsilidzacotsedwa kwa iye." 
Luke11:1 Ndipo kunali, pakukhala iye pamalo pena ndi kupemphera, m'mene analeka, wina wa ophunzira ace anati kwa iye, Ambuye, tiphunzitseni ife kupemphera, monganso Yohane anaphunzitsa ophunzira ace." 
Luke11:2 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, M'mene mupemphera nenani, Atate, Dzina lanu liyeretsedwe; Ufumu wanu udze;" 
Luke11:3 tipatseni ife tsiku ndi tsiku cakudya ca patsiku. 
Luke11:4 Ndipo mutikhululukire ife macimo athu; pakuti ifenso tikhululukira munthu yense wa mangawa athu. Ndipo musatitengere ife kokatiyesa. 
Luke11:5 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndani wa inu adzakhala ndi bwenzi lace, nadzapita kwa iye pakati pa usiku, nadzati kwa iye, Bwenzi, ndibwereke mikate itatu;" 
Luke11:6 popeza wandidzera bwenzi langa locokera paulendo, ndipo ndiribe compatsa;" 
Luke11:7 ndipo iyeyu wa m'katimo poyankha akati, Usandibvuta; pakhomo mpotseka tsopano, ndipo ana anga ali nane pamodzi pogona; sindikhoza kuuka ndi kukupatsa?" 
Luke11:8 Ndinena ndi inu, ngakhale sadzauka ndi kumpatsa, cifukwa ali bwenzi lacevkoma cifukwa ca liuma lace adzauka nadzampatsa iye ziri zonse azisowa." 
Luke11:9 Ndipo Ine ndinena ndi inu, Pemphani, ndipo adzakupatsani; funani, ndipo mudzapeza; gogodani ndipo adzakutsegulirani." 
Luke11:10 Pakuti yense wakupempha alandira; ndi wofunayo apeza; ndi iye amene agogoda adzamtsegulira. 
Luke11:11 Ndipo ndani wa inu ali atate, mwana wace akadzampempha mkate, adzampatsa mwala? kapena nsomba, nadzamninkha njoka m'malo mwa nsomba?" 
Luke11:12 kapena akadzampempha dzira kodi adzampatsa cinkhanira? 
Luke11:13 Potero, ngati inu, okhala oipa, mudziwa kupatsa ana anu mphatso zabwino, koposa kotani nanga Atate wanu wa Kumwamba adzapatsa Mzimu Woyera kwa iwo akumpempha iye?" 
Luke11:14 Ndipo analikuturutsa ciwanda cosalankhula. Ndipo kunali, citaturuka ciwanda, wosalankhulayo analankhula; ndipo makamu a anthu anazizwa." 
Luke11:15 Koma ena mwa iwo anati, Ndi Beelzebule mkuru wa ziwanda amaturutsa ziwanda." 
Luke11:16 Koma ena anamuyesa, nafuna kwa iye cizindikilo cocokera Kumwamba." 
Luke11:17 Koma iye, podziwa zolingirira zao, anati kwa iwo, Ufumu uli wonse wogawanika m'kati mwace upasuka; ndipo nyumba ikagawanika m'kati mwace igwa." 
Luke11:18 Ndiponso ngati Satana agawanika kudzitsutsa mwini, udzaimika bwanji ufumu wace? popeza munena kuti nditurutsa ziwanda ndi Beelzebule." 
Luke11:19 Koma ngati Ine ndimaturutsa ziwanda ndi Beelzebule, ana anu aziturutsa ndi yani? Mwa ici iwo adzakhala oweruza anu." 
Luke11:20 Koma ngati Ine nditurutsa ziwanda ndi cala ca Mulungu, pamenepo Ufumu wa Mulungu wafikira inu." 
Luke11:21 Pamene pali ponse mwini mphamvu alonda pabwalo pace zinthu zace ziri mumtendere; 
Luke11:22 koma pamene pali ponse amdzera wakumposa mphamvu, nakamlaka, amcotsera zida zace zonse zimene anazitama, nagawa zofunkha zace." 
Luke11:23 Iye wosabvomerezana ndi Ine atsutsana ndi Ine; ndipo iye wosasonkhanitsa pamodzi ndi Ine amwaza. 
Luke11:24 Pamene pali ponse mzimu wonyansa ukaturuka mwa munthu, upyola malo opanda madzi nufunafuna mpumulo; ndipo posaupeza unena, Ndidzabwera kunyumba kwanga kumene ndinaturukako;" 
Luke11:25 ndipo pofika, uipeza yosesa ndi yokonzeka." 
Luke11:26 Pomwepo, upita nutenga mizimu yina isanu ndi iwiri yoipa yoposa ndi uwu mwini; ndipo ilowa nikhalira komweko; ndipo makhalidwe otsiriza a munthu uyu aipa koposa oyambawo." 
Luke11:27 Ndipo kunali, pakunena izi iye, mkazi wina mwa khamu la anthu anakweza mau, nati kwa iye, Yodala mimba imene idakubalani, ndi mawere amene munayamwa." 
Luke11:28 Koma iye anati, Inde, koma odala iwo akumva mau a Mulungu, nawasunga." 
Luke11:29 Ndipo pakusonkhana pamodzi makamu a anthu, anayamba kunena, Mbadwo uno ndi mbadwo woipa; ufuna cizindikilo, ndipo cizindikilo sicidzapatsidwa kwa uwu koma cizindikilo ca Yona." 
Luke11:30 Pakuti monga ngati Yona anali cizindikilo kwa Anineve, cotero adzakhalanso Mwana wa munthu kwa mbadwo uno." 
Luke11:31 Mfumu yaikazi ya kumwera idzaimirira pa mlandu wotsiriza pamodzi ndi amuna a mbadwo uno, nadzawatsutsa; pakuti anadza ku'cokera ku malekezero a dziko kudzamva nzeru za Solomo; ndipo onani, woposa Solomo ali pano." 
Luke11:32 Amuna a ku Nineve adzaimirira pa mlandu wotsiriza pamodzi ndi anthu a mbadwo uno, nadzawatsutsa; pakuti iwo analapa pa kulalikira kwa Y ona; ndipo onani, wakuposa Y ona ali pano." 
Luke11:33 Palibe munthu, atayatsa nyali, aiika m'cipinda capansi, kapena pansi pa muyeso, koma pa coikapo cace, kuti iwo akulowamo aone kuunika." 
Luke11:34 Nyali ya thupi ndiyo diso lako; pamene pali ponse diso lako liri langwiro thupi lako lonse liunikidwanso monsemo; koma likakhala loipa, thupi lako lomwe liri la mdima wokha wokha." 
Luke11:35 Potero yang'anira kuunika kuli mwa iwe kungakhale mdima. 
Luke11:36 Pamenepo, ngati thupi lako lonse liunikidwa losakhala nalo dera lace lamdima, lidzakhala lounikidwa monsemo, ngati pamene nyali ndi kuwala kwace ikuunikira iwe." 
Luke11:37 Ndipo pakulankhula iye, anamuitana Mfarisi kuti adye naye; ndipo analowa naseama kudya." 
Luke11:38 Ndipo anazizwa Mfarisiyo, pakuona kuti anayamba cakudya asanasambe." 
Luke11:39 Koma Ambuye anati kwa iye, Tsopano inu Afarisi muyeretsa kunja kwace kwa cikho ndi mbale, koma m'kati mwanu mudzala zolanda ndi zoipa." 
Luke11:40 Opusa inu, kodi iye wopanga kunja kwace sanapanganso m'kati mwace?" 
Luke11:41 koma patsani mphatso yacifundo za m'katimo; ndipo onani, zonse ziri zoyera kwa inu." 
Luke11:42 Koma tsoka inu, Afarisi! cifukwa mupereka limodzi la magawo khumi la timbeu tonunkhira, ndi timbeu tokometsa cakudya ndi ndiwo zonse, ndipo mumaleka ciweruziro ndi cikondi ca Mulungu; mwenzi mutacita izi, ndi kusasiya zinazo." 
Luke11:43 Tsoka inu, Afarisi! cifukwa mukonda mipando yaulemu m'masunagoge, ndi kulankhulidwa m'misika." 
Luke11:44 Tsoka inu! cifukwa muli ngati manda osaoneka, ndipo anthu akuyendayenda pamwamba pao sadziwa," 
Luke11:45 Ndipo mmodzi wa acilamulo anayankha, nanena kwa iye, Mphunzitsi, ndi kunena izi, mutitonza ifenso." 
Luke11:46 Ndipo anati, Tsoka inunso, acilamulo inul cifukwa musenzetsa anthu akatundu osautsa ponyamula, ndipo inu nomwe simukhudza akatunduwo ndi cala canu cimodzi." 
Luke11:47 Tsoka inu! cifukwamumanga za pa manda a aneneri, ndipo makolo anu anawapha." 
Luke11:48 Comweco muli mboni, ndipo mubvomera nchito za makolo anu; cifukwa iwotu anawapha, koma inu muwamangira iwo zapamanda." 
Luke11:49 Mwa icinso nzeru ya Mulungu inati, Ndidzatumiza kwa iwo aneneri ndi atumwi; ndipo ena a iwo adzawapha, nadzawazunza;" 
Luke11:50 kuti mwazi wa aneneri onse, wakhetsedwa kuyambira kukhazika kwa dziko lapansi, ukafunidwe kwa anthu a mbadwo uno;" 
Luke11:51 kuyambira mwazi wa 1 Abele kufikira mwazi wa 2 Zakariya, amene anamphera pakati pa guwa la nsembe ndi nyumba ya Kacisi. Indetu, ndinena kwa inu udzafunidwa kwa anthu a mbadwo uno." 
Luke11:52 3 Tsoka inu, acilamulo! cifukwa munacotsa cifungulo ca nzeru; inu simunalowamo nokha, ndipo munawaletsa iwo analinkulowa." 
Luke11:53 Ndipo pamene iye anaturuka m'menemo, alembi ndi Afarisi anayamba kumuumiriza iye kolimba, ndi kumtompha iye ndi zinthu zambiri;" 
Luke11:54 4 namlindira akakole kanthu koturuka m'kamwa mwace. 
Luke12:1 Pomwepo pamene anthu a zikwi zikwi a khamu anasonkhana pamodzi, kotero kuti anapondana, iye anayamba kunena kwa ophunzira ace poyamba, Tacenierani nokha ndi cotupitsa mikate ca Afarisi, cimeneciri cinyengo." 
Luke12:2 Koma kulibe kanthu kobvundikiridwa kamene sikadzaululidwa; ndi kobisika kamene sikadzadziwika. 
Luke12:3 Cifukwa cace zonse zimene mwazinena mumdima zidzamveka poyera; ndipo cimene mwalankhula m'khutu, m'zipinda za m'kati cidzalalikidwa pa macindwi a nyumba." 
Luke12:4 Ndipo ndinena kwa inu, abwenzi anga, Musaope iwo akupha thupi, ndipo akatha ici alibe kanthu kena angathe kucita." 
Luke12:5 Koma ndidzakulangizani amene muzimuopa; taopani iye amene atatha kupha ali ndi mphamvu yakutaya kugehena, inde, ndinena ndinu opani ameneyo." 
Luke12:6 Kodi mpheta zisanu sizigulidwa timakobiri tiwiri? ndipo palibe imodzi ya izo iiwalika pamaso pa Mulungu; 
Luke12:7 komatu ngakhale matsitsi onse a pamutu panu awerengedwa. Musaopa, muposa mtengo wace wa mpheta zambiri." 
Luke12:8 Ndipo ndinena kwa inu, Amene ali yense akabvomereza Ine pamaso pa anthu, inde, Mwana wa munthu adzambvomereza iye pamaso pa angelo a Mulungu;" 
Luke12:9 koma iye wondikana Ine pamaso pa anthu, iye adzakanidwa pamaso pa angelo a Mulungu." 
Luke12:10 Ndipo amene ali yense adzanenera Mwana wa munthu zoipa adzakhululukidwa; koma amene anenera Mzimu Woyera zamwano sadzakhululukidwa. 
Luke12:11 Ndipo pamene pali ponse adzamuka nanu ku mlandu wa m'sunagoge ndi kwa akulu, ndi aulamuliro, musade nkhawa ndi kuti mukadzikanira bwanji, ndipo ndi mau otani, kapena mukanena ciani;" 
Luke12:12 pakuti Mzimu Woyera adzaphunzitsa inu nthawi yomweyo zimene muyenera kuzinena. 
Luke12:13 Ndipo munthu wa m'khamulo anati kwa iye, Mphunzitsi, uzani mbale wanga agawane ndi ine cuma camasiye." 
Luke12:14 Koma anati kwa iye, Munthu iwe, ndani anandiika Ine ndikhale woweruza, kapena wakugawira inu?" 
Luke12:15 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Yang'anirani, mudzisungire kupewa msiriro uli wonse; cifukwa moyo wace wa munthu sulingana ndi kucuruka kwa zinthu zace ali nazo." 
Luke12:16 Ndipo iye ananena nao fanizo, kuti, Munda wace wa munthu mwini cuma unapatsa bwino." 
Luke12:17 Ndipo anaganizaganiza mwa yekha nanena, Ndidzatani ine, popeza ndiribe mosungiramo zipatso zanga?" 
Luke12:18 Ndipo anati, Ndidzatere: ndidzapasula nkhokwe zanga, ndi kumanganso zazikuru, ndipo ndidzasungiramo dzinthu zanga zonse, ndi cuma canga." 
Luke12:19 Ndipo ndidzati kwa moyo wanga, Moyo iwe, uli naco cuma cambiri cosungika kufikira zaka zambiri; tapumulatu, nudye, numwe, nukondwere." 
Luke12:20 Koma Mulungu anati kwa iye, Wopusa iwe, usiku womwe uno udzafunidwa moyo wako; ndipo zinthu zimene unazikonza zidzakhala za yani?" 
Luke12:21 Atero iye wakudziunjikira cuma mwini yekha wosakhala naco cuma ca kwa Mulungu," 
Luke12:22 Ndipo Iyeanati kwa ophunzira ace, Cifukwa cace ndinena ndinu, Musade nkhawa ndi moyo wanu, cimene mudzadya; kapena ndi thupi lanu, cimene mudzabvala." 
Luke12:23 Pakuti moyo uli woposa cakudya, ndi thupi liposa cobvala." 
Luke12:24 Lingirirani makungubwi, kuti samafesai, kapena kutemai; alibe nyumba yosungiramo, kapena nkhokwe; ndipo Mulungu awadyetsa: nanga inu simuziposa mbalame kwambiri!" 
Luke12:25 Ndipo ndani wa inu, ndi kuda nkhawa angathe kuonjeza mkono pa msinkhu wace?" 
Luke12:26 Kotero ngati simungathe ngakhale cacing'onong'ono, muderanji nkhawa cifukwa ca zina zija?" 
Luke12:27 Lingalirani maluwa, makulidwe ao; sagwiritsa nchito ndi kusapota; koma ndinena kwa inu, Ngakhale Solomo, mu ulemerero wace wonse, sanabvala ngati limodzi la awa." 
Luke12:28 Koma ngati Mulungu abveka kotere maudzu a kuthengo akukhala lero, ndipo mawa aponyedwa pamoto; nanga inu sadzakuninkhani koposa, inu okhulupirira pang'ono?" 
Luke12:29 Ndipo inu musafunefune cimene mudzadya, ndi cimene mudzamwa; ndipo musakayike mtima." 
Luke12:30 Pakuti izi zonse mitundu ya anthu a pa dziko lapansi amazifunafuna; koma Atate wanu adziwa kuti musowa zimenezi. 
Luke12:31 Komatu tafuna-funani Ufumu wace, ndipo izi adzakuonjezerani." 
Luke12:32 Musaopa, kagulu ka nkhosa inu; cifukwa Atate wanu akonda kukupatsani Ufumu." 
Luke12:33 Gulitsani zinthu muli nazo, nimupatse mphatso zacifundo; mudzikonzere matumba a ndarama amene sakutha, cuma cosatha m'Mwamba, kumene mbala siziyandikira, ndipo njenjete siziononga." 
Luke12:34 Pakuti kumene kuli cuma canu, komweko kudzakhalanso mtima wanu." 
Luke12:35 Khalani odzimangira m'cuuno, ndipo nyali zanu zikhale zoyaka;" 
Luke12:36 ndipo inu nokha khalani ofanana ndi anthu oyembekezera mbuye wao, pamene ati abwera kucokera kuukwati; kuti pakudza iye, nakagogoda, akamtsegulire pomwepo." 
Luke12:37 Odala akapolowo amene mbuye wao, pakudza iye, adzawapeza odikira; indetu ndinena ndinu, kuti iye adzadzimangira m'cuuno, nadzawakhalitsa pansi kudya, nadzafika, nadzawatumikira." 
Luke12:38 Ndipo akadza ulonda waciwiri, kapena wacitatu, nakawapeza atero, odala amenewa." 
Luke12:39 Koma zindikirani ici, kuti mwini nyumba akadadziwa nthawi yace yakudza mbala, akadadikira, ndipo sakadalola nyumba yace ibooledwe." 
Luke12:40 Khalani okonzeka inunso; cifukwa nthawi imene simulingirira, Mwana wa munthu akudza." 
Luke12:41 Ndipo Petro anati, Ambuye, kodi fanizo ili mwalinena kwa ife, kapena kwa onse?" 
Luke12:42 Ndipo Ambuye anati, Ndani tsono ali mdindo wokhulupirika ndi wanzeru, amene mbuye wace adzamuika kapitao wa pa banja lace, kuwapatsa iwo phoso lao pa nthawi yace?" 
Luke12:43 Wodala kapoloyo amene mbuye wace pakufika, adzampeza alikucita cotero." 
Luke12:44 1 Ndinena ndinu zoona, kuti adzamuika iye kapitao wa pa zonse ali nazo." 
Luke12:45 Koma 2 kapolo uyo akanena mumtima mwace, Mbuye wanga azengereza kudza; ndimo akayamba kupanda anyamata ndi adzakazi ndi kudya ndi kumwa, ndi kuledzera;" 
Luke12:46 3 mbuye wa kapolouyo adzafika tsiku lakuti samuyembekezera, ndi nthawi yakuti saidziwa, nadzamdula iye pakati, nadzamuika dera lace pamodzi ndi anthu osakhulupirira." 
Luke12:47 Ndipo 4 kapolo uyo, wodziwa cifuniro ca mbuye wace, ndipo sanakonza, ndi kusacita zonga za cifuniro caceco, adzakwapulidwa mikwapulo yambiri." 
Luke12:48 Koma 5 iye amene sanacidziwa, ndipo anazicita zoyenera mikwapulo, adzakwapulidwa pang'ono. Ndipo kwa munthu ali yense adampatsa zambiri, kwa iye adzafuna zambiri; ndipo amene anamuikizira zambiri, adzamuuza abwezere zoposa." 
Luke12:49 Ine ndinadzera kuponya mota pa dziko lapansi; ndipo ndifunanji, ngati unatha kuyatsidwa?" 
Luke12:50 Koma ndiri ndi ubatizo ndikabatizidwe nao; ndipo ndikanikizidwa Ine kufikira ukatsirizidwa! 
Luke12:51 Kodi muyesa kuti ndinadzera kudzapatsa mtendere pa dziko lapani? Ndinena wa inu, Iaitu, komatu kutsutsana;" 
Luke12:52 pakuti 6 kuyambira tsopano adzakhala m'nyumba imodzi anthu asanu, atatu adzatsutsana ndi awiri, ndi awiri adzatsutsana ndi atatu." 
Luke12:53 Adzatsutsana atate ndi mwana wace, ndi mwana ndi atate wace; amace adzatsutsana ndi mwana wamkazi'l ndi mwana wamkazi ndi amace, mpongozi adzatsutsana ndi mkazi wa mwana wace, ndi mkaziyo ndi mpongozi wace." 
Luke12:54 Koma iye ananenanso kwa makamu a anthu, 7 Pamene pali ponse muona mtambo wokwera kumadzulo, pomwepo munena, kuti, Ikudza mvula; ndipo itero." 
Luke12:55 Ndipo pamene mphepo ya kumwela iomba, munena, kuti, Kudzakhala kutenthatu; ndipo kuterodi." 
Luke12:56 Onyenga inu, mudziwa kuzindikira nkhope yace ya dziko lapansi ndi ya thambo; koma simudziwa bwanji kuzindikira nyengoyino?" 
Luke12:57 Ndipo inunso, pa nokha mulekeranji kuweruza kolungama?" 
Luke12:58 Pakuti 8 pamene ulikupita naye mnzako wa miandu kwa woweruza, fulumira panjira kutha naye mlandu, kuti angakokere iwe kwa woweruza, ndipo woweruzayo angapereke iwe kwa msilikari, ndi msilikari angaponye iwe m'nyumba yandende." 
Luke12:59 Ine ndinena kwa iwe, 9 Sudzaturukamo konse kufikira utalipira kakobiri kakumariza." 
Luke13:1 Ndipo anakhalako nthawi yomweyo, anthu ena amene anamuuza iye za Agalileya, amene Pilato anasanganiza mwazi wao ndi nsembe zao." 
Luke13:2 Ndipo iye anayankha nati kwa iwo, Kodi muyesa kuti Agalileya aja anali anthu akucimwa koposa Agalileya onse, cifukwa anamva zowawa izi?" 
Luke13:3 Ndinena kwa inu, iaitu; koma ngati inu simutembenuka mtima, mudzaonongeka nonse momwemo." 
Luke13:4 Kapena iwo aja khumi ndi asanu ndi atatu, amene nsanja yaitali ya m'Siloamu inawagwera, ndi kuwapha; kodi muyesa kuti iwo anali olakwa koposa anthu onse akukhala m'Yerusalemu?" 
Luke13:5 Ndinena kwa inu, Iaitu; koma ngati simutembenuka mtima, mudzaonongeka nonse ci, modzimodzi." 
Luke13:6 Ndipo iye ananena fanizo ili: Munthu wina anali ndi mkuyu wookam'munda wace wamphesa. Ndipo anadza nafuna cipatso pa uwu, koma anapeza palibe." 
Luke13:7 Ndipo anati kwa wosungira munda wamphesa, Taona, zaka zapita zitatu ndimadza ine kudzafuna cipatso pa mkuyu uwu, ndipo ndimapeza palibe: taulikha; uyeseranjinso nthaka yopanda pace?" 
Luke13:8 Ndipo iye anayankha nanena naye, Mbuye, baulekani ngakhale caka cino comwe, kufikira ndidzaukumbira kwete, ndithirepo ndowe;" 
Luke13:9 ndipo, ngati udzabala cipatso kuyambira pamenepo, cabwino; koma ngati iai, mudzaulikhatu." 
Luke13:10 Ndipo analikuphunzitsa m'sungagoge mwina, tsiku la Sabata." 
Luke13:11 Ndipo mkazi anali nao mzimu wakumdwalitsa zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu; nakhala wopeteka, ndimo analibe mphamvu konse yakuweramuka." 
Luke13:12 Ndipo Yesu m'mene anamuona, anamuitana, nanena naye, Mkaziwe, wamasulidwa kudwala kwako." 
Luke13:13 Ndipo anaika manja ace pa iye; ndipo pomwepo anaongoledwa, nalemekeza Mulungu." 
Luke13:14 Ndipo mkuru wa sunagoge anabvutika mtima, cifukwa Yesu anaciritsa tsiku la Sabata, nayankha, nanena kwa khamulo, Alipo masiku asanu ndi limodzi, m'menemo anthu ayenera kugwira nchito, cifukwa cace idzani kudzaciritsldwa momwemo, koma tsiku la Sabata ai." 
Luke13:15 Koma Ambuye anamyankha iye, nati, Onyenga inu, kodi munthu ali yense wa inu samaimasula ng'ombe yace, kapena buru wace kucodyeramo, tsiku la Sabata, kupita nayo kukaimwetsa madzi?" 
Luke13:16 Ndipo mkazi uyu, ndiye mwana wa Abrahamu, amene Satana anammanga, onani, zaka khumi ndi zisanu ndi zitatu, nanga si kuyenera kodi, kuti amasulidwe nsinga yace imeneyi tsiku la Sabata?" 
Luke13:17 Ndipo pamene Iye anatero, onse aja akutsutsana naye ananyazitsidwa; ndipo anthu onse a m'khamu anakondwera ndi zinthu zonse za ulemererozo zinacitidwa ndi iye." 
Luke13:18 Pamenepo ananena, Ufumu wa Mulungu ufanana ndi ciani? ndipo ndidzaufanizira ndi ciani?" 
Luke13:19 Ufanana ndi kambeu kampiru, kamene munthu anatenga, nakaponya m'munda wace wace, ndipo kanamera, kanakula mtengo; ndi mbalame za m'mlengalenga zinabindikira mu nthambi zace." 
Luke13:20 Ndiponso anati, Ndidzafanizira Ufumu wa Mulungu ndi ciani?" 
Luke13:21 Ufanana ndi cotupitsa mikate, cimene mkazianatenga, nacibisa mu miyeso itatu ya ufa, kufikira unatupa wonsewo," 
Luke13:22 Ndipo Iye anapita pakati pa mizinda ndi midzi, naphunzitsa, nayenda ulendo kunkabe ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke13:23 Ndipo munthu anati kwa iye, Ambuye, akupulumutsidwandiwo owerengeka kodi? Koma iye anati kwa iwo," 
Luke13:24 Yesetsani kulowa pa khomo lopapatiza; cifukwa anthu ambiri, ndikuuzani, adzafunafuna kulowamo, koma sadzakhoza." 
Luke13:25 Pamene atauka mwini nyumba natseka pakhomo, ndipo inu mudzayamba kuima pabwalo, ndi kugogoda pacitseko, ndi kunena, Ambuye titsegulireni ife; ndipo iye adzayankha nadzati ndi inu, Sindidziwa inu kumene mucokerako;" 
Luke13:26 pomwepo mudzayambakunena, Ifetinadya ndi kumwa pamaso panu, ndipo munaphunzitsa m'makwalala a kwathu;" 
Luke13:27 ndipo iye adzati, Ndinena kwa inu, sindidziwa kumene mucokera inu; cokani pa Ine, nonse akucita cosalungama," 
Luke13:28 Kudzakhala komweko kulira ndi kukukuta mano, pamene mudzaona Abrahamu, ndi Isake, ndi Yakobo, ndi aneneri onse, mu. Ufumu wa Mulungu, koma inu nokha muturutsidwa kunja." 
Luke13:29 Ndipo anthu adzacokera kum'mawa, ndi kumadzulo, ndi kumpoto, ndi kumwela, nadzakhalapansi mu Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke13:30 Ndipo onani, alipo akuthungo amene adzakhala oyamba, ndipo alipo oyamba adzakhala akuthungo." 
Luke13:31 Nthawi yomweyo anadzapo Afarisi ena, nanena kwa iye, Turukani, cokani kuno; cifukwa Herode afuna kupha lou." 
Luke13:32 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Pitani kauzeni nkhandweyo, Taonani, nditurutsa ziwanda, nditsiriza maciritso lero ndi mawa, ndipo mkuca nditsirizidwa." 
Luke13:33 Komatu ndiyenera ndipite ulendo wanga lero ndi mawa ndi mkuca, cifukwa sikuloleka kuti mneneri aonongeke kunja kwace kwa Yerusalemu." 
Luke13:34 Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu, iwe wakupha aneneri, ndi wakuponya miyala iwo atumidwa kwa iwe! ha! kawiri kawiri ndinafuna kusonkhanitsa ana ako, monga ngati thadzi ndi anapiye ace m'mapiko ace, ndipo simunafunai!" 
Luke13:35 onani nyumba yanu isiyidwa kwa inu yabwinja; ndipo ndinena kwa inu kuti, Simudzandiona Ine, kufikira mudzati, Wolemekezeka iye amene akudza m'dzina la Ambuye." 
Luke14:1 Ndipo panali pamene iye analowa m'nyumba ya mmodzi wa akuru a Afarisi tsiku la Sabat a, kukadya, iwo analikumzonda iye." 
Luke14:2 Ndipo onani, panali pamaso pace munthu wambulu." 
Luke14:3 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati kwa acilamulo ndi Afarisi, nanena, Kodi nkuloledwa tsiku la Sabata kuciritsa, kapena iai?" 
Luke14:4 Koma iwo anakhala cete. Ndipo anamtenga namciritsa, namuuza apite." 
Luke14:5 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndani wa inu buru wace kapena ng'ombe yace itagwa m'citsime, ndipo sadzaiturutsa pomwepo tsiku la Sabata kodi?" 
Luke14:6 Ndipo iwo sanathe kumbwezera mau pa zinthu izi. 
Luke14:7 Ndipo iye ananena fanizo kwa oitanidwa, popenya kuti amadzisankhira mipando yaulemu, nanena kwa iwo," 
Luke14:8 Pamene pali ponse waitanidwa iwe ndi munthu ku cakudya ca ukwati, usaseama pa mpando waulemu; kuti kapena wina waulemu wakuposa iwe akaitanidwe ndi iye," 
Luke14:9 ndipo pakufika iye amene adaitana iwe ndi uyu, adzati kwa iwe, Mpatse uyu malo; ndipo pomwepo udzayamba manyazi kukhala pa mpando wa kuthungo." 
Luke14:10 Koma pamene pali ponse waitanidwa iwe, pita nukhale pansi pa malo a kuthungo; kotero kuti pamene akadza iye anakuitana iwe, akanena ndi iwe, Bwenzi langa, sendera, kwera kuno; pomwepo udzakhala ndi ulemerero pamaso pa onse akuseama pacakudya pamodzi ndi iwe." 
Luke14:11 Cifukwa munthu ali yense wakudzikuza adzacepetsedwa; ndipo wakudzicepetsa adzakulitsidwa. 
Luke14:12 Ndipo ananenanso kwa iye amene adamuitana, Pamene ukonza cakudya ca pausana kapena ca madzulo, usaitane abwenzi ako, kapena abale ako, kapena a pfuko lako, kapena anansi ako eni cuma; kuti kapena iwonso angabwereze kuitana iwe, ndipo udzakhala nayo mphotho." 
Luke14:13 Koma pamene ukonza phwando uitane aumphawi, opunduka, otsimphina, akhungu;" 
Luke14:14 ndipo udzakhala wodala; cifukwa iwo alibe cakubwezera iwe mphotho; pakuti idzabwezedwa mphotho pa kuuka kwa oiungama. 
Luke14:15 Ndipo pamene wina wa iwo akuseama pacakudya pamodzi ndi iye anamva izi, anati kwa iye, Wodala iye amene adzadya mkate mu Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke14:16 Koma anati kwa iye, Munthu wina anakonza phwando lalikuru; naitana anthu ambiri;" 
Luke14:17 ndipo anatumiza kapolo wace pa nthawi ya phwando kukanena kwa oitanidwawo, idzani, cifukwa zonse zakonzeka tsopano." 
Luke14:18 Ndipo onse ndi mtima umodzi anayamba kuwiringula. Woyamba anati kwa iye, Ine ndagula munda, ndipo ndiyenera ndituruke kukauona; ndikupempha undilole ine ndisafika." 
Luke14:19 Ndipo anati wina, Ine ndagula ng'ombe za magori asanu, ndipo ndinka kukaziyesa; ndikupempha undilole ine ndisafika." 
Luke14:20 Ndipo anati wina, Ine ndakwatira mkazi, ndipo cifukwa cace sindingathe kudza." 
Luke14:21 Ndipo kapoloyo pakubwera anauza mbuye wace zinthu izi. Pamenepo mwini nyumba anakwiya, nati kwa kapolo wace, Turuka msanga, pita kumakwalala ndi ku njira za mudzi, nubwere nao muno aumphawi ndi opunduka ndi akhungu ndi otsimphina." 
Luke14:22 Ndipo kapoloyo anati, Ambuye, cimene munacilamulira cacitika, ndipo malo atsalapo." 
Luke14:23 Ndipo mbuye ananena kwa kapoloyo, Turuka, nupite kumiseu ndi njira za kuminda, nuwaumirize anthu alowe, kuti nyumba yanga idzale." 
Luke14:24 Pakuti ndinena kwa inu, kuti kulibe mmodzi wa amuna oitanidwa aja adzalawa phwando langa." 
Luke14:25 Ndipo mipingo yambiri ya anthu inamuka naye; ndipo iye anapotoloka, nati kwa iwo." 
Luke14:26 Munthu akadza kwa Ine, wosada atate wace ndi amace, ndi mkazi wace, ndi ana, ndi abale, ndi alongo ace, inde ndi moyo wace womwe wa iye mwini, sakhoza kukhala wophunzira wanga." 
Luke14:27 Ndipo amene ali yense sasenza mtanda wace wa mwini yekha, ndi kudza pambuyo panga, sakhoza kukhala wophunzira wanga," 
Luke14:28 Pakuti ndani wa inu amene akafuna kumanga nsanja yaitali, sathanga wakhala pansi, nawerengera mtengo wace, aone ngati ali nazo zakuimariza?" 
Luke14:29 Kuti kungacitike, pamene atakhazika pansi miyala ya ku maziko ace, osakhoza kuimariza, anthu onse akuyang'ana adzayamba kumseka iye," 
Luke14:30 ndi kunena kuti, Munthu uyu anayamba kumanga, koma sanathe kumariza." 
Luke14:31 Kapena mfumu yanji pakupita kukomana ndi nkhondo ya mfumu inzace, sathanga wakhala pansi, nafunsana ndi akuru ngati akhoza ndi asilikari ace zikwi khumi kulimbana naye wina uja alikudza kukomana naye ndi asilikari zikwi makumi awiri?" 
Luke14:32 Koma ngati sakhoza, atumiza akazembe, pokhala winayo ali kutalitali, nafunsa za mtendere." 
Luke14:33 Cifukwa cace tsono, yense wa inu amene sakaniza zonse ali nazo, sakhoza kukhala wophunzira wanga." 
Luke14:34 Kotero mcere uli wokoma; koma ngati mcere utasukuluka adzaukoleretsa ndi ciani? 
Luke14:35 Suyenera kuuthira pamunda kapena padzala, autaya kunja. Amene ali nao makutu akumva amve." 
Luke15:1 Koma amisonkho onse ndi anthu ocimwa analikumyandikira kudzamva iye. 
Luke15:2 Ndipo Afarisi ndi alembi anadandaula nati, Uyu alandira anthu ocimwa, nadya nao." 
Luke15:3 Koma anati kwa iwo fanizo ili, nanena," 
Luke15:4 Munthu ndani wa inu ali nazo nkhosa makumikhumi, ndipo pakutayika imodzi ya izo, sasiya nanga m'cipululu zinazo makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu zisanu ndi zinai, nalondola yotayikayo kufikira aipeza?" 
Luke15:5 Ndipo pamene adaipeza, aisenza pa mapewa ace wokondwera." 
Luke15:6 Ndipo pakufika kunyumba kwace amema abwenzi ace ndi anansi ace, nanena nao, Kondwerani ndi ine, cifukwa ndinapeza nkhosa yanga yotayikayo." 
Luke15:7 Ndinena kwa inu, kotero kudzakhala cimwemwe Kumwamba cifukwa ca wocimwa mmodzi wotembenuka mtima, koposa anthu olungama makumi asanu ndi anai mphambu asanu ndi anai, amene alibe kusowa kutembenuka mtima." 
Luke15:8 Kapena mkazi wanji ali nazo ndalama zasiliva khumi, ngati itayika imodzi, sayatsa nyali, nasesa m'nyumba yace, nafunafuna cisamalire kufikira akaipeza?" 
Luke15:9 Ndipo m'mene aipeza amema abwenzi ace ndi anansi ace, nanena; Kondwerani ndi ine, cifukwa ndinapeza ndalama ndidatayayo." 
Luke15:10 Comweco, ndinena kwa inu, kuli cimwemwe pamaso pa angelo a Mulungu cifukwa ca munthu wocimwa mmodzi amene atembenuka mtima." 
Luke15:11 Ndipo iye anati, Munthu wina anali ndi ana amuna awiri;" 
Luke15:12 ndipo wamng'onoyo anati kwa atate wace, Atate, ndigawirenitu zanga za pa cuma canu. Ndipo iye anawagawira za moyo wace." 
Luke15:13 Ndipo pakupita masiku owerengekamwana wamng'onoyo anasonkhanitsa zonse, napita ulendo wace ku dziko lakutari; ndipo komweko anamwaza cuma cace ndi makhalidwe a citayiko." 
Luke15:14 Ndipo pamene anatha zace zonse, panakhala njala yaikuru m'dziko muja, ndipo iye anayamba kusowa." 
Luke15:15 Ndipo anamuka nadziphatikiza kwa mfulu imodzi ya dziko lija; ndipo uyu anamtumiza kubusa kwace kukaweta nkhumba. 
Luke15:16 Ndipo analakalaka kukhutitsa mimba yace ndi makoko amene nkhumba rimadya, ndipo palibe munthu anamninkha kanthu." 
Luke15:17 Koma m'mene anakumbukila mumtima, anati, Anchito olipidwa ambiri a atate wanga ali naco cakudya cocuruka, ndipo ine ndionongeke kuno ndi njala?" 
Luke15:18 Ndidzanyamuka ndipite kwa atate wanga, ndipo ndidzanena nave, Atate, ndinacimwira Kumwamba ndi pamaso panu;" 
Luke15:19 sindiyeneranso konse kuchulidwa mwana wanu; mundiyese ine ngati mmodzi wa anchito anu. 
Luke15:20 Ndipo iye ananyamuka, nadza kwa atate wace. Koma pakudza iye kutali, atate wace anamuona, nagwidwa cifundo, nathamanga, namkupatira pakhosi pace, nampsompsonetsa." 
Luke15:21 Ndipo mwanayo anati kwa iye, Atate ndinacimwira Kumwamba ndi pamaso panu, sindiyeneranso konse kuchulidwa mwana wanu." 
Luke15:22 Koma atateyo ananena kwaakapolo ace, Turutsani msanga mwinjiro wokometsetsa, nimumbveke; ndipo mpatseni phete ku dzanja lace ndi nsapato ku apazi ace;" 
Luke15:23 ndipo idzani naye mwana wa ng'ombe wonenepa, mumuphe, ndipo tidye, tisekere;" 
Luke15:24 cifukwa mwana wanga uyu anali wakufa, ndipo akhalanso wamoyo; anali wotayika, ndipo wapezedwa. Ndipo anayamba kusekera." 
Luke15:25 Koma mwana wace wamkuru anali kumunda. Ndipo pakubwera iye ndi kuyandikira kunyumba, anamva kuyimba ndi kubvina." 
Luke15:26 Ndipo anaitana mmodzi wa anayamata, namfunsa, Zinthu izi nzotani?" 
Luke15:27 Ndipo uyu anati kwa iye, Mng'ono wako wafika; ndipo atate wako anapha mwana wa ng'ombe wonenepa, cifukwa anamlandira iye wamoyo." 
Luke15:28 Koma anakwiya, ndipo sanafuna kulowamo, Ndipo atate wace anaturuka namdandaulira." 
Luke15:29 Koma anayankha nati kwa atate wace, Onani, ine ndinakhala kapolo wanu zaka zambiri zotere, ndipo sindinalakwira lamulo lanu nthawi iri yonse; ndipo simunandipatsa ine kamodzi konse mwana wa mbuzi, kuti ndisekere ndi abwenzi anga." 
Luke15:30 Koma pamene anadza mwana wanu uyu, wakutha zamoyo zanu ndi akazi aciwerewere, munamphera iye mwana wa ng'ombe wonenepa." 
Luke15:31 Koma iye ananena nave, Mwana wanga, iwe uli ndine nthawi zonse, ndipo zanga zonse ziri zako." 
Luke15:32 Koma kudayenera kuti tisangalale ndi kukondwerera: cifukwa mng'ono wako uyu anali wakufa ndipo ali ndi moyo; anatayika, ndipo wapezeka." 
Luke16:1 Ndipo iye ananenanso kwa ophunzira ace, Panali munthu mwini cuma, anali ndi kapitao wace; ndipo ameneyu ananenezedwa kwa iye kuti alikumwaza cuma cace." 
Luke16:2 Ndipo anamuitana, nati kwa iye, ici ndi ciani ndikumva za iwe? Undiwerengere za ukapitao wako; pakuti sungathe kukhalabe kapitao." 
Luke16:3 Ndipo kapitao uyu anati mumtima mwace, Ndidzacita ciani, cifukwa mbuye wanga andicotsera ukapitao? kulima ndiribe mphamvu, kupemphapempha kundicititsa manyazi." 
Luke16:4 Ndidziwa cimene ndidzacita, kotero kuti pamene ananditurutsa muukapitao, anthu akandilandire kunyumba kwao." 
Luke16:5 Ndipo anadziitanira mmodzi ndi mmodzi amangawa onse a mbuye wace, nanena kwa woyamba, Unakongola ciani kwa mbuye wanga?" 
Luke16:6 Ndipo anati, Mitsuko ya mafuta zana. Ndipo iye ananena naye, Tenga kalata wako, nukhale pansi msanga, nulembere, Makumi asanu." 
Luke16:7 Pomwepo anati kwa wina, Ndipo iwe uli nao mangawa otani? Ndipo uyu anati, Mitanga ya tirigu zana iye ananena naye, Tenga kalata wako nulembere makumi asanu ndi atatu." 
Luke16:8 Ndipo mbuye wace anatama kapitao wonyengayo, kuti anacita mwanzeru; cifukwa ana a nthawi ya pansi pano ali anzeru m'mbadwo wao koposa ana a kuunika." 
Luke16:9 Ndipo Ine ndinena kwa inu, Mudziyesere nokha abwenzi ndi cuma cosalungama; kuti pamene cikakusowani, iwo akalandire inu m'mahema osatha." 
Luke16:10 Iye amene akhulupirika m'cacing'onong'ono alinso wokhulupirika m'cacikuru; ndipo iye amene ali wosalungama m'cacing'onong'ono alinso wosalungama m'cacikuru. 
Luke16:11 Cifukwa cace ngati simunakhala okhulupirika m'cuma ca cosalungama, adzakhulupirira inu ndani ndi cuma coona?" 
Luke16:12 Ndipo ngati simunakhala okhulupirika ndi zace za wina, adzakupatsani inu ndani za inu eni?" 
Luke16:13 Palibe mnyamata wa m'nyumba akhoza kukhala kapolo wa ambuye awiri; pakuti kapena adzamuda wina, nadzakonda winayo; kapena adzatsata wina, nadzapeputsa winayo. Simungathe kukhala kapolo wa Mulungu ndi wa Cuma." 
Luke16:14 Koma Marisi, ndiwo okonda ndalama, anamva izi zonse; ndipo anamseka." 
Luke16:15 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Inu ndinu odziyesera nokha olungama pamaso pa anthu; koma Mulungu azindikira mitima yanu; cifukwa ici cimene cikuzika mwa anthu ciri conyansa pamaso pa Mulungu." 
Luke16:16 Cilamulo ndi aneneci analipo kufikira pa Yohane; kuyambira pamenepo ulalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino wa Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndipo munthu ali yense akangamira kulowamo." 
Luke16:17 Kuti kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zicoke nkwapafupi, koma kuti kalembo kakang'ono ka cilamulo kagwe nkwapatali." 
Luke16:18 Yense wakusudzula mkazi wace, nakwatira wina, acita cigololo; ndipo iye amene akwatira wosudzulidwayo, acita cigololo," 
Luke16:19 Ndipo panali munthu mwini cuma amabvala cibakuwa ndi nsaru yabafuta, nasekera, nadyerera masiku onse;" 
Luke16:20 ndipo wopemphapempha wina, dzina lace Lazaro, adaikidwa pakhomo pace wodzala ndi zironda," 
Luke16:21 ndipo anafuna kukhuta ndi zakugwa pa gome la mwini cumayo; komatu agarunso anadza nanyambita zirondazace. 
Luke16:22 Ndipo kunali kuti wopemphayo adafa, ndi kuti anatengedwa iye ndi angelo kunka ku cifuwa ca Abrahamu; ndipo mwini cumayo adafanso, naikidwa m'manda." 
Luke16:23 Ndipo m'Hade anakweza maso ace, pokhala nao mazunzo, naona Abrahamu patali, ndi Lazaro m'cifuwa mwace." 
Luke16:24 Ndipo anakweza mau nati, Atate Abrahamu, mundicitire cifundo, mutome Lazaro, kuti abviike nsonga ya cala cace m'madzi, naziziritse lilime langa; pakuti ndizunzidwadi m'lawi ili la moto." 
Luke16:25 Koma Abrahamu anati, Mwana, kumbukila kuti unalandira zokoma zako pakukhala m'moyo iwe, momwemonso Lazaro zoipa; ndipo tsopano iye asangalatsidwa pano, koma iwe uzunzidwadi." 
Luke16:26 Ndipo pamwamba pa izi, pakati pa ife ndi inu pakhazikika phompho lalikuru, kotero kuti iwo akufuna kuoloka kucokera kuno kunka kwa inu sangathe, kapena kucokera kwanuko kuyambuka kudza kwa ife, sangathenso." 
Luke16:27 Koma anati, Pamenepo ndikupemphani, Atate, kuti mumtume ku nyumba ya atate wanga;" 
Luke16:28 pakuti ndirinao abale asanu; awacitire umboni iwo kuti iwonso angadze ku malo ana a mazunzo. 
Luke16:29 Koma Abrahamu anati, Ali ndi Mose ndi aneneri; amvere iwo." 
Luke16:30 Koma anati, lai, Atate Abrahamu, komatu ngati wina akapita kwa iwo wocokera kwa akufa adzasandulika mtima." 
Luke16:31 Koma anati kwa iye, Ngati samvera Mose ndi aneneri, sadzakopeka mtima ngakhale wina akauka kwa akufa." 
Luke17:1 Ndipo anati kwa ophunzira ace, Sikutheka kuti zolakwitsa zisadze; koma tsoka iye amene adza nazo." 
Luke17:2 Kukolowekedwa mwala wamphero m'khosi mwace ndi kuponyedwa Iye m'nyanja nkwapafupi, koma kulakwitsa mmodzi wa ang'ono awa nkwapatali." 
Luke17:3 Kadzicenjerani nokha; akacimwa mbale wako umdzudzule; akalapa, umkhululukire." 
Luke17:4 Ndipo akakucimwira kasanu ndi kawiri pa tsiku lace, nakakutembenukira kasanu ndi kawiri ndi kunena, Ndalapa ine; uzimkhululukira." 
Luke17:5 Ndipo atumwi anati kwa Ambuye, Mutionjezere cikhulupiriro." 
Luke17:6 Koma Ambuye anati, Mukakhala naco cikhulupiriro ngati kambeu kampiru, mukanena kwa mtengo uwu wamkuyu, Uzulidwe, nuokedwe m'nyanja; ndipo ukadamvera inu." 
Luke17:7 Koma ndani mwa inu ali naye kapolo wolima, kapena woweta nkhosa, amene pobwera iye kucokera kumunda adzanena kwa iye, Lowa tsopano, khala pansi kudya;" 
Luke17:8 wosanena naye makamaka, Undikonzere cakudya me, nudzimangire, nunditumikire kufikira ndadya ndi kumwa; ndipo nditatha ine udzadya nudzamwa iwe?" 
Luke17:9 Kodi ayamika kapoloyocifukwa anacita zolamulidwa? 
Luke17:10 Cotero Inunso m'mene mutacita zonse anakulamulirani, Denani, Ife ndife akapolo opanda pace, tangocita zimene tayenera kuzicita." 
Luke17:11 Ndipo kunali, pakumuka ku Yerusalemu iye analikupita pakati pa Samariya ndi Galileya." 
Luke17:12 Ndipo m'mene analowa iye m'mudzi wina, anakomana naye amuna khumi akhate, amene anaima kutali;" 
Luke17:13 ndipo iwo anakweza mau, nanena, Yesu, Mbuye, muticitire cifundo." 
Luke17:14 Ndipo pakuwaona anati kwa iwo, Pitani, kadzionetseni nokha kwa ansembe. Ndipo kunali, m'kumuka kwao, anakonzedwa." 
Luke17:15 Ndipo mmodzi wa iwo, pakuona kuti anaciritsidwa, anabwerera m'mbuyo, nalemekeza Mulungu ndi mau akuru;" 
Luke17:16 ndipo anagwa nkhope yace pansi ku mapazi ace, namyamika iye; ndipo anali Msamariya ameneyo." 
Luke17:17 Ndipo Yesu anayankha nati, Kodi sanakonzedwa khumi? koma ali kuti asanu ndi anai aja?" 
Luke17:18 Akubwera kulemekeza Mulungu sanapezeka mmodzi kodi, koma mlendo uyu?" 
Luke17:19 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Nyamuka, nupite; cikhulupiriro cako cakupulumutsa iwe." 
Luke17:20 Ndipo pamene Afarisi anamfunsa iye, kuti, Ufumu wa Mulungu ukudza liti, anawayarikha, nati, Ufumu wa Mulungu sukudza ndi maonekedwe;" 
Luke17:21 ndipo sadzanena, Taonani uwu, kapena uwo! Pakuti, taonani, Ufumu wa Mulungu uli m'kati mwa inu." 
Luke17:22 Ndipo anati kwa ophunzira ace, Adzadza masiku, amene mudzakhumba kuona limodzi la masiku a Mwana wa munthu, koma simudzaliona." 
Luke17:23 Ndipo adzanena ndi inu, Taonani ilo! taonani ili! musacoka kapena kuwatsata;" 
Luke17:24 pakuti monga mphezi ing'anipa kucokera kwina pansi pa thambo, niunikira kufikira kwina pansi pa thambo, kotero adzakhala Mwana wa munthu m'tsiku lace." 
Luke17:25 Koma ayenera athange wamva zowawa zambiri nakanizidwe ndi mbadwo uno. 
Luke17:26 Ndipo monga kunakhala masiku a Nowa, momwemo kudzakhalanso masiku a Mwana wa munthu." 
Luke17:27 Anadya, anamwa, anakwatira, anakwatiwa, kufikira tsiku lija Nowa analowa m'cingalawa, ndipo cinadza cigumula, niciwaononga onsewo." 
Luke17:28 Monga momwenso kunakhala masiku a Loti; anadya, anamwa, anagula, anagulitsa, anabzala, anamanga nyumba;" 
Luke17:29 koma tsiku limene Loti anaturuka m'Sodoma udabvumba mota ndi sulfure zocokera kumwamba, ndipo zinawaononga onsewo;" 
Luke17:30 momwemo kudzakhala tsiku lakubvumbuluka Mwana wa munthu. 
Luke17:31 Tsikulo iye amene adzakhala pamwamba pa chindwi, ndi akatundu ace m'nyumba, asatsike kuwatenga; ndipo iye amene ali m'munda modzimodzi asabwere ku zace za m'mbuyo." 
Luke17:32 Kumbukilani mkazi wa Loti," 
Luke17:33 iye ali yense akafuna kusunga moyo wace adzautaya, koma iye ali yense akautaya, adzausunga." 
Luke17:34 Ndinena ndi inu, usiku womwewo adzakhala awiri pa kama mmodzi; mmodzi adzatengedwa, ndi wina adzasiyidwa." 
Luke17:35 Padzakhala akazi awiri akupera pamodzi, mmodzi adzatengedwa, ndi wina adzasiyidwa. [" 
Luke17:36 ] 
Luke17:37 Ndipo anayankha nanena kwa iye, Kuti, Ambuye? Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Pamene pali mtembo, pomweponso miimba idzasonkhanidwa." 
Luke18:1 Ndipo anawanenera fanizo lakuti ayenera iwo kupemphera nthawi zonse, osafoka mtima;" 
Luke18:2 nanena, M'mudzi mwakuti munali woweruza wosaopa Mulungu, ndi wosasamala munthu."
