Luke18:3 Ndipo m'mudzimo munali mkazi wamasiye; ndipo anadza kwa iye nanena, Mundiweruzire mlandu pa wotsutsana nane." 
Luke18:4 Ndipo sanafuna nthawi; koma bwino bwino anati mwa yekha, Ndingakhale sindiopa Mulungu kapena kusamala munthu;" 
Luke18:5 koma cifukwa ca kundibvuta ine mkazi wamasiye amene ndidzamweruzira mlandu, kuti angandilemetse ndi kudzaidza kwace." 
Luke18:6 Ndipo Ambuye anati, Tamverani conena woweruza wosalungama." 
Luke18:7 Ndipo kodi Mulungu sadzacitira cilungamo osankhidwa ace akumuitana usana ndi usiku, popeza aleza nao mtima?" 
Luke18:8 Ndinena ndi inu, adzawacitira cilungamo posacedwa. Koma Mwana wa munthu pakudza Iye, vadzapeza cikhulupiriro pa dziko lapansi kodi?" 
Luke18:9 Ndipo anatinso kwa ena amene anadzikhulupirira mwa iwo okha kuti ali olungama, napeputsa onse ena, fanizo ili," 
Luke18:10 Anthu awiri anakwera kunka kukacisi kukapemphera; winayo Mfarisi ndi mnzace wamsonkho. 
Luke18:11 Mfarisiyo anaimirira napemphera izi mwa yekha, Mulungu, ndikuyamikani kuti sindiri monga anthu onse ena, opambapamba, osalungama, acigololo, kapenanso monga wamsonkho uyu;" 
Luke18:12 ndisala cakudya kawiri sabata limodzi; ndipereka limodzi lamagawo khumi la zonse ndiri nazo. 
Luke18:13 Koma wamsonkhoyo alikuima patali sanafuna kungakhale kukweza maso kumwamba, komatu anadziguguda pacifuwa pace nanena, Mulungu, mundicitire cifundo, ine wocimwa." 
Luke18:14 Ndinena ndi inu, anatsikira kunyumba kwace woyesedwa wolungama uyutu, wosati uja ai; pakuti yense wakudzikuza yekha adzacepetsedwa; koma wodzicepetsa yekha adzakulitsidwa." 
Luke18:15 Ndipo anadzanao kwa iye ana amakanda kuti awakbudze; koma pamene ophunzira anaona, anawadzudzula." 
Luke18:16 Koma Yesu anawaitana, nanena, Lolani ana adze kwa Ine, ndipo musawaletse; pakuti Ufumu wa Mulungu uti wa otere." 
Luke18:17 Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Ali yense wosalandira Ufumu wa Mulungu ngati mwana, sadzalowamo ndithu." 
Luke18:18 Ndipo mkuru wina anamfunsa iye, nanena, Mphunzitsi wabwino, ndizicita ciani, kuti ndilowe moyo wosatha?" 
Luke18:19 Koma Yesu anati kwa iye, Undicha Ine wabwino bwanji? palibe wabwino, koma mmodzi, ndiye Mulungu." 
Luke18:20 Udziwa malamulo. Usacite cigololo, Usaphe, Usabe, Usacite umboni wonama, Lemekeza atate wako ndi amako." 
Luke18:21 Koma anati, Izi zonse ndazisunga kuyambira ubwana wanga." 
Luke18:22 Koma m'mene Yesu anamva, anati kwa iye, Usowa cinthu cimodzi: gulitsa ziri zonse uli nazo, nugawire osauka; ndipo udzakhala naco cuma ceni ceni m'Mwamba; ndipo ukadze kuno, unditsate Ine." 
Luke18:23 Koma pakumva izi anagwidwa naco cisoni cambiri; pakuti anali mwini cuma cambiri. 
Luke18:24 Ndipo Yesu pomuona iye anati, Ha! nkubvutika nanga kwa anthu eni cuma kulowa Ufumu wa Mulungu!" 
Luke18:25 Pakuti nkwapafupi kwa ngamila apyole diso la singano koma kwa munthu mwini cuma, kulowa Ufumu wa Mulungu nkwapatali." 
Luke18:26 Koma akumvawo anati, Tsono ndani angathe kupulumutsidwa?" 
Luke18:27 Koma iye anati, Zinthu zosatheka ndi anthu zitheka ndi Mulungu." 
Luke18:28 Ndipo Petro anati, Taonani ife tasiya zathu za ife eni, ndipo takutsatani Inu." 
Luke18:29 Koma anati kwa iwo, Indetu ndinena kwa inu, Palibe munthu wasiya nyumba, kapena mkazi, kapena abale, kapena akumbala, kapena ana, cifukwa ca Ufumu wa Mulungu," 
Luke18:30 koma adzalandira zobwezedwa koposatu m'nthawi yino; ndipo m'nthawi irinkudza moyo wosatha. 
Luke18:31 Ndipo anadzitengera khumi ndi awiriwo, nati kwa iwo, Taonani, tikwera kunkaku Yerusalemu, ndipo zidzakwaniritsidwa kwa Mwana wa munthu zonse zolembedwa ndi aneneri." 
Luke18:32 Pakuti adzampereka kwa amitundu, nadzamseka, nadzamcitira cipongwe, nadzamthira malobvu; ndipo atamkwapula adzamupha iye;" 
Luke18:33 ndipo tsiku lacitatu adzauka. 
Luke18:34 Ndipo sanadziwitsa kanthu ka izi; ndi mau awa adawabisikira, ndipo sanazindikira zonenedwazo." 
Luke18:35 Ndipo kunali, pamene anayandikira ku Yeriko, msaona wina anakhala m'mbali mwa njira, napemphapempha;" 
Luke18:36 ndipo pakumva khamu la anthu alinkupita, anafunsa, ici nciani?" 
Luke18:37 Ndipo anamuuza iye, kuti, Yesu Mnazarayo alinkupita." 
Luke18:38 Ndipo anapfuula, nanena, Yesu, Mwana wa Davine, mundicitire cifundo." 
Luke18:39 Ndipo iwo akutsogolera anamdzudzula iye, kuti akhale cete; koma iye anapfuulitsa cipfuulire, Mwana wa Davine, mundicitire cifundo." 
Luke18:40 Ndipo Yesu anaima, nalamulira kuti abwere naye kwa iye: ndipo m'mene adafika pafupi, anamfunsa iye," 
Luke18:41 Of una ndikucitire ciani? Ndipo anati, Ambuye, kuti ndipenyenso." 
Luke18:42 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Penyanso: cikhulupiriro cako cakupulumutsa iwe." 
Luke18:43 Ndipo pomwepo anapenyanso, namtsata iye, ndi kulemekeza Mulungu: ndipo anthu onse pakuona, anacitira Mulungu mayamiko." 
Luke19:1 Ndipo analowa, napyola pa Yeriko. Ndipo taonani, mwamuna wochedwa dzina lace Zakeyu;" 
Luke19:2 ndipo Iye anali mkulu wa amisonkho, nali wacuma." 
Luke19:3 Ndipo anafuna kuona Yesu ndiye uti, ndipo sana the, cifukwa ca khamulo, pakuti anali wamfupi msinkhu." 
Luke19:4 Ndipo anathamanga, natsogola, nakwera mumkuyu kukamuona iye; pakuti anati apite njira yomweyi." 
Luke19:5 Ndipo m'mene anadza pamalopo Yesu anakweza maso nati kwa iye, Zakeyu, fulumira, nutsike; pakuti lero ndiyenera kukhala m'nyumba mwako." 
Luke19:6 Ndipo anafulumira, natsika, namlandira iye wokondwera." 
Luke19:7 Ndipo m'mene anaciona anadandaula onse, nanena, Analowa amcereze munthu ali wocimwa." 
Luke19:8 Ndipo Zakeyu anaimirira nati kwa Ambuye, Taonani, Ambuye, gawo limodzi la zanga zonse zogawika pakati ndipatsa osauka; ndipo ngati ndalanda kanthu kwa munthu monyenga, ndimbwezera kanai." 
Luke19:9 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iye, Lero cipulumutso cagwera nyumba iyi, popeza iyenso ndiye mwana wa Abrahamu." 
Luke19:10 Pakuti Mwana wa munthu anadza kufunafuna ndi kupulumutsa, cotayikaco." 
Luke19:11 Ndipo pakumva izi iwo, iye anaonjeza nanena fanizo, cifukwa anali iye pafupi pa Yerusalemu, ndipo iwo anayesa kuti Ufumu wa Mulungu ukuti uonekere pomwepo." 
Luke19:12 Pamenepo: anati, Munthu wa pfuko lomveka ananka ku dziko lakutali, kudzilandirira yekha ufumu, ndi kubwerako." 
Luke19:13 Ndipo anaitana akapolo ace khumi, nawapatsa iwo ndalama khumi, nati kwa iwo, Cita nazoni malonda kufikira ndibweranso." 
Luke19:14 Koma mfulu za pamudzi pace zinamuda, nizituma akazembe amtsate m'mbuyo ndi kunena, Ife sitifuna munthuyu akhale mfumu yathu." 
Luke19:15 Ndipo kunali, pakubwera iye, atalandira ufumuwo, anati aitanidwe kwa iye akapolo aja, amene adawapatsa ndalamazo, kuti adziwe umo anapindulira pocita malonda." 
Luke19:16 Ndipo anafika woyamba, nanena, Mbuye ndalama yanu inacita nionjeza ndalama khumi." 
Luke19:17 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Cabwino, kapolo wabwino iwe; popeza unakhala wokhulupirika m'cacing'onong'ono, khala nao ulamuliro pa midzi khumi." 
Luke19:18 Ndipo anadza waciwiri, nanena, Mbuye, ndalama yanu yapindula ndalama zisanu." 
Luke19:19 Ndipo anati kwa iyenso, Khala iwenso woweruza midzi isanu." 
Luke19:20 Ndipo wina anadza, nanena, Mbuye, taonani, siyi ndalama yanu, ndaisunga m'kansaru;" 
Luke19:21 pakuti ndinakuopani, popeza inu ndinu munthu wouma mtima: munyamula cimene simunaciika pansi, mututa cimene simunacifesa." 
Luke19:22 Ananena kwa iye, Pakamwa pako ndikuweruza, kapolo woipa iwe. Unadziwa kuti ine ndine munthu wouma mtima, wonyamula cimene sindinaciika, ndi wotuta cimene sindinacifesa;" 
Luke19:23 ndipo sunapereka bwanji ndalama yanga pokongoletsa, ndipo ine pakudza ndikadaitenga ndi phindu lace?" 
Luke19:24 Ndipo anati kwa iwo akuimirirapo, Mcotsereni ndalamayo, nimuipatse kwa iye wakukhala nazo ndalama khumi." 
Luke19:25 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Mbuye, ali nazo ndalama khumi." 
Luke19:26 Ndinena ndi inu, kuti kwa yense wakukhala naco kudzapatsidwa; koma kwa iye amene alibe kanthu, cingakhale cimene ali naco cidzacotsedwa." 
Luke19:27 Koma adani anga aja osafuna kuti ndidzakhala mfumu yao, bwerani cao kuno, nimuwaphe pamaso panga," 
Luke19:28 Ndipo m'mene adanena izi anawatsogolera nakwera ku Yerusalemu. 
Luke19:29 Ndipo kunali, m'mene anayandikira ku Betefage ndi Betaniya, pa phiri lochedwa la Azitona, anatuma awiri a ophunzira," 
Luke19:30 nati, Mukani ku mudzi uli pandunji panu; m'menemo, polowa, mudzapeza mwana wa buru womangidwa, pamenepo palibe munthu anakwerapo nthawi iri yonse; mummasule iye nimumtenge." 
Luke19:31 Ndipomunthuakati kwa inu, Mummasuliranji? mudzatero naye, Ambuye amfuna iye." 
Luke19:32 Ndipo anacoka otumidwawo, napeza monga adanena kwa iwo." 
Luke19:33 Ndipo pamene anamasula mwana wa buru, eni ace anati kwa iwo, Mumasuliranji mwana wa buru?" 
Luke19:34 Ndipo anati, Ambuye amfuna iye." 
Luke19:35 Ndipo anadzanave kwa Yesu; ndipo anayalika zobvala zao pa mwana wa buruyo, nakwezapo Yesu." 
Luke19:36 Ndipo pakupita iye, anayala zobvala zao m'njira." 
Luke19:37 Ndipo pakuyandikira iye tsono potsetsereka pace pa phiri la Azitona, unyinji wonse wa ophunzira anayamba kukondwera ndi kuyamika Mulungu ndi mau akuru, cifukwa ca nchito zonse zamphamvu anaziona;" 
Luke19:38 nanena, Wolemekezeka Mfumuyo ikudza m'dzina la Ambuye; mtendere m'Mwamba, ndi ulemerero m'Mwambamwamba." 
Luke19:39 Ndipo Afarisi ena a m'khamu la anthu anati kwa iye, Mphunzitsi, dzudzulani ophunzira anu." 
Luke19:40 Ndipo anayankha nati, Ndinena ndi inu, ngati awa akhala cete miyala idzapfuula." 
Luke19:41 Ndipo m'meneanayandikira, anaona mudziwo naulirira," 
Luke19:42 nanena, Ukadazindikira tsiku ili, inde iwetu zinthu za mtendere! koma tsopano zibisika pamaso pako." 
Luke19:43 Pakuti masiku adzakudzera, ndipo adani ako adzakuzingira linga, nadzakuzungulira iwe kwete, nadzakutsekereza ponsepo;" 
Luke19:44 ndipo adzakupasula iwe, ndi ana ako mwa iwe; ndipo sadzasiya mwa iwe mwala wina pa mwala unzace; popeza sunazindikira nyengo, ya mayang'aniridwe ako." 
Luke19:45 Ndipo analowa m'Kacisi, nayamba kuturutsa iwo akugulitsa malonda, nanena nao," 
Luke19:46 Kwalembedwa, Ndipo nyumba yanga idzakhala nyumba yakupemphera; koma inu mwaiyesa iyo phanga la acifwamba." 
Luke19:47 Ndipo analikuphunzitsa m'Kacisi tsiku ndi tsiku. Koma ansembe akulu, ndi alembi ndi akulu a anthu anafunafuna kumuononga iye;" 
Luke19:48 ndipo sanapeza cimene akacita; pakuti anthu onse anamlendewera iye kuti amve. 
Luke20:1 Ndipo kunali lina la masiku awo m'mene iye analikuphunzitsa anthu m'Kacisi, ndi kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino, adamdzera ansembe akulu ndi alembi pamodzi ndi akulu;" 
Luke20:2 ndipo anati, nanena naye, Mutiuze mucita in ndi ulamuliro wotani? Kapena ndani iye amene anakupatsani ulamuliro umene?" 
Luke20:3 Ndipo anayankha, nati kwa iwo, Ndidzakufunsani mau Inenso; mundiuze:" 
Luke20:4 Ubatizo wa Yohane unacokera Kumwamba kodi, kapena kwa anthu?" 
Luke20:5 Ndipo anatsutsana mwa okha, nanena, Ngati tinena ucokera Kumwamba; adzati, Simunamkhulupirira cifukwa ninji?" 
Luke20:6 ndiponso, tikanena, Ucokera kwa anthu; anthu onse adzatiponya miyala: pakuti akopeka mtima, kuti Yohane ali mneneri." 
Luke20:7 Ndipo anayankha kuti sadziwa kumene ucokera. 
Luke20:8 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Ndingakhale Inenso sindikuuzani ulamuliro umene ndicita nao zinthu izi." 
Luke20:9 Ndipo iye anayamba kunena kwa anthu fanizo ili: Munthu analima munda wamphesa, naukongoletsa kwa olima munda, nanka ku dziko lina, nagonerako nthawi yaikuru." 
Luke20:10 Ndipo pa nyengo ya zipatso anatumiza kapolo wace kwa olima mundawo, kuti ampatseko cipatso ca mundawo; koma olimawo anampanda, nambweza wopanda kanthu." 
Luke20:11 Ndipo anatumizanso kapolo wina; ndipo iyenso anampanda, namcitira cipongwe, nambweza, wopanda kanthu." 
Luke20:12 Ndipo anatumizanso wina wacitatu; ndipo iyenso anamlasa, namtaya kunja." 
Luke20:13 Ndipo mwini mundawo anati, Ndidzacita ciani? Ndidzatuma mwana wanga amene ndikondana naye; kapena akamcitira iye ulemu." 
Luke20:14 Koma olimawo, pamene anamuona, anauzana wina ndi mnzace, nati, Uyu ndiye wolowa nyumba; tiyeni timuphe, kuti colowa cace cikhale cathu." 
Luke20:15 Ndipo anamponya kunja kwa mundawo, namupha, Pamenepo mwini munda wamphesawo adzawacitira ciani?" 
Luke20:16 iye adzafika nadzaononga olima munda aja, nadzapatsa munda kwa ena. Ndipo pamene iwo anamva, anati, Musatero iail" 
Luke20:17 Koma iye anawapenyetsa iwo, nati, Nciani ici cinalembedwa, Mwala umene anaukana omanga nyumba, Womwewu unakhala mutu wa pangondya." 
Luke20:18 Munthu yense wakugwa pa mwala uwu, adzaphwanyika; koma iye amene udzamgwera, udzamupha." 
Luke20:19 Ndipo alembi ndi ansembe akuru anafunafuna kumgwira ndi manja nthawi yomweyo; ndipo anaopa anthu; pakuti anazindikira kuti ananenera pa iwo fanizo ili. 
Luke20:20 Ndipo anamyang'anira, natumiza ozonda, amene anadzionetsera ngati olungama mtima, kuti akamkole pa mau ace, kotero kuti akampereke iye ku ukulu ndi ulamuliro wa kazembe." 
Luke20:21 Ndipo anamfunsa iye, nanena, Mphunzitisi, ife tidziwa kuti munena ndi kuphunzitsa kolunjika, ndi kusasamalira nkhope ya munthu, koma muphunzitsa njira ya Mulungu koonadi;" 
Luke20:22 kodi kuloledwa kupereka msonkho kwa Kaisara, kapena iai?" 
Luke20:23 Koma iye anazindikira cinyengo cao, nati kwa iwo," 
Luke20:24 Tandionetsani Ine rupiya latheka. Cithunzithunzi ndi colemba cace nca yani? Anati iwo, Ca Kaisara." 
Luke20:25 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Cifukwa cace perekani kwa Kaisara zace za Kaisara, ndi kwa Mulungu zace za Mulungu." 
Luke20:26 Ndipo sanakhoza kugwira mauwo pamaso pa anthu; ndipo anazizwa ndi kuyankha kwace, nakhala cete." 
Luke20:27 Ndipo anadza kwa iye Asaduki ena, amene amanena kuti palibe kuuka kwa akufa; ndipo anamfunsa iye," 
Luke20:28 nanena, Mphunzitsi, Mose anatilembera ire, kuti mbale wace wa munthu akafa, wokhala ndi mkazi, ndipo ali be mwana iye, mbale wace adzakwatira mkaziyo, nadzamuukitsira mbale wace mbeu." 
Luke20:29 Tsono panali abale asanu ndi awiri; ndipo woyamba anakwatira mkazi, nafa wopanda mwana;" 
Luke20:30 ndipo waciwiri," 
Luke20:31 ndi wacitatu anamtenga mkaziyo; ndipo coteronso asanu ndi awiri onse, sanasiya mwana, namwalira." 
Luke20:32 Pomarizira anamwaliranso mkaziyo. 
Luke20:33 Potero m'kuuka iye adzakhala mkazi wa yani wa iwo? pakuti asanu ndi awiriwo adamkwatira iye. 
Luke20:34 Ndipo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Ana a dziko lapansi akwatira nakwatiwa:" 
Luke20:35 koma iwo akuyesedwa oyenera kufikira dzikolijalo, ndi kuuka kwa akufa, sakwatira kapena kukwatiwa." 
Luke20:36 Pakuti sangathe kufanso nthawi zonse; pakuti afanafana ndi angelo; ndipo ali ana a Mulungu, popeza akhala ana a kuuka kwa akufa." 
Luke20:37 Koma za kuti anthu akufa auka, anasonyeza ngakhale Mose, pa Citsamba cija, pamene iye amchulira Ambuye, Mulungu wa Abrahamu, ndi Mulungu wa Isake, ndi Mulungu wa Yakobo." 
Luke20:38 Ndipo iye sakhala Mulungu wa akufa, koma wa amoyo: pakuti anthu onse akhala ndi moyo kwa iye." 
Luke20:39 Ndipo alembi ena anayankha nati, Mphunzitsi, mwanena bwino." 
Luke20:40 Pakuti sanalimbanso mtima kumfunsa iye kanthu kena. 
Luke20:41 Koma iye anati kwa iwo, Amanena bwanji kuti Kristuyo ndiye mwana wa Davine?" 
Luke20:42 Pakuti Davine yekha anena m'buku la Masalmo, Ambuye ananena kwa Ambuye wanga, Ukhale pa dzanja langa lamanja," 
Luke20:43 Kufikira Ine ndikaika adani ako pansi pa mapazi ako. 
Luke20:44 Cotero Davine anamchula iye Ambuye, ndipo nanga ali mwana wace bwanji?" 
Luke20:45 Ndipo pamene anthu onse anallinkumva iye, anati kwa ophunzira," 
Luke20:46 Cenjerani nao alembi, amene afuna kuyendayenda obvala miinjiro, nakonda kulankhulidwa m'misika, ndi mipando yaulemu m'sunagoge, ndi malo aulemu pamapwando;" 
Luke20:47 amene aononga nyumba za akazi amasiye, ndipo monyenga acita mai pemphero atali; amenewo adzalandira kulanga koposa." 
Luke21:1 Ndipo Yesu anakweza maso, naona anthu eni cuma alikuika zopereka zao mosungiramo ndalama." 
Luke21:2 Ndipo anaona mkazi wina wamasiye waumphawi alikuika momwemo timakobiri tiwiri. 
Luke21:3 Ndipo iye anati, Zoonadi ndinena kwa inu, wamasiye uyu waumphawi anaikamo koposa onse;" 
Luke21:4 pakuti onse amenewa anaika mwa unyinji wao pa zoperekazo; koma iye mwa kusowa kwace anaikamo za moyo wace, zonse anali nazo." 
Luke21:5 Ndipo pamene ena analikunena za Kacisiyo, kuti anakonzeka ndi miyala yokoma ndi zopereka, anati iye," 
Luke21:6 Zinthu izi muziona, adzafika masiku, pamenepo sudzasiyidwa pano mwala pa mwala unzace, umene sudzagwetsedwa." 
Luke21:7 Ndipo iwo anamfunsa iye, nati, Mphunzitsi, nanga zinthu izi zidzaoneka liti? ndipo cizindikilo ndi cianipamene izi ziti zicitike?" 
Luke21:8 Ndipo iye anati, Yang'anirani musasoceretsedwe; pakuti ambiri adzadza m'dzina langa, nadzanena, Ndine amene; ndipo, Nthawi yayandikira; musawatsate pambuyo pao." 
Luke21:9 Ndipo pamene mudzamva za nkhondo ndi mapanduko, musaopsedwa; pakuti ziyenera izi ziyambe kucitika; koma mathedwe sakhala pomwepo." 
Luke21:10 Pamenepo ananena nao, Mtundu wa anthu udzaukira pa mtundu wina, ndipo ufumu pa ufumu wina:" 
Luke21:11 ndipo kudzakhala zibvomezi zazikuru, ndi njala ndi miliri m'malo akutiakuti, ndipo kudzakhala zoopsya ndi zizindikilo zazikuru zakumwamba." 
Luke21:12 Koma zisanacitike izi, anthu adzakuthirani manja, nadzakuzunzani, nadzapereka inu ku masunagoge ndi ndende, nadzamuka nanu kwa mafumu ndi akazembe, cifukwa ca dzina langa." 
Luke21:13 Kudzakhala kwa inu ngati umboni. 
Luke21:14 Cifukwa cace tsimikizani mumtima mwanu, kuti usanafike mlandu musalingirire cimene mudzayankha." 
Luke21:15 Pakuti Ine ndidzakupatsani inu kamwa ndi nzeru, zimene adani anu onse sadzatha kuzikana kapena kuzitsutsa." 
Luke21:16 Koma mudzaperekedwa ngakhale ndi akukubalani, ndi abale, ndi a pfuko lanu, ndi abwenzi anu; ndipo ena a inu adzakuphani," 
Luke21:17 Ndipo anthu onse adzadana ndi inu cifukwa ca dzina langa. 
Luke21:18 Ndipo silidzaonongeka tsitsi limodzi la pamutu panu. 
Luke21:19 Mudzakhala nao moyo wanu m'cipiriro. 
Luke21:20 Koma pamene pali ponse mudzaona Yerusalemu atazingidwa ndi magulu a ankhondo, zindikirani pamenepo kuti cipululutso cace cayandikira." 
Luke21:21 Pamenepo iwo ali m'Yudeya athawire kumapiri, ndi iwo ali m'kati mwa uwo aturuke, ndi iwo ali kumiraga asalowemo." 
Luke21:22 Cifukwa amenewa ndi masiku akubwezera, kuti zonse zidalembedwa zicitike." 
Luke21:23 Koma tsoka iwo akukhala ndi pakati, ndi iwo akuyamwitsa ana masiku awo! pakuti padzakhala cisauko cacikuru padziko, ndi mkwiyo pa anthu awa." 
Luke21:24 Ndipo adzagwa ndi lupanga lakuthwa, nadzagwidwa ndende kunka ku mitundu yonse ya anthu; ndipo mapazi a anthu akunja adzapondereza kufikira kuti nthawi zao za anthu akunja zakwanira." 
Luke21:25 Ndipo kudzakhala zizindikilo pa dzuwa ndi mwezi ndi nyenyezi; ndi pa dziko lapansi cisauko ca mitundu ya anthu, alikuthedwa nzeru pa mkukumo wace wa nyanja ndi mafunde ace;" 
Luke21:26 anthu akukomoka ndi mantha, ndi kuyembekeeera zinthu zirinkudza ku dziko lapansi;" 
Luke21:27 pakuti mphamvu zakumwamba zidzagwedezeka. Ndipo pamenepo adzaona Mwana wa munthu alinkudza mu mtambo ndi mphamvu ndi ulemerero waukuru. 
Luke21:28 Komapoyamba kucitika izi weramukani, tukulani mitu yanu; cifukwa ciomboledwe canu cayandikira." 
Luke21:29 Ndipo ananena nao fanizo; Onani mkuyu, ndi mitengo yonse:" 
Luke21:30 pamene iphukira, muipenya nimuzindikira pa nokha kuti dzinja liri pafupi pomwepo." 
Luke21:31 Inde cotero inunso, pakuona zinthu izi zirikucitika, zindikirani kuti Ufumu wa Mulungu uli pafupi." 
Luke21:32 Indetu ndinena ndinu, Mbadwo uno sudzapitirira, kufikira zonse zitacitika." 
Luke21:33 Kumwamba ndi dziko lapansi zidzapita; koma mau anga sadzapita. 
Luke21:34 Koma mudziyang'anire nokha, kuti kapena mitima yanu ingalemetsedwe ndi madyaidya ndi kuledzera, ndi zosamalira za moyo uno, ndi kuti tsiku ilo lingafikire inu modzidzimutsa ngati msampha;" 
Luke21:35 pakuti Iidzatero ndi kufikira anthu onse akukhala pankhope pa dziko lonse lapansi. 
Luke21:36 Koma inu dikirani nyengo zonse ndi kupemphera, kutimukalimbike kupulumuka zonse zimene zidzacitika, ndi kuimirira pamaso pa Mwana wa munthu." 
Luke21:37 Ndipo usana uli wonse iye analikuphunzitsa m'Kacisi; ndi usiku uli wonse anaturuka, nagona pa phiri lochedwa la Azitona." 
Luke21:38 Ndipo anthu onse analawira mamawa kudza kwa iye kuKacisi kudzamvera Iye. 
Luke22:1 Ndipo phwando la mikate yopanda cotupitsa linayandikira, ndilo lochedwa Paskha." 
Luke22:2 Ndipo ansembe akuru ndi alembi anafunafuna maphedwe ace pakuti anaopa anthuwoo. 
Luke22:3 Ndipo Satana analowa m'Yudase wonenedwa Isikariote, amene anawerengedwa mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo," 
Luke22:4 Ndipo iye anacoka, nalankhulana ndi ansembe akulu ndi akazembe mompereka iye kwa iwo." 
Luke22:5 Ndipo anakondwera, napangana naye kumpatsa ndalama." 
Luke22:6 Ndipo iye anabvomera, nafunafuna nthawi yabwino yakumpereka iye kwa iwo, pakalibe khamu la anthu." 
Luke22:7 Ndipo tsiku la mikate yopanda cotupitsa linafika, limene inayenera kuphedwa nsembe ya Paskha." 
Luke22:8 Ndipo iye anatumiza Petro ndi Yohane, nati, Pitanimutikonzere ife Paskha, kuti tidye." 
Luke22:9 Ndipo iwo ananena naye, Mufuna tikakonzere kuti?" 
Luke22:10 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Onani, mutalowa m'mudzi, adzakomana ndinu munthu alikusenza mtsuko wa madzi; mumtsate ameneyo kunyumba kumene akalowako iye." 
Luke22:11 Ndipo mukanene kwa mwini nyumbayo, Mphunzitsi anena nawe, Cipinda ca alendo ciri kuti, m'mene ndikadye Paskha pamodzi ndi ophunzira anga?" 
Luke22:12 Ndipo iyeyo adzakuonetsani cipinda cacikuru capamwamba, cokonzeka; mukakonzere kumeneko." 
Luke22:13 Ndipo anapita iwo, napeza monga adatero nao; ndipo anakonza Paskha." 
Luke22:14 Ndipo itadza nthawi yace, iye anakhala pacakudya, ndi ophunzira pamodzi ndi iye." 
Luke22:15 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndinalakalaka ndithu kudya Paskha uwu pamodzi ndinu, ndisanayambe kusautsidwa;" 
Luke22:16 pakuti ndinena ndi inu, sindidzadya kufikira udzakwaniridwa mu Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Luke22:17 Ndipo analandira cikho, ndipo pamene adayamika, anati, Landirani ici, mucigawane mwa inu nokha;" 
Luke22:18 pakuti ndinena kwa inu, kuyambira tsopano Ine sindidzamwako cipatso ca mpesa, kufikira Ufumu wa Mulungu udzafika." 
Luke22:19 Ndipo m'mene adatenga mkate, nayamika, anaunyema, nawapatsa, nanena, ici ndi thupi langa lopatsidwa cifukwa ca inu; citani ici cikumbukilo canga." 
Luke22:20 Ndipo coteronso cikho, atatha mgonero, nanena, Cikho ici ndi pangano latsopano m'mwazi wanga wothiridwa cifukwa ca inu." 
Luke22:21 Koma onani, dzanja lace la iye amene adzandipereka ali pagome pano pamodzi ndi Ine." 
Luke22:22 Pakuti Mwana wa munthu amukatu, monga kunaikidwiratu; koma tsoka munthuyo amene ampereka!" 
Luke22:23 Ndipo anayamba kufunsana mwa iwo okha, ndiye yani mwa iwo amene adzacita ici." 
Luke22:24 Ndipo kunakhala kutsutsana mwa iwo, ndani wa iwo ayesedwe wamkuru." 
Luke22:25 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mafumu a anthu a mitundu awacitira ufumu; ndipo iwo amene awacitira ulamuliro anenedwa, Ocitira zabwino." 
Luke22:26 Koma sipadzatero ndi inu; komatu iye ali wamkuru mwa inu, akhale ngati wamng'ono; ndi iye ali woyamba, akhale ngati wotumikira." 
Luke22:27 Pakuti wamkuru ndani, iye wakuseama pacakudya kapena wakutumikirapo? si ndiye wakuseama pacakudya kodi? koma Ine ndiri pakati pa inu monga ngati wotumikira." 
Luke22:28 Koma inu ndinuamene munakhala ndi Ine cikhalire m'mayesero anga; 
Luke22:29 ndipo Ine ndikuikirani ufumu, monganso Atate wanga anandiikira Ine, kuti mukadye ndi kumwa kugome kwanga mu Ufumu wanga;" 
Luke22:30 ndipo mudzakhala pa mipando yacifumu ndi kuweruza mafuko khumi ndi awiri a Israyeli. 
Luke22:31 Simoni, Simoni, taona, Satana anafunsa akutengeni kuti akupeteni ngati tirigu;" 
Luke22:32 koma ndinakupempherera kuti cikhulupiriro cako cingazime; ndipo iwe, pamene watembenuka ukhazikitse abale ako." 
Luke22:33 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ambuye, ndiripo ndikapite ndi Inu kundende ndikuimfa." 
Luke22:34 Ndipo iye anati, Ndikuuza iwe, Petro, sadzalira tambala lero lino kufikira udzakana katatu kuti sundidziwa Ine." 
Luke22:35 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Pamene ndinakutumizani opanda thumba la ndalama, ndi thumba la kamba, ndi nsapato, munasowa kanthu kodi? Anati iwo, Iai." 
Luke22:36 Ndipo anati kwaiwo, Koma tsopano, iye amene ali ndi thumba la ndalama, alitenge, ndi thumba la kamba lomwe; ndipo amene alibe, agulitse copfunda cace, nagule lupanga," 
Luke22:37 Pakuti ndinena ndi inu, cimene cidalembedwa ciyenera kukwanitsidwa mwa Ine, Ndipo anawerengedwa ndi anthu opanda lamulo; pakuti izi za kwa Ine ziri naco cimariziro." 
Luke22:38 Ndipo iwo anati, Ambuye, taonani, malupanga awir siwa. Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Cakwa nira." 
Luke22:39 Ndipo iye anaturuka, napita monga adafucita, ku phiri la Azitona ndi ophunzira anamtsata iye." 
Luke22:40 Ndipo pofika pomwepo, anati kwa iwo, Pempherani kuti mungalowe m'kuyesedwa." 
Luke22:41 Ndipo anapatukana nao kutalika kwace ngan kuponya mwala, nagwada pansi napemphera," 
Luke22:42 nati, Atate, mukafuna Inu, cotsani cikho ici pa Ine; koma si kufuna kwanga ai, komatu kwanu kucitike." 
Luke22:43 Ndipo anamuonekera iye 1 mngelo wa Kumwamba namlimbitsa iye. 
Luke22:44 Ndipo 2 pokhala iye m'cipsinjo mtima anapemphera kolimba koposa ndithu: ndi thukuta lace linakhala ngati madontho akuru a mwazi alinkugwa pansi. 
Luke22:45 Ndipo pamene ananyamuka pakupemphera anadza kwa ophunzira, nawapeza ali m'tulo ndi cisoni," 
Luke22:46 ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mugoneranji? Ukani, 3 pempherani kuti mungalowe m'kuyesedwa." 
Luke22:47 Pamene iye anali cilankhulire, taonani, khamu la anthu, ndipo iye wochedwa Yudase, mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, anawatsogolera; nayandikira Yesu kumpsompsona iye." 
Luke22:48 Koma Yesu anati kwa iye, Yudase, ulikupereka Mwana wa munthu ndi cimpsompsono kodi?" 
Luke22:49 Ndipo m'mene iwo akumzinga iye anaona cimene citi cicitike, anati, Ambuye, tidzakantha ndi lupanga kodi?" 
Luke22:50 Ndipo wina wa iwo 4 anakantha kapolo wa mkuru wa ansembe, namdula khutu lace lamanja." 
Luke22:51 Koma Yesu anayankha nati, Lolani kufikira kumene. Ndipo anakhudza khutu lace, namciritsa." 
Luke22:52 Ndipo 5 Yesu anati kwa ansembe akulu ndi akapitao a Kacisi, ndi akuru, amene anadza kumgwira iye, Munaturuka ndi malupanga ndi mikunkhu kodi monga ngati kugwira wacifwamba?" 
Luke22:53 Masiku onse, pamene ndinali ndi inu m'Kacisi, simunatansa manja anu kundigwira: koma 6 nyengo yino ndi yanu, ndipo ulamuliro wa mdima ndi wanu." 
Luke22:54 Ndipo 7 pamenepo anamgwira iye, napita naye, nalowa m'nyumba ya mkulu wa ansembe. Koma Petro anatsata kutari." 
Luke22:55 Ndipo 8 pamene adasonkha mota m'kati mwa bwalo, nakhala pansi pamodzi, Petro anakhala pakati pao." 
Luke22:56 Ndipo mdzakazi anamuona iye alikukhala m'kuwala kwace kwa moto, nampenyetsa iye, nati, Munthu uyunso anali naye." 
Luke22:57 Koma anakana, nati, Mkaziwe, sindimdziwa iye." 
Luke22:58 Ndipo 9 popita kamphindi, anamuona wina, nati, Iwenso uli mmodzi wa awo. Koma Petro anati, Munthu iwe, sindine." 
Luke22:59 Ndipo 10 patapita ngati ora limodzi, wina ananenetsa, kuti, Zoonadi, munthu uyunso anali naye, pakuti ndiye Mgalileya." 
Luke22:60 Koma Petro anati, Munthu iwe, sindidziwa cimene ucinena, Ndipo pomwepo, iye ali cilankhulire, tambala analira." 
Luke22:61 Ndipo Ambuye anapotoloka, nayang'ana Petro. Ndipo 11 Petra anakumbukila mau a Ambuye, kuti anati kwa iye, 12 Asanalire tambala lero lino, udzandikana Ine katatu." 
Luke22:62 Ndipo anaturuka, nalira misozi ndi kuwawa mtima." 
Luke22:63 Ndipo amuna amene analikusunga Yesu anamnyoza iye, nampanda." 
Luke22:64 Ndipo anamkulunga iye m'maso, namfunsa, nati, Talota; anakupanda Iwe ndani?" 
Luke22:65 Ndipo zambiri zina anamnenera iye, namcitira mwano." 
Luke22:66 Ndipo 13 pamene kunaca, bungwe la akuru a anthu linasonkhana, ndiwo ansembe akuru ndi alembi; ndipo anapita naye ku bwalo lao, nanena, 14 Ngati uli Kristu, utiuze." 
Luke22:67 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Ndikakuuzani, simudzabvomereza;" 
Luke22:68 ndipo ndikakufunsani kanthu, simudzayankha." 
Luke22:69 Koma 15 kuyambira tsopano Mwana wa munthu adzakhala pa dzanja lamanja la mphamvu ya Mulungu. 
Luke22:70 Ndipo onse anati, Umo mtero, muli Mwana wa Mulungu kodi? Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, 16 Munena kuti ndine." 
Luke22:71 Ndipo iwo anati, 17 Tifuniranjinso mboni? pakuti ife tokha tinamva m'kamwa mwa iye mwini." 
Luke23:1 Ndipo khamu lonselo Iinanyamuka kupita naye kwa Pilato. 
Luke23:2 Ndipo anayamba kumnenera iye, kuti, Tinapeza munthu uyu alikupandutsa anthu a mtundu wathu, ndi kuwaletsa kupereka msonkho kwa Kaisara, nadzinenera kuti iye yekha ndiye Kristu mfumu." 
Luke23:3 Ndipo Pilato anamfunsa iye, nanena, Kodindiwe mfumu ya Ayuda? Ndipo iye anamyankha nati, Mwatero." 
Luke23:4 Ndipo Pilato anati kwa ansembe akuru ndi makamu a anthu, Ndiribe kupeza cifukwa ca mlandu ndi munthu uyu." 
Luke23:5 Koma iwo anapunda kunena kuti, Amautsa anthuwo, naphunzitsa m'Yudeya lonse, kuyambira ku Galileya ndi kufikira kuno komwe." 
Luke23:6 Koma pamene Pilato anamva, anafunsa ngati munthuyu ali Mgalileya." 
Luke23:7 Ndipo m'mene anadziwa kuti ali wa m'ulamuliro wace wa Herode, anamtumiza iye kwa Herode, amene anali iye mwini ku Yerusalemu masiku awa," 
Luke23:8 Ndipo Herode, pamene anaona Yesu, anakondwa ndithu; pakuti anayamba kale kufuna kumpenya iye, cifukwa anamva za iye; nayembekeza kuona cizindikilo cina cocitidwa ndi iye." 
Luke23:9 Ndipo anamfunsa iye mau ambiri; koma iye sanamyankha kanthu. 
Luke23:10 Ndipo ansembe akuru ndi alembi anaimirira, namnenera iye kolimba." 
Luke23:11 Ndipo Herode ndi asilikari ace anampeputsa iye, namnyoza, nambveka iye copfunda conyezimira, nambwezera kwa Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Ndipo Herode ndi Pilato anaci-I tana cibwenzi tsiku lomwelo; pakuti kale anadana. 
Luke23:13 Ndipo Pilato anaitana ansembe akuru, ndi akuru, ndi anthu, asonkhane," 
Luke23:14 nati kwa iwo, Munadza kwa ine ndi munthu uyu ngati munthu wakupandutsa anthu: ndipo taonani, Ine ndinamfunsa za mlanduwu pamaso panu, ndipo sindinapeza pa munthuyu cifukwa ca zinthu zimene mumnenera;" 
Luke23:15 inde, nga khale Herode yemwe; pakuti iye anambwezera iye kwa ife; ndipo taonani, sanacita iye kanthu kakuyenera kufa." 
Luke23:16 Cifukwacace ndidzamkwapula ndi kununasula iye. [ 
Luke23:17 ] 
Luke23:18 Koma iwo onse pamodzi anapfuula, nati, Cotsani munthu uyu, mutimasulire Baraba;" 
Luke23:19 ndiye munthu anaponyedwa m'ndende cifukwa ca mpanduko m'mudzi ndi ca kupha munthu. 
Luke23:20 Ndipo Pilato analankhulanso nao, nafuna kumasula Yesu;" 
Luke23:21 koma iwo anapfuula, nanena, Mpacikeni, mpacikeni pamtanda." 
Luke23:22 Ndipo anati kwa iwo nthawi yacitatu, Nanga munthuyu anacita coipa ciani? Sindinapeza cifukwa ca kufera iye; cotero ndidzamkwapula iye ndi kummasula." 
Luke23:23 Koma anakakamiza ndi mau okweza, napempha kuti iye apacikidwe, Ndipo mau ao analakika." 
Luke23:24 Ndipo Pilato anaweruza kuti cimene alikufunsa cicitidwe. 
Luke23:25 Ndipo anawamasulira amene adaponyedwa m'ndende cifukwa ca mpanduko ndi kupha munthu, amene iwo anampempha; koma anapereka Yesu mwa cifuniro cao." 
Luke23:26 Ndipo popita naye, anagwira munthu, Simoni wa ku Kurene, alikucokera kuminda, namsenza iye mtanda aunyamule pambuyo pace pa Yesu," 
Luke23:27 Ndipo unamtsata unyinji waukuru wa anthu, ndi wa akazi amene anadziguguda pacifuwa, namlirira iye." 
Luke23:28 Koma Yesu anawapotolokera nati, Ana akazi inu a Yerusalemu, musandilirire Ine, koma mudzilirire nokha ndi ana anu." 
Luke23:29 Cifukwa taonani masiku alinkudza, pamene adzati, Odala ali ouma ndi mimba yosabala, ndi mawere osayamwitsa." 
Luke23:30 Pomwepo adzayamba kunena kwa mapiri, Igwani pa ife; ndi kwa zitunda, Bisani ife." 
Luke23:31 Pakuti ngati azicitira izi mtengo wauwisi, nanga kudzatani ndi wouma?" 
Luke23:32 Ndipo analinso awiri ena, ndiwo ocita zoipa; anatengedwa pamodzi ndi iye kuti aphedwe." 
Luke23:33 Ndipo pamene anafika ku malo dzina lace Bade, anampacika iye pamtanda pomwepo, ndi ocita zoipa omwe, mmodzi ku dzanja lamanja ndi wina kulamanzere." 
Luke23:34 Ndipo Yesu ananena, Atate, muwakhululukire iwo, pakuti sadziwa cimene acita. Ndipo anagawana zobvala zace, poyesa maere." 
Luke23:35 Ndipo anthu anaima alikupenya, Ndi akurunso anamlalatira iye nanena, Anapulumutsa ena; adzipulumutse yekha ngati iye ndiye Kristu wa Mulungu, wosankhidwa wace." 
Luke23:36 Ndipo asilikarinso anamnyoza, nadza kwa iye, nampatsa vinyo wosasa," 
Luke23:37 nanena, Ngati Iwe ndiwe Mfumu ya Ayuda, udzipulumutse wekha." 
Luke23:38 Ndipo kunalinso lembo pamwamba pace, ndilo: UYU NDIYE MFUMU YAAYUDA." 
Luke23:39 Ndipo mmodzi wa ocita zoipa anapacikidwawo anamcitira iye mwano nanena, Kodi suli Kristu Iwe? udzipulumutse wekha ndi ife." 
Luke23:40 Koma winayo anayankha, namdzudzula iye, nati, Kodi suopa Mulungu, poona uli m'kulangika komweku?" 
Luke23:41 Ndipo ifetu kuyenera; pakuti tirikulandira zoyenera zimene tinazicita: koma munthu uyu sanacita kanthu kolakwa. 
Luke23:42 Ndipo ananena, Yesu, ndikumbukileni m'mene mulowa Ufumuwanu." 
Luke23:43 Ndipo Iye ananena naye, Indetu, ndinena ndi iwe, Lero lino udzakhala ndine m'Paradaiso." 
Luke23:44 Ndipo ora lace pamenepo linali ngati lacisanu ndi cimodzi. Ndipo panali mdima pa dziko lonse kufikira ora lacisanu ndi cinai, ndipo dzuwa linada." 
Luke23:45 Ndipo nsaru yocinga ya m'Kacisi inang'ambika pakati. 
Luke23:46 Ndipo pamene Yesu anapfuula ndi mau akuru, anati, 1 Atate, m'manja mwanu ndipereka mzimu wanga. Ndipo pakutero anapereka mzimu wace." 
Luke23:47 Ndipo 2 pamene kenturiyo anaona cinacitikaco, analemekeza Mulungu, nanena, Zoonadi munthu uyu anali wolungama." 
Luke23:48 Ndipo makamu onse osonkhana kudzapenya ici, pamene anaona zinacitikazo, anapita kwao ndi kudziguguda pacifuwa." 
Luke23:49 Ndipo 3 omdziwa iye onse, ndi akazi amene adamtsata kucokera ku Galileya, anaima kutari, naona zinthu izi." 
Luke23:50 Ndipo taonani, munthu dzina lace Yosefe, ndiye mkuru wa mirandu, munthu wabwino ndi wolungama" 
Luke23:51 (amene sanabvomereza kuweruza kwao ndi nchito yao) wa ku Arimateya, mudzi wa Ayuda, ndiye woyembekezera Ufumu wa Mulungu," 
Luke23:52 yemweyo anapita kwa Pilato napempha mtembo wace wa Yesu. 
Luke23:53 Ndipo 4 anautsitsa, naukulunga m'nsaru yabafuta, nauika m'manda osemedwa m'mwala, m'menemo sanaika munthu ndi kale lonse." 
Luke23:54 Ndipo panali tsiku lokonzera, ndi Sabata linayandikira." 
Luke23:55 Ndipo 5 akazi, amene anacokera naye ku Galileya, anatsata m'mbuyo, naona manda, ndi maikidwe a mtembo wace." 
Luke23:56 Ndipo anapita kwao, 6 nakonza zonunkhira ndi mafuta abwino. Ndipo pa Sabata anapumula 7 monga mwa lamulo." 
Luke24:1 Koma tsiku loyamba la sabata, mbanda kuca, anadza kumanda atatenga zonunkhira adazikonza." 
Luke24:2 Ndipo anapeza mwala unakunkhunizidwa kuucotsa pamanda. 
Luke24:3 Ndipo m'mene analowa sanapeza mtembo wa Ambuye Yesu. 
Luke24:4 Ndipo kunali, m'mene anathedwa nzeru naco, taonani amuna awiri anaimirira pafupi pao atabvala zonyezimira;" 
Luke24:5 ndipo m'mene anakhala ndi mantha naweramira pansi nkhope zao, anati kwa iwo, Mufuniranji wamoyo pa akufa?" 
Luke24:6 Palibe kuno iye, komatu anauka; kumbukilani muja adalankhula nanu, pamene analinso m'Galileya," 
Luke24:7 ndi kunena, kuti, Mwana wa munthu ayenera kuperekedwa m'manja a anthu ocimwa, ndi kupacikidwa pamtanda, ndi kuuka tsiku lacitatu." 
Luke24:8 Ndipo anakumbukila mau ace, nabwera kucokera kumanda," 
Luke24:9 nafotokozera zonse khumi ndi mmodziwo, ndi otsala onse omwe." 
Luke24:10 Koma panali Mariya wa Magadala, ndi Y ohana, ndi Mariya amace wa Yakobo, ndi akazi ena pamodzi nao amene ananena izi kwa atumwiwo." 
Luke24:11 Ndipo mau awa anaoneka pamaso pao ngati nkhani zacabe, ndipo sanamvera akaziwo." 
Luke24:12 Koma Petro ananyamuka nathamangira kumanda, ndipo powerama anaona nsaru zoyera pa zokha; ndipo anacoka nanka kwao, nazizwa ndi cija cidacitikaco." 
Luke24:13 Ndipo taonani, awiri a mwa iwo analikupita tsiku lomwelo kumudzi dzina lace Emau, wosiyana ndi Yerusalemu mastadiya makumi asanu ndi limodzi." 
Luke24:14 Ndipo iwowa anakambirana nkhani za izi zonse zidacitika. 
Luke24:15 Ndipo kunali m'kukambirana kwao ndi kufunsana, Yesu mwini anayandikira, natsagana nao." 
Luke24:16 Koma maso ao anagwidwa kuti asamzindikire iye. 
Luke24:17 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mau awa ndi otani mulandizanawo poyendayenda? Ndipo anaima ndi nkhope zao zacisoni." 
Luke24:18 Ndipo mmodzi wa iwo, dzina lace Kleopa, anayankha nati kwa iye, Kodi iwe wekha ndiwe mlendo m'Yerusalemu ndi wosazindikira zidacitikazi masiku omwe ano?" 
Luke24:19 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Zinthu zanji? Ndipo anati kwa iye, lzi za Yesu Mnazarene, ndiye munthu mneneri wamphamvu m'nchito, ndi m'mau, pamaso pa Mulungu ndi anthu onse;" 
Luke24:20 ndikuti ansembe akulu ndi akulu athu anampereka iye ku ciweruziro ca imfa, nampacika iye pamtanda." 
Luke24:21 Ndipo tinayembekeza ife kuti iye ndiye wakudzayo kudzaombola Israyeli, Komatunso, pamodzi ndi izi zonse lero ndilo tsiku lacitatu kuyambira zidacitika izi." 
Luke24:22 Komatu akazi enanso a mwa ife anatidabwitsa, ndiwo amene analawirira kumanda;" 
Luke24:23 ndipo m'mene sanapeza mtembo wace, anadza, nanena kuti adaona m'masomphenya angelo, amene ananena kuti ali ndi moyo iye." 
Luke24:24 Ndipo ena a iwo anali nafe anacoka kunka kumanda, napeza monga momwe akazi adanena; koma Iyeyo sanamuona." 
Luke24:25 Ndipo iye anati kwa iwo, Opusa inu, ndiozengereza mtima kusakhulupirira zonse adazilankhula aneneri!" 
Luke24:26 Kodi sanayenera Kristu kumva zowawa izi, ndi kulowa ulemerero wace?" 
Luke24:27 Ndipo anayamba kwa Mose, ndi kwa aneneri onse, nawatanthauzira iwo m'malembo onse zinthu za iye yekha." 
Luke24:28 Ndipo anayandikira ku mudzi umene analikupitako; ndipo anacita ngati anafuna kupitirira. 
Luke24:29 Ndipo anamuumiriza iye, nati, Khalani ndi ife; pakuti kuli madzulo, ndipo dzuwa lapendekatu, Ndipo analowa kukhala nao." 
Luke24:30 Ndipo kunali m'mene iye anaseama nao pacakudya, anatenga mkate, naudalitsa naunyema, napatsa iwo." 
Luke24:31 Ndipo maso ao anatseguka, ndipo anamzindikira iye; ndipo anawakanganukira iye, nawacokera." 
Luke24:32 Ndipo anati wina kwa mnzace, Mtima wathu sunali wotentha m'kati mwathu nanga m'mene analankhula nafe m'njira, m'mene anatitseguliramalembo?" 
Luke24:33 Ndipo ananyamuka nthawi yomweyo nabwera ku Yerusalemu, napeza khumi ndi mmodziwo, ndi iwo anali nao atasonkhana pamodzi," 
Luke24:34 nanena, Ambuye anauka ndithu, naonekera kwa Simoni." 
Luke24:35 Ndipo iwo anawafotokozera za m'njira, ndi umo anadziwika nao m'kunyema kwa mkate." 
Luke24:36 Ndipo pakulankhula izi iwowa, iye anaimirira pakati pao; nanena nao, Mtendere ukhale nanu." 
Luke24:37 Koma anaopsedwandi kucita mantha, 1 nayesa alikuona mzimu." 
Luke24:38 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Mukhala bwanji obvutika? ndipo matsutsano am auka bwanji m'mtima mwanu?" 
Luke24:39 Penyani manja anga ndi mapazianga, kuti Ine ndine mwini: 2 ndikhudzeni, ndipo penyani; pakuti mzimu ulibe, mnofu ndi mafupa, monga muona ndirinazo Ine." 
Luke24:40 Ndipo m'mene ananena ici, anawaonetsera iwo manja ace ndi mapazi ace." 
Luke24:41 Koma pokhala iwo cikhalire osakhulupirira cifukwa ca cimwemwe, nalikuzizwa, anati kwa iwo, 3 Muli nako kanthu kakudya kuno?" 
Luke24:42 Ndipo anampatsa iye cidutsu ca nsomba yokazinga. 
Luke24:43 Ndipo 4 anacitenga, nacidya pamaso pao." 
Luke24:44 Ndipo anati kwa iwo, 5 Awa ndi mauwo ndinalankhula nanu, paja ndinakhala ndi inu, kuti ziyenera kukwanitsidwa zonse zolembedwa za Ine m'cilamulo ca 6 Mose, ndi aneneri, ndi masalmo." 
Luke24:45 Ndipo 7 anawatsegulira mitima yao, kuti adziwitse malembo;" 
Luke24:46 ndipo anati kwa iwo, 8 Kotero kwalembedwa, kuti Kristu amve zowawa, nauke kwa akufa tsiku lacitatu;" 
Luke24:47 ndi kuti kulalikidwe m'dzina lace kulapa ndi 9 kukhululukidwa kwa macimo kwa 10 mitundu yonse, kuyambira ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke24:48 11 Inu ndinu mboni za izi. 
Luke24:49 Ndipo onani, 12 Ine nditumiza pa inu lonjezano la Atate wanga; koma khalani inu m'mudzi muno, kufikira mwabvekedwa ndi mphamvu yocokera Kumwamba." 
Luke24:50 Ndipo anaturuka nao kufikira ku Betaniya; nakweza manja ace, nawadalitsa." 
Luke24:51 Ndipo kunali, 13 pakuwadalitsa iye analekana nao, natengedwa kunka Kumwamba." 
Luke24:52 Ndipo 14 anamlambira iye, nabwera ku Yerusalemu ndi cimwemwe cacikuru;" 
Luke24:53 ndipo IS anakhala ci khalire m'Kacisi, nalikuyamika Mulungu, Amen." 
John1:1 PACIYAMBI panali Mau, ndipo Mau anali kwa Mulungu, ndipo Mau ndiye Mulungu." 
John1:2 Awa anali paciyambi kwa Mulungu," 
John1:3 Zonse: zinalengedwa ndi iye; ndipo kopanda iye sikunalengedwa kanthu kali konse kolengedwa," 
John1:4 Mwa iye munali moyo; ndi moyowu unali kuunika kwa anthu. 
John1:5 Ndipo kuunikaku kunawala mumdima; ndi mdimawu sunakuzindikira. 
John1:6 Kunali munthu, wotumidwa ndi Mulungu, dzina lace ndiye Yohane." 
John1:7 Iyeyu anadza mwa umboni kudzacita umboni za kuunikaku, kuti onse akakhulupirire mwa iye," 
John1:8 iye sindiye kuunikaku, koma anatumidwa kukacita umboni wa kuunikaku." 
John1:9 Uku ndiko kuunika kweni kweni, kumene kuunikira anthu onse akulowa m'dziko lapansi." 
John1:10 Anali m'dziko lapansi, ndi dziko linalengedwa ndi iye, koma dziko silinamzindikira iye." 
John1:11 Anadza kwa zace za iye yekha, ndipo ace a mwini yekha sanamlandira iye." 
John1:12 Koma onse amene anamlandira iye, kwa iwo anapatsa mphamvu yakukhala ana a Mulungu, kwa iwotu, akukhulupirira dzina lace;" 
John1:13 amene sanabadwa ndi mwazi, kapena ndi cifuniro ca thupi, kapena ndi cifuniro ca munthu, koma ca Mulungu." 
John1:14 Ndipo Mau anasandulika thupi, nakhazikika pakati pa ife, ndipo tinaona ulemerero wace, ulemerero wonga wa wobadwa yekha wa Atate, wodzala ndi cisomo ndi coonadi." 
John1:15 Yohane acita umboni za iye, napfuula nati, Uyu ndiye amene ndinanena za iye, Wakudzayo pambuyo panga analipo ndisanabadwe ine; cifukwa anakhala woyamba wa ine." 
John1:16 Cifukwa mwa kudzala kwace tinalandira ife tonse, cisomo cosinthana ndi cisomo." 
John1:17 Cifukwa cilamulo cinapatsidwa mwa Mose; cisomo ndicoonadi zinadza mwa Yesu Kristu. 
John1:18 Kulibe munthu anaona Mulungu nthawi zonse; Mwana wobadwa yekha wakukhala pa cifuwa ca Atate, Iyeyu anafotokozera." 
John1:19 Ndipo umene ndiwo umboni wa Yohane, pamene Ayudaanatuma kwa iye ansembe ndi alembi a ku Yerusalemu akamfunse iye, Ndiwe yani?" 
John1:20 Ndipo anabvomera, wosakana; nalola kuti, Sindine Kristu." 
John1:21 Ndipo anamfunsa iye, Nanga bwanji? ndiwe Eliya kodi? Nanena iye, Sindine iye, Ndiwe Mneneriyo kodi? Nayankha, Iai." 
John1:22 Cifukwa cace anati kwa iye, Ndiwe yani? kuti tibwezere mau kwa iwo anatituma ife. Unena ciani za iwe wekha?" 
John1:23 Anati, 1 Ndine mau a wopfuula m'cipululu, Lungamitsani njira ya Mbuye, monga anati Yesaya mneneriyo." 
John1:24 Ndipo otumidwawo analia kwa Marisi. 
John1:25 Ndipo anamfunsa iye, nati kwa iye, Koma ubatiza bwanji, ngati suli Kristu, kapena Eliya, kapena Mneneriyo?" 
John1:26 Yohane anawayankha, nati, 2 Ine ndibatiza ndi madzi; pakati pa inu paimirira amene simumdziwa," 
John1:27 3 ndiye wakudza pambuyo panga, amene sindiyenera kummasulira lamba la nsapato yace." 
John1:28 Zinthu izi zinacitika m'Betaniya tsidya lija la Y ordano, pomwe analikubatiza Yohane." 
John1:29 M'mawa mwace anaona Yesu alinkudza kwa iye, nanena, 4 Onani Mwanawankhosa wa Mulungu 5 amene acotsa cimo lace la dziko lapasi!" 
John1:30 6 Ndiye amene ndinati za iye, Pambuyo panga palinkudza munthu amene analipo ndisanabadwe ine; pakuti anali woyamba wa ine." 
John1:31 Ndipo sindinamdziwa iye; koma kuti aonetsedwe kwa Israyeli, 7 cifukwa ca ici ndinadzaine kudzabatiza ndi madzi." 
John1:32 Ndipo Yohane anacita umboni, nati, 8 Ndinaona Mzimu alikutsika kucokera Kumwamba monga nkhunda; nakhalabe pa iye." 
John1:33 Ndipo sindinamdziwa iye, koma wonditumayo kudzabatiza ndi madzi, Iyeyu ananena ndi ine, Amene udzaona Mzimu atsikira, nakhala pa iye, 9 yemweyu ndiye wakubatiza ndi Mzimu Woyera." 
John1:34 Ndipo ndaona ine, ndipo ndacita umboni kuti Mwana wa Mulungu ndi Yemweyu." 
John1:35 M'mawa mwacenso analikuimirira Yohane ndi awiri a akuphunzira ace; 
John1:36 ndipo poyang'ana Yesu alikuyenda, anati, 10 Onani Mwanawankhosa wa Mulungu!" 
John1:37 Ndipo akuphunzira awiriwo anamva iye alinkulankhula, natsata Yesu." 
John1:38 Koma Yesu anaceuka, napenya iwo alikumtsata, nanena nao, Mufuna ciani? Ndipo anati kwa iye, Rabi (ndiko kunena posandulika, Mphunzitsi), mukhala kuti?" 
John1:39 Nanena nao, Tiyeni, mukaone, Pamenepo anadza naona kumene anakhala; nakhala ndi iye tsiku lomwelo; panali monga ora lakhumi." 
John1:40 Andreya mbale wace wa Simoni Petro anali mmodzi wa awiriwo, anamva Yohane, namtsata iye." 
John1:41 Anayamba iye kupeza mbale wace yekha Simoni, nanena naye, Tapeza ife Mesiya (ndiko kusandulika Kristu)." 
John1:42 Anadza naye kwa Yesu. M'mene anamyang'ana iye, anati, Uli Simoni mwana wa Yohane; 11 udzachedwa Kefa (ndiko kusandulika Petro)." 
John1:43 M'mawa mwace anafuna kuturuka kunka ku Galileya, napeza Filipo, Ndipo Yesu ananena naye, Tsata Ine." 
John1:44 Koma Filipo anali wa ku Betsaida, mudzi wa Andreya ndi Petro." 
John1:45 Filipo anapeza Natanayeli, nanena naye, iye 12 amene Mose analembera za iye m'cilamulo, ndi aneneri, tampeza, ndiye Yesu mwana wa Yosefe wa ku Nazarete." 
John1:46 Natanayeli anati kwa iye, 13 Ku Nazarete nkutha kucokera kanthu kabwino kodi? Filipo ananena naye, Tiye ukaone." 
John1:47 Yesu anaona Natanayeli alinkudza kwa iye, nanena za iye, Onani, M-israyeli ndithu, mwa iye mulibe cinyengo!" 
John1:48 Natanayeli ananena naye, Munandidziwira kuti? Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Asanakuitane Filipo, pokhala iwe pansi pa mkuyu paja, ndinakuona iwe." 
John1:49 Natanayeli anayankha Iye, Rabi, 14 Inu ndinu Mwana wa Mulungu, 15 ndinu Mfumu ya Israyeli," 
John1:50 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Cifukwa ndinati kwa iwe kuti ndinakuona pansi pa mkuyu ukhulupirira kodi? udzaona zoposa izi." 
John1:51 Ndipo ananena naye, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi Inu, 16 Mudzaona thambo lotseguka, ndi angeloa Mulungu akwera natsikira pa Mwana wa munthu." 
John2:1 Ndipo tsiku lacitatu pariali ukwati m'Kana wa m'Galileya; ndipo amace wa Yesu anali komweko. 
John2:2 Ndipo Yesu yemwe ndi akuphunzira ace anaitanidwa ku ukwatiwo. 
John2:3 Ndipo pakutha vinyo, amace wa Yesu ananena naye, Alibe vinyo," 
John2:4 Yesu nanena naye, Mkazi, ndiri ndi ciani ndi inu? nthawi yanga siinafike." 
John2:5 Amace ananena kwa atumiki, Cimene ciri conse akanena kwa inu, citani." 
John2:6 Ndipopanali pamenepo mitsuko yamiyala isanu ndi umodzi yoikidwako monga mwa mayeretsedwe a Ayuda, yonse ya miyeso iwiri kapena itatu." 
John2:7 Yesu ananena nao, Dzazani mitsukoyo ndi madzi. Naidzaza, nde nde nde." 
John2:8 Ndipo ananena nao, Tungani tsopano, mupite nao kwamkulu wa phwando. Ndipo anapita nao." 
John2:9 Koma pamene mkuluyo analawa madzi osanduka vinyowo, ndipo sanadziwa kumene anacokera (koma atumiki amene adatiinga madzi anadziwa), mkuluyo anaitana mkwati," 
John2:10 nanena naye, Munthu ali yense amayamba kuika vinyo wokoma; ndipo anthu atamwatu, pamenepo wina wosakoma; koma iwe wasunga vinyo wokoma kufikira tsopano lino." 
John2:11 Ciyambi ici ca zizindikilo zace Yesu anacita m'Kana wa m'Galileya naonetsera ulemerero wace; ndipo akuphunzira ace anakhulupirira iye. 
John2:12 Zitapita izianatsikira ku Kapemao, iye ndi amace, ndiabale ace, ndi ophunzira ace; nakhala komweko masiku owerengeka." 
John2:13 Ndipo Paskha wa Ayuda unayandikira, ndipo Yesu anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
John2:14 Ndipo anapeza m'Kacisiiwo akugulitsa ng'ombe ndi nkhosa ndi nkhunda, ndi akusinthana ndalama alikukhala pansi." 
John2:15 Ndipo pamene adapanga mkwapulo wazingwe, anaturutsa onse m'Kacisimo, ndi nkhosa ndi ng'ombe; nakhuthula ndalama za osinthanawo, nagubuduza magome;" 
John2:16 nati kwa iwo akugulitsa nkhunda, Cotsani izi muno; musamayesa nyumba ya Atate wanga nyumba ya malonda." 
John2:17 Akuphunzira ace anakumbukila kuti kunalembedwa, Cangu ca pa nyumba yanu candidya ine." 
John2:18 Cifukwa cace Ayuda anayankha nati kwa iye, Mutionetsera ife cizindikilo canji, pakuti mucita izi?" 
John2:19 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Pasulani kacisi uyu, ndipo masiku atatu ndidzamuutsa." 
John2:20 Pamenepo Ayuda anati, Zaka makumi anai ndi zisanu ndi cimodzi analimkumanga Kacisiyu, kodi inu mudzamuutsa masiku atatu?" 
John2:21 Koma iye analikunena za kacisi wathupi lace. 
John2:22 Cifukwa cace atauka kwa akufa, akuphunzira ace anakumbukira kuti ananena ici; ndipo anakhulupirira colemba, ndi mau amene Yesu ananena." 
John2:23 Koma pamene anali m'Yerusalemu pa Paskha paphwando, ambiri anakhulupirira dzinalace, pakuona zizindikilo zace zimene anaeitazi." 
John2:24 Koma Yesu sanakhulupirira iwo kuti akhale nao, cifukwa iye anadziwa anthu onse," 
John2:25 ndipo sanasowa wina acite umboni za munthu; pakuti anadziwa iye yekha cimene cinali mwa munthu. 
John3:1 Koma panali munthu wa Afarisi, dzina lace Nikodemo, mkulu wa Ayuda," 
John3:2 Iyeyu anadza kwa Yesu usiku, nati kwa iye, Rabi, tidziwa kuti Inu ndinu mphunzitsi wocokera kwa Mulungu; pakuti palibe munthu akhoza kucita zizindikilo zimene inu mucita, ngati Mulungu sakhala naye," 
John3:3 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi iwe, Ngati munthu sabadwa mwatsopano, sakhoza kuona Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
John3:4 Nikodemoananena kwa iye, Munthu akhoza bwanji kubadwa atakalamba? Kodi akhoza kulowanso m'mimba ya amace ndi kubadwa?" 
John3:5 Yesu anayankha, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi iwe, Ngati munthu sabadwa mwa madzi ndi Mzimu, sakhoza kulowa ufumu wa Mulungu." 
John3:6 Cobadwa m'thupi cikhala thupi, ndipo cobadwa mwa Mzimu, cikhala mzimu." 
John3:7 Usadabwe cifukwa ndinati kwa iwe, Uyenera kubadwa mwatsopano." 
John3:8 Mphepo iomba pomwe ifuna, ndipo ukumva mau ace, komavsudziwa, kumene icokera, ndi kumene imuka; cotero ali yense wobadwa mwa Mzimu." 
John3:9 Nikodemo anayankha nati kwa iye, Izi zingatheke bwanji?" 
John3:10 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Kodi uli mphunzitsi wa Israyeli, ndipo sudziwa izi?" 
John3:11 Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa iwe, Tilankhula cimene ticidziwa, ndipo ticita umboni za cimene taeiona; ndipo umboni wathu simuulandira." 
John3:12 Ngati ndakuuzani za pansi pano, ndipo simukhulupira, mudzakhulupira bwanji, ngati ndikuuzani za Kumwamba?" 
John3:13 Ndipo kulibe munthu anakwera Kumwamba, koma iye wotsikayo kucokera Kumwamba, ndiye Mwana wa munthu, wokhala m'Mwambayo." 
John3:14 Ndipo monga Mose anakweza njoka m'cipululu, cotero Mwana wa munthu ayenera kukwezedwa;" 
John3:15 kuti yense wakukhulupira akhale nao moyo wosatha mwa iye. 
John3:16 Pakuti Mulungu anakonda dziko lapansi kotero, kuti anapatsa Mwana wace wobadwa yekha, kuti yense wakukhulupirira iye asatayike, koma akhale nao moyo wosatha." 
John3:17 Pakuti Mulungu sanatuma Mwana wace ku dziko lapansi, kuti akaweruze dziko lapansi, koma kuti dziko lapansi likapulumutsidwe ndi iye." 
John3:18 Wokhulupirira Iye saweruzidwa; wosakhulupira waweruzidwa ngakhale tsopano, cifukwa sanakhulupirira dzina la Mwana wobadwa yekha wa Mulungu." 
John3:19 Koma ciweruziro ndi ici, kuti kuunika kunadza ku dziko lapansi, ndipo anthu anakonda mdima koposa kuunika; pakuti nchito zao zinali zoipa." 
John3:20 Pakuti yense wakucita zoipa adana nako kuunika, ndipo sakudza kwa kuunika, kuti zingatsutsidwe nchito zace." 
John3:21 Koma wocita coonadi adza kukuunika, kuti nchito zace zionekere kuti zinacitidwa mwa Mulungu." 
John3:22 Zitapita in anadza Yesu ndi akuphunzira ace ku dziko la Yudeya; ndipo pamenepo anatsotsa nao pamodzi, nabatiza." 
John3:23 Ndipo Yohane analinkubatiza m'Ainoni pafupi pa Salemu, cifukwa panali madzi ambiri pamenepo; ndipo analinkufikako anthu, nalinkubatizidwa." 
John3:24 Pakuti Yohane sanaikidwe m'ndende. 
John3:25 Pamenepo padauka kufunsana mwa ophunzira ace a Yohane ndi Myuda za mayeretsedwe. 
John3:26 Ndipo anadza kwa Yohane, nati kwa iye, Rabi, Iye amene anali ndi inu tsidya lija la Y ordano, amene munamcitira umboni, taonani yemweyu abatiza, ndipo anthu onse alinkudza kwa iye." 
John3:27 Yohane anayankha nati, Munthu sakhoza kulandira kanthu, ngati sikapatsidwa kwa iye kocokera Kumwamba." 
John3:28 Inu nokha mundicitira umboni, kuti ndinati, Sindine Kristu, koma kuti ndiri wotumidwa m'tsogolo mwace mwa iye." 
John3:29 Iye amene ali naye mkwatibwi ali mkwati, koma mnzace wa mkwatiyo, wakuimirira ndi kumvera iye, akondwera kwakukuru cifukwa ca mau a mkwatiyo; cifukwa cace cimwemwe canga cimene cakwanira." 
John3:30 Iyeyo ayenera kukula koma ine ndicepe. 
John3:31 Iye wocokera Kumwamba ali woposa onse; iye amene ali wa dziko lapansi ali wa dziko lapansi, nalankhula za dziko lapansi: Iye wocokera Kumwamba ali woposa onse." 
John3:32 Cimene anaciona nacimva, acita umboni wa ici comwe; ndipo kulibe munthu alandira umboni wace." 
John3:33 1 Iye amene analandira umboni wace anaikapo cizindikilo cace kuti Mulungu ali woona. 
John3:34 Pakuti 2 Iye amene Mulungu anamtuma alankhula mau a Mulungu; pakuti 3 sapatsa Mzimu ndi muyeso. 
John3:35 4 Atate akonda Mwana, nampatsa zinthu zonse m'dzanja lace." 
John3:36 Iye amene akhulupirira Mwanayo ali nao moyo wosatha; koma iye amene sakhulupirira Mwanayo sadzaona moyo, koma mkwiyo wa Mulungu ukhala pa iye." 
John4:1 Cifukwa cace pamene Ambuye anadziwa kuti Afarisi adamva kuti Yesu anayesa anthu ophunzira, nawabatiza koposa Yohane" 
John4:2 (angakhale Yesu sanabatiza yekha koma ophunzira ace)," 
John4:3 anacokera ku Yudeya, namukanso ku Galileya." 
John4:4 Ndipo anayenerakupita pakati pa Samariya. 
John4:5 Cifukwa cace anadza ku mudzi wa Samariya, dzina lace Sukari, pafupi pa kadziko kamene Yakobo adapatsa mwana wace Yosefe;" 
John4:6 ndipo pamenepo panali citsime ca Yakobo. Ndipo Yesu, popeza analema ndi ulendo wace, motero anakhala pacitsime," 
John4:7 Kunali ngati ora lacisanu ndi cimodzi. Kunadza mkazi woturuka m'Samariya kudzatunga madzi. Yesu ananena naye, Undipatse Ine ndimwe." 
John4:8 Pakuti ophunzira ace adacoka kunka kumudzi kuti akagule cakudya. 
John4:9 Pamenepo mkazi wa m'Samariya ananena ndi iye, Bwanji Inu, muli Myuda, mupempha kwa ine kumwa, ndine mkazi Msamariya? (pakuti Ayuda sayenderana nao Asamariya)," 
John4:10 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Ukadadziwa mtulo wa Mulungu, ndi Iye amene alinkunena ndi iwe, Undipatse Ine ndimwe; ukadapempha iye, ndipo akadakupatsa madzi amoyo." 
John4:11 Mkaziyo ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, mulibe cotungira madzi, ndi citsime ciri cakuya; ndipo mwatenga kuti madzi amoyo?" 
John4:12 kodi muli wamkuru ndi atate wathu Yakobo amene anatipatsa ife citsimeci, namwamo iye yekha, ndi ana ace, ndi zoweta zace?" 
John4:13 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Yense wakumwako madzi awa adzamvanso Iudzu;" 
John4:14 koma iye wakumwa madzi amene Ine ndidzampatsa sadzamva ludzu nthawi zonse; koma madzi amene Ine ndidzampatsa adzakhala mwa iye kasupe wa madzi otumphukira ku moyo wosatha. 
John4:15 Mkaziyo ananena kwa iye, Ambuye, ndipatseni madzi amene, kuti ndisamve ludzu, kapena ndisadze kuno kudzatunga." 
John4:16 Yesu ananena kwa iye, Muka, kamuitane mwamuna wako, nudze kuno." 
John4:17 Mkazi anayankha nati kwa iye, Ndiribe mwamuna. Yesu ananena naye, Wanena bwino, kuti mwamuna ndiribe;" 
John4:18 pakuti wakhala nao amuna asanu; ndipo iye amene ukhala nave tsopano sali mwamuna wako; ici wanena zoona. 
John4:19 Mkazi ananena ndi iye, Ambuye, ndizindikira kuti muli Mneneri." 
John4:20 Makolo athu analambira m'phiri ili; ndipo inu munena, kuti m'Yerusalemu muli malo ozenera kulambiramo anthu." 
John4:21 Yesu ananena naye, Tamvera Ine, mkazi iwe, kuti ikudza nthawi, imene simudzalambira Atate kapena m'phiri ili, kapena m'Yerusalemu." 
John4:22 Inu mulambira cimene simucidziwa; ife tilambira cimene ticidziwa; pakuti cipulumutso cicokera kwa Ayuda. 
John4:23 Koma ikudza nthawi, ndipo tsopano iripo, imene olambira oona adzalambira Atate mumzimu ndi m'coonadi; pakuti Atate afuna otere akhale olambira ace." 
John4:24 Mulungu ndiye mzimu; ndipo omlambira iye ayenera kumlambira mumzimu ndi m'coonadi. 
John4:25 Mkazi ananena ndi Iye, Ndidziwa kuti Mesiya adza (wochedwa Kristu): akadzadza Iyeyu, adzatiuza zonse." 
John4:26 Yesu ananena naye, Ine wakulankhula nawe ndine amene." 
John4:27 Ndipo pamenepo anadza ophunzira ace; nazizwa kuti analinkulankhula ndi mkazi; koma panalibe wina anati, Mufuna ciani? kapena, mulankhula naye ciani?" 
John4:28 Pamenepo mkazi anasiya mtsuko wace, namuka kumudzi, nanena ndi anthu," 
John4:29 Tiyeni, mukaone munthu, amene anandiuza zinthu ziri zonse ndinazicita: ameneyu sali Kristu nanga?" 
John4:30 Anaturuka iwo m'mudzi ndipo analinkudza kwa iye. 
John4:31 Pa mphindikati iyi ophunzira ace anampempha iye, ndi kunena, Rabi, idyani." 
John4:32 Koma iye anati kwa iwo, Ine ndiri naco cakudya cimene inu simucidziwa." 
John4:33 Cifukwa cace ophunzira ananena wina ndi mnzace, Kodi pali wina anamtengera iye kanthu kakudya?" 
John4:34 Yesu ananena nao, Cakudya canga ndico kuti ndicite cifuniro ca iye amene anandituma Ine, ndi kutsiriza nchito yace." 
John4:35 Kodi simunena inu, kuti, Yatsala miyezi inai, ndipo kudza kumweta? Onani ndinena kwa inu, Kwezani maso anu, nimuyang'ane m'minda, kuti mwayera kale kufikira kumweta." 
John4:36 Wakumweta alandira kulipira, nasonkhanitsira cobala ku moyo wosatha; kuti wofesayo akakondwere pamodzi ndi womwetayo." 
John4:37 Pakuti m'menemo conenaco ciri coona, Wofesa ndi wina, womweta ndi winanso." 
John4:38 Ine ndinatuma inu kukamweta cimene simunagwirirapo nchito: ena anagwira nchito, ndipo inu mwalowa nchito yao." 
John4:39 Ndipo m'mudzi mula anthu Asamariya ambiri anamkhulupirira iye cifukwa ca mau a mkazi, wocita umboniyo, kuti, Anandiuza ine zinthu ziri zonse ndinazicita." 
John4:40 Cifukwa cace pamene Asamariya anadza kwa iye, anamfunsa akhale nao; ndipo anakhala komweko masiku awiri." 
John4:41 Ndipo ambiri oposa anakhulupira cifukwa ca mau ace: 
John4:42 ndipo ananena kwa mkazi, kuti, Tsopano sitikhulupira cifukwa ca kulankhula kwako: pakuti tamva tokha, ndipo tidziwa kuti Mpulumutsi wa dziko lapansi ndi Iyeyu ndithu." 
John4:43 Koma atapita masiku awiriwo anacoka komweko kunka ku Galileya. 
John4:44 Pakuti Yesu mwini anacita umboni kuti, Mneneri alibe ulemu m'dziko la kwao." 
John4:45 Cifukwa cace pamene anadza ku Galileya, Agalileva anamlandira iye, atakaona zonse zimene anazicita m'Yerusalemu paphwando; pakuti iwonso ananka kuphwando." 
John4:46 Cifukwa cace Yesu anadzanso ku Kana wa m'Galileya, kumene anasandutsa madzi vinyo. Ndipo kunalimkulu wina wa mfumu, mwana wace anadwala m'Kapernao." 
John4:47 Iyeyu, pamene anamva kuti Yesu wacokera ku Yudeya nafika ku Galileya, ananka kwa iye, nampempha kuti atsike kukaciritsa mwana wace; pakuti anali pafupi imfa." 
John4:48 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa iye, Ngati simuona zizindikilo ndi zozizwa, simudzakhulupira." 
John4:49 Mkuluyo ananena kwa iye, Ambuye, tsikani asanafe mwana wanga." 
John4:50 Yesu ananena naye, Muka, mwana wako ali ndi moyo, Munthuyo anakhulupirira mau amene Yesu anatero naye, namuka." 
John4:51 Ndipo m'mene analikutsika, akapolo ace anakomana, naye, nanena, kuti, Mwana wanu ali ndi moyo." 
John4:52 Cifukwa cace anawafunsa ora lace anayamba kuciralo. Pamenepo anati kwa iye, kuti, Dzulo, ora lacisanu ndi ciwiri malungo anamsiya." 
John4:53 Cifukwa cace atateyo anadziwa kuti ndi ora lomwelo limene Yesu anati kwa iye, Mwana wako ali ndi moyo; ndipo anakhulupira iye yekha ndi a pa banja lace onse." 
John4:54 Ici ndi cizindikilo caciwiri Yesu anacita, ataeokera ku Yudeya, ndi kulowa m'Galileya." 
John5:1 Zitapita izi panali phwando la Ayuda; ndipo Yesu anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu. 
John5:2 Koma pali thamanda m'Yerusalemu pa cipata ca nkhosa, lochedwa m'Cihebri Betesda, liri ndi makumbi asanu." 
John5:3 M'menemo munagona khamu lalikuru la anthu odwala akhungu, opunduka miyendo, opuwala. [" 
John5:4 ] 
John5:5 Koma panali munthu wina apo, ali m'kudwala kwace zaka makumi atatu kudza zisanu ndi zitatu." 
John5:6 Yesu, pakuona ameneyo alikugona, ndipo anadziwa kuti anatero nthawi yaikuru pamenepo, ananena naye, Ufuna kuciritsidwa kodi?" 
John5:7 Wodwalayo anayankha, Ambuye, ndiribe wondibvika ine m'thamanda, pali ponse madzi abvundulidwa; koma m'mene ndirinkudza ine, wina atsika ndisanatsike ine." 
John5:8 Yesu ananena naye, Tauka, yalula mphasa yako, nuyende," 
John5:9 Ndipo pomwepo munthuyu anacira, nayalula mphasa yace, nayenda. Koma tsiku lomwelo linali la Sabata." 
John5:10 Cifukwa cace Ayuda ananena kwa wociritsidwayo, Ndi Sabata, ndipo sikuloledwa kwa iwe kuyalula mphasa yako." 
John5:11 Koma iyeyu anayankha iwo, iye amene anandiciritsa, yemweyu anati kwa ine, Yalula mphasa yako, nuyende," 
John5:12 Anamfunsa, Munthuyo ndani wonena ndi iwe, Yalula mphasa yako, nuyende?" 
John5:13 Koma wociritsidwayo sanadziwa ngati ndani; pakuti Yesu anacoka kacetecete, popeza panali anthu aunyinji m'malo muja." 
John5:14 Zitapita izi Yesu anampeza m'Kacisi, nati kwa iye, Taona, waeiritsidwa; usacimwenso, kuti cingakugwere ecipa coposa." 
John5:15 Munthuyo anacoka, nauza Ayuda, kuti ndiye Yesu amene adameiritsa." 
John5:16 Ndipo cifukwa ca ici Ayuda analondalonda Yesu, popeza anacita izo dzuwa la Sabata." 
John5:17 Koma Yesu anayankha iwo, Atate wanga amagwira nchito kufikira tsopano, lnenso ndigwira nchito." 
John5:18 Cifukwa ca ici Ayuda anaonjeza kufuna kumupha, si cifukwa ca kuswa dzuwa la Sabata kokha, komatu amaehanso Mulungu Atate wace wa iye yekha; nadziyesera wolingana ndi Mulungu." 
John5:19 Pamenepo Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, sakhoza Mwana kucita kanthu pa yekha, koma cimene aona Atate acicita, ndico. Pakuti zimene iye azicita, zomwezo Mwananso azicita momwemo." 
John5:20 Pakuti Atate akonda Mwana, namuonetsa zonse azicita yekha: ndipo adzamuonetsa nchito zoposa izi, kuti mukazizwe," 
John5:21 Pakuti monga Atate aukitsa akufa, nawapatsa moyo, momwemonso Mwanaapatsa moyo iwo amene iye afuna." 
John5:22 Pakuti Atate saweruza munthu ali yense, koma anapereka kuweruza konse kwa Mwana;" 
John5:23 kuti onse akalemekeze Mwana, monga alemekeza Atate. Wosalemekeza Mwana salemekeza Atate amene anamtuma iye." 
John5:24 Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, kuti iye wakumva mau anga, ndi kukhulupirira iye amene anandituma Ine, ali nao moyo wosatha, ndipo salowa m'kuweruza, koma wacokera kuimfa, nalowa m'moyo." 
John5:25 Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, kuti ikudza nthawi, ndipo Iripo tsopano, imene akufa adzamva mau a Mulungu; ndipo iwo akumva adzakhala ndi moyo." 
John5:26 Pakuti monga Atate ali ndi moyo mwa iye yekha, momwemonso anapatsa kwa Mwana kukhala ndi moyo mwa iye yekha;" 
John5:27 ndipo anampatsa iye mphamvu ya kucita mlandu, pakuti ali Mwana wa munthu." 
John5:28 Musazizwe ndi ici, kuti ikudza nthawi, imene onse ali m'manda adzamva mau ace," 
John5:29 nadzaturukira, amene adacita zabwino, kukuuka kwa moyo; koma amene adacita zoipa kukuuka kwa kuweruza." 
John5:30 Sindikhoza kucita kanthu kwa Ine ndekha; monga momwe ndimva ndiweruza; ndipo maweruzidwe anga ali olungama; cifukwa kuti sinditsata cifuniro canga, koma cifuniro ca Iye ondituma Ine." 
John5:31 Ngati ndicita umboni wa Ine ndekha, umboni wanga suli woona." 
John5:32 Wocita umboni wa Ine ndi wina; ndipo ndidziwa kuti umboni umene iye andicitira Ine uli woona. 
John5:33 Inu munatuma kwa Yohane, ndipo iye anacitira umboni coonadi." 
John5:34 Ndipo Ine sindilandira umboni kwa munthu: koma ndinena izi, kuti inu mukapulumutsidwe." 
John5:35 Iyeyo anali nyali yoyaka ndi yowala; ndipo inu munafuna kukondwera m'kuunika kwace kanthawi. 
John5:36 Koma Ine ndiri nao umboni woposa wa Yohane; pakuti nchito zimene Atateanandipatsa ndizitsirize, nchito zomwezo ndizicita zindicitira umboni, kuti Atate anandituma Ine." 
John5:37 Ndipo Atate wonditumayo, 1 Iyeyu wandicitira Ine umboni. Simunamva mau ace konse, kapena maonekedwe ace simunaona." 
John5:38 Ndipo mulibe mau ace okhala mwa inu; cifukwa kuti amene Iyeyu anatuma, inu simumkhulupirira ameneyo." 
John5:39 2 Musanthula m'malembo, popeza muyesa kuti momwemo muli nao moyo wosatha; ndipo akundicitira Ine umboni ndi iwo omwewo;" 
John5:40 ndipo 3 simufuna kudza kwa Ine, kuti mukhale nao moyo." 
John5:41 4 Ulemu sindiulandira kwa anthu. 
John5:42 Koma ndikudziwani inu, kuti mulibe cikondiea Mulungu mwa inu nokha." 
John5:43 Ndadza Ine m'dzina la Atate wanga, ndipo simundilandira Ine; akadza wina m'dzina lace la iye mwini, iyeyu mudzamlandira." 
John5:44 Mungathe inu bwanji kukhulupira, 5 popeza mulandira ulemu wina kwa mnzace ndipo ulemu wakucokera kwa Mulungu yekha simuufuna?" 
John5:45 Musayesa kuti Ine ndidzakunenezani inu kwa Atate; 6 pali wakukunenezani, ndiye Mose, amene inu mumtama." 
John5:46 Pakuti mukadakhulupirira Mose, mukadakhulupirira Ine; 7 pakuti iyeyu analembera za Ine." 
John5:47 Koma ngati simukhulupirira malembo a iyeyu, mudzakhulupirira bwanji mau anga?" 
John6:1 Zitapita izi anacoka Yesu kunka ku tsidya lija la nyanja ya Galileya, ndiyo ya Tiberiya," 
John6:2 Ndipo khamu lalikuru la anthu linamtsata iye, cifukwa anaona zizindikilo zimene anacita pa odwala." 
John6:3 Koma Yesu anakwera kuphiri, nakhala pansi komweko pamodzi ndi akuphunzira ace." 
John6:4 Ndipo Paskha, phwando la Ayuda, anayandikira." 
John6:5 Pamenepo Yesu, pokweza maso ace, ndi kuona kuti khamu lalikuru lirinkudza kwa iye, ananena kwa Filipo, Tidzagula kuti mikate kuti adye awa?" 
John6:6 Koma ananena ici kuti amuyese; pakuti anadziwa yekha cimene adzacita. 
John6:7 Filipo anayankha iye, Mikate ya marupiya atheka mazana awiri siikwanira iwo, kuti yense atenge pang'ono." 
John6:8 Mmodzi wa akuphunzira ace, Andreya, mbale wace wa Simoni Petro, ananena ndi Iye," 
John6:9 Pali mnyamata pano, amene ali nayo mikate isanu yabarele, ndi tinsomba tiwiri; koma nanga izi zifikira bwanji ambiri otere?" 
John6:10 N ati Yesu, Akhalitseni anthu pansi, Ndipo panali udzu wambiri pamalopo, Pamenepo amunawo anakhala pansi, kuwerenga kwao monga zikwi zisanu." 
John6:11 Pomwepo Yesu anatenga mikateyo; ndipo pamene adayamika, anagawira iwo akukhala pansi; momwemonso ndi tinsomba, monga momwe iwo anafuna." 
John6:12 Ndipo pamene adakhuta, Iyeananena kwa akuphunzira ace, Sonkhanitsani makombo kuti kasatayike kanthu." 
John6:13 Pomwepo anasonkhanitsa, nadzaza mitanga khumi ndi iwiri ndi makombo a mikate isanuyo yabarele, amene anatsalira anadyawo." 
John6:14 Cifukwa cace, anthu, poona cizindikilo cimene anacita, ananena, kuti, Ameneyo ndiye mneneri ndithu wakudzayom'dziko lapansi." 
John6:15 Pamenepo Yesu, pozindikira kuti alikufuna kudza kudzamgwira iye, kuti amlonge ufumu, anacokanso kunka kuphiri pa yekha." 
John6:16 Koma pofika madzulo, akuphunzira ace anatsikira kunyanja;" 
John6:17 ndipo pamene adalowa m'ngalawa, analikuoloka nyanja kunka ku Kapernao. Ndipo kutada pamenepo, koma Yesu asanadze kwa iwo." 
John6:18 Ndipo nyanja inalikuuka cifukwa ca mphepo yaikulu yakuombako. 
John6:19 Ndipo parnene adapalasa monga mastadiya makumi awiri ndi asanu kapena makumi atatu, anaona Yesu alikuyenda panyanja, ndi kuyandikira ngalawa; ndipo anacita mantha." 
John6:20 Koma iye ananena nao, ndine; musaope." 
John6:21 Pamenepo analola kumlandira m'ngalawa; ndipo pomwepo ngalawayo inafika kumtunda kumene analikunkako. 
John6:22 M'mawa mwace khamu la anthu limene linaima tsidya lija la nyanja linaona kuti palibe ngalawa yina koma imodzi, ndi kuti Yesu sanalowa pamodzi ndi akuphunzira ace m'ngalawamo, koma akuphunzira ace adacoka pa okha;" 
John6:23 koma zinacokera ngalawa zina ku Tiberiya, pafupi pa malo pomwe adadyapo mkate m'mene Yesu adayamika;" 
John6:24 cifukwa cace pamene khamu la anthu linaona kuti palibe Yesu, ndi akuphunzira ace palibe, iwo okha analowa m'ngalawazo nadza ku Kapernao, alikufuna Yesu." 
John6:25 Ndipo pamene anampeza iye tsidya lina la nyanja, anati kwa iye, Rabi, munadza kuno liti?" 
John6:26 Yesu anayankha iwo nati, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Mundifuna Ine, si cifukwa munaona zizindikilo, koma cifukwa munadya mkate, nimunakhuta." 
John6:27 Gwirani nchito si cifukwa ca cakudya cimene citayika koma ca cakudya cimene citsalira ku moyo wosatha, cimene Mwana wa munthu adzakupatsani inu; pakuti ameneyo Atate, ndiye Mulungu, adamlembera cizindikilo." 
John6:28 Pamenepo anati kwa iye, Ticite ciani, kuti ticite nchito za Mulungu?" 
John6:29 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Nchito ya Mulungu ndi iyi, kuti mukhulupirire iye amene Iyeyo anamtuma." 
John6:30 Cifukwa cace anati kwa iye, Ndipo mucita cizindikilo canji, kuti tione ndi kukhulupirira Inu? mucita ciani?" 
John6:31 Atate athu anadya mana m'cipululu; monga kwalembedwa, Mkate wocokera m'mwamba anawapatsa iwo kudya," 
John6:32 Cifukwa cace Yesu anati kwa iwo, Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, Si Mose amene anakupatsani inu mkate wa Kumwamba; koma Atate wanga akupatsani inu mkate woona wa Kumwamba." 
John6:33 Pakuti mkate wa Mulungu ndiye wakutsika kucokera Kumwamba ndi kupatsa moyo kwa dziko lapansi. 
John6:34 Pamenepo anati kwa iye, Ambuye, tipatseni ife mkate umene nthawi zonse." 
John6:35 Yesu anati kwa iwo, Ine ndine mkate wamoyo; iye amene adza kwa Ine sadzamva njala, ndi iye amene akhulupirira Ine sadzamva ludzu nthawi zonse." 
John6:36 Koma ndinati kwa inu, kuti mungakhale mwandiona, simukhulupirira." 
John6:37 Cinthu conse cimene anandipatsa Ine Atate cidzadza kwa Ine; ndipo wakudza kwa Ine sindidzamtaya iye kunja. 
John6:38 Pakuti ndinatsika Kumwamba, si kuti ndicite cifuniro canga, koma cifuniro ca iye amene anandituma Ine." 
John6:39 Koma cifuniro ca Iye amene anandituma Ine ndi ici, kuti za ici conse Iye anandipatsa Ine ndisatayeko kanthu, koma ndiciukitse tsiku lomariza." 
John6:40 Pakuti cifuniro ca Atate wanga ndi ici, kuti yense wakuyang'ana Mwana, ndi kukhulupirira iye, akhale nao moyo wosatha; ndipo Ine ndidzamuukitsa iye tsiku lomariza." 
John6:41 Cifukwa cace Ayuda anang'ung'udza za iye, cifukwa anati, Ine ndine mkate wotsika Kumwamba." 
John6:42 Ndipo iwo ananena, Si Yesu uyu, mwana wa Yosefe, atate wace ndi amai wace tiwadziwa? Anena bwanji tsopano, kuti, Ndinatsika Kumwamba?" 
John6:43 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Musang'ung'udze winandi mnzace." 
John6:44 Kulibe mmodzi akhoza kudza kwa Ine koma ngati Atate wondituma Ine amkoka iye; ndipo Ine ndidzamuukitsa iye tsiku lomariza. 
John6:45 Calembedwa mwa aneneri, Ndipo adzakhala onse ophunzitsidwa ndi Mulungu. 1 Yense amene adamva kwa Atate, naphunzira, adza kwa Ine." 
John6:46 2 Sikuti munthu wina waona Atate, koma 3 iye amene ali wocokera kwa Mulungu, ameneyo waona Atate." 
John6:47 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, 4 iye wokhuluplra ali nao moyo wosatha." 
John6:48 5 Ine ndine mkate wamoyo," 
John6:49 6 Makolo anu adadya m'cipululu, ndipo adamwalira." 
John6:50 7 Mkate wotsika Kumwamba ndi uwu, kuti munthu akadyeko ndi kusamwalira." 
John6:51 8 Mkate wamoyo wotsika Kumwamba Ndine amene. Ngati munthu wina akadyako mkate umene, adzakhala ndi moyo kosatha. Inde, ndipo 9 mkate umene ndidzapatsa Ine, ndiwo thupi langa, ukhale moyo wa dziko lapansi." 
John6:52 Pamenepo Ayuda anatetana wina ndi mnzace ndi kunena, Akhoza bwanji ameneyu kutipatsa ife kudya thupi lace?" 
John6:53 Cifukwa cace Yesu anati kwa iwo, Indetu, indetu, ndinenandi inu, 10 Ngati simukudya thupi la Mwana wa munthu ndi kumwa mwazi wace, mulibe moyo mwa inu nokha." 
John6:54 11 Iye wakudya thupi langa ndi kumwa mwazi wanga ali nao moyo wosatha; ndipo Ine ndidzamuukitsa iye tsiku lomariza. 
John6:55 Pakuti thupi langa ndi cakudya ndithu, ndi mwazi wanga ndi caku mwa ndithu." 
John6:56 Iye wakudya thupi langa indi kumwa mwazi wanga 12 akhala mwa Ine ndi Ine mwa iye. 
John6:57 Monga Atate wamoyo anandituma Ine, ndipo Inenso ndiri ndi moyo cifukwa ca Atate; momwemo wondidya Ine, iyeyu adzakhala ndi moyo cifukwa ca Ine." 
John6:58 13 Mkate wotsika Kumwamba ndi umenewu: si monga makolowo, anadya namwalira; iye wakudya mkate umene adzakhala ndi moyo nthawi zonse." 
John6:59 Izi ananena m'sunagoge, pakuphunzitsa m'Kapernao." 
John6:60 14 Pamenepo ambiri a akuphunzira ace, pakumva izi, anati, Mau awa ndi osautsa; akhoza kumva awa ndani?" 
John6:61 Koma Yesu podziwa mwa yekha kuti akuphunzira ace alikung'ung'udza cifukwa ca ici, anati kwa iwo, ici mukhumudwa naco?" 
John6:62 15 Nanga bwanji ngati mukaona Mwana wa munthu alikukwera kumene anali kale lomwe? 
John6:63 16 Wopatsa moyo ndi mzimu; thupi silithandiza konse. Mau amene ndalankhula ndi inu ndiwo mzimu, ndi moyo." 
John6:64 Koma 17 pali ena mwa inu amene sakhuluplra, Pakuti. Yesu anadziwa poyamba amene ali osakhulupira, ndi amene adzampereka." 
John6:65 Ndipo ananena, 18 Cifukwa ca ici ndinati kwa inu, kuti palibe munthu angathe kudza kwa Ine, koma ngati kupatsidwa kwa Iye ndi Atate." 
John6:66 19 Pa ici ambiri a akuphunzira ace anabwerera m'mbuyo, ndipo sanayenda-yendanso ndi iye." 
John6:67 Cifukwa cace Yesu anati kwa khumi ndi awiriwo, Nanga inunso mufuna kucoka?" 
John6:68 Simoni Petro anamyankha iye, Ambuye, tidzamuka kwa yani? Inu muli nao mau a moyo wosatha." 
John6:69 Ndipo 20 ife tikhulupirira, ndipo tidziwa kuti Inu ndinu Woyera wa Mulungu." 
John6:70 Yesu anayankha iwo, 21 Kodi sindinakusankhani khumi ndi awiri, ndipo mwa inu 22 mmodzi ali mdierekezi?" 
John6:71 Koma adanena za Yudase, mwana wa Simoni Isikariote, pakuti iye ndiye amene akampereka iye, ali mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiri." 
John7:1 Ndipo zitapita izi Yesu anayendayenda m'Galileya; pakuti sanafuna kuyendayenda m'Yudeya, cifukwa Ayuda anafuna kumupha iye." 
John7:2 Koma phwando la Ayuda, phwando la misasa, linayandikira." 
John7:3 Cifukwa cace abale ace anati kwa iye, Cokani pano, mumuke ku Yudeya, kuti akuphunzita anunso akapenye nchito zanu zimenemucita." 
John7:4 Pakuti palibe munthu acita kanthu mobisika, nafuna yekha kukhala poyera, Ngati mucita izi, dzionetsereni eni nokha kwa dziko lapansi," 
John7:5 Pakuti angakhale abale ace sanakhulupirira iye. 
John7:6 Cifukwa cace Yesu ananena nao, Nthawi yanga siinafike; koma nthawi yanu yakonzeka masiku onse." 
John7:7 Dziko lapansi silingathe kudana ndi inu; koma Ine lindida popeza Ine ndilicitira umboni, kuti nchito zace ziri zoipa," 
John7:8 K werani inu kunka kuphwando; sindikwera Ineku phwando ili tsopano apa; pakuti nthawi yanga siinakwanire. 
John7:9 Ndipo m'mene adanena nao zimenezi anakhalabe m'Galileya," 
John7:10 Koma pamene abale ace adakwera kunka kuphwando, pomwepo Iyenso anakwera, si poonekera, koma monga mobisalika." 
John7:11 Pomwepo Ayuda analikumfuna iye paphwando, nanena, Ali kuti uja?" 
John7:12 Ndipo kunali kung'ung'udza kwambiri za iye m'makamu a anthu; ena ananena, kuti, Ali wabwino; koma ena ananena, lai, koma asoceretsa khamu la anthuwo." 
John7:13 Cinkana anatero panalibe munthu analankhula za iye poyera, cifukwa ca kuopa Ayuda." 
John7:14 Koma pamene padafika pakati pa phwando, Yesu anakwera nalowa m'Kacisi, naphunzitsa," 
John7:15 Cifukwa cace Ayuda anazizwa, nanena, Ameneyu adziwa bwanji zolemba, wosaphunzira?" 
John7:16 Pamenepo Yesu anayankha iwo, nati, Ciphunzitso canga siciri canga, koma ca iye amene anandituma Ine." 
John7:17 Ngati munthu ali yense afuna kucita cifuniro cace, adzazindikira za ciphunzitsoco, ngati cicokera kwa Mulungu, kapena ndilankhula zocokera kwa Ine ndekha." 
John7:18 Iye wolankhula zocokera kwa iye yekha afuna ulemu wa mwini yekha, iye wakufuna ulemu wa iye amene anamtuma, yemweyu ali woona, ndipo mwa iye mulibecosalungama." 
John7:19 Si Mose kodi anakupatsani inu cilamulo, ndipo kulibe mmodzi mwa inu acita cilamulo? Mufuna kundipha cifukwa ninji?" 
John7:20 Khamu la anthu linayankha, Muli ndi ciwanda: afuna ndani kukuphani lou?" 
John7:21 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Ndinacita nchito imodzi, ndipo muzizwa monse," 
John7:22 Cifukwa ca ici Mose, anakupatsani inu mdulidwe (si kuti ucokera kwa Mose, koma kwa, makolo); ndipo mudula munthu tsiku la Sabata." 
John7:23 Ngati munthu alandira mdulidwe tsiku la Sabata, kuti cilamulo ca Mose cingapasulidwe; kodi mundikwiyira Ine, cifukwa ndamciritsadi munthu tsiku la Sabata?" 
John7:24 Musaweruze monga maonekedwe, koma weruzani ciweruziro colungama." 
John7:25 Pamenepo ena a iwo a ku Yerusalemu ananena, Kodi suyu amene afuna kumupha r" 
John7:26 ndipo taona amalankhula poyera, ndipo sanena kanthu kwa iye. Kapena kodi akuru adziwa ndithu kuti ndiye Kristu ameneyo?" 
John7:27 Koma ameneyo tidziwa uko acokera: koma Kristu pamene akadzadza, palibe mmodzi adzadziwa uko acokera." 
John7:28 Pamenepo Yesu anapfuula m'Kacisi, alikuphunzitsa ndi kunena, Mundidziwa Ine, ndiponso mudziwa uko ndicokera; ndipo sindinadza Ine ndekha, koma iye wondituma Ine amene inu simumdziwa, ali woona." 
John7:29 Ine ndimdziwa iye; cifukwa ndiri wocokera kwa iye, nandituma Ine Iyeyu." 
John7:30 Pamenepo anafuna kumgwira iye; koma palibe wina anamgwira kumanja, cifukwa nthawi yace siinafike." 
John7:31 Koma ambiri a m'khamu la anthu anakhulupirira iye; ndipo ananena, Pamene Kristu akadza kodi adzacita zizindikilo zambiri zoposa zimene adazicita ameneyo?" 
John7:32 Afarisi anamva khamu la anthu ling'ung'udza zimenezi za iye; ndipo ansembe akulu ndi Afarisi anatuma anyamata kuti akamgwire iye. 
John7:33 Pamenepo Yesu anati, Katsala kanthawi ndiri ndi inu, ndipo ndimuka kwa iye wondituma Ine." 
John7:34 Mudzafunafuna Ine, osandipeza; ndipo pomwe ndiri Ine, inu simungathe kudzapo." 
John7:35 Cifukwa cace Ayuda anati mwa iwo okha, Adzanka kuti uyu kuti ife sitikampeza iye? kodi adzamuka kwa Ahelene obalalikawo, ndi kuphunzitsa Ahelene?" 
John7:36 Mau awa amene ananena ndi ciani, Mudzandifunafuna osandipeza Ine: ndipo pomwe ndiri Ine, inu simungathe kudzapo?" 
John7:37 Koma tsiku lomariza, lalikurulo la phwando, Yesu anaimirira napfuula, ndi kunena, Ngati pali munthu akumva Ludzu, adze kwa Ine, namwe." 
John7:38 Iye wokhulupirira Ine, monga cilembo cinati, Mitsinje ya madzi amoyo idzayenda, kuturuka m'kati mwace." 
John7:39 Koma 1 ici anati za Mzimu, amene iwo akukhulupirira iye anati adzalandire; pakuti Mzimu panalibe pamenepo, cifukwa Yesu sanalemekezedwa panthawi pomwepo." 
John7:40 Pamenepo ena a khamulo pakumva mau awa, ananena, 2 Mnene riyo ndi uyu ndithu." 
John7:41 Ena ananena, 3 Uyu ndi Kristu, Koma ena ananena, Kodi Kristu adza kuturuka m'Galileya?" 
John7:42 4 Kodi sicinati cilembo kuti Kristu adza kuturuka mwa mbeu ya Davine, ndi kucokera ku Betelehemu, kumudzi kumene kunali Davine?" 
John7:43 5 Kudakhala tsono kusiyana m'khamulo cifukwa ca iye. 
John7:44 Koma 6 ena mwa iwo anafuna kumgwira iye; koma palibe munthu anamgwira kumanja. 
John7:45 Pamenepo anyamatawo anadza kwa ansembe akulu ndi Afarisi; ndipo iwowa anati kwa iwo, Simunamtenga iye bwanji?" 
John7:46 Anyamatawo anayankha, 7 Nthawi yonse palibe munthu analankhula cotero." 
John7:47 Pamenepo Afarisi anayankha iwo, Kodi mwasokeretsedwa inunso?" 
John7:48 8 Kodi wina wa akuru anakhulupirira iye, kapena wa Afarisi?" 
John7:49 Koma khamu ili losadziwa cilamulo, likhala lotembereredwa." 
John7:50 9 Nikodemo ananena kwa iwo, amene uja adadza kwa iye kale, ali mmodzi wa iwo," 
John7:51 Kodi cilamulo cathu ciweruza munthu, osayamba kumva iye, ndi kuzindikira cimene, acita?" 
John7:52 Anayankha nati kwa iye, Kodi iwenso uli woturuka m'Galileya? Santhula, nuone kuti m'Galileya sanauka mneneri." 
John7:53 Ndipo anamuka munthu yense ku nyumba yace. 
John8:1 Koma Yesu anamuka ku phiri la Azitona. 
John8:2 Komac mamawa anadzanso kuKacisi, ndipo anthu onse anadza kwa iye; ndipo m'mene anakhala pansi anawaphunzitsa." 
John8:3 Koma alembi ndi Afarisi anabwera naye kwa iye mkazi wogwidwa m'cigololo, ndipo pamene anamuimika iye pakati," 
John8:4 ananena kwa iye, Mphunzitsi, mkazi uyu wagwidwa alimkucita cigololo." 
John8:5 Koma m'cilamulo Mose anatilamulira, ttwaponye miyala otere. Cifukwa cace Inu munena ciani za iye?" 
John8:6 Koma ici ananena kuti amuyese iye, kuti akhale naco comneneza iye. Koma Yesu, m'mene adawerama pansi analemba pansi ndi cala cace." 
John8:7 Koma pamene anakhalakhala alikumfunsabe iye, anaweramuka, nati kwa iwo, Amene mwa inu ali wopanda cimo, ayambe kumponya mwala," 
John8:8 Ndipo m'mene adaweramanso analemba ndi cala cace pansi. 
John8:9 Koma iwo, m'mene adamva, anaturukamo amodzi amodzi, kuyambira akulu, kufikira otsiriza; ndipo Yesu anatsala yekha, ndi mkazi, alikuima pakati." 
John8:10 Koma Yesu pamene adaweramuka, anati kwa iye, Mkazi iwe, ali kuti ajawa? Palibe munthu anakutsutsa kodi?" 
John8:11 Koma iye anati, Palibe, Ambuye. Ndipo Yesu anati, Inenso sindikutsutsa iwe; pita; kuyambira tsopano usacimwenso." 
John8:12 Pamenepo Yesu analankhulanso nao, nanena, Ine ndine kuunika kwa dziko lapansi; iye wonditsata ine sadzayenda mumdima, koma adzakhala nako kuunika kwa moyo." 
John8:13 Cifukwa cace Afarisi anati kwa iye, Mucita umboni wa Inu nokha; umboni wanu suli woona."
