John8:14 Anayankha Yesu nati kwa iwo, Ndingakhale ndicita umboni wa Ine ndekha umboni wanga uli woona; cifukwa ndidziwa kumene ndinacokera ndi kumene ndimukako; koma e inu, simudziwa kumene ndicokera, ndi kumene ndimukako." 
John8:15 Inu muweruza monga mwa thupi; Ine sindiweruza munthu. 
John8:16 Ndipo ngati ndiweruza Ine, ciweruziro canga ciri coona; pakuti sindiri pa ndekha, koma ine ndi Atate amene anandituma Ine." 
John8:17 Inde kudalembedwa m'cilamulo canu kuti umboni wa anthu awiri uli woona. 
John8:18 Ine ndine wakucita umboni wa Ine ndekha, ndipo Atate amene anandituma Ine, acita umboni wa Ine." 
John8:19 Cifukwa cace ananena ndi iye, Ali kuti Atate, wanu? Yesu anayankha, Simudziwa kapena Ine, kapena Atate wanga; mukadadziwa Ine, mukada-dziwanso Atate wanga." 
John8:20 Mau awa analankhula m'nyumba ya cuma ca Mulungu pophunzitsa m'Kacisi; ndipo palibe munthu anamgwira iye, pakuti nthawi yace siinafike." 
John8:21 Pamenepo anatinso kwa iwo; Ndimuka Ine, ndipo mudzandifuna, ndipo m'cimo lanu mudzafa: kumene ndimukako Ine, simudziwa kudza inu." 
John8:22 Cifukwa cace Ayuda ananena, Kodi adzadzipha yekha, pakuti ananena, Kumene ndimukako Ine, simudziwa inu kudza?" 
John8:23 Ndipo ananena nao, Inu ndinu ocokera pansi; Ine ndine wocokera Kumwamba; inu ndinu a dziko lino lapansi; sindiri Ine wa dziko lino lapansi." 
John8:24 Cifukwa cace ndinati kwa inu, kuti mudzafam'macimo anu, pakuti ngati simukhulupirira kuti Ine ndine, mudzafa m'macimo anu." 
John8:25 Pamenepo ananena kwa iye, Ndinu yani? Yesu anati kwa iwo, Cimene comwe ndidalankhulanso ndi inu kuyambira paciyambi." 
John8:26 Ndiri nazo zambiri zakulankhula ndi zakuweruza za inu; koma wondituma Ine ali woona; ndipo zimene ndazimva kwa iye, zomwezo ndilankhuia kwa dziko lapansi." 
John8:27 Sanazindikira iwo kuti analikunena nao za Atate. 
John8:28 Cifukwa cace Yesu anati, Pamene mutadzamkweza Mwana wa munthu, pomwepo mudzazindikira kuti Ine ndine, ndipo sindicita kanthu kwa Ine ndekha, koma monga anandiphunzitsa Atate, ndilankhula izi." 
John8:29 Ndipo wondituma Ine ali ndi Ine; sanandisiya Ine pa ndekha; cifukwa ndicita Ine rimene zimkondweretsa iye nthawi zonse. 
John8:30 Pakulankhula iye zimenezi, ambiri anakhulupirira iye." 
John8:31 Cifukwa cace Yesu ananena kwa Ayuda aja adakhulupirira iye, Ngati mukhala inu m'mau anga, muli akuphunzira anga ndithu;" 
John8:32 ndipo mudzazindikira coonadi, ndipo coonadi cidzakumasulani." 
John8:33 Anamyankha iye, Tiri mbeu ya Abrahamu, ndipo sitinakhala akapolo a munthu nthawi iri yonse; munena bwanji; Mudzayesedwa aufulu?" 
John8:34 Yesu anayankha iwo, nati, Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu kuti yense wakucita cimo ali kapolo wa cimolo." 
John8:35 Koma kapolo sakhala m'nyumba nthawi yonse; mwana ndiye akhala nthawi yonse. 
John8:36 Cifukwa cace ngati Mwana adzakuyesani inu aufulu, mudzakhala mfulu ndithu." 
John8:37 Ndidziwa kuti muli mbeu ya Abrahamuj koma mufuna kundipha Ine, cifukwa mau anga alibe malo mwa inu." 
John8:38 1 Zimene ndinaona Ine kwa Atate, ndilankhula; ndipo inunso mucita cimene mudamva kwa atate wanu." 
John8:39 Anayankha nati kwa iye, Atate wathu ndiye Abrahamu. Yesu ananena nao, 2 Ngati muli ana a Abrahamu, mukadacita nchito za Abrahamu." 
John8:40 Koma tsopano mufuna kundipha Ine, ndine munthu amene ndinalankhula ndi inu coonadi, 3 cimene ndinamva kwa Mulungu; ici Abrahamu sanacita." 
John8:41 Inu mucita nchito za atate wanu. Anati kwa iye, Sitinabadwa ife m'cigololo; tiri naye Atate mmodzi ndiye Mulungu." 
John8:42 Yesu anati kwa iwo, 4 Mulungu akadakhala Atate wanu, mukadakonda Ine; pakuti Ine ndinaturuka, ndi kucokera kwa Mulungu; pakuti sindinadza kwa Ine ndekha, koma Iyeyu anandituma Ine." 
John8:43 Simuzindikira malankhulidwe anga cifukwa ninji? Cifukwa simungathe kumva mau anga," 
John8:44 5 Inu muli ocokera mwa atate wanu mdierekezi, ndipo zolakalaka zace za atate wanu mufuna kucita. Iyeyu anali wambanda kuyambira paciyambi, ndipo sanaima m'coonadi, pakuti mwa iye mulibe coonadi. Pamene alankhula bodza, alankhula za mwini wace; pakuti ali wabodza, ndi atate wace wa bodza." 
John8:45 Koma Ine, cifukwa ndinena coonadi, simukhulupirira Ine." 
John8:46 Ndani mwa inu anditsutsa Ine za cimo? Ngati ndinena coonadi, simundikhulupirira Ine cifukwa ninji?" 
John8:47 6 Iye wocokera kwa Mulungu amva zonena za Mulungu; inu simumva cifukwa cakuti simuli a kwa Mulungu," 
John8:48 Ayuda anayankha nati kwa iye, Kodi sitinenetsa kun Inu ndinu Msamariya, ndipo 7 muli ndi ciwanda?" 
John8:49 Yesu anayankha, Ndiribe ciwanda Ine; koma ndilemekeza Atate wanga, ndipo inu mundipeputsa." 
John8:50 Koma 8 Ine sinditsata ulemerero wanga; alipo woutsata ndi wakuweruza. 
John8:51 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, 9 Munthu akasunga mau anga, sadzaona imfa nthawi yonse." 
John8:52 Ayuda anati kwa Iye, Tsopano tazindikira kuti muli ndi ciwanda. 10 Abrahamu anamwalira, ndi aneneri; ndipo Inu munena, Munthu akasunga mau anga, sadzalawa imfa ku nthawi yonse." 
John8:53 Kodi Inu ndinu wamkulu ndi atate wathu Abrahamu, amene anamwalira? ndipo aneneri anamwalira: mudziyesera nokha muli yani?" 
John8:54 Yesu anayankha, Ngati Ine ndidzilemekeza ndekha, ulemerero wanga uli cabe; 11 Atate wanga ndiye wondilemekeza Ine; amene munena za iye, kuti ndiye Mulungu wanu;" 
John8:55 ndipo 12 inu simunamdziwa iye; koma Ine ndimdziwa iye; ndipo ngati ndinena kuti sindimdziwa iye, ndidzakhala wonama cimodzimodzi inu; koma ndimdziwa iye, ndipo ndisunga mau ace." 
John8:56 13 Atate wanu Abrahamu anakondwera kuona tsiku langa; ndipo anaona, nasangalala." 
John8:57 Ayuda pamenepo anati kwa iye, Simunafikire zaka makumi asanu, ndipo munaona Abrahamu kodi?" 
John8:58 Yesu anati kwa iwo, Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, asanayambe kukhala Abrahamu ndipo 14 Ine ndiripo." 
John8:59 Pamenepo 15 anatola miyala kuti amponye iye; koma Yesu anabisala, naturuka m'Kacisi." 
John9:1 Ndipo popita, anaona munthu ali wosaona cibadwire." 
John9:2 Ndipo akuphunzira ace anamfunsa iye, nanena, Rabi, anacimwa ndani, ameneyo, kapena atate wace ndi amace, kuti anabadwa wosaona?" 
John9:3 Yesu anayankha, Sanacimwa ameneyo, kapena atate wace ndi amace; koma kuti nchito za Mulungu zikaonetsedwe mwa iye." 
John9:4 Tiyenera kugwira nchito za iye wondituma Ine, pokhala pali msana; ukudza usiku pamene palibe munthu angakhoze kugwira nchito," 
John9:5 Pakukhala Ine m'dziko lapansi, ndiri kuunika kwa dziko lapansi." 
John9:6 Pamene ananena izi, analabvula pansi, nakanda thope ndi malobvuwo, napaka thopelo m'maso," 
John9:7 nati kwa iye, Muka, kasambe m'thamanda la Siloamu (ndilolosandulika, Wotumidwa). Pamenepo anacoka, nasamba, nabwera alikuona." 
John9:8 Cifukwa cace anzace ndi iwo adamuona kale, kuti anali wopemphapempha, ananena, Kodi si uyu uja wokhala ndi kupemphapempha?" 
John9:9 Ena ananena, kuti, Ndiyeyu; ena ananena, lai, koma afanana naye. Iyeyu anati, Ndine amene." 
John9:10 Pamenepo ananena ndi iye, Nanga maso ako anatseguka bwanji?" 
John9:11 Iyeyu anayankha, Munthuyo wochedwa Yesu anakanda thope, napaka m'maso mwanga, nati kwa ine, Muka ku Siloamu kasambe; cifukwa cace ndinacoka, ndipo m'mene ndinasamba ndinapenya," 
John9:12 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ali kuti Iyeyo? Anena, Sindidziwa ine." 
John9:13 Anapita naye amene anali wosaona kale kwa Afarisi. 
John9:14 Koma tsikulo ndi la Sabata limene Yesu anakanda thope, namtsegulira iye maso ace." 
John9:15 Pamenepo ndipo Afarisi anamfunsanso, umo anapenyera, Ndipo anati kwa iwo, Anapaka thope m'maso mwanga, ndinasamba, ndipo ndipenya." 
John9:16 Ena pamenepo mwa Afarisi ananena, Munthu uyu sacokera kwa Mulungu, cifukwa sasunga Sabata. Koma ena ananena, Munthu ali wocimwa, akhoza bwanji kucita zizindikilo zotere? Ndipo panali kutsutsana mwa iwo." 
John9:17 Pamenepo ananenanso kwa wosaonayo, Iwe unenanji za iye, popeza anakutsegulira maso ako? Koma iye anati, Ali Mneneri." 
John9:18 Cifukwa cace Ayuda sanakhulupirira za iye, kuti anali wosaona, napenya, kufikira kumene adaitana atate wace ndi amace a iye wopenya;" 
John9:19 nawafunsa iwo, nanena, Kodi uyu ndi mwana wanu, amene inu munena kuti anabadwa wosaona?" 
John9:20 Ndipo apenya bwanji tsopano? Atate wace ndi amace anayankha nati, Tidziwa kuti uyu ndi mwana wathu, ndi kuti anabadwa wosaona;" 
John9:21 koma sitidziwa umo apenyera tsopano; kapena sitimdziwa amene anamtsegulira pamaso pace; mumfunse iye; ali wamsinkhu; adzalankhula mwini za iye yekha. 
John9:22 Izi ananena atate wace ndi amace, cifukwa anaopa Ayuda; pakuti Ayuda adapangana kale, kuti ngati munthu ali yense adzambvomereza iye kuti ndiye Kristu, akhale woletsedwa m'sunagoge," 
John9:23 Cifukwa ca ici atate wace ndi amace anati, Ali wamsinkhu; mumfunse iye." 
John9:24 Pamenepo anamuitana kaciwiri munthuyo amene anali wosaona, nati kwa iye, Lemekeza Mulungu; tidziwa kuti munthuyo ali wocimwa." 
John9:25 Pamenepo iyeyu anayankha, Ngati ali wocimwa, sindidziwa; cinthu cimodzi ndicidziwa, pokhala ndinali wosaona, tsopano ndipenya." 
John9:26 Cifukwa cace anati kwa iye, Anakucitira iweciani? anakutsegulira iwe maso bwanji?" 
John9:27 Iye anayankha iwo, Ndinakuuzani kale, ndipo simunamva; mufuna kumvanso bwanji? kodi inunso mufuna kukhala: akuphunzira ace?" 
John9:28 Ndipo anamlalatira iye, nati, Ndiwe wophunzira wa Iyeyu, ife ndife akuphunzira a Mose." 
John9:29 Tidziwa ife kuti Mulungu analankhula ndi Mose; koma sitidziwa kumene acokera ameneyo," 
John9:30 Munthuyu anayankha nati kwa iwo, Pakuti cozizwa ciri m'menemo, kuti inu simudziwa kumene acokera, ndipo ananditsegulira maso anga." 
John9:31 Tidziwa kuti Mulungu samvera ocimwa. Koma ngati munthu ali yense akhala wopembedza Mulungu nacita cifuniro cace, amvera ameneyo." 
John9:32 Kuyambira paciyambi sikunamveka kuti wina anatsegulira maso munthu wosaona cibadwire. 
John9:33 Ngatiuyu sanacokera kwa Mulungu, sakadakhoza kucita kanthu." 
John9:34 Anayankha natikwa iye, Wabadwa iwe konse m'zoipa, ndipo iwe utiphunzitse ife kodi? Ndipo anamtaya kunja." 
John9:35 Yesu anamva kuti adamtaya kunja; ndipo pakumpeza iye, anati, Kodi ukhulupirira Mwana wa Mulungu?" 
John9:36 Iyeyu anayankha nati, Ndipo ndani iye, Ambuye, kuti ndimkhulupirire iye?" 
John9:37 Yesu anati kwa iye, Wamuona iye, ndiponso wakulankhula ndi iwe ndi Iyeyo." 
John9:38 Koma iye anati, Ndikhulupirira, Ambuye; ndipo anamgwadira iye." 
John9:39 Ndipo Yesu anati, Kudzaweruza ndadza Ine ku dziko lino lapansi, kuti iwo osapenya apenye; ndi kuti iwo akupenya akhale osaona," 
John9:40 Ndipo Afarisi ena akukhala ndi iye anamva izi, nati kwa iye, Kodi ifenso ndife osaona?" 
John9:41 Yesu anati kwa iwo, Mukadakhala osaona simukadakhala nalo cimo; koma tsopano munena, kuti, Tipenya: cimo lanu likhala." 
John10:1 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Iye wosalowa m'khola la nkhosa pakhomo, koma akwerera kwina, iyeyu ndiye wakuba ndi wolanda." 
John10:2 Koma iye wakulowera pakhomo, ndiye mbusa wa nkhosa." 
John10:3 Iyeyu, wapakhomo amtsegulira ndi nkhosa zimva mau ace; ndipo aitana nkhosa za iye yekha maina ao, nazitsogolera kunja." 
John10:4 Pamene adaturutsa zonse za iye yekha, azitsogolera; ndi nkhosa zimtsata iye; cifukwa zidziwa mau ace." 
John10:5 Koma mlendo sizidzamtsata, koma zidzamthawa; cifukwasizidziwa mau a alendo." 
John10:6 Fanizo ili Yesu ananena kwa iwo; koma sanazindikira zimene Yesu analikulankhula nao. 
John10:7 Cifukwa cace Yesuananenanso nao, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Ine ndine khomo la nkhosa." 
John10:8 Onse amene anadza m'tsogolo mwa Ine ali akuba, ndi olanda: koma nkhosa sizinamva iwo." 
John10:9 Ine ndine khomo; ngati wina alowa ndi Ine, adzapulu-mutsidwa, nadzalowa, nadzaturuka, nadzapeza busa." 
John10:10 Siikudza mbala, koma kuti ikabe, ndi kupha, ndi kuononga, Ndadza Ine kuti akhale ndi moyo, ndi kukhala nao wocuruka." 
John10:11 Ine ndine Mbusa Wabwino; mbusa wabwino ataya moyo wace cifukwa ca nkhosa. 
John10:12 Wolipidwa amene sakhala mbusa, amene nkhosa siziri zace za yekha, aona mmbulu ulinkudza, nasiya nkhosazo, nathawa; ndipo mmbulu uzikwatula, nuzibalalitsa;" 
John10:13 cifukwa ali wolipidwa, ndipo sasamala nkhosa." 
John10:14 Ine ndine Mbusa Wabwino; ndipo ndizindikira zanga, ndi zanga zindizindikira ine," 
John10:15 monga Atate andidziwa Ine, ndi Ine ndimdziwa Atate; ndipo nditaya moyo wanga cifukwa ca nkhosa." 
John10:16 Ndipo nkhosa zina ndiri nazo, zimene siziri za khola ili; izinso ndiyenera kuzitenga, ndipo zidzamva mau anga; ndipo zidzakhala gulu limodzi, mbusa mmodzi," 
John10:17 Cifukwa ca ici Atate andikonda Ine, cifukwa nditaya Ine moyo wanga, kuti ndikautengenso," 
John10:18 Palibe wina andicotsera uwu, koma ndiutaya Ine ndekha. Ndiri nayo mphamvu yakuutaya, ndi mphamvu ndiri nayo yakuutenganso; lamulo ili ndinalandira kwa. Atate wanga." 
John10:19 Panakhalanso kutsutsana pakati pa Ayuda cifukwa ca mau awa. 
John10:20 Koma ambiri mwa iwo ananena, Ali ndi ciwanda, nacita misala; mukumva iye bwanji?" 
John10:21 Ena ananena, Mau awa sali a munthu wogwidwa ciwanda. Kodi ciwanda cikhoza kumtsegulira maso wosaona?" 
John10:22 Koma kunali phwando la kukonzersanso m'Yerusalemu; nyengoyo ndi yacisanu. 
John10:23 Ndipo Yesu analikuyendayenda m'Kacisi m'khumbi la Solomo," 
John10:24 Pamenepo Ayuda anamzungulira iye, nanena ndi iye, Kufikira liti musfnkhitsa-slnkhitsa moyo wathu? ngati Inu ndinu Kristu, tiuzeni momveka." 
John10:25 Yesu anayankha iwo, Ndakuuzani, ndipo simukhulupirira, Nchitozi ndizicita Ine m'dzina la Atate wanga, zimenezi zindicitira umboni." 
John10:26 Koma inu simukhulupira, cifukwa simuli a mwa nkhosa zanga." 
John10:27 Nkhosa zanga zimva mau anga, ndipo Ine ndizizindikira, ndipo zinditsata Ine." 
John10:28 Ndipo Ine ndizipatsa moyo wosatha; ndipo sizidzaonongeka ku nthawi yonse, ndipo palibe munthu adzazikwatula m'dzanja langa," 
John10:29 Atate wanga, amene anandipatsa izo, ali wamkulu ndi onse; ndipo palibe wina angathe kuzikwatula m'dzanja la Atate." 
John10:30 Ine ndi Atate ndife amodzi. 
John10:31 Ayuda anatolanso miyala kuti amponye iye. 
John10:32 Yesu anayankha iwo, ndakuonetsani inu nchito zabwino zambiri za kwa Atate; cifukwa ca nchito yiti ya izo mundiponya miyala?" 
John10:33 Ayuda anamyankha iye, Cifukwa ca nchito yabwino sitikuponyani miyala, koma cifukwa ca mwano; ndi kuti Inu, muli munthu, mudziyesera nokha Mulungu," 
John10:34 Yesu anayankha iwo, Kodi sikulembedwa m'cilamulo canu, Ndinati Ine, Muli milungu?" 
John10:35 Ngati anawacha milungu iwo amene mau a Mulungu anawadzera (ndipo colemba sicingathe kutyoka)," 
John10:36 kodi inu munena za iye, amene Atate anampatula namtuma ku dziko lapansi, Ucita mwano; cifukwa ndinati, Ndiri Mwana wa Mulungu?" 
John10:37 Ngati sindicita nchito za Atate wanga, musakhulupirira Ine." 
John10:38 Koma ngati ndicita, mungakhale simukhulupirira Ine, khulupirirani nchitozo; kuti mukadziwe ndi kuzindikira kuti Atate ali mwa Ine, ndi ine mwa Atate." 
John10:39 Anafunanso kumgwira iye; ndipo anapulumuka m'dzanja lao. 
John10:40 Ndipo anacoka kunkanso tsidya lija la Yordano, kumalo kumene kunali Yohane analikubatiza poyamba paja; ndipo anakhala komweko." 
John10:41 Ndipo ambiri anadza kwa iye; nanena kuti, Sanacita cizindikilo Yohane; koma zinthu ziri zonse Yohane ananena za iye zinali zoona." 
John10:42 Ndipo ambiri anakhulupirira iye komweko. 
John11:1 Koma panali munthu wodwala, Lazaro wa ku Betaniya, wa m'mudzi wa Mariya ndi mbale wace Marita." 
John11:2 Koma ndiye Mariya uja anadzoza Ambuye ndi mafuta onunkhira bwino, napukuta mapazi ace ndi tsitsi lace, amene mlongo wace Lazaro anadwala." 
John11:3 Pamenepo alongo ace anatumiza kwa iye, nanena, Ambuye, onani, amene mumkonda adwala." 
John11:4 Koma Yesu pamene anamva, anati, Kudwala kumene sikuli kwa imfa, koma cifukwa ca ulemerero wa Mulungu, kuti Mwana wa Mulungu alemekezedwe nako." 
John11:5 Koma Yesu anakonda Marita, ndi mbale wace, ndi Lazaro." 
John11:6 Cifukwa cace pamene anamva kuti anadwala, anakhala pamenepo pa malo pomwepo masiku awiri." 
John11:7 Ndipo pambuyo pace ananena kwa akuphunzira ace, Tiyeni tipitenso ku Yudeya." 
John11:8 Akuphunzira ananena ndi iye, Ambuye, Ayuda analikufuna kukuponyani miyala tsopano apa; ndipo munkanso komweko kodi?" 
John11:9 Yesu anayankha, Kodi sikuli maora khumi ndi awiri usana? Ngati munthu ayenda usana sakhumudwa, cifukwa apenya kuunika kwa dziko lino lapansi," 
John11:10 Koma ngati munthu ayenda usiku, akhumudwa, cifukwa mulibe kuunika mwa iye." 
John11:11 Izi anati, ndipo zitatha izi ananena nao, Lazaro bwenzi lathu ali m'tulo; koma ndimuka kukamuukitsa iye tulo tace." 
John11:12 Cifukwa cace akuphunzira ace anati kwa iye, Ambuye, ngati ali m'tulo adzacira." 
John11:13 Koma Yesu adanena za imfa yace; koma iwowa anayesa kuti ananena za mpumulo wa tulo. 
John11:14 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa iwo momveka, Lazaro wamwalira." 
John11:15 Ndipo ndikondwera cifukwa ca inu kuti kunalibe Ine komweko, cakuti mukakhulupire; koma tiyeni, tipite kwa iye." 
John11:16 Pamenepo Tomasi, wochedwa Didimo, anati kwa akuphunzira anzace, Tipite ifenso kuti tikafere naye pamodzi." 
John11:17 Ndipo pamene Yesu anadza, anapeza kuti pamenepo atakhala m'manda masiku anai." 
John11:18 Koma Betaniya anali pafupi pa Yerusalemu, nthawi yace yonga ya mastadiya khumi ndi asanu;" 
John11:19 koma ambiri a mwa Ayuda adadza kwa Marita ndi Mariya, kudzawatonthoza mtima pa mlongo wao." 
John11:20 Pamenepo Marita, pakumva kuti Yesu alinkudza, anamuka kukakomana ndi iye; koma Mariya anakhalabe m'nyumba." 
John11:21 Ndipo Marita anati kwa Yesu, Ambuye, mukadakhala kuno mlongo wanga sakadafa." 
John11:22 Koma ngakhale tsopano ndidziwa kuti zinthu ziri zonse mukapempha Mulungu, adzakupatsani Mulungu." 
John11:23 Yesu ananena naye, Mlongo wako adzauka." 
John11:24 Marita ananena ndi iye, Ndidziwa kuti adzauka m'kuuka tsiku lomariza." 
John11:25 Yesu anati kwa iye, Ine ndine kuuka ndi moyo; wokhulupirira Ine, angakhale amwalira, adzakhala ndi moyo;" 
John11:26 ndipo yense wakukhala ndi moyo, nakhulupirira Ine, sadzamwalira nthawi yonse. Kodi ukhulupirira ici?" 
John11:27 Ananena ndi iye, Inde Ambuye; ndakhulupirira ine kuti Inu ndinu Kristu, Mwana wa Mulungu, wakudza m'dziko lapansi." 
John11:28 Ndipo m'mene anati ici anacoka naitana Mariya mbale wace m'tseri, ndi kuti, Wafika Mphunzitsi, akuitana iwe." 
John11:29 Koma iyeyo, pakumva, ananyamuka msanga, nadza kwa iye." 
John11:30 (Koma Yesu sanafike kumudzi, koma anali pamalo pomwe Marita adakomana ndi Iye)" 
John11:31 Pamenepo Ayuda okhala naye m'nyumba, ndi kumtonthoza iye, pakuona Mariya ananyamuka msanga, naturuka, namtsata iye, ndi kuyesa kuti amuka kumanda kukalira komweko." 
John11:32 Pomwepo Mariya, pofika pamene panali Yesu, m'mene anamuona iye, anagwa pa mapazi ace, nanena ndi iye, Ambuye, mukadakhala kuno Inu, mlongo wanga sakadamwalira." 
John11:33 Pamenepo Yesu, pakumuona iye alikulira, ndi Ayuda akumperekeza iye alikulira, anadzuma mumzimu, nabvutika mwini," 
John11:34 nati, Mwamuika iye kuti? Ananena ndi iye, Ambuye, tiyeni, mukaone." 
John11:35 Yesu analira. 
John11:36 Cifukwa cace Ayuda ananena, Taonani, anamkondadi!" 
John11:37 Koma ena mwa iwo anati, Kodi uyu wotsegulira maso wosaona uja, sanakhoza kodi kucita kuti sakadafa ameneyunso?" 
John11:38 Pamenepo Yesu, ndi kudzumanso mwa iye yekha anadza kumanda. Koma panali phanga, ndipo mwala unaikidwa pamenepo." 
John11:39 Yesu ananena, Cotsani mwala. Marita, mlongo wace wa womwalirayo, ananena ndi iye, Ambuye, adayamba kununkha: pakuti wagona masiku anai." 
John11:40 Yesu ananena naye, Kodi sindinati kwa iwe, kuti, ngati ukhulupira, udzaona ulemerero wa Mulungu?" 
John11:41 Pomwepo anacotsa mwala. Kama Yesu anakweza maso ace kupenya kumwamba nati, Atate, ndiyamika Inu kuti munamva Ine." 
John11:42 Koma ndadziwa Ine kuti mumandimva Ine nthawi zonse; koma cifukwa ca khamu la anthu alikuimirira pozungulira ndinanena ici, kuti akhulupire kuti Inu munandituma Ine." 
John11:43 Ndipom'mene adanena izi, ana pfuula ndi mau akuru, Lazaro, turuka." 
John11:44 Ndipo womwalirayo anaturuka womangidwa miyendo ndi manja ndi nsaru za kumanda; ndi nkhope yace inazingidwa ndi mlezo. Yesu ananena nao, Mmasuleni iye, ndipo mlekeni amuke." 
John11:45 Cifukwa cace ambiri a mwa Ayuda amene anadza kwa Mariya, m'mene anaona cimene anacita, anakhulupirira iye." 
John11:46 Koma ena a mwa iwo anamuka kwa Afarisi, nawauza zimene Yesu adazicita." 
John11:47 Pamenepo ansembe akulu ndi Afarisi anasonkhanitsa akulu, nanena, Titani ife? cifukwa munthu uyu acita zizindikilo zambiri." 
John11:48 Ngati timleka iye kotero, onse adzakhulupirira iye; ndipo adzadza Aroma nadzacotsa malo athu ndi mtundu wathu." 
John11:49 Koma wina mmodzi wa mwa iwo, Kayafa, wokhaia mkulu wa ansembe caka comweco anati kwa iwo, Simudziwa kanthu konse inu," 
John11:50 kapena simuganiza kuti nkokoma kwa inu kuti munthu mmodzi afere anthu, ndi kuti mtundu wonse usaonongeke," 
John11:51 Koma ici sananena kwa iye yekha; koma pokhala mkulu wa ansembe caka comweco ananenera kuti Yesu akadzafera mtunduwo; 
John11:52 ndipo si cifukwa ca mtunduwo wokha ai, koma kuti akasonkhanitse pamodzi ana a Mulungu akubalalikawo." 
John11:53 Cifukwa cace, kuyambira tsiku Iomwelo anapangana kuti amuphe iye." 
John11:54 Cifukwa cace Yesu sanayandeyendanso poonekera mwa Ayuda, koma anacokapo kunka ku dziko loyandikira cipululu, kumudzi dzina lace Efraimu; nakhala komweko pamodzi ndi akuphunzira ace." 
John11:55 Koma Paskha wa Ayuda anali pafupi; ndipo ambiri anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu kucoka ku miraga, usanafike Paskha, kukadziyeretsa iwo okha." 
John11:56 Pamenepo analikumfuna Yesu, nanena wina ndi mnzace poimirira iwo m'Kacisi, Muyesa bwanji inu, sadzadza kuphwando kodi?" 
John11:57 Koma ansembe akulu ndi Afarisi adalamulira, kuti, munthu wina akadziwa pokhala iye, aulule, kuti akamgwire iye." 
John12:1 Pomwepo anatsala masiku asanu ndi limodzi asanafike Paskha, Yesu anadza ku Betaniya kumene kunali Lazaro, amene Yesu adamuukitsa kwa akufa." 
John12:2 Ndipo anamkonzera iye cakudya komweko; ndipo Marita anatumikira; koma Lazaro anali mmodzi wa iwo akuseama pacakudya pamodzi ndi iye. 
John12:3 Pamenepo Mariya m'mene adatenga muyeso umodzi wa mafuta onunkhira bwino a nardo a mtengo wace wapatali, anadzoza mapazi a Yesu, napukuta mapazi ace ndi tsitsi lace; ndipo nyumba inadzazidwa ndi mnunkho wace wa mafutawo." 
John12:4 Koma Yudase Isikariote, mmodzi wa akuphunzira ace, amene adzampereka iye, ananena," 
John12:5 Nanga mafuta onunkhira awa sanagulitsidwa cifukwa ninji ndi marupiya atheka mazana atatu, ndi kupatsidwa kwa osauka?" 
John12:6 Koma ananena ici si cifukwa analikusamalira osauka, koma cifukwa anali mbala, ndipo pokhala nalo thumba, amabazoikidwamo." 
John12:7 Pamenepo Yesu anati, Mleke iye, pakuti anacisungira ici tsiku la kuikidwa kwanga." 
John12:8 Pakuti osauka muli nao pamodzi ndi inu nthawi zonse; koma simuli ndi Ine nthawi zonse. 
John12:9 Pamenepo khamu lalikuru la Ayuda Iinadziwa kuti ali pomwepo; ndipo anadza, si cifukwa: ca Yesu yekha, koma kuti adzaone Lazaro, amene adamuukitsa kwa akufa." 
John12:10 Koma ansembe akulu anapangana kuti akaphe Lazaronso; 
John12:11 pakuti ambiri a Ayuda anacoka cifukwa ca iye, nakhulupirira Yesu." 
John12:12 M'mawa mwace khamu lalikuru la anthu amene adadza kuphwando, pakumva kuti Yesu alinkudza ku Yerusalemu," 
John12:13 anatenga makwata a kanjedza, naturuka kukakomana ndi iye, napfuula, Hosana; wolemekezeka iye wakudza m'dzina la Ambuye, ndiye Mfumu ya Israyeli." 
John12:14 Koma Yesu, m'mene adapeza kaburu anakhala pamenepo; monga mulembedwa:" 
John12:15 Usaope, mwana wamkazi wa Ziyoni; taona Mfumu yako idza wokhala pa mwana wa buru." 
John12:16 Izisanazidziwa aku phunzira ace poyamba; koma pamene Yesu analemekezedwa, pamenepo anakumbukila kuti izi zinalembedwa za iye, ndi kuti adamcitira iye izi." 
John12:17 Pamenepo khamulo limene linali pamodzi ndi iye, m'mene anaitana Lazaro kuturuka kumanda, namuukitsa kwa akufa, anacita umboni." 
John12:18 Cifukwa ca icinso khamulo linadza kudzakomana ndi iye, cifukwa anamva kuti iye adacita cizindikilo ici." 
John12:19 Cifukwa cace Afarisi ananena wina ndi mnzace, Muona kuti simupindula kanthu konse; onani dziko litsata pambuyo pace pa iye." 
John12:20 Koma panali Ahelene ena mwa iwo akukwera kunka kukalambira paphwando," 
John12:21 Ndipo iwo anadza kwa Filipo wa ku Betsaida wa m'Galileya, namfunsa iye, ndi kuti, Mbuye, tifuna kuona Yesu." 
John12:22 Filipo anadza nanena kwa Andreya; nadza Andreya ndi Filipo, nanena ndi Yesu." 
John12:23 Koma Yesu anayankha iwo, nati, Yafika nthawi, kuti Mwana wa munthu alemekezedwe." 
John12:24 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Ngati mbeu ya tirigu siigwa m'nthaka, nifa, ikhala pa yokha iyo; koma ngati ifa, ibala cipatso cambiri." 
John12:25 Iye wokonda moyo wace adzautaya; ndipo wodana ndi moyo wace m'dziko lino lapansi adzausungira ku moyo wosatha. 
John12:26 Ngati wina anditumikira Ine, anditsate; ndipo kumene kuli Ine, komwekonso kudzakhala mtumiki wanga, Ngati wina anditumikira Ine, Atate adzamcitira ulemu iyeyu," 
John12:27 Moyo wanga wabvutika tsopano; ndipo ndidzanena ciani? Atate, ndipulumutseni Ine ku nthawi iyi. Koma cifukwa ca ici ndinadzera nthawi iyi." 
John12:28 Atate, lemekezani dzina lanu. Pomwepo adadza mau ocokera Kumwamba, ndalilemekeza, ndipo ndidzalilemekezanso." 
John12:29 Cifukwa cace khamu la anthu akuimirirako, ndi kuwamva ananena kuti kwagunda. Ena ananena, Mngelo walankhula ndi iye." 
John12:30 Yesu anayankha nati, Mau awa sanafika cifukwa ca Ine, koma ca inu." 
John12:31 Tsopano pali kuweruza kwa dziko ili lapansi; mkulu wa dziko ili lapansi adzatayidwa kunja tsopano," 
John12:32 Ndipo Ine, m'mene ndikakwezedwa kudziko, ndidzakoka anthu onse kwa Ine ndekha." 
John12:33 Koma ananena ici ndi kuzindikiritsa imfa yanji akuti adzafa nayo. 
John12:34 Pamenepo khamulo linayankha iye, Tidamva ife m'cilamulo kuti Kristu akhala ku nthawi yonse; ndipo Inu munena bwanji, kuti Mwana wa munthu ayenera kukwezedwa? Mwana wa munthu amene ndani?" 
John12:35 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa iwo, Katsala kanthawi kakang'ono ndipo kuunika kuli mwa inu. 1 Yendani pokhala muli nako kuunika, kuti mdima sungakupezeni; ndipo woyenda mumdima sadziwa kumene amukako," 
John12:36 2 Pokhala muli nako kuunika, khulupirirani kuunikako, kuti mukakhale ana a kuunikako. Izi Yesu analankhula, nacoka nawabisalira." 
John12:37 Koma angakhale adacita zizindikilo zambiri zotere pamaso pao iwo sanakhulupirira iye; 
John12:38 kuti mau a Yesaya mneneri akakwaniridwe, amene anati, 3 Ambuye, wakhulupirira ndani kulalikira kwathu? Ndipo mkono wa Ambuye wabvumbulutsidwa kwa yani?" 
John12:39 Cifukwa ca ici sanathe kukhulupira, pakuti Yesaya anatinso," 
John12:40 4 Wadetsa maso ao, naumitsa mtima wao; Kuti angaone ndi maso, angazindikire ndi mtima, Nangatembenuke, Ndipo ndingawaciritse." 
John12:41 5 Izi anati Yesaya, cifukwa anaona ulemerero wace; nalankhula za iye." 
John12:42 Kungakhale kotero, ambiri a mwa akuru anakhulupirira iye; koma 6 cifukwa ca Afarisi sanabvomereza, kuti angaletsedwe m'sunagoge," 
John12:43 7 pakuti anakonda ulemerero wa anthu koposa ulemerero wa Mulungu. 
John12:44 Koma Yesu anapfuula nati, 8 iye wokhulupirira ine, sakhulupirira Ine, koma iye wondituma Ine." 
John12:45 Ndipo 9 wondiona Ine aona amene anandituma Ine 
John12:46 10 Ndadza Ine kuunika ku dziko lapansi, kuti yense wokhulupirira Ine asakhale mumdima." 
John12:47 Ndipo ngati wina akumva mau anga, ndi kusawasunga, Ine sindimweruza; pakuti 11 sindinadza kudzaweruza dziko lapansi, koma kuti ndipulumutse dziko lapansi." 
John12:48 12 iye amene akaniza Ine, ndi kusalandira mau anga, ali naye womweruza iye; 13 mau amene ndalankhula, iwowa adzamweruza tsiku lomariza." 
John12:49 14 Pakuti sindinalankhula mwa Ine ndekha; koma Atate wondituma Ine, yemweyu anandipatsa Ine lamulo, limene ndikanene, ndi limene ndikalankhule." 
John12:50 Ndipo ndidziwa kuti lamulo lace liri moyo wosatha; cifukwa cace zimene ndilankhula, monga momwe Atate wanena ndi Ine, momwemo ndilankhula." 
John13:1 Koma pasanafike phwando la Paskha, Yesu, podziwa kuti nthawi yace idadza yakucoka kuturuka m'dziko lino lapansi, kunka kwa Atate, m'mene anakonda ace a iye yekha a m'dziko lapansi, anawakomia kufikira cimariziro." 
John13:2 Ndipo pokhala pamgonero, mdierekezi adathakuika mu mtima wace wa Yudase mwana wa Simoni Isikariote, kuti akampereke iye," 
John13:3 Yesu, podziwa kuti Atate adampatsa iye zonse m'manja mwace, ndi kuti anacokera kwa Mulungu, namuka kwa Mulungu," 
John13:4 ananyamuka pamgonero, nabvula malaya ace; ndipo m'mene adatenga copukutira, anadzimanga m'cuuno." 
John13:5 Pomwepo anathira madzi m'nsambidwe, nayamba kusambitsa mapazi a akuphunzira ace, ndi kuwapukuta ndi copukutira, cimene anadzimanga naco," 
John13:6 Anadza pomwepo kwa Simoni Petro. Iyeyu ananena ndi iye, Ambuye, kodi Inu mundisambitsa ine mapazi?" 
John13:7 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Cimene ndicita Ine, sucidziwa tsopano; koma udzadziwa m'tsogolo mwace." 
John13:8 Petro ananena ndi iye, Simudzasambitsa mapazi anga ku nthawi yonse. Yesu anamyankha iye, Ngati sindikusambitsa iwe ulibe colandira pamodzi ndi Ine." 
John13:9 Simoni Petro ananena ndi iye, Ambuye, si mapazi anga okha, komanse manja ndi mutu." 
John13:10 Yesu ananena naye, Amene anatha kusamba alibe kusowa koma kusamba mapazi, koma ayera monse: ndipo inu ndinu oyera, koma si nonse ai." 
John13:11 Pakuti anadziwa amene adzampereka iye; cifukwa ca ici anati, Simuli oyera nonse." 
John13:12 Pamenepo, atatha iye kusambitsa mapazi ao, ndi kutenga malaya ace, anaseamanso, nati kwa iwo, Nanga cimene ndakucitirani inu; mucizindikira kodi?" 
John13:13 Inu mundicha Ine Mphunzitsi, ndi Ambuye: ndipo munena bwino; pakuti ndine amene." 
John13:14 Cifukwa cace, ngati Ine Ambuye ndi Mphunzitsi, ndasambitsa mapazi anu, inunso muyenera kusambitsana mapazi wina ndi mnzaceo" 
John13:15 Pakuti ndakupatsani inu citsanzo, kuti, monga Ine ndakucitirani inu, inunso mucite." 
John13:16 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Kapolo sali wamkulu ndi mbuye wace; kapena mtumwi sali wamkuru ndi womtuma iye," 
John13:17 Ngati mudziwa izi, odala inu ngati muzicita." 
John13:18 Sindinena za inu nonse; ndidziwa amene ndawasankha: koma kuti colemba cikwaniridwe, iye wakudya mkate wanga anatsalimira pa Ine cinendene cace." 
John13:19 Kuyambira tsopano ndinena kwa inu, cisadacitike, kuti pamene citacitika, mukakhulupire kuti ndine amene." 
John13:20 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, Iye wolandira amene ali yense ndimtuma, andilandira Ine; koma wolandira Ine alandira wondituma Ine." 
John13:21 Yesu m'mene adanenaizi, anabvutika mumzimu, nacita umboni, nati, Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, kuti mmodzi wa inu adzandipereka Ine." 
John13:22 Akuphunzira analikupenyanawina kwa mnzace, ndi kusinkhasinkha kuti ananena za yani." 
John13:23 Koma mmodzi wa akuphunzira ace, amene Yesu anamkonda, analikutsamira pa cifuwa ca Yesu." 
John13:24 Pamenepo Simoni Petro anamkodola nanena naye, Utiuze ndiye yani amene anena za iye." 
John13:25 Iyeyu potsamira pomwepo, pa cifuwa ca Yesu, anena ndi iye. Ambuye, ndiye yani?" 
John13:26 Ndipo Yesu anayankha, Ndi iyeyu, amene Ine ndidzamsunsira nthongo ndi kumpatsa, Pamenepo, m'mene anasunsa nthongo anaitenga naipatsa Yudase mwana wa Simoni Isikariote." 
John13:27 Ndipopambuyo pace pa nthongoyo, Satana analowa mwa iyeyu. Pamenepo Yesu ananena naye, Cimene ucita, cita msanga," 
John13:28 Kama palibe mmodzi wa iwo akuseamako anadziwa cimene anafuna, poti atere naye." 
John13:29 Pakuti popeza Yudase anali nalo thumba, enaanalikuyesakuti Yesu ananena kwa iye, Gula zimene zitisowa paphwando; kapena, kuti apatse kanthu kwa aumphawi." 
John13:30 Pamenepo iyeyo m'mene adalandira nthongo, anaturuka pomwepo, Koma kunali usiku." 
John13:31 Tsono m'mene adaturuka, Yesu ananena, Tsopano walemekezeka Mwana wa munthu, ndipo Mulungu walemekezedwa mwa iye;" 
John13:32 ndipo Mulungu adzamlemekeza iye mwa iye yekha, adzamlemekeza iye tsopano apa." 
John13:33 Tiana, katsala kanthawi ndikhala ndi inu. Mudzandifunafuna Ine; ndipo monga ndinanena kwa Ayuda, kuti kumene ndinkako Ine, inu simungathe kudza, momwemo ndinena kwa inu tsopano." 
John13:34 Ndikupatsani inu lamulo latsopano, kuti mukondane wina ndi mnzace; monga ndakonda Inu, kuti inunso mukondane wina ndi mnzace." 
John13:35 1 Mwa ici adzazindikira onse kuti muli akuphunzira anga, ngati muli naco cikondano wina ndi mnzace." 
John13:36 Simoni Petro anena ndi iye, Ambuye, mumuka kuti? Yesu anayankha, Kumene ndimukako sungathe kunditsata Ine tsopano; koma, 2 udzanditsata bwino lomwe." 
John13:37 Petro ananena ndi iye, Ambuye, sindingathe kukutsatani Inu tsopano cifukwa ninji? 3 Ndidzataya moyo wanga cifukwa ca Inu." 
John13:38 Yesu anayankha, Moyo wako kodi udzautaya cifukwa ca Ine? Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa iwe, Asanalire tambala udzandikana Ine katatu." 
John14:1 Mtima wanu usabvutike; mukhulupirira Mulungu, khulupirirani Inenso." 
John14:2 M'nyumba ya Atate wanga alimo malo okhalamo ambiri. Ngati sikudali kutero, ndikadakuuzani inu; pakuti ndipita kukukonzerani inu malo." 
John14:3 Ndipo ngati ndipita kukakonzera inu malo, ndidzabweranso, ndipo ndidzalandira inu kwa Ine ndekha; kuti kumene kuli Ineko, mukakhale inunso." 
John14:4 Ndipo kumene ndinkako Ine, mudziwa njira yace." 
John14:5 Tomasi ananena ndi Iye, Ambuye, sitidziwa kumene munkako; tidziwa njira bwanji?" 
John14:6 Yesu ananena naye, ine ndinenjira, ndi coonadi, ndi moyo. Palibe munthu adza kwa Atate, koma mwa Ine." 
John14:7 Mukadazindikira ine mukadadziwa Atate wanganso; kuyambira tsopano mumzindikira iye, ndipo mwamuona iye." 
John14:8 Filipo ananena ndi iye, Ambuye, tionetsereni ife Atate, ndipo citikwanira." 
John14:9 Yesu ananena naye, Kodi ndiri ndiinu nthawi yaikuru yotere, ndipo sunandizindikira, Filipo? iye amene wandiona Ine waona Atate; unena iwe bwanji, Mutionetsere Atate?" 
John14:10 Sukhulupirira kodi kuti ndiri Ine mwa Atate, ndi Atate ali mwa Ine? Mau amene ndinena Ine kwa inu sindilankhula kwa Ine ndekha; koma Atate wokhala mwa Ine acita nchito zace." 
John14:11 Khulupirirani Ine, kuti Inendiri mwa Atate ndi Atate ali mwa Ine; koma ngati si comweco, khulupirirani Ine cifukwa ca nchito zomwe." 
John14:12 Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, Wokhulupirira Ine, nchito zimene ndicita Ine adzazicitanso iyeyu; ndipo adzacita zoposa izi; cifukwa ndipita Ine kwa Atate." 
John14:13 Ndipo cimene ciri conse mukafunse m'dzina langa, ndidzacicita, kuti Atate akalemekezedwe mwa Mwana." 
John14:14 Ngati mudzapempha kanthu m'dzina langa, ndidzacita." 
John14:15 Ngati mukonda Ine, sungani malamulo anga." 
John14:16 Ndipo Ine ndidzapempha Atate, ndipo adzakupatsani inu Nkhoswe yina, kuti akhale ndi inu ku nthawi yonse," 
John14:17 ndiye Mzimu wa coonadi; amene dziko lapansi silingathe kumlandira, pakuti silimuona iye, kapena kumzindikira iye. Inu mumzindikira iye; cifukwa akhala ndi inu nadzakhala mwa inu." 
John14:18 Sindidza-kusiyani inu mukhale ana amasiye; ndidza kwa inu. 
John14:19 Katsala kanthawi, ndipo dziko lapansi silindionanso Ine; koma inu mundiona; popeza Ine ndiri ndi moyo inunso mudzakhala ndi moyo." 
John14:20 Tsiku lo mwelo mudzazindikira kuti ndiri Ine mwa Atate wanga, ndi inu mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa inu." 
John14:21 Iye wakukhala nao malamulo anga, ndi kuwasunga, iyeyu ndiye wondikonda Ine; koma wondikonda Ine adzakondedwa ndi Atate wanga, ndipo line ndidzamkonda, ndipo ndidzadzionetsandekha kwa iye." 
John14:22 Yudase, si Isikariote, ananena ndi iye, Ambuye, cacitika ciani kuti muziti mudzionetsa nokha kwa ife, koma si kwa dziko lapansi?" 
John14:23 Yesu anayankha nati kwa iye, Ngati wina akonda Ine, adzasunga mau anga; ndipo Atate wanga adzamkonda, ndipo tidzadza kwa iye, ndipo tidzayesa kwa iye mokhalamo." 
John14:24 Wosandikonda Ine sasunga mau anga; ndipo 1 mau amene mumva sali mau anga, koma a Atate wondituma Ine." 
John14:25 Izi ndalankhula nanu, pakukhala ndi inu." 
John14:26 Koma 2 Nkhosweyo, Mzimu Woyera, amene Atate adzamtuma m'dzina langa, 3 Iyeyo adzaphunzitsa Inu zonse, nadzakumbutsa inu zinthu zonse zimene ndinanena kwa inu." 
John14:27 4 Mtendere ndikusiyirani inu, mtendere wanga ndikupatsani; Ine sindikupatsani inu monga dziko lapansi lipatsa. 5 Mtima wanu usabvutike, kapena usacite mantha." 
John14:28 Mwamva kuti Ine ndinanena kwa inu, 6 Ndimuka, ndipo ndidza kwa inu. Mukadandikonda Ine, mukadakondwera kuti ndipita kwa Atate; 7 pakuti Atate ali wamkuru ndi Ine." 
John14:29 Ndipo tsopano 8 ndakuuzani cisanacitike, kuti pamene citacitika mukakhulupire." 
John14:30 Sindidzalankhulanso zambiri ndi inu, pakuti 9 mkuru wa dziko lapansi adza; ndipo alibe kanthu mwa Ine;" 
John14:31 koma kuti dziko lapansi lizindikire kuti ndikonda Atate, ndikuti 10 ndicita monga momwe Atate wandilamulira. Nyamukani, tizimuka kucokera kuno." 
John15:1 Ine ndine mpesa weniweni, ndipo Atate wanga ndiye wam'munda." 
John15:2 Nthambi iri yonse ya mwa Ine yosabala cipatso, aicotsa; ndi iri y'onse yakubala cipatso, aisadza, kuti ikabale cipatso cocuruka." 
John15:3 Mwakhala okonzeka tsopano inu cifukwa ca mau amene ndalankhula ndi inu," 
John15:4 Khalani mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa inu. Monga nthambi siingathe kubala cipatso pa yokha, ngati siikhala mwampesa; motere mulibe inunso ngati simukhala mwa Ine." 
John15:5 Ine ndine mpesa, inu ndinu nthambi zace: wakukhala mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa iye, ameneyo abala cipatso cambiri; pakuti kopanda Ine simungathe kucita kanthu." 
John15:6 Ngati wina sakhala mwa Ine, watayika kunja monga nthambi, nafota; ndipo azisonkhanitsa nazitaya kumoto, nazitentha." 
John15:7 Ngati mukhala mwa Ine, ndi mau anga akhala mwa inu, pemphani cimene ciri conse mucifuna ndipo cidzacitika kwa inu." 
John15:8 Mwa ici alemekezedwa Atate wanga, kuti mubale cipatso cambiri; ndipo mudzakhala akuphunzira anga." 
John15:9 Monga momwe Atate wandikonda Ine, Inenso ndakonda inu; khalani m'cikondi canga." 
John15:10 Ngati musunga malamulo anga mudzakhala m'cikondi canga; monga Ine ndasunga malamulo a Atate wanga, ndipo ndikhala m'cikondi cace." 
John15:11 Izi ndalankhula ndi inu, kuti cimwemwe canga cikhale mwa inu, ndi kuti cimwemwe canu cidzale." 
John15:12 Lamulo langa ndi ili, kuti mukondane wina ndi mnzace, monga ndakonda inu." 
John15:13 Palibe munthu ali naco cikondi coposa ici, cakuti munthu ataya moyo wace cifukwa ca abwenzi ace." 
John15:14 Muli abwenzianga inu, ngati muzicita zimene ndikulamulirani inu." 
John15:15 Sindichanso inu akapolo; cifukwa kapolo sadziwa cimene mbuye wace acita; koma ndacha inu abwenzi; cifukwa zonse zimene ndazimva kwa Atate wanga ndakudziwitsani. 
John15:16 Inu simunandisankha Ine, koma Ine ndinakusankhani inu, ndipo ndinakuikani, kuti mukamuke inu ndi kubala cipatso, ndi kuti cipatso canu cikhale; kuti cimene ciri conse mukapempha Atate m'dzina langa akakupatseni inu." 
John15:17 Zinthu izi ndilamulira inu, kuti mukondane wina ndi mnzace." 
John15:18 Ngati dziko lapansi lida inu, mudziwa kuti lidada Ine lisanayambe kuda inu." 
John15:19 Mukadakhala a dziko lapansi, dziko lapansi likadakonda zace za lokha; koma popeza simuli a dziko lapansi, koma Ine ndinakusankhani inu mwa dziko lapansi, cifukwa ca ici likudani inu." 
John15:20 Kumbukilani mau amene Ine ndinanena kwa inu, Kapolo sali wamkuru ndi mbuye wace. Ngati anandilondalonda Ine, adzakulonda-londani inunso; ngati anasunga mau anga, adzasunga anunso." 
John15:21 Koma izi zonse adzakucitirani cifukwa ca dzina langa, cifukwa sadziwa wondituma Ine." 
John15:22 Sindikadadza ndi kulankhula nao sakadakhala nalo cimo; koma tsopano alibe cowiringula pa macimo ao. 
John15:23 Iye wondida Ine, adanso Atate wanga." 
John15:24 Sindikadacita mwa iwo nchito zosacita wina, sakadakhala nalo cimo; koma tsopano anaona, nada: Ine ndi Atate wanganso," 
John15:25 Koma citero, kuti mau olembedwa m'cilamulo cao akwaniridwe, kuti, Anandida Ine kopanda cifukwa." 
John15:26 Koma pamene wafika Nkhoswe, amene Ine ndidzamtuma kwa inu kucokera kwa Atate, ndiye Mzimu wa coonadi, amene aturuka kwa Atate, Iyeyu adzandicitira Ine umboni." 
John15:27 Ndipo inunso mucita umboni, pakuti muli ndi Ine kuyambira ciyambi." 
John16:1 Izi ndalankhula ndi inu kuti mungakhumudwitsidwe. 
John16:2 Adzakuturutsani m'masunagoge; koma ikudza nthawi imene yense wakupha inu adzayesa kuti atumikira Mulungu," 
John16:3 Ndipo izi adzacita, cifukwa sanadziwa Atate, kapena Ine." 
John16:4 Koma zinthu izi ndalankhula ndi inu kuti ikadza nthawi yao, mukakumbukire kuti ndinakuuzani. Koma izi sindinanena kwa inu kuyambira paciyambi, cifukwa ndinali pamodzi ndi inu." 
John16:5 Koma tsopano ndimuka kwa iye wondituma Ine; ndipo palibe wina mwa inu andifunsa Ine, Munka kuti?" 
John16:6 Koma cifukwa ndalankhula izi ndi inu cisoni cadzala mumtima mwanu. 
John16:7 Koma ndinena Ine coonadi ndi inu; kuyenera kwa inu kuti ndicoke Ine; pakuti ngati sindicoka, Nkhosweyo sadzadza kwa inu; koma ngati ndipita ndidzamtuma iye kwa inu." 
John16:8 Ndipo atadza Iyeyo, adzatsutsa dziko lapansi za macimo, ndi za cilungamo, ndi za ciweruziro;" 
John16:9 za macimo, cifukwa sakhulupirira Ine;" 
John16:10 za cilungamo, cifukwa ndinka kwa Atate, ndipo simundionanso;" 
John16:11 za ciweruziro, cifukwa mkuru wa dziko ili lapansi waweruzidwa." 
John16:12 Ndiri nazo zambirinso zakunena kwa inu, koma simungathe kuzisenza tsopano lino." 
John16:13 Koma atadza Iyeyo, Mzimu wa coonadi, adzatsogolera inu m'coonadi conse; pakuti sadzalankhula za iye mwini; koma zinthu ziri zonse adzazimva, adzazilankhula; ndipo zinthu zirinkudza adzakulalikirani." 
John16:14 Iyeyo adzalemekeza Ine; cifukwa adzatenga za mwa Ine, nadzalalikira kwa inu." 
John16:15 Zinthu ziri zonse Atate ali nazo ndi zanga; cifukwa cace ndinati, kuti atenga za mwa Ine, nadzalalikira kwa inu." 
John16:16 Katsala kanthawi, ndipo simundionanso Ine, ndipo kanthawinso, ndipo mudzandiona Ine." 
John16:17 Mwa akuphunzira ace tsono anati wina ndi mnzace, ici nciani cimene anena ndi ife, Kanthawi ndipo simundiona; ndiponso kanthawi, ndipo mudzandiona; ndipo, cifukwa ndimuka kwa Atate?" 
John16:18 Cifukwa cace ananena, ici nciani cimene anena, Kanthawi? Sitidziwa cimene alankhula." 
John16:19 Yesu anazindikira kuti analikufuna kumfunsa iye, ndipo anati kwa iwo, Kodi mulikufunsana wina ndi mnzace za ici, kuti ndinati, Kanthawi ndipo simundiona Ine, ndiponso kanthawi nimudzandiona Ine?" 
John16:20 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi inu, kuti mudzalira ndi kubuma maliro inu, koma dziko lapansi lidzakondwera; mudzacita cisoni inu, koma cisoni canu cidzasandulika cimwemwe." 
John16:21 Mkazi pamene akuti abale ali naco cisoni, cifukwa yafika nthawi yace; koma pamene wabala mwana, sakumbukilanso kusaukako, cifukwa ca cimwemwe kuti wabadwa munthu ku dziko lapansi." 
John16:22 Ndipo inu tsono muli naco cisoni tsopano lino, koma ndidzakuonaninso, ndipo mtima wanu udzakondwera, ndipo palibe wina adzacotsa kwa inu cimwemwe canu." 
John16:23 Ndipo tsiku limenelo simudzandifunsa kanthu. Indetu, indetu, ndinena kwa inu, Ngati mudzapempha Atate kanthu, adzakupatsani inu m'dzina langa." 
John16:24 Kufikira tsopano simunapempha kanthu m'dzina langa; pemphani, ndipo mudzalandira, kuti cimwemwe canu cikwaniridwe." 
John16:25 Zinthu izi ndalankhula ndi inu m'mafanizo; ikudza nthawi imene sindidzalankhula ndi inu m'mafanizo, koma ndidzakulalikirani inu momveka za Atate." 
John16:26 Tsiku limenelo mudzapempha m'dzina langa; ndipo sindinena kwa inu kuti Ine ndidzafunsira inu kwa Atate; 
John16:27 pakuti Atate yekha akonda inu, cifukwa inu mwandikonda Ine, ndi kukhulupirira kuti Ine ndinaturuka kwa Atate." 
John16:28 Ndinaturuka mwa Atate, ndipo ndadza ku dziko lapansi: ndilisiyanso dziko lapansi, ndipo ndipita kwa Atate." 
John16:29 Akuphunzira ace ananena, Onani, tsopano mulankhula zomveka, ndipo mulibe kunena ciphiphiritso," 
John16:30 Tsopano tidziwa kuti mudziwa zonse, ndipo mulibe kusowa kuti wina akafunse Inu; mwa ici tikhulupirira kuti munaturuka kwa Mulungu." 
John16:31 Yesu anayankha iwo, Kodi mukhulupirira tsopano?" 
John16:32 Onani ikudza nthawi, ndipo yafika, imene mudzabalalitsidwa, yense ku zace za yekha, ndipo mudzandisiya Ine pa ndekha. Ndipo sindikhala pa ndekha, cifukwa Atate ali pamodzi ndi Ine," 
John16:33 Zinthu izi ndalankhula ndi inu, kuti mwa Ine mukakhale nao mtendere. M'dziko lapansi mudzakhala naco cibvuto, koma limbikani mtima; ndalilaka dziko lapansi Ine." 
John17:1 Zinthu izi analankhula Yesu; ndipo m'mene anakweza maso ace Kumwamba, anati, Atate, yafika nthawi; lemekezani Mwana wanu, kuti Mwana wanu akulemekezeoi Inu;" 
John17:2 monga mwampatsa iye ulamuliro pa thupi liri lonse, kuti onse amene mwampatsa iye, awapatse iwo moyo wosatha." 
John17:3 Koma moyo wosatha ndi uwu, kuti akadziwe Inu Mulungu woona yekha, ndi Yesu Kristu amene munamtuma." 
John17:4 Ine ndalemekeza Inu pa dziko lapansi, m'mene ndinatsiriza nchito imene munandipatsa ndicite." 
John17:5 Ndipo tsopano, Atate Inu, lemekezani Ine ndi Inu nokha ndi ulemerero umene ndinali nao ndi Inu lisanakhale dziko lapansi." 
John17:6 Ndalionetsera dzina lanu kwa anthu amene mwandipatsa Ine m'dziko lapansi; anali anu, ndipo mwandipatsa Ine iwo; ndipo adasunga mau anu." 
John17:7 Azindikira tsopane kuti zinthu ziri zonse zimene mwandipatsa Ine zicokera kwa Inu; 
John17:8 cifukwa mau amene munandipatsa Ine ndinapatsa iwo; ndipo analandira, nazindikira koona kuti ndinaturuka kwa Inu, ndipo anakhulupira kuti Inu munandituma Ine." 
John17:9 Ine ndiwapempherera iwo; sindipempherera dziko lapansi, koma iwo amene mwandipatsa Ine," 
John17:10 cifukwa ali anu: ndipo zanga zonse ziri zanu, ndi zanu ziri zanga; ndipo ndilemekezedwa mwa iwo." 
John17:11 Sindikhalanso m'dziko lapansi, koma iwo ali m'dziko lapansi, ndipo Ine ndidza kwa Inu. Atate. Woyera, sungani awa m'dzina lanu amene mwandipatsa Ine, kuti akhale mmodzi, monga Ife." 
John17:12 Pamenendinakhala nao, Ine ndinalikuwasunga iwo m'dzina lanu amene mwandipatsa Ine; ndipo ndinawasunga, ndipo sanatayika mmodzi yense wa iwo, koma mwana wa citayiko, kuti lembo likwaniridwe." 
John17:13 Koma tso pane ndidza kwa Inu; ndipo izi ndilankhula m'dziko lapansi, kuti akhale naco cimwemwe canga cokwaniridwa mwa iwo okha." 
John17:14 Ine ndawapatsa iwo mau anu; ndipo dziko lapansi linadana nao, cifukwa sakhala a dziko lapansi, monga Ine sindikhala wa dziko lapansi." 
John17:15 Sindipempha kuti muwacotse iwo m'dziko lapansi, koma kuti muwasunge iwo kuletsa woipayo." 
John17:16 Siali adziko lapansi monga Ine sindiri wa dziko lapansi. 
John17:17 Patulani iwo m'coonadi; mau anu ndi coonadi. 
John17:18 Monga momwe munandituma Ine ku dziko lapansi, Inenso ndinatuma iwo ku dziko lapansi," 
John17:19 Ndipo cifukwa ca iwo Ine ndidzipatula ndekha kuti iwonso akhale opatulidwa m'coonadi. 
John17:20 Koma sindipempherera iwo okha, komanso iwo akukhulupirira Ine cifukwa ca mau ao;" 
John17:21 kuti onse akakhale amodzi, monga Inu Atate mwa Ine, ndi Ine mwa Inu, kuti iwonso akakhale mwa Ife: kuti dziko lapansi likakhulupire kuti Inu munandituma Ine." 
John17:22 Ndipo ulemerero umene mwandipatsa Ine ndapatsa Iwo; kuti akhale amodzi, monga Ife tiri mmodzi;" 
John17:23 Ine mwa iwo, ndi Inu mwa Ine, kuti akhale angwiro mwa mmodzi; kutr dziko lapansi lizindikire kuti Inu munandituma Ine, nimunawakonda iwo, monga momwe munakonda Ine," 
John17:24 1 Atate, amene mwandipatsa Ine, ndifuna kuti, kumene ndiri Ine, iwonso akhale pamodzi ndi Ine; kuti ayang'anire ulemerero wanga, umene mwandipatsa Ine; 2 pakuti munandikonda Inelisanakhazildke dziko lapansi." 
John17:25 Atate wolungama, 3 dziko lapansi silinadziwa Inu, koma 4 Ine ndinadziwa Inu; ndipo 5 iwo anazindikira kuti munandituma Ine;" 
John17:26 ndipo 6 ndinazindikiritsa iwo dzina lanu, ndipo ndidzalizindikiritsa; kuti cikondi 7 cimene munandikonda naco cikhale mwa iwo, ndi Ine mwa iwo." 
John18:1 M'mene Yesu adanena izi, anaturuka ndi akuphunzira ace, kunka tsidya lija la mtsinje wa Kedroni, kumene kunali munda, umene analowamo iye ndi akuphunzira ace." 
John18:2 Koma Yudasenso amene akampereka iye, anadziwa malowa; cifukwa Yesu akamkako kawiri kawiri ndi akuphunzira ace." 
John18:3 Pamenepo Yudase, m'mene adatenga gulu la asilikari ndi anyamata, kwa ansembe akulu ndi Afarisi, anadza komweko ndi nyali ndi miuni ndi zida." 
John18:4 Pamenepo Yesu, podziwa zonse zirinkudza pa iye, anaturuka, nati kwa iwo, Mufuna yani?" 
John18:5 Anayankha iye, Yesu Mnazarayo. Yesu ananena nao, Ndine. Koma Yudase yemwe, wompereka iye, anaima nao pamodzi." 
John18:6 Ndipo m'mene anati kwa iwo, Ndine, anabwerera m'mbuyo, nagwa pansi." 
John18:7 Pamenepo anawafunsanso, Mufuna yani? koma iwo anati, Yesu Mnazarayo." 
John18:8 Yesu anayankha, Ndati, Ndine; cifukwa cace ngati mufuna Ine, lekani awa amuke;" 
John18:9 kuti akwaniridwe mau amene ati, Mwa iwo amene mwandipatsa Ine, sindinataya mmodzi." 
John18:10 Pamenepo Simoni Petro pokhala nalo lupanga, analisolola nakantha kapolo wa mkulu wa ansembe, namsenga khutu lace lamanja. Koma dzina lace la kapoloyo ndiye Malko." 
John18:11 Pamenepo Yesu anati kwa Petro, Longa Iupanga m'cimakecace; cikho cimene Atate wandipatsa Ine sindimwere ici kodi?" 
John18:12 Ndipo khamulo ndi kapitao wamkuru, ndi anyamata a Ayuda anagwira Yesu nammanga iye," 
John18:13 nayamba kupita naye kwa Anasi; pakuti anali mpongozi wa Kayafa, amene anali mkulu wa ansembe caka comweco." 
John18:14 Koma Kayafa anali uja wakulangiza Ayuda, kuti kuyenera munthu mmodzi afere anthu." 
John18:15 Koma Simoni Petro ndi wophunzira wina anatsata Yesu. Koma wophunzira ameneyo anali wodziwika kwa mkulu wa ansembe, nalowa pamodzi ndi Yesu, m'bwalo la mkulu wa ansembe;" 
John18:16 koma Petro anaima kukhomo kunja, Cifukwa cace wophunzira winayo amene anadziwika kwa mkulu wa ansembe, anaturuka nalankhula ndi wapakhomo, nalowetsa Petro." 
John18:17 Pamenepo namwali wapakhomoyo ananena kwa Petro, Kodi suli iwenso wa akuphunzira a munthu uyu? Iyeyu ananena, Sindine." 
John18:18 Koma akapolo ndi anyamata analikuimirirako, atasonkha mota wamakara; pakuti kunali kuzizira; ndipo analikuotha moto; koma Petronso anali nao alikuimirira ndi kuotha moto." 
John18:19 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe anafunsa Yesu za akuphunzira ace, ndi ciphunzitso cace." 
John18:20 Yesu anayankha iye, Ine ndalankhula zomveka kwa dziko lapansi; ndinaphunzitsa Ine nthawi zonse m'sunagoge ndi m'Kacisi, kumene amasonkhana Ayuda onse; ndipo mobisika sindinalankhula kanthu." 
John18:21 Undifunsiranji Ine? funsa iwo amene adamva cimene ndinalankhula nao; taona, amenewo adziwa cimene ndinanena Ine." 
John18:22 Koma m'mene iye adanena izi, mmodzi wa anyamata akuimirirako anapanda Yesu khofu, ndi kuti, Kodi uyankha mkulu wa ansembe comweco?" 
John18:23 Yesu anayankha iye, Ngati ndalankhula coipa, cita umboni wa coipaco, koma ngati bwino, undipandiranji?" 
John18:24 Koma Anasi adamtumiza iye womangidwa kwa Kayafa mkulu wa ansembe. 
John18:25 Koma Simoni Petro analikuimirira ndi kuotha moto. Pomwepo anati kwa iye, Suli iwenso wa akuphunzira ace kodi? Iyeyu anakana, nati, Sindine." 
John18:26 Mmodzi wa akapolo a mkulu wa ansembe ndiye mbale wace wa uja amene Petro anamdula khutu, ananena, Ine sindinakuona iwe kodi m'munda pamodzi ndi iye?" 
John18:27 Pamenepo Petro anakananso; ndipo pomwepo analira tambala. 
John18:28 Pamenepo anamtenga Yesu kucokera kwa Kayafa kupita ku Pretorio; koma munali mamawa; ndipo iwo sanalowa ku Pretorio, kuti angadetsedwe, koma kuti akadye Paskha." 
John18:29 Cifukwa cace Pilato anaturukira kunja kwa iwo, nati, Cifukwa canji mwadza naco ca munthu uyu?" 
John18:30 Anayankha nati kwa iye, Akadakhala wosacita zoipa uyu sitikadampereka iye kwa inu." 
John18:31 Ndipo Pilato anati kwa iwo, Mumtenge iye inu, ndi kumweruza iye monga mwa cilamulo canu. Ayuda anati kwa iye, Tiribe ulamuliro wakupha munthu ali yense;" 
John18:32 kuti mau a Yesu akwaniridwe, amene ananena akuzindikiritsa imfa imene, akuti adzafa nayo." 
John18:33 Cifukwa cace Pilato analowanso m'Pretorio, naitana Yesu, nati kwa iye, Iwe ndiwe Mfumu ya Ayuda kodi?" 
John18:34 Yesu anayankha, Kodi munena ici mwa inu nokha, kapena ena anakuuzani za Ine?" 
John18:35 Pilato anayankha, ndiri ine Myuda kodi? Mtundu wako ndi ansembe akulu anakupereka kwa ine; wacita ciani?" 
John18:36 Yesu anayankha, Ufumu wanga suli wa dziko lino lapansi; ufumu wanga ukadakhala wa dziko lino lapansi, anyamata anga akadalimbika nkhondo, kuti ndisaperekedwe kwa Ayuda; koma tsopano ufumu wanga suli wocokera konkuno." 
John18:37 Pamenepo Pilato anati kwa iye, Nanga kodi ndiwe Mfumu? Yesu anayankha, Munena kuti ndine Mfumu. Ndinabadwira ici Ine, ndipo ndinadzera ici kudza ku dziko lapansi, kuti ndikacite umboni ndi coonadi. Yense wakukhala mwa coonadi amva mau anga." 
John18:38 Pilato ananena kwa iye, Coonadi nciani? Ndipo pamene adanena ici, anaturukiranso kwa Ayudawo, nanena nao, vine sindipeza konse cifukwa mwa iye." 
John18:39 Koma muli nao makhalidwe, akuti ndimamasulira inu mmodzi pa Paskha; kodi mufuna tsono kuti ndimasulire inu Mfumu ya Ayuda?" 
John18:40 Pomwepo anapfuulanso, nanena, Si uyu, koma Baraba. Koma Baraba anali wacifwamba." 
John19:1 Pamenepo tsono Pilato anatenga Yesu, namkwapula." 
John19:2 Ndipo asilikari, m'mene analuka korona waminga anambveka pamutu pace, nampfunda iye maraya acibakuwa;" 
John19:3 nadza kwa iye, nanena, Tikuoneni, Mfumu ya Ayuda! nampanda khofu." 
John19:4 Ndipo Pilato anaturukanso kunja, nanena nao, Taonani, ndidza naye kwa inu kunja kuti mudziwe kuti sindipeza mwa iye cifukwa ciri conse." 
John19:5 Pamenepo Yesu anaturuka kunja, atabvala korona waminga; ndi maraya acibakuwa, Ndipo ananena nao, Taonani munthuyu!" 
John19:6 Ndipo pamene ansembe akulu ndi anyamata anamuona iye, anapfuula nanena, Mpacikeni, mpacikeni, Pilato ananena nao, Mtengeni iye inu nimumpaeike; pakuti ine sindipeza cifukwa mwa: iye." 
John19:7 Ayuda anamyankha iye, Tiri naco cilamulo ife, ndipo monga mwa cilamuloco ayenera kufa, cifukwa anadziyesera Mwana wa Mulungu." 
John19:8 Ndipo pamene Pilato anamva mau awa, anaopa koposa." 
John19:9 Ndipo analowanso ku Pretorio, nanena kwa Yesu, Mucoka kuti? koma Yesu sanamyankha kanthu." 
John19:10 Cifukwa cace Pilato ananena kwa iye, Simulankhula ndi ine kodi? simudziwa kodi kuti ulamuliro ndiri nao wakukumasulani, ndipo ndiri nao ulamuliro wakukupacikani?" 
John19:11 Yesu anamyankha iye, Simukadakhala nao ulamuliro uli wonse pa Ine, ngati sukadapatsidwa kwa inu kucokera Kumwamba; cifukwa ca ici iye wondipereka Ine kwa inu ali nalo cimo loposa." 
John19:12 Pa ici Pilato anafuna kumasula iye; koma Ayuda anapfuula, ndi kunena, Ngati mumasula ameneyo, simuli bwenzi la Kaisara; yense wodziyesera yekha mfumu atsutsana naye Kaisara." 
John19:13 Pamenepo Pilato, m'mene adamva mau awa, anaturuka ndi Yesu, nakhala pansi pa mpando woweruzira kumalo dzina lace; Bwalo lamiyala, koma m'Cihebri, Gabata," 
John19:14 Koma linali tsiku lokonza Paskha; panali monga ora lacisanu ndi cimodzi. Ndipo ananena kwa Ayuda, Taonani, Mfumu yanu!" 
John19:15 Pamenepo anapfuula iwowa, Cotsani, Cotsani, mpacikeni iye! Pilato ananena nao, Ndipacike Mfumu yanu kodi? Ansembe akulu anayankha, Tiribe Mfumu koma Kaisara." 
John19:16 Ndipo pamenepo anampereka iye kwa iwo kutiampacike, Pamenepo anatenga Yesu;" 
John19:17 ndipo anasenza mtanda yekha, naturuka kunka ku malo ochedwa Maloa-bade, amene achedwa m'Cihebri, Golgota:" 
John19:18 kumene anampacika Iye; ndipo pamodzi ndi iye awiri ena, cakuno ndi cauko, koma Yesu pakati." 
John19:19 Koma Pilato analemba lembo, naliika pamtanda. Koma panalembedwa, YESU MNAZARAYO, MFUMU YA AYUDA." 
John19:20 Ndipo lembo ilo analiwerenga ambiri a Ayuda; cifukwa malo amene Yesu anapaeikidwapo anali pafupipa mudziwo; ndipo linalembedwa m'Cihebri, ndi m'Ciroma, ndi m'Cihelene." 
John19:21 Pamenepo ansembe akulu a Ayuda, ananena kwa Pilato, Musalembe, Mfumu ya Ayuda; koma kuti Iyeyu anati, Ndiri Mfumu ya Ayuda." 
John19:22 Pilato anayankha, Cimene ndalemba, ndalemba." 
John19:23 Pamenepo asilikari, m'mene adapacika Yesu, anatenga zobvala zace, nadula panai, natenga wina cina, wina cina, ndiponso maraya; koma maraya anaombedwa monsemo kuyambira pamwamba pace, analibe msoko." 
John19:24 Cifukwa cace anati wina kwa mnzace, Tisang'ambe awa, koma ticite maere, awa akhale a yani; kuti lembo likwaniridwe limene linena, Anagawana zobvala zanga mwa iwo okha, ndi pa maraya anga anacitira maere. Ndipo asilikari anacita izi." 
John19:25 Koma pamtanda wa Yesu anaimirira amace, ndi mbale wa amace, Mariya, mkazi wa Kleopa, ndi Mariya wa Magadala." 
John19:26 Pamenepo Yesu pakuona amace, ndi wophunzira amene anamkonda, alikuimirirako, ananena kwa amace, Mkazi, taonani, mwana wanu!" 
John19:27 Pamene ananena kwa wophunzirayo, Taona, amai wako. Ndipo kuyambira ora lomweli wophunzirayo ananka naye kwao." 
John19:28 Citapita ici Yesu, podziwa kuti zonse zidatha pomwepokuti lembo likwaniridwe, ananena, Ndimva ludzu." 
John19:29 Kunaikidwako cotengera codzala ndi vinyo wosasa; cifukwa cace anazenenga cinkhupule codzaza ndi vinyo wosasayo pa phesi lahisope, nacifikitsa kukamwa kwace." 
John19:30 Pamene Yesu tsono adalandira vinyo wosasayo anati, Kwatha; ndipo anawerama mutu, napereka mzimu." 
John19:31 Pomwepo Ayuda, popeza panali tsiku lokonzera, kuti 1 mitembo ingatsale pamtanda tsiku la Sabata, pakuti tsiku lomwelo la Sabata linali lalikuru, anapempha Pilato kuti miyendo yao ityoledwe, ndipo acotsedwe." 
John19:32 Cifukwa cace anadza asilikari natyola miyendo ya woyambayo, ndi ya winayo wopacikidwa pamodzi ndi iye;" 
John19:33 koma pofika kwa Yesu, m'mene anamuona iye, kuti wafa kale, sanatyola miyendo yace;" 
John19:34 koma mmodzi wa asilikari anamgwaza ndi nthungo m'nthiti yace, ndipo 2 panaturuka pomwepo mwazi ndi madzi." 
John19:35 Ndipo 3 iye amene anaona, wacita umboni, ndi umboni wace uti woona; ndipo iyeyu adziwa kuti anena zoona, kuti inunso mukakhulupire." 
John19:36 Pakuti izi zinacitika, kuti lembo likwaniridwe, 4 Pfupa la iye silidzatyoledwa." 
John19:37 Ndipo linenanso lembo lina, 5 Adzayang'ana pa iye amene anampyoza." 
John19:38 6 Citatha ici. Y osefe wa ku Arimateya, ndiye wophunzira wa Yesu, koma mobisika, cifukwa ca kuopa Ayuda, anapempha Pilato kuti akacotse mtembo wa Yesu. Ndipo Pilato analola. Cifukwa cace anadza, nacotsa mtembo wace." 
John19:39 Koma anadzanso 7 Nikodemo, amene anadza kwa iye usiku poyamba paja, alikutenga cisanganizo ca mure ndi aloe, monga miyeso zana." 
John19:40 Pamenepo anatenga mtembo wa Yesu, nauzenenga ndi nsaru zabafuta pamodzi ndi zonunkhira, monga mwa maikidwe a maliro a Ayuda." 
John19:41 Koma kunali munda kumalo kumene anapacikidwako, ndi m'mundamo munali manda atsopano m'mene sanaikidwamo munthu ali yense nthawi zonse." 
John19:42 8 Pomwepo ndipo anaika Yesu, cifukwa ca tsiku lokonzera la Ayuda, pakuti mandawo anali pafupi." 
John20:1 Koma tsiku loyamba la Sabata anadza Mariya wa Magadala mamawa, kusanayambe kuca, kumanda, napenya mwala wocotsedwa kumanda." 
John20:2 Pomwepo anathamanga nadza kwa Simoni Petro ndi kwa wophunzira wina amene Yesu anamkonda, nanena nao, Anacotsa Ambuye kumanda, ndipo sitidziwa kumene anamuika iye." 
John20:3 Anaturuka tsono Petro ndi wophunzira winayo, nalinkupita kumanda." 
John20:4 Koma anathamanga onse awiri pamodzi; ndipo wophunzira winayo anathamanga naposa Petro, nayamba kufika kumanda;" 
John20:5 ndipo m'mene anawerama cosuzumira anaona nsaru zabafuta zitakhala, komatu sanalowamo." 
John20:6 Pamenepo anadzanso Simoni Petro alikumtsata iye, nalowa m'manda; ndipo anaona nsaru zabafuta zitakhala," 
John20:7 ndi mlezo, umene unali pamutu pace, wosakhala pamodzi ndi nsaru zabafuta, koma wopindika padera pamalo pena." 
John20:8 Pamenepo tsono analowanso wophunzira winayo, amene anayamba kufika kumanda, ndipo anaona, nakhulupira." 
John20:9 Pakuti kufikira pomwepo sanadziwa lembo lakuti ayenera iye kuuka kwa akufa. 
John20:10 Cifukwa cace akuphunzirawo anacokanso, kunka kwao." 
John20:11 Koma Mariya analikuima kumanda kunja, alikulira. Ndipo m'mene alikulira anawerama cisuzumirire kumanda;" 
John20:12 ndipo anaona angelo awiri atabvala zoyera, alikukhala mmodzi kumutu, ndi wina kumiyendo, kumene mtembo wa Yesu udagona." 
John20:13 Ndipo iwowa ananena kwa iye, Mkazi, uliranji? Ananena nao, Cifukwa anacotsa Ambuye wanga, ndipo sindidziwa kumene anamuika iye." 
John20:14 M'mene adanena izi, anaceuka m'mbuy'o, naona Yesu ali ciriri, ndipo sanadziwa kuti ndiye Yesu." 
John20:15 Yesu ananena naye, Mkazi, uliranji? ufuna yani? Iyeyu poyesa kuti ndiye wakumunda, ananena ndi iye, Mbuye ngati mwamnyamula iye, ndiuzeni kumene mwamuika iye, ndipo ndidzamcotsa." 
John20:16 Yesu ananena naye, Mariya. Iyeyu m'mene anaceuka, ananena ndi iye m'Cihebri, Raboni; cimene cinenedwa, Mphunzitsi." 
John20:17 Yesu ananena naye, Usandikhudze, pakuti sindinatha kukwera kwa Atate; koma pita kwa abale anga, ukati kwa iwo, Ndikwera kunka kwa Atate wanga, ndi Atate wanu, ndi Mulungu wanga, ndi Mulungu wanu." 
John20:18 Mariya wa Magadala anapita nalalikira kwa akuphunzirawo, kuti, Ndaona Ambuye; ndi kuti ananena izi kwa iye." 
John20:19 Pamenepo, pokhala madzulo, tsiku lomwelo, loyamba la Sabata, makomo ali citsekere, kumene anakhala akuphunzira, cifukwa ca kuopa Ayuda, Yesu anadza naimirira pakati pao, nanena nao, Mtendere ukhale ndi inu." 
John20:20 Ndipo pamene adanena ici, anaonetsa iwo manja ace ndi nthiti zace. Pamenepo akuphunzira anakondwera pakuona Ambuye." 
John20:21 Cifukwa cace Yesu anatinso kwa iwo, Mtendere ukhale ndi inu; monga Atate wandituma Ine, Inenso ndituma inu." 
John20:22 Ndipo pamene anati ici anawapumira, nanena nao, Landirani Mzimu Woyera." 
John20:23 Zocimwa za anthu ali onse muwakhululukira, zikhululukidwa kwa iwo; za iwo amene muzigwiritsa, zagwiritsidwa." 
John20:24 Koma Tomasi, mmodzi wa khumi ndi awiriwo, wochedwa Didimo, sanakhala nao pamodzi, pamene Yesu anadza." 
John20:25 Cifukwa cace akuphunzira ena ananena naye, Tamuona Ambuye. Koma iye anati kwa iwo, Ndikapanda kuona m'manja ace cizindikilo ca misomaliyo, ndi kuika cala canga m'cizindikilo ca misomaliyo, ndi kuika dzanja langa ku nthiti yace; sindidzakhulupira." 
John20:26 Ndipo pakupita masiku asanu ndi atatu akuphunzira ace analinso m'nyumbamo, ndi Tomasi pamodzi nao: Yesu anadza, makomo ali citsekere, naimirira pakati, nati, Mtendere ukhale ndi inu." 
John20:27 Pomwepo ananena kwa Tomasi, Bwera naco cala cako kuno, nuone manja anga; ndipo bwera nalo dzanja lako, nuliike ku nthiti yanga, ndipo usakhale wosakhulupira, koma wokhulupira." 
John20:28 Tomasi anayankha nati kwa iye, Ambuye wanga, ndi Mulungu wanga." 
John20:29 Yesu ananena kwa iye, Cifukwa wandiona Ine, wakhulupira; odala iwo akukhulupira, angakhale sanaona." 
John20:30 Ndipo zizindikilo zina zambiri Yesu anazicita pamaso pa akuphunzira ace, zimene sizinalembedwa m'buku ili;" 
John20:31 koma zalembedwa izi kuti mukakhulupirire kuti Yesu ndiye Kristu Mwana wa Mulungu, ndi kuti pakukhulupira mukhale nao moyo m'dzina lace." 
John21:1 Zitapita izi Yesu anadzionetseranso kwa akuphunzira ace ku nyanja ya Tiberiya. Koma anadzionetsera cotere. 
John21:2 Anali pamodzi Simoni Petro, ndi Tomasi, wochedwa Didimo, ndi Natanayeli wa ku Kana wa ku Galileya, ndi ana a Zebedayo, ndi awiri ena a akuphunzira ace." 
John21:3 Simoni Petro ananena nao, ndinka kukasodza. Ananena naye, Ifenso tipita nawe. Anaturuka, nalowa m'ngalawa; ndipo m'usiku muja sanagwira kanthu." 
John21:4 Koma pakuyamba kuca, Yesu anaimirira pam bali pa nyanja, komatu akuphunzirawo sanadziwa kuti ndiye Yesu." 
John21:5 Yesu ananena nao, Ananu, muli nako kanthu kakudya kodi? Anamyankha iye, lai." 
John21:6 Koma anati kwa iwo, Ponyani khoka ku mbali ya dzanja lamanja ya ngalawa, ndipo mudzapeza, Pamenepo anaponya, ndipo analibenso mphamvu yakulikoka cifukwa ca kucuruka nsomba." 
John21:7 Pamenepo wophunzira uja amene Yesu anamkonda ananena kwa Petro, Ndiye Ambuye. Simoni Petro pakumva kuti ndiye Ambuye, anadzibveka maraya a pathupi, pakuti anali wamarisece, nadziponya yekha m'nyanja." 
John21:8 Koma akuphunzira ena anadza m'kangalawa, pakuti sanali kutali ndi mtunda, koma monga mikono mazana awiri, nakoka khoka la nsombazo." 
John21:9 Ndipo pamene anaturukira pamtunda, anapenya moto wamakara pomwepo, ndi kansomba kosanjikikako, ndi mkate." 
John21:10 Yesu ananena nao, Tenganiko nsomba zimene mwazigwira tsopano," 
John21:11 Cifukwa cace Simoni Petro anakwera m'ngalawa nakokera khoka kumtunda Iodzala ndi nsomba zazikuru, zana limodzi, ndi makumiasanu ndi zitatu; ndipo zingakhale zinacuruka kotere, kokha silinang'ambika." 
John21:12 Yesu ananena nao, Idzani mufisule. Koma palibe mmodzi wa akuphunzira anatha kumfunsa iye, Ndinu yani? podziwa kuti ndiye Ambuye." 
John21:13 Yesu anadza natenga mkate napatsa Iwo, momwemonso nsomba." 
John21:14 Imeneyo ndi nthawi yacitatu yakudzionetsera Yesu kwa akuphunzira ace, m'mene atauka kwa akufa." 
John21:15 Ndipo pamene atafisula Yesu ananena kwa Simoni Petro, Simoni mwana wa Yona, kodi undikonda Ine koposa awa? Ananena ndi iye, Inde, Ambuye; mudziwa kuti ndikukondani Inu. Ananena naye, Dyetsa ana a nkhosa anga." 
John21:16 Ananena nayenso kaciwiri, Simoni mwana wa Yona, ukonda Ine kodi? Ananena ndi iye, Inde, Ambuye; mudziwa kuti ndikukondani Inu. Ananena naye, Weta nkhosa zanga." 
John21:17 Ananena: naye kacitatu, Simoni mwana wa Yona, kodi undikonda Ine? Petro anamva cisoni kuti anati kwa iye kacitatu, Kodi undikonda Ine? ndipo anati kwa iye, Ambuye, mudziwa Inu zonse; muzindikira kuti ndikukondani Inu. Yesu ananena naye, Dyetsa nkhosa zanga." 
John21:18 Indetu, indetu, ndinena ndi iwe, pamene unali mnyamata unadzimangira wekha m'cuuno, ndipo unayenda kumene unafuna; koma pamene udzakalamba udzaturutsa manja ako, ndipo adzakumanga wina, nadzakunyamula kumene sufuna." 
John21:19 Koma ici ananena ndi kuzindikiritsa imfa imene adzalemekeza nayo Mulungu. Ndipo m'mene ananena ici, anati kwa iye, nditsate Ine," 
John21:20 Petro, m'mene anaceuka, anapenya wophunzira amene Yesu anamkonda alikutsata, amenenso anatsamira pacifuwa pace pamgonero, nati, Ambuye, ndani iye wakupereka Inu?" 
John21:21 Pamenepo Petro pakumuona, ananena kwa Yesu, Ambuye, koma nanga uyu?" 
John21:22 Yesu ananena naye, Ngati ndifuna uyu akhale kufikira ndidza Ine, kuli ciani ndi iwe? unditsate Ine iwe." 
John21:23 Cifukwa cace mau awa anaturuka kufikira kwa abale, kuti wophunzira uyu sadzafa. Koma Yesu sananena kwa iye kuti sadzafa; koma, Ngati ndifuna iye akhale kufikira ndidza, kuli ciani ndi iwe?" 
John21:24 Yemweyu ndiye wophunzira wakucita umboniza izi, ndipo analembera izi; ndipo tidziwa kuti umboni wace ndi woona." 
John21:25 Koma palinso zina zambiri zimene. Yesu anazicita, zoti zikadalembedwa zonse phe, ndilingalira kuti dziko lapansi silikadakhala nao malo a mabuku amene akadalembedwa. Amen." 
Acts1:1 TAONANI Teofilo inu, mau aja oyamba ndinakonza, za zonse Yesu anayamba kuzicita ndi kuziphunzitsa," 
Acts1:2 kufikira tsiku lija anatengedwa kunka Kumwamba, atatha kulamulira mwa Mzimu Woyera atumwi amene adawasankha;" 
Acts1:3 kwa iwonso anadzionetsera yekha wamoyo ndi zitsimikizo zambiri, zitatha zowawa zace, naonekera kwa iwo masiku makumi anai, ndi kunena zinthu za Ufumuwa Mulungu;" 
Acts1:4 ndipo e posonkhana nao pamodzi, anawalamulira asacoke ku Yerusalemu, komatu alindire lonjezano la Atate, limene, anati, munalimva kwa Ine;" 
Acts1:5 pakuti Yohane anabatizadi ndi madzi; koma inu mudzabatizidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, asanapite masiku ambiri." 
Acts1:6 Pamenepo iwowa, atasonkhana pamodzi, anamfunsa iye, nanena, Ambuye, kodi nthawi yino mubwezera ufumu kwa Israyeli?" 
Acts1:7 Koma anati kwa iwo, Sikuli kwa inu kudziwa nthawi kapena nyengo, zimene Atate anaziika m'ulamuliro wace wa iye yekha." 
Acts1:8 Komatu mudzalandira mphamvu, Mzimu Woyera atadza pa inu: ndipo mudzakhala mboni zanga m'Yerusalemu, ndi m'Yudeya lonse, ndi m'Samariya, ndi kufikira malekezero ace a dziko." 
Acts1:9 Ndipo m'mene adanena izi, ali cipenyerere iwo, ananyamulidwa; ndipo mtambo unamlandira iye kumcotsa kumaso kwao." 
Acts1:10 Ndipo pakukhala iwo cipenyerere kumwamba pomuka iye, taonani, amuna awiri obvala zoyera anaimirira pambali pao;" 
Acts1:11 amenenso anati, Amuna a ku Galileya, muimiranji ndi kuyang'ana kumwamba? Yesu amene walandiridwa kunka Kumwamba kucokera kwa inu, adzadza momwemo monga munamuona alinkupita Kumwamba." 
Acts1:12 Pamenepo anabwera ku Yerusalemu kucokera ku phiri lonenedwa la Azitona, limene liyandikana ndi Yerusalemu, loyendako tsiku la Sabata." 
Acts1:13 Ndipo pamene adalowa, anakwera ku cipinda ca pamwamba, kumene analikukhalako; ndiwo Petro ndi Yohane ndi Yakobo ndi Andreya, Filipo ndi Tomasi, Bartolomeyu ndi Mateyu, Yakobo mwana wa Alifeyu, ndi Simoni Zelote, ndi Yuda mwana wa Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Iwo onse analikukangalika m'kupemphera, pamodzi ndi akazi, ndi Mariya, amace wa Yesu, ndi abale ace omwe." 
Acts1:15 Ndipo m'masiku awa anaimirira Petro pakati pa abale, nati (gulu la anthu losonkhana pamalo pomwe ndilo ngati zana limodzi ndi makumi awiri)," 
Acts1:16 Amuna inu, abale, kunayenera kuti lemba likwanitsidwe, limene Mzimu Woyera anayamba kunena mwa m'kamwa mwa Davine za Yudase, wokhala mtsogoleri wa iwo adagwira Yesu." 
Acts1:17 Cifukwa anali wowerengedwa mwa ife, ndipo analandira gawo lace la utumiki uwu." 
Acts1:18 (Uyutu tsono anadzitengera kadziko ndi mphoto ya cosalungama; ndipo anagwa camutu, naphulika pakati, ndi matumbo ace onse anakhuthuka;" 
Acts1:19 ndipo cinadziwika ndi onse akukhala ku Yerusalemu; kotero kuti m'manenedwe ao kadzikoka kanachedwa Akeldama, ndiko, kadziko ka mwazi.)" 
Acts1:20 Pakuti kwalembedwa m'buku la Masalmo, Pogonera pace pakhale bwinja, Ndipo pasakhale munthu wogonapo; Ndipo uyang'aniro wace autenge wina." 
Acts1:21 Potero kuyenera kuti wina wa amunawo anatsatana nafe nthawi yonseyi Ambuye Yesu analowa naturuka mwa ife," 
Acts1:22 kuyambira ubatizo wa Yohane, kufikira tsiku lija anatengedwa kunka Kumwamba kutisiya ife, mmodzi wa awa akhale mboni ya kuuka kwace pamodzi ndi ife." 
Acts1:23 Ndipo anaimikapo awiri, Yosefe wochedwa Barsaba, amene anachedwanso Yusto, ndi Matiya." 
Acts1:24 Ndipo anapemphera, nati, Inu, Ambuye, wozindikiramitima ya onse, sonyezani mwa awa awiri mmodziyo amene munamsankha," 
Acts1:25 alowe malo a utumiki uwu ndi utumwi, kucokera komwe Yudase anapatukira, kuti apite ku malo a iye yekha." 
Acts1:26 Ndipo anayesa maere pa iwo; ndipo anagwera Matiya; ndipo anawerengedwa pamodzi ndi khumi ndi mmodziwo. 
Acts2:1 Ndipo pakufika tsiku la Penteskoste, anali onse pamodzi pa malo amodzi." 
Acts2:2 Ndipo mwadzidzidzi anamveka mau ocokera Kumwamba ngati mkokomo wa mphepo yolimba, nadzaza nyumba yonse imene analikukhalamo." 
Acts2:3 Ndipo anaonekera kwa iwo malilime ogawanikana, onga amoto; ndipo unakhala pa iwo onse wayekha wayekha." 
Acts2:4 Ndipo anadzazidwa onse ndi Mzimu Woyera, nayamba kulankhula ndi malilime ena, monga Mzimu anawalankhulitsa." 
Acts2:5 Koma anali m'Yerusalemu okhalako Ayuda, amuna opembedza, ocokera ku mtundu uli wonse pansi pa thambo." 
Acts2:6 Koma pocitika mau awa, unyinji wa anthu unasonkhana, nusokonezedwa, popeza yense anawamva alikulankhula m'cilankhulidwe cace ca iye yekha." 
Acts2:7 Ndipo anadabwa onse, nazizwa, nanena, Taonani, awa onse alankhulawa sali Agalileya kodi?" 
Acts2:8 ndipo nanga ife timva bwanji, yense m'cilankhulidwe cathu cimene tinabadwa naco?" 
Acts2:9 Aparti ndi Amedi, ndi Aelami, ndi iwo akukhala m'Mesopotamiya, m'Yudeya, ndiponso m'Kapadokiya, m'Ponto, ndi m'Asiya;" 
Acts2:10 m'Frugiya, ndiponso m'Pamfuliya, m'Aigupto, ndi mbali za Libiya wa ku Kurene, ndi alendo ocokera ku Roma, ndiwo Ayuda, ndiponso opinduka," 
Acts2:11 Akrete, ndi Aarabu, tiwamva iwo alikulankhula m'malilime athu zazikuru za Mulungu." 
Acts2:12 Ndipo anadabwa onse, nathedwa nzeru, nanena wina ndi mnzace, Kodi ici nciani?" 
Acts2:13 koma ena anawaseka, nanena kuti, Akhuta vinyo walero." 
Acts2:14 Koma Petro, anaimirira pamodzi ndi khumi ndi mmodziwo, nakweza mau ace, nanena kwa iwo, nati, Amuna inu Ayuda, ndi inu nonse akukhala kwanu m'Yerusalemu, ici cizindikirike kwa inu, ndi po cherani khutu mau anga." 
Acts2:15 Pakuti awa sanaledzera monga muyesa inu; pakuti ndi ora lacitatulokha la tsiku; 
Acts2:16 komatu ici ndi cimene cinanenedwa ndi mneneri Yoeli," 
Acts2:17 Ndipo kudzali m'masiku otsiriza, anena Mulungu, Ndidzathira ca Mzimu wansa pa thupi liri lonse, Ndipo ana anu amuna, ndi akazi adzanenera, Ndipo anyamata anu adzaona masomphenya, Ndi akulu anu adzalota maloto;" 
Acts2:18 Ndiponso pa akapolo anga ndi pa adzakazi anga m'masiku awa Ndidzathira ca Mzimu wanga; ndipo adzanenera. 
Acts2:19 Ndipo ndidzapatsa zodabwitsa m'thambo la kumwamba, Ndi zizindikilo pa dziko lapansi; Mwazi, ndi moto, ndi mpweya wautsi;" 
Acts2:20 Dzuwa lidzasanduka mdima, Ndi mweziudzasanduka mwazi, Lisanadze tsiku la Ambuye, Lalikuru ndi loonekera;" 
Acts2:21 Ndipo kudzali, kuti yense amene akaitana pa dzina la Ambuye adzapulumutsidwa." 
Acts2:22 Amuna inu Aisrayeli, mverani mau awa: Yesu Mnazarayo, mwamuna wocokera kwa Mulungu, wosonyezedwa kwa inu ndizimphamvu, ndi zozizwa, ndi zizindikilo, zimene Mulungu anazicita mwa iye pakati pa inu, monga mudziwa nokha;" 
Acts2:23 ameneyo, woperekedwa ndi uphungu woikidwa ndi kudziwiratu kwa Mulungu, inu mwampacika ndi kumupha ndi manja a anthu osayeruzika;" 
Acts2:24 yemweyo Mulungu anamuukitsa, atamasula zowawa za imfa, mwakuti sikunali kotheka kuti iye agwidwe nayo." 
Acts2:25 Pakuti Davine anena za Iye, Ndinaona Mbuye pamaso panga nthawi zonse; Cifukwa ali pa dzanja langa lamanja, kuti ndingasinthike;" 
Acts2:26 Mwa ici unakondwera mtima wanga, ndipo linasangalala lilime langa; Ndipo thupi langanso lidzakhala m'ciyembekezo." 
Acts2:27 Pakuti simudzasiya moyo wanga ku Hade, Kapena simudzapereka Woyera wanu aone cibvunde," 
Acts2:28 Munandidziwitsa ine njira za moyo; Mudzandidzaza ndi kukondwera pamaso panu. 
Acts2:29 Amuna inu, abale, kuloleka kunena poyera posaopa kwa inu za kholo lija Davine, kuti adamwalira naikidwanso, ndipo manda ace ali ndi ife kufikira lero lino." 
Acts2:30 Potero, pokhala mneneri iye, ndi kudziwa kuti ndi Iumbiro anamlumbirira Mulungu, kuti mwa cipatso ca m'cuuno mwace adzakhazika wina pa mpando wacifumu wace;" 
Acts2:31 iye pakuona ici kale, analankhula za kuuka kwa Kristu, kuti sanasiyidwa m'Hade, ndipo thupi lace silinaona cibvunde." 
Acts2:32 Yesu ameneyo, Mulungu anamuukitsa; za ici tiri mboni ife tonse." 
Acts2:33 Potero, popeza anakwezedwa ndi dzanja Lamanja la Mulungu, nalandira kwa Atate lonjezano la Mzimu Woyera, anatsanulira ici, cimene inu mupenya nimumva." 
Acts2:34 Pakuti Davine sanakwera Kumwamba ai; koma anena yekha, Ambuye anati kwa Mbuye wanga, Khalani ku dzanja lamanja langa," 
Acts2:35 Kufikira ndikaike adani ako copondapo mapazi ako. 
Acts2:36 Pamenepo lizindikiritse ndithu banja liri lonse la Israyeli, kuti Mulungu anamuyesa Ambuye ndi Kristu, Yesu amene inu munampacika." 
Acts2:37 Koma pamene anamva ici, analaswa mtima, natitu kwa Petro ndi atumwi enawo, Tidzacita ciani, amuna inu, abale?" 
Acts2:38 Koma Petro anati kwa iwo, Lapani, batizidwani yense wa inu m'dzina la Yesu Kristu kuloza ku cikhululukiro ca macimo anu; ndipo mudzalandira mphatso ya Mzimu Woyera." 
Acts2:39 Pakuti lonjezano 1 liri kwa inu, ndi kwa ana anu, 2 ndi kwa onse akutali, 3 onse amene Ambuye Mulungu wathu adzaitana." 
Acts2:40 Ndipo ndi mau ena ambiri anacita umboni, nawadandaulira iwo, nanena, Mudzipulumutse kwa mbadwo uno wokhotakhota." 
Acts2:41 Pamenepo iwo amene analandira mau ace anabatizidwa; ndipo anaonjezedwa tsiku lomwelo anthu ngati zikwi zitatu. 
Acts2:42 Ndipo 4 anali cikhalire m'ciphunzitso ca atumwi ndi m'ciyanjano, m'kunyema mkate ndi mapemphero." 
Acts2:43 Koma panadza mantha pa anthu onse; ndipo 5 zozizwa ndi zizindikilo zambiri zinacitika ndi atumwi. 
Acts2:44 Ndipo onse akukhulupira anali pamodzi, 6 nakhala nazo zonse zodyerana." 
Acts2:45 Ndipo zimene anali nazo, ndi cuma cao, anazigulitsa, nazigawira kwa onse, monga momwe yense anasowera." 
Acts2:46 Ndipo tsiku ndi tsiku 7 anali cikhalire ndi mtima umodzi m'Kacisi, ndipo ananyema mkate kunyumba kwao, nalandira cakudya ndi msangalalo, ndi mtima woona;" 
Acts2:47 nalemekeza Mulungu, 8 ndi kukhala naco cisomo ndi anthu onse. Ndipo 9 Ambuye anawaonjezera tsiku ndi tsiku amene akuti apulumutsidwe." 
Acts3:1 Koma Petro ndi Yohane analikukwera kunka kuKacisi pa ora lakupembedza, ndilo lacisanu ndi cinai." 
Acts3:2 Ndipo munthu wina wopunduka miyendo cibadwire ananyamulidwa, amene akamuika masiku onse pa khomo la Kacisi lochedwa Lokongola, kuti apemphe zaulere kwa iwo akulowa m'Kacisi;" 
Acts3:3 ameneyo, pakuona Petro ndi Yohane akuti alowe m'Kacisi, anapempha alandire caulere." 
Acts3:4 Ndipo Petro, pompenyetsetsa iye pamodzi ndi Yohane, anati, Tiyang'ane ife." 
Acts3:5 Ndipo iye anabvomereza iwo, nalingirira kuti adzalandira kanthu." 
Acts3:6 Koma Petro anati, Siliva ndi golidi ndiribe; koma cimene ndiri naco, ici ndikupatsa, M'dzina la Yesu Kristu Mnazarayo, yenda," 
Acts3:7 Ndipo anamgwira Iye ku dzanja lace lamanja, namnyamutsa; ndipo pomwepo mapazi ace ndi mfundo za kumapazi zinalimbikitsidwa." 
Acts3:8 Ndipo anazunzuka, naimirira, nayenda; ndipo analowa pamodzi nao m'Kacisi, nayenda, nalumpha, nayamika Mulungu." 
Acts3:9 Ndipo anthu onse anamuona iye, alikuyenda ndi kuyamika Mulungu;" 
Acts3:10 namzindikira iye, kuti ndiye amene anakhala pa Khomo Lokongola la Kacisi: ndipo anadzazidwa ndi kudabwa ndi kuzizwa pa ici cidamgwera." 
Acts3:11 Koma m'mene anagwira Petro ndi Yohane, anawathamangira pamodzi anthu onse ku khumbi lochedwa la Solomo, alikudabwa ndithu." 
Acts3:12 Koma m'mene Petro anaciona, anayankha kwa anthu, Amuna inu a Israyeli, muzizwa naye bwanji ameneyo? kapena mutipenyetsetsa ife bwanji, monga ngati tamyendetsa iye ndi mphamvu ya ife eni, kapena ndi cipembedzo cathu?" 
Acts3:13 Mulungu wa Abrahamu, ndi Isake, ndi Yakobo, Mulungu wa makolo athu, analemekeza Mwana wace Yesu; amene, inu munampereka ndi kumkaniza pa Pilato, poweruza iyeyu kummasula." 
Acts3:14 Koma inu munakaniza Woyera ndi Wolungamayo, ndipo munapempha kuti munthu wambanda apatsidwe kwa inu," 
Acts3:15 ndipo munamupha Mkulu wa moyo; amene Mulungu anamuukitsa kwa akufa; za ici ife tiri mboni. 
Acts3:16 Ndipo pa cikhulupiriro ca m'dzina lace dzina lacelo linalimbikitsa iye amene mumuona, nimumdziwa; ndipo cikhulupiriro ciri mwa iye cinampatsa kucira konse kumeneku pamaso pa inu nonse." 
Acts3:17 Ndipo tsopano, abale, ndidziwa kuti munacicita mosadziwa, monganso akulu anu." 
Acts3:18 Koma zimene Mulungu analalikiratu m'kamwa mwa aneneri onse, kuti adzamva kuwawa Kristu, iye anakwaniritsa cotero." 
Acts3:19 Cifukwa cace lapani, bwererani kuti afafanizidwe macimo anu, kotero kuti zidze nyengo zakutsitsimutsa zocokera ku nkhope ya Ambuye;" 
Acts3:20 ndipo atume amene anaikidwa kwa inu, Kristu Yesu;" 
Acts3:21 amene thambo la kumwamba liyenera kumlandira kufikira nthawi zakukonzanso zinthu zonse, zimene Mulunguanalankhula za izo m'kamwa mwa aneneri ace oyera ciyambire." 
Acts3:22 Mosetu anati, Mbuye Mulungu adzaukitsira inu mneneri mwa abale anu, ngati ine; mudzamvera iye m'zinthu ziri zonse akalankhule nanu." 
Acts3:23 Ndipo kudzali, kuti wamoyo ali yensesamvera mneneri ameneyu, adzasakazidwa konse mwa anthu." 
Acts3:24 Koma angakhale aneneri onse kuyambira Samuelindi akumtsatira, onse amene analankhula analalikira za masiku awa." 
Acts3:25 Inu ndinu ana a aneneri, ndi a panganolo Mulungu anapangana ndi makolo anu ndi kunena kwa Abrahamu, Ndipo mu mbeu yako mafuko onse a dziko adzadalitsidwa." 
Acts3:26 Kuyambira ndi inu, Mulungu, ataukitsa Mwana wace, anamtuma kukudalitsani inu, ndi kukubwezani yense ku zoipa zace." 
Acts4:1 Koma m'mene analikulankhula ndi anthu, ansembe ndi mdindo wa kuKacisi ndi Asaduki anadzako," 
Acts4:2 obvutika mtima cifukwa anaphunzitsa anthuwo, nalalikira mwa Yesu kuuka kwa akufa." 
Acts4:3 Ndipo anawathira manja, nawaika m'ndende kufikira m'mawa; pakuti mpa madzulo pamenepo." 
Acts4:4 Koma ambiri a iwo amene adamva mau anakhulupira; ndipo ciwerengero ca amuna cinali ngati zikwi zisanu. 
Acts4:5 Koma panali m'mawa mwace, anasonkhana pamodzi m'Yerusalemu oweruza, ndi akulu, ndi alembi;" 
Acts4:6 ndi Anasi mkulu wa ansembe, ndi Kayafa, ndi Yohane, ndi Alesandro, ndi onse amene anali a pfuko la mkulu waansembe." 
Acts4:7 Ndipo m'mene anawaimika pakati, anafunsa kuti, Ndi mphamvu yanji, kapena m'dzina lanji, mwacita ici inu?" 
Acts4:8 Pamenepo Petro, wodzala ndi Mzimu Woyera anati kwa iwo, Oweruza a anthu inu, ndi akulu,"
