Acts20:19 wotumikira Ambuye ndi kudzicepetsa konse ndi misozi, ndi mayesero anandigwera ndi ziwembu za Ayuda;" 
Acts20:20 kuti sindinakubisirani zinthu zopindulira, osazilalikira kwa inu, ndi kukuphunzitsani inu pabwalo ndi m'nyumba m'nyumba," 
Acts20:21 ndi kucitira umboni Ayuda ndi Ahelene wa kutembenuza mtima kulinga kwa Mulungu, ndi cikhulupiriro colinga kwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu." 
Acts20:22 Ndipo, taonani, ndipita ku Yerusalemu womangidwa mumzimu, wosadziwa zimene zidza'ndigwera ine kumeneko;" 
Acts20:23 koma kuti Mzimu Woyera andicitira umboni m'midzi yonse, ndi kunena kuti nsinga ndi zisautso zindilindira." 
Acts20:24 Komatu sindiuyesa kanthu moyo, wanga, kuti uli wa mtengo wace kwa ine ndekha; kotero kuti ndikatsirize njira yanga, ndi utumiki ndinaulandira kwa Ambuye Yesu, kucitira umboni Uthenga Wabwino wa cisomo ca Mulungu." 
Acts20:25 Ndipo tsopano, taonani, ndidziwa ine kuti inu nonse amene ndinapitapita mwa inu kulalikira ufumuwo, simudzaonanso nkhope yanga." 
Acts20:26 Cifukwa cace ndikucitirani umboni lero lomwe, kuti ndiribe kanthu ndi mwazi wa anthu onse." 
Acts20:27 Pakuti sindinakubisirani pakukulalikirani uphungu wonse wa Mulungu. 
Acts20:28 Tadzicenjerani nokha, ndi gulu lonse, pamenepo Mzimu Woyera anakuikani oyang'anira, kuti muwete Eklesia wa Mulungu, umene anaugula ndi mwazi wa iye yekha." 
Acts20:29 Ndidziwa ine kuti, nditacoka ine, adzalowa mimbulu yosautsa, yosalekerera gululo;" 
Acts20:30 ndipo mwa inu nokha adzauka anthu, olankhula zokhotakhota, kupatutsa ophunzira awatsate." 
Acts20:31 Cifukwa cace dikirani, nimukumbukile kuti zaka zitatu sindinaleka usiku ndi usana kucenjeza yense wa inu ndi misozi." 
Acts20:32 Ndipo tsopano ndikuikizani kwa Mulungu, ndi kwa mau a cisomo cace, cimene ciri ndi mphamvu yakumangirira ndi kupatsa inu colowa mwa onse oyeretsedwa." 
Acts20:33 Sindinasirira siliva, kapena golidi, kapena cobvala ca munthu ali yense." 
Acts20:34 Mudziwa inu nokha kuti manja anga awa anatumikira zosowa zanga, ndi za iwo akukhala ndi ine." 
Acts20:35 M'zinthu zonse ndinakupatsani citsanzo, cakuti pogwiritsa nchito, koteromuyenerakuthandiza ofoka ndi kukumbuka mau a Ambuye Yesu, kuti anati yekha, Kupatsa kutidalitsa koposa kulandira." 
Acts20:36 Ndipo m'mene ananena izi, anagwada pansi, napemphera ndi iwo onse." 
Acts20:37 Ndipo onsewa analira kwambiri, namkupatira Paulo pakhosi pace, nampsompsona," 
Acts20:38 nalira makamaka cifukwa ca mau adanenawa, kuti sadzaonanso nkhope yace. Ndipo anamperekeza iye kungalawa." 
Acts21:1 Ndipo kunali, titalekana nao ndi kukankha ngalawa, tinadza molunjika ku Ko, ndi m'mawa mwace ku Rode, ndipo pocokerapo ku Patara;" 
Acts21:2 ndipo m'mene tinapeza ngalawa Yakuoloka kunka ku Foinike, tinalowamo, ndi kupita nayo." 
Acts21:3 Ndipo pamene tinafika popenyana ndi Kupro, tinacisiya kulamanzere, ntinapita ku Suriya; ndipo tinakoceza ku Turo; pakuti pamenepo ngalawainafuna kutula akatundu ace." 
Acts21:4 Ndipo m'mene tinapeza ophunzira, tinakhalako masikuasanu ndi awiri; ndipo iwowa ananena ndi Paulo mwa Mzimu, kuti asakwere ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:5 Ndipo kunali pamene tidatsiriza masikuwa, tidacoka ndi kunka ulendo wathu; ndipo iwo onse, akazi ndi ana anatiperekeza kufikira kuturuka m'mudzi; ndipo pogwadira pa mcenga wa kunyanja, tinapemphera," 
Acts21:6 ndi kulawirana; ndipo tinalowa m'ngalawa, koma iwo anabwera kwao." 
Acts21:7 Ndipo ife titatsiriza ulendo wathu wocokera ku Turo, tinafika ku Ptolemayi; ndipo m'mene tidalankhula abale, tinakhala nao tsiku limodzi." 
Acts21:8 Ndipo m'mawa mwace tinacoka, ntinafika ku Kaisareya, ndipo m'mene tinalowa m'nyumba ya Filipo mlaliki, mmodzi wa asanu ndi awiri aja, tinakhala naye." 
Acts21:9 Ndipo munthuyu anali nao ana akazi anai, anamwali, amene ananenera." 
Acts21:10 Ndipo pokhalapo masiku ambiri, anatsika ku Yudeya mneneri, dzina lace Agabo." 
Acts21:11 Ndipo anadza kwa ife natenga lamba la Paulo, nadzimanga yekha manja ndi mapazi, nati, Atero Mzimu Woyera, Munthu mwini lamba ili, adzammanga kotero Ayuda a m'Yerusalemu, nadzampereka m'manja a amitundu." 
Acts21:12 Koma pamene tinamva izi tinamdandaulira ife ndi iwo a komweko, asakwere iye kunka ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:13 Pamenepo Paulo anayankha, Mucitanji, polira ndi kundiswera mtima? pakuti ndakonzeka Ine si kumangidwa kokha, komatunso kufera ku Yerusalemu cifukwa ca dzina la Ambuye Yesu." 
Acts21:14 Ndipo pokana iye kukopeka, tinaleka, ndi kuti, Kufuna kwa Ambuye kucitidwe." 
Acts21:15 Ndipo atapita masiku awa tinakonza akatundu athu, ntikwera ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:16 Ndipo anamuka nafenso ena a ophunzira a ku Kaisareya, natenganso wina Mnaso wa ku Kupro, wophunzira wakale, amene adzaticereza." 
Acts21:17 Ndipo pofika ife ku Yerusalemu, abale anatilandira mokondwera." 
Acts21:18 Ndipo m'mawa mwace Paulo analowa nafe kwa Yakobo; ndi akulu onse anali pomwepo. 
Acts21:19 Ndipo atawalankhula iwo, anawafotokozera cimodzi cimodzi zimene Mulungu anacita kwa amitundu mwa utumiki wace." 
Acts21:20 Ndipo pamene anazimva, analemekeza Mulungu; nati kwa iye, Uona, mbale, kuti ambirimbiri mwa Ayuda akhulupira; ndipo ali naco cangu onsewa, ca pa cilamulo;" 
Acts21:21 ndipo anamva za iwe, kuti uphunzitsa Ayuda onse a ku amitundu apatukane naye Mose, ndi kuti asadule ana ao, kapena asayende monga mwa miyambo." 
Acts21:22 Nciani tsono? adzamva ndithu kuti wafika. 
Acts21:23 Cifukwa cace ucite ici tikuuza iwe; tiri nao amuna anai amene anawinda; 
Acts21:24 amenewa uwatenge nudziyeretse nao pamodzi, nuwalipirire, kati amete mutu; ndipo adzadziwa onse kuti zomveka za iwe nzacabe, koma kuti iwe wekhaoso uyenda molunjika, nusunga cilamulo." 
Acts21:25 Kama kunena za amitundu adakhulupirawo, tinalembera ndi kulamulira kuti asale zoperekedwa kwa mafano, ndi mwazi, ndi zopotola, ndi dama." 
Acts21:26 Pamenepo Paulo anatenga anthuwo, ndipo m'mawa mwace m'mene anadziyeretsa nao pamodzi, analowa m'Kacisi, nauza cimarizidwe ca masiku a kuyeretsa, kufikira adawaperekera iwo onse mtulo." 
Acts21:27 Ndipo pamene masiku asanu, ndi awiri anati amarizidwe, Ayuda a ku Asiya pomuona iye m'Kacisi, anautsa khamu lonse la anthu, namgwira," 
Acts21:28 napfuula, Amuna a Israyeli, tithandizeni; ameneyu ndi munthu uja anaphunzitsa onse ponsepo ponenera anthu, ndi cilamulo, ndi malo ano; ndiponso anatenga Ahelene nalowa nao m'Kacisi, nadetsa malo ana oyera." 
Acts21:29 Pakuti adaona Trofimo wa ku Efeso kale pamodzi ndi iye mumzinda; ameneyo anayesa kuti Paulo anamtenga nalowa naye kuKacisi. 
Acts21:30 Ndipo mudzi wonse unasokonezeka, ndipo anthu anathamangira pamodzi; nagwira Paulo namkoka kumturutsa m'Kacisi; ndipo pomwepo pamakomo panatsekedwa." 
Acts21:31 Ndipo m'mene anafuna kumupha iye, wina anamuuza kapitao wamkuru wa gululo kuti m'Yerusalemumonse muli pinngu-piringu," 
Acts21:32 Ndipo posacedwa iye anatenga asilikari ndi akenturiyo, nathamanga, nawatsikira; ndipo iwowa, pakuona kapitao wamkuru ndi asilikari, analeka kumpanda Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Pamenepo poyandikira kapitao wamkuru anamgwira iye, nalamulira ammange ndi maunyolo awir; ndipo anafunsira, ndiye yani, ndipo anacita ciani?" 
Acts21:34 Koma wina anapfuula kena, wina kena, m'khamumo; ndipo m'mene sanathe kudziwa zoona cifukwa ca phokosolo analamulira amuke naye kulinga." 
Acts21:35 Ndipo pamene anafika pamakwerero, kudatero kuti anamsenza asilikari cifukwa ca kulimbalimba kwa khamulo;" 
Acts21:36 pakuti unyinji wa anthu unatsata, nupfuula, Mcotse iye." 
Acts21:37 Ndipo poti alowe naye m'linga, Paulo ananena kwa kapitao wamkuru, Mundilole ndikuuzeni kanthu? Ndipo anati, Kodi udziwa Cihelene?" 
Acts21:38 Si ndiwe M-aigupto uja kodi, unacita mipanduko kale lija, ndi kutsogolera ambanda aja zikwi zinai kucipululu?" 
Acts21:39 Koma Paulo anati, Ine ndine munthu Myuda, wa ku Tariso wa m'Kilikiya, mfulu ya mudzi womveka; ndipo ndikupemphani mundilole ndilankhule ndi anthu." 
Acts21:40 Ndipo m'mene adamlola, Paulo anaimirira pamakwerero, natambalitsira anthu dzanja; ndipo pokhala cete onse, analankhula nao m'cinenedwe ca Cihebri, nanena." 
Acts22:1 Amuna, abale, ndi atate, mverani codzikanira canga tsopano, ca kwa inu." 
Acts22:2 Ndipo pakumva kuti analankhula nao m'cinenedwe ca Cihebri, anaposa kukhala cete; ndipo anati:" 
Acts22:3 ine ndine munthu Myuda, wobadwa m'Tariso wa Kilikiya, koma ndaleredwa m'mzinda muno, pa mapazi a Gamaliyeli, wolangizidwa monga mwa citsatidwe ceni ceni ca cilamulo ca makolo athu, ndipo ndinali wacangu, colinga kwa Mulungu, monga muli inu nonse lero;" 
Acts22:4 ndipo ndinalondalonda Njira iyi kufikira imfa, ndi kumanga ndi kupereka kundende amuna ndi akazi." 
Acts22:5 Monganso mkulu wa ansembe andicitira umboni, ndi bwalo lonse la akuru; kwa iwo amenenso ndinalandira akalata kunka nao kwa abale, ndipo ndinapita ku Damasiko, kuti ndikatenge iwonso akukhala kumeneko kudza nao omangidwa ku Yerusalemu, kuti alangidwe." 
Acts22:6 Ndipo kunali, pakupita ine ndi kuyandikira ku Damasiko, monga usana, mwadzidzidzi kunandiwalira pondizungulira ine kuunika kwakukuru kocokera kumwamba." 
Acts22:7 Ndipo ndinagwapansitu, ndipondinamva mau akunena nane, Saulo, Saulo, undilonda-londeranii Ine?" 
Acts22:8 Ndipo ndinayankha, Ndinu yani Mbuye? Ndipo anati kwa Ine, Ndine Yesu wa ku Nazarete, amene umlondalonda." 
Acts22:9 Ndipo iwo akukhala nane anaonadi kuunika, koma sanamva mau akulankhula nane." 
Acts22:10 Ndipo ndinati, ndidzacita ciani, Ambuye? Ndipo Ambuye anati kwa ine, Taukavpita ku Damasiko; kumeneko adzakufotokozera zonse zoikika kwa iwe uzicite." 
Acts22:11 Ndipo popeza sindinapenya, cifukwa ca ulemerero wa kuunikako, anandigwira dzanja iwo amene anali ndi ine, ndipo ndinafika ku Damasiko." 
Acts22:12 Ndipo munthu dzina lace Hananiya, ndiye munthu wopembedza monga mwa cilamulo, amene amcitira umboni wabwino Ayuda onse akukhalako," 
Acts22:13 anadza kwa ine, ndipo poimirirapo anati kwa ine, Saulo, mbale, penyanso. Ndipo ine, ora lomweli ndinampenya." 
Acts22:14 Ndipo anati, Mulungu wa makolo athu anakusankhiratu udziwe cifuniro cace, nuone Wolungamayo, numve mau oturuka m'kamwa mwace." 
Acts22:15 Ndipo udzamkhalira iye mboni kwa anthu onse, za izo udaziona ndi kuzimva." 
Acts22:16 Ndipo tsopano ucedweranji? Tauka, nubatizidwe ndi kusamba kucotsa macimo ako, nuitane pa dzina lace." 
Acts22:17 Ndipo kunali, nditabwera ku Yerusalemu ndinalikupemphera m'Kacisi, ndinacita ngati kukomoka," 
Acts22:18 ndipo ndinamuona iye, nanena nane, Fulumira, turuka msanga m'Yerusalemu; popeza sadzalandira umboni wako wakunena za Ine." 
Acts22:19 Ndipo ndinati ine, Ambuye, adziwa iwo okha kuti ndinali kuika m'ndende ndi kuwapanda m'masunagoge onse iwo akukhulupirira Inu;" 
Acts22:20 ndipo pamene anakhetsa mwazi wa Stefano mboni yanu, ine ndemwe ndinalikuimirirako, ndi kubvomerezana nao, ndi kusunga Zoobvala za iwo amene anamupha iye." 
Acts22:21 Ndipo anati kwa ine, Pita; cifukwa Ine ndidzakutuma iwe kunka kutali kwa amitundu." 
Acts22:22 Ndipo adamumva kufikira mau awa; ndipo anakweza mau ao nanena, Acoke pa dziko lapansi munthu wotere; pakuti sayenera iye kukhala ndi moyo." 
Acts22:23 Ndipo pakupfuula iwo, ndi kutaya zobvala zao, ndi kuwaza pfumbi mumlengalenga," 
Acts22:24 kapitao wamkuru analamulira kuti amtenge iye kulowa naye kulinga, nati amfunsefunse ndi kumkwapula, kuti adziwe cifukwa cace nciani kuti ampfuulira comweco." 
Acts22:25 Ndipo m'mene anammanga iye ndi nsingazo, Paulo anati kwa kenturiyo wakuimirirako, Kodinkuloleka kwa inu kukwapula munthu Mroma, mlandu wace wosamveka?" 
Acts22:26 Ndipo pakumva ici kenturiyoyo, ananka kwa kapitao wamkuru, namuuza, nanena, Nciani ici uti ucite? pakuti munthuyo ndiye Mroma." 
Acts22:27 Ndipo kapitao wamkuruyo anadza, nati kwa iye, Ndiuze, iwe ndiwe Mroma kodi? Ndipo anati, Inde." 
Acts22:28 Ndipo kapitao wamkuru anayankha, Ine ndalandira ufulu umene ndi kuperekapo mtengo wace waukuru. Ndipo Paulo anati, Koma ine ndabadwa Mroma." 
Acts22:29 Pamenepo ndipo iwo amene anati amfunsefunse, anamsiya; ndipo kapitao wamkurunso anaopa, pozindikira kuti ndiye Mroma, ndiponso popeza adammanga iye." 
Acts22:30 Koma m'mawa mwace pofuna kuzindikira cifukwa cace ceni ceni cakuti anamnenera Ayuda, anammasula iye, nalamulira asonkhane ansembe akulu, ndi bwalo lonse la akulu, ndipo anatsika naye Paulo, namuika pamaso pao." 
Acts23:1 Ndipo Paulo, popenyetsetsa a m'bwalo la akuru anati, Amuna, abale, ndakhala ine pamaso pa Mulungu ndi cikumbu mtima cokoma conse kufikira lero lomwe." 
Acts23:2 Ndipo mkulu wa ansembe Hananiya analamulira akuimirirako ampande pakamwa pace. 
Acts23:3 Pamenepo Paulo anati kwa iye, Mulungu adzakupanda iwe, khoma loyeretsedwa iwe; ndipo kodi ukhala iwe wakundiweruza mlandu monga mwa cilamulo, ndipo ulamulira andipande ine posanga cilamulo?" 
Acts23:4 Ndipo iwo akuimirirako anati, Ulalatira kodi mkulu wa ansembe wa Mulungu?" 
Acts23:5 Ndipo Paulo anati, Sindinadziwa, abale, kuti ndiye mkulu wa ansembe; pakuti kwalembedwa, Usamnenera coipa mkulu wa anthu ako." 
Acts23:6 Koma pozindikira Paulo kuti ena ndi Asaduki, ndi ena Afarisi, anapfuula m'bwalomo, Amuna, abale, ine ndine Mfarisi, mwana wa Afarisi: andinenera mlandu wa ciyembekezo ndi kuuka kwa akufa." 
Acts23:7 Ndipo pamene adatero, kunakhala cilekano pakati pa Afarisi ndi Asaduki; ndipo osonkhanawo anagawikana." 
Acts23:8 Pakutitu Asaduki anena kuti kulibe kuuka kwa akufa, kapena mngelo, kapena mzimu; koma Afarisi abvomereza ponse pawiri." 
Acts23:9 Ndipo cidauka cipolowe cacikuru; ndipo alembi ena a kwa Afarisi anaimirira, natsutsana, nanena, Sitipeza coipa ciri conse mwa munthuyu; ndipo nanga bwanji ngati mzimu kapena mngelo: walankhula naye?" 
Acts23:10 Ndipo pamene padauka cipolowe cacikuru, kapitao wamkuru anaopa kuti angamkadzule Paulo, ndipo analamulira asilikari atsike, namkwatule pakati pao, nadze naye kulowa naye m'linga," 
Acts23:11 Ndipo usiku wace Ambuye anaimirira pa iye, nati, Limbika mtima; pakuti monga wandicitira umboni ku Yerusalemu, koteronso uyenera kundicitira umboni ku Roma." 
Acts23:12 Ndipo kutaca, Ayuda anapangana ciwembu, nadzitemberera, ndi kunena kuti sadzadya kapena kumwa kanthu, kufikira atamupha Paulo;" 
Acts23:13 ndipo iwo amene adacita cilumbiro ici anali oposa makumi anai. 
Acts23:14 Amenewo anadza kwa ansembe akulu ndi akulu, nati, Tadzitemberera nalo temberero kuti sitidzalawa kanthu kufikira titamupha Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Potero tsopano inu ndi bwalo la akuru muzindikiritse kapitao wamkuru kuti atsikenaye kwa inu, monga ngati mufuna kudziwitsitsa bwino za iye; koma tadzikonzeratu timuphe asanayandikire iye." 
Acts23:16 Koma mwana wa mlongo wace wa Paulo anamva za cifwamba cao, ndipo anadza nalowa m'linga, namfotokozera Paulo." 
Acts23:17 Ndipo Paulo anadziitanira kenturiyo wina, nati, Pita naye mnyamata uyu kwa kapitao wamkuru; pakuti ali nako kanthu kakumfotokozera iye." 
Acts23:18 Pamenepo ndipo anamtenga, napita naye kwa kapitao wamkuru, nati, Wam'nsingayo Paulo anandiitana, nandipempha ndidze naye mnyamata uyu kwa inu, ali nako kanthu kakulankhula ndi inu." 
Acts23:19 Ndipo kapitao wamkuru anamgwira dzanja, napita naye padera, namfunsa m'tseri, Ciani ici uli naco kundifotokozera?" 
Acts23:20 Ndipo anati, Ayuda anapangana kuti akufunseni mutsike naye Paulo mawa ku bwalo la mirandu, monga ngati mufuna kufunsitsa za iye." 
Acts23:21 Pamenepo musakopedwe nao; pakuti amlalira iye oposa makumi anai a iwo amene anadzitemberera okha kud sadzadya kapena kumwa kufikira atamupha iye; ndipo akonzekeratu tsopano nayang'anira lonjezano lanu. 
Acts23:22 Pamenepo ndipo kapitao wamkuru anauza mnyamatayo apite, namlamulira kuti, Usauze munthu yense kuti wandizindikiritsa izi." 
Acts23:23 Ndipo anaitana akenturiyo awiri, nati, Mukonzeretu asilikari mazana awiri, apite kufikira Kaisareya, ndi apakavalo makumi asanu ndi awiri, ndi anthungo mazana awiri, acoke ora lacitatu la usiku;" 
Acts23:24 ndiponso mukonzeretu nyama zobereka amkwezepo Paulo, nampereke wosungika kwa Felike kazembeyo." 
Acts23:25 Ndipo analembera kalata wakuti: 
Acts23:26 Klaudiyo Lusiya kwa kazembe womveketsa Felike, ndikulankhulani." 
Acts23:27 Munthu uyu anagwiridwa ndi Ayuda, ndipo akadaphedwa ndi iwo; pamenepo ndinafikako ine ndi asilikari, ndipo ndinamlanditsa pakumva kuti ndiye Mroma." 
Acts23:28 Ndipo pofuna kuzindikira cifukwa cakuti anamnenera iye, ndinatsikira naye ku bwalo la akuru ao." 
Acts23:29 Ndipo ndinapeza kuti adamnenera za mafunso a cilamulo cao; koma analibe kumnenera kanthu kakuyenera imfa kapena nsinga. 
Acts23:30 Ndipo m'mene anandidziwitsa kuti pali ciwembu ca pa munthuyu, pomwepo ndinamtumiza kwa inu; ndipo ndalamulira akumnenera akamnenere kwa inu." 
Acts23:31 Pamenepo ndipo asilikari, monga adawalamulira, anatenga Paulo, napita naye usiku ku Antipatri." 
Acts23:32 Koma m'mawa mwace anasiya apakavalo amperekeze, nabwera kulinga;" 
Acts23:33 iwowo, m'mene anafika ku Kaisareya, anapereka kalata kwa kazembe, naperekanso Paulo kwa iye." 
Acts23:34 Ndipo m'mene adawerenga anafunsa acokera m'dziko liti; ndipo pozindikira kuti anali wa ku Kilikiya," 
Acts23:35 anati, Ndidzamva mlandu wako, pamene akukunenera afika. Ndipo analamulira kuti amdikire iye m'nyumba yamlandu ya Herode." 
Acts24:1 Ndipo atapita masiku asanu anatsika mkulu wa ansembe Hananiya pamodzi ndi akuru ena, ndi wogwira moyo dzina lace Tertulo; ndipo anafotokozera kazembeyo za kunenera Paulo." 
Acts24:2 Ndipo pamene adamuitana, Tertulo anayamba kumnenera ndi kunena. Popeza tiri nao mtendere wambiri mwa inu, ndipo mwa kuganiziratu kwanu muukonzera mtundu wathu zotiipsa," 
Acts24:3 tizilandira ndi ciyamiko conse, monsemo ndi ponsepo, Felike womveka inu." 
Acts24:4 Koma kuti ndingaonjeze kukulemetsani ndikupempha, ni mutimvere mwacidule ndi cifatso canu." 
Acts24:5 Pakuti tapeza munthuyu ali ngati mliri, ndi woutsa mapanduko kwa Ayuda onse m'dziko lonse lokhalamo anthu, ndi mtsogoleri wa mpanduko wa Anazarene;" 
Acts24:6 amenenso anayesa kuipsa Kacisi; amene tamgwira; 
Acts24:7  
Acts24:8 kwa iye mudzakhoza kuzindikira pomfunsa nokha, za izi zonse timnenerazi." 
Acts24:9 Ndipo Ayudanso anabvomerezana naye, natsimikiza kuti izi zitero." 
Acts24:10 Ndipo pamene kazembe anamkodola kuti anene, Paulo anayankha, Podziwa ine kuti mwakhala woweruza wa mtundu uwu zaka zambiri, ndidzikanira mokondwera;" 
Acts24:11 popeza mukhoza kuzindikira kuti apita masiku khumi ndi awiri okha cikwerere ine ku Yerusalemu kukalambira; 
Acts24:12 ndipo sanandipeza m'Kacisi wotsutsana ndi munthu, kapena kuutsa khamu la anthu, kapena m'sunagoge kapena m'mzinda." 
Acts24:13 Ndipo sangathe kukutsimikizirani zimene andinenera ine tsopano. 
Acts24:14 Koma ici ndibvomera kwa inu, kuti monga mwa Njira yonenedwa mpatuko, momwemo nditumikira Mulungu wa makolo athu, ndi kukhulupira zonse ziri monga mwa cilamulo, ndi zolembedwa mwa aneneri;" 
Acts24:15 ndi kukhala naco ciyembekezo ca kwa Mulungu cimene iwo okhanso acilandira, kuti kudzakhala kuuka kwa olungama ndi osalungama." 
Acts24:16 M'menemonso ndidziyesera ndekha ndikhale naco nthawi zonse cikumbu mtima cosanditsutsa ca kwa Mulungu ndi kwa anthu. 
Acts24:17 Ndipo zitapita zaka zambiri ndinadza kutengera mtundu wanga zacifundo, ndi zopereka;" 
Acts24:18 popereka izi anandipeza woyeretsedwa m'Kacisi, wopanda khamu la anthu, kapena phokoso; koma panali Ayuda ena a ku Asiya," 
Acts24:19 ndiwo mwenzi atakhala pano pamaso panu ndi kundinenera, ngati ali nako kanthu kotsutsa ine." 
Acts24:20 Kapena iwo amene ali kunowa anene anapeza cosalungama cotani, poimirira ine pamaso pa bwalo la akuru," 
Acts24:21 koma mau awa amodzi okha, amene ndinapfuula poimirira pakati pao, Kunena za kuuka kwa akufa ndiweruzidwa ndi inu lero lino." 
Acts24:22 Koma Felike anawalinditsa, popeza anadziwitsadi Njirayo, nati, Pamene Lusiya kapitao wamkuru akatsika ndidzazindikiritsa konse za kwa inu." 
Acts24:23 Ndipo analamulira kenturiyo amsunge iye, koma akhale nao ufulu, ndipo asaletse anthu ace kumtumikira." 
Acts24:24 Koma atapita masiku ena, anadza Felike ndi Drusila mkazi wace, ndiye Myuda, naitana Paulo, ndipo anamva iye za cikhulupiriro ca Kristu Yesu." 
Acts24:25 Ndipo m'mene anamfotokozera za cilungamo, ndi cidziletso, ndi ciweruziro cirinkudza, Felike anagwidwa ndi mantha, nayankha, Pita tsopano; ndipo ndikaona nthawi, ndidzakuitana iwe." 
Acts24:26 Anayembekezanso kuti Paulo adzampatsa ndalama; cifukwa cacenso anamuitana iye kawiri kawiri, nakamba naye." 
Acts24:27 Koma zitapita zaka ziwiri Porkiyo Festo analowa m'malo a Felike; ndipo Felike pofuna kukonda Ayuda anamsiya Paulo m'nsinga. 
Acts25:1 Pamenepo Festo m'mene analowa dziko lace, ndipo atapita masiku atatu, anakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu kucokera ku Kaisareya." 
Acts25:2 Ndipo ansembe akulu ndi akulu a Ayuda ananenera Paulo kwa iye; ndipo iwo anamdandaulira," 
Acts25:3 nampempha kuti mlandu wace wa Paulo uipe, kuti amuitane iye adze ku Yerusalemu; iwo amcitira cifwamba kuti amuphe panjira." 
Acts25:4 Pamenepo Festo anayankha, kuti Paulo asungike ku Kaisareya, ndi kuti iye mwini adzapitako posacedwa." 
Acts25:5 Cifukwa cace, ati, iwo amene akhoza mwa inu amuke nane potsikirako, ndipo ngati kuli kanthu kosayenera mwa munthuyo amnenere iye." 
Acts25:6 Ndipo m'mene adatsotsa mwa iwo masiku asanu ndi atatu kapena khumi okha anatsikiraku Kaisareya; ndipo m'mawa mwace anakhala pa mpando waciweruziro, nalamulira kuti atenge Paulo." 
Acts25:7 Ndipo m'mene anafika iye, Ayuda adatsikawo ku Yerusalemu anaimirira pomzinga iye, namnenera zifukwa zambiri ndi zazikuru, zimene sanakhoza kuzitsimikiza;" 
Acts25:8 koma Paulo podzikanira ananena, Sindinacimwa kanthu kapena pacilamulo, kapena paKacisi, kapena pa Kaisara." 
Acts25:9 Kama Festo pofuna kuyesedwa wacisomo ndi Ayuda, anayankha kwa Paulo, nati, Kodi ufuna kukwera kunka ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuweruzidwa ndi ine pomwepo kunena za zinthu izi?" 
Acts25:10 Koma Paulo anati, ndirikuimirira pa mpando waciweruziro wa Kaisara, pompano ndiyenera kuweruzidwa ine; Ayuda sindinawacitira-kanthu koipa, monga mudziwanso nokha bwino." 
Acts25:11 Pamenepo ngati ndiri wocita zoipa, ngati ndacita kanthu kakuyenera imfa, sindikana kufa; koma ngati zinthuzi awa andinenera nazo ziri zacabe, palibe mmodzi akhoza kundipereka kwa iwo. Nditurukira kwa Kaisara." 
Acts25:12 Pamenepo Festo, atakamba ndi aphungu ace, anayankha, Wanena, Ndirurukira kwa Kaisara; kwa Kaisara udzapita." 
Acts25:13 Ndipo atapita masiku ena, Agripa mfumuyo, ndi Bemike anafika ku Kaisareya, nalankhula Festo." 
Acts25:14 Ndipo atatsotsako masiku ambiri, Festo anafotokozera mfumuyo mlandu wace wa Paulo, nanena, Pali munthu adamsiya m'ndende Felike," 
Acts25:15 amene ansembe akulu ndi akulu a Ayuda anamnenera kwa ine, ndiri ku Yerusalemu, nandipempha ndiipitse mlandu wace." 
Acts25:16 Koma ndinawayankha, kuti macitidwe a Aroma satero, kupereka munthu asanayambe woneneredwayo kupenyana nao omnenera ndi kukhala napo podzikanira pa comneneraco." 
Acts25:17 Potero, pamene adasonkhana pano, sindinacedwa, koma m'mawa mwace ndinakhala pa mpando waciweruziro, ndipo ndinalamulira adze naye munthuyo." 
Acts25:18 Ndipo pamene anaimirira omneneza, sanamchulira konse cifukwa ca zoipa zonga ndinazilingirira ine;" 
Acts25:19 koma anali nao mafunso ena otsutsana naye a cipembedzero ca iwo okha, ndi mafunso a wina Yesu, amene adafa, amene Paulo anati kuti ali ndi moyo." 
Acts25:20 Ndipo ine posinkhasinkha za mafunso awa ndinamfunsa ngati afuna kupita ku Yerusalemu, ndi kuweruzidwa komweko za izi." 
Acts25:21 Koma pakunena Paulo ndi kuti, asungidwe, akaturukire kwa Augusto, ndinaweruza asungidwe iye kufikira ndikamtumiza kwa Kaisara." 
Acts25:22 Ndipo Agripa anati kwa Festo, Ndifuna nanenso ndimve munthuyo. Anati, Mawa mudzamva iye." 
Acts25:23 M'mawa mwace tsono, atafika Agripa ndi Bemike ndi cifumu cacikuru, ndipo atalowa momvera milandu, pamodzi ndi akapitao akuru, ndi amuna omveka a mudziwo, ndipo pakulamulira Festo, anadza naye Paulo." 
Acts25:24 Ndipo Festo anati, Mfumu Agripa, ndi amuna inu nonse muli nafe pano pamodzi, muona uyu, amene unyinji wonse wa Ayuda anandiuza za iye, ku Yerusalemu ndi kunonso, ndi kupfuula kuti sayeneranso kukhala ndi moyo." 
Acts25:25 Koma ndinapeza ine kuti sanacita kanthu, koyenera imfa iye; ndipo popeza, iye yekha anati akaturukire kwa Augusto, ndatsimikiza mtima kumtumizako." 
Acts25:26 Koma ndiribe ine kanthu koti ndinenetse za iye kakulembera kwa mbuye wanga. Cifukwa cace ndamturutsira kwa inu, ndipo makamaka kwa inu, Mfumu Agripa, kuti, ndikatha kumfunsafunsa, ndikhale nako kanthu kakulembera." 
Acts25:27 Pakuti cindionekera copanda nzeru, potumiza wam'nsinga, wosachulanso zifukwa zoti amneneze." 
Acts26:1 Ndipo Agripa anati kwa Paulo, Kwaloleka udzinenere wekha. Pamenepo Paulo, anatambasula dzanja nadzikanira:" 
Acts26:2 Ndidziyesera wamwai, Mfumu Agripa, popeza nditi ndidzikanira lero pamaso panu, za zonse zimene Ayuda andinenera nazo;" 
Acts26:3 makamaka popeza mudziwitsa miyambo yonse ndi mafunso onse a mwa Ayuda; cifukwa cace ndikupemphani mundimvere ine moleza mtima. 
Acts26:4 Mayendedwe a moyo wanga tsono, kuyambira pa cibwana canga, amene anakhala ciyambire mwa mtundu wanga m'Yerusalemu, awadziwa Ayuda onse;" 
Acts26:5 andidziwa ine ciyambire, ngati afuna kucitapo umboni, kuti ndinakhala Mfarisi monga mwa mpatuko wolunjikitsitsa wa cipembedzero cathu." 
Acts26:6 Ndipo tsopano ndiimirira pano ndiweruzidwe pa ciyembekezo ca lonjezano limene Mulungu analicita kwa makolo athu; 
Acts26:7 kunkira komweko mafuko athu khumi ndi awiri, potumikira Mulungu kosapumula usiku ndi usana, ayembekeza kufikirako. Cifukwa ca ciyembekezo ici, Mfumu, andinenera Ayuda." 
Acts26:8 Muciyesa cinthu cosakhulupirika, cakuti Mulungu aukitsa akufa?" 
Acts26:9 Inedi ndinayesa ndekha, kuti kundiyenera kucita zinthu zambiri zotsutsana nalo dzina la Yesu Mnazarayo." 
Acts26:10 Cimenenso ndinacita m'Yerusalemu: ndipo ndinatsekera ine oyera mtima ambiri m'ndende, popeza ndidalandira ulamuliro wa kwa ansembe akulu; ndiponso pophedwa iwo, ndinabvomerezapo." 
Acts26:11 Ndipo ndinawalanga kawiri kawiri m'masunagoge onse, ndi kuwakakamiza anene zamwano; ndipo pakupsa mtima kwakukuru pa iwo ndinawalondalonda ndi kuwatsata ngakhale kufikira ku midzi yakunja." 
Acts26:12 M'menemo popita ine ku Damasiko ndi ulamuliro ndi ukumu wa kwa ansembe akulu, dzuwa lamsana," 
Acts26:13 ndinaona panjira, Mfumu, kuunika kocokera kumwamba kowalitsa koposa dzuwa, kunawala pondizinga ine ndi iwo akundiperekeza." 
Acts26:14 Ndipo pamene tidagwa pansi tonse, ndinamva mau akunena kwa ine m'cinenedwe ca Cihebri, Saulo, Saulo, undilondalonderanji Ine? nkukubvuta kutsalima pacothwikira." 
Acts26:15 Ndipo ndinati, Ndinu yani Mbuye? Ndipo Ambuye anati, Ine ndine Yesu amene iwe umlondalonda." 
Acts26:16 Komatu uka, imirira pa mapazi ako; pakuti cifukwa ca ici ndinaonekera kwa iwe, kukuika iwe ukhale mtumiki ndi mboni ya izi wandionamo Ine, ndiponso ya izi ndidzakuonekeramo we;" 
Acts26:17 ndi kukulanditsa kwa anthu, ndi kwa amitundu, amene Ine ndikutuma kwa iwo," 
Acts26:18 kukawatsegulira maso ao, kuti atembenuke kucokera kumdima, kulinga kukuunika, ndi kucokera ulamuliro wa Satana kulinga kwa Mulungu, kuti alandire iwo cikhululukiro ca macimo, ndi colowa mwa iwo akuyeretsedwa ndi cikhulupiriro ca mwa Ine." 
Acts26:19 Potero, Mfumu Agripa, sindinakhala ine wosamvera masomphenya a Kumwamba;" 
Acts26:20 komatu kuyambira kwa iwo a m'Damasiko, ndi a m'Yerusalemu, ndi m'dziko lonse la Yudeya, ndi kwa amitundunso ndinalalikira kuti alape, natembenukire kwa Mulungu, ndi kucita nchito zoyenera kutembenuka mtima." 
Acts26:21 Cifukwa ca izi Ayuda anandigwira m'Kacisi, nayesa kundipha." 
Acts26:22 Pamenepo pothandizidwa ndi Mulungu, ndiimirira kufikira lero lino, ndi kuwacitira umboni ang'ono ndi akuru, posanena kanthu kena koma zimene aneneri ndi Mose ananenazidzafika;" 
Acts26:23 kuti Kristu akamve zowawa, kuti iye, woyamba mwa kuuka kwa akufa, adzalalikira kuunika kwa anthu ndi kwa amitundu." 
Acts26:24 Koma pakudzikanira momwemo, Festo anati ndi mau akuru, Uli wamisala Paulo; kuwerengetsa kwako kwakucititsa misala." 
Acts26:25 Koma Paulo anati, Ndiribe misala, Festo womvekatu; koma nditurutsa mau a coonadi ndi odziletsa." 
Acts26:26 Pakuti mfumuyo idziwa izi, kwa iye imene ndilankhula nayonso mosaopa: pakuti ndidziwadi kuti kulibe kanthu ka izi kadambisikira; pakuti ici Sicinacitika m'tseri." 
Acts26:27 Mfumu Agripa, mukhulupirira aneneri kodi? ndidziwa kuti muwakhulupirira." 
Acts26:28 Ndipo Agripa anati kwa Paulo, Ndi kundikopa pang'ono ufuna kundiyesera Mkristu." 
Acts26:29 Ndipo Paulo anati, Mwenzi atalola Mulungu, kuti ndi kukopa pang'ono, kapena ndi kukopa kwambiri, si inu nokha, komatunso onse akundimva ine lero, akadakhala otero onga ndiri ine, osanena nsinga izi." 
Acts26:30 Ndipo ananyamuka mfumu, ndi kazembe, ndi Bemike, ndi iwo akukhala nao;" 
Acts26:31 ndipo atapita padera analankhula wina ndi mnzace, nanena, Munthu uyu sanacita kanthu koyenera imfa, kapena nsinga." 
Acts26:32 Ndipo Agripa anati kwa Festo, Tikadakhoza kumasula munthuyu, wakadapanda kunena, Ndikaturukire kwa Kaisara." 
Acts27:1 Ndipo pamene padatsimikizika kuti tipite m'ngalawa kunka ku Italiya, anapereka Paulo ndi andende ena kwa kenturiyo dzina lace Yuliyo, wa gulu la Augusto." 
Acts27:2 Ndipo m'mene tidalowam'ngalawa ya ku Adramutiyo ikati ipite kunka ku malo a ku mbali ya Asiya, dnakankha, ndipo Aristarko Mmakedoniya wa ku Tesalonika, anali nafe." 
Acts27:3 Ndipo m'mawa mwace tinangokoceza ku Sidoni; ndipo Yuliyo anacitira Paulo mwacikondi, namlola apite kwa abwenzi ace amcereze." 
Acts27:4 Ndipo pokankhanso pamenepo, tinapita kutseri kwa Kupro, popeza mphepo inaomba mokomana nafe." 
Acts27:5 Ndipo pamene tidapyola nyanja ya kunsi kwace kwa Kilikiya ndi Pamfiliya, tinafika ku Mura wa Lukiya." 
Acts27:6 Ndipo kenturiyo anapezako ngalawa ya ku Alesandriya, irikupita ku Italiya, ndipo anatilongamo." 
Acts27:7 Ndipo m'mene tidapita pang'ono pang'ono masiku ambiri, ndi kufika mobvutika pandunji pa Knido, ndipo popeza siinatilolanso mphepo, tinai pita m'tseri mwa Krete, pandunji pa Salimone;" 
Acts27:8 ndipo popaza-pazapo mobvutika, tinafika ku malo ena dzina lace Pokoceza Pokoma; pafupi pamenepo panali mudzi wa Laseya." 
Acts27:9 Ndipo Itapita nthawi yambiri, ndipo unayambokhala woopsya ulendowo, popezanso nyengo ya kusala cakudya idapita kale, Paulo anawacenjeza," 
Acts27:10 nanena nao, Amuna inu, ndiona ine kuti ulendo udzatitengera kuonongeka ndi kutayika kwambiri, si kwa akatundu okha kapena ngalawa yokha, komatunso kwa moyo wathu." 
Acts27:11 Koma kenturiyo anakhulupirira watsigiro ndi mwini ngalawa makamaka, wosasamala mau a Paulo." 
Acts27:12 Ndipo popezadooko silinakoma kugonapo nyengo yacisanu, unyinji unacita uphungu ndi kutiamasule nacokepo, ngati kapena nkutheka afikire ku Foinika, ndi kugonako, ndilo dooko la ku Krete, loloza kumpoto ndi kumwela." 
Acts27:13 Ndipo poomba pang'ono mwela, poyesa kuti anaona cofunirako, anakoka nangula, napita m'mbali mwa Krete." 
Acts27:14 Koma patapita pang'ono idaombetsa kucokerako mphepo ya namondwe, yonenedwa Eurokulo;" 
Acts27:15 ndipo pogwidwa nayo ngalawa, yosakhoza kupitanso mokomana nayo mphepo, tidangoleka, ndipo tinangotengedwa." 
Acts27:16 Ndipo popita kutseri kwa cisumbu cacing'ono dzina lace Kauda, tinakhoza kumangitsa bwato koma mobvutika;" 
Acts27:17 ndipo m'mene adaukweza, anacita nazo zothandizira, nakulunga ngalawa; ndipo pakuopa kuti angatayike pa Surti, anatsitsa matanga, natengedwa motero." 
Acts27:18 Ndipo pobvutika kwakukuru ndi namondweyo, m'mawa mwace anayamba kutaya akatundu;" 
Acts27:19 ndipo tsiku lacitatu anataya ndi manja ao a iwo eni zipangizo za ngalawa. 
Acts27:20 Ndipo m'mene dzuwa kapena nyenyezi sizinatiwalira masiku ambiri, ndipo namondwe wosati wamng'ono anatigwera, ciyembekezo conse cakuti tipulumuke cidaticokera pomwepo." 
Acts27:21 Ndipo pamene atakhala nthawi yaikuru osadya kanthu, Paulo anaimirira pakati pao, nati, Amuna inu, mukadamvera ine, osacoka ku Krete, osadzitengera kuonongeka ndi kutayika kumene." 
Acts27:22 Koma tsopano ndikucenjezani mulimbike mtima; pakuti sadzatayika wamoyo mmodzi mwa inu, koma ngalawa ndiyo." 
Acts27:23 Pakuti anaimirira kwa ine usiku walero mngelo wa Mulungu amene ndiri wace, amenenso ndimtumikira," 
Acts27:24 nanena, Usaope Paulo; ukaimirira pamaso pa Kaisara; ndipo, taona, Mulungu anakupatsa onse amene akuyenda nawe pamodzi." 
Acts27:25 Cifukwa cace, limbikani mtima, amuna inu; pakuti ndikhulupirira Mulungu, kuti kudzatero monga momwe ananena ndi ine." 
Acts27:26 Koma tiyenera kutayika pa cisumbu cakuti. 
Acts27:27 Koma pofika usiku wakhumi ndi cinai, potengedwa ife kwina ndi kwina m'nyanja ya Adriya, pakati pa usiku amarinyero anazindikira kuti analikuyandikira kumtunda;" 
Acts27:28 ndipo anayesa madzi, napeza mikwamba makumi awiri; ndipo katapita kanthawi, anayesanso, napeza mikwamba khumi ndi isanu." 
Acts27:29 Ndipo pakuopa tingatayike pamiyala, anaponya anangula anai kumakaliro, nakhumba kuti kuce." 
Acts27:30 Ndipo m'mene amarinyero anafunakuthawa m'ngalawa, natsitsira bwato m'nyanja, monga ngati anati aponye anangula kulikuru," 
Acts27:31 Paulo anati kwa kenturiyo ndi kwa asilikari, Ngati awa sakhala m'ngalawa inu simukhoza kupulumuka." 
Acts27:32 Pamenepo asilikari anadula zingwe za bwato, naligwetsa." 
Acts27:33 Ndipo popeza kulinkuca, Paulo anawacenjeza onse adye kanthu, nati, Lero ndilo tsiku lakhumi ndi cinai limene munalindira, ndi kusala cakudya, osalawa kanthu." 
Acts27:34 Momwemo ndikucenjezani mutenge kanthu kakudya; pakuti kumeneku ndi kwa cipulumutsocanu; pakuti silidzatayika tsitsi la pa mutu wa mmodzi wa inu. 
Acts27:35 Ndipo atanena izi, ndi kutenga mkate, anayamika Mulungu pamaso pa onse; ndipo m'mene adaunyema anayamba kudya." 
Acts27:36 Ndipo anakhala olimbika mtima onse, natenga cakudya iwo omwe." 
Acts27:37 Ndipo life tonse tiri m'ngalawa ndife anthu mazana awiri mphambu makumi asanu ndi awiri kudza asanu ndi mmodzi. 
Acts27:38 Ndipo m'mene anakhuta, anapepuza ngalawa, nataya tirigu m'nyarija." 
Acts27:39 Ndipo kutaca sanazindikira dzikolo; koma anaona pali bondo la mcenga; kumeneko anafuna, ngati nkutheka, kuyendetsako ngalawa." 
Acts27:40 Ndipo m'mene anataya anangula anawasiya m'nyanja, namasulanso zingwe zomanga tsigiro; ndipo pokweza thanga la kulikuru, analunjikitsa kumcenga." 
Acts27:41 Koma pofika pamalo pokomana mafunde awiri, anatsamitsapo ngalawa; ndipo kulikuru kunatsama, ndi kukhala kosasunthika, koma kumakaliro kunasweka ndi mphamvu ya mafunde." 
Acts27:42 Ndipo uphungu wa asilikari udati awapheandende, angasambire, ndi kuthawa." 
Acts27:43 Koma kenturiyo, pofuna kupulumutsa Paulo, anawaletsa angacite ca uphungu wao; nalamula kuti iwo akukhoza kusambira ayambe kudziporiya m'nyanja, nafike pamtunda," 
Acts27:44 ndipo otsalawo, ena pamatabwa, ndi ena pa zina za m'ngalawa. Ndipo kudatero kuti lonse adapulumukira pamtunda." 
Acts28:1 Ndipo titapulumuka, pamenepo tinadziwa kuti cisumbuco cinachedwa Melita." 
Acts28:2 Ndipo akunja anaticitira zokoma zosacitika pena ponsepo; pakuti anasonkha moto, natilandira ife tonse, cifukwa ca mvula inalinkugwa, ndi cifukwa ca cisanu." 
Acts28:3 Koma pamene Paulo adaola cisakata ca nkhuni, naciika pamoto, inaturukamo njoka, cifukwa ca kutenthaku, nilumadzanja lace." 
Acts28:4 Koma pamene akunjawo anaona ciromboco ciri lende pa dzanja lace, ananena wina ndi mnzace, Zoona munthuyu ndiye wambanda, angakhale anapulumuka m'nyanja, cilungamo sicimlola akhale ndi moyo." 
Acts28:5 Koma anakutumulira ciromboco kumoto, osamva kupweteka." 
Acts28:6 Koma anayesa kuti adzatupa, kapena mwini wace kugwa kufa pomwepo; koma m'mene adalindira nthawitu, naona kuti sikunampweteka, anapindula, nati, Ndiye Mulungu." 
Acts28:7 Koma pafupt pamenepo panali minda, mwini wace ndiye mkulu cisumbuco, dzina lace Popliyo; amene anatilandira ife, naticereza okoma masiku atatu." 
Acts28:8 Ndipo kunatero kuti atate wace wa Popliyo anagona wodwala nthenda ya malungo ndi kamwazi. Kwa iyeyu Paulo analowa, napemphera, naika manja pa iye, namciritsa." 
Acts28:9 Ndipo patacitika ici, enanso a m'cisumbu, okhala nazo nthenda, anadza, naciritsidwa;" 
Acts28:10 amenenso anaticitira ulemu wambiri; ndipo pocoka ife anatiikira zotisowa. 
Acts28:11 Ndipo itapita miyezi itatu tinayenda m'ngalawa ya ku Alesandriya, idagonera nyengo ya cisanu kucisumbuko, cizindikilo cace, Ana-a-mapasa." 
Acts28:12 Ndipo pamene tinakoceza ku Surakusa, tinatsotsako masiku atatu." 
Acts28:13 Ndipo pocokapo tinapaza ntifika ku Regio; ndipo litapita tsiku limodzi unayamba mwela, ndipo m'mawa mwace tinafika ku Potiyolo:" 
Acts28:14 pamenepo tinakomana ndi abale, amene anatiumirira tikhale nao masiku asanu ndi awiri; ndipo potero tinafika ku Roma." 
Acts28:15 Kucokera kumeneko abalewo, pakumva za ife, anadza kukomana nafe ku Bwalo la Apiyo, ndi ku Nyumba za Alendo Zitatu; ndipo pamene Paulo anawaona, anayamika Mulungu, nalimbika mtima." 
Acts28:16 Ndipo pamene tinalowa m'Roma, analola Paulo akhale pa yekha ndi msilikari womdikira iye." 
Acts28:17 Ndipo kunali, atapita masiku atatu, anaitana akulu a Ayuda asonkhane; ndipo atasonkhana, ananena nao, Ine, amuna, abale, ndingakhale sindinacita kanthu kakuipsa anthu, kapena miyambo ya makolo, anandipereka wam'nsinga kucokera ku Yerusalemu ku manja a Aroma;" 
Acts28:18 ndiwo, atandifunsafunsa ine anafuna kundimasula, popeza panalibe cifukwa ca kundiphera." 
Acts28:19 Koma pakukanapo Ayuda, ndinafulumidwa mtima kuturukira kwa Kaisara; si kunena kuti ndinali nako kanthu kakunenera mtundu wanga." 
Acts28:20 Cifukwa ca ici tsono ndinakupemphani inu mundione ndi kulankhula nane; pakuti cifukwa ca ciyembekezo ca Israyeli ndamangidwa ndi unyolo uwu. 
Acts28:21 Ndipo anati kwa iye, Ife sitinalandira akalata onena za inu ocokera ku Yudeya, kapena sanadza kuno wina wa abale ndi kutiuza kapena kulankhula kanthu koipa ka inu." 
Acts28:22 Koma tifuna kumva mutiuze muganiza ciani; pakuti za mpatuko uwu, tidziwa kuti aunenera ponse ponse." 
Acts28:23 Ndipo pamene adampangira tsiku, anadza ku nyumba yace anthu ambiri; amenewo anawafotokozera, ndikucitira umboni Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndi kuwakopa za Yesu, zocokera m'cilamulo ca Mose ndi mwa aneneri, kuyambira mamawa kufikira madzulo." 
Acts28:24 Ndipo ena anamvera zonenedwazo, koma ena sanamvera." 
Acts28:25 Koma popeza sanabvomerezana, anacoka atanena Paulo mau amodzi, kuti, Mzimu Woyera analankhula kokoma mwa Yesaya Mneneri kwa makolo anu," 
Acts28:26 ndi kuti, Pita kwa anthu awa, nuti, Ndi kumva mudzamva, ndipo simudzazindikira konse; Ndipo pakupenya mudzapenya, koma osaona konse;" 
Acts28:27 Pakuti mtima wa anthu awa watupatu, Ndipo m'makutu mwao mmolemakumva, Ndipo masoao anawatseka; Kuti angaone ndi maso, Nangamve ndi makutu, Nangazindikire ndi mtima, Nangatembenuke, Ndipo Ine ndingawaciritse." 
Acts28:28 Potero, dziwani inu, kuti cipulumutso ici ca Mulungu citumidwa kwa amitundu; iwonsoadzamva. [" 
Acts28:29 ] 
Acts28:30 Ndipo anakhala zaka ziwiri zamphumphu m'nyumba yace yobwereka, nalandira onse akufika kwa iye," 
Acts28:31 ndi kulalikira Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndi kuphunzitsa za Ambuye Yesu Kristu ndi kulimbika konse, wosamletsa munthu." 
Romans1:1 PAULO, kapolowa Yesu Kristu, mtumwi woitanidwa, wopatulidwa kukanena Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu," 
Romans1:2 umene iye analonjeza kale ndi mau a ananeri ace m'malembo oyera," 
Romans1:3 wakunena za Mwana wace, amene anabadwa, wa mbeu ya Davide, monga mwa thupi," 
Romans1:4 amene anatsimikizidwa ndi mphamvu kuti ndiye Mwana wa Mulungu monga mwa Mzimu wa ciyero, ndi kuuka kwa akufa; ndiye Yesu Kristu Ambuye wathu;" 
Romans1:5 amene ife tinalandira naye cisomo ndi utumwi, kuti amvere cikhulupiriro anthu a mitundu yonse cifukwa ca dzina lace;" 
Romans1:6 mwa amenewo muli inunso, oitanidwa a Yesu Kristu;" 
Romans1:7 kwa onse a ku Roma, okondedwa a Mulungu, oitanidwa kuti akhale oyera mtima: Cisomo cikhale ndinu ndi mtendere wa kwa Mulungu Atate wathu, ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu." 
Romans1:8 Poyamba, ndiyamika Mulungu wanga mwa Yesu Kristu cifukwa ca inu nonse, cifukwa kuti mbiri ya cikhulupiriro canu idamveka pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Romans1:9 Pakuti Mulungu ali mboni yanga, amene ndimtumikira mu mzimu wanga, m'Uthenga Wabwino wa Mwana wace, kuti kosalekeza ndikumbukila inu, ndi kupempha masiku onse m'mapemphero anga," 
Romans1:10 ngati nkutheka tsopano mwa cifuniro ca Mulungu, ndione ulendo wabwino, wakudza kwa inu." 
Romans1:11 Pakuti ndilakalaka kuonana ndinu, kuti ndikagawire kwa inu mtulo wina wauzimu, kuti inu mukhazikike;" 
Romans1:12 ndiko, kuti ine ndikatonthozedwe pamodzi ndi inu, mwa cikhulupiriro ca ife tonse awiri, canu ndi canga." 
Romans1:13 Ndipo sindifuna kuti inu, abale, mudzakhala osadziwa, kuti kawiri kawiri ndikanena mumtima kuti ndikafike kwa inu, koma ndaletsedwa kufikira lero, kuti ndikaone zobala zina mwa inunso, monga mwa anthu amitundu ena." 
Romans1:14 Ine ndiri wamangawa wa Ahelene ndi wa akunja, wa anzeru ndi wa opusa." 
Romans1:15 Cotero, momwe ndingakhoze ine, ndirikufuna kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino kwa inunso a ku Roma." 
Romans1:16 Pakuti Uthenga Wabwino sundicititsa manyazi; pakuti uti mphamvu ya Mulungu yakupulumutsa munthu ali yense wakukhulupira; kuyambira Myuda, ndiponso Mhelene." 
Romans1:17 Pakuti m'menemo caonetsedwa cilungamoca Mulungu cakucokera kucikhulupiriro kuloza kucikhulupiriro: monga kwalembedwa, Koma munthu wolungama adzakhala ndi moyo ndi cikhulupiriro." 
Romans1:18 Pakuti mkwiyo wa Mulungu, wocokera Kumwamba, uonekera pa cisapembedzo conse ndi cosalungama ca anthu, amene akanikiza pansi coonadi m'cosalungama cao;" 
Romans1:19 cifukwa codziwika ca Mulungu caonekera m'kati mwao; pakuti Mulungu anacionetsera kwa iwo. 
Romans1:20 Pakuti cilengedwere dziko lapansi zaoneka bwino zosaoneka zace ndizo mphamvu yace yosatha ndi umulungu wace; popeza zazindikirika ndi zinthu zolengedwa, kuti iwo adzakhale opanda mau akuwiringula;" 
Romans1:21 cifukwa kuti, ngakhale anadziwa Mulungu, sanamcitira ulemu wakuyenera Mulungu, ndipo sanamyamika; koma anakhala opanda pace m'maganizo ao, ndipo unada mtima wao wopulukira," 
Romans1:22 Pakunena kuti ali anzeru, anapusa;" 
Romans1:23 nasandutsa ulemerero wa Mulungu wosaonongeka, naufanizitsa ndi cifaniziro ca munthu woonongeka ndi ca mbalame, ndi ca nyama zoyendayenda, ndi ca zokwawa." 
Romans1:24 Cifukwa cace Mulungu anawapereka iwo m'zilakolako za mitima yao, kuzonyansa, kucititsana matupi ao wina ndi mnzace zamanyazi;" 
Romans1:25 amenewo anasandutsa coonadi ca Mulungu cabodza napembedza, natumikira colengedwa, ndi kusiya Wolengayo, ndiye wolemekezeka nthawi yosatha. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Cifukwa ca ici Mulungu anawapereka iwo 1 ku zilakolako za manyazi; pakuti angakhale akazi ao anasandutsa macitidwe ao a cibadwidwe akhale macitidwe osalingana ndi cibadwidwe: 
Romans1:27 ndipo cimodzimodzinso amuna anasiya macitidwe a cibadwidwe ca akazi, natenthetsana ndi colakalaka cao wina ndi mnzace, amuna okhaokha anacitirana camanyazi, ndipo analandira mwa iwo okha mphotho yakuyenera kulakwa kwao." 
Romans1:28 Ndipo monga iwo anakana kukhala naye Mulungu m'cidziwitso cao, anawapereka Mulungu ku mtima wokanika, kukacita zinthu zosayenera;" 
Romans1:29 anadzala ndi zosalungama zonse, kuipa, kusirira, dumbo; odzala ndi kaduka, mbanda, ndeu, cinyengo, udani;" 
Romans1:30 akazitape, osinjirira, akumuda Mulungu, acipongwe, odzitama, amatukutuku, ovamba zoipa, osamvera akuru ao," 
Romans1:31 opanda nzeru, osasunga mapangano, opanda cikondi ca cibadwidwe, opanda cifundo;" 
Romans1:32 amene ngakhale adziwa kuweruza kwace kwa Mulungu, kuti iwo 2 amene acita zotere ayenera imfa, azicita iwo okha, ndiponso abvomerezana ndi iwo akuzicita." 
Romans2:1 Cifukwa cace uli wopanda mau owiringula, munthu iwe, amene uli yense wakuweruza; pakuti m'mene uweruza wina, momwemo udzitsutsa iwe wekha, pakuti iwe wakuweruza, umacita zomwezo." 
Romans2:2 Ndipo tidziwa kuti kuweruza kwa Mulungu kuli koona pa iwo akucita zotere. 
Romans2:3 Ndipo uganiza kodi, munthu iwe, amene umaweruza iwo akucita zotere, ndipo uzicitanso iwe mwini, kuti udzapulumuka pa mlandu wit Mulungu?" 
Romans2:4 Kapena upeputsa kodi kulemera kwa ubwino wace, ndi cilekerero ndi cipiriro cace, wosadziwa kuti ubwino wa Mulungu ukubwezera kuti ulape?" 
Romans2:5 Koma kolingana ndi kuuma kwako, ndi mtima wako wosalapa, ulikudziunjikira wekha mkwiyo pa dzuwa la mkwiyo ndi la kubvumbulutsa kuweruza kolungama kwa Mulungu;" 
Romans2:6 amene adzabwezera munthu ali yense kolingana ndi nchito zace; 
Romans2:7 kwa iwo amene afunafuna ulemerero ndi ulemu ndi cisaonongeko, mwa kupirira pa nchito zabwino, adzabwezera moyo wosatha;" 
Romans2:8 koma kwa iwo andeu, ndi osamvera coonadi, koma amvera cosalungama, adzabwezera mkwiyo ndi kuzaza," 
Romans2:9 nsautso ndi kuwawa mtima, kwa moyo wa munthu ali yense wakucita zoipa, kuyambira Myuda, komanso Mhelene;" 
Romans2:10 koma ulemerero ndi ulemu ndi mtendere kwa munthu ali yense wakucita zabwino, kuyambira Myuda, ndiponso Mhelene;" 
Romans2:11 pakuti Mulungu alibe tsankhu. 
Romans2:12 Pakuti onse amene anacimwa opanda lamulo adzaonongeka opanda lamulo; ndi onse amene anacimwa podziwa lamulo adzaweruzidwa ndi lamulo; 
Romans2:13 pakuti akumvaimva lamulo sakhala olungama pamaso pa Mulungu, koma akucita lamulo adzayesedwa olungama," 
Romans2:14 Pakuti pamene anthu a mitundu akukhala opanda lamulo, amacita mwa okha za lamulo, omwewo angakhale alibe lamulo, adzikhalira okha ngati lamulo;" 
Romans2:15 popeza iwo aonetsa nchito ya lamulolo yolembedwa m'mitima yao, ndipo cikumbu mtima cao cicitiranso umboni pamodzi nao, ndipo maganizo ao wina ndi mnzace anenezana kapena akanirana;" 
Romans2:16 tsiku limene Mulungu adzaweruza ndi Yesu Kristu zinsinsi za anthu, monga mwa uthenga wanga wabwino." 
Romans2:17 Koma ngati iwe unenedwa Myuda, nukhazikika palamulo, nudzitamandira pa Mulungu;" 
Romans2:18 nudziwa cifuniro cace, nubvomereza zinthu zoposa, utaphunzitsidwa m'cilamulo," 
Romans2:19 nulimbika mumtima kuti iwe wekha uli wotsogolera wa akhungu, nyali ya amene akhala mumdima," 
Romans2:20 wolangiza wa opanda nzeru, mphunzitsi wa tiana, wakukhala m'cilamulo ndi cionekedwe ca nzeru ndi ca coonadi;" 
Romans2:21 ndiwe tsono wakuphunzitsa wina; kodi ulibe kudziphunzitsa mwini? iwe wakulalikira kuti munthu asabe, kodi ulikuba mwini wekha?" 
Romans2:22 Iwe wakunena kuti munthu asacite cigololo, kodi umacita cigololo mwini wekha? Iwe wakudana nao mafano, umafunkha za m'kacisi kodi?" 
Romans2:23 Iwe wakudzitamandira pacilamulo, kodi ucitira Mulungu mwano ndi kulakwa kwako m'cilamulo?" 
Romans2:24 Pakuti dzina la Mulungu licitidwa mwano cifukwa ca inu, pakati pa anthu a mitundu, monga mwalembedwa." 
Romans2:25 Pakuti inde mdulidwe uli wabwino, ngati iwe umacita lamulo; koma ngati uli wolakwira lamulo, mdulidwe wako wasanduka kusadulidwa." 
Romans2:26 Cifukwa cace ngati wosadulidwa asunga zoikika za cilamulo, kodi kusadulidwa kwace sikudzayesedwa ngati mdulidwe?" 
Romans2:27 Ndipo kusadulidwa, kumene kuli kwa cibadwidwe, ngati kukwanira cilamulo, kodi sikudzatsutsa iwe, amene uli nao malembo ndi mdulidwe womwe, ndiwe wolakwira lamulo?" 
Romans2:28 Pakuti siali Myuda amene akhala wotere pamaso, kapena suli mdulidwe umene uli wotere pamaso, m'thupimo;" 
Romans2:29 koma Myuda ndiye amene akhala wotere mumtima; ndipo mdulidwe uli wa mtima, mumzimu, si m'malembo ai; kuyamika kwace sikucokera kwa anthu, koma kwa Mulungu." 
Romans3:1 Ndipo potero Myuda aposa Dinji? Kapena mdulidwe upindulanji? 
Romans3:2 Zambiri monse monse: coyamba, kuti mau a Mulungu anaperekedwa kwa iwo." 
Romans3:3 Nanga bwanji ngati ena sanakhulupira? Kodi kusakhulupira kwao kuyesa cabe cikhulupiriko ca Mulungu? 
Romans3:4 Msatero ai. Koma Mulungu akhale woona, ndimo anthu onse akhale onama; monga kwalembedwa, Kuti Inu mukayesedwe wolungama m'maneno anu, Ndi kuti mukalakike m'mene muweruzidwa." 
Romans3:5 Koma ngati cosalungama cathu citsimikiza cilungamo ca Mulungu, tidzatani ife? Kodi ali wosalungama Mulungu, amene afikitsa mkwiyo? (ndilankhula umo anenera munthu)." 
Romans3:6 Msatero ai. Ngati kotero, Mulungu adzaweruza bwanji mlandu wa dziko lapansi?" 
Romans3:7 Pakuti ngati coonadi ca Mulungu cicurukitsa ulemerero wacecifukwa ca bodza langa, nanga inenso ndiweruzidwa bwanji monga wocimwa?" 
Romans3:8 Ndipo tilekerenji kunena, Ticite zoipa kuti zabwino zikadze (monganso ena atinamiza ndi kuti timanena)? Kulanga kwa amenewo kuli kolungama." 
Romans3:9 Ndipo ciani tsono? kodi tiposa ife? Iai ndithu; pakuti tidawaneneza kale Ayuda ndi Ahelene omwe, kuti onsewa agwidwa ndi ucimo;" 
Romans3:10 monga kwalembedwa, Palibe mmodzi wolungama, inde palibe mmodzi;" 
Romans3:11 Palibe mmodzi wakudziwitsa, Palibe mmodzi wakuloodola Mulungu;" 
Romans3:12 Onsewa apatuka, pamodzi akhala opanda pace; Palibe mmodzi wakucita zabwino, inde, palibe mmodzi ndithu." 
Romans3:13 M'mero mwao muli manda apululu; Ndi lilime lao amanyenga; Ululu wa mamba uli pansi pa milomo yao; 
Romans3:14 M'kamwa mwao mudzala ndi zotemberera ndi zowawa; 
Romans3:15 Miyendo yao icita liwiro kukhetsa mwazi; 
Romans3:16 Kusakaza ndi kusauka kuli m'njira zao; 
Romans3:17 Ndipo njira ya mtendere sanaidziwa; 
Romans3:18 Kumuopa Mulungu kulibe pamaso pao. 
Romans3:19 Ndipo tidziwa kuti zinthu ziri zonse cizinena cilamulo cizilankhulira iwo ali naco cilamulo; kuti pakamwa ponse patsekedwe, ndi dziko lonse lapansi litsutsidwe ndi Mulungu;" 
Romans3:20 cifukwa kuti pamaso pace palibe munthu adzayesedwa wolungama ndi Debito za lamulo; pakuti ucimo udziwika ndi lamulo. 
Romans3:21 Koma tsopano cilungamo ca Mulungu caoneka copanda lamulo, cilamulo ndi aneneri acitira ici umboni;" 
Romans3:22 ndico cilungamo ca Mulungu cimene cicokera mwa cikhulupiriro ca pa Yesu Kristu kwa onse amene akhulupira; pakuti palibe kusiyana; 
Romans3:23 pakuti onse anacimwa, naperewera pa ulemerero wa Mulungu;" 
Romans3:24 ndipo ayesedwa olungama kwaulere, ndi cisomo cace, mwa ciombolo ca mwa Kristu Yesu;" 
Romans3:25 amene Mulungu anamuika poyera akhale cotetezera mwa cikhulupiriro ca m'mwazi wace, kuti aonetse cilungamo cace, popeza Mulungu m'kulekerera kwace analekerera macimo ocitidwa kale lomwe;" 
Romans3:26 kuti aonetse cilungamo cace m'nyengo yatsopano; kuti iye akhale wolungama, ndi wakumuyesa wolungama iye amene akhulupirira Yesu," 
Romans3:27 Pamenepo kudzitama kuli kuti? Kwaletsedwa. Ndi lamulo lotani? La nchito kodi? lai; koma ndi lamulo la cikhulupiriro. 
Romans3:28 Pakuti timuyesa munthu wohmgama cifukwa ca cikhulupiriro, wopanda nchito za lamulo." 
Romans3:29 Kapena Mulungu ndiye wa Ayuda okha okha kodi? si wao wa amitundunso kodi? Bya, wa amitundunso:" 
Romans3:30 ngatitu ndiye Mulungu mmodzi, amene adzawayesa amdulidwe olungama ndi cikhulupiriro, ndi akusadulidwa mwa cikhulupiriro," 
Romans3:31 Potero kodi lamulo tiyesa cabe mwa cikhulupiriro? Msatero ai; koma tikhazikitsa lamulo. 
Romans4:1 Ndipo tsono tidzanena kuti Abrahamu, kholo lathu monga mwa thupi, analandira ciani?" 
Romans4:2 Pakuti ngati Abrahamu anayesedwa wolungama cifukwa ca nchito, iye akhala naco codzitamandira; koma kulinga kwa Mulungu ai." 
Romans4:3 Pakuti lembo litani? Ndipo Abrahamu anakhulupirira Mulungu, ndipo cinawerengedwa kwa iye cilungamo," 
Romans4:4 Ndipo kwa iye amene agwira nchito, mphotho siiwerengedwa ya cisomo koma ya mangawa." 
Romans4:5 Koma kwa iye amene sacita, koma akhulupirira iye amene ayesa osapembedza ngati olungama, cikhulupiriro cace ciwerengedwa cilungamo." 
Romans4:6 Monganso Davide anena za mdalitso wace wa munthu, amene Mulungu amwerengera cilungamo copanda nchito," 
Romans4:7 ndi kuti, Odala iwo amene akhululukidwa kusayeruzika kwao, Nakwiriridwa macimo ao," 
Romans4:8 Wodala munthu amene Mulungu samwerengera ucimo. 
Romans4:9 Mdalitso umenewu tsono uli kwa odulidwa kodi, kapena kwa osadulidwa omwe? pakuti timati, Cikhulupiriro cace cinawerengedwa kwa Abrahamu cilungamo." 
Romans4:10 Tsono cinawerengedwa bwanji? m'mene iye anali wodulidwa kapena wosadulidwa? Si wodulidwa ai, koma wosadulidwa;" 
Romans4:11 ndipo iye analandira cizindikilo ca mdulidwe, ndico cosindikiza cilungamo ca cikhulupiriro, comwe iye anali naco asanadulidwe; kuti kotero iye akhale kholo la onse akukhulupira, angakhale iwo sanadulidwa, kuti cilungamo ciwerengedwe kwa iwonso;" 
Romans4:12 ndiponso kholo la mdulidwe wa iwo amene siali a mdulidwe okha, koma wa iwo amene atsata mayendedwe a cikhulupiriro cija ca kholo lathu Abrahamu, cimene iye anali naco asanadulidwe." 
Romans4:13 Pakuti lonjezo lakuti iye adzakhala wolowanyumba wa dziko lapansi silinapatsidwa kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa mbeu yace mwa Lamulo, koma mwa cilungamo ca cikhulupiriro." 
Romans4:14 Pakuti ngati iwo a lamulo akhala olowa nyumba, pamenepo cikhulupiriro eayesedwa cabe, ndimo lonjezo layesedwa lopanda pace;" 
Romans4:15 pakuti cilamulo cicitira mkwiyo; koma pamene palibe lamulo, pamenepo palibe kulakwa." 
Romans4:16 Cifukwa cace cilungamo cicokera m'cikhulupiriro, kuti cikhale monga mwa cisomo; kuti lonjezo likhale Iokhazikika kwa mbeu zonse; si kwa iwo a cilamulo okha okha, komakwa iwonso a cikhulupiriro ca Abrahamu; ndiye kholo la ife tonse;" 
Romans4:17 monga kwalembedwa: Ndinakukhazika iwe kholo la mitundu yambiri ya anthu pamaso pa Mulungu amene iye anamkhulupirira, amene apatsa akufa moyo, ndi kuitana zinthu zoti palibe, monga ngati ziripo," 
Romans4:18 Amene anakhulupira nayembekeza zosayembekezeka, kuti iye akakhale kholo la mitundu yambiri ya anthu, monga mwa conenedwaci, Mbeu yakoidzakhala yotere," 
Romans4:19 Ndipo iye osafoka m'cikhulupiriro sanalabadira thupi lace, ndilo longa ngati lakufa pamenepo, (pokhala iye ngati zaka makumi khumi), ndi mimba ya Sara idaumanso;" 
Romans4:20 ndipo poyang'anira lonjezo la Mulungu sanagwedezeka cifukwa ca kusakhulupirira, koma analimbika m'cikhulupiriro, napatsa Mulungu ulemu," 
Romans4:21 nakhazikikanso mumtima kuti, o cimene iye analonjeza, anali nayonso mphamvu yakucicita." 
Romans4:22 Cifukwa cace ici cinawerengedwa kwa iye cilungamo. 
Romans4:23 Ndipo ici sicinalembedwa cifukwa caiye yekha yekha, kuti cidawerengedwa kwa iye;" 
Romans4:24 koma cifukwa ca ifenso, kwa ife amene cidzawerengedwa kwa ife amene tikhulupirira iye amene anaukitsa kwa akufa Yesu Ambuye wathu," 
Romans4:25 amene anaperekedwa cifukwa ca zolakwazathu, naukitsidwa cifukwa ca kutiyesa ife olungama." 
Romans5:1 Popeza tsono tayesedwa olungama ndi cikhulupiriro, tikhala ndi mtendere ndi Mulungu mwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu;" 
Romans5:2 amene ife tikhoza kulowa naye ndi cikhulupiriro m'cisomo ici m'mene tirikuunamo; ndipo tikondwera m'ciyembekezo ca ulemerero wa Mulungu. 
Romans5:3 Ndipo si cotero cokha, komanso tikondwera m'zisautso; podziwa ife kuti cisautso cicita cipiriro; ndi cipiriro cicita cizolowezi;" 
Romans5:4 ndi cizolowezi cicita ciyembekezo: 
Romans5:5 ndipo ciyembekezo sicicititsa manyazi; cifukwa cikondi ca Mulungu cinatsanulidwa m'mitima mwathu mwa Mzimu Woyera, amene wapatsidwa kwa ife." 
Romans5:6 Pakuti pamene tinali cikhalire ofok a, pa nyengo yace Kristu anawafera osapembedza." 
Romans5:7 Pakuti ndi cibvuto munthu adzafera wina wolungama; pakuti kapena wina adzalimbika mtima kufera munthu wabwino. 
Romans5:8 Koma g Mulungu atsimikiza kwa ife cikonai cace ca mwini yekha m'menemo, kuti pokhala ife cikhalire ocimwa, Kristu adatifera ife." 
Romans5:9 Ndipo tsono popeza inayesedwa olungama ndi mwazi wace, makamaka ndithu tidzapulumuka mkwiyo wa Mulungu mwa Iyeyo." 
Romans5:10 Pakuti ngati, pokhala ife adani ace, tinayanjanitsidwa ndi Mulungu mwa imfa ya Mwana wace, makamaka ndithu, popeza ife tayanjanitsidwa, tidzapulumuka ndi moyo wace." 
Romans5:11 Ndipo si cotero cokha, koma ife tikondwera ndi Mulungu mwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, amene talandira naye tsopano ciyanjanitso." 
Romans5:12 Cifukwa cace, monga ucimo unalowa m'dziko lapansi mwa munthu mmodzi, ndi imfa mwa ucimo; cotero imfa inafikira anthu onse, cifukwa kuti onse anacimwa." 
Romans5:13 Pakuti kufikira nthawi ya lamulo ucimo unali m'dziko lapansi; koma ucimo suwerengedwa popanda lamulo. 
Romans5:14 Komatu imfa inacita ufumu kuyambira kwa Adamu kufikira kwa Mose, ngakhale pa iwonso amene sanacimwa monga macimwidwe ace a Adamu, ndiye fanizo la wakudzayo." 
Romans5:15 Koma mphatso yaulere siilingana ndi kulakwa. Pakuti ngati ambiriwo anafa cifukwa ca kulakwa kwammodziyo, makamaka ndithu cisomo ca Mulungu, ndi mphatso yaulere zakucokera ndi munthu mmodziyo Yesu Kristu, zinacurukira anthu ambiri." 
Romans5:16 Ndipo mphatso siinadza monga mwa mmodzi wakucimwa, pakuti mlandu ndithu unacokera kwa munthu mmodzi kufikira kutitsutsa, koma mphatso yaulere icokera ku zolakwa zambiri kufikira kutiyesa olungama." 
Romans5:17 Pakuti ngati, ndi kulakwa kwa mmodzi, imfa inacita ufumu mwa mmodziyo; makamaka ndithu amene akulandira kucuruka kwace kwa cisomo ndi kwa mphatso ya cilungamo, adzacita ufumu m'moyo mwa mmodzi, ndiye Yesu Kristu." 
Romans5:18 Cifukwa cace, monga mwa kulakwa kumodzi kutsutsa kunafikira anthu onse; comweconso mwa cilungamitso cimodzi cilungamo ca moyo cinafikira anthu onse." 
Romans5:19 Pakuti monga ndi kusamvera kwa munthu mmodzi ambiri anayesedwa ocimwa, comweco ndi kumvera kwa mmodzi ambiri adzayesedwa olungama." 
Romans5:20 Ndipo lamulo linalowa moyenjezera, kuti kulakwa kukacuruke; koma rl pamene ucimo unacuruka, pomwepo cisomo cinacuruka koposa;" 
Romans5:21 kuti, mongaucimo unacita ufumu muimfa, comweconso cisomo cikacite ufumu mwa cilungamo, kufikira moyo wosatha mwa Yesu Kristu Ambuye wathu." 
Romans6:1 Cifukwa cace tidzatani? Tidzakhalabe m'ucimo kodi, kuti cisomo cicuruke?" 
Romans6:2 Msatero ai. Ife amene tiri akufa ku ucimo, tidzakhala bwanji cikhalire m'menemo?" 
Romans6:3 Kapena kodi simudziwa kuti ife tonse amene tinabatizidwa mwa Kristu Yesu; tinabatizidwa mu imfa yace? 
Romans6:4 Cifukwa cace tinaikldwa m'manda pamodzi ndi iye mwa ubatizo kulowa muimfa; kuti monga Kristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa mwa ulemerero wa Atate, cotero ifenso tikayende m'moyo watsopano." 
Romans6:5 Pakuti ngati ife tinakhala olumikizidwa ndi iye m'cifanizidwe ca imfa yace, koteronso tidzakhala m'cifani'Zidwe ca kuuka kwace;" 
Romans6:6 podziwa ici, kuti umunthu wathu wakale unapacikidwa pamodzi ndi iye, kuti thupilo la ucimo likaonongedwe, kuti ife tisakhalenso akapolo a ucimo;" 
Romans6:7 pakuti iye amene anafa anamasulidwa kuucimo. 
Romans6:8 Koma ngati ife tinafa ndi Kristu, tikhulupirira kuti tidzakhalanso amoyo ndi iye;" 
Romans6:9 podziwa kuti Kristu anaukitsidwa kwa akufa, sadzafanso; imfa siicitanso ufumu pa Iye." 
Romans6:10 Pakuti pakufa iye, atafa ku ucimo kamodzi; ndipo pakukhala iye wamoyo, akhala wamoyo kwa Mulungu." 
Romans6:11 Cotero inunso mudziwerengere inu nokha ofafa ku ucimo, koma amoyo kwa Mulungu mwa Kristu Yesu." 
Romans6:12 Cifukwa cace musamalola ucimo ucite ufumu m'thupi lanu la imfa kumvera zofuna zace: 
Romans6:13 ndipo musapereke ziwalo zanu kuucimo, zikhale zida za cosalungama; koma mudzipereke inu nokha kwa Mulungu, monga amoyo ataturuka mwa akufa, ndi ziwalo zanu kwa Mulungu zikhale zida za cilungamo," 
Romans6:14 Pakuti ucimo sudzacita ufumu pa inu; popeza simuli a lamulo koma a cisomo. 
Romans6:15 Ndipo ciani tsono? Tidzacimwa kodi cifukwa sitiri a lamulo, koma a cisomo? Msatero ai." 
Romans6:16 Kodi simudziwa kuti kwa iye amene mudzipereka eni nokha kukhala akapolo ace akumvera iye, mukhalatu akapolo ace a yemweyo mulikumvera iye; kapena a ucimo kulinga kuimfa, kapena a umvero kulinga kucilungamo?" 
Romans6:17 Koma ayamikidwe Mulungu, kuti ngakhale mudakhala akapolo a ucimo, tsopano mwamvera ndi mtima makhalidwe aja a ciphunzitso cimene munaperekedweraco;" 
Romans6:18 ndipo pamene munamasulidwa kuucimo, munakhala akapolo a cilungamo," 
Romans6:19 Ndilankhula manenedwe a anthu, cifukwa ca kufoka kwa thupi lanu; pakuti monga inu munapereka ziwalo zanu zikhale akapolo a conyansa ndi a kusayeruzika kuti zicite kusayeruzika, inde kotero tsopano perekani ziwalo zanu zikhale akapolo a cilungamo kuti zicite ciyeretso." 
Romans6:20 Pakuti pamene inu munali aka polo a ucimo, munali osatumikira cilungamo." 
Romans6:21 Ndipo munali nazo zobala zanji nthawi ija, m'zinthu zimene mucita nazo manyazi tsopano? pakuti cimariziro ca zinthu izi ciri imfa." 
Romans6:22 Koma tsopano, pamene munamasulidwa kuucimo, ndi kukhala akapolo a Mulungu, muli naco cobala canu cakufikira ciyeretso, ndi cimariziro cace moyo wosatha." 
Romans6:23 Pakuti mphotho yace ya ucimo ndi imfa; koma mphatso yaulere ya Mulungu ndiyo moyo wosatha wa mwa Kristu Yesu Ambuye wathu. 
Romans7:1 Nanga kodi simudziwa, abale, pakuti ndilankhula ndi anthu akudziwa lamulo, kuti lamulolo licita ufumu pa munthu nthawi zonse iye ali wamoyo?" 
Romans7:2 Pakuti mkazi wokwatidwa amangidwa ndi lamulo kwa mwamuna wace wamoyo; koma mwamunayo akafa, iye amasulidwa ku lamulo la mwamunayo." 
Romans7:3 Ndipo cifukwa cace, ngati iye akwatiwa ndi mwamuna wina, pokhala mwamuna wace wamoyo, adzanenedwa mkazi wacigololo; koma mwamunayo akafa, iye amasulidwa ku lamuloli; cotero sakhala wacigololo ngati akwatiwa ndi mwamuna wina." 
Romans7:4 Cotero, abale anga, inunso munayesedwa akufa ku cilamulo ndi thupi la Kristu; kuti mukakhale ace a wina, ndiye amene anaukitsidwa kwa akufa, kuti ife timbalire Mulungu zipatso," 
Romans7:5 Pakuti pamene tinali m'thupi, zilakolako za macimo, zimene zinali mwa cilamulo, zinalikucita m'ziwalo zathu, kuti zibalire imfa zipatso," 
Romans7:6 Koma tsopano tinamasulidwa kucilamulo, popeza tinafa kwa ici cimene tinagwidwa naco kale; cotero kuti titumikire mu mzimu watsopano, si m'cilembo cakale ai." 
Romans7:7 Pamenepo tidzatani? Kodi cilamulo ciri ucimo? Msatero ai. Koma ine sindikadazindikira ucimo, koma mwa lamulo ndimo; pakuti sindikadazindikira cilakolako sicikadati cilamulo, Usasirire;" 
Romans7:8 koma ucimo, pamene unapeza cifukwa, unacita m'kati mwanga zilakolako zonse mwa lamulo; pakuti popanda lamulo ucimo uli wakufa." 
Romans7:9 Ndipo kale ine ndinali wamoyo popanda lamulo; koma pamene lamulo linadza, ucimo unatsitsimuka, ndipo ine ndinafa." 
Romans7:10 Ndipo lamulo, limene linali Iakupatsa moyo, ndinalipeza lakupassa imfa." 
Romans7:11 Pakuti ucimo, pamene unapeza cifukwa mwa lamulo, unandinyenga ine, ndi kundipha nalo." 
Romans7:12 Cotero cilamulo ciri coyera, ndi cilangizo cace ncoyera, ndi colunaama, ndi cabwino." 
Romans7:13 Ndipo tsopano cabwino cija cinandikhalira imfa kodi? Msatero ai. Koma ucimo, kuti uoneke kuti uli ucimo, wandicitira imfa mwa cabwino cija; kuti ucimo ukakhale wocimwitsa ndithu mwa lamulo." 
Romans7:14 Pakuti tidziwa kuti cilamulo ciri cauzimu; koma ine ndiri wathupi, wogulitsidwa kapolo wa ucimo." 
Romans7:15 Pakuti cimene ndicita sindicidziwa; pakuti sindicita cimene ndifuna, koma cimene ndidana naco, ndicita ici." 
Romans7:16 Koma ngati ndicita cimene sindicifuna, ndibvomerezana naco cilamulo kuti ciri cabwino." 
Romans7:17 Ndipo tsopano si ine ndicicita, koma ucimo wakukhalabe m'kati mwanga ndiwo." 
Romans7:18 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti m'kati mwanga, ndiko m'thupi langa, simukhala cinthu cabwino; pakuti kufuna ndiri nako, koma kucita cabwino sindikupeza." 
Romans7:19 Pakuti cabwino cimene ndicifuna, sindicicita; koma coipa cimene sindicifuna, cimeneco ndicicita." 
Romans7:20 Koma ngati ndicita cimene sindicifuna, si ndinenso amene ndicicita, koma ucimo wakukhalabe m'kati mwanga ndiwo." 
Romans7:21 Ndipo cotero odipeza lamulo ili, kuti, pamene ndifuna cabwino, coipa ciriko." 
Romans7:22 Pakuti monga mwa munthu wa m'kati mwanga, ine ndikondwera ndi cilamulo ca Mulungu:" 
Romans7:23 koma ndiona lamulo lina m'ziwalo zanga, lirikulimbana ndi lamulo la mtima wanga, ndi kundigonjetsa kapolo wa lamulo la m'ziwalo zanga." 
Romans7:24 Munthu wosauka ine; adzandilanditsa ndani m'thupi la imfa iyi? 
Romans7:25 Ndiyamika Mulungu, mwa Yesu Kristu Ambuye wathu. Ndipo cotero ine ndekha ndi mtimatu nditumikira cilamulo ca Mulungu; koma ndi thupi nditumikira lamulo la ucimo." 
Romans8:1 Cifukwa cace tsopano iwo akukhala mwa Kristu Yesu alibe kutsutsidwa. 
Romans8:2 Pakuti cilamulo ca mzimu wa moyo mwa Kristu Yesu candimasula ine ku lamulo la ucimo ndi la imfa. 
Romans8:3 Pakuti cimene cilamulo sicinathe kucita, popeza cinafoka mwa thupi, Mulungu anatumiza Mwana wace wa iye yekha m'cifanizo ca thupi la ucimo, ndi cifukwa ca ucimo, natsutsa ucimo m'thupi;" 
Romans8:4 kuti coikika cace ca cilamulo cikakwaniridwe mwa ife, amene sitiyendayenda monga mwa thupi, koma monga mwa mzimu." 
Romans8:5 Pakuti iwo amene ali monga mwa thupi asamalira zinthu za thupi; koma iwo amene ali monga mwa mzimu, asamalira zinthu za mzimu:" 
Romans8:6 pakuti cisamaliro ca thupi ciri imfa; koma cisamaliro ca mzimu ciri moyo ndi mtendere. 
Romans8:7 Cifukwa cisamaliro ca thupi cidana ndi Mulungu; pakuti sicigonja ku cilamulo ca Mulungu, pakuti sicikhoza kutero." 
Romans8:8 Ndipo iwo amene ali m'thupi sangathe kukondweretsa Mulungu. 
Romans8:9 Koma inu simuli m'thupi ai, koma mumzimu, ngatitu Mzimu wa Mulungu akhalabe mwa inu. Koma ngati munthu alibe Mzimu wa Kristu, siali wace wa Kristu." 
Romans8:10 Ndipo ngati Kristu akhala mwa inu, thupilo ndithu liri lakufa cifukwa ca ucimo; koma mzimu uli wamoyo cifukwa ca cilungamo." 
Romans8:11 Koma ngati Mzimu wa iye amene adaukitsa Yesu kwa akufa akhalabe mwa inu, iye amene adaukitsa Kristu Yesu kwa akufa adzapatsanso moyo matupi anu akufa, mwa Mzimu wace wakukhala mwa inu." 
Romans8:12 Cifukwa cace, abale, ife tiri amangawa si ace a thupi ai, kukhala ndi moyo monga mwa thupi;" 
Romans8:13 pakuti ngati mukhala ndi moyo monga mwa thupi, mudzafa; koma ngati ndi mzimu mufetsa zocita zace za thupi, mudzakhala ndi moyo." 
Romans8:14 Pakuti onse amene atsogozedwa ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu, amenewo ali ana a Mulungu," 
Romans8:15 Pakuti inu simunalandira mzimu wa ukapolo kucitanso mantha; koma munalandira mzimu waumwana, umene tipfuula nao, kuti, Abba, Atate," 
Romans8:16 Mzimu yekha acita umboni pamodzi ndi mzimu wathu, kuti tiri ana a Mulungu;" 
Romans8:17 ndipo ngati ana, pomweponso olowa nyumba; inde olowa nyumba ace a Mulungu, ndi olowa anzace a Kristu; ngatitu ife timva zowawa pamodzi naye, kuti tikalaodirenso ulemerero pamodzi ndi iye." 
Romans8:18 Pakuti ndiyesa kuti masauko a nyengo yatsopano sayenera kulinganizidwa ndi ulemerero umene udzaonetsedwa kwa ife. 
Romans8:19 Pakuti ciyembekezetso ca colengedwa cilimilia bvumbulutso la ana a Molungu. 
Romans8:20 Pakuti colengedwaco cagonietsedwa kuutsiru, cosafuna mwini, koma cifukwa ca iye amene anacigonjetsa," 
Romans8:21 ndi ciyembekezo kuti colengedwa comwe cidzamasulidwa ku ukapolo wa cibvundi, ndi kolowa ufulu wa ulemerero wa ana a Mulungu," 
Romans8:22 Pakuti tidziwa kuti colengedwa conse cibuula, ndi kugwidwa m'zowawa pamodzi kufikira tsopano." 
Romans8:23 Ndipo si cotero cokha, koma ife tomwe, tiri nazo zoundukula za Mzimu, inde ifenso tibuula m'kati mwathu, ndi kulindirira umwana wathu, ndiwo ciomboledwe ca thupi lathu." 
Romans8:24 Pakuti ife tinapolumutsidwa ndi ciyembekezo; koma ciyembekezo cimene cioneka si ciri ciyembekezo ai; pa kuti ayembekezera ndani cimene acipenya? 
Romans8:25 Koma ngati tiyembekezera cimene: siticipenya, pomwepo ticilindirira ndi cipiriro." 
Romans8:26 Ndipo momwemonso Mzimu athandiza kufoka kwathu; pakuti cimene tizipempha monga ciyenera, sitidziwa; koma Mzimu mwiniatipempherera ndi zobuula zosatheka kuneneka;" 
Romans8:27 ndipo iye amene asanthula m'mitima adziwa cimene acisamalira Mzimu, cifukwa apempherera oyera mtima monga mwa cifuno ca Mulungu." 
Romans8:28 Ndipo tidziwa kuti amene akonda Mulungu zinthu zonse zithandizana kuwacitira ubwino, ndiwo amene aitanidwa monga mwa kutsimikiza kwa mtima wace." 
Romans8:29 Cifukwa kuti iwo 1 amene iye anawadziwiratu, 2 iwowa anawalamuliratu 3 afanizidwe ndi cifaniziro ca Mwana wace, kuti 4 iye akakhale mwana woyamba wa abale ambiri;" 
Romans8:30 ndipo amene iye anawalamuliratu, iwo anawaitananso; ndimo iwo amene iye anawaitana, iwowa anawayesanso olungama; ndi iwo amene iye anawayesa olungama, 5 iwowa anawapatsanso olemerero." 
Romans8:31 Ndipo tidzatani ndi zinthu izi? 6 Ngati Mulungu ali ndi ife, adzatikaniza ndani?" 
Romans8:32 iye amene sanatimana Mwana wace wa iye yekha, koma 7 anampereka cifukwa ca ife tonse, adzalekeranji kutipatsanso ife zinthu zonse kwaulere pamodzi ndi iye?" 
Romans8:33 Ndani adzaneneza osankhidwa a Mulungu? 8 Mulungu ndiye ameneawayesa olungama; 
Romans8:34 9 ndani adzawatsutsa? Kristu Yesu ndiye amene adafera, inde makamaka, ndiye amene adauka kwa akufa, 10 amene akhalanso pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu, 11 amenenso atipempherera ife." 
Romans8:35 Adzatisiyanitsa ndani ndi cikondi ca Kristu? nsautso kodi, kapena kupsinjika mtima, kapena kuzunza, kapena njala, kapena usiwa, kapena zoopsya kapena lupanga kodi?" 
Romans8:36 Monganso kwalembedwa, 12 Cifukwa ca Inu tirikuphedwa dzuwa lonse; Tinayesedwa monga nkhosa zakupha," 
Romans8:37 Koma 13 m'zonsezi, ife tilakatu, mwa iye amene anatikonda." 
Romans8:38 Pakuti ndakopeka mtima kuti ngakhale imfa, ngakhale moyo, ngakhale angelo, ngakhale maufumu, ngakhale zinthu ziripo, ngakhale zinthu zirinkudza, ngakhale zimphamvu," 
Romans8:39 ngakhale utali, ngakhale kuya, ngakhale colengedwa cina ciri conse, sicingadzakhoze kutisiyanitsa ife ndi cikondi ca Mulungu, cimene ciri mwa Kristu Yesu Ambuye wathu." 
Romans9:1 Ndinena zoona mwa Kristu, sindinama ai, cikumbu mtima canga cicita umboni pamodzi ndine mwa Mzimu Woyera," 
Romans9:2 kuti ndagwidwa ndi cisoni cacikuru ndi kuphwetekwa mtima kosaleka. 
Romans9:3 Pakuti ndikadafunakuti ine ndekha nditembereredwe kundicotsa kwa Kristu cifukwa ca abale anga, ndiwo a mtundu wanga monga mwa thupi;" 
Romans9:4 ndiwo Aisrayeli; ali nao umwana, ndi ulemerero, ndi mapangano, ndi kupatsa kwa malamulo, ndi kutumikira m'kacisi wa Mulungu, ndi malonjezo;" 
Romans9:5 a iwo ali makolo, ndi kwa iwo anacokera Kristu, monga mwa thupi, ndiye Mulungu wa pamwamba pa zonse wolemekezeka ku nthawi zonse. Amen." 
Romans9:6 Koma sikuli ngati mau a Mulungu anakhala cabe ai. Pakuti onse akucokera kwa a Israyeli siali Israyeli; 
Romans9:7 kapena cifukwa ali mbeu ya Abrahamu, siali onse ana; koma anati, Mwa Isake, mbeu yako idzaitanidwa." 
Romans9:8 Ndiko kuti, ana a thupi sakhala iwo ana a Mulungu ai; koma ana a lonjezo awerengedwa mbeu yace." 
Romans9:9 Pakuti mau a lonjezo ndi amenewa, Pa nyengo iyi ndidzadza, ndipo Sara adzakhala ndi mwana" 
Romans9:10 Ndipo si cotero cokha, koma Rebekanso, pamene anali ndi pakati pa mmodzi, ndiye kholo lathu Isake;" 
Romans9:11 pakuti anawo asanabadwe, kapena asanacite kanthu kabwino kapena koipa, kuti kutsimikiza mtima kwa Mulungu monga mwa kusankha kukhale, si cifukwa ca nchito ai, koma cifukwa ca wakuitanayo," 
Romans9:12 cotero kunanenedwa kwa uyo, Wamkuru adzakhala kapolo wa wamng'ono." 
Romans9:13 Inde monga kunalembedwa, Ndinakonda Yakobo, koma ndinamuda Esau." 
Romans9:14 Ndipo tsono tidzatani? Kodi ciripo cosalungama ndi Mulungu? Msatero ai. 
Romans9:15 Pakuti anati ndi Mose, Ndidzacitira cifundo amene ndimcitira cifundo, ndipo ndidzakhala ndi cisoni kwa iye amene ndikhala naye cisoni." 
Romans9:16 Cotero sicifuma kwa munthu amene afuna, kapena kwa iye amene athamanga, koma kwa Mulungu amene acitira cifundo." 
Romans9:17 Pakuti lembo linena kwa Farao, Cifukwa ca ici, ndinakuutsa iwe, kuti ndikaonetse mwa iwe mphamvu yanga, ndi kuti dzina langa likabukitsidwe pa dziko lonse lapansi." 
Romans9:18 Cotero iye acitira cifundo amene iye afuna, ndipo amene iye afuna amuumitsamtima." 
Romans9:19 Pamenepo udzanena ndine kodi, Adandaulabe bwanji? Pakuti ndani anakaniza cifuno cace?" 
Romans9:20 Koma munthu iwe, ndiwe yani wakubwezera Mulungu mau? Kodi cinthu copangidwa cidzanena ndi amene anacipanga, U ndipangiranji ine cotero?" 
Romans9:21 Kodi kapena woumba mbiya sakutha kucita zace padothi, kuumba ndi ncinci yomweyo cotengera cimodzi caulemu ndi cina camanyazi?" 
Romans9:22 Ndipo titani ngati Mulungu, pofuna iye kuonetsa mkwiyo wace, ndi kudziwitsa mph amvu yace, analekerera ndi cilekerero cambiri zotengera za mkwiyo zokonzekera cionongeko?" 
Romans9:23 ndi kuti iye akadziwitse ulemerero wace waukuru pa zotengera zacifundo, zimene iye anazikonzeratu kuulemerero," 
Romans9:24 ndi ife amenenso iye anatiitana, si a mwa Ayuda okha okha, komanso a mwa anthu amitundu?" 
Romans9:25 Monga atinso mwa Hoseya, Amene sanakhala anthu anga, ndidzawacha anthu anga; Ndi iye amene sanali wokondedwa, wokondedwa." 
Romans9:26 1 Ndipo kudzali, kuti pamalo pamenepo kunanenedwa kwa iwo, Simuli anthu anga ai, Pomwepo iwo adzachedwa ana a Mulungu wamoyo." 
Romans9:27 Ndipo Yesaya apfuula za Israyeli, kuti, 2 Ungakhale unyinji wa ana a Israyeli ukhala monga mcenga wa kunyanja, 3 cotsalira ndico cidzapulumuka." 
Romans9:28 Pakuti Ambuye adzacita mau ace pa dziko lapansi, kuwatsiriza mwacidule." 
Romans9:29 Ndipo monga Yesaya anati kale, 4 Ngati Ambuye wa makamu a kumwamba sanatisiyira ife mbeu, Tikadakhala monga Sodoma, ndipo tikadafanana ndi Gomora." 
Romans9:30 Cifukwa cace tidzatani? 5 Kuti amitundu amene sanatsata cilungamo, anafikira cilungamo, ndico cilungamo ca cikhulupiriro;" 
Romans9:31 6 koma Israyeli, potsata lamulo la cilungamo, sanafikira lamulolo." 
Romans9:32 Cifukwa canji? Cifukwa kuti sanacitsata ndi cikhulupiriro, koma monga ngati ndi nchito. 7 Anakhumudwa pa mwala wokhumudwitsa;" 
Romans9:33 monganso kwalembedwa, kuti, 8 Onani, ndikhazika m'Ziyoni mwala wakukhumudwa nao, ndi thanthwe lopunthwitsa; Ndipo 9 wakukhulupirira iye sadzacita manyazi." 
Romans10:1 Abale, kufunitsa kwa mtima wanga ndi pemphero langa limene ndiwapempherera kwa Mulungu, ndilo, kuti apulumuke." 
Romans10:2 Pakuti ndiwacitira iwo umboni kuti a ali ndi cangu ca kwa Mulungu, koma si monga mwa cidziwitso." 
Romans10:3 Pakuti pakusadziwa cilungamo ca Mulungu, ndipo pofuna kukhazikitsa cilungamo ca iwo okha, iwo sanagonja ku cilungamo ca Mulungu." 
Romans10:4 Pakuti Kristu ali cimariziroca lamulo kulinga kucilungamo kwa amene ali yense akhulupira," 
Romans10:5 Pakuti Mose walemba kuti munthu amene acita cilungamo ca m'lamulo, adzakhala naco ndi moyo." 
Romans10:6 Koma cilungamo ca cikhulupiriro citero, Usamanena mumtima mwako, Adzakwera ndani Kumwambako? ndiko, kutsitsako Kristu;" 
Romans10:7 kapena, Adzatsikira ndani kudzenieko? ndiko, kukweza Kristu kwa akufa." 
Romans10:8 Koma citani? Mau ali pafupi ndiwe, m'kamwa mwako, ndi mumtima mwako; ndiwo mau a cikhulupiriro, amene ife tiwalalikira:" 
Romans10:9 kuti ngati udzabvomereza m'kamwa mwako Yesu ndiye Ambuye, ndi kukhulupirira mumtima mwako kuti Mulungu anamuukitsa kwa akufa, udzapulumuka:" 
Romans10:10 pakuti ndi mtima munthu akhulupira kutengapo cilungamo; ndi m'kamwa abvomereza kutengapo cipulumutso 
Romans10:11 Pakuti lembo litere, Amene ali yense akhulupirira iye, sadzacita manyazi." 
Romans10:12 Pakuti kulibe kusiyana Myuda ndi Mhelene; pakuti Yemweyo ali Ambuye wa onse, nawacitira zolemera onse amene aitana pa iye;" 
Romans10:13 pakuti, amene ali yense adzaitana pa dzina la Ambuye adzapulumuka." 
Romans10:14 Ndipo iwo adzaitana bwanji pa iye amene sanamkhulupirira? ndipo adzakhulupirira bwanji iye amene sanamva za iye? ndipo adzamva bwanji wopanda wolalikira? 
Romans10:15 ndipo adzalalikira bwanji, ngati satumidwa? monganso kwalembedwa, Okometsetsa ndithu ali mapazi a iwo akulalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa zinthu zabwino." 
Romans10:16 Koma sanamvera Uthenga Wabwino onsewo. Pakuti Yesaya anena, Ambuye, anakhulupirira ndani zonena ife?" 
Romans10:17 Comweco cikhulupiriro cidza ndi mbiri, ndi mbiri idza mwa mau a Kristu." 
Romans10:18 Koma ine nditi, Sanamva iwo kodi! Indetu, Liu lao linaturukira ku dziko lonse lapansi, Ndi maneno ao ku malekezero a dziko lokhalamo anthu." 
Romans10:19 Koma nditi, Kodi Israyeli alibe kudziwa? Poyamba Mose anena, Ine ndidzacititsa inu nsanje ndi iwo amene sakhala mtundu wa anthu, Ndidzakwiyitsa inu ndi mtundu wopulukira." 
Romans10:20 Ndipo Yesaya alimbika mtima ndithu, nati, Ndinapezedwa ndi iwo amene sanandifuna; Ndinaonekera kwa iwo amene sanandifunsa." 
Romans10:21 Koma kwa Israyeli anena, Dzuwa lonse ndinatambalitsira manja anga kwa anthu osamvera ndi okanakana." 
Romans11:1 Cifukwa cace ndinena, Mulungu anataya anthu ace kodi? Msatero ai. Pakuti inenso ndiri M-israyeli, wa mbeu ya Abrahamu, wa pfuko la Benjamini." 
Romans11:2 Mulungu sanataya anthu ace amene iye anawadziwiratu, Kapena simudziwa kodi cimene lembo linena za Eliya? kuti anaumirira Mulungu poneneza Israyeli, kuti," 
Romans11:3 Ambuye, anawapha aneneri anu, nagwetsa maguwa anu a nsembe; ndipo ine ndatsala ndekha, ndipo alikufuna moyo wanga." 
Romans11:4 Koma kuyankha kwa Mulungu kudatani kwa iye? Ndinadzisiyira ndekha anthu amunazikwi zisanu ndi ziwiri, amene sanagwadira Baala." 
Romans11:5 Coteronso nthawi yatsopano ciripo cotsalira monga mwa kusankha kwa cisomo. 
Romans11:6 Koma ngati kuli ndi cisomo, sikulinso ndinchito ai; ndipo pakapanda kutero, cisomo sicikhalanso cisomo." 
Romans11:7 Ndipo ciani tsono? ici cimene Israyeli afunafuna sanacipeza; koma osankhidwawo anacipeza, ndipo otsalawo anaumitsidwa mtima;" 
Romans11:8 monga kunalembedwa kuti, Mulungu anawapatsa mzimu watulo, maso kuti asapenye, ndi makutu kuti asamve, kufikira lero lino." 
Romans11:9 Ndipo Davide akuti, Gome lao likhale kwa iwo, ngati msampha, ndi ngati diwa, Ndi monga cokhumudwitsa, ndi cowabwezera cilango;" 
Romans11:10 Maso ao adetsedwe, kuti asapenye, Ndipo muweramitse msana wao masiku onse." 
Romans11:11 Cifukwa cace ndinena, Anakhumudwa kodi kuti agwe? Msatero ai; koma ndi kulakwa kwao cipulumutso cinadza kwa anthu akunja, kudzacititsa iwo nsanje." 
Romans11:12 Ndipo ngati kulakwa kwao kwatengera dzikolapansi zolemera, ndipo kucepa kwao klltengera anthu amitundu zolemera; koposa kotani nanga kudzaza kwao?" 
Romans11:13 Koma ndilankhula ndi inu anthu amitundu. Popeza ine ndiri mtumwi wa anthu amitundu, millemekeza utumiki wanga;" 
Romans11:14 kuti ngati nkutheka ndikacititse nsanje amenewo a mtundu wanga; ndi kupulumutsa ena a iwo. 
Romans11:15 Pakuti ngati kuwataya kwao kuli kuvanianitsa kwa dziko lapansi, nanga kulandiridwa kwao kudzatani, koma ndithu ngati moyo wakucokera kwa: akufa?" 
Romans11:16 Ndipo ngati zoundukula ziri zopatulika, coteronso mtanda; ndipo ngati muzu uli wopatulika, coteronso nthambi." 
Romans11:17 Koma ngati nthambi zina zinathyoledwa, ndipo iwe, ndiwe mtengo wazitona wa kuthengo, unamezetsanidwa mwa izo, nugawana nazo za muzu za mafuta ace a mtengowo," 
Romans11:18 usadzitama iwe wekha pa nthambizo: koma ngati udzitama wekha, suli iwe amene unyamula muzu, ai, koma muzu ukunyamula iwetu." 
Romans11:19 Ndipo kapena udzanena, Nthambizo zathyoledwa kuti ine ndikamezetsanidwe nao." 
Romans11:20 Cabwino; iwo anathyoledwa ndi kusakhulupirira kwao, ndipo iwe umaima ndi cikhulupiriro cako. Usamadzikuza mumtima, koma opatu:" 
Romans11:21 pakuti ngati Mulungu sanaleka nthambi za mtundu wace, inde sadzakuleka iwe." 
Romans11:22 Cifukwa cace onani cifatso ndi kuuma mtima kwace kwa Mulungu: kwa iwo adagwa, kuuma kwace; koma kwa iwe cifatso cace ca Mulungu, ngati ukhala cikhalire m'eifatsomo; koma ngati sutero, adzakusadza iwe." 
Romans11:23 Ndipo iwonso, ngati sakhala cikhalire ndi cisakhulupiriro, adzawamezanitsanso." 
Romans11:24 Pakuti ngati iwe unasadzidwa ku mtengo wazitona wa mtundu wa kuthengo, ndipo unamezetsanidwa ndi mtengo wazitona wabwino, mokaniza makhalidwe ako; koposa kotani nanga iwo, ndiwo nthambi za mtundu wace, adzamezetsanidwa ndi mtengo wao womwewo wazitona?" 
Romans11:25 Pakuti sindifuna, abale, kuti mukhale osadziwa cinsinsi ici, kuti mungadziyese anzeru mwa inu nokha, kuti kuuma mtima kunadza pang'ono pa Israyeli, kufikira kudzaza kwa anthu amitundu kunalowa;" 
Romans11:26 ndipo cotero Israyeli yense adzapulumuka; monganso kunalembedwa, kuti, Adzaturuka ku Ziyoni Mpulumutsi; Iye adzacotsa zamwano kwa Yakobo:" 
Romans11:27 Ndipo ici ndi cipangano canga ndi iwo, Pamene ndidzacotsa macimo ao." 
Romans11:28 Kunena za Uthenga Wabwino, iwo ali ngati adani, cifukwa ca inu; koma kunena za cisankhidwe, z ali okondedwa, cifukwa ca makolo." 
Romans11:29 Pakuti 1 mphatso zace ndi kuitana kwace kwa Mulungu sizilapika. 
Romans11:30 Pakuti 2 monga inunso kale simunamvera Mulungu, koma tsopano mwalandira cifundo mwa kusamvera kwao," 
Romans11:31 coteronso iwo sanamvera tsopano, kuti iwonso akalandire cifundo, cifukwa ca cifundo ca kwa inu." 
Romans11:32 Pakuti 3 Mulungu anatsekera pamodzi onse m'kusamvera, kuti akacitire onse cifundo."
