2Corinthians4:1 Cifukwa cace popeza tiri nao utumiki umene, monga talandira cifundo, sitifoka;" 
2Corinthians4:2 koma takaniza zobisfka za manyazi, osayendayenda mocenjerera, kapena kucita nao mau a Mulungu konyenga; koma ndi maonekedwe a coonadi tidzibvomeretsa tokha ku cikumbu mtima ca anthu onse pamaso pa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians4:3 Koma ngatinso Uthenga Wabwino wathu uphimbika, uphimbika mwa iwo akutayika;" 
2Corinthians4:4 mwa amene mulungu wa nthawi yino ya pansi pano unacititsa khungu maganizo ao a osakhulupirira, kuti ciwalitsiro ca Uthenga Wabwino wa ulemerero wa Kristu, amene ali cithunzithunzi ca Mulungu, cisawawalire." 
2Corinthians4:5 Pakuti tilalikira si za ife tokha, koma Kristu Yesu Ambuye, ndi ife tokha akapolo anu, cifukwa ca Kristu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Pakuti Mulungu amene anati, Kuunika kudzawala kuturuka mumdima, ndiye amene anawala m'mitima yathu kutipatsa ciwalitsiro ca cidziwitso ca ulemerero wa Mulungu pankhope pa Yesu Kristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Koma tiri naco cuma ici m'zotengera zadothi, kuti ukulu woposa wamphamvu ukhale wa Mulungu, wosacokera kwa ife;" 
2Corinthians4:8 ndife osautsika monsemo, koma osapsinjika; osinkhasinkha, koma osakhala kakasi;" 
2Corinthians4:9 olondoleka, koma osatayika; ogwetsedwa, koma osaonongeka;" 
2Corinthians4:10 nthawi zonse tirikusenzasenza m'thupi kufa kwace kwa Yesu, kuti moyonso wa Yesu uoneke m'thupi mwathu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Pakuti ife amene tiri ndi moyo tiperekeka kuimfa nthawi zonse, cifukwa ca Yesu, kuti moyonso wa Yesu uoneke m'thupi lathu lakufa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Cotero imfa icita mwa ife, koma moyo mwa inu." 
2Corinthians4:13 Koma pokhala nao mzimu womwewo wa cikhulupiriro, monga mwa colembedwaco, ndinakhulupira, cifukwa cace ndinalankhula; ifenso tikhulupira, cifukwa cace tilankhula;" 
2Corinthians4:14 podziwa kuti iye amene anaukitsa Ambuye Yesu adzaukitsa ifenso pamodzi ndi Yesu, nadzatiikapo pamodzi ndi inu." 
2Corinthians4:15 Pakuti zonsezi nza kwa inu, kuti cisomoco, cocurukitsidwa mwa unyinjiwo, cicurukitsire ciyamiko ku ulemerero wa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians4:16 Cifukwa cace sitifoka; koma ungakhale umunthu wathu wakunja ubvunda, wa m'kati mwathu ukonzedwa kwatsopano tsiku ndi tsiku." 
2Corinthians4:17 Pakuti cisautso cathu copepuka ca kanthawi citicitira ife kulemera koposa kwakukuru ndi kosatha kwa ulemerero; 
2Corinthians4:18 popeza sitipenyerera zinthu zooneka, koma zinthu zosaoneka; pakuti zinthu zooneka ziri za nthawi, koma zinthu zosaoneka ziri zosatha." 
2Corinthians5:1 Pakuti tidziwa kuti ngati nyumba ya pansi pano ya msasa wathu ipasuka, tiri naco cimango ca kwa Mulungu, ndiyo nyumba yosamangidwa ndi manja, yosatha, m'Mwamba." 
2Corinthians5:2 Pakutinso m'menemo tibuula, ndi kukhumbitsa kubvekedwa ndi cokhalamo cathu cocokera Kumwamba;" 
2Corinthians5:3 ngatitu pobvekedwa sitidzapezedwa amarisece. 
2Corinthians5:4 Pakutinso ife okhala mu msasawu tibuula, pothodwa; si kunena kuti tifuna kubvulidwa, koma kubvekedwa, kuti caimfaco cimezedwe ndi moyo." 
2Corinthians5:5 Ndipo wotikonzera ife ici cimene, ndiye Mulungu, amene anatipatsa ife cikhole ca Mzimu," 
2Corinthians5:6 Pokhala nako kulimbika mtima nthawi zonse tsono, ndipo podziwa kuti pamene tiri kwathu m'thupi, sitiri kwa Ambuye," 
2Corinthians5:7 (pakuti tiyendayenda mwa cikhulupiriro si mwa cionekedwe); 
2Corinthians5:8 koma tilimbika mtima, ndipo tikondwera makamaka kusakhala m'thupi, ndi kukhala kwathu kwa Ambuye." 
2Corinthians5:9 Cifukwa cacenso tifunitsitsa, kapena kwathu kapena kwina, kukhala akumkondweretsa iye." 
2Corinthians5:10 Pakuti ife tonse tiyenera kuonetsedwa ku mpando wa kuweruza wa Kristu, kuti yense alandire zocitika m'thupi, monga momwe anacita, kapena cabwino kapena coipa." 
2Corinthians5:11 Podziwa tsono kuopsa kwa Ambuye, tikopa anthu, koma tionetsedwa kwa Mulungu; ndipo ndiyembekezanso kuti tionetsedwa m'zikumbu mtimazanu." 
2Corinthians5:12 Sitidzibvomeretsanso ife tokha kwa inu, koma tikupatsani inu cifukwa ca kudzitamandira pa ife, kuti mukakhale nako kanthu kakutsutsana nao iwo akudzitamandira pooneka pokha, osati mumtima." 
2Corinthians5:13 Pakuti ngati tiri oyaruka, titero kwa Mulungu; ngati tiri a nzeru zathu, titero kwa inu." 
2Corinthians5:14 Pakuti cikondi ca Kristu citikakamiza; popeza taweruza cotero, kuti mmodzi adafera onse, cifukwa cace onse adafa;" 
2Corinthians5:15 ndipo adafera onse, kuti iwo akukhala ndi moyoasakhalenso ndi moyo kwa iwo okha, koma kwa iye amene adawafera iwo, nauka." 
2Corinthians5:16 Kotero kuti ife sitidziwanso munthu tsopano monga mwa thupi; ndipo ngati tazindikira Kristu monga mwa thupi, koma tsopano sitimzindikiranso motero." 
2Corinthians5:17 Cifukwa cace ngati munthu ali yense ali mwa Kristu ali wolengedwa watsopano; zinthu zakale zapita, taonani, zakhala zatsopano," 
2Corinthians5:18 Koma zinthu zonse zicokera kwa Mulungu amene anatiyanjanitsa kwa iye yekha mwa Kristu, natipatsa utumiki wa ciyanjanitso;" 
2Corinthians5:19 ndiko kunena kuti Mulungu anali mwa Kristu, alinkuyanjanitsa dziko lapansi kwa Iyeyekha, osawawerengera zolakwa zao; ndipo anaikiza kwa ife mau a ciyanjanitso," 
2Corinthians5:20 Cifukwa cace tiri atumiki m'malo mwa Kristu, monga ngati Mulungu alikudandaulira mwa ife; tiumiriza inu m'malo mwa Kristu, yanjanitsidwani ndi Mulungu," 
2Corinthians5:21 Ameneyo sanadziwa ucimo anamyesera ucimo m'malo mwathu; kuti ife tikhale cilungamo ca Mulungu mwa iye. 
2Corinthians6:1 Ndipo a ocita naye pamodzi tidandauliranso kuti musalandire cisomo ca Mulungu kwacabe inu," 
2Corinthians6:2 (pakuti anena, M'nyengo yolandiridwa ndinamva iwe, Ndipo m'tsiku la cipulumutso ndinakuthandiza; Taonani, tsopano ndiyo nyengo yabwino yolandiridwa, taonani, tsopano ndilo tsiku la cipulumutso);" 
2Corinthians6:3 osapatsa cokhumudwitsa konse m'cinthu ciri conse, kuti utumikiwo usanenezedwe;" 
2Corinthians6:4 koma m'zonse tidzitsimikfzira ife tokha monga atumiki a Mulungu, m'kupirira kwambiri, m'zisautso, m'zikakamizo, m'zopsinja," 
2Corinthians6:5 m'mikwingwirima, m'ndende, m'mapokoso, m'mabvutitso, m'madikiro, m'masalo a cakudya;" 
2Corinthians6:6 m'mayeredwe, m'cidziwitso, m'cilekerero, m'kukoma mtima, mwa Mzimu Woyera, m'cikondi cosanyenga;" 
2Corinthians6:7 m'mau a coonadi, mu mphamvu ya Mulungu; mwa camuna ca cilungamo kulamanja ndi kulamanzere," 
2Corinthians6:8 mwa ulemerero, mwa mnyozo, mwa mbiri yoipa ndi mbiri yabwino; mongaosoceretsa, angakhale ali oona;" 
2Corinthians6:9 monga osadziwika, angakhale adziwika bwino; monga alinkufa, ndipo taonani, tiri ndi moyo; monga olangika, ndipo osaphedwa;" 
2Corinthians6:10 monga akumva cisoni, koma akukondwera nthawi zonse; monga aumphawi, lroma akulemeretsa ambiri; mensa okhala opanda-kanthu, ndipo akhala nazo zinthu zonse." 
2Corinthians6:11 M'kamwa mwathu mmotseguka kwa inu Akorinto, mtima wathu wakulitsidwa." 
2Corinthians6:12 Simupsinjika mwa ife, koma mupsiniika mumtima mwanu." 
2Corinthians6:13 Ndipo kukhale cibwezero comweci (ndinena monga ndi ana anga) mukulitsidwe inunso. 
2Corinthians6:14 Musakhale omangidwa m'goli ndi osakhulupira osiyana; pakuti cilungamo cigawanabwanji ndi cosalungama? Kapena kuunika kuyanjana bwanji nw mdima? 
2Corinthians6:15 Ndipo Kristu abvomerezana bwanji ndi Beliyali? Kapena wokhulupira ali nalo gawo lanji pamodzi ndi wosakhulupira? 
2Corinthians6:16 Ndipo ciphatikizo cace ncanji ndi kacisi wa Mulungu ndi wa mafano? Pakuti ife ndife kacisi wa, Mulungu wamoyo; monga Mulungu anati, Ndidzakhalitsa mwa iwo, ndipe ndidzayendayenda mwa iwo; ndipo ndidzakhala Mulungu wao, ndi iwo adzakhala anthu anga." 
2Corinthians6:17 Cifukwa cace, Turukani pakati Pao, ndipo patukani, ati Ambuye, Ndipo musakhudza kanthu kosakonzeka; Ndipo Ine ndidzalandira inu," 
2Corinthians6:18 Ndipo ndidzakhala kwa inu Atate, Ndi inu mudzakhala kwa Ine ana amunandi akazi, anena Ambuye Wamphamvuyonse." 
2Corinthians7:1 Pokhala nao tsono malonjezano amenewa, okondedwa, tidzikonzere tokha kuleka codetsa conse ca thupi ndi ca mzimu, ndi kutsirfza ciyero m'kuopa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians7:2 Tipatseni malo; sitinamcitira munthu cosalungama, sitinaipsa munthu, sitinacenjerera munthu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Sindinena ici kuti ndikutsutseni: pakuti ndanena kale kuti muli mu mitima yathu, kuti tife limodzi ndi kukhala ndi moyo limodzi." 
2Corinthians7:4 Ndilimbika mtima kwambiri pakunena nanu, kudzitamandira kwanga cifukwa ca inu nkwakukuru; ndidzazidwa naco citonthozo, ndisefukira naco cimwemwe m'cisautso cathu conse." 
2Corinthians7:5 Pakutinso pakudza ife m'Makedoniya thupi lathu linalibe mpumulo, koma tinasautsidwa ife monsemo; kunjako zolimbana, m'katimo mantha." 
2Corinthians7:6 Koma iye amene atonthoza odzicepetsa, ndiye Mulungu, anatitonthoza ife ndi kufika kwace kwa Tito;" 
2Corinthians7:7 koma si ndi kufika kwace kokha, komanso ndi citonthozo cimene anatonthozedwa naco mwa inu, pamene anatiuza ife kukhumbitsa kwanu, kulira kwanu, cangu canu ca kwa ine; kotero kuti ndinakondwera koposa," 
2Corinthians7:8 Kuti ngakhale ndakumvetsani cisoni ndi kalata uja, sindiwawapo mtima, ndingakhale ndinawawa mtima; pakuti ndiona kuti kalata uja anakumvetsani cisoni, ngakhale kwa nthawi yokha." 
2Corinthians7:9 Tsopano ndikondwera, sikuti mwangomvedwa cisoni, koma kuti mwamvetsedwa cisoni ku kutembenuka mtima; pakuti munamvetsedwa cisoni ca kwa Mulungu, kuti tisakusowetseni m'kanthu kali konse." 
2Corinthians7:10 Pakuti cisoni ca kwa Mulungu citembenuzira mtima kueipulumutso, cosamvetsanso cisoni; koma cisonicadziko lapansi cicita imfa." 
2Corinthians7:11 Pakuti, taonani, ici comwe, cakuti mudamvetsedwa cisoni ca kwa Mulungu, khama lalikuru lanji cidalicita mwa inu, komanso codzikonza, komanso mkwiyo, komanso mantha, komanso kukhumbitsa komanso cangu, komanso kubwezera cilango! M'zonse muoadzitsimikizira nokha kuti muli oyera mtima m'menemo." 
2Corinthians7:12 Cifukwa cace ndingakhale ndalembera kwa inu, sindinacita cifukwa ca iye amene anacita coipa, kapena cifukwa ca iye amene anacitidwa coipa, koma kuti khama lanu la kwa ife lionetsedwe kwa inu pamaso pa Mulungu." 
2Corinthians7:13 Cifukwa ca icitatonthozedwa; ndipo m'citonthozo cathu tinakondwera koposa ndithu pa cimwemwe ca Tito, kuti mzimu wace unatsitsimutsidwa ndi inu nonse." 
2Corinthians7:14 Pakuti ngati ndadzitamandira nako kanthu kwa iye cifukwa ca inu, sindinamvetsedwa manyazi; koma monga tinalankhula zonse ndi inu m'coonadi, koteronso kudzitamandira kwathu kumene kwa Tito, kunakhala coonadi." 
2Corinthians7:15 Ndipo cikondi ceni ceni care cicurukira koposa kwa inu, pokumbukira kumvera kwanu kwa inu nonse, kuti munamlandira iye ndi mantha ndi kunthunthumira." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndikondwera kuti m'zonse ndilimbika mtima za inu. 
2Corinthians8:1 Ndipo tikudziwitsani, abale, cisomo ca Mulungu copatsika mwa Mipingo ya ku Makedoniya," 
2Corinthians8:2 kuti m'citsimikizo cacikuru ca cisautso, kucurukitsa kwa cimwemwe cao, ndi kusauka kwaokweni kweni zidacurukira ku colemera ca kuolowa mtima kwao." 
2Corinthians8:3 Pakuti monga mwa mphamvu yao, ndicitapo umboni, inde koposa mphamvu yao," 
2Corinthians8:4 anacita eni ace, natiumirfza ndi kutidandauliraza cisomoco, ndi za ciyanjano ca utumiki wa kwa oyera mtima;" 
2Corinthians8:5 ndipo, si monga tidayembekeza; koma anayamba kudzipereka okha kwa Ambuye, ndi kwa ife mwa cifuniro ca Mulungu." 
2Corinthians8:6 Kotero kuti tinadandaulira Tito, kuti monga anayamba kale, comweconso atsirize kwa inu cisomo icinso." 
2Corinthians8:7 Koma monga mucurukira m'zonse, m'cikhulupiriro, ndi m'mau, ndi m'cidziwitso, ndi m'khama lonse, ndi m'cikondi canu ca kwa ife, curukaninso m'cisomo ici." 
2Corinthians8:8 Sindinena ici monga kulamulira, koma kuyesa mwa khama la ena coonadi ca cikondi canunso." 
2Corinthians8:9 Pakuti mudziwa cisomo ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, kuti, cifukwa ca inu anakhala wosauka, angakhale anali wolemera, kuti inu ndi kusauka kwace mukakhale olemera." 
2Corinthians8:10 Ndipo m'menemo odichula coyesa ine; pakuti cimene cipindulira inu, amene munayamba kale caka capitaci si kucita kokha, komanso kufunira." 
2Corinthians8:11 Koma tsopano tsirizani kucitaku; kuti monga kunali cibvomerezo ca kufunira, koteronso kukhale kutsiriza kwacem'cimene muli naco." 
2Corinthians8:12 Pakuti ngati cibvomerezoco ciri pomwepo, munthu alandiridwa monga momwe ali naco, si monga cimsowa." 
2Corinthians8:13 Pakuti sinditero kuti ena akamasuke, ndi inu musautsidwe;" 
2Corinthians8:14 koma mwa kulingana kucuruka kwanu kukwanire kusowa kwao nthawi ya makono ano, kutinso kucuruka kwao kukwanire kusowa kwanu," 
2Corinthians8:15 Kuti pakhalecilingano; monga kwalembedwa, Wosonkhetsacambiri sicinamtsalira; ndi iye wosonkhetsa pang'ono sicinamsowa." 
2Corinthians8:16 Koma ayamikike Mulungu, wakupatsa khama lomweli la kwa inu mu mtima wa Tito." 
2Corinthians8:17 Pakutitu analandira kudandaulira kwathu; koma pokhala halo khama loposa, anaturukira kunka kwil inu mwini wace." 
2Corinthians8:18 Ndipo tatuma pamodzi naye mbaleyo, amene kusimba kwace m'Uthenga Wabwino kuli m'Mipingo yonse;" 
2Corinthians8:19 ndipo si ici cokha, komanso anasankhika ndi Mipingo, apite limodzi ndi ife m'cisomo ici, cimene ticitumikira ife, kwa ulemerero wa Ambuye, ndi kuonetsa cibvomerezo cathu;" 
2Corinthians8:20 ndi kupewa ici kuti wina angatichule za kucurukira kumene tikutumikira; 
2Corinthians8:21 pakuti tikonzeratu zinthu zokoma, si pamaso pa Ambuye pokha, komanso pamaso pa anthu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Ndipo tinatumiza mbale wathu awaperekeze iwo, amene tamtsimikizirakawiri kawiri ali wakhama m'zinthu zambiri, koma tsopano wa khama loposatu ndi kulimbika kwakukuru kumene ali nako kwa inu," 
2Corinthians8:23 Nanga za Tito, ali woyanjana wanga ndi wocita nane wa kwa inu; nanga abale athu, ali atumwi a Mipingo, ali ulemerero wa Kristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Cifukwa cace muwatsimikizire iwo citsimikizo ca cikondi canu, ndi ca kudzitamandira kwathu pa inu pamaso pa Mipingo." 
2Corinthians9:1 Pakutitu za utumiki wa kwa oyera mtima sikufunika kwa ine kulembera inu; 
2Corinthians9:2 pakuti ndidziwa cibvomerezo canu cimene ndidzitamandira naco cifukwa ca inu ndi Amakedoniya, kuti Akaya anakonzekeratu citapita caka; ndi cangu canu cinautsa ocurukawo." 
2Corinthians9:3 Koma ndatuma abale kuti kudzitamandira kwathu kwa pa inu kusakhale kopanda pace m'menemo; kuti, monga ndinanena, mukakhale okonzekeratu;" 
2Corinthians9:4 kuti kapena akandiperekeze a ku Makedoniya nadzakupezani inu osakonzeka, ife (kuti tisanene inu) tingacititsidwe manyazi m'kulimbika kumene." 
2Corinthians9:5 Cifukwa cace ndinayesa kuti kufunika kupempha abale kuti atsogole afike kwa inu, nakonzeretu dalitso lanu lolonjezeka kale, kuti cikhale cokonzeka comweci, monga ngati mdalitso, ndipo si monga mwa kuumiriza." 
2Corinthians9:6 Koma nditi ici, kuti iye wakufesa mouma manja, mouma manjanso adzatuta. Ndipo iye wakufesa moolowa manja, moolowa manjanso adzatuta." 
2Corinthians9:7 Yense acite monga anatsimikiza mtima, si mwa cisoni kapena mokakamiza, pakuti Mulungu akonda wopereka mokondwerera." 
2Corinthians9:8 Ndipo Mulungu akhoza kucurukitsira cisomo conse kwa inu; kuti inu, pokhala naco cikwaniro conse m'zinthu zonse, nthawi zonse, mukacurukire ku nchito yonse yabwino;" 
2Corinthians9:9 monga kwalembedwa; Anabalalitsa, anapatsa kwa osauka; Cilungamo cace cikhala ku nthawi yonse." 
2Corinthians9:10 Ndipo iye wopatsa mbeu kwa wofesa, ndi mkate ukhale cakudya, adzapatsa ndi kucurukitsa mbeu yanu yofesa, nadzaonjezapo pa zipatso za cilungamo canu;" 
2Corinthians9:11 polemeretsedwa inu m'zonse ku kuolowa manja konse, kumene kucita mwa ife ciyamiko ca kwa Mulungu," 
2Corinthians9:12 Pakuti utumiki wa kutumikira kumene sudzaza zosowa za oyera mtima zokha, koma ucurukiranso kwa Mulungu mwa mayamiko ambiri;" 
2Corinthians9:13 popeza kuti mwa kuyesa kwa utumiki umene alemekeza Mulungu pa kugonia kwa cibvomerezo canu ku Uthenga Wabwino wa Kristu, ndi kwa kuolowa manja kwa cigawano canu kwa iwo ndi kwa onse;" 
2Corinthians9:14 ndipo iwo, ndi pempherero lao la kwa inu, akhumbitsa inu, cifukwa ca cisomo coposa ca Mulungu pa inu," 
2Corinthians9:15 Ayamikike Mulungu cifukwa ca mphatso yace yace yosatheka kuneneka. 
2Corinthians10:1 Koma ine ndekha Paulo, ndidandaulira inu mwa kufatsa ndi ulere wa Kristu, ine amene pamaso panu ndikhala wodzicepetsa pakati pa inu, koma pokhala kwina ine ndilimbika mtima kwa inu;" 
2Corinthians10:2 koma ndipempha kuti pokhala ndiri pomwepo, ndisalimbike mtima ndi kulimbika kumene ndiyesa kulimbika nako pa ena, amene atiyesera ife monga ngati tirikuyendayenda monga mwa thupi," 
2Corinthians10:3 Pakuti pakuyendayenda m'thupi, siticita nkhondo monga mwa thupi," 
2Corinthians10:4 (pakuti zida za nkhondo yathu siziri za thupi, koma zamphamvu mwa Mulungu zakupasula malinga);" 
2Corinthians10:5 ndi kugwetsa matsutsano, ndi cokwezeka conse cimene cidzikweza pokana ddziwitso ca Mulungu, ndi kugonjetsa ganizo lonse ku kumvera kwa Kristu;" 
2Corinthians10:6 ndi kukhala okonzeka Irubwezera cilango kusamvera konse, pamene kumvera kwanu kudzakwaniridwa." 
2Corinthians10:7 Kodi mupenyera zopenyeka pamaso? Ngati wina alimbika mwa yekha kuti ali wa Kristu, ayesere icinso mwa iye yekha, kuti monga iye ali wa Kristu, koteronso ife." 
2Corinthians10:8 Pakuti ndingakhale ndikadzitamandira kanthu kocurukira za ulamuliro (umene anatipatsa Ambuye ku kumangirira, ndipo si ku kugwetsera kwanu), sindidzanyazitsidwa;" 
2Corinthians10:9 kuti ndisaoneke monga ngati kukuopsani mwa akalatawo. 
2Corinthians10:10 Pakuti, akalatatu, ati, ndiwo olemera, ndi amphamvu; koma maonekedwe a thupi lace ngofoka, ndi mau ace ngacabe." 
2Corinthians10:11 Wotereyo ayese ici kuti monga tiri ife ndi mau mwa akalata, pokhala palibe ife, tiri oterenso m'macitidwe pokhala tiri pomwepo." 
2Corinthians10:12 Pakuti sitilimba mtima kudziwerenga, kapena kudzilinganiza tokha ndi ena a iwo amene adzibvomeretsa okha; koma iwowa, podziyesera okha ndi iwo okha, ndi kudzilinganiza okha ndi iwookha, alibe nzeru." 
2Corinthians10:13 Koma ife sitidzadzitamandira popitirira muyeso, koma monga mwa muyeso wa cilekelezero cimene Mulungu anatigawira muyeso, kufikira ngakhale kwa inunso." 
2Corinthians10:14 Pakuti sitinyanyampiradi tokha, monga ngati sitinafikira kwa inu; pakuti tinadza kufikira inunso, mu Uthenga Wabwino wa Kristu:" 
2Corinthians10:15 osadzitamandira popitirira muyeso mwa macititso a ena; koma tiri naco ciyembekezo kuti pakukula cikhulupiriro canu, tidzakulitsidwa mwa inu monga mwa cilekezero cathu kwa kucurukira," 
2Corinthians10:16 kukalalikira Uthenga Wabwino m'tsogolo mwace mwa inu, sikudzitamandira mwa cilekezero ca wina, ndi zinthu zokonzeka kale." 
2Corinthians10:17 Koma iye wodzitamandira adzitamandire mwa Ambuye; 
2Corinthians10:18 pakuti si iye amene adzitama yekha, koma iye amene Ambuye amtama ali wobvomerezeka." 
2Corinthians11:1 Mwenzi mutandilola pang'ono ndi copusaco! Komanso mundilole. 
2Corinthians11:2 Pakuti ndicita nsanje pa inu ndi nsanje ya Mulungu; pakuti ndinakupalitsani ubwenzi mwamuna mmodzi, kuti ndikalangize inu ngati namwali woyera mtima kwa Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:3 Koma ndiopa, kuti pena, monga njoka inanyenga Heva ndi kucenjerera kwace, maganizo anu angaipsidwe kusiyana nako kuona mtima ndi kuyera mtima ziri kwa Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:4 Pakutitu ngati iye wakudza alalikira Yesu wina, amene ife sitinalalikira, kapena ngati mulandira mzimu wa mtundu wina, umene simunalandira, kapena uthenga wabwino wa mtundu wina umene simunalandira, mulolana nave bwino lomwe." 
2Corinthians11:5 Pakuti ndiyesa kuti sindinaperewera konse ndi atumwi oposatu," 
2Corinthians11:6 Ndipo ndingakhale ndiri wosaphunzira m'manenedwe, koma sinditero m'cidziwitso, koma m'zonse tacionetsa kwa inu mwa anthu onse." 
2Corinthians11:7 Kodi ndacimwa podzicepetsa ndekha, kuti inu mukakwezedwe, popeza ndinalalikira kwa inu Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu mwaufulu?" 
2Corinthians11:8 ndinalanda za Mipingo yina, ndi kulandira kwa iwo kulipira kuti ndikatumikire inu;" 
2Corinthians11:9 ndipo pakukhala nanu, ndi kusowa, sindinasaukitsa munthu ali yense; pakuti abale akucokera ku Makedoniya, anakwaniritsa kusowa kwanga; ndipo m'zonse ndinacenjera ndekha, ndisalemetse inu, ndipo ndidzacenjerapo." 
2Corinthians11:10 Coonadi ca Kristu ciri mwa ine, kuti kudzitamandira kumene sikudzaletsedwa kwa ine mu mbali za Akaya," 
2Corinthians11:11 Cifukwa ninji? Cifukwa sindikonda inu kodi? Adziwa Mulungu. 
2Corinthians11:12 Koma cimene ndicita, ndidzacitanso, kuti ndikawadulire cifukwa iwo akufuna cifukwa; kuti m'mene adzitamandiramo, apezedwe monganso ife." 
2Corinthians11:13 Pakuti otere ali atumwi onyenga, ocita ocenjerera, odzionetsa ngati atumwi a Kristu," 
2Corinthians11:14 Ndipo kulibe kudabwa; pakuti Satana yemwe adzionetsa ngati mngelo wa kuunika. 
2Corinthians11:15 Cifukwa cace sikuli kanthu kwakukuru ngatinso atumiki ace adzionetsa monga atumiki a cilungamo; amene cimariziro cao cidzakhala monga nchito zao. 
2Corinthians11:16 Ndinenanso, Munthu asandiyese wopanda nzeru; koma ngati mutero, mundilandirenso ine monga wopanda nzeru, kuti inenso ndidzitamandire pang'ono." 
2Corinthians11:17 Cimene ndilankhula sindilankhula monga mwa Ambuye, koma monga wopanda nzeru, m'kulimbika kumene kwa kudzitamandira." 
2Corinthians11:18 Popeza ambiri adzitamandira monga mwa thupi, inenso ndidzadzitamandira." 
2Corinthians11:19 Pakuti mulolana nao opanda nzeru mokondwera, pokhala anzeru inu nokha." 
2Corinthians11:20 Pakuti mulola ngati wina akuyesani inu akapolo, ngati wina alikwira inu, ngati wina alanda zanu, ngati wina adzikuza, ngati wina akupandani pankhope." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ndinena monga mwa kunyoza, monga ngati tinakhala ofoka. Koma m'mene wina alimbika mtimamo (ndinena mopanda nzeru) momwemo ndilimbika mtima inenso." 
2Corinthians11:22 Kodi ali Ahebri? Inenso. Kodi ali Aisrayeli? Inenso. Kodi ali mbeu ya Abrahamu? Inenso. 
2Corinthians11:23 Kodi ali atumiki a Kristu? (ndilankhula monga moyaruka), makamaka ine; m'zibvutitso mocurukira, m'ndende mocurukira, m'mikwingwirima mosawerengeka, muimfa kawiri kawiri." 
2Corinthians11:24 Kwa Ayuda ndinalandirakasanu mikwingwirima makumi anai kuperewera umodzi. 
2Corinthians11:25 Katatu ndinamenyedwa ndi ndodo, kamodzi ndinaponyedwa miyala, katatu ndinatayika posweka combo, ndinakhala m'kuya tsiku limodzi usana ndi usiku;" 
2Corinthians11:26 paulendo kawiri kawiri, moopsya mwace mwa mitsinje, moopsya mwace mwa olanda, 1 moopsya modzera kwa mtundu wanga, moopsya modzera kwa amitundu, moopsya m'mudzi, moopsya m'cipululu, moopsya m'nyanja, moopsya mwaabale onyenga;" 
2Corinthians11:27 m'cibvutitso ndi m'colemetsa, m'madikiro kawiri kawiri, 2 m'njala ndi ludzu, m'masalo a cakudyakawiri kawiri, m'cisanu ndi umarisece." 
2Corinthians11:28 Popanda zakunjazo pali condisindikiza tsiku ndi tsiku, calabadiro ca Mipingo yonse." 
2Corinthians11:29 3 Afoka ndani wosafoka inenso? Akhumudwitsidwa ndani, wosatenthanso ine?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Ngati ndiyenerakudzitamandira, 4 ndidzadzitamandira ndi za kufoka kwanga." 
2Corinthians11:31 Mulungu Atate wa Ambuye Yesu, iye amene alemekezeka ku nthawi yonse, adziwa kuti sindinama." 
2Corinthians11:32 M'Damasiko kazembe wa mfumu Areta analindizitsa mudzi wa Adamasiko kuti andigwire ine; 
2Corinthians11:33 ndipo mwa zenera, mumtanga, ananditsitsa pakhoma, ndipo ndinapulumuka m'manja mwace." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ndiyenera kudzitamandira, kungakhale sikupindulika; koma ndidzadza ku masomphenya ndi mabvumbulutso a Ambuye." 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndidziwa munthu wa mwa Kristu, zitapita zaka khumi ndi zinai (ngati m'thupi, sindidziwa; ngati kunja kwa thupi, sindidziwa; adziwa Mulungu), anakwatulidwa wotereyo kunka naye Kumwamba kwacitatu." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ndipo ndidziwa munthu wotereyo (ngati m'thupi, ngati wopanda thupi, sindidziwa; adziwa Mulungu)," 
2Corinthians12:4 kuti anakwatulidwa kunka ku Paradaiso, namva maneno osatheka kuneneka, amene saloleka kwa munthu kulankhula." 
2Corinthians12:5 Cifukwa ca wotereyo ndidzadzitamandira; koma cifukwa ca Ine ndekha sindidzadzitamandira, koma m'zofoka zanga," 
2Corinthians12:6 Pakuti ngati ndikafuna kudzitamandira, sindidzakhala wopanda nzeru; pakuti ndidzanena coonadi; koma ndileka, kuti wina angandiwerengere ine koposa kumene andiona ine, kapena amva za ine." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ndipo kuti ndingakwezeke koposa, cifukwa ca ukulu woposa wa mabvumbulutso, kunapatsidwa kwa ine munga m'thupi, ndiye mngelowa Satana kutianditundudze, kuti ndingakwezeke koposa." 
2Corinthians12:8 Za ici ndinapemphera Ambuye katatu kuti cicoke rkwafne. 
2Corinthians12:9 Ndipo ananena kwa ine, Cisomo canga cikukwanira; pakuti mphamvu yanga ithedwa m'ufoko. Cifukwa cace makamaka ndidzadzitamandira rriokondweratu m'maufoko anga, kuti mphamvu ya Kristu ikhale pa ine." 
2Corinthians12:10 Cifukwa cace ndisangalala m'tnaufoko, m'ziwawa, m'zikakamizo, m'mazunzo, m'zipsinjiko, cifukwa ca Kristu; pakuti pamene ndifoka, pamenepo ndiri wamphamvu." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ndakhala wopanda nzeru, mwandtcititsa kutero; pakuti inu nunayenera kundibvomereza; pacuti sindiperewera ndi atumwiopoiatu m'kanthu konse, ndingakhale adiri cabe." 
2Corinthians12:12 Zizindikilotu za ntumwi zinacitika pakati pa inu, ri'cipiriro conse, ndi zizindikilo, ndi cozizwa, ndi zamphamvu." 
2Corinthians12:13 Pakuti kuli ciani cimene munacepetsedwa naco ndi Mipingo yotsala yina, agati, si ici kuti ine ndekha sindirasaukitsa inu? Ndikhululukireni oipa ici." 
2Corinthians12:14 Taonani, nthawi yaitatu iyi ndapukwa ine kudza kwa nu, ndipo sindidzakusaukitsani; pakuti sindifuna zanu, koma inu; cakuti ana sayenera kuunjikira atate adi amai, koma atate ndi amai kumjikira ana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ndipo ndidzapereka ndi kuperekedwa konse cifucwa ca miyoyo yanu mokondweratu. Ngati ndikonda inu kocuruka koposa, kodi ndikondedwa kocepa?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Koma kukhale kotero; ine sindinalemetsa inu; koma pokhala wocenjera ine, ndinakugwirani ndi cinyengo." 
2Corinthians12:17 Kodi wina wa iwo ndinawatuma kwa inu, ndinakucenjererani naye kodi? Ndinadandaulira Tito, ndipo ndinatuma mbaleyo naye." 
2Corinthians12:18 Kodi Tito anakucenjererani kanthu? Sitinayendayenda naye Mzimu yemweyo kodi? Sitinatsata mapazi omwewo kodi? 
2Corinthians12:19 Mumayesa tsopano Uno kuti tirikuwiringula kwa, inu. Tilankhula pamaso pa Mulungu mwa Kristu. Koma zonse, okondedwa, ziri za kumangirira kwanu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Pakuti ndiopa, kuti kaya, pakudza ine, sindidzakupezani inu otere onga ndifuna, ndipo ine ndidzapezedwa ndi inu wotere wonga simufuna; kuti kaya pangakhale cotetana, kaduka, mikwiyo, zilekanitso, maugogodi ukazitape, zodzikuza, mapokoso;" 
2Corinthians12:21 kuti pakudzanso ine, Mulungu wanga angandicepse pa inu, ndipo ndingalirire ambiri 1 a iwo amene adacimwa kale, osalapa pa codetsa, ndi cigololo, ndi kukhumba zonyansa zimene anacita." 
2Corinthians13:1 Nthawi yacitatu iyi ndirinkudza kwa inu. Pakamwa pa mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu maneno onse adzakhazikika. 
2Corinthians13:2 Ndinanena kale, ndipo ndinena ndisanafikeko, monga pamene ndinali pomwepo kaciwiri kaja, pokhala ine palibe, kwa iwo adacimwa kale ndi kwa onse otsala, kuti, ngati ndidzanso sindidzawaleka;" 
2Corinthians13:3 popeza mufuna citsimikizo ca Kristu wakulankhula mwa ine; amene safoka kwa inu, koma ali wamphamvu mwa inu;" 
2Corinthians13:4 pakuti anapacikidwa m'ufoko, koma ali ndi moyo mu mphamvu ya Mulungu. Pakuti ifenso tiri ofok a mwa iye, koma tidzakhala ndi moyo pamodzi ndi iye, mu mphamvu ya Mulungu, ya kwa inu." 
2Corinthians13:5 Dziyeseni nokha, ngati muli m'cikhulupiriro, dzitsimikizeni nokha. Kapena simuzindikira kodi za inu nokha kuti Yesu Kristu ali mwa inu? mukapanda kukhala osatsimikizidwa." 
2Corinthians13:6 Koma ndiyembekeza kuti mudzazindikira kuti sitiri osatsimikizidwa. 
2Corinthians13:7 Ndipo tipemphera Mulungu kuti musacite kanthu koipa; sikuti ife tikaoneke obvomerezeka, koma kuti inu mukacite cabwino, tingakhale ife tikhala monga osatsimikizidwa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Pakuti sitikhoza kanthu pokana coonadi, koma pobvomereza coonadi." 
2Corinthians13:9 Pakuti tikondwera, pamene ife tffoka ndi inu muli amphamvu; icinso tipempherera, ndicoungwiro wanu." 
2Corinthians13:10 Cifukwa ca ici ndilembera izi pokhala palibe ine, kuti pokhala ndiri pomwepo ndingacite mowawitsa, monga mwa ulamuliro umene Ambuye anandipatsa ine wakumangirira, ndipo si wakugwetsa." 
2Corinthians13:11 Cotsalira, abale, kondwerani, Mucitidwe angwiro; mutorithozedwe; khalani a mtima umodzi, khalani mumtendere; ndipo Mulungu wa cikondi ndi mtendere akhale pamodzi ndi inu." 
2Corinthians13:12 Lankhulanani ndi cipsompsono copatulika. 
2Corinthians13:13 Oyera mtima onse alankhula inu," 
2Corinthians13:14 Cisomo ca Ambuye Yesu Kristu, ndi cikondi ca Mulungu, ndi ciyanjano ca Mzimu Woyera zikhale ndi inu nonse." 
Galatians1:1 PAULO, mtumwi (wosacokera kwa anthu, kapena mwa munthu, koma mwa Yesu Kristu, ndi Mulungu Atate, amene anamuukitsa iye kwa akufa)," 
Galatians1:2 ndi abale onse amene ali pamodzi ndi ine, kwa Mipingo ya ku Galatiya:" 
Galatians1:3 Cisomo kwa inu, ndi mtendere wa kwa Mulungu Atate, ndi Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu," 
Galatians1:4 amene anadzipereka yekha cifukwa ca macimo athu, kuti akatilanditse ife m'nyengo ya pansi pano yino yoipa, monga mwa cifuniro ca Mulungu ndi Atate wathu;" 
Galatians1:5 yemweyo akhale nao ulemerero ku nthawi za nthawi. Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Ndizizwa kuti msanga motere mulikutunsika kwa iye amene anakuitanani m'cisomo ca Kristu, kutsata uthenga wabwino wina;" 
Galatians1:7 umene suli wina; koma pali ena akubvuta inu, nafuna kuipsa Uthenga Wabwino wa Kristu." 
Galatians1:8 Koma ngakhale ife, kapena mngelo wocokera Kumwamba, ngati akakulalikireni uthenga wabwino wosati umene tidakulalikirani ife, akhale wotembereredwa." 
Galatians1:9 Monga tinanena kale, ndipo ndinenanso tsopano apa, ngati wina akulalikirani uthenga wabwino wosati umene mudaulandira, akhale wotembereredwa." 
Galatians1:10 Pakuti kodi ndikopa anthu tsopano, kapena Mulungu? Kapena kodi ndifuna kukondweretsa anthu? Ndikadakhala wokondweretsabe anthu, sindikadakhala kapolo wa Kristu." 
Galatians1:11 Pakuti ndikudziwitsani inu, abale, za Uthenga Wabwinowo wolalikidwa ndi ine, kuti suli monga mwa anthu." 
Galatians1:12 Pakutitu sindinaulandira kwa munthu, kapena sindinauphunzira, komatu unadza mwa bvumbulutso la Yesu Kristu." 
Galatians1:13 Pakuti mudamva za makhalidwe anga kale mwa Ciyuda, kuti ndinalondalonda Mpingo wa Mulungu koposa, ndi kuupasula," 
Galatians1:14 ndipo ndinawaposa ndi kutsogola mwa Ciyuda ambiri a msinkhu wanga mwa mtundu wanga, ndipo ndinakhala wacangu koposa pa miyambo ya makolo anga." 
Galatians1:15 Koma pamene padakondweretsa Mulungu, amene anandipatula, ndisanabadwe, nandiitana ine mwa cisomo cace," 
Galatians1:16 kuti abvumbulutse Mwana wace mwa ine, kuti ndimlalikire iye mwa amitundu; pomwepo sindinafunsana ndi thupi ndi mwazi:" 
Galatians1:17 kapena kukwera kunka ku Yerusalemu sindinankako kwa iwo amene anakhala atumwi ndisanakhale mtumwi ine, komatu ndinamuka ku Arabiya, ndipo ndinabweranso ku Damasiko." 
Galatians1:18 Pamenepo patapita zaka zitatu, ndinakwera kunka ku Yerusalemu kukazindikirana naye Kefa, ndipo ndinakhala kwa iye masiku khumi ndi asanu." 
Galatians1:19 Koma wina wa atumwi sindinamuona, koma Yakobo mbale wa Ambuye." 
Galatians1:20 Ndipo izi ndikulemberani inu, taonani, pamaso pa Mulungu sindinama ine." 
Galatians1:21 Pamenepo ndinadza ku mbali za Suriya ndi Kilikiya. 
Galatians1:22 Koma ndinali wosadziwika nkhope yanga kwa Mipingo ya ku Yudeya ya mwa Kristu; 
Galatians1:23 koma analinkumva kokha, kuti, iye wakutilondalonda ife kale, tsopane alalikira cikhulupiriroco ada cipasula kale;" 
Galatians1:24 ndipo analemekeza Mulungu mwaine. 
Galatians2:1 Pamenepo popita zaka khumi ndi zinai ndinakweranso kunka ku Yerusalemu pamodzi ndi Bamaba, ndinamtenganso Tito andiperekeze." 
Galatians2:2 Koma ndinakwera kunkako mobvumbulutsa; ndipo ndinawauza Uthenga Wabwino umene ndiulalikira kwa amitundu; koma m'tseri kwa iwo omveka, kuti kapena ndingathamange, kapena ndikadathamanga cabe." 
Galatians2:3 Komatu ngakhale Tito, amene anali ndi ine, ndiye Mhelene, sanamkakamiza adulidwe;" 
Galatians2:4 ndico cifukwa ca abale onyenga olowezedwa m'tseri, amene analowa m'tseri kudzazonda ufulu wathu umene tiri nao mwa Kristu Yesu, kuti akaticititse iukapolo." 
Galatians2:5 Koma sitidawafumukira mowagonjera ngakhale ora limodzi; kuti coonadi ca Uthenga Wabwino cikhalebe ndi inu. 
Galatians2:6 Koma iwo akuyesedwa ali kanthu (ngati anali otani kale, kulibe kanthu kwa ine; Mulungu salandira nkhope ya munthu) iwo omvekawo sanandionjezera ine kanthu;" 
Galatians2:7 koma pena, pakuona kuti anaikiza kwa ine Uthenga Wabwino wa kusadulidwa, monga kwa Petro Uthenga Wabwino wa mdulidwe" 
Galatians2:8 (pakuti iye wakucita mwa Petro kumtuma kwa odulidwa anacitanso mwa ine kundituma kwa amitundu); 
Galatians2:9 ndipo pakuzindikira cisomoco cinapatsidwakwa ine, Yakobo ndi Kefa ndi Yohane, amene anayesedwa mizati, anapatsa ine ndi Bamaba dzanja lamanja la ciyanjano, kuti ife tipite kwa amitundu, ndi iwo kwa mdulidwe;" 
Galatians2:10 pokhapo kuti tikumbukile aumphawi; ndico comwe ndinafulumira kucicita. 
Galatians2:11 Koma pamene Kefa anadza ku Antiokeyandinatsutsana naye pamaso pace, pakuti anatsutsika wolakwa." 
Galatians2:12 Pakuti asanafike ena ocokera kwa Yakobo, anadya pamodzi ndi amitundu; koma atadza iwo, anadzibweza, ndi kudzipatula yekha, pakuopa iwo a ku mdulidwe." 
Galatians2:13 Ndipo Ayuda otsala anawagwiranso m'maso pamodzi naye; kotero kuti Bamabanso anatengedwa ndi kugwira m'maso kwao. 
Galatians2:14 Komatu pamene ndinaona kuti sanalikuyenda koongoka, monga mwa coonadi ca Uthenga Wabwino, ndinati kwa Kefa pamaso pa onse, Ngati inu muli Myuda mutsata makhalidwe a amitundu, ndipo si a Ayuda, mukangamiza bwanji amitundu atsate makhalidwe a Ayuda?" 
Galatians2:15 Ife ndife Ayuda pacibadwidwe, ndipo sitiri ocimwa a kwaamitundu;" 
Galatians2:16 koma podziwa kuti munthu sayesedwa wolungama pa: nchito ya lamulo, koma mwa cikhulupiriro ca Yesu Kristu, ifedi tinakhulupirira kwa Yesu Kristu, kuti tikayesedwe olungama ndicikhulupiriro ca Kristu, ndipo si ndi nchito za lamulo; pakuti palibe munthu adzayesedwa wolungama ndi nchito za lamulo." 
Galatians2:17 Koma ngati ife, pofuna kuyesedwa olungama mwa Kristu, tipezedwanso tiri ocimwa tokha, kodi Kristu ali mtumikiwa ucimo cifukwa cace? Msatero ai." 
Galatians2:18 Pakuti ngati izi zomwezi ndazigumula ndizimanganso, ndidzitsimikizira ndekha ndirt wolakwa." 
Galatians2:19 Pakuti ine mwa lamulo ndafa ku lamulo, kuti ndikhale ndi moyo kwa Mulungu." 
Galatians2:20 Ndinapacikidwa ndi Kristu; koma ndiri ndi mayo; wosatinso ine ai, koma Kristu ali ndi moyo mwa ine; koma moyo umene ndiri nao: tsopano m'thupi, ndiri nao m'cikhulupiriro ca Mwana wa Mulungu, amene anandikonda, nadzipereka yekha cifukwa ca ine." 
Galatians2:21 Sindieiyesa copanda pace cisomo ca Mulungu; pakuti ngati cilungamo ciri mwa Lamulo, Kristu adafa cabe." 
Galatians3:1 Agalatiya opusa inu, anakulodzani ndani, inu amene Kristu anaonetsedwa pa maso panu, wopacikidwa?" 
Galatians3:2 ici cokha ndifuna kuphunzira kwa inu, Kodi munalandira Mzimuyo ndi nchito za lamulo, kapena ndi kumva kwa cikhulupiriro?" 
Galatians3:3 Kodi muli opusa otere? Popeza mudayamba ndi Mzimu, kodi tsopano mutsiriza ndi thupi?" 
Galatians3:4 Kodi mudamva zowawa zambiri zotere kwacabe? ngatitu kwacabe. 
Galatians3:5 Ndipo iye amene akuonjezerani inu Mzimuyo, nacita zimphamvu mwa inu, atero kodi ndi nchito za lamulo, kapena ndi kumva kwa cikhulupiriro?" 
Galatians3:6 Monga Abrahamu anakhulupirira Mulungu, ndipo kunawerengedwa kwa iye cilungamo," 
Galatians3:7 cotero zindikirani kuti iwo a cikhulupiriro ndiwo ana a Abrahamu. 
Galatians3:8 Ndipo malembo, pakuoneratu kuti Mulungu adzayesa olungama amitundu ndi cikhulupiriro, anayamba kale kulalikira Uthenga Wabwino kwa Abrahamu, kuti, Idzadalitsidwa mwa iwe mitundu yonse." 
Galatians3:9 Kotero kuti iwo a cikhulupiriro adalitsidwa pamodzi ndi Abrahamu wokhulupirikayo," 
Galatians3:10 Pakuti onse amene atama nchito za lamulo Iiwakhalira temberero; pakuti kwalembedwa, Wotembereredwa ali yense wosakhala m'zonse zolembedwa m'buku la cilamulo, kuzicita izi." 
Galatians3:11 Ndipo cidziwikatu kuti palibe munthu ayesedwa wolungama ndi lamulo pamaso pa Mulungu; pakuti, Wolungama adzakhala ndi moyo ndi cikhulupiriro;" 
Galatians3:12 koma cilamulo sicicokera kucikhulupiriro; koma, Wakuzicita izi adzakhala ndi moyo ndi izi." 
Galatians3:13 Kristu anatiombola ku temberero la cilamulo, atakhala temberero m'malo mwathu; pakuti kwalembedwa, Wotembereredwa ali yense woo paeikidwa pamtengo;" 
Galatians3:14 kutidalitso la Abrahamu mwa Yesu Kristu, licitike kwa amitundu; kuti tikalandire lonjezano la Mzimuyo, mwa cikhulupiriro." 
Galatians3:15 Abale, ndinena monga munthu Pangano, lingakhale la munthu, litalunzika, palibe munthu aliyesacabe, kapena kuonjezapo." 
Galatians3:16 Ndipo malonjezano ananenedwa kwa Abrahamu ndi kwa mbeu yace, Sanena, Ndipo kwa zimbeu, ngati kunena zambiri; komatu ngati kunena imodzi, Ndipo kwa mbeu yako, ndiye Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Ndipo ici ndinena; Lamulo, limene linafika zitapita zaka mazana anai mphambu makumi atatu, silifafaniza pangano lolunzika kale ndi Mulungu, kuliyesa lonjezanolo lacabe." 
Galatians3:18 Pakuti ngati kulowa nyumba kucokera kulamulo, sikucokeranso kulonjezano; koma kumeneku Mulungu anampatsa Abrahamu kwaufulu mwa lonjezano." 
Galatians3:19 Nanga cilamulo tsono? Cinaoniezeka cifukwa ca zolakwa, kufikira ikadza mbeu imene adailonjezera; ndipo cinakonzeka ndi angelo m'dzanja la Ilkhoswe." 
Galatians3:20 Koma nkhoswe siiri ya mmodzi; koma Mulungu ali mmodzi. 
Galatians3:21 Pamenepo kodi cilamulo citsutsana nao malonjezano a Mulungu? Msatero ai. Pakuti cikadapatsidwa cilamulo eakukhoza kucitira moyo, cilungamo cikadacokera ndithu kulamulo." 
Galatians3:22 Komatu lembo Iinatsekereza zonse pansi pa ucimo, kuti lonjezano la kwa cikhulupiriro ca Yesu Kristu likapatsidwe kwa okhulupirirawo." 
Galatians3:23 Koma cisanadze cikhulupiriro tinasungidwa pomvera lamulo otsekedwa kufikira cikhulupiriro cimene cikabvumbulutsidwa bwino bwino. 
Galatians3:24 1 Momwemo cilamulo cidakhala namkungwi wathu wakutifikitsa kwa Kristu, 2 kuti tikayesedwe olungama ndi cikhulupiriro." 
Galatians3:25 Koma popeza cadza cikhulupiriro, sitikhalanso omvera namkungwi." 
Galatians3:26 3 Pakuti inu nonse muli ana a Mulungu, mwa cikhulupiriro ca mwa Yesu Kristu." 
Galatians3:27 4 Pakuti nonse amene munabatizidwa kwa Kristu mudabvala Kristu. 
Galatians3:28 5 Muno mulibe Myuda, kapena Mhelene, muno mulibe kapolo, kapena mfulu, muno mulibe mwamuna ndi mkazi; 6 pakuti muli nonse mmodzi mwa Kristu Yesu." 
Galatians3:29 Koma ngati muli a Kristu, muli mbeu ya Abrahamu, 7 nyumba monga mwa Lonjezano." 
Galatians4:1 Koma ndinena kuti, pokhala wolowa nyumba ali wakhanda, sasiyana ndi kapolo, angakhale ali mwini zonse;" 
Galatians4:2 komatu ali wakumvera omsungira ndi adindo, kufikira nthawi yoikika kale ndi atate wace." 
Galatians4:3 Koteronso ife, pamene tinali akhanda, tinali akapolo akumvera miyambo ya dziko lapansi;" 
Galatians4:4 koma pokwaniridwa nthawi, Mulungu anatuma Mwana wace, wobadwa ndi mkazi, wobadwa wakumvera lamulo," 
Galatians4:5 kuti akaombole iwo akumvera lamulo, kuti ife tikalandire umwana." 
Galatians4:6 Ndipo popeza muli ana, Mulungu anatumiza Mzimu wa Mwana wace alowe m'mitima yathu, wopfuula Abba, Atate." 
Galatians4:7 Kotero kuti sulinso kapolo, koma mwana; koma ngati mwana, wolowa nyumbanso mwa Mulungu." 
Galatians4:8 Komatu pajapo, posadziwa Mulungu inu, munacitira ukapolo iyo yosakhalamilungu m'cibadwidwe cao;" 
Galatians4:9 koma tsopano, podziwa Mulungu inu, koma makamaka podziwika ndi Mulungu, mubwereranso bwanji kutsata miyambo yofoka ndi yaumphawi, imene mufuna kubwerezanso kuicitira ukapolo?" 
Galatians4:10 Musunga masiku, ndi miyezi, ndi nyengo, ndi zaka." 
Galatians4:11 Ndiopera inu, kuti kapena odadzibvutitsa ndi inu cabe." 
Galatians4:12 Abale, ndikupemphani, khalani monga ine, pakuti inenso ndiri mongainu. Simunandicitira coipa ine;" 
Galatians4:13 koma mudziwa kuti m'kufoka kwa thupi ndinakulalikirani Uthenga Wabwino poyamba: 
Galatians4:14 ndipo cija ca m'thupi langa cakukuyesani inu simunacipeputsa, kapena sicinakunyansirani, komatu munandilandira ine monga mngelo wa Mulungu, monga Kristu Yesu mwini." 
Galatians4:15 Pamenepo thamo lanu liri kuti? Pakuti ndikucitirani inu umboni, kuti, kukadatheka, mukadakolowola maso anu ndi kundipatsa ine." 
Galatians4:16 Kotero kodi ndasanduka mdani wanu, pakukunenerani zoona?" 
Galatians4:17 Acita cangu pa inu koma si kokoma ai, komatu afuna kukutsekerezani inu kunja, kuti mukawacitire iwowa cangu." 
Galatians4:18 Koma nkwabwino kucita cangu m'zabwino nthawi zonse, si pokha pokha pokhala nanu pamodzi ine." 
Galatians4:19 Tiana tanga, amene ndirikumvanso zowawa za kubala inu, kufikira Kristu aumbika mwa inu," 
Galatians4:20 koma mwenzi nditakhala nanu tsopano, ndi kusintha mau anga; cifukwa ndisinkhasinkha nanu." 
Galatians4:21 Ndiuzeni, inu akufuna kukhala omvera lamulo, kodi simukumva cilamulo?" 
Galatians4:22 Pakuti palembedwa, kuti Abrahamu anali nao ana amuna awiri, mmodzi wobadwa mwa mdzakazi, ndi mmodzi wobadwa mwa mfulu." 
Galatians4:23 Komatu uyo wa mdzakazi anabadwa monga mwa thupi; koma iye wa mfuluyo, anabadwa monga mwa Ionjezano, Izo ndizo zophiphiritsa;" 
Galatians4:24 pakuti akaziwa ali mapangano awiri, mmodzi wa ku phiri la Sinai, akubalira ukapolo, ndiye Hagara." 
Galatians4:25 Koma Hagara ndiye phiri la Sinai, m'Arabiya, nafanana ndi Yerusalemu wa tsopano; pakuti ali muukapolo pamodzi ndi ana ace." 
Galatians4:26 Koma, Yerusalemu wa kumwamba uli waufulu, ndiwo amai wathu." 
Galatians4:27 Pakuti kwalembedwa, Kondwera, cumba iwe wosabala; Yimba nthungululu, nupfuule iwe wosamva kuwawa kwa kubala; Pakuti ana ace a iye ali mbeta acuruka koposa ana a iye ali naye mwamuna." 
Galatians4:28 Koma ife, abale, monga Isake, tiri ana a lonjezano." 
Galatians4:29 Komatu monga pompaja iye wobadwa monga mwa thupi anazunza wobadwa monga mwa Mzimu, momwemonso tsopano," 
Galatians4:30 Koma lembo linena ciani? Taya kubwalo mdzakazi ndi mwana wace, pakuti sadzalowa nyumba mwanawa mdzakazi pamodzi ndi mwana wa mfulu." 
Galatians4:31 Cifukwa cace, abale, z sitiri ana a mdzakazi, komatu a mfulu." 
Galatians5:1 Kristu anatisandutsa mfulu, kuti tikhale mfulu; cifukwa cace cirimikani, musakodwenso ndi gori la ukapolo." 
Galatians5:2 Taonani, ine Paulo ndinena ndi inu, kuti, ngati mulola akuduleni, Kristu simudzapindula naye kanthu." 
Galatians5:3 Ndicitanso umboni kwa munthu yense wolola amdule, kuti ali wamangawa kucita cilamulo conse." 
Galatians5:4 Mulibe kanthu ndi Kristu, inu amene muyesedwa olungama ndi lamulo; mudagwa posiyana naco cisomo." 
Galatians5:5 Pakuti ife mwa Mzimu, kucokera m'cikhulupiriro, tilindira ciyembekezo ca cilungamo," 
Galatians5:6 Pakuti mwa Kristu Yesu kapena mdulidwe kapena kusadulidwa kulibe mphamvu; komatu cikhulupiriro cakucititsa mwa cikondi. 
Galatians5:7 Munathamanga bwino; anakuletsani ndani kuti musamvere coonadi? 
Galatians5:8 Kukopa kumene sikucokera kwa iye anakuitanani. 
Galatians5:9 Cotupitsa pang'ono citupitsa mtanda wonse. 
Galatians5:10 Ine ndikhulupirira inu mwa Ambuye, kuti simudzakhala nao mtima wina; koma iye wakubvuta inu, angakhale ali yani, adzasenza citsutso cace." 
Galatians5:11 Koma ine, abale, ngati ndilalikiransoindulidwe, ndizunzikanso bwanji? Pamenepo cikhumudwitso ca mtanda cidatha." 
Galatians5:12 Mwenzi atadzidula, iwo akugwedezetsani inu." 
Galatians5:13 Pakuti adakuitanani inu, abale, mukhale mfulu; cokhaco musacite nao ufulu wanu cothandizira thupi, komatu mwa cikondi citiranani ukapolo." 
Galatians5:14 Pakuti mau amodzi akwaniritsa cilamulo conse ndiwo; Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda iwe mwini. 
Galatians5:15 Koma ngati mulumana ndi kudyana, cenjerani mungaonongane." 
Galatians5:16 Koma ndinena, Muyendeyende ndi Mzimu, ndipo musafitse cilakolako ca thupi." 
Galatians5:17 Pakuti thupi lilakalaka potsutsana naye Mzimu, ndi Mzimu potsutsana nalo thupi; pakuti izi sizilingana; kuti zimene muzifuna musazicite." 
Galatians5:18 Ngati Mzimu akutsogolerani, simuli omvera lamulo." 
Galatians5:19 Ndipo nchito za thupi zionekera, ndizo dama, codetsa, kukhumba zonyansa, kupembedza mafano," 
Galatians5:20 nyanga, madano, ndeu, kaduka, zopsa mtima, zotetana, magawano, mipatuko, njiru," 
Galatians5:21 kuledzera, mcezo, ndi zina zotere; zimene ndikucenjezani nazo, monga ndacita, kuti iwo akucitacita zotere sadzalowa Ufumu wa Mulungu." 
Galatians5:22 Koma cipatso ca Mzimu ndico cikondi, cimwemwe, mtendere, kuleza mtima, cifundo, kukoma mtima, icikhulupirtro," 
Galatians5:23 cifatso, ciletso; pokana zimenezi palibe lamulo." 
Galatians5:24 Koma iwo a Kristu Yesu adapacika thupi, ndi zokhumba zace, ndi zilakolako zace." 
Galatians5:25 1 N gati tiri ndi moyo ndi Mzimu, ndi Mzimunso tiyende." 
Galatians5:26 2 Tisakhale odzikuza, outsana, akucitirana njiru." 
Galatians6:1 Abale, ngatinso munthu agwidwa nako kulakwa kwakuti, inu auzimu, mubweze wotereyo mu mzimu wa cifatso; ndikudzipenyerera wekha, ungayesedwe nawenso." 
Galatians6:2 Nyamuliranani zothodwetsa, ndipo kotero mufitse cilamulo ca Kristu." 
Galatians6:3 Pakuti ngati wina ayesa ali kanthu pokhala ali cabe, adzinyenga yekha." 
Galatians6:4 Koma yense ayesere nchito yace ya iye yekha, ndipo pamenepo adzakhala nako kudzitamandira cifukwa ca iye yekha, si cifukwa ca wina," 
Galatians6:5 Pakuti yense adzasenza katundu wace wa iye mwini. 
Galatians6:6 Koma iye amene aphunzira mau, ayenera kucereza womphunzitsayo m'zonse zabwino." 
Galatians6:7 Musanyengedwe; Mulungu sanyozeka; pakuti cimene munthu acifesa, cimenenso adzacituta." 
Galatians6:8 Pakuti wakufesera kwa thupi la iye yekha, cocokera m'thupi adzatuta cibvundi; koma wakufesera kwa Mzimu, cocokera mu Mzimu adzatuta moyo wosatha." 
Galatians6:9 Koma tisaleme pakucita zabwino pakuti pa nyengo yace tidzatuta tikapanda kufoka. 
Galatians6:10 Cifukwa cace, monga tiri nayo nyengo, ticitire onse cokoma, koma makamaka iwo a pa banja la cikhulupiriro." 
Galatians6:11 Taonani, malembedwe akuruwo ndakulemberani inu ndi dzanja langa la ine mwini." 
Galatians6:12 Onseamene afuna kuonekera okoma m'thupi, iwowa akukangamizani inu mudulidwe; cokhaco, cakuti angazunzike cifukwa ca mtanda wa Kristu." 
Galatians6:13 Pakuti angakhale iwo omwe odulidwa sasunga lamulo; komatu afuna inu mudulidwe, kuti akadzitamandire m'thupi lanu." 
Galatians6:14 Koma kudzitamandira ine konse konse, iai, koma mu mtanda wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, amene mwa iye dziko lapansi lapacikidwira ine, ndi ine ndapacikidwira dziko lapansi." 
Galatians6:15 Pakuti mdulidwe ulibe kanthu, kusadulidwakulibe kanthunso, komatu wolengedwa watsopano." 
Galatians6:16 Ndipo onse amene atsatsa cilangizo ici, mtendere ndi cifundo zikhale pa iwo, ndi pa Israyeli wa Mulungu." 
Galatians6:17 Kuyambira tsopano palibe munthu andibvute, pakuti ndiri nayo ine m'thupi mwanga mikwingwirima ya Yesu." 
Galatians6:18 Cisomo ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu cikhale ndi mzimu wanu, abale. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 PAULO, mtumwi wa Kristu Yesu, mwa cifuniro ca Mulungu, kwa oyera mtima amene ali m'Efeso, ndi kwa iwo okhulupirika mwa Kristu Yesu:" 
Ephesians1:2 Cisomo kwa inu, ndi mtendere wocokera kwa Mulungu Atate wathu, ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu." 
Ephesians1:3 Wolemekezeka Mulungu ndi Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, amene anatidalitsa ife ndi dalitso lonse la mzimu m'zakumwamba mwa Kristu;" 
Ephesians1:4 monga anatisankha ife mwa iye, lisanakhazikike dziko lapansi, tikhale ife oyera mtima, ndi opanda cirema pamaso pace m'cikondi," 
Ephesians1:5 Anatikonzeratu tilandiridwe ngati ana, a iye yekha mwa Yesu Kristu, monga umo kunakomera cifuniro cace," 
Ephesians1:6 kuti uyamikidwe ulemerero wa cisomo cace, cimene anaticitira ife kwaufulu mwa Wokondedwayo." 
Ephesians1:7 Tiri ndi maomboledwe mwa mwazi wace, cikhululukiro ca zocimwa, monga mwa kulemera kwa cisomo cace," 
Ephesians1:8 cimene anaticurukitsira ife m'nzeru zonse, ndi cisamaliro." 
Ephesians1:9 Anatizindikiritsa ife cinsinsi ca cifuniro cace, monga kunamkomera ndi monga anatsimikiza mtima kale mwa iye," 
Ephesians1:10 kuti pa tnakonzedwe a makwaniridwe a nyengozo, akasonkhanitse pamodzi zonse mwa Kristu, za kumwamba, ndi za padziko." 
Ephesians1:11 Mwa iye tinayesedwa colowa cace, popeza tinakonzekeratu monga mwa citsimikizo mtima ca iye wakucita zonse monga mwa uphungu wa cifuniro cace;" 
Ephesians1:12 kuti ife amene dnakhulupirira Kristu kale tikayamikitse ulemerero wace. 
Ephesians1:13 Mwa Iyeyo inunso, mutamva mau a coonadi, Uthenga Wabwino wa cipulumutso canu; ndi kumkhulupirira iye, munasindikizidwa cizindikilo ndi Mzimu Woyera wa lonjezano," 
Ephesians1:14 ndiye cikole ca colowa cathu, kuti ace ace akaomboledwe, ndi kuti ulemerero wace uyamikike." 
Ephesians1:15 Mwa ici inenso, m'mene ndamva za cikhulupiriro'ca mwa Ambuye Yesu ciri mwa inu, cimenenso mufikitsira oyera mtima onse," 
Ephesians1:16 sindileka kuyamikacifukwa ca inu, ndi kukumbukila inu m'mapemphero anga;" 
Ephesians1:17 kuti Mulungu wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, Atate wa ulemerero, akupatseni inu mzimu wa nzeru, ndi wa bvumbulutso kuti mukamzindikire iye;" 
Ephesians1:18 ndiko kunena kuti maso amitima yanu awalitsike, ktiti mukadziwe inu ciyembekezo ca kuitana kwace nciani; cianinso cuma ca ulemerero wacolowa cace mwa oyera mtima," 
Ephesians1:19 ndi ciani ukuru woposa wa mphamvu yace ya kwa ife okhulupira, monga mwa macitidwe a mphamvu yace yolimba," 
Ephesians1:20 imene anacititsa mwa Kristu, m'mene anamuukitsa kwa akufa, 1 namkhazikitsa pa dzanja lace lamanja m'zakumwamba," 
Ephesians1:21 2 pamwamba pa ukulu wonse, ndi ulamuliro ndi mphamvu, ndi ufumu, ndi dzina liri lonse lochedwa, si m'nyengo yinoya pansi pano yokha, komanso mwaiyo ikudza;" 
Ephesians1:22 ndipo 3 anakonza zonse pansi pa mapazi ace, nampatsa iye 4 akhale mutu pamtu pa zonse," 
Ephesians1:23 5 kwa Eklesia amene ali thupi lace, 6 mdzazidwe wa iye amene adzazazonse m'zonse." 
Ephesians2:1 Ndipo inu, anakupatsani moyo, pokhala munali akufa ndi zolakwa, ndi zocimwa zanu," 
Ephesians2:2 zimene munayendamo kale, monga mwa mayendedwe a dziko lapansi lino, monga mwa mkulu wa ulamuliro wa mlengalenga, wa mzimu wakucita tsopano mwa ana a kusamvera;" 
Ephesians2:3 amene ife tonsenso tinagonera pakati pao kale, m'zilakolako za thupi lathu, ndi kucita zifuniro za thupi, ndi za maganizo, ndipo tinali ana a mkwiyo cibadwire, monganso otsalawo;" 
Ephesians2:4 koma Mulungu, wolemera cifundo, cifukwa ca cikondi cace cacikuru cimene anatikonda naco," 
Ephesians2:5 tingakhale tinali akufa m'zolakwa zathu, anatipatsa moyo pamodzi ndi Kristu (muli opulumutsidwa ndi cisomo)," 
Ephesians2:6 ndipo anatiukitsa pamodzi, natikhazikitsa pamodzi m'zakumwamba mwa Kristu Yesu;" 
Ephesians2:7 kuti akaonetsere m'nyengo zirinkudza cuma coposa ca cisomo cace, m'kukoma mtima kwa pa ife mwa Kristu Yesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Pakuti muli opulumutsidwa ndi cisomo cakucita mwa cikhulupiriro, ndipo ici cosacokera kwa inu: ciri mphatso ya Mulungu;" 
Ephesians2:9 cosacokera kunchito, kuti asadzitamandire munthu ali yense." 
Ephesians2:10 Pakuti ife ndife cipango cace, olengedwa mwa Kristu Yesu, kucita nchito zabwino, zimene Mulungu anazipangiratu, kuti tikayende m'menemo." 
Ephesians2:11 Momwemo kumbukirani, kuti kale inu amitundu m'thupi, ochedwa kusadulidwa ndi iwo ochedwa mdulidwe m'thupi, umene udacitika ndi manja;" 
Ephesians2:12 kuti nthawi ija munali opanda Kristu, alendo a padera ndi mbumba ya Israyeli, ndi alendo alibe kanthu ndi mapangano a malonjezano, opanda ciyembekezo, ndi opanda Mulungu m'dziko lapansi." 
Ephesians2:13 Koma tsopano mwa Yesu Kristu inu amene munali kutali kale, anakusendezani mukhale pafupi m'mwazi wa Kristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Pakuti iye ndiye mtendere wathu, amene anacita kutionse awiri akhale mmodzi, nagumula khoma lakudulitsa pakati," 
Ephesians2:15 atacotsa udani m'thupi lace, ndiwo mau a cilamulo ca kuchulako malangizo; kuti alenge awiriwa mwa iye yekha, akhale munthu mmodzi watsopano, ndi kucitapo mtendere;" 
Ephesians2:16 ndi kuti akayanianitse awiriwa ndi Mulungu, m'thupi limodzi mwa mtandawo, atapha nao udaniwo;" 
Ephesians2:17 ndipo m'mene anadza, analalikira Uthenga Wabwino wa mtendere kwa inu akutali, ndi mtendere kwa iwo apafupi;" 
Ephesians2:18 kuti mwa iye ife tonse awiri tiri nao malowedwe athu kwa Atate, mwa Mzimu mmodzi." 
Ephesians2:19 Pamenepo ndipo simulinso alendo ndi ogonera, komatu muli a mudzi womwewo wa oyera mtima ndi a banja la Mulungu;" 
Ephesians2:20 omangika pa maziko a atumwi ndi aneneri, pali Kristu Yesu mwini, mwala wa pangondya;" 
Ephesians2:21 1 mwa iye cimango conse, columikizika pamodzi bwino, cikula, cikhale 2 kacisi wopatulika mwa Ambuye;" 
Ephesians2:22 3 cimene inunso mumangidwamo pamodzi, mukhale cokhalamo Mulungu mwa Mzimu." 
Ephesians3:1 Cifukwa ca ici ine Paulo, ndine wandende wa Kristu Yesu cifukwa ca inu amitundu," 
Ephesians3:2 ngatitu munamva za udindo wa cisomo ca Mulungucimene anandipatsa ine ca kwa inu; 
Ephesians3:3 ndi umo anandizindikiritsa cinsinsico mwa bvumbulutso, monga ndinalemba kale mwacidule," 
Ephesians3:4 cimene mukhoza kuzindikira naco, pakuciwerenga, cidziwitso canga m'cinsinsi ca Kristu," 
Ephesians3:5 cimene sanacizindikiritsa ana a anthu m'mibadwo yina, monga anacibvumbulutsa tsopano kwa atumwi ndi aneneri ace oyera mwa Mzimu," 
Ephesians3:6 kuti amitundu ali olowanyumbapamodzi ndi ife, ndi ziwalo zinzathu za thupilo, ndi oland ira nafe pamodzi palonjezano mwa Kristu Yesu, mwa Uthenga Wabino," 
Ephesians3:7 umene anandikhalitsa mtumiki wace monga mwa mphatso ya cisomo ca Mulungu, cimene anandipatsa ine, monga mwa, macitidwe a mphamvu yace." 
Ephesians3:8 Kwa ine wocepa ndi wocepetsa wa onse, oyera mtima anandipatsa cisomo ici, ndilalikire kwa amitundu cuma cosalondoleka ca Kristu;" 
Ephesians3:9 ndi kuwalitsira onse adziwe makonzedwe a cinsinsico, cimene cinabisika ku yambira kale kale mwa Mulungu wolenga zonse;" 
Ephesians3:10 kuti mu Eklesia azindikiritse tsopano kwa akulu ndi maulamuliro m'zakumwamba nzeru ya mitundu mitundu ya Mulungu," 
Ephesians3:11 monga mwa citsimikizo mtima ca nthawi za nthawi, cimene anacita mwa Kristu Yesu Ambuye wathu:" 
Ephesians3:12 amene tiri naye cokhazikika mtima ndi ciyandiko eolimbika, mwa cikhulupiriro ca pa iye." 
Ephesians3:13 Mwa ici ndipempha kuti musade mtima, m'zisautso zanga cifukwa ca inu, ndiwo ulemerero wanu." 
Ephesians3:14 Cifukwa ca ici ndipinda maondo anga kwa Atate," 
Ephesians3:15 amene kucokera kwa iye pfuko lonse la m'mwamba ndi la padziko alicha dzina," 
Ephesians3:16 kuti monga mwa cuma ca ulemerero wace akulimbikitseni inu ndi mphamvu mwa Mzimu wace, m'kati mwanu," 
Ephesians3:17 kuti Kristu akhale cikhalire mwa cikhulupiriro m'mitima yanu; kuti, ozika mizu ndi otsendereka m'cikondi," 
Ephesians3:18 mukakhozetu kuzindikira pamodzi ndi oyera mtima onse, kupingasa, ndi utali, ndi kukwera," 
Ephesians3:19 ndi kuzama nciani; ndi kuzindikira cikondi ca Kristu, cakuposa mazindikiridwe, kuti mukadzazidwe kufikira cidzalo conse ca Mulungu." 
Ephesians3:20 Ndipo kwa iye amene angathe kucita koposa-posatu zonse zimene tizipempha, kapena tiziganiza, monga mwa mphamvu ya kucita mwa ife," 
Ephesians3:21 kwa iye ukhale ulemerero mu Mpingo ndi mwa Kristu Yesu, kufikira mibadwo yonse ya nthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Ndikudandaulirani inu tsono, ine wandende mwa Ambuye, muyende koyenera maitanidwe amene munaitanidwa nao," 
Ephesians4:2 ndi kuonetsera kudzicepetsa konse, ndi cifatso, ndi kuonetsera cipiriro, ndi kulolerana wina ndi mnzace, mwa cikondi;" 
Ephesians4:3 ndi kusamalitsa kusunga umodzi wa Mzimu mwa cimangiriro ca mtendere. 
Ephesians4:4 Thupi limodzi ndi Mzimu mmodzi, monganso anakuitanani m'ciyembekezo cimodzi ca maitanidwe anu;" 
Ephesians4:5 Ambuye mmodzi, cikhulupiriro cimodzi, ubatizo umodzi," 
Ephesians4:6 Mulungu mmodzi ndi Atate wa onse amene ali pamwamba pa onse, ndi mwa onse, ndi m'kati mwa zonse." 
Ephesians4:7 Ndipo kwa yense wa ife capatsika cisomo, monga mwa muyeso wa mphatso ya Kristu." 
Ephesians4:8 Cifukwa cace anena, M'mene anakwera kumwamba, anamanga ndende undende, Naninkha zaufulu kwa anthu." 
Ephesians4:9 Koma ici, cakuti, Anakwera, nciani nanga komakuti anatsikiranso ku madera a kunsi kwa dziko?" 
Ephesians4:10 Iye wotsikayo ndiye yemweyonso anakwera, popitiriratu miyamba yonse, kuti akadzaze zinthu zonse." 
Ephesians4:11 Ndipo Iye anapatsa ena akhale atumwi; ndi enaaneneri; ndi ena alaliki; ndi ena abusa, ndi ena aphunzitsi;" 
Ephesians4:12 kuti akonzere oyera mtima: ku nchito ya utumiki, kumangirira thupi la Kristu;" 
Ephesians4:13 kufikira ife tonse tikafikira ku umodzi wa cikhulupiriro, ndi wa cizindikiritso ca Mwana wa Mulungu, kwa munthu wangwiro, ku muyeso wa msinkhu wa cidzaloca Kristu." 
Ephesians4:14 Kuti tisakhalenso makanda, ogwedezekagwedezeka, natengeka-tengeka ndi mphepo yonse ya ciphunzitso, ndi tsenga la anthu, ndi kucenjerera kukatsata cinyengo ca kusoceretsa;" 
Ephesians4:15 koma ndi kucita zoona mwa cikondi tikakule m'zinthu zonse, kufikira iye amene ali mutu ndiye Kristu;" 
Ephesians4:16 kucokera mwa Iye thupi lonse, lokowanidwa ndi lolumikizidwa pamodzi, pothandizanapo mfundo yonse, monga mwa kucititsa kwa ciwalo conse pa muyeso wace, licita makulidwe a thupi, kufikira cimango cace mwa cikondi." 
Ephesians4:17 Pamenepo ndinena ici, ndipo ndicita umboni mwa Ambuye, kuti simuyendanso inu monganso amitundu angoyenda, m'citsiru ca mtima wao," 
Ephesians4:18 odetsedwam'nzeru zao, oyesedwa alendo pa moyo wa Mulungu, cifukwa ca cipulukiro ciri mwa iwo, cifukwa ca kuumitsa kwa mitima yao;" 
Ephesians4:19 amenewo popeza sazindikiranso kanthu konse, anadzipereka okha kuti akhumbe zonyansa, kuti acite cidetso conse mu umbombo." 
Ephesians4:20 Koma inusimunaphunzira Kristu cotero," 
Ephesians4:21 ngatitu mudamva iye, ndipo munaphunzitsidwa mwa iye, monga coonadi ciri mwa Yesu;" 
Ephesians4:22 kuti mubvule, kunena za makhalidwe anu oyamba, munthu wakale, wobvunda potsata zilakolako za cinyengo;" 
Ephesians4:23 koma kuti 1 mukonzeke, mukhale atsopano mu mzimu wa mtima wanu," 
Ephesians4:24 2 nimubvale munthu watsopano, amene analengedwa monga mwa Mulungu, m'cilungamo, ndi m'ciyero ca coonadi." 
Ephesians4:25 Mwa ici, mutataya zonama, 3 lankhulani zoona yense ndi mnzace; 4 pakuti tiri ziwalo wina ndi mnzace." 
Ephesians4:26 5 Kwiyani, koma musacimwe; dzuwa lisalowe muli cikwiyire," 
Ephesians4:27 ndiponso 6 musampatse malo mdierekezi. 
Ephesians4:28 Wakubayo asabenso; koma 7 makamaka agwiritse nchito, nagwire nchito yokoma ndi manja ace, kuti akhale naco cakucereza wosowa." 
Ephesians4:29 8 Nkhani yonse yobvunda isaturuke m'kamwa mwanu, koma ngati pali yina yabwino kukumangirira monga mofunika ndiyo, 9 kuti ipatse cisomo kwa iwo akumva." 
Ephesians4:30 Ndipo 10 musamvetse cisoni Mzimu Woyera wa Mulungu, amene munasindikizidwa cizindikilo mwa iye, kufikira tsiku la maomboledwe." 
Ephesians4:31 11 Ciwawo conse, ndi kupsya mtima, ndi mkwiyo, ndi ciwawa, ndi mwano zicotsedwe kwa inu, ndiponso coipa conse." 
Ephesians4:32 Koma 12 mukhalirane okoma wina ndi mnzace, a mtima wacifundo, akukhululukirana nokha, 13 monganso Mulungu mwa Kristu anakhululukira inu." 
Ephesians5:1 Cifukwa cace khalani akutsanza a Mulungu, monga ana okondedwa;" 
Ephesians5:2 ndipo yendani m'cikondi monganso Kristu anakukondani inu, nadzipereka yekha m'malo mwathu, copereka ndi nsembe kwa Mulungu, ikhale pfungo lonunkhira bwino." 
Ephesians5:3 Koma dama ndi cidetso conse, kapena cisiriro, zisachulidwe ndi kuchulidwa komwe mwa inu, monga kuyenera oyera mtima;" 
Ephesians5:4 kapena cinyanso, ndi kulankhula zopanda pace, kapena zopusa zimene siziyenera; koma makamaka ciyamiko." 
Ephesians5:5 Pakuti ici mucidziwe kuti wadama yense, kapena wacidetso, kapena wosirira, amene apembedza mafano, alibe colowa m'ufumu wa Kristu ndi Mulungu." 
Ephesians5:6 Asakunyengeni inu munthu ndi mau opanda pace, pakuti cifukwa ca hi umadza mkwiyo wa Mulungu pa ana a kusamvera." 
Ephesians5:7 Cifukwa cace musakhale olandirana nao; 
Ephesians5:8 pakuti kale munali mdima, koma tsopano muli kuunika mwa Ambuye; yendani monga ana a kuunika," 
Ephesians5:9 pakuti cipatso ca kuunika ticipeza m'ubwino wonse, ndi cilungamo, ndi coonadi," 
Ephesians5:10 kuyesera cokondweretsa Ambuye nciani; 
Ephesians5:11 ndipo musayanjane nazo nchito za mdima zosabala kanthu, koma maka-makanso muzitsutse;" 
Ephesians5:12 pakuti zocitidwa nao m'tseri, kungakhale kuzinena kucititsa manyazi." 
Ephesians5:13 Koma zinthu zonse potsutsika ndi kuunika, zionekera; pakuti conse cakuonetsa ciri kuunika." 
Ephesians5:14 Mwa ici anena, Khala maso wogona iwe, nuuke kwa akufa, ndi, po Kristu adzawala pa iwe." 
Ephesians5:15 Potero, penyani bwino umo muyendera, si monga opanda nzeru, koma monga anzeru;" 
Ephesians5:16 akucita macawi, popeza masiku ali oipa," 
Ephesians5:17 Cifukwa cace musakhale opusa, koma dziwitsani cifuniro ca Ambuye nciani." 
Ephesians5:18 Ndipo musaledzere naye vinyo, m'mene muli citayiko; komatu mudzale naye Mzimu," 
Ephesians5:19 ndi kudzilankhulira nokha ndi masalmo, ndi mayamiko, ndi nyimbo zauzimu, kuyimbira ndi kuyimba m'malimba Ambuye mumtima mwanu;" 
Ephesians5:20 ndi kuyamika Mulungu Atate masiku onse, cifukwa ca zonse, m'dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu;" 
Ephesians5:21 ndi kumverana wina ndi mnzace m'kuopa Kristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Akazi Inu, mverani amuna anu ainu eni, monga kumvera Ambuye." 
Ephesians5:23 Pakuti mwamuna ndiye mutu wa mkazi, monganso Kristu ndiye mutu wa Eklesia, ali yekha Mpulumutsi wa thupilo." 
Ephesians5:24 Komatu monga Eklesia amvera Kristu, koteronso akazi amvere amuna ao m'zinthu zonse." 
Ephesians5:25 Amuna inu, kondani akazi anu, monganso Kristu anakonda Eklesia, nadzipereka yekha m'malo mwace;" 
Ephesians5:26 kuti akampatule, atamyeretsa ndi kumsambitsa madzi ndi mau;" 
Ephesians5:27 kutilye akadziikire yekha Eklesia wa ulemerero, wopanda banga, kapena khwinya, kapena kanthu kotere; komatu kuti akhale woyera, ndi wopanda cirema." 
Ephesians5:28 Koteronso amuna azikonda akazi ao a iwo okha monga ngati matupi a iwo okha. Wokonda mkazi wa iye yekha, adzikonda yekha;" 
Ephesians5:29 pakuti munthu sanadana nalo thupi lace ndi kale lonse; komatu alilera nalisunga, monganso Kristu Eklesia;" 
Ephesians5:30 pakuti tiri ziwalo za thupi lace. 
Ephesians5:31 1 Cifukwa ca ici munthu azisiya atate ndi amai, nadzaphatikizana ndi mkazi wace; ndipo iwo awiri adzakhala thupi limodzi." 
Ephesians5:32 Cinsinsi ici ncacikuru; koma ndinena ine za Kristu ndi Eklesia. 
Ephesians5:33 Komanso inu, yense pa yekha, yense akonde mkazi wace wa iye yekha, monga adzikonda yekha; ndipo 2 mkaziyo akumbukile kuti aziopa mwamuna." 
Ephesians6:1 Ananu, mverani akukubalani mwa Ambuye, pakuti ici ncabwino." 
Ephesians6:2 Lemekeza atate wako ndi amako (ndilo lamulo loyamba lokhala nalo lonjezano)," 
Ephesians6:3 kuti kukhale bwino ndi iwe, ndi kuti ukhale wa nthawi yaikuru padziko." 
Ephesians6:4 Ndipo atate inu, musakwiyitse ana anu; komatu muwalere iwo m'maleredwe ndi cilangizo ca Ambuye." 
Ephesians6:5 Akapolo inu, mverani iwo amene ali ambuye anu monga mwa thupi, ndi kuwaopa ndi kunthunthumira nao, ndi mtima wanu wosakumbukila kanthu kena, monga kwa Kristu;" 
Ephesians6:6 si monga mwa ukapolo wa pamaso, monga okondweretsa anthu, komatu monga akapolo a Kristu, akucita cifuniro ca Mulungu cocokera kumtima;" 
Ephesians6:7 akucita ukapolo ndi kubvomereza mtima, monga kutumikira Yesu Kristu, si anthu ai;" 
Ephesians6:8 podziwa kuti cinthu cokoma ciri conse yense acicita, adzambwezera comweci Ambuye, angakhale ali kapolo kapena mfulu." 
Ephesians6:9 Ndipo, ambuye inu, muwacitire zomwezo iwowa, nimuleke kuwaopsa; podziwa kuti Ambuye wao ndi wanu ali m'Mwamba, ndipo palibe tsankhu kwa iye." 
Ephesians6:10 Cotsalira, tadzilimbikani mwa Ambuye, ndi m'kulimba kwa mphamvu yace." 
Ephesians6:11 Tabvalani zida zonse za Mulungu, kuti mudzakhoze kucirimika pokana macenjerero a mdierekezi." 
Ephesians6:12 Cifukwa kuti kulimbana kwathu sitilimbana nao mwazi ndi thupi, komatu nao maukulu, ndi maulamuliro, ndi akucita zolimbika a dziko lapansi a mdima uno, ndi a uzimu a coipa m'zakumwamba." 
Ephesians6:13 Mwa ici mudzitengere zida zonse za Mulungu, kuti mudzakhoza kuima citsutsire pofika tsiku loipa, ndipo, mutacita zonse, mudzacirimika." 
Ephesians6:14 Cifukwa cace cirimikani, mutadzimangira m'cuuno mwanu ndi coonadi, mutabvalanso capacifuwa ca cilungamo;" 
Ephesians6:15 ndipo mutadzibveka mapazi anu ndi makonzedwe a Uthenga Wabwino wa mtendere; 
Ephesians6:16 koposa zonse mutadzitengeranso cikopa ca cikhulupiriro, cimene mudzakhoza kuzima naco mibvi yonse yoyaka moto ya woipayo." 
Ephesians6:17 Mutengenso cisoti ca cipulumutso, ndi lupanga la Mzimu, ndilo Mau a Mulungu;" 
Ephesians6:18 mwa pemphero lonse ndi pembedzero mupemphere nthawi yonse mwa Mzimu, ndipo poeezera pamenepo cicezerere ndi kupembedzera oyera mtima onse," 
Ephesians6:19 ndi ine ndemwe, kuti andipatse mau m'kunditsegulira m'kamwa molimbika, kuti ndizindikiritse anthu cinsinsico ca Uthenga Wabwino," 
Ephesians6:20 cifukwa ca umene 1 ndiri mtumiki wa m'unyolo, kuti m'menemo ndikalankhule molimbika, monga ndiyenera kulankhula." 
Ephesians6:21 Koma 2 kuti mukadziwe inunso za kwa ine, zimene ndicita, zinthu zonse adzakuzindikiritsani Tukiko mbale wokondedwayo, ndi mtumiki wokhulupirika mwa Ambuye;" 
Ephesians6:22 amene ndamtuma kwa inu cifukwa ca icico, kuti mukazindikire za kwa ife, ndi kuti akatonthoze mitima yanu." 
Ephesians6:23 3 Mtendere ukhale kwa abale, ndi cikondi, pamodzi ndi cikhulupiriro, zocokera kwa Mulungu Atate, ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Akhale naco cisomo onse akukonda Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu m'eosaonongeka. 
Philippians1:1 PAULO ndi Timoteo, akapolo a Yesu Kristu, kwa oyera mtima onse mwa Kristu Yesu, akukhala ku Filipi, pamodzi ndi oyang'anira ndi atumiki:" 
Philippians1:2 Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu. 
Philippians1:3 Ndiyamika Mulungu wanga pokumbukira inu ponse; 
Philippians1:4 nthawi zonse m'pembedzero langa lonse la kwa inu nonse ndicita pembedzerolo ndi kukondwera," 
Philippians1:5 cifukwa ca ciyanjano canu cakuthandizira Uthenga Wabwino, kuyambira tsiku loyambalo, kufikira tsopano lino;" 
Philippians1:6 pokhulupira pamenepo, kuti iye amene anayamba mwa inu nchito yabwino, adzaitsiriza kufikira tsiku la Yesu Kristu;" 
Philippians1:7 monga kundiyenera ine kuyesa za inu nonse, popeza ndiri nako m'mtima mwanga, kuti inu m'zomangira zanga, ndipo m'codzikanira, ndi matsimikizidwe a Uthenga Wabwino, inu nonse muli oyanjana nane m'cisomo." 
Philippians1:8 Pakuti Mulungu ali mboni yanga, kuti ndilakalaka inu nonse m'phamphu la mwa Kristu Yesu." 
Philippians1:9 Ndipo ici ndipempha, kuti cikondi canu cisefukire cionjezere, m'cidziwitso, ndi kuzindikira konse;" 
Philippians1:10 kuti mukayese inu zinthu zosiyana; kuti mukakhale a mtima woona ndi wosalakwa, kufikira tsiku la Kristu;" 
Philippians1:11 odzala nacocipatso ca cilungamo cimene ciri mwa Yesu Kristu, kucitira Mulungu ulemerero ndi ciyamiko." 
Philippians1:12 Koma abale, ndifuna kuti muzindikire kuti zija za kwa ine zidacita makamaka kuthandizira Uthenga Wabwino;" 
Philippians1:13 kotero kuti zomangira zanga zinaonekera mwa Kristu m'bwalo lonse da alonda, ndi kwa onse ena;" 
Philippians1:14 ndi kuti unyinji wa abale mwa Ambuye, pokhulupirira m'zomangira zanga, alimbika mtima koposa kulankhula mau a Mulungu opanda mantha." 
Philippians1:15 Enatu alalikiranso Kristu cifukwa ca kaduka ndi ndeu; koma enanso cifukwa ca kukoma mtima; 
Philippians1:16 ena atero ndi cikondi, podziwa kuti anandiika ndicite eokanira ca Uthenga Wabwino;" 
Philippians1:17 koma ena alalikira Kristu mocokera m'cotetana, kosati koona, akuyesa kuti adzandibukitsira cisautso m'zomangira zanga." 
Philippians1:18 Potero nciani? Cokhaco kuti monsemo, ngati pamaso pokha, ngati m'coonadi, Kristu alalikidwa; ndipo m'menemo ndikondwera, komanso ndidzakondwera." 
Philippians1:19 Pakuti ndidziwa kuti ici cidzandicitira ine cipulumutso, mwa pembedzero lanu ndi mwa kundipatsako kwa Mzimu wa Yesu Kristu;" 
Philippians1:20 monga mwa kulingiriritsa ndi ciyembekezo canga, kuti palibe cinthu cidzandicititsa manyazi, komatu mwa kulimbika mtima konse, monga nthawi yonse, tsopanonso Kristu adzakuzidwa m'thupi langa, kapena mwamoyo, kapena mwa imfa." 
Philippians1:21 Pakuti kwa ine kukhala ndi moyo ndiko Kristu, ndi kufa kuli kupindula." 
Philippians1:22 Koma ngati kukhala ndi moyo m'thupi, ndiko cipatso ca nchito yanga, sindizindikiranso cimene ndidzasankha." 
Philippians1:23 Koma ndipanidwa nazo ziwirizi, pokhala naco colakalaka ca kucoka kukhala ndi Kristu, ndiko kwabwino koposa-posatu;" 
Philippians1:24 koma kukhalabe m'thupi ndiko kufunika koposa, cifukwa ca inu." 
Philippians1:25 Ndipo pokhulupirira pamenepo ndidziwa kuti ndidzakhala, ndi kukhalitsa ndi inu nonse, kuonjezeracimwemwe ca cikhulupiriro canu;" 
Philippians1:26 kuti kudzitamandira kwanu kucuruke m'Kristu Yesu mwa ine, mwa kukhalanso ine kwa inu." 
Philippians1:27 Cokhaci, mayendedwe anu ayenere Uthenga Wabwino wa Kristu: kuti, ndingakhale nditi ndirinkudza ndi kuona inu, ndingakhale nditi ndiri kwina, ndikamva za kwa inu, kuti mucirimika mu mzimu umodzi, ndi kugwirira pamodzi ndi moyo umodzi cikhulupiriro ca Uthenga Wabwino;" 
Philippians1:28 osaopa adani m'kanthu konse, cimene ciri kwa iwowa cisonyezo ca cionongeko, koma kwa inu ca cipulumutso, ndico ca kwa Mulungu;" 
Philippians1:29 kuti kwapatsidwa kwa inu kwaufulu cifukwa ca Kristu, si kukhulupirira kwa iye kokha, komatunso kumva zowawa cifukwa ca iye," 
Philippians1:30 ndi kukhala naco inu cilimbano comweci mudaciona mwa ine, nimukumva tsopano ciri mwa ine." 
Philippians2:1 Ngati tsono muli citonthozo mwa Kristu, ngati cikhazikitso ca cikondi, ngati ciyanjano ca Mzimu, ngati phamphu, ndi zisoni," 
Philippians2:2 kwaniritsani cimwemwe canga, kuti mukalingalire mtima zomwezo, akukhala naco cikondi comwe, a moyo umodzi, olingalira mtima umodzi;" 
Philippians2:3 musacite kanthu monga mwa cotetana, kapena monga mwa ulemerero wopanda pace, komatu ndi kudzicepetsa mtima, yense ayese anzace omposa iye mwini;" 
Philippians2:4 munthu yense asapenyerere zace za iye yekha, koma yense apenyererenso za mnzaceo" 
Philippians2:5 Mukhale nao mtima m'kati mwanu umene unalinso mwa Kristu Yesu," 
Philippians2:6 ameneyo, pokhala nao maonekedwe a Mulungu, sanaciyesa colanda kukhala wofana ndi Mulungu," 
Philippians2:7 koma anadzikhuthula yekha, natenga maonekedwe akapolo, nakhala m'mafanizidwe a anthu;" 
Philippians2:8 ndipo popezedwa m'maonekedwe ngati munthu, anadzicepetsa yekha, nakhala womvera kufikira imfa, ndiyo imfa ya pamtanda." 
Philippians2:9 Mwa icinso Mulungu anamkwezetsa iye, nampatsa dzina limene liposa maina onse," 
Philippians2:10 kuti m'dzina la Yesu bondo liri lonse lipinde, la za m'mwamba ndi za padziko, ndi za pansi pa dziko," 
Philippians2:11 ndi malilime onse abvomere kuti Yesu Kristu ali Ambuye, kucitira ulemu Mulungu Atate." 
Philippians2:12 Potero, okondedwa anga, monga momwe mumvera nthawi zonse, posati pokha pokha pokhala ine ndiripo, komatu makamaka tsopano pokhala ine palibe, gwirani nchito yace ya cipulumutso canu ndi mantha, ndi kunthunthumira;" 
Philippians2:13 pakuti wakucita mwa inu kufuna ndi kucita komwe, cifukwa ca kukoma mtima kwace, ndiye Mulungu," 
Philippians2:14 Citani zonse kopanda madandaulo ndi makani," 
Philippians2:15 kuti mukakhale osalakwa ndi oona, ana a Mulungu opanda cirema pakati pa mbadwo wokhotakhota ndi wopotoka, mwa iwo amene muonekera monga mauniko m'dziko lapansi," 
Philippians2:16 akuonetsera mau a movo; kuti ine ndikakhale wakudzitamandira: nao m'tsiku la Kristu, kuti sindinathamanga cabe, kapena kugwiritsa nchito cabe." 
Philippians2:17 Komatu ngatinso ndithiridwa pa nsembe ndi kutumikira kwa cikhulupiriro canu, ndikondwera, ndipo ndikondwera pamodzi ndi inu nonse;" 
Philippians2:18 momwemonso kondwerani inu, nimukondwere pamodzi ndi ine." 
Philippians2:19 Koma ndiyembekeza mwa Ambuye Yesu kuti ndidzatumiza Timoteo kwa inu msanga, kuti inenso nditonthozeke bwino pozindikira za kwa inu." 
Philippians2:20 Pakuti ndiribe wina wa mtima womwewo, amene adza: samalira za kwa inu ndi mtima woona." 
Philippians2:21 Pakuti onsewa atsata za iwo okha, si za Yesu Kristu." 
Philippians2:22 Koma muzindikira matsimikizidwe ace, kuti, monga mwana acitira atate wace, anatumikira pamodzi ndi ine Uthenga Wabwino." 
Philippians2:23 Ameneyo ndithu tsono ndiyembekeza kumtuma posacedwa m'mene ndikapenyerera za kwa ine zidzatani; 
Philippians2:24 koma ndikhulupirira mwa Ambuye kuti ine ndekhanso ndidzadza msanga. 
Philippians2:25 Koma ndinayesa nkufunika kutuma kwa inu Epafrodito mbaleyo, ndiye wanchito mnzanga ndi msilikari mnzanga, ndiye mtumwi wanu, ndi wonditumikira pa cosowa canga;" 
Philippians2:26 popeza anali wolakalaka inu nonse, nabvutika mtima cifukwa mudamva kuti anadwala." 
Philippians2:27 Pakutinso anadwaladi pafupi imfa; komatu Mulungu anamcitira cifundo; koma si iye yekha, komatu inenso, kuti ndisakhale naco cisoni cionjezere-onjezere." 
Philippians2:28 Cifukwa cace ndamtuma iye cifulumizire, kuti pakumuona mukakondwerenso, ndi inenso cindicepere cisoni." 
Philippians2:29 Cifukwa cace mumlandire mwa Ambuye, ndi cimwemweconse; nimucitire ulemu oterewa;" 
Philippians2:30 pakuti cifukwa lea nchito ya Kristu anafikira pafupi imfa, wosasamalira moyo wace, kuti z akakwaniritse ciperewero ca utumiki wanu wa kwa ine." 
Philippians3:1 Cotsalira, abale anga, kondwerani mwa Ambuye. Kulembera zomwezo kwa inu, sikundibvuta ine, koma kwa inu kuli kukhazikitsa." 
Philippians3:2 Penyererani agaru, penyererani ocita zoipa, penyererani coduladula;" 
Philippians3:3 pakuti ife ndife mdulidwe, akutumikira popembedza ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu, nadzitamandira mwa Yesu Kristu, osakhulupirira m'thupi;" 
Philippians3:4 ndingakhale inenso ndiri nako kakukhulupirira m'thupi; ngati wina yense ayesa kukhulupirira m'thupi, makamaka ineyu;" 
Philippians3:5 wodulidwa tsiku lacisanu ndi citatu, wa mbadwo wa Israyeli, wa pfuko la Benjamini, Mhebri wa mwa Ahebri; monga mwa lamulo, Mfarisi;" 
Philippians3:6 monga mwa cangu, wolondalonda Eklesia; monga mwa cilungamo ca m'lamulo wokhala wosalakwa ine." 
Philippians3:7 Komatu zonse zimene zinandipindulira, zomwezo ndinaziyesa citayiko cifukwa ca Kristu." 
Philippians3:8 Komatu zeni zeninso ndiyesa zonse zikhale citayiko cifukwa ca mapambanidwe a cizindikiritso ca Kristu Yesu Ambuye wanga, cifukwa ca Iyeyu ndinatayikitsa zinthu zonse, ndipo ndiziyesa zapadzala, kuti ndikadzionjezere Kristu," 
Philippians3:9 ndi kupezedwa mwa iye, wosati wakukhala naco cilungamo canga ca m'lamulo, koma cimene ca mwa cikhulupiriro ca Kristu, cilungamoco cocokera mwa Mulungu ndi cikhulupiriro;" 
Philippians3:10 kuti ndimzindikire iye, ndi mphamvu ya kuuka kwace, ndi ciyanjano ca zowawa zace, pofanizidwa ndi imfa yace;" 
Philippians3:11 ngati nkotheka ndikafikire kuuka kwa akufa. 
Philippians3:12 Si kunena kuti ndinalandira kale, kapena kuti ndatha kukonzeka wamphumphu; koma ndilondetsa, ngatinso ndikacigwire ici cimene anandigwirira Yesu Kristu." 
Philippians3:13 Abale, ine sindiwerengera ndekha kuti ndatha kucigwira: koma cinthu cimodzi ndicicita; poiwaladi zam'mbuyo, ndi kutambalitsira zam'tsogolo," 
Philippians3:14 ndilondetsa polekezerapo, kutsatira mfupo wa maitanidwe akumwamba a Mulungu a mwa Kristu Yesu." 
Philippians3:15 Tonsefe amene tsono tidakonzeka amphumphu, tilingirire ici mumtima; ndipo ngati kuli kanthu mulingirira nako kwina mumtima, akanso Mulungu adzabvumbulutsira inu;" 
Philippians3:16 cokhaci, kumene tidafikirako, mayendedwe athu alinganeko." 
Philippians3:17 Abale khalani pamodzi akutsanza anga, ndipo yang'anirani iwo akuyenda kotero monga muli ndi ife citsanzo canu." 
Philippians3:18 Pakuti ambiri amayenda, za amene ndinakuuzani kawiri kawiri, ndipo tsopanonso ndikuuzani ndi kulira, ali adani a mtanda wa Kristu;" 
Philippians3:19 citsiriziro cao ndico kuonongeka, mulungu wao ndiyo niimba yao, ulemerero wao uli m'manyazi ao, amenealingirira za padziko." 
Philippians3:20 Pakuti ufulu wathu uli Kumwamba; z kucokera komwenso tilindirira Mpulumutsi, Ambuye Yesu Kristu;" 
Philippians3:21 amene adzasanduliza thupi lathu lopepulidwa, lifanane nalo thupi lace la ulemerero, monga mwa macitidwe amene akhoza kudzigonjetsera nao zinthu zonse." 
Philippians4:1 Potero, abale anga okondedwa, olakalakidwa, ndinu cimwemwe canga ndikorona wanga, cirimikani motere mwa Ambuye, okondedwa." 
Philippians4:2 Ndidandaulira Euodiya, ndidandaulira Suntuke, alingirire ndi mtima umodzi mwa Ambuye." 
Philippians4:3 Inde, ndikupemphaninso, mnzanga wa m'goli woona, muthandize akazi awa amene anakangalika nane pamodzi mu Uthenga Wabwino, pamodzi ndi Klementonso, ndi otsala aja anchito anzanga, amene maina ao ali m'buku la moyo." 
Philippians4:4 Kondwerani mwa Ambuye nthawi zonse: ndibwerezanso kutero, kondwerani." 
Philippians4:5 Kufatsa kwanu kuzindikirike ndi anthu onse. Ambuye ali pafupi. 
Philippians4:6 Musadere nkhawa konse; komatu m'zonse ndi pemphero, ndi pembedzero, pamodzi ndi ciyamiko, zopempha zanu zidziwike kwa Mulungu." 
Philippians4:7 Ndipo mtendere wa Mulungu wakupambana cidziwitso conse, udzasunga mitima yanu ndi maganizo anu mwa Kristu Yesu." 
Philippians4:8 Cotsalira, abale, zinthu ziri zonse zoona, ziri zonse zolemekezeka, ziri zonse zolungama, ziri zonse zoyera, ziri zonse zokongola, ziri zonse zimveka zokoma; ngati kuli cokoma mtima cina, kapena citamando cina, zilingirireni izi." 
Philippians4:9 Zimenenso mudaziphunzira, ndi kuzilandira, ndi kuzimva, ndi kuziona mwa ine, zomwezo citani; ndipo Mulungu wa mtendere adzakhala pamodzi ndi inu." 
Philippians4:10 Koma ndinakondwera mwa Ambuye kwakukuru, kuti tsopano munatsitsimukanso kulingirira mtima za kwa ine, kumenekonso munalingirirako, koma munasowa pocitapo." 
Philippians4:11 Si kuti ndinena monga mwa ciperewero, pakuti ndaphunzira ine, kuti zindikwanire ziri zonse ndiri nazo." 
Philippians4:12 Ndadziwa ngakhale kupeputsidwa, ndadziwanso kusefukira; konseko ndi m'zinthu zonse ndalowa mwambo wakukhuta, ndiponso wakumva njala; wakusefukira, ndiponso wakusowa." 
Philippians4:13 Ndikhoza zonse mwa iye wondipatsa mphamvuyo. 
Philippians4:14 Koma munacita bwino kuti munayanjana nane m'cisautso canga. 
Philippians4:15 Koma mudziwanso inu nokha, inu Afilipi, kuti m'ciyambi ca Uthenga Wabwino, pamene ndinacoka kuturuka m'Makedoniya, sunayanjana nane Mpingo umodzi wonse m'makhalidwe a copereka ndi colandira; koma inu nokha;" 
Philippians4:16 pakuti m'Tesalonikanso munanditumizira pa cosowa canga kamodzi kapena kawiri. 
Philippians4:17 Sikunena kuti nditsata coperekaco, komatu nditsata cipatsocakucurukira ku ciwerengero canu." 
Philippians4:18 Koma ndiri nazo zonse, ndipo ndisefukira; ndadzazidwa, popeza ndalandira kwa Epafrodito zija zidacokera kwanu, mnunkho wa pfungo labwino, nsembe yolandirika, yokondweretsa Mulungu." 
Philippians4:19 Koma Mulungu wanga adzakwaniritsa cosowa canu ciri conse monga mwa cuma cace m'ulemerero mwa Kristu Yesu. 
Philippians4:20 Ndipo kwa Mulungu ndi Atate wathu kukhale ulemerero ku nthawi za nthawi, Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Lankhulani woyera mtima ali yense mwa Kristu Yesu. Abalewo akukhala ndiine alankhula inu. 
Philippians4:22 Oyera mtima onse alankhula inu, koma makamaka-fwo a banja la Kaisara." 
Philippians4:23 Cisomo ca Ambuye Yesu Kristu cikhale ndi mzimu wanu. 
Colossians1:1 PAULO, mtumwi wa Kristu Yesu mwa cifuniro ca Mulungu, ndi Timoteo mbaleyo," 
Colossians1:2 kwa oyera mtima ndi abale okhulupirika mwa Kristu a m'Kolose: Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere wocokera kwa Mulungu Atate wathu. 
Colossians1:3 Tiyamika Mulungu Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu ndi kupempherera Inu nthawi zonse," 
Colossians1:4 popeza tidamva za cikhulupiriro canu ca mwa Kristu Yesu, ndi cikondi muli naco kwa oyera mtima onse;" 
Colossians1:5 cifukwa ca ciyembekezo cosungikira kwa inu m'Mwamba, cimene mudacimva kale m'mau a coonadi ca Uthenga Wabwino," 
Colossians1:6 umene udafikira kwa inu; monganso m'dziko lonse lapansi umabala zipatso, numakula, monganso mwa inu; kuyambira tsikulo mudamva nimunazindildra cisomo ca Mulungu m'coonadi;"
