Colossians1:7 monga momwe munaphunzira kwa Epafra kapolo mnzathu wokondedwa, ndiyemtumiki wokhulupirika wa Kristu cifukwa ca ife;" 
Colossians1:8 amenenso anatifotokozera cikondi canu mwa Mzimu. 
Colossians1:9 Mwa ici ifenso, kuyambira tsiku limene tidamva, sitileka kupembedzera ndi kupempherera inu, kuti mukadzazidwe ndi cizindikiritso ca cifuniro cace mu nzeru zonse ndi cidziwitso ca mzimu," 
Colossians1:10 kuti mukayende koyenera Ambuye kukamkondweretsa monsemo, ndi kubala zipatso mu nchito yonse yabwino, ndi kukula m'cizindikiritso ca Mulungu;" 
Colossians1:11 olimbikitsidwa m'cilimbiko conse, monga mwa mphamvu ya ulemerero wace, kucitira cipiriro conse ndi kuleza mtima konse pamodzi ndi cimwemwe," 
Colossians1:12 ndi kuyamika Atate, amene anatiyeneretsa ife kulandirana nao colowa ca oyera mtima m'kuunika;" 
Colossians1:13 amene anatilanditsa ife ku ulamuliro wa mdima, natisunthitsa kutilowetsa m'ufumu wa Mwana wa cikondi cace;" 
Colossians1:14 amene tiri nao maomboledwe mwa iye, m'kukhululukidwa kwa zocimwa zathu;" 
Colossians1:15 amene ali fanizo la Mulungu wosaonekayo, wobadwa woyamba wa cilengedwe conse;" 
Colossians1:16 pakuti mwa iye, zinalengedwa zonse za m'mwamba, ndi za padziko, zooneka ndi zosaonekazo, kapena mipando yacifumu, kapena maufumu, kapena maukulu, kapena maulamuliro; zinthu zonse zinalengedwa mwa iye ndi kwa iye." 
Colossians1:17 Ndipo iye ali woyamba wa zonse, ndipo zonse zigwirizana pamodzi mwa iye." 
Colossians1:18 Ndipo iye ali mutu wa thupi, Eklesiayo; ndiye ciyambi, wobadwa woyamba woturuka mwa akufa; kuti akakhale iye mwa zonse woyambayamba." 
Colossians1:19 Pakuti kunamkomera Atate kuti mwa iye cidzalo conse cikhalire," 
Colossians1:20 mwa Iyenso kuyanjanitsa zinthu zonse kwa iye mwini, atacita mtendere mwa mwazi wa mtanda wace; mwa Iyetu, kapena za padziko, kapena za m'mwamba." 
Colossians1:21 Ndipo inu, okhala alendo kale ndi adani m'cifuwa canu m'nchito zoipazo, koma tsopano anakuyanjanitsani" 
Colossians1:22 m'thupi lace mwa imfayo, kukaimika inu oyera, ndi opanda cirema ndi osatsutsika pamaso pace;" 
Colossians1:23 ngatitu mukhalabe m'cikhulupiriro, ocirimika ndi okhazikika ndi osasunthika kulekana naco ciyembekezo ca Uthenga Wabwino umene mudaumva, wolalikidwa colengedwa conse ca pansi pa thambo; umene ine Paulo ndakhala mtumiki wace." 
Colossians1:24 Tsopano 1 ndikondwera nazo zowawazo cifukwa ca inu, ndipo 2 ndikwaniritsa zoperewera za cisautso ca Kristu m'thupi langa 3 cifukwa ca thupi lace, ndilo Eklesiayo;" 
Colossians1:25 amene ndinakhala mtumiki wace, 4 monga mwa udindo wa Mulungu umene anandipatsa ine wakucitira inti, wakukwaniritsa mau a Mulungu," 
Colossians1:26 5 ndiwo cinsinsico cinabisika kuyambira pa nthawizo, ndi kuyambira pa mibadwoyo; koma anacionetsa tsopano kwa oyera mtima ace," 
Colossians1:27 kwa iwo amene Mulungu anafuna kuwazindikiritsa ici 6 cimene ciri cuma ca ulemerero wa cinsinsi pakati pa amitundu, ndiye Kristu mwa inu, ciyembekezo ca ulemerero;" 
Colossians1:28 amene timlalikira ife, ndi kucenjeza munthu ali yense 7 ndi kuphunzitsa munthu ali yense mu nzeru zonse, 8 kuti tionetsere munthu ali yense wamphumphu mwa Kristu;" 
Colossians1:29 kucita ici ndidzibvutitsa ndi kuyesetsa 9 monga mwa macitidwe ace akucita mwa ine ndi mphamvu. 
Colossians2:1 Pakuti ndifuna kuti inu mudziwe nkhawa imene ndiri nayo cifukwa ca inu, ndi iwowa a m'Laodikaya, ndi onse amene sanaone nkhope yanga m'thupi;" 
Colossians2:2 kuti itonthozeke mitima yao, nalumikizike pamodzi iwo m'cikondi, kufikira cuma conse ca cidzalo ca cidziwitso, kuti akazindikire Iwo cinsinsi ca Mulungu, ndiye Kristu," 
Colossians2:3 amene zolemera zonseza nzeru ndi cidziwitso zibisika mwa iye. 
Colossians2:4 Ici ndinena, kuti munthu asakusokeretseni inu ndi mau okopakopa." 
Colossians2:5 Pakuti ndingakhale ndiri kwina m'thupi, komatu mumzimu ndiri pamodzi ndi inu, wokondwera pakupenya makonzedwe anu, ndi cilimbiko ca cikhulupiriro canu ca kwa Kristu." 
Colossians2:6 Cifukwa cace monga momwe munalandira Kristu Yesu Ambuye, muyende mwa iye," 
Colossians2:7 ozika mizu ndi omangirika mwa iye, ndi okhazikika m'cikhulupiriro, monga munaphunzitsidwa, ndi kucurukitsa ciiyamiko." 
Colossians2:8 Penyani kuti pasakhale wina wakulanda inu ngati cuma, mwa kukonda nzeru kwace, ndi cinyengo copanda pace, potsata mwambo wa anthu, potsata zoyamba za dziko lapansi, osati potsata Kristu;" 
Colossians2:9 pakuti mwa iye cikhalira cidzalo ca Umulungu m'thupi," 
Colossians2:10 ndipo muli odzazidwa mwa iye, ndiye mutu wa ukulu wonse ndi ulamuliro;" 
Colossians2:11 amenenso munadulidwa mwa iye ndi mdulidwe wosacitika ndi manja, m'mabvulidwe a thupi, mu mdulidwe wa Kristu;" 
Colossians2:12 popeza munaikidwa m'manda pamodzi ndi iye muubatizo, momwemonso munaukitsidwa pamodzindi iye m'cikhulupiriro ca macitidwe a Mulungu, amene anamuukitsa iye kwa akufa." 
Colossians2:13 Ndipo inu, pokhala akufa m'zolakwa ndi kusadulidwa kwa thupi lanu, anakupatsani moyo pamodzi ndi iye, m'mene adatikhululukira ife zolakwa zonse;" 
Colossians2:14 adatha kutifafanizira ca pa ifeco colembedwa m'zoikikazo, cimene cinali cotsutsana nafe; ndipo anacicotsera pakatipo, ndi kucikhomera ici pamtanda;" 
Colossians2:15 atabvula maukulu ndi maulamuliro, anawaonetsera poyera, nawagonjetsera nako." 
Colossians2:16 Cifukwa cace munthu aliyense asakuweruzeni inu m'cakudya, kapena cakumwa, kapena m'kunena tsiku la phwando, kapena tsiku lokhala mwezi, kapena la Sabata;" 
Colossians2:17 ndizo mthunzi wa zirinkudzazo; koma thupi ndi la Kristu. 
Colossians2:18 Munthu ali yense asakunyengeni ndi kulanda mphotho yanu ndi kudzicepetsa mwini wace, ndikugwadira kwa angelo, ndi kukhalira mu izi adaziona, wodzitukumula cabe ndi zolingalira za thupi lace, wosagwiritsa mutuwo," 
Colossians2:19 kucokera kwa iye amene thupi lonse, lothandizidwa ndi kulumikizidwa pamodzi mwa mfundo ndi mitsempa, likula ndi makulidwe a Mulungu." 
Colossians2:20 Ngati munafa pamodzi ndi Kristu kusiyana nazo zoyambaza dziko lapansi, mugonieranii ku zoikikazo, monga ngati moyo wanu mukhala nao m'dziko lapansi," 
Colossians2:21 usaikapo dzanja, usalawa, usakhudza," 
Colossians2:22 (ndizo zonse zakuonongedwa pocita nazo), monga mwa malangizo ndi maphunziro a anthu?" 
Colossians2:23 zimene ziri naotu manenedwe a nzeru m'kutumikira kwa cifuniro ca mwini wace, ndi kudzicepetsa, ndi kusalabadira thupi; koma ziribe mphamvu konse yakuletsa cikhutitso ca thupi." 
Colossians3:1 Cifukwa cace ngati munaukitsidwa pamodzi ndi Kristu, funani zakumwamba, kumene kuli Kristu wokhala pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu." 
Colossians3:2 Lingalirani zakumwamba osati za padziko ai. 
Colossians3:3 Pakuti munafa, ndipo moyo wanu wabisika pamodzi ndi Kristu mwa Mulungu," 
Colossians3:4 Pamene Kristu adzaoneka, ndiye moyo wathu, pamenepo inunso mudzaonekera pamodzi ndi iye m'ulemerero." 
Colossians3:5 Cifukwa cace fetsani ziwalozo ziri padziko; dama, cidetso, cifunitso ca manyazi, cilakolako coipa, nelicisiriro, cimene ciri kupembedza mafano;" 
Colossians3:6 cifukwa ca izi zomwe ukudza mkwiyo wa Mulungu pa ana a kusamvera; 
Colossians3:7 zimene munayendamo inunso kale, pamene munakhala ndi moyo wanu m'menemo," 
Colossians3:8 Koma tsopano tayani inunso zonsezi: mkwiyo, kupsa mtima, dumbo, mwano, zonyansa zoturuka m'kamwa mwanu:" 
Colossians3:9 musamanamizana wina ndi mnzace; popeza mudabvula munthu wakale pamodzi ndi nchito zace," 
Colossians3:10 ndipo munabvala watsopano, amene alikukonzekawatsopano, kuti akhale naco cizindikiritso, mousa mwa cifaniziro ca iye amene anamlenga iye;" 
Colossians3:11 pamene palibe Mhelene ndi Ayuda, mdulidwe ndi kusadulidwa, wachedwa wakunja, Mskuti, kapolo, mfulu, komatu Kristu ndiye zonse, ndi m'zonse." 
Colossians3:12 Cifukwa cace bvalani, monga osankhika a Mulungu, oyera mtima ndi okondedwa, mtima wacifundo, kukoma mtima, kudzicepetsa, cifatso, kuleza mtima;" 
Colossians3:13 kulolerana wina ndi mnzace, ndi kukhululukirana eni okha, ngati wina ali naco cifukwa pa mnzace; monganso Ambuye anakhululukira inu, teroni inunso;" 
Colossians3:14 koma koposa izi zonse khalani naco cikondano, ndico comangira ca mtima wamphumphu." 
Colossians3:15 Ndipo mtendere wa Kristu ucite ufumu m'mitima yanu, kulingakonso munaitanidwa m'thupi limodzi; ndipo khalani akuyamika." 
Colossians3:16 Mau a Knstu akhalitse mwa inu cicurukire mu nzeru yonse, ndi kuphunzitsa ndi kuyambirirana eni okha ndi masalmo, ndimayamiko ndi nyimbo zauzimu, ndi kuyimbira Mulungu ndi cisomo mumtima mwanu." 
Colossians3:17 Ndipo ciri conse mukacicita m'mau kapena muncbito, citani zonse m'dzina la Ambuye Yesu, ndi kuyamika Mulungu Atate mwa iye." 
Colossians3:18 Akazi inu, muzimvera amuna anu, monga kuyenera mwa Ambuye." 
Colossians3:19 Amuna inu, kondani akazi anu, ndipo musawawire mtima iwo." 
Colossians3:20 Ana inu, mverani akubala inu m'zonse, pakuti ici Ambuye akondwera naco." 
Colossians3:21 Atate inu, musaputa ana anu, kuti angataye mtima." 
Colossians3:22 Akapolo inu, mverani m'zonse iwo amene ali ambuye monga mwa thupi, wosati ukapolo wa pamaso, monga okondweretsa anthu, komatu ndi mtima wakulinga kumodzi, akuopa Ambuye;" 
Colossians3:23 ciri conse mukacicita, gwirani nchito mocokera mumtima, monga kwa Ambuye, osati kwa anthu ai;" 
Colossians3:24 podziwa kuti mudzalandira kwa Ambuye mphotho ya colowa; mutumikira Ambuye Kristu mwaukapolo. 
Colossians3:25 Pakuti iye wakucita cosalungama adzalandiranso cosalungama anaeitaco; ndipo 1 palibe tsankhu. 
Colossians4:1 Ambuye inu, citirani akapolo anu colungama ndi colingana; podziwa kuti inunso muli naye Mbuye m'Mwamba." 
Colossians4:2 Citani khama m'kupemphera, nimudikire momwemo ndi ciyamiko;" 
Colossians4:3 ndi kutipempherera ifenso pomwepo, kuti Mulungu atitsegulire ife pakhomo pa mau, kuti tilankhule cinsinsi ca Kristu; cimenenso ndikhalira m'ndende," 
Colossians4:4 kuti ndicionetse ici monga ndiyenera kulankhula. 
Colossians4:5 Muyendere munzeru ndi iwo akunja, kucita macawi nthawi ingatayike." 
Colossians4:6 Mau anu akhale m'cisomo, okoleretsa, kuti mukadziwe inu mayankhidwe anu a kwa yense akarani." 
Colossians4:7 Zonse za kwa ine adzakuzindikiritsani Tukiko, mbale wokondedwa ndi mtumiki wokhulupirika ndi kapolo mnzanga mwa Ambuye:" 
Colossians4:8 amene ndamtuma kwa inu cifukwa ca ici comwe, kuti mukazindikire za kwa ife, ndi kuti atonthoze mitima yanu;" 
Colossians4:9 pamodzi ndi Onesimo, mbale wokhulupirika ndi wokondedwa, amene ali wa kwa inu. Zonse za kuno adzakuzindikiritsani inu." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarko wam'ndende mnzanga akulankhulani inu ndi Marko, msuwani wa Bamaba (amene munalandira zolamulira za kwa iye; akafika kwanu, mumlandire iye)," 
Colossians4:10 Aristarko wam'ndende mnzanga akulankhulani inu ndi Marko, msuwani wa Bamaba (amene munalandira zolamulira za kwa iye; akafika kwanu, mumlandire iye)," 
Colossians4:11 ndi Yesu, wochedwa Yusto, ndiwo a mdulidwe; iwo okha ndiwo anchito anzanga a mu Ufumu wa Mulungu, ndiwo akundikhalira ine conditonthoza mtima." 
Colossians4:12 Akulankhulani inu Epafra ndiye wa kwa inu ndiye kapolo wa Yesu Kristu, wakulimbira cifukwa ca inu m'mapemphero ace znasiku onse, kuti mukaime amphumphu ndi odzazidwa m'cifuniro conse ca Mulungu." 
Colossians4:13 Pakuti ndimcitira iye umboni kuti adziwawitsa nayo nchito cifukwa ca inu, ndi iwo a m'Laodikaya, ndi iwo a m'Herapoli." 
Colossians4:14 Akulankhulani inu Luka sing'anga wokondedwa, ndi Dema." 
Colossians4:15 Lankhulani abalewo a m'Laodikaya, ndi Numfa, ndi Mpingowo wa m'nyumba yao." 
Colossians4:16 Ndipo pamene mudamwerenga kalata uyu, amwerengenso mu Mpingo wa ku Laodikaya, ndi inunso muwerenge wa ku Laodikaya," 
Colossians4:17 Ndipo nenani kwa Arkipo, Samaliratu utumiki umene udaulandira mwa Ambuye, kuti uukwanitse." 
Colossians4:18 Kulankhula ndi dzanja langa, kwa ine Paulo. Kumbukilani zoo mangira zanga, Cisomo cikhale nanu." 
1Thessalonians1:1 PAULO, ndi Silvano, ndi Timoteo, kwa Mpingo wa Atesalonika mwa Mulungu Atate ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu: Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Tiyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse cifukwa ca inu nonse, ndi kukumbukila inu m'mapemphero athu;" 
1Thessalonians1:3 ndi kukumbukila kosalekeza nchito yanu ya cikhulupiriro, ndi cikondi cocitacita, ndi cipiriro ca ciyembekezo ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, pamaso pa Mulungu Atate wathu;" 
1Thessalonians1:4 podziwa, abale okondedwa ndi Mulungu, cisankhidwe canu," 
1Thessalonians1:5 kuti Vthenga Wabwino wathu sunadza kwa inu m'mau mokha, komatunso mumphamvu, ndi mwa Mzimu Woyera, ndi m'kucuruka kwakukuru; monga mudziwa tinakhala onga otani mwa inu cifukwa ca inu." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Ndipo munayamba kukhala akutsanza athu, ndi a Ambuye, m'mene mudalandira mauwo m'cisautso cambiri, ndi cimwemwe ca Mzimu Woyera;" 
1Thessalonians1:7 kotero kuti munayamba kukhala inu citsanzo kwa onse akukhulupira m'Makedoniya ndi m'Akaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Pakuti kuturuka kwa inu kudamveka mau a Ambuye, osati m'Makedoniya ndi Akaya mokha, komatu m'malo monse cikhulupiriro canu ca kwa Mulungu cidaturuka; kotero kuti sikufunika kwa ife kulankhula kanthu." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Pakuti iwo okha alalikira za ife, malowedwe athu a kwa inu anali otani; ndi kuti munatembeoukira kwa Mulungu posiyana nao mafano, kutumikira Mulungu weni weni wamoyo," 
1Thessalonians1:10 ndi kulindirira Mwana wace acokere Kumwamba, amene anamuukitsa kwa akufa, Yesu, wotipulumutsa ife ku mkwiyo ulinkudza." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Pakuti, abale, mudziwa nokha malowedwe athu a kwa inu, kuti sanakhala opanda pace;" 
1Thessalonians2:2 koma tingakhale tidamva zowawa kale, ndipo anaticitira cipongwe, monga mudziwa, ku Filipi, tinalimbika pakamwa mwa Mulungu wathu kulankhula ndi inu Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu m'kutsutsana kwambiri." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Pakuti kudandaulira kwathu sikucokera kukusocera, kapena kucidetso, kapena m'dnyengo;" 
1Thessalonians2:4 komatu monga Mulungu anatibvomereza kutiikiza Uthenga Wabwino, kotero tilankhula; osati monga okondweretsa anthu, koma Mulungu; amene ayesa mitima yathu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Pakuti sitinayenda nao mau osyasyalika nthawi iri yonse, monga mudziwa, kapena kupsiniira msiriro, mboni ndi Mulungu;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 kapena sitinakhala ofuna ulemerero wa kwa anthu, kapena kwa inu, kapena kwa ena, tingakhale tinali nayo mphamvu yakukulemetsanl monga atumwi a Kristu." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Komatu tinakhala ofat sa pakati pa inu, monga m'mene mlezi afukata ana ace a iye yekha;" 
1Thessalonians2:8 kotero ife poliralira inu, tinabvomera mokondwera kupereka kwa inu si Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu wokha, komanso moyo wathu, popeza mudakhala okondedwa kwa ife." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Pakuti mukumbukila, abale, cigwiritso cathu ndi cibvuto cathu; pocita usiku ndi usana, kuti tingalemetse wina wa inu, tinalalikira kwa inu Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Inu ndinu mboni, Mulungunso, kuti tinakhala oyera mtima ndi olungama ndi osalakwa kwa inu akukhulupirira;" 
1Thessalonians2:11 monga mudziwa kuti tinacitira yense wa inu pa yekha, monga atate acitira ana ace a iye yekha, ndi kukudandaulirani, ndi kukusangalatsani ndi kucita umboni," 
1Thessalonians2:12 kuti muyende koyenera Mulungu, amene akuitanani inu mulowe ufumu wace wa iye yekha, ndi ulemerero." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ndipo mwa icinso ife tiyamika Mulungu kosalekeza, kuti, pakulandira mau a Uthenga wa Mulungu, simunawalandira monga mau a anthu, komatu monga momwe ali ndithu, mau a Mulungu, amenenso acita mwa inuokhulupirira." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Pakuti inu, abale, munayamba kukhala akutsanza a Mipingo ya Mulungu yokhala m'Yudeya mwa Kristu Yesu; popeza zomwezi mudazimva kowawa nelinunso pamanja pa a mtundu wanu wa inu nokha, monganso iwowapa manja a Ayuda;" 
1Thessalonians2:15 amene adaphanso Ambuye Yesu, ndi aneneri, natilondalonda ife, ndipo sakondweretsa Mulungu, natsutsana nao anthu onse;" 
1Thessalonians2:16 natiletsa ife kuti tisalankhule ndi akunja kuti apulumutsidwe; kudzaza macimo ao nthawi zonse; koma mkwiyo wafika pa iwo kufikira cimariziro. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Koma ife, abale, angakhale adaticotsa kusiyana nanu kanthawi, osapenyana maso, koma kusiyana mtima ai, tinayesetsa koposa kuona nkhope yanu ndi cilakolako cacikuru;" 
1Thessalonians2:18 cifukwa tinafuna kudza kwa inu, inedi Paulo ndatero kamodzi kapena kawiri; koma Satana anatiletsa." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Pakuti ciyembekezo cathu, kapena cimwemwe, kapena korona wakudzitamandira naye nciani? si ndinu nanga pamaso pa Ambuye wathu Yesu m'kufika kwace?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Pakuti inu ndinu ulemerero wathu ndi cimwemwe cathu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Cifukwa cace, posakhoza kulekereranso, tidabvomereza mtima atisiye tokhaku Atene;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 ndipo tinatuma Timoteo, mbale wathuyo ndi mtumiki wa Mulungu m'Uthenga Wabwino wa Kristu, kuti akhazikitse inu; ndi kutonthoza inu za cikhulupiriro canu;" 
1Thessalonians3:3 kuti asasunthike wina ndi zisautso izi, pakuti mudziwa nokha kuti adatiika ife ticite izi." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Pakutinso, pamenetinali ndi inu tinakuuziranitu kuti tidzamva zisautso; monga kudacitika, monganso mudziwa." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Mwa ici inenso, posalekereranso, ndinatuma kukazindikira cikhulupiriro canu, kuti kaperta: woyesa akadakuyesani, ndipo cibvuto cathu cikadakhala copanda pace." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Koma tsopano pofika Timoteo kwathu kucokera kwa inu, ndi kutifotokozera mbiri yokoma ya cikhulupiriro ndi cikondano canu, ndi kuti mutikumbukila bwino masiku onse, pokhumba kutiona ife, monganso ire kukuonani inu;" 
1Thessalonians3:7 cifukwa ca ici tasangalala pa inu, abale, m'kupsinjika kwathu konse ndi cisautso cathu conse, mwa cikhulupiriro canu;" 
1Thessalonians3:8 pakuti tsopano tiri ndi moyo, ngati inu mucirimika mwa Ambuye." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Pakuti tikhoza kubwezera kwa Mulungu ciyamiko canji cifukwa ca inu, pa cimwemwe conse tikondwera naco mwa inu pamaso pa Mulungu wathu;" 
1Thessalonians3:10 ndi kucurukitsa mapemphero athu usiku ndi usana kuti tikaone nkhope yanu, ndi kukwaniritsa zoperewera pa cikhulupiriro canu?" 
1Thessalonians3:11 Koma Mulungu Atate wathu mwini yekha, ndi Ambuye wathu Yesu atitsogolere m'njira yakufika kwa inu;" 
1Thessalonians3:12 koma Ambuye akukulitseni inu, nakueurukitseni m'cikondano wina kwa mnzace ndi kwa anthu onse, monganso ife titero kwa inu;" 
1Thessalonians3:13 kuti akakhazikitse mitima yanu yopanda cifukwa m'ciyero pamaso pa Mulungu Atate wathu, pakufika Ambuye wathu Yesu pamodzi ndi oyera mtima ace onse." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Cotsalira tsono, abale, tikupemphani ndi kukudandaulirani mwa Ambuye Yesu, kuti, monga munalandira kwa ife mayendedwe okoma, muyenera kuyendanso ndi kukondweretsa Mulungu, monganso mumayenda, eurukani koposa momwemo." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Pakuti mudziwa malangizo amene tinakupatsani mwa Ambuye Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Pakuti ici ndi cifuniro ca Mulungu, ciyeretso canu, kuti mudzipatule kudama;" 
1Thessalonians4:4 yense wa inu adziwe kukhala naco cotengera cace m'ciyeretso ndi ulemu," 
1Thessalonians4:5 kosati m'eiliro ca cilakolako conyansa, monganso amitundu osadziwa Mulungu;" 
1Thessalonians4:6 asapitirireko munthu, nanyenge mbale wace m'menemo, cifukwa Ambuye ndiye wobwezera wa izi zonse, monganso tinakuuziranitu, ndipo tinacitapo umboni." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Pakuti Mulungu sanaitana ife titsate cidetso, koma ciyeretso." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Cifukwa cace iye wotaya ici, sataya munthu, komatu Mulungu, wakupatsa Mzimu wace Woyera kwa inu." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Koma kunena za cikondano ca pa abale sikufunika kuti akulembereni; pakuti wakukuphunzitsani ndi Mulungu, kuti mukondane wina ndi mnzace;" 
1Thessalonians4:10 pakutinso munawacitira ici abale onse a m'Makedoniya lonse. Koma tikudandaulirani, abale, mueurukireko koposa," 
1Thessalonians4:11 ndi kuti muyesetse kukhala cete ndi kucita za inu eni ndi kugwira nchito ndi manja anu, monga tinakuuzani;" 
1Thessalonians4:12 kuti mukayende oona mtima pa iwo a kunja, ndi kukhala osasowa kanthu." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Koma sitifuna, abale, kuti mukhale osadziwa za iwo akugona; kuti mungalire monganso otsalawo, amene alibe ciyembekezo." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Pakuti ngati tikhulupirira kuti Yesu adamwalira, nauka, koteronso Mulungu adzatenga pamodzi ndi iye iwo akugona mwa Yesu." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Pakuti ici tinena kwa inu m'mau a Ambuye, kuti ife okhala ndi moyo, otsalira kufikira kufikanso kwa Ambuye, sitidzatsogolera ogonawo." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Pakuti Ambuye adzatsika Kumwamba mwini yekha ndi mpfuu, ndi mau a mngelo wamkuru, ndi lipenga la Mulungu; ndipo akufa mwa Ambuye adzayamba kuuka;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 pamenepo ife okhala ndi moyo, otsalafe, tidzakwatulidwa nao pamodzi m'mitambo, kukakomana ndi Ambuye mumlengalenga, ndipo potero tidzakhala ndi Ambuye nthawi zonse." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Comweco, tonthozanani ndi mau awa," 
1Thessalonians5:1 Koma za nthawizo ndi nyengozo, abale, sikufunika kuti tidzakulemberani," 
1Thessalonians5:2 Pakuti inu nokha mudziwa bwino kuti tsiku la Ambuye lidzadza monga mbala usiku," 
1Thessalonians5:3 Pamene angonena, Mtendere ndi mosatekeseka, pamenepo cionongeko cobukapo cidzawagwera, monga zowawa mkazi wa pakati; ndipo sadzapulumuka konse." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kama inu, abale, simuli mumdima, kuti tsikulo likakugwereni monga mbala;" 
1Thessalonians5:5 pakuti inu nonse muli ana a kuunika, ndi ana a usana; sitiri a usiku, kapena a mdima;" 
1Thessalonians5:6 cifukwa cace tsono tisagone monga otsalawo, komatu tidikire, ndipo tisaledzere," 
1Thessalonians5:7 Pakuti iwo akugona agona usiku; ndi iwo akuledzera aledzera usiku. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Koma ife popeza tiri a usana tisaledzere, titabvala capacifuwa ca cikhulupiriro ndi cikondi; ndi cisoti ciri ciyembekezo ca cipulumutso." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Pakuti Mulungu sanatiika ife tilawe mkwiyo, komatu kuti tilandire cipulumutso mwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 amene anafa m'malo mwathu, kuti, tingakhale tidikira, tingakhale tigona, tikakhale ndi moyo pamodzi ndi Iye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Mwa ici cenjezanani, ndipo mangiriranani wina ndi mnzace, monganso mumacita," 
1Thessalonians5:12 Koma, abale, tikupemphani, dziwani iwo akugwiritsa nchito mwa inu, nakhala akulu anu mwa Ambuye, nakuyatnbirirani inu;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 ndipo muwacitire ulemu woposatu mwa cikondi, cifukwa ca nchito yao. Khalani mumtendere mwa inu nokha." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Koma tidandaulira inu abale, yambirirani ampwayi, limbikitsani amantha mtima? cirikizani ofok a, mukhale oleza mtima pa onse." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Penyani kuti wina asabwezere coipa womcitira coipa; komatu nthawi zonse mutsatire cokoma, kwa anzanu, ndi kwa onse." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Kondwerani nthawi zonse; 
1Thessalonians5:17 Pempherani kosaleka; 
1Thessalonians5:18 M'zonse yamikani; pakuti ici ndi cifuniro ca Mulungu ca kwa inu, mwa Kristu Yesu." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Musazime Mzimuyo; 
1Thessalonians5:20 Musanyoze maaenero; 
1Thessalonians5:21 Yesani zonse; sungani cokomaco," 
1Thessalonians5:22 Mupewe maonekedwe onse a coipa. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Ndipo Mulungu wa mtendere yekha ayeretse inu konsekonse; ndipo mzimu wanu ndi moyo wanu ndi thupi lanu zisungidwe zamphumphu, zopanda cirema pa kudza kwace kwa: Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Wakuitana inu ali wokhulupirika, amenensoadzacicita." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Abale, z tipempherereni ife." 
1Thessalonians5:26 1 Lankhulani abale onse ndi cipsompsono copatulika. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndikulumbirirani pa Ambuye kuti 2 kalatayu awerengedwe kwa abale onse. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Cisomo ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu cikhale nanu. 
2Thessalonians1:1 PAULO, ndi Silvano, ndi Timoteo, kwa Mpingo wa Atesalonika mwa Mulungu Atate wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere wa kwa Mulungu Atate ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Tiziyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse cifukwa ca inu, abale, monga kuyenera; pakuti cikhulupiriro canu cikula cikulire, ndipo cicurukira cikondanoca inu nonse, yense pa mnzace;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 kotero kuti ife tokha tidzitamandira za inu m'Mipingo ya Mulungu, cifukwa ca cipiriro canu, ndi cikhulupiriro canu, m'mazunzo anu onse ndi zisautsozo muzimva;" 
2Thessalonians1:5 ndico citsimikizo ca ciweruziro colungama ca Mulungu; kuti mu-kawerengedwe oyenera ufumu wa Mulungu, umenenso mumvera zowawa;" 
2Thessalonians1:6 popeza nkolungama kwa Mulungu kubwezera cisautso kwa iwo akucitira inu cisautso," 
2Thessalonians1:7 ndi kwa inu akumva cisautso mpumulo pamodzi ndi ire, pa bvumbulutso la Ambuye Yesu wocokera Kumwamba pamodzi ndi angelo a mphamvu yace," 
2Thessalonians1:8 m'lawi lamoto, ndi kubwezera cilango kwa iwo osamdziwa Mulungu, ndi iwo osamvera Uthenga Wabwino wa Ambuye wathu Yesu;" 
2Thessalonians1:9 amene adzamva cilango, ndico cionongeko cosatha cowasiyanitsa ku nkhope ya Ambuye, ndi ku ulemerero wa mphamvu yace," 
2Thessalonians1:10 pamene adzadza kudzalemekezedwa mwa oyera mtima ace, ndi kukhala wodabwizitsa mwa onse akukhulupirira (popeza munakhulupirira umboni wathu wa kwa inu) m'tsiku lija." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Kukatero tikupemphereraninso nthawi zonse, kuti Mulungu wathu akakuyeseni inu oyenera kuitanidwa kwanu, nakakwaniritse comkomera conse, ndi nchito ya cikhulupiriro mumphamvu;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 kuti dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu lilemekezedwe mwa inu, ndi inu mwa iye, monga mwa cisomo ca Mulungu wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Ndipo tikupemphani, abale, cifukwa ca kudza kwace kwa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, ndi kusonkhana pamodzi kwathu kwa iye;" 
2Thessalonians2:2 kuti musamagwedezeka mtima msanga ndi kutaya maganizo anu, kapena kuopsedwa, mwa mzimu kapena mwa mau; kapena mwa kalata, monga wolembedwa ndi ife, monga ngati tsiku la Ambuye lafika;" 
2Thessalonians2:3 munthu asakunyengeni konseko; kuti silifika, koma ciyambe cifike cipatukoco, nabvumbulutsike munthu wosayeruzika, mwana wa cionongeko," 
2Thessalonians2:4 amene atsutsana nazo, nadzikuza pa zonse zochedwa Mulungu, kapena zopembedzeka; kotero kuti iye wakhalapansi ku Kacisi wa Mulungu, nadzionetsera yekha kuti ali Mulungu." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Simukumbukila kodi, kuti pokhala nanu, ndisanacoke ine, ndinakuuzani izi?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ndipo tsopano comletsa mucidziwa, kuti akabvumbulutsidwe iye m'nyengo yace ya iye yekha." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Pakuti cinsinsi ca kusayeruzika cayambadi kucita; cokhaci pali womletsa tsopano, kufikira akamcotsa pakati." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Ndipo pamenepo adzabvumbulutsidwa wosayeruzikayo, amene Ambuye Yesu adzamthera ndi mzimu wa pakamwa pace, nadzamuononga ndi maonekedwe a kudza kwace;" 
2Thessalonians2:9 ndiye amene kudza kwace kuli monga mwa macitidwe a Satana, mu mphamvu yonse, ndi zizindikilo ndi zozizwa zonama;" 
2Thessalonians2:10 ndi m'cinyengo conse ca cosalungama kwa iwo akuonongeka, popeza cikondi ca coonadi sanacisandira, kuti akapulumutsidwe iwo." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ndipo cifukwa cace Mulungu atumiza kwa iwo macitidwe a kusoceretsa, kuti akhulupirire bodza;" 
2Thessalonians2:12 kuti aweruzidwe onse amene sanakhulupirira coonadi, komatu anakondwera ndi cosalungama." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Koma tiyenera ife tiziyamika Mulungu nthawi zonse cifukwa: ca inu, abale okondedwa ndi Ambuye, kuti Mulungu anakusankhani inu kuyambira paciyambi, mulandire cipulumutso mwa ciyeretso ca Mzimu ndi cikhulupiriro ca coonadi;" 
2Thessalonians2:14 kumene aoaitanako inu mwa Uthenga Wabwino wathu, kuti mulandire ulemerero wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Cifukwa cace tsono, abale, cirimikani, gwiritsani miyambo imene tinakuphunzitsani, kapena mwa mau, kapena mwa kalata wathu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Ndipo Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, ndi Mulungu Atate wathu amene anatikonda natipatsa elsangalatso cosatha ndi ciyembekezo cokoma mwa cisomo," 
2Thessalonians2:17 asangalatse mitima yanu, nakhazikitse inu mu nchito yonse ndi mau onse abwino." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Cotsalira, abale, mutipempherere, kuti mau a Ambuye athamange, nalemekezedwe, monganso kwanu;" 
2Thessalonians3:2 ndi kuti tilanditsidwe m'manja a anthu osayenerandi oipa; pakuti si onse ali naco cikhulupiriro. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Koma Ambuye ali wokhulupirika amene adzakukhazikitsani inu, nadzakudikirirani kuletsa woipayo;" 
2Thessalonians3:4 koma tikhulupirira mwa Ambuye za inu, kuti mumacita, ndiponso mudzacita zimene tikulamulirani." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ndipo Ambuye atsogolere bwino mitima yanu ilowe m'cikondi ca mulungu ndi m'cipiriro ca Kristu," 
2Thessalonians3:6 Ndipo tikulamulirani, abale, m'dzina la Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, kuti mubwebvuke kwa mbale yense wakuyenda dwacedwace, wosatsata mwambo umene anaulandira kwa ife." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Pakuti mudziwa nokha m'mene muyenera kutitsanza ifemo; pakuti sitinakhala dwacedwace mwa inu; 
2Thessalonians3:8 kapena sitinadya mkate cabe pa dzanja la munthu ali yense, komatu m'cibvuto ndi cipsinjo, tinagwira nchito usiku ndi usana, kuti tingalemetse wina wa inu;" 
2Thessalonians3:9 si cifukwa tiribe ulamuliro, komatu kuti tidzipereke tokha tikhale kwa inu citsanzo canu, kuti mukatitsanze ife." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Pakutinso pamene tinali nanu tidakulamulirani ici, Ngati munthu safuna kugwira nchito, asadyenso." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Pakuti tikumva za ena mwa inu kuti ayenda dwacedwace, osagwira nchito konse, kama ali ocita mwina ndi mwina." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Koma oterewa tiwalamulira ndi kuwadandaulira mwa Ambuye Y esu Kristu, kuti agwire nchito pokhala cete, nadye cakudya cadwo okha," 
2Thessalonians3:13 Kama inu, abale, musaleme pakucita zabwino." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Koma ngati wina samvera mau athu m'kalata uyu, yang'anirani ameneyo, kuti musayanjane naye, kuti acite manyazi." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Koma musamuyese mdani, kama mumuyambirire ngati mbale." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Ndipo Ambuye wa mtendere yekha atipatse ife mtendere nthawi zonse, monsemo. Ambuye akhale ndi inu nonse." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Cilankhulo ndi dzanja langa Paulo; ndico cizindikilo m'kalata ali yense; ndiko kulemba kwanga. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Cisomo ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu cikhale ndi inu nonse. 
1Timothy1:1 PAULO, mtumwi wa Kristu Yesu monga mwa cilamuliro ca Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu, ndi ca Kristu Yesu, ciyembekezo cathu:" 
1Timothy1:2 kwa Timoteo mwana wanga weniweni m'cikhulupiriro: Cisomo, cifundo, mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate ndi kwa Kristu Yesu Ambuye wathu." 
1Timothy1:3 Monga ndinakudandaulira iwe utsalire m'Efeso, popita ine ku Makedoniya, nditeronso, kuti ukalamulire ena ajawa asaphunzitse kanthu kena," 
1Timothy1:4 kapena asasamale nkhani zacabe, ndi mawerengedwe osalekeza a mafuko a makolo, ndiwo akuutsa mafunso, osati za udindo wa Mulungu umene uli m'cikhulupiriro;" 
1Timothy1:5 koma citsirizo ca cilamuliro ndico cikondi cocokera mu mtima woyera ndi m'cikumbu mtima cokoma ndi cikhulupiriro cosanyenga; 
1Timothy1:6 zimenezo, ena pozilambalala anapatukira kutsata mau opanda pace;" 
1Timothy1:7 pofuna kukhala aphunzitsi a lamulo ngakhale sadziwitsa zimene azmena, kapena azilimbikirazi." 
1Timothy1:8 Koma mudziwa kuti lamulo ndi labwino, ngati munthu acita nalo monga mwa lamulo," 
1Timothy1:9 podziwa ici, kuti lamulo siliikika kwa munthu wolungama, koma kwa osayeruzika ndi osamvera lamulo, osapembedza, ndi ocimwa, osalemekeza ndi amnyozo, akupha atate ndi akupha amai, akupha anzao," 
1Timothy1:10 acigololo, akucita zoipa ndi amuna, akuba anthu, amabodza, olumbira zonama, ndipo ngati kuli kena kakutsutsana naco ciphunzitso colamitsa;" 
1Timothy1:11 monga mwa Uthenga Wabwino wa ulemerero wa Mulungu wolemekezeka, umene anandisungitsa ine." 
1Timothy1:12 Ndimyamika iye wondipatsa ine mphamvu, ndiye Kristu Yesu, Ambuye wathu, kuti anandiyesa wokhulupirika, nandiika kuutumiki," 
1Timothy1:13 ndingakhale kale ndinali wamwano, ndi wolondalonda, ndi wacipongwe; komatu anandicitira cifundo, popeza ndinazicita wosazindikira, wosakhulupirira;" 
1Timothy1:14 koma cisomo ca Ambuye wathu cidacurukatu pamodzi ndi cikhulupiriro ndi cikondi ciri mwa Kristu Yesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Mauwa ali okhulupirika ndi oyenera konse kuti awalandire, kuti Kristu Yesu anadza ku dziko lapansi kupulumutsa ocimwa; wa iwowa ine ndine woposa;" 
1Timothy1:16 komatu mwa ici anandicitira cifundo, kuti mwa ine, woyamba, Yesu Kristu akaonetsere kuleza mtima kwace konse kukhale citsanzo ca kwa iwo adzakhulupirira pa iye m'tsogolo kufikira moyo wosatha." 
1Timothy1:17 Ndipo kwa Mfumu yosatha, yosabvunda, yosaoneka, Mulungu wa yekha, ukhale ulemu ndi ulemerero, kufikira nthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Lamulo ili ndipereka kwa iwe, mwana wanga Timoteo, kuti, emonga mwa zonenera zidakutsogolera iwe kale, ulimbane nayo nkhondo yabwino;" 
1Timothy1:19 ndi kukhala naco cikhulupiriro ndi cikumbu mtima cokoma, cimene ena adacikankha, cikhulupiriro cao cidatayika;" 
1Timothy1:20 a iwo ali Humenayo ndi Alesandro, amene ndawapereka kwa Satana, kuti aphunzire kusalankhula zamwano." 
1Timothy2:1 Ndidandaulira tsono, poyambayamba, kuti acitike mapembedzo, mapemphero, mapembedzero, mayamiko, cifukwa ca anthu onse;" 
1Timothy2:2 cifukwa ca mafumu ndi onse akucita ulamuliro kuti m'moyo mwathu tikakhale odika mtima, ndi acete m'kulemekeza Mulungu, ndi m'kulemekezeka monse." 
1Timothy2:3 Pakuti ici ncokoma ndi colandirika pamaso pa Mulungu Mpulumutsi wathu; 
1Timothy2:4 amene afuna anthu onse apulumuke, nafike pozindikira coonadi." 
1Timothy2:5 Pakuti pali Mulungu mmodzi, ndi Mtetezi mmodzi pakati pa Mulungu ndi anthu, ndiye munthu, Kristu Yesu," 
1Timothy2:6 amene anadzipereka yekha ciombolom'malo mwa onse; umboni m'nyengo zace; 
1Timothy2:7 umene anandiika ine mlaliki wace ndi mtumwi (ndinena zoona, wosanama ine), mphunzitsi wa amitundu m'cikhulupiriro ndi coonadi." 
1Timothy2:8 Cifukwa cace ndifuna kuti amunawo apemphere pamalo ponse, ndi kukweza manja oyera, opanda mkwiyo ndi makani." 
1Timothy2:9 Momwemonso, akazi adzibveke okha ndi cobvala coyenera, ndi manyazi, ndi cidziletso; osati ndi tsitsi lace loluka, ndi golidi kapena ngale, kapena maraya a mtengo wace wapatali;" 
1Timothy2:10 komatu (umo mokomera akazi akubvomereza kulemekeza Mulungu), mwa nchito zabwino." 
1Timothy2:11 Mkazi aphunzire akhale wacete m'kumvera konse. 
1Timothy2:12 Koma sindilola ine kuti mkazi aphunzitse, kapena kulamulira mwamuna; komatu akhale cete." 
1Timothy2:13 Pakuti Adamu anayamba kulengedwa, pamenepo Heva;" 
1Timothy2:14 ndipo Adamu sananyengedwa, koma mkaziyo ponyengedwa analowa m'kulakwa;" 
1Timothy2:15 koma adzapulumutsidwa mwa kubala mwana, ngati akhala m'cikhulupiriro ndi cikondi ndi ciyeretso pamodzi ndi cidziletso." 
1Timothy3:1 Mauwa ali okhulupirika, ngati munthu akhumba udindo wa woyang'anira, aifuna nchito yabwino." 
1Timothy3:2 Ndipo kuyenera woyang'anira akhale wopanda cirema, mwamuna wa mkazi mmodzi, wodzisunga, wodziletsa, wolongosoka, wokonda kucereza alendo, wokhoza kuphunzitsa;" 
1Timothy3:3 wosati woledzera, kapena womenyana ndeu; komatu wofatsa, wopanda ndeu, wosakhumba cuma;" 
1Timothy3:4 woweruza bwino nyumba yace ya iye yekha, wakukhala nao ana ace omvera iye ndi kulemekezeka konse." 
1Timothy3:5 Koma ngati munthu sadziwa kuweruza nyumba ya iye yekha, adzasunga bwanji Mpingo wa Mulungu?" 
1Timothy3:6 Asakhale wophunza, kuti podzitukumula ungamgwere mlandu wa mdierekezi." 
1Timothy3:7 Kuyeneranso kuti iwo akunja adzakhoza kumcitira umboni wabwino; kuti ungamgwere mtonzo, ndi msampha wa mdierekezi." 
1Timothy3:8 Momwemonso atumiki akhale olemekezeka, osanena pawiri, osamwetsa vinyo, osati a cisiriro conyansa;" 
1Timothy3:9 okhala naco cinsinsi ca cikhulupiriro m'cikumbu mtima coona. 
1Timothy3:10 Koma iwonso ayambe ayesedwe; pamenepo atumikire, akakhala opanda cifukwa." 
1Timothy3:11 Momwemonso akazi akhale olemekezeka, osadierekeza, odzisunga, okhulupirika m'zonse." 
1Timothy3:12 Atumiki akhale mwamuna wa mkazi mmodzi, akuweruza bwino ana ao, ndi iwo a m'nyumba yao ya iwo okha." 
1Timothy3:13 Pakuti iwo akutumikira bwino adzitengera okha mbiri yabwino, ndi kulimbika kwakukuru m'cikhulupiriro ca mwa Kristu Yesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Izi ndikulembera ndi kuyembekeza kudza kwa iwe posacedwa, koma ngati ndicedwa," 
1Timothy3:15 kuti udziwe kuyenedwa kwace pokhala m'nyumba ya Mulungu, ndiye Eklesia wa Mulungu wamoyo, mzati ndi mcirikizo wa coonadi." 
1Timothy3:16 Ndipo pobvomerezeka, cinsinsi ca kucitira Mulungu ulemu ncacikuru: iye amene anaonekera m'thupi, anayesedwa wolungama mumzimu, anapenyeka ndi angelo, analalikidwa mwa amitundu, wokhulupiridwa m'dziko lapansi, wolandiridwa m'ulemerero." 
1Timothy4:1 Koma Mzimu anena monenetsa, kuti m'masiku otsiriza ena adzataya cikhulupiriro, ndi kusamala mizimu yosoceretsa ndi maphunziro a ziwanda," 
1Timothy4:2 m'maonekedwe onyenga a iwo onena mabodza, olocedwa m'cikumbu mtima mwao monga ndi citsulo camoto;" 
1Timothy4:3 akuletsa ukwati, osivitsa zakudya zakuti, zimene Mulungu anazilenga kuti acikhulupiriro ndi ozindikira coonadi azilandire ndi ciyamiko." 
1Timothy4:4 Pakuti colengedwa conse ca Mulungu ncabwino, ndipo palibe kanthu kayenera kutayika, ngati kalandiridwa ndi ciyamiko;" 
1Timothy4:5 pakuti kayeretsedwa ndi Mau a Mulungu ndi kupemphera. 
1Timothy4:6 Ngati ukumbutsa abale zinthu izi, udzakhala mtumiki wabwino wa Kristu Yesu, woleredwa m'mauwo a cikhulupiriro, ndi malangizo abwino amene udawatsata;" 
1Timothy4:7 koma nkhani zacabe ndi za akazi okalamba ukane. Ndipo udzizoloweretse kucita cipembedzo; 
1Timothy4:8 pakuti cizolowezi ca thupi cipindula pang'ono, koma cipembedzo cipindula zonse, popeza cikhala nalo Lonjezano la ku moyo uno, ndi la moyo ulinkudza." 
1Timothy4:9 Okhulupirika mauwa ndi oyenera kulandiridwa konse. 
1Timothy4:10 Pakuti kukalingako tlgwiritsa nchito ndi kuyesetsa, cifukwa ciyembekezo cathu tiri naco pa Mulungu wamoyo, amene ali Mpulumutsi wa anthu onse, makamaka wa okhulupira." 
1Timothy4:11 Lamulira izi, nuziphunzitse." 
1Timothy4:12 Munthu asapeputse ubwana wako; komatu khala citsanzo kwa iwo okhulupira, m'mau, m'mayendedwe, m'cikondi, m'cikhulupiriro, m'kuyera mtima." 
1Timothy4:13 Kufikira ndidza ine, usamalire kuwerenga, kucenjeza, kulangiza." 
1Timothy4:14 Usanyalapse mphatsoyo iri mwa iwe, yopatsidwa kwa iwe mwa cinenero, pamodzi ndi kuika kwa manja a akulu." 
1Timothy4:15 Izi uzisamalitse; mu izi ukhale; kuti kukula mtima kwako kuonekere kwa onse. 
1Timothy4:16 Udzipenyerere wekha, ndi ciphunzitsoco. Uzikhala muizi; pakuti pocita ici udzadzipulumutsa iwe wekha ndi iwo akumva iwe." 
1Timothy5:1 Mkulu usamdzudzule, komatu umdandaulire ngati atate; anyamata ngati abale;" 
1Timothy5:2 akazi akulu ngati amai; akazi ang'ono ngati alongo, m'kuyera mtima konse." 
1Timothy5:3 Citira ulemu amasiye amene ali amasiye ndithu. 
1Timothy5:4 Koma ngati wamasiye wina ali nao ana kapena adzukulu, ayambe aphunzire iwo kucitira ulemu a m'banja lao, ndi kubwezera akuwabala; pakuti ici ncolandirika pamaso pa Mulungu." 
1Timothy5:5 Koma iye amene ali wamasiye ndithu, nasiyidwa yekha, ayembekezera Mulungu, nakhalabe m'mapembedzo ndi mapemphero usiku ndi usana." 
1Timothy5:6 Koma iye wakutsata zomkondweretsa, adafa pokhala ali ndi moyo," 
1Timothy5:7 Ndipo izi ulamulire, kuti akhale opanda ciremao" 
1Timothy5:8 Koma ngati wina sadzisungiratu mbumba yace ya iye yekha, makamaka iwo a m'banja lace, wakana cikhulupiriro iye, ndipo aipa koposa wosakhulupira." 
1Timothy5:9 Asawerengedwe wamasiye ngati sanafikire zaka makumi asanu ndi limodzi, atakhala mkazi wa mwamuna mmodzi," 
1Timothy5:10 wa mbiri ya nchito zabwino; ngati walera ana, ngati wacereza alendo, ngati adasambitsa mapazi a nzera mtima, ngati wathapdiza osautsidwa, ngati anatsatadi nchito zonse zabwino." 
1Timothy5:11 Koma amasiyeang'ono uwakane; pakuti pamene ayambakumcitira Kristu cipongwe afuna kukwatiwa; 
1Timothy5:12 pokhala naco citsutso, popeza adataya cikhulupiriro cao coyamba." 
1Timothy5:13 Ndipo aphunziraponso kucita ulesi, aderuderu; koma osati ulesi wokha, komatunso alankhula zopanda pace, nacita mwina ndi mwina, olankhula zosayenera." 
1Timothy5:14 Cifukwa cace nditi akwatiwe amasiye ang'ono, nabale ana, naweruzire nyumba, osapatsa cifukwa kwa mdaniyo cakulalatira;" 
1Timothy5:15 pakuti adayamba enakupatuka ndi kutsata Satana. 
1Timothy5:16 Ngati mkazi wina wokhulupira ali nao amasiye, iye awathandize, ndipo Mpingowo usalemedwe; kuti uthandize iwo amene ali amasiye ndithu." 
1Timothy5:17 Akuru akuweruza bwino ayesedwe oyenera ulemu wowirikiza, makamaka iwo akucititsa m'mau ndi m'ciphunzitso." 
1Timothy5:18 Pakuti malembo ati, Usapunamiza ng'ombe yopuntha tirigu. Ndipo, Wogwira nchito ayenera kulipira kwace." 
1Timothy5:19 Pa mkulu usalandire comnenera, koma pakhale mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Iwo akucimwa uwadzudzule pamaso pa onse, kuti otsalawo acite mantha." 
1Timothy5:21 Ndikucitira umboni pamaso pa Mulungu, ndi Kristu Yesu, ndi angelo osankhika, kuti usunge izi kopanda kusankhiratu, wosacita kanthu monga mwa tsankhu." 
1Timothy5:22 Usafulumira kuika manja pa munthu ali yense, kapena usayanjana nazo zoipa za eni; udzisunge wekha woyera mtima." 
1Timothy5:23 Usakhalenso wakumwa madzi okha, komatu ucite naye vinyo pang'ono, cifukwa ca mimba yako ndi zofoka zako zobwera kawiri kawiri." 
1Timothy5:24 Zocimwa za anthu ena ziri zooneka-kale, zitsogola kunka kumlandu; koma enanso ziwatsata." 
1Timothy5:25 Momwemonso pali nchito zokoma zinaonekera kale; ndipo zina zosati zotere sizikhoza kubisika. 
1Timothy6:1 Onse amene ali akapolo a m'goli, ayesere ambuye a iwo okha oyenera ulemu wonse, kuti dzina la Mulungu ndi ciphunzitso zisacitidwe mwano." 
1Timothy6:2 Ndipo iwo akukhala nao ambuye okhulupira, asawapeputse popeza ali abale; koma makamaka awatumikire popeza ali okhulupira ndi okondedwa, oyanjana nao pa cokomaco, Izi uphunzitse, nucenjeze." 
1Timothy6:3 Ngati munthu aphunzitsa zina, wosabvomerezana nao mau a moyowo a Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, ndi ciphunzitsoco ciri monga mwa cipembedzo:" 
1Timothy6:4 iyeyo watukumuka, wosadziwa kanthu, koma ayarukira pa mafunso ndi makani a mau, kumene zieokerako njiru, ndeu, zamwano, mayerekezo oipa;" 
1Timothy6:5 makani opanda pace a anthu oipsika nzeru ndi ocotseka coonadi, akuyesa kuti cipembedzo cipindulitsa." 
1Timothy6:6 Koma cipembedzo pamodzi ndi kudekha cipindulitsa kwakukuru; 
1Timothy6:7 pakuti sitinatenga kanthu polowa m'dziko lapansi, ndiponso sitikhoza kupita nako kanthu pocoka pano;" 
1Timothy6:8 koma pokhala nazo zakudya ndizopfunda, zimenezi zitikwanire." 
1Timothy6:9 Koma iwo akufuna kukhala acuma amagwa m'ciyesero ndi m'msampha, ndi m'zilakolako zambiri zopusa ndi zopweteka, zotere zonga zimiza anthu m'cionongekondi citayiko." 
1Timothy6:10 Pakuti muzu wa zoipa zonse ndiwo cikondi ca pa ndalama; cimene ena pocikhumba, anasocera, nataya cikhulupiriro, nadzipyoza ndi zowawa zambiri." 
1Timothy6:11 Koma iwe, munthu wa Mulungu iwe, thawa izi; nutsate cilungamo, cipembedzo, cikhulupiriro, cikondi, cipiriro, cifatso." 
1Timothy6:12 Limba nayo nkhondo yabwino ya cikhulupiriro, gwira moyo wosatha, umene adakuitanira, ndipo wabvomereza cibvomerezo cabwino pamaso pa mboni zambiri." 
1Timothy6:13 Ndikulamulira pamaso pa Mulungu, wozipatsa zinthu zonse moyo, ndi Kristu Yesu, amene anacitira umboni cibvomerezo cabwino kwa Pontiyo Pilato;" 
1Timothy6:14 kuti usunge lamulolo, lopanda banga, lopanda cirema, kufikira maonekedwe a Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu;" 
1Timothy6:15 limene adzalionetsa m'nyengo za iye yekha, amene ali Mwini Mphamvu wodala ndi wayekha, ndiye Mfumu ya mafumu ndi Mbuye wa ambuye;" 
1Timothy6:16 amene iye yekha ali nao moyo wosatha, wakukhala m'kuunika kosakhozeka kufikako; amene munthu sanamuona, kapena sakhoza kumuona; kwa iye kukhale ulemu ndi mphamvu yosatha. Amen." 
1Timothy6:17 Lamulira iwo acuma m'nthawi yino ya pansi pano, kuti asadzikuze, kapena asayembekezere cuma cosadziwika kukhala kwace, koma Mulungu, amene atipatsa ife zonse kocurukira, kuti tikondwere nazo;" 
1Timothy6:18 kuti acite zabwino, naeuruke ndi nchito zabwino, nakondwere kugawira ena, nayanjane;" 
1Timothy6:19 nadzikundikire okha maziko okoma ku nyengo ikudzayi, kuti akagwire moyo weni weniwo." 
1Timothy6:20 Timoteo iwe, dikira cokusungitsa, ndi kulewa zokamba zopanda pace ndi zotsutsana za ici cichedwa cizindikiritso konama;" 
1Timothy6:21 cimene ena pocibvomereza 1 adalakwa ndi kutaya cikhulupiriro. Cisomo cikhale nanu. 
2Timothy1:1 PAULO a mtumwi wa Kristu Yesu mwa cifuniro ca Mulungu, monga mwa lonjezano la moyo wa m'Kristu Yesu," 
2Timothy1:2 kwa Timoteo, mwana wanga wokondedwa: Cisomo, cifundo, mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate ndi Kristu Yesu Ambuye wathu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndiyamika Mulungu, amene ndimtumikira kuyambira makolo anga ndi cikumbu mtima coyera, kuti ndikumbukila iwe kosalekeza m'mapemphero anga," 
2Timothy1:4 pokhumba usiku ndi usana kukuona iwe, ndi kukumbukila misozi yako, kuti ndidzazidwe naco cimwemwe;" 
2Timothy1:5 pokumbukila cikhulupiriro cosanyenga ciri mwa iwe, cimene cinayamba kukhala mwa mbuye wako Loisi, ndi mwa mai wako Yunike, ndipo, ndakopeka mtima, mwa iwenso." 
2Timothy1:6 Cifukwa cace ndikukumbutsa iwe ukoleze mphatso ya Mulungu, iri mwa iwe mwa kuika kwa manja anga," 
2Timothy1:7 Pakuti Mulungu sanatipatsa mzimu wa mantha; komatu wa mphamvu ndi cikondi ndi cidziletso. 
2Timothy1:8 Potero usacite manyazi pa umboni wa Ambuye wathu, kapena pa ine wandende wace; komatu umve masautso ndi Uthenga Wabwino, monga mwa mphamvu ya Mulungu;" 
2Timothy1:9 amene anatipulumutsa ife, natiitana ife ndi maitanidwe oyera, si monga mwa nchito zathu, komatu monga mwa citsimikizo mtima ca iye yekha, ndi cisomo, copatsika kwa ife mwa Kristu Yesu zisanayambe nthawi zoyamba," 
2Timothy1:10 koma caonetsedwa tsopano m'maonekedwe a Mpulumutsi wathu Kristu Yesu, amenedi anatha imfa, naonetsera poyera moyo ndi cosabvunda mwa Uthenga Wabwino," 
2Timothy1:11 umene ndaikikapo mlaliki, ndi mtumwi ndi mphunzitsi wace." 
2Timothy1:12 Cifukwa ca ideo ndinamva zowawa izi; komatu sindicita manyazi; pakuti ndimdziwa iye amene ndamkhulupirira, ndipo ndikopeka mtima kuti ali wa mphamvu ya kudikira cosungitsa eangaeo kufikira tsiku lijalo." 
2Timothy1:13 Gwira citsanzo ca mau a moyo, amene udawamva kwa ine, mwa cikhulupiriro ndi cikondi ciri mwa Kristu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Cosungitsa cokomaca udikire mwa Mzimu Woyera amene akhalitsa mwa ife. 
2Timothy1:15 Ici ucidziwa, kuti onse a m'Asiya adabwerera kusiyana nane; a iwo ali Fugelo ndi Hermogene," 
2Timothy1:16 Ambuye acitire banja la Onesiforo cifundo; pakuti anatsitsimutsa ine kawiri kawiri, ndipo sanacita manyazi ndi unyolo wanga;" 
2Timothy1:17 komatu pokhala m'Roma iye anandifunafuna ine ndi khama, nandipeza," 
2Timothy1:18 (Ambuye ampatse iye apeze cifundo ndi Ambuye tsiku lijalo); ndi muja ananditumikira m'zinthu zambiri m'Efeso, uzindikira iwe bwino." 
2Timothy2:1 Ndipo iwe, mwana wanga, limbika m'cisomo ca m'Kristu Yesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Ndipo zimene wazimva kwa ine mwa mboni zambiri, zomwezi uikize kwa anthu okhulupirika, amene adzadziwa kuphunzitsa enanso." 
2Timothy2:3 Umve zowawa pamodzi nane monga msilikari wabwino wa Kristu Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Msilikari sakodwa nazo nchito wamba, kuti akakondweretse iye amene adamlemba usilikari." 
2Timothy2:5 Koma ngatinso wina ayesana nao m'makani a masewero, sambveka korona ngati sanayesana monga adapangana." 
2Timothy2:6 Wam'munda wogwiritsitsa nchitoyo ayenera akhale woyamba kulandira zipatsozoo 
2Timothy2:7 Lingirira cimene ndinena; pakuti Ambuye adzakupatsa cidziwitso m'zonse. 
2Timothy2:8 Kumbukila Yesu Kristu, wouka kwa akufa, wocokera m'mbeu ya Davide, monga mwa Uthenga Wabwino wanga;" 
2Timothy2:9 m'menemo ndimva zowawa kufikira zomangira, monga wocita zoipa; koma mau a Mulungu samangika." 
2Timothy2:10 Mwa ici ndipirira zonse, cifukwa ca osankhika, kuti iwonso akapeze cipulumutsoeo ca mwa Kristu Yesu, pamodzi ndi ulemerero wosatha." 
2Timothy2:11 Okhulupirika mauwa: Pakuti ngati tidamwalira ndi iye, tidzakhalanso moyo ndi iye:" 
2Timothy2:12 ngati ttpirira, tidzacitanso ufumu ndi iye: ngati timkana Iye, Iyeyunso adzatikana ife:" 
2Timothy2:13 ngati tikhala osakhulupirika, Iyeyu akhala wokhulupirika; pakuti sakhoza kudzikana yekha." 
2Timothy2:14 Uwakumbutse izi, ndi kuwacitira umboni pamaso pa Ambuye, kuti asacite makani ndi mau osapindulitsa kanthu, koma ogwetsa iwo akumva." 
2Timothy2:15 Ucite cangu kudzionetsera kwa Mulungu wobvomerezeka, wanchito wopanda cifukwa ca kucita manyazi, wolunjika nao bwino mau a coonadi." 
2Timothy2:16 Koma pewa nkhani zopanda pace; pakuti adzapitirira kutsata cisapembedzo," 
2Timothy2:17 ndipo mau ao adzanyeka cironda; a iwo ali Humenayo ndi Fileto; 
2Timothy2:18 ndiwo amene adasokera kunena za coonadi, ponena kuti kuuka kwa akufa kwacitika kale, napasula cikhulupiriro ca ena." 
2Timothy2:19 Koma ndithu maziko a Mulungu aimika pokhazikika, ndi cukhala naco cizindikilo ici, Ambuye azindikira iwo amene ali ace; ndipo, Adzipatule kwa cosalungama yense wakuehula dzina la Ambuye." 
2Timothy2:20 Koma m'nyumba yaikuru simuli zotengera za golidi ndi siliva zokha, komatunso za mtengo ndi dothi; ndipo zina zaulemu, koma zina zopanda ulemu." 
2Timothy2:21 Ngati tsono munthu adziyeretsa yekha pa izi, adzakhala cotengera ca kuulemu, copatulidwa, coyenera kucita naco Mbuye, cokonzera nchito yonse yabwino." 
2Timothy2:22 Koma thawa zilakolako za unyamata, nutsate cilungamo, cikhulupiriro, cikondi, mtendere, pamodzi ndi iwo akuitana pa Ambuye ndi mitima yoyera." 
2Timothy2:23 Koma mafunso opusa ndi opanda malango upewe, podziwa kuti abala ndeu." 
2Timothy2:24 Ndipo kapolo wa Ambuye sayenera kucita ndeu, komatu akhale woyenera, waulere pa onse, wodziwa kuphunzitsa, woleza," 
2Timothy2:25 1 wolangiza iwo akutsutsana mofatsa; 2 ngati kapena Mulungu awapatse iwo citembenuziro, kukazindikira coonadi," 
2Timothy2:26 ndipo 3 akadzipulumutse ku msampha wa mdierekezi, m'mene anagwidwa naye, ku cifuniro cace." 
2Timothy3:1 Koma zindikira ici, kuti masiku otsiriza zidzafika nthawi zowawitsa." 
2Timothy3:2 Pakuti anthu adzakhala odzikonda okha, okonda ndarama, odzitamandira, odzikuza, amwano, osamvera akuwabala, osayamika," 
2Timothy3:3 osayera mtima, opanda cikondi cacibadwidwe, osayanjanitsika, akudierekeza, osakhoza kudziletsa, aukali, osakonda abwino," 
2Timothy3:4 aciwembu, aliuma olimbirira, otukumuka mtima, okonda zokondweretsa munthu, osati okonda Mulungu;" 
2Timothy3:5 akukhala nao maonekedwe a cipembedzo, koma mphamvu yace adaikana; kwa iwonso udzipatule," 
2Timothy3:6 Pakuti mwa iwo akhala akukwawira m'nyumba, nagwira akazi opusa, osenza akatundu a zoipa zao, otengedwa nazo zilakolako za mitundu mitundu:" 
2Timothy3:7 ophunzira nthawi zonse, koma sakhoza konse kufikira ku cizindikiritso ca coonadi." 
2Timothy3:8 Ndipo monga momwe Yane ndi Yambre anatsutsana naye Mose, kotero iwonso atsutsana naco coonadi; ndiwo anthu obvunditsitsa mtima, osatsimikizidwa pacikhulupiriro." 
2Timothy3:9 Koma sadzapitirirapo; pakuti kupusa kwao kudzaonekeratu kwa onse, monganso kupusa kwa iwo aja." 
2Timothy3:10 Koma iwe watsatatsata ciphunzitso canga, mayendedwe, citsimikizo mtima, cikhulupiriro, kuleza mtima, cikondi, cipiriro," 
2Timothy3:11 mazunzo, kumva zowawa; zotere zonga anandicitira m'Antiokeya, m'Ikoniya, m'Lustro, mazunzo otere onga ndawamva; ndipo m'zonsezi Ambuye anandilanditsa." 
2Timothy3:12 Ndipo onse akufuna kukhala opembedza m'moyo mwa Kristu Yesu, adzamva mazunzo." 
2Timothy3:13 Koma anthu oipa ndi onyenga, adzaipa ciipire, kusokeretsa ndi kusokeretsedwa." 
2Timothy3:14 Koma ukhalebe iwe mu izi zimene waziphunzira, nutsimikizika mtima nazo, podziwa amene adakuphunzitsa;" 
2Timothy3:15 ndi kuti kuyambira ukhanda wako wadziwa malembo opatulika, okhoza kukupatsa nzeru kufikira cipulumutso, mwa cikhulupiriro ca mwa Kristu Yesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Lemba liri lonse adaliuzira Mulungu, ndipo lipindulitsa pa ciphunzitso, citsutsano, cikonzero, cilangizo ca m'cilungamo:" 
2Timothy3:17 kuti munthu wa Mulungu akhale woyenera, wokonzeka kucita nchito iri yonse yabwino." 
2Timothy4:1 Ndikucitira umboni pamaso pa Mulungu ndi Kristu Yesu, amene adzaweruza amoyo ndi akufa, ndi pa maonekedwe ace ndi ufumu wace;" 
2Timothy4:2 lalikira mau; cita nao pa nthawi yace, popanda nthawi yace; tsutsa, dzudzula, cenjeza, ndi kuleza mtima konse ndi ciphunzitso." 
2Timothy4:3 Pakuti idzafika nthawi imene sadzalola ciphunzitso colamitsa; komatu poyabwa m'khutu adzadziuniikitsa aphunzitsi monga mwa zilakolako za iwo okha: 
2Timothy4:4 ndipo adzalubza dala pacoonadi, nadzapatukira kutsata nthanu zacabe." 
2Timothy4:5 Koma iwe, khala maso m'zonse, imva zowawa, cita nchito ya mlaliki wa Uthenga Wabwino, kwaniritsa utumiki wako." 
2Timothy4:6 Pakuti ndirimkuthiridwa nsembe tsopano, ndipo nthawi ya kumasuka kwanga yafika." 
2Timothy4:7 Ndalimbana nako kulimbana kwabwino, ndatsiriza njirayo, ndasunga cikhulupiriro:" 
2Timothy4:8 cotsalira wandiikira ine korona wa cilungamo, amene Ambuye, woweruza wolungama, adzandipatsa ine tsiku lijalo: ndipo si kwa ine ndekha, komatunso kwa onse amene anakonda maonekedwe ace." 
2Timothy4:9 Tayesetsa kudza kwa ine msanga: 
2Timothy4:10 pakuti Dema wandisiya ine, atakonda dziko lino lapansi, napita ku Tesalonika; Kresike ku Galatiya, Tito ku Dalimatiya." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka yekha ali pamodzi ndi ine. Umtenge Marko, adze pamodzi ndi iwe; pakuti ayenera kunditumikira." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka yekha ali pamodzi ndi ine. Umtenge Marko, adze pamodzi ndi iwe; pakuti ayenera kunditumikira." 
2Timothy4:12 Koma Tukiko ndamtuma ku Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Copfunda cija ndinacisiya ku Trowa kwa Karpo, udze naco pakudza iwe, ndi mabuku, makamaka zikopa zija zolembedwa." 
2Timothy4:14 Alesandro wosula mkuwa anandicitira zoipa zambiri: adzambwezera iye Ambuye monga mwa nchito zace; 
2Timothy4:15 ameneyo iwenso ucenjere naye; pakuti anatsutsana nao mau athu. 
2Timothy4:16 Pa codzikanira canga coyamba panalibe mmodzi anandithangata, koma onse anandisiya; cimeneco cisawerengedwe cowatsutsa." 
2Timothy4:17 Koma Ambuye anaima nane nandipatsa mphamvu; kuti mwa ine cilalikiro cimveke konse konse, ndi amitundu onse amve; ndipo ndinalanditsidwa m'kamwa mwa mkango." 
2Timothy4:18 Ambuye adzandilanditsa ku nchito yonse yoipa, nadzandipulumutsa ine kulowa Ufumu wace wa Kumwamba; kwa iye ukhale ulemerero ku nthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
2Timothy4:19 Lankhula Priska ndi Akula, ndi banja la Onesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 Erasto anakhalira m'Korinto; koma Trofimo ndamsiya wodwala ku Mileto. 
2Timothy4:21 1 Tayesetsa kudza isanadze nyengo yacisanu. Akulankhula iwe Eubulo, ndi Pude, ndi Lino, ndi Klaudiya, ndi abale onse." 
2Timothy4:22 2 Ambuye akhale ndi mzimu wako. Cisomo cikhale nanu. 
Titus1:1 PAULO, kapolo wa Mulungu ndi mtumwi wa Yesu Kristu monga mwa cikhulupiriro ca osa nkhika a Mulungu, ndi cizindikiritso ca coonadi ciri monga mwa cipembedzo," 
Titus1:2 m'ciyembekezo ca moyo wosatha, umene Mulungu, wosanamayo, analonjeza zisanayambe nthawi zosayamba;" 
Titus1:3 koma pa nyengo za iye yekha anaonetsa mau ace muulalikiro, umene anandisungitsa ine, monga mwa lamulo la Mpulumutsi wathu Mulungu:" 
Titus1:4 kwa Tito, mwana wanga weni weni monga mwa cikhulupiriro ca ife tonse: Cisomo ndi mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate ndi Kristu Yesu Mpulumutsi wathu." 
Titus1:5 Cifukwa ca ici ndinakusiya iwe m'Krete, kuti ukalongosole zosowa, nukaike akuru m'midzi yonse, monga ndinakulamulira;" 
Titus1:6 ngati wina ali wopanda cirema, mwamuna wa mkazi mmodzi, wokhala nao ana okhulupirira, wosasakaza zace, kapena wosakana kumvera mau." 
Titus1:7 Pakuti woyang'anira ayenera kukhala wopanda cirema, ngati mdindo wa Mulungu; wosati waliuma, wosapsa mtima msanga, wosati waciwawa, wopanda ndeu, wosati wa cisiriro conyansa;" 
Titus1:8 komatu wokonda kucereza alendo, wokonda zokoma, wodziweruza, wolungama, woyera mtima, wodziletsa;" 
Titus1:9 wogwira mau okhulupirika monga mwa ciphunzitso, kuti akakhoze kucenjeza m'ciphunzitso colamitsa, ndi kutsutsa otsutsana naye." 
Titus1:10 Pakuti alipo ambiri osamvera mau, olankhula zopanda pace, ndi onyenga, makamaka iwo a kumdulidwe," 
Titus1:11 amene ayenera kutsekedwa pakamwa; ndiwo amene apasula mabanja banja lonse, ndi kuphunzitsa zosayenera cifukwa ca cisiriro conyansa." 
Titus1:12 Wina wa mwa iwo, ndiye mneneri wa iwo okha, anati, Akrete ndiwo amabodza masiku onse, zirombo zoipa, aumbombo, aulesi." 
Titus1:13 Umboni uwu uli woona. Mwa ici uwadzudzule mokaripa, kuti akakhale olama m'cikhulupiriro," 
Titus1:14 osasamala nthanu zacabe za Ciyuda, ndi malamulo a anthu opatuka kusiyana naco coonadi." 
Titus1:15 Zonse ziyera kwa iwo amene ayera mtima; koma kwa iwo odetsedwa ndi osakhulupira kulibe kanthu koyera; komatu zadetsedwa nzeru zao ndi cikumbu mtima cao. 
Titus1:16 Abvomereza kuti adziwa Mulungu, koma ndi Debito zao amkana iye, popeza ali onyansitsa, ndi osamvera, ndi pa nchito zonse zabwino osatsimikizidwa." 
Titus2:1 Koma iwe, lankhula zimene ziyenera ciphunzitso colamitsa:" 
Titus2:2 okalamba akhale odzisunga, olemekezeka, odziletsa, olama m'cikhulupiriro, m'cikondi, m'cipiriro." 
Titus2:3 Momwemonso akazi okalamba akhale nao makhalidwe oyenera anthu oyera, osadierekeza, osakodwa naco cikondi ca pavinyo, akuphunzitsa zokoma;" 
Titus2:4 kuti akalangize akazi ang one akonde amuna ao, akonde ana ao," 
Titus2:5 akhale odziletsa, odekha, ocita m'nyumba mwao, okoma, akumvera amuna a iwo okha, kuti mau a Mulungu angacitidwe mwano." 
Titus2:6 Momwemonso anyamata uwadandaulire akhale odziletsa; 
Titus2:7 m'zonse udzionetsere wekha citsanzo ca nchito zabwino; m'ciphunzitse cako uonetsere cosabvunda, ulemekezeko," 
Titus2:8 mau olama osatsutsika; kuti iye wakutsutsana acite manyazi, posakhala nako kanthu koipa kakutinenera ife." 
Titus2:9 Akapolo amvere ambuye ao a iwo okha, nawakondweretse m'zonse; osakana mau ao;" 
Titus2:10 osatapa pa zao, komatu aonetsere cikhulupiriko conse cabwino; kuti akakometsere ciphunzitso ca Mpulumutsi wathu Mulungu m'zinthu zonse." 
Titus2:11 Pakuti caonekera cisomo ca Mulungu cakupulumutsa anthu onse," 
Titus2:12 ndi kutiphunzitsa ife kuti, pokana cisapembedzo ndi zilakolako za dziko lapansi, tikhale ndi moyo m'dziko lino odziletsa, ndi olungama, ndi opembedza;" 
Titus2:13 akulindira ciyembekezo eodala, ndi maonekedwe a ulemerero wa Mulungu wamkuru ndi Mpulumutsi wathu Yesu Kristu;" 
Titus2:14 amene anadzipereka yekha m'malo mwa ife, kuti akatiombole Ife ku zoipa zonse, nakadziyeretsere yekha anthu akhale ace eni eni, acangu pa nchito zokoma." 
Titus2:15 Izi lankhula, ndipo ucenjeze, nudzudzule ndi ulamuliro wonse. Munthu asakupeputse." 
Titus3:1 Uwakumbutse iwo agonje kwa akulu, ndi aulamuliro, akhale omvera, okonzeka pa nchito iri yonse yabwino;" 
Titus3:2 asacitire mwano munthu ali yense, asakhale andeu, akhale aulere, naonetsere cifatso conse pa anthu onse." 
Titus3:3 Pakuti kale ifenso tinali opusa, osamvera, onyengeka, akucitira ukapolo zilakolako ndi zokondweretsa za mitundu mitundu, okhala m'dumbo ndi njiru, odanidwa, odana wina ndi mnzace." 
Titus3:4 Koma pamene kukoma mtima, ndi cikondi ca pa anthu, ca Mpulumutsi wathu Mulungu zidaoneka," 
Titus3:5 zosati zocokera m'nchito za m'cilungamo, zimene tidazicita ife, komatu monga mwa cifundo cace anatipulumutsa ife, mwa kutsuka kwa kubadwanso ndi makonzedwe a Mzimu Woyera," 
Titus3:6 amene anatsanulira pa ife mocurukira, mwa Yesu Kristu Mpulumutsi wathu;" 
Titus3:7 kuti poyesedwa olungama ndi cisomo ca Iyetu, tikayesedwe olowa nyumba monga mwa ciyembekezo ca moyo wosatha." 
Titus3:8 Okhulupirika mauwa, ndipo za izi ndifuna kuti ulimbitse mau, kuti iwo akukhulupirira Mulungu asamalire akhalebe atsogoleri a nchito zabwino. Izi nzokoma ndi zopindulitsa anthu;" 
Titus3:9 koma pewa mafunso opusa, ndi mawerengedwe a mibadwo, ndi ndeu, ndi makani a pamalamulo; pakuti sizipindulitsa, ndipo ziri zacabe." 
Titus3:10 Munthu wopatukira cikhulupiriro, utamcenjeza kamodzi ndi kawiri, umkanize," 
Titus3:11 podziwa kuti worereyo wasandulika konse, nacimwa, nakhala wodzitsutsa Yekha." 
Titus3:12 Pamene ndikatuma Artema kwa iwe, kapena Tukiko, cita cangu kudza kwa ine ku Nikopoli: pakuti ndatsimikiza mtima kugonerako nyengo yacisanu." 
Titus3:13 Zena nkhoswe ya mirandu, ndi Apolo ufulumire kuwakonzera zaulendo, kuti asasowe kanthu," 
Titus3:14 Ndipo anthu athu aphunzirenso asunge nchito zabwino zofunika, kuti asakhale osabala zipstso." 
Titus3:15 Akulankhula iwe onse akukhala pamodzi ndi ine. Lankhula otikondawo m'cikhulupiriro. Cisomo cikhale ndi inu nonse. 
Philemon1:1 PAULO, wandende wa Kristu Yesu, ndi Timoteo mbaleyo, kwa Filemoni wokondedwayo ndi wanchito mnzathu," 
Philemon1:2 ndi kwa Apiya mlongoyo, ndi Arkipo msilikari mnzathu, ndi kwa Mpingo uli m'nyumba yako;" 
Philemon1:3 Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere za kwa Mulungu Atate wathu ndi Ambuye Yesu Kristu. 
Philemon1:4 Ndiyamika Mulungu wanga nthawi zonse, ndi kukumbukila iwe m'mapemphero anga," 
Philemon1:5 pakumva za cikondi cako ndi cikhulupiriro uli naco cakulinga kwa Ambuye Yesu, ndi kwa oyera mtima onse;" 
Philemon1:6 kuti ciyanjano ca cikhulupiriro cako cikakhale camphamvu podziwa cabwino ciri conse ciri mwa inu, ca kwa Kristu." 
Philemon1:7 Pakuti ndinali naco cimwemwe cambiri ndi cisangalatso pa cikondi cako, popeza mitima ya oyera mtima yatsitsimuka mwa iwe, mbale." 
Philemon1:8 Momwemo, ndingakhale ndiri nako kulimbika mtima kwakukuru m'Kristu kukulamulira cimene ciyenera," 
Philemon1:9 koma makamaka ndidandaulira mwa cikondi, pokhala wotere, Paulo nkhalamba, ndipo tsopano wandendenso wa Kristu Yesu;" 
Philemon1:10 ndikudandaulira cifukwa ca mwana wanga, amene ndambala m'ndende, Onesimo," 
Philemon1:11 amene kale sanakupindulira, koma tsopano watipindulira bwino iwe ndi ine;" 
Philemon1:12 amene ndi yemweyo ndakubwezera iwe, ndiye mtima weni weni wa ine." 
Philemon1:13 Ameneyo ndikadafuna ine kumsunga akhale nane, kuti m'malo mwako akadanditumikira ine m'ndende za Uthenga Wabwino:" 
Philemon1:14 koma wopanda kudziwa mtima wako sindinafuna kucita kanthu; kuti ubwino wako usakhale monga mokakamiza, komatu mwaufulu." 
Philemon1:15 Pakuti kapena anasiyanitsidwa ndi iwe kanthawi cifukwa ca ici, ndi kuti udzakhala naye nthawi zonse;" 
Philemon1:16 osatinso monga kapolo, koma woposa kapolo, mbale wokondedwa, makamaka ndi ine, koma koposa nanga ndi iwe, m'thupi, ndiponso mwa Ambuye." 
Philemon1:17 Ngati tsono undiyesa woyanjana nawe, umlandire iye monga ine mwini." 
Philemon1:18 Koma ngati anakulakwira kanthu, kapena wakongola kanthu, undiwerengere ine kameneko;" 
Philemon1:19 Ine Paulo ndicilemba ndi dzanja langa, ndidzacibwezera ine; kuti ndisanene nawe kuti iwe ndiwe mangawa anga." 
Philemon1:20 Inde, mbale, ndikondwere nawe mwa Ambuye: utsitsimutse mtima wanga mwa Kristu." 
Philemon1:21 Pokhulupirira kumvera kwako ndikulembera iwe, podziwa kuti udzacicanso koposa cimene ndinena." 
Philemon1:22 Koma undikonzerenso pogona; pakuti ndiyembekeza kuti mwa mapemphero anu ndidzapatsidwa kwa inu. 
Philemon1:23 Epafra wandende mnzanga mwa Kristu Yesu akulankhula iwe; 
Philemon1:24 ateronso, Marko, Aristarko, Dema, Luka, anchito anzanga." 
Philemon1:24 ateronso, Marko, Aristarko, Dema, Luka, anchito anzanga." 
Philemon1:25 Cisomo ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu cikhale pamodzi ndi mzimu wanu. Amen. 
Hebrews1:1 KALE Mulungu analankhula ndi makolo mwa aneneri m'manenedwe ambiri ndi mosiyana-siyana," 
Hebrews1:2 koma pakutha pace pa masiku ano analankhula ndi ife ndi Mwana amene anamuika wolowa nyumba wa zonse, mwa Iyenso analenga maiko ndi am'mwamba omwe;" 
Hebrews1:3 ameneyo, pokhala ali cinyezimiro ca ulemerero wace, ndi cizindikilo ceni ceni ca cikhalidwe cace, nanyamula zonse ndi mau a mphamvu yace, m'mene adacita ciyeretso ca zoipa, anakhala pa dzanja lamanja la Ukulu m'Mwamba," 
Hebrews1:4 atakhala wakuposa angelo, monga momwe adalowa dzina lakuposa iwo." 
Hebrews1:5 Pakuti kwa mngelo uti anati nthawi iri yonse, Iwe ndiwe Mwana wanga, Lero ine ndakubala Iwe? ndiponso, Ine ndidzakhala kwa iye Atate, Ndipo iye adzakhala kwa ine Mwana?" 
Hebrews1:6 Ndipo pamene atenganso wobadwa woyamba kulowa naye m'dziko, anena, Ndipo amgwadire iye angelo onse a Mulungu." 
Hebrews1:7 Ndipo za angelo anenadi, Amene ayesa angelo ace mizimu, Ndi omtumikira iye akhale lawi lamoto;" 
Hebrews1:8 Koma ponena za Mwana, ati, Mpando wacifumu wanu, Mulungu, ufikira nthawi za nthawi; Ndipo ndodo yacifumu yoongoka ndiyo ndodo ya ufumu wanu." 
Hebrews1:9 Mwakonda cilungamo, ndi kudana naco coipa; Mwa ici Mulungu, ndiye Mulungu wanu, wakudzozani Ndi mafuta a cikondwerero ceni ceni koposa anzanu." 
Hebrews1:10 Ndipo, Inu, Ambuye, paciyambipo munaika maziko ace a dziko, Ndipo miyamba iri nchito ya manja anu;" 
Hebrews1:11 Iyo idzatayika; komatu mukhalitsa; Ndipo iyo yonse idzasuka mongamaraya; 
Hebrews1:12 Ndi monga copfunda mudzaipinda Monga maraya, ndipo idzasanduka; Koma Inu ndinu yemweyo, Ndipo zaka zanu sizidzatha." 
Hebrews1:13 Koma za mngelo uti anati nthawi iri yonse, Khala pa dzanja lamanja langa, Kufikira ndikaika adani ako mpando wa ku mapazi ako?" 
Hebrews1:14 Kodi siiri yonse mizimu yotumikira, yotumidwa kuti itumikire iwo amene adzalowa cipulumutso?" 
Hebrews2:1 Mwa ici tiyenera kusamaliradi zimene tidazimvazi kuti kapena tingatengedwe ndi kusiyana nazo. 
Hebrews2:2 Pakuti ngati mau adalankhulidwa ndi angelo adakhala okhazikika, ndipo colakwira ciri conse ndi cosamvera calandira mphotho yobwezera yolungama," 
Hebrews2:3 tidzapulumuka bwanji ife, tikapanda kusamala cipulumutso cacikuru cotero? cimene Ambuye adayamba kucilankhula, ndipo iwo adacimva anatilimbikitsira ife;" 
Hebrews2:4 pocita umboni pamodzi nao Mulungunso ndi zizindikilo, ndi zozizwitsa ndi mphamvu za mitundu mitundu ndi zogawira za Mzimu Woyera, monga mwa cifuniro cace." 
Hebrews2:5 Pakuti sanagoniersera angelo dziko lirinkudza limene tinenali. 
Hebrews2:6 Koma wina anacita umboni pena, nati, Munthu nciani kuti mumkumbukila iye? Kapena mwana wa munthu kuti muceza naye?" 
Hebrews2:7 Munamcepsa pang'ono ndi angelo, Mudambveka iye korona wa ulemerero ndi ulemu, Ndipo mudamuika iye wovang'anira nchito za manja anu;" 
Hebrews2:8 Mudagonjetsa zonse pansi pa mapaziace. Pakuti muja adagonietsa zonse kwa iye, sanasiyapo kanthu kosamgoniera iye. Koma sitinayamba tsopano apa kuona zonse zimgonjera." 
Hebrews2:9 Koma timpenya iye amene adamcepsa pang'ono ndi angelo, ndiye Yesu, cifukwa ca zowawa za imfa, wobvala korona wa ulemerero ndi ulemu, kuti ndi cisomo ca Mulungu alawe imfa m'malo mwa munthu ali yense." 
Hebrews2:10 Pakuti kunamuyenera iye amene zonse ziri cifukwa ca iye, ndi zonse mwa Iye, pakutenga ana ambiri alowe ulemerero, kumkonza wamphumphu mtsogoleri woyamba wa cipulumutso cao mwa zowawa." 
Hebrews2:11 Pakuti iye wakuyeretsa ndi iwo akuyeretsedwa acokera onse mwa mmodzi; cifukwa ca ici alibe manyazi kuwacha iwo abale," 
Hebrews2:12 ndi kuti, ndidzalalikira dzina lanu kwa abale anga, Pakati pa Mpingo ndidzakuyimbirani." 
Hebrews2:13 Ndiponso, Ndidzamtama Iye. Ndiponso, Taonani, Ine ndi ana amene Mulungu anandipatsa," 
Hebrews2:14 Popeza tsono ana ndiwo a mwazi ndi nyama, Iyenso momwemo adalawa nao makhalidwe omwewo kuti mwa imfa akamuononge iye amene anali nayo mphamvu ya imfa, ndiye mdierekezi;" 
Hebrews2:15 nakamasule iwo onse amene, cifukwa ca kuopa imfa, m'moyo wao wonse adamangidwa ukapolo." 
Hebrews2:16 Pakuti ndithu salandira angelo, koma alandira mbeu ya Abrahamu." 
Hebrews2:17 Potero kudamuyenera kufanizidwa ndi abale m'zonse, kuti akadzakhala mkulu wa ansembe wadfundo ndi wokhulupirika m'zinthu zakwa Mulungu, kuti apereke dipo la zoipa za anthu." 
Hebrews2:18 Pakuti popeza adamva zowawa, poyesedwa yekha, akhoza kuthandiza iwo amene ayesedwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Potero, abale oyera mtima, olandirana nao maitanidwe akumwamba, lingirirani za Mtumwi ndi. Mkuluwansembe wa cibvomerezo cathu, Yesu;" 
Hebrews3:2 amene anakhala wokhulupirika kwa iye adamuikayo, monganso Mose m'nyumba yace yonse." 
Hebrews3:3 Pakuti ameneyo wayesedwa woyenera ulemerero woposa Mose, monga momwe iye amene anaimanga nyumba ali nao ulemerero woposa nyumbayi." 
Hebrews3:4 Pakuti nyumba iri yonse iri naye wina woimanga; koma wozimanga zonse ndiye Mulungu. 
Hebrews3:5 Ndipo Mosetu anali wokhulupirika m'nyumba yace yonse, monga mnyamata, acitire umboni izi zidzalankhulidwazi;" 
Hebrews3:6 koma Kristu monga mwana, wosunga nyumba yace; ndife nyumba yace, ngati tigwiritsa kulimbika mtima ndi kudzitamandira kwa ciye-I mbekezoeo, kucigwira kufikira citsiriziro." 
Hebrews3:7 Momwemo, monga anena Mzimu Woyera, Lero ngati mudzamva mau ace," 
Hebrews3:8 Musaumitse mitima yanu, monga m'kupsetsa mtimamo, Monga muja tsiku la ciyesero m'cipululu," 
Hebrews3:9 Cimene makolo anu anandiyesa naco, Ndi kundibvomereza, Naona nchito zanga zaka makumi anai." 
Hebrews3:10 Momwemo ndinakwiya nao mbadwouwu, Ndipo ndinati, Nthawi zonse amasocera mumtima; Koma sanazindikira njira zangaiwowa;" 
Hebrews3:11 Monga ndinalumbira m'ukali wanga: Ngati adzalowa mpumulo wanga! 
Hebrews3:12 Tapenyani, abale, kuti kapena ukakhale mwa wina wa inu mtima woipa wosakhulupira, wakulekana ndi Mulungu wamoyo;" 
Hebrews3:13 komatu dandauliranani nokha tsiku ndi tsiku, pamene paehedwa, Lero; kuti angaumitsidwe wina wa inu ndi cenjerero la ucimo;" 
Hebrews3:14 pakuti takhala ife olandirana ndi Kristu, ngatitu tigwiritsa ciyambi ca kutama kwathu kucigwira kufikira citsiriziro;" 
Hebrews3:15 umo anenamo, Lero ngati mudzamva mau ace, Musaumitse mitima yanu, monga pa kupsetsa mtima." 
Hebrews3:16 Pakuti ndi ayani, pakumva, anapsetsa mtima? Kodi si onse aja adaturuka m'Aigupto ndi Mose?" 
Hebrews3:17 Koma anakwiya ndi ayani zaka makumi anai? Kodi si ndi awo adacimwawo, amene matupi ao adagwa m'cipululu?" 
Hebrews3:18 Ndipo adawalumbirira ayani kuti asalowe mpumulo wace? 
Hebrews3:19 Si awo kodiosamverawo? Ndipo tiona kuti sanakhoza kulowa cifukwa ca kusakhulupirira. 
Hebrews4:1 Cifukwa cace tiope kuti kapena likatsala lonjezano lakulowa mpumulo wace, wina wa inu angaoneke ngati adaliperewera." 
Hebrews4:2 Pakuti kwa ifenso walalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino, monganso kwa iwo; koma iwowa sanapindula nao mau omvekawo, popeza sanasanganizika ndi cikhulupiriro mwa iwo amene adawamva." 
Hebrews4:3 Popeza ife amene takhulupira tilowa mpumulowo, monga momwe ananena, Monga ndalumbira mu mkwiyowanga, Ngati adzalowa mpumulo wanga: zingakhale nebitozo zidatsirizika kuyambira kuzika kwa dziko lapansi." 
Hebrews4:4 Pakuti wanena pena za tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri, natero, Ndipo Mulungu anapumula tsiku lacisanu ndi ciwiri, kuleka nchito zace zonse" 
Hebrews4:5 Ndipo m'menemonso, Ngati adzalowa mpumulo wanga." 
Hebrews4:6 Popeza tsono patsala kuti ena akalowa momwemo, ndi iwo amene Uthenga Wabwino unalalikidwa kwa iwo kale sanalowamo cifukwa ca kusamvera," 
Hebrews4:7 alangizanso tsiku lina, ndi kunena m'Davide, itapita nthawi yaikuru yakuti, Lero, monga kwanenedwakale, Lero ngati mudzamva mau ace, Musaumitse mitima yanu." 
Hebrews4:8 Pakuti ngati Yoswa akadawapumitsa iwo, sakadalankhuia m'tsogolomo za tsiku lina." 
Hebrews4:9 Momwemo utsalira mpumulo wa Sabata wa kwa anthu a Mulungu. 
Hebrews4:10 Pakuti iye amene adalowa mpumulo wace, adapumulanso mwini wace ku nchito zace, monganso Mulungu ku zace za iye." 
Hebrews4:11 Cifukwa cace ticite cangu ca kulowa mpumulowo, kuti f winaangagwe m'citsanzo comwe ca kusamvera." 
Hebrews4:12 Pakuti mau a Mulungu ali amoyo, ndi ocitacita, ndi akuthwa koposa lupanga lakuthwa konse konse, napyoza kufikira kugawira moyo ndi mzimu, ndi zimfundo ndi mafuta a m'mafupa, nazindikiritsa zolingirira ndi zitsimikizo za mtima." 
Hebrews4:13 Ndipo palibe colengedwa cosaonekera pamaso pace, koma zonse zikhala za pambalambanda ndi zobvundukuka pamaso pace pa iye amene ticita naye." 
Hebrews4:14 Popeza tsono tiri naye Mkuluwansembe wamkuru, wopyoza miyamba, Yesu Mwana wa Mulungu, tigwiritsitse cibvomerezo cathu." 
Hebrews4:15 Pakuti sitiri naye mkulu wa ansembe wosatha kumva cifundo ndi zofoka zathu; koma wayesedwa m'zonse monga momwe ife, koma wopanda ucimo." 
Hebrews4:16 Potero tilimbike mtima poyandikira mpando wacifumu wacisomo, kuti tilandire cifundo ndi kupeza cisomo ca kutithandiza nthawi yakusowa." 
Hebrews5:1 Pakuti mkulu wa ansembe ali yense, wotengedwa mwa anthu, amaikika cifukwa ca anthu m'zinthu za kwa Mulungu, kuti apereke mitulo, ndiponso nsembe, cifukwa ca macimo:" 
Hebrews5:2 akhale wokhoza kumva cifundo ndi osadziwa ndi olakwa, popeza iye yekhanso amazingwa ndi cifoko;" 
Hebrews5:3 ndipo cifukwa caceco ayenera, monga m'malo a anthuwo, moteronso m'malo a iye yekha, kupereka nsembe cifukwa ca macimo." 
Hebrews5:4 Ndipo palibe munthu adzitengera ulemuwo mwini wace, komatu iye amene aitanidwa ndi Mulungu, monga momwenso Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Koteronso Kristu sanadzilemekeza yekha ayesedwe Mkuluwansembe, komatu iye amene analankhula kwa iye, Mwana wanga ndi Iwe, Lero Ine ndakubala Iwe;" 
Hebrews5:6 Monga anenanso mwina, Iwe ndiwe wansembe wa nthawizonse Monga mwa dongosolo la Melikizedeke." 
Hebrews5:7 Ameneyo, m'masiku a thupi lace anapereka mapemphero ndi mapembedzero pamodzi ndi kulira kwakukuru ndi misozi kwa iye amene anakhoza kumpulumutsa iye muimfa, ndipo anamveka popeza anaopa Mulungu," 
Hebrews5:8 angakhale anali Mwana, anaphunzira kumvera ndi izi adamva kuwawa nazo;" 
Hebrews5:9 ndipo pamene anakonzeka wamphumphu anakhala kwa onse akumvera iye cifukwa ca cipulumutso cosatha; 
Hebrews5:10 wochedwa ndi Mulungu mkulu wa ansembe monga mwa dongosolo la Melikizedeke. 
Hebrews5:11 Za iye tirinao mau ambiri kuwanena, ndiotilaka powatanthauzira, popeza mwagontha m'makutu." 
Hebrews5:12 Pakuti mungakhale mwayenera kukhala aphunzitsi cifukwa ca nyengoyi, muli nako kusowanso kuti wina aphunzitse inu zoyamba za ciyambidwe ca maneno a Mulungu; ndipo mukhala onga ofuna mkaka, osati cakudya cotafuna." 
Hebrews5:13 Pakuti yense wakudya mkaka alibe cizolowezi ca mau a cilungamo; pakuti ali khanda. 
Hebrews5:14 Koma cakudya cotafuna ciri ca anthu akulu misinkhu, amene mwa kucita nazo anazoloweretsa zizindikiritso zao kusiyanitsa cabwino ndi coipa." 
Hebrews6:1 Mwa ici, polekana nao mau a ciyambidwe ca Kristu, tipitirire kutsata ukulu msinkhu; osaikanso maziko a kutembenuka mtima kusiyana nazo nchito zakufa, ndi a cikhulupiriro ca pa Mulungu," 
Hebrews6:2 a ciphunzitso ca ubatizo, a kuika manja, a kuuka kwa akufa, ndi a ciweruziro cosatha." 
Hebrews6:3 Ndipo ici tidzacita, akatilola Mulungu." 
Hebrews6:4 Pakuti sikutheka kuwakonzanso, atembenuke mtima, iwo amene anaunikidwa pa nthawi yace, nalawa mphatso ya Kumwamba, nakhala olandirana naye Mzimu Woyera," 
Hebrews6:5 nalawa mau okoma a Mulungu, ndi mphamvu ya nthawi irinkudza," 
Hebrews6:6 koma anagwa m'cisokero; popeza adzipaeikiranso okha Mwana wa Mulungu, namcititsa manyazi poyera." 
Hebrews6:7 Pakuti nthaka imene idamwa mvula iigwera kawiri kawiri, nipatsa therere loyenera iwo amene adailimira, ilandira dalitso locokera kwa Mulungu:" 
Hebrews6:8 koma ikabala minga ndi mitungwi, itayika; nitsala pang'ono ikadatembereredwa; citsiriziro cace ndico kutenthedwa." 
Hebrews6:9 Koma, okondedwa, takopeka mtima kuti za inu ziri zoposa ndi zophatikana cipulumutso, tingakhale titero pakulankhula;" 
Hebrews6:10 pakuti Mulungu sali wosalungama kuti adzaiwala nchito yanu, ndi cikondico mudacionetsera ku dzina lace, umo mudatumikira oyera mtima ndi kuwatumikirabe." 
Hebrews6:11 Koma tikhumba kuti yense wa inu aonetsere cangu comweci colinga ku ciyembekezo cokwanira kufikira citsiriziro; 
Hebrews6:12 kuti musakhale aulesi, koma akuwatsanza iwo amene alikulowa malonjezano mwa cikhulupiriro ndi kuleza mtima." 
Hebrews6:13 Pakuti pamene Mulungu analonjezana naye Abrahamu, popeza analibe wamkuru woposa kumlumbira, analumbira pa iye yekha," 
Hebrews6:14 nati, Kudalitsatu ndidzakudalitsa iwe, ndipo kucurukitsa ndidzakucurukitsa iwe." 
Hebrews6:15 Ndipo potero atapirira analandira lonjezanolo. 
Hebrews6:16 Pakuti anthu amalumbira pa wamkulu; ndipo m'citsutsano cao ciri conse lumbiro litsiriza kutsimikiza. 
Hebrews6:17 Momwemo Mulungu, pofuna kuonetsera mocurukira kwa olowa a lonjezano kuti cifuniro cace sicisinthika, analowa pakati ndi lumbiro;" 
Hebrews6:18 kuti mwa zinthu ziwiri zosasinthika, m'mene Mulungu sakhoza kunama, tikakhale naco coticenjeza colimba, ife amene tidathawira kucigwira ciyembekezo coikika pamaso pathu;" 
Hebrews6:19 cimene tiri naco ngati nangula wa moyo, cokhazikika ndi colimbanso, ndi cakulowa m'katikati mwa cophimba;" 
Hebrews6:20 m'mene Yesu mtsogoleri analowamo cifukwa ca ife, atakhala mkulu wa ansembe nthawi yosatha monga mwa dongosolo la Melikizedeke." 
Hebrews7:1 Pakuti Melikizedeke uyu, Mfumu ya Salemu, wansembe wa Mulungu Wamkulukulu, amene anakomana ndi Abrahamu, pobwera iye adawapha mafumu aja, namdalitsa," 
Hebrews7:2 amenenso Abrahamu anamgawira limodzi la magawo khumi la zonse (ndiye posandulika, poyamba ali Mfumu ya cilungamo, pameneponso Mfumu ya Salemu, ndiko, Mfumu ya mtendere;" 
Hebrews7:3 wopanda atate wace, wopanda amace, wopanda mawerengedwe a cibadwidwe cace, alibe ciyambi ca masiku ace kapena citsiriziro ca moyo wace, wofanizidwa ndi Mwana wa Mulungu), iyeyu wakhala wansembe kosalekeza." 
Hebrews7:4 Koma tapenyani ukulu wace wa iyeyu, amene Abrahamu, kholo lalikuru, anampatsa limodzi la magawo khumi la zosankhika za kunkhondo." 
Hebrews7:5 Ndipo iwotu mwa ana a Levi akulandira nchito yakupereka nsembe, ali nalo lamulo lakuti atenge limodzi la magawo khumi kwa anthu monga mwa cilamulo, ndiko kwa abaleao, angakhale adaturuka m'cuuno ca Abrahamu;" 
Hebrews7:6 koma iye amene mawerengedwe a cibadwidwe cace sacokera mwa iwo, anatenga limodzi la magawo khumi kwa Abrahamu, namdalitsa iye amene ali nao malonjezano." 
Hebrews7:7 Ndipo popanda citsutsano konse wamng'ono adalitsidwa ndi wamkuru. 
Hebrews7:8 Ndipo pano anthu ofeka alandira limodzi la magawo khumi; koma apo iye, woti adamcitira umboni kuti ali ndi moyo." 
Hebrews7:9 Ndipo kuli ngati kunena, mwa Abrahamu Levinso wakulandira limodzi limodzi la magawo khumi adapereka limodzi la magawo khumi;" 
Hebrews7:10 pakuti pajapo anali m'cuuno ca atate wace, pamene Melikizedeke anakomana naye." 
Hebrews7:11 Ndipo pakadakhala ungwiro mwa unsembe wa Cilevi (pakuti momwemo anthu analandira cilamulo), pakadatsala kusowa kotani kuti auke wansembe wina monga mwa dongosolo la Melikizedeke, wosayesedwa monga mwa dongosolo la Aroni?" 
Hebrews7:12 Pakuti posandulika unsembe, kufunikanso kuti lamulo lisandulike." 
Hebrews7:13 Pakuti iye amene izi zineneka za iye, akhala wa pfuko lina, wa ili palibe munthu watumikira guwa la nsembe." 
Hebrews7:14 Pakuti kwadziwikadi kuti Ambuye wathu anaturuka mwa Yuda; za pfuko ili Mose sanalankhula kanthu ka ansembe. 
Hebrews7:15 Ndipo kwadziwikatu koposa ndithu, ngati auka wansembe wina monga mwa mafanidwe a Melikizedeke," 
Hebrews7:16 amene wakhala si monga mwa lamulo la lamuliro la kwa thupi, komatu monga mwa mphamvu ya moyo wosaonongeka;" 
Hebrews7:17 pakuti amcitira umboni, Iwe ndiwe wansembe nthawi yosatha Monga mwa dongosolo la Melikizedeke." 
Hebrews7:18 Pakutitu kuli kutaya kwace kwa lamulo lidadza kalelo, cifukwa ca kufoka kwace, ndi kusapindulitsa kwace," 
Hebrews7:19 (pakuti cilamulo sicinacitira kanthu kakhale kopanda cirema), ndipo kulinso kulowa naco ciyembekezo coposa, cimene tiyandikira naco kwa Mulungu." 
Hebrews7:20 Ndipo monga momwe sikudacitika kopanda lumbiro; 
Hebrews7:21 (pakuti iwotu anayesedwa ansembe kopanda lumbiro; koma iye ndi lumbiro mwa iye emeoe ananena kwa iye, Walumbira Ambuye ndipo sadzalapa, Iwe ndiwe wansembe nthawi yosatha)." 
Hebrews7:22 Momwemonso Yesu wakhala Nkhoswe ya pangano loposa. 
Hebrews7:23 Ndipo iwo ndiwo ambiri anakhala ansembe, popeza imfa idawaletsa asakhalebe;" 
Hebrews7:24 koma iye cifukwa kuti akhala iye nthawi yosatha ali nao unsembe wosasinthika," 
Hebrews7:25 kucokera komwekoakhoza kupulumutsa konse konse iwo akuyandikira kwa Mulungu mwa iye, popeza ali nao moyo wace cikhalire wa kuwapembedzera iwo." 
Hebrews7:26 Pakuti mkulu wa ansembe wotere anatiyenera ife, woyera mtima, wopanda coipa, wosadetsedwa, wosiyana ndi ocimwa, wakukhala wopitirira miyamba;" 
Hebrews7:27 amene alibe cifukwa ca kupereka nsembe tsiku ndi tsiku monga akulu a ansembe, yoyambira cifukwa ca zoipa za iwo eni, yinayi cifukwa ca zoipa za anthu; pakuti ici anacita kamodzi, kwatha, podzipereka yekha." 
Hebrews7:28 Pakuti cilamulo cimaika akuru a ansembe anthu, okhala naco cifoko; koma mau a lumbirolo, amene anafika citapita cilamulo, aika Mwana, woyesedwa wopanda cirema ku nthawi zonse." 
Hebrews8:1 Koma mutu wafzi tanenazi ndi uwu: Tiri naye Mkuruwansembe wotere, amene anakhala pa dzanja lamanja la mpando wacifumu wa Ukulu m'Kumwamba,"
