Hebrews8:2 Mtumiki wa malo opatulika, ndi wa cihema coona, cimene Ambuye anacimanga, si munthu ai." 
Hebrews8:3 Pakuti mkulu wa ansembe ali yense aikidwa kupereka mitulo, ndiponso nsembe; potero nkufunika kuti ameneyo akhale nako kanthunso kakupereka," 
Hebrews8:4 Ndipo iye akadakhala padziko, sakadakhala konse wansembe, popeza pali iwo akupereka mitulo monga mwa lamulo;" 
Hebrews8:5 amene atumikira cifaniziro ndi mthunzi wa zakumwambazo monga Mose acenjezedwa m'mene anafuna kupanga cihema: pakuti, Cenjera, ati, ucite zonse monga mwa citsanzoco caonetsedwa kwa iwe m'phiri." 
Hebrews8:6 Koma tsopano iye walandira citumikiro comveka coposa, umonso ali Nkhoswe ya pangano labwino loposa, limene likhazikika pa malonjezano oposa." 
Hebrews8:7 Pakuti loyamba lija likadakhala lopanda cirema sakadafuna malo a laciwirilo. 
Hebrews8:8 Pakuti powachulira iwo cifukwa, anena, Taonani, akudza masiku, anena Ambuye, Ndipo ndidzapangana pangano latsopano ndi nyumba ya Israyeli, ndi nyumba ya Yuda," 
Hebrews8:9 Losati longa pangano ndinalicita ndi makolo ao, Tsikuli ndinawagwira kudzanja iwo kuwatsogolera aturuke m'dziko la Aigupto; Kuti iwo sanakhalabe m'pangano langa, Ndipo loe sindinawasamalira iwo, anena Ambuye," 
Hebrews8:10 Pakuti ili ndi pangano ndidzalipangana ndi nyumba ya Israyeli, Atapita masiku ajawa, anena Ambuye: Ndidzapatsa malamulo anga kuwalonga m'nzeru zao, Ndipo pamtima pao ndidzawalemba iwo; Ndipo ndidzawakhalira iwo Mulungu, Ndipo iwo adzandikhalira Ine anthu:" 
Hebrews8:11 Ndipo sadzaphunzitsa yense mfulu mnzace, Ndipo yense mbale wace, ndi kuti, Zindikira Ambuye: Pakuti onse adzadziwa Ine, Kuyambira wamng'ono kufikira wamkuru wa iwo." 
Hebrews8:12 Kuti ndidzacitira cifundo rosalungama zao, Ndipo zoipa zao sindidzazikumbukanso." 
Hebrews8:13 Pakunena iye, Latsopano, anagugitsa loyambali. Koma cimene cirimkuguga ndi kusukuluka, cayandikira kukanganuka." 
Hebrews9:1 Ndipo cingakhale cipangano coyambaci cinali nazo zoikika za kulambira, ndi malo opatulika a pa dziko lapansi." 
Hebrews9:2 Pakuti cihema cidakonzeka, coyamba cija, m'menemo munali coikapo nyali, ndi gome, ndi mkate woonekera; paja paitanidwa Malo Opatulika," 
Hebrews9:3 Koma m'kati mwa cophimba caciwiri, cihema conenedwa Malo Opatulikitsa;" 
Hebrews9:4 okhala nayo mbale ya zofukiza yagolidi ndi likasa la cipangano, lokuta ponsepo ndi golidi, momwemo munali mbiya yagolidi yosungamo mana, ndi ndodo ya Aroni idapukayo, ndi magome a cipangano;" 
Hebrews9:5 ndi pamwamba pace akerubi a ulemerero akucititsa mthunzi pacotetezerapo; za izi sitikhoza kunena tsopano padera padera. 
Hebrews9:6 Ndipo izi zitakonzeka kotero, ansembe amalowa m'cihema coyamba kosalekeza, ndi kutsiriza kulambirako;" 
Hebrews9:7 koma kulowa m'caciwiri, mkuru wa ansembe yekha kamodzi pacaka, wosati wopanda mwazi, umene apereka cifukwa ca iye yekha, ndi zolakwa za anthu;" 
Hebrews9:8 Mzimu Woyera wodziwitsa nako, kuti njira yolowa nayo ku malo opatulika siinaonetsedwe, pokhala cihema coyamba ciri ciriri;" 
Hebrews9:9 ndico ciphiphiritso ca ku nthawi yomweyi, m'mene mitulo ndi nsembenso zinaperekedwa zosakhoza, ponena za cikumbu mtima, kuyesa wangwiro wolambirayo." 
Hebrews9:10 Popeza akhala zoikika za thupi zokha (ndi zakudya, ndi zakumwa, ndi masambidwe osiyana-siyana), oikidwa kufikira nthawi yakukonzanso." 
Hebrews9:11 Koma atafika Kristu, Mkuluwansembe wa zokoma zirinkudza, mwa cihema cacikuru ndi cangwiro coposa, cosamangika ndi manja, ndiko kunena kuti, cosati ca ciiengedweici," 
Hebrews9:12 kapena mwa mwazi wa mbuzi ndi ana a ng'ombe, koma mwa mwazi wa iye yekha, analowa kamodzi ku malo opatulika, atalandirapo ciombolo cosatha." 
Hebrews9:13 Pakuti ngati mwazi wa mbuzi ndi ng'ombe zamphongo, ndi makala a ng'ombe yamthandi owazawaza pa iwo odetsedwa, upatutsa kufikira ciyeretso ca thupi;" 
Hebrews9:14 koposa kotani nanga mwazi wa Kristu amene anadzipereka yekha wopanda cirema kwa Mulungu mwa Mzimu wosatha, udzayeretsa cikumbu mtima canu kucisiyanitsa ndi nchito zakufa, kukatumikira Mulungu wamoyo?" 
Hebrews9:15 Ndipo mwa ici ali Nkhoswe ya cipangano catsopano, kotero kuti, popeza kudacitika imfa yakuombola zolakwa za pa cipangano coyamba, oitanidwawo akalandire lonjezano la zolowa zosatha." 
Hebrews9:16 Pakuti pamene pali copangiratu pafunika pafike imfa ya wolemberayo. 
Hebrews9:17 Pakuti copangiratu ciona mphamvu atafa mwini wace; popeza ciribe mphamvu konse pokhala wolemberayo ali ndi moyo; 
Hebrews9:18 momwemo coyambaconso sicinakonzeka copanda mwazi. 
Hebrews9:19 Pakuti pamene Mose adalankhulira anthu once lamulo liri lonse monga mwa cilamulo, anatenga mwazi wa ana a ng'ombe ndi mbuzi, pamodzi ndi madzi ndi ubweya wofiira ndi hisope, nawaza buku lomwe, ndi anthu onse," 
Hebrews9:20 nati, 1 Uwu ndi mwazi wa cipangano Mulungu adakulamulirani." 
Hebrews9:21 Ndiponso cihema ndi zotengera zonse za utumikiro anaziwaza momwemo ndi mwaziwo. 
Hebrews9:22 Ndipo monga mwa cilamulo zitsala zinthu pang'ono zosayeretsedwa ndi mwazi, ndipo 2 wopanda kukhetsa mwazi kulibe kumasuka." 
Hebrews9:23 Pomwepo padafunika kuti 3 zifaniziro za zinthu za m'Mwamba ziyeretsedwe ndi izi; koma zam'mwamba zeni zeni ziyeretsedwe ndi nsembe zoposa izi. 
Hebrews9:24 Pakuti 4 Kristu sanalowa m'malo opatulika omangika ndi manja, akutsanza oonawo; komatu m'Mwamba momwe, 5 kuonekera tsopano pamaso pa Mulungu cifukwa ca ife;" 
Hebrews9:25 kosati kuti adzipereke yekha kawiri kawiri; 6 monga mkulu wa ansembe alowa m'malo opatulika caka ndi caka ndi mwazi wosati wace; 
Hebrews9:26 cikadatero, kukadamuyenera kumva zowawa kawiri kawiri kuyambira kuzika kwa dziko lapansi; kama tsopano 7 kamodzi pa citsirizo ca nthawizo waonekera kucotsa ucimo mwa nsembe ya iye yekha." 
Hebrews9:27 Ndipo popeza 8 kwaikikatu kwa anthu kufa kamodzi, ndipo 9 atafa, ciweruziro;" 
Hebrews9:28 kotero 10 Kristunso ataperekedwa nsembe kamodzi kukasenza macimo a ambiri, 11 adzaonekera pa nthawi yaciwiri, wopanda ucimo, kwa iwo amene amlindirira, kufikira cipulumutso." 
Hebrews10:1 mthunzi wa zokoma zirinkudza, osati cifaniziro ceni ceni ca zinthuzo, sicikhozatu, ndi nsembe zomwezi caka ndi caka, zimene azipereka kosalekeza, kuwayesera angwiro iwo akuyandikira." 
Hebrews10:2 Pakadapanda kutero, kodi sakadaleka kuzipereka, cifukwa otumikirawo sakadakhala naco cikumbu mtima ca macimo, popeza adayeretsedwa kamodzi?" 
Hebrews10:3 Komatu mu izizo muli cikumbukiro ca macimo caka ndi caka. 
Hebrews10:4 Pakuti sikutheka kuti mwazi wa ng'ombe zamphongo, ndimbuzi ukacotsera macimo." 
Hebrews10:5 Mwa ici polowa m'dziko lapansi, anena, Nsembe ndi copereka simunazifuna, Koma thupi munandikonzera Ine." 
Hebrews10:6 Nsembe zopsereza zamphumphu ndi za kwa macimo simunakondwera nazo; 
Hebrews10:7 Pamenepo ndinati, Taonani, ndafika, (Pamutu pace pa buku palembedwa za Ine) Kudzacita cifuniro canu, Mulungu," 
Hebrews10:8 Pakunena pamwamba apa, kuti, Nsembe ndi zopereka ndi nsembe zopsereza zamphumphu ndi za kwa macimo simunazifuna, kapena kukondwera nazo (zimene ziperekedwa monga mwa lamulo)," 
Hebrews10:9 pamenepo anati, Taonani, ndafika kudzacita cifuniro canu. Acotsa coyambaco, kuti akaike caciwirico." 
Hebrews10:10 Ndi cifuniro cimeneco tayeretsedwa mwa copereka ca thupi la Yesu Kristu, kamodzi, kwatha." 
Hebrews10:11 Ndipotu wansembe ali yenseamaima tsiku ndi tsiku, natumikira, napereka nsembe zomwezi kawiri kawiri, zimene sizikhoza konse kucotsa macimo;" 
Hebrews10:12 koma iye, m'mene adapereka nsembe imodzi cifukwa ca macimo, anakhala pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu cikhalire;" 
Hebrews10:13 kuyambira pomwepo alindirira, kufikira adani ace aikidwa akhale mpando ku mapazi ace." 
Hebrews10:14 Pakuti ndi cipereko cimodzi anawayesera angwiro cikhalire iwo oyeretsedwa. 
Hebrews10:15 Koma Mzimu Woyeranso aticitira umboni; pakuti adatha kunena," 
Hebrews10:16 ici ndi cipangano ndidzapangana nao, Atapira masiku ajawo, anena Ambuye: Ndidzapereka malamulo anga akhale pamtima pao; Ndipo pa nzeru zao ndidzawalemba;" 
Hebrews10:17 Ndipo macimo ao ndi masayeruziko ao sindidzawakumbukilanso. 
Hebrews10:18 Koma pomwe pali cikhululukiro ca macimo palibenso copereka ca kwaucimo. 
Hebrews10:19 Ndipo pokhala naco, abale, cilimbikitso cakulowa m'malo opatulika, ndi mwazi wa Yesu," 
Hebrews10:20 pa njira yatsopano ndi yamoyo, imene adatikonzera, mwa cocinga, ndico thupi lace;" 
Hebrews10:21 ndipo popeza tiri naye wansembe wamkuru wosunga nyumba ya Mulungu; 
Hebrews10:22 tiyandikire ndi mtima woona, m'cikhulupiriro cokwanira, ndi mitima yathu yowazidwa kuicotsera cikumbu mtima coipa, ndi matupi athu osambitsidwa ndi madzi oyera;" 
Hebrews10:23 tigwiritse cibvomerezo cosagwedera ca ciyembekezo cathu, pakuti wolonjezayo ali wokhulupirika;" 
Hebrews10:24 ndipo tiganizirane wina ndi mnzace kuti tifulumizane ku cikondano ndi nchito zabwino," 
Hebrews10:25 osaieka kusonkhana kwathu pamodzi, monga amacita ena, komatu tidandaulirane, ndiko koposa monga momwe muona tsiku lirikuyandika." 
Hebrews10:26 Pakuti tikacimwa ife eni ace, titatha kulandira cidziwitso ca coonadi, siitsalanso nsembe ya kwa macimo," 
Hebrews10:27 koma kulindira kwina koopsa kwa ciweruziro, ndi kutentha kwace kwa mota wakuononga otsutsana nao." 
Hebrews10:28 Munthu wopeputsa cilamulo ca Mose angofa opanda cifundo pa mboni ziwiri kapena zitatu: 
Hebrews10:29 ndipo mutani, kulanga koposa kotani nanga adzayesedwa woyenera iye amene anapondereza Mwana wa Mulungu, nayesa mwazi wa cipangano umene anayeretsedwa nao cinthu wamba, z nacitira cipongwe Mzimu wa cisomo;" 
Hebrews10:30 pakuti timdziwa iye amene anati, 1 Kubwezera cilango nkwanga, loe ndidzabwezera. Ndiponso; 2 Ambuye adzaweruza anthu ace." 
Hebrews10:31 3 Kugwa m'manja a Mulungu wamoyo nkoopsa. 
Hebrews10:32 Koma tadzikumbursani masiku akale, m'menemo mutaunikidwa 4 mudapirira citsutsano cacikuru ca zowawa;" 
Hebrews10:33 pena pocitidwa 5 cinthu cooneredwa mwa matonzo ndi zisautso; penanso polawana nao iwo ocitidwa zotere. 
Hebrews10:34 Pakuti 6 munamva cifundo ndi iwo a m'ndende, ndiponso mudalola mokondwera kulandidwa kwa cuma canu, 7 pozindikira kuti muli naco nokha cuma coposa caeikhalire." 
Hebrews10:35 Potero musataye kulimbika kwanu, kumene kuli naco cobwezera mphotho cacikuru." 
Hebrews10:36 Pakuti cikusowani cipiriro, kuti 8 pamene mwacita cifuniro ca Mulungu, mukalandire lonjezano." 
Hebrews10:37 9 Pakuti katsala kanthawi kakang'onong'ono, Ndipowakudzayoadzafika, wesacedwa." 
Hebrews10:38 10 Koma wolungama wangayo adzakhala ndi moyo wocokera m'cikhulupiriro: Ndipo ngati abwerera, moyo wanga ulibe kukondwera mwaiye." 
Hebrews10:39 Koma ife si ndife 11 a iwo akubwerera kulowa citayiko; koma 12 a iwo a cikhulupiriro ca ku cipulumutso ca moyo. 
Hebrews11:1 Koma cikhulupiriro ndico cikhazikitso ca zinthu zoyembekezeka, ciyesero ca zinthu zosapenyeka." 
Hebrews11:2 Pakuti momwemo akulu anacitidwa umboru. 
Hebrews11:3 Ndi cikhulupiriro tizindikira kuti maiko ndi a m'mwamba omwe anakonzedwa ndi mau a Mulungu, kotero kuti zinthu zopenyeka sizinapangidwa zocokera mwa zoonekazo." 
Hebrews11:4 Ndi cikhulupiriro Abeli anapereka kwa Mulungu nsembe yoposa ija ya Kami, mene anacitidwa umboni nayo kuti anali wolungama; nacitapo umboni Mulungu pa mitulo yace; ndipo momwemo iye, angakhale adafa alankhulabe." 
Hebrews11:5 Ndi cikhulupiriro Enoke anatengedwa kuti angaone imfa; ndipo sanapezeka, popeza Mulungu adamtenga: pakuti asanamtenge, anacitidwa umboni kuti anakondweretsa Mulungu;" 
Hebrews11:6 koma wopanda cikhulupiriro sikutheka kumkondweretsa; pakuti iye wakudza kwa Mulungu ayenera kukhulupirira kuti alipo, ndi kuti ali wobwezera mphotho iwo akumfuna iye." 
Hebrews11:7 Ndi cikhulupiriro Nowa, pocenjezedwa ndi Mulungu za zinthu zisanapenyeke, ndi pocita mantha, anamanga cingalawa ca kupulumutsiramo iwo a m'nyumba yace; kumene anatsutsa nako dziko lapansi, nakhala wolowa nyumba wa cilungamo ciri monga mwa cikhulupiriro." 
Hebrews11:8 Ndi cikhulupiriro Abrahamu, poitanidwa, anamvera kuturuka kunka ku malo amene adzalandira ngati colowa; ndipo anaturuka wosadziwa kumene akamukako." 
Hebrews11:9 Ndi cikhulupiriro anakhala mlendo ku dziko la lonjezano, losati lace, nakhalira m'mahema pamodzi ndi Isake ndi Yakobo, olowa nyumba pamodzi ndi iye a lonjezano lomwelo;" 
Hebrews11:10 pakuti analindirira mudzi wokhala nao maziko, mmisiri wace ndi womanga wace ndiye Mulungu." 
Hebrews11:11 Ndi cikhulupiriro Sara yemwe analandira mphamvu yakukhala ndi pakati, patapita nthawi yace, popeza anamwerengera wokhulupirika iye amene adalonjeza;" 
Hebrews11:12 mwa icinso kudacokera kwa mmodzi, ndiye ngati wakufa, aunyinji ngati nyenyezi za m'mwamba, ndi ngati mcenga, uli m'mbali mwa nyanja, osawerengeka." 
Hebrews11:13 Iwo onse adamwalira m'cikhulupiriro, osalandira malonjezano, komatu adawaona ndi kuwalankhula kutali, nabvomereza kuti ali alendo ndi ogonera padziko." 
Hebrews11:14 Pakuti wo akunena zotere aonetserapo kuti alikufuna dziko likhale lao. 
Hebrews11:15 Ndipotu akadakumbukila lijalo adaturukamo akadaona njira yakubwera nayo. 
Hebrews11:16 Koma tsopano akhumba lina loposa, ndilo la m'Mwamba; mwa ici Mulungu sacita manyazi nao poitanidwa Mulungu wao; pakuti adawakonzera mudzi." 
Hebrews11:17 Ndi cikhulupiriro Abrahamu, poyesedwa, anapereka nsembe Isake, ndipo iye amene adalandira malonjezano anapereka mwana wace wayekha;" 
Hebrews11:18 amene kudanenedwa za iye, kuti, Mwa Isake mbeu yako idzaitanidwa:" 
Hebrews11:19 poyesera iye kuti Mulungu ngwokhoza kuukitsa, ngakhale kwa akufa; kucokera komwe, paciphiphiritso, anamlandiranso." 
Hebrews11:20 Ndi cikhulupiriro Isake anadalitsa Yakobo ndi Esau, zingakhale za zinthu zirinkudza," 
Hebrews11:21 Ndi cikhulupiriro Yakobo, poti alinkufa, anadalitsa yense wa ana a Yosefe; napembedza potsamira pa mutu wa ndodo yace." 
Hebrews11:22 Ndi cikhulupiriro, Yosefe, pakumwalira, anachula za maturukidwe a ana a Israyeli; nalamulira za mafupa ace." 
Hebrews11:23 Ndi cikhulupiriro Mose, pobadwa, anabisidwa miyezi itatu ndi akumbala, popeza anaona kuti ali mwana wokongola; ndipo sanaopa cilamuliro ca mfumu." 
Hebrews11:24 Ndi cikhulupiriro Mose, atakula msinkhu, anakana kuchedwa mwana wace wa mwana wamkazi wa Farao;" 
Hebrews11:25 nasankhula kucitidwa zoipa pamodzi ndi anthu a Mulungu, kosati kukhala nazo zokondweretsa za zoipa nthawi;" 
Hebrews11:26 nawerenga thonzo la Kristu cuma coposa zolemera za Aigupto; pakuti anapenyerera cobwezera ca mphotho. 
Hebrews11:27 Ndi cikhulupiriro anasiya Aigupto, wosaopa mkwiyo wa mfumu; pakuti anapirira molimbika monga ngari kuona wosaonekayo." 
Hebrews11:28 Ndi cikhulupiriro 1 anacita Paskha, ndi kuwaza kwa mwazi, kuti wakuononga ana oyamba angawakhudze iwo." 
Hebrews11:29 Ndi cikhulupiriro 2 anaoloka Nyanja Yofiira kupita ngati pamtunda: ndiko Aaigupto poyesanso anamizidwa. 
Hebrews11:30 Ndi cikhulupiriro 3 malinga a Yeriko adagwa atazunguliridwa masiku asanu ndi awiri. 
Hebrews11:31 Ndi cikhulupiriro 4 Rahabi wadama uja sanaonongeka pamodzi ndi osamverawo, popeza analandira ozonda ndi mtendere." 
Hebrews11:32 Ndipo ndinene cianinso? pakuti idzandiperewera nthawi ndifotokozere za 5 Gideoni, 6 Baraki, 7 Samsoni, 8 Yefita; za 9 Davide, ndi 10 Samueli ndi aneneri;" 
Hebrews11:33 amene mwa cikhulupiriro anagonjetsa maufumu, anacita cilungamo, analandira malonjezano, 11 anatseka pakamwa mikango," 
Hebrews11:34 12 nazima mphamvu ya moto, 13 napulumuka lupanga lakuthwa, 14 analimbikitsidwa pokhala ofok a, anakula mphamvu kunkhondo, 15 anapitikitsa magulu a nkhondo yacilendo." 
Hebrews11:35 16 Akazi analandira akufa ao mwa kuuka kwa akufa; ndipo 17 ena anakwapulidwa, osalola kuomboledwa," 
Hebrews11:36 kuti akalandire kuuka koposa; koma ena anayesedwa ndi matonzo ndi zokwapulira, ndiponso nsinga, ndi 18 kuwatsekera m'ndende;" 
Hebrews11:37 19 anaponyedwa miyala, anacekedwa pakati, anayesedwa, anaphedwa ndi lupanga, anayendayenda obvala zikopa zankhosa, ndi zikopa zambuzi, nakhala osowa, osautsidwa, ocitidwa zoipa," 
Hebrews11:38 (amenewo dziko lapansi silinayenera iwo), osokerera m'mapululu, ndi m'mapiri, ndi 20 m'mapanga, ndi m'mauna a dziko." 
Hebrews11:39 Ndipo iwo onse 21 adacitidwa umboni mwa cikhulupiriro, sanalandira lonjezanolo," 
Hebrews11:40 22 popeza Mulungu adatikonzera ife kanthu koposa, kuti iwo asayesedwe amphumphu opanda ife." 
Hebrews12:1 Cifukwa cace ifenso, popeza tizingidwa nao mtambo waukuru wotere wa mboni, titaye colemetsa ciri conse, ndi cimoli Iimangotizinga, ndipo tithamange mwacipiriro makaniwo adatiikira, ndi kupenyerera woyambira ndi womariza wa cikhulupiriro cathu," 
Hebrews12:2 Yesu, ameneyo, cifukwa ca cimwemwe coikidwaco pamaso pace, anapirira mtanda, nanyoza manyazi, nakhala pa dzanja lamanja la mpando wacifumu wa Mulungu," 
Hebrews12:3 Pakuti talingirirani iye amene adapirira ndi ocimwa otsutsana naye kotere, kuti mungaleme ndi kukomoka m'moyo mwanu." 
Hebrews12:4 Simunakana kufikira mwazi pogwirana nalo cimo; 
Hebrews12:5 ndipo mwaiwala dandauliro limene linena nanu monga ndi ana, Mwana wanga, usayese copepuka kulanga kwa Ambuye, Kapena usakomoke podzudzulidwa ndilye;" 
Hebrews12:6 Pakuti iye amene Ambuye amkonda amlanga, Nakwapula mwana ali yense amlandira." 
Hebrews12:7 Mukapirira kufikira kulangidwa Mulungu acitira inu monga ngati ana; pakuti mwana wanji amene atate wace wosamlanga? 
Hebrews12:8 Koma ngati mukhala opanda cilango, cimene onse adalawako, pamenepo muli am'thengo, si ana ai." 
Hebrews12:9 Komanso, tinali nao atate a thupi lathu akutilanga, ndipo tinawalemekeza; kodi sitidzagonjera Atate wa mizimu koposa nanga, ndi kukhala ndi moyo?" 
Hebrews12:10 Pakutitu iwo anatilanga masiku owerengeka monga kudawakomera; koma iye atero, kukatipindulitsa, kuti tikalandirane nao pa ciyero cace." 
Hebrews12:11 Chango ciri conse, pakucitika, sicimveka cokondwetsa, komatu cowawa; koma citatha, cipereka cipatso ca mtendere, kwa iwo ozoloweretsedwa naco, ndico ca cilungamo." 
Hebrews12:12 Mwa ici limbitsani manja ogooka, ndi maondo olobodoka;" 
Hebrews12:13 ndipo lambulani miseu yolunjika yoyendamo mapazi anu, kuti cotsimphinaco cisapatulidwe m'njira, koma ciciritsidwe." 
Hebrews12:14 Londolani mtendere ndi anthu onse, ndi ciyeretso cimene, akapanda ici, palibe mmodzi adzaona Ambuye:" 
Hebrews12:15 ndi kuyang'anira kuti pangakhale wina wakuperewera cisomo ca Mulungu, kuti ungapuke muzu wina wa kuwawa mtima ungabvute inu, ndipo aunyinji angadetsedwe nao;" 
Hebrews12:16 kuti pangakhale wacigololo, kapena wamnyozo, ngati Esau, amene anagulitsa ukulu wace wobadwa nao mtanda umodzi wa cakudya." 
Hebrews12:17 Pakutf mudziwa kutinso pamene anafuna kulowa dalitsolo, anakanidwa (pakuti sanapeza malo akulapa), angakhale analifunafuna ndi misozi." 
Hebrews12:18 Pakuti simunayandikira phiri lokhudzika, ndi lakupsya moto, ndi pakuda bii, ndi mdima, ndi namondwe," 
Hebrews12:19 ndi mau a lipenga, ndi maaenedwe a mau, manenedweamene iwo adamvawo anapempha kuti asawaonjezerepo mau;" 
Hebrews12:20 pakuti sanakhoza kulola colamulidwaco. Ingakhale nyama ikakhudza phirilo, idzaponyedwa miyala;" 
Hebrews12:21 ndipo maonekedwewo anali oopsa otere, kuti Mose anati, Ndiopatu ndi kunthunthumira." 
Hebrews12:22 Komatu mwayandikira ku phiri la Ziyoni, ndi mudzi wa Mulungu wamoyo, Yerusalemu wa Kumwamba, ndi kwa unyinji wocuruka wa angelo," 
Hebrews12:23 ndi kwa msonkhano wa onse ndi Mpingo wa obadwa oyamba olembedwa m'Mwamba, ndi kwa Mulungu Woweruza wa onse, ndi kwa mizimu ya olungama oyesedwa angwiro," 
Hebrews12:24 ndi kwa Yesu Nkhoswe ya cipangano catsopano, ndi kwa mwazi wa kuwaza wakulankhula cokoma coposa mwazi wa Abeli." 
Hebrews12:25 Penyani musakane wolankhulayo. Pakuti ngati iwowa sanapulumuka, pomkana iye amene anawacenjeza padziko, koposatu sitidzapulumuka ife, odzipatulira kwa iye wa Kumwamba;" 
Hebrews12:26 amene mau ace anagwedeza dziko pamenepo; koma tsopano adalonjeza, ndi kuti, Kamodzinso ndidzagwedeza, si dziko lokha, komanso m'mwamba." 
Hebrews12:27 Ndipo ici, cakuti kamodzinso, cilozera kusuntha kwace kwa zinthu zogwedezeka, monga kwa zinthu zolengedwa, kuti zinthu zosagwedezeka zikhale." 
Hebrews12:28 Mwa ici polandira ufumu wosagwedezeka, tikhale naco cisomo, cimene tikatumikire naco Mulungu momkondweretsa, ndi kumcitira ulemu ndi mantha." 
Hebrews12:29 Pakuti 1 Mulungu wathu ndiye mota wonyeketsa. 
Hebrews13:1 Cikondi ca pa abale cikhalebe. 
Hebrews13:2 Musaiwale kucereza alendo; pakuti mwa ici ena anacereza angelo osacidziwa. 
Hebrews13:3 Kumbukilani am'nsinga, monga am'nsinga anzao; ocitidwa zoipa, monga ngati inunso adatero nanu m'thupi." 
Hebrews13:4 Ukwati ucitidwe ulemu ndi onse, ndi pogona pakhale posadetsedwa; pakuti adama ndi acigololo adzawaweruza Mulungu." 
Hebrews13:5 Mtima wanu ukhale wosakonda cuma; zimene muli nazo zikukwanireni; pakuti iye anati, Sindidzakusiya konse, kungakhale kukutaya, sindidzakutaya ndithu." 
Hebrews13:6 Kotero kuti tinena molimbika mtima, Mthandizi wanga ndiye Ambuye; smdidzaopa; Adzandicitira ciani munthu?" 
Hebrews13:7 Kumbukilani atsogoleri anu, amene analankhula nanu Mau a Mulungu; ndipo poyang'anira citsiriziro ca mayendedwe ao mutsanze cikhulupiriro cao." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kristu ali yemweyo dzulo, ndi lero, ndi ku nthawi zonse." 
Hebrews13:9 Musatengedwe ndi maphunzitso a mitundu mitundu, ndi acilendo; pakuti nkokoma kuti mtima ukhazikike ndi cisomo; kosati ndi zakudya, zimene iwo adazitsata sanapindula nazo." 
Hebrews13:10 Tiri nalo guwa la nsembe, limene iwo akutumikira cihema alibe ulamuliro wa kudyako." 
Hebrews13:11 Pakuti matupi a nyama zija, mwazi wa izo umatengedwa ndi mkulu wa ansembe kulowa m'malo opatulidwa, cifukwa ca zoipa, amatenthedwa kunja kwa tsasa." 
Hebrews13:12 Mwa ici Yesunso, kuti akayeretse anthuwo mwa mwazi wa iye yekha, adamva cowawa kunja kwa cipata." 
Hebrews13:13 Cifukwa cace titurukire kwa iye kunja kwa tsasa osenza thonzo lace. 
Hebrews13:14 Pakuti pano tiribe mudzi wokhalitsa, komatu tifunafuna ulinkudzawo." 
Hebrews13:15 Potero mwa iye tipereke ciperekere nsembe yakuyamika Mulungu, ndiyo cipatso ca milomo yobvomereza dzina lace." 
Hebrews13:16 Koma musaiwale kucitira cokoma ndi kugawira ena; pakuti nsembe zotere Mulunguakondweranazo. 
Hebrews13:17 Mverani atsogoleri anu, nimuwagonjere; pakuti alindirira moyo wanu, monga akuwerengera; kuti akacite ndi cimwemwe, osati mwacisoni: pakuti ici sicikupindulitsani inu." 
Hebrews13:18 Mutipempherere ife; pakuti takopeka mtima kuti tiri naco cikumbu mtima cokoma m'zonse, pofuna kukhala nao makhalidwe abwino." 
Hebrews13:19 Ndipo ndikudandaulirani koposa kucita ici, kuti kubwera kwanga kwa inu kufulumidwe." 
Hebrews13:20 Koma Mulungu wa mtendere amene anabwera naye woturuka mwa akufa 1 Mbusa wamkuru wa nkhosa 2 ndi mwazi wa cipangano cosatha, ndiye Ambuye wathu Yesu," 
Hebrews13:21 3 akuyeseni inu opanda cirema m'cinthu ciri conse cabwino, kuti mucite cifuniro cacej ndi kucita mwa ife comkondweretsa pamaso pace, mwa Yesu Kristu; kwa Iyeyu ukhale ulemerero ku nthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Koma ndidandaulira inu, abale, lolani mau acidandauliro; pakutinso ndalembera inu mwacidule." 
Hebrews13:23 Zindikirani kuti mbale wathu 4 Timoteo wamasulidwa; pamodzi ndi iye, ngati akudza msanga, ndidzakuonani inu." 
Hebrews13:24 Lankhulani 5 atsogoleri anu onse, ndi oyera mtima onse. Akulankhulani iwo a ku Italiya." 
Hebrews13:25 Cisomo cikhale ndi inu nonse. Amen. 
James1:1 YAKOBO, kapolo wa Mulungu ndi wa Ambuye Yesu Kristu, kwa mafuko khumi ndi awiri a m'cibalaliko: ndikulankhulani." 
James1:2 Muciyese cimwemwe cokha, abale anga, m'mene mukugwa m'mayesero a mitundu mitundu;" 
James1:3 pozindikira kuti ciyesedwe ca cikhulupiriro canu cicita cipiriro. 
James1:4 Koma cipiriro cikhale nayo nchito yace yangwiro, kuti mukakhale angwiro ndi opanda cirema, osasowa kanthu konse." 
James1:5 Koma wina wa inu ikamsowa nzeru, apemphe kwa Mulungu, amene apatsa kwa onse modzala manja, niwosatonza; ndipo adzampatsa iye," 
James1:6 Koma apemphe ndi cikhulupiriro, wosakayika konse; pakuti wokayikayo afanana ndi pfunde la nyanja lotengeka ndi mphepo ndi kuwinduka nayo." 
James1:7 Pakuti asayese munthu uyu kuti adzalandira kanthu kwa Ambuye; 
James1:8 munthu wa mitima iwiri akhala wosinkhasinkha pa njira zace zonse. 
James1:9 Koma mbale woluluka adzitamandire pa ukulu wace; 
James1:10 pakuti adzapita monga duwa la udzu," 
James1:11 Pakuti laturuka dzuwa ndi kutentha kwace, ndipo laumitsa udzu; ndipo lathothoka duwa lace, ndi ukoma wa maonekedwe ace waonongeka; koteronso wacuma adzafota m'mayendedwe ace." 
James1:12 Wodala munthu wakupirira poyesedwa; pakuti pamene wabvomerezeka, adzalandira korona wa moyo, amene Ambuye adalonjezera iwo akumkonda iye." 
James1:13 Munthu poyesedwa, asanena, Ndiyesedwa ndi Mulungu; pakuti Mulungu sakhoza kuyesedwa ndi zoipa, ndipo iye mwini sayesa munthu:" 
James1:14 koma munthu ali yense ayesedwa pamene cilakolako cace ca iye mwini cimkokera, nicimnyenga." 
James1:15 Pamenepo cilakolakoco citaima, cibala ucimo; ndipo ucimo, utakula msinkhu, ubala imfa." 
James1:16 Musanyengedwe, abale anga okondedwa." 
James1:17 Mphatso iri yonse yabwino, ndi cininkho ciri conse cangwiro zicokera Kumwamba, zotsika kwa Atate wa mauniko, amene alibe cisanduliko, kapena mthunzi wa citembenukiro." 
James1:18 Mwa cifuniro cace mwini anatibala ife ndi mau a coonadi, kuti tikhale ife ngati zipatso zoundukula za zolengedwa zace." 
James1:19 Mudziwa, abale anga okondedwa, kuti munthu ali yense akhale wochera khutu, wodekha polankhula, wodekha pakupsa mtima." 
James1:20 Pakuti mkwiyo wa munthu sucita cilungamo ca Mulungu. 
James1:21 Mwa ici, mutabvula cinyanso conse ndi cisefukiro ca coipa, landirani ndi cifatso mau ookedwa mwa inu, okhoza kupulumutsa moyo wanu." 
James1:22 Khalani akucita mau, osati akumva okha, ndi kudzinyenga nokha." 
James1:23 Pakuti ngati munthu ali wakumva mau wosati wakucita, iyeyu afanana ndi munthu wakuyang'anira nkhope yace ya cibadwidwe cace m'kalirole;" 
James1:24 pakuti wadziyang'anira yekha nacoka, naiwala pompaja nali wotani." 
James1:25 Koma iye wakupenyerera m'lamulo langwiro, ndilo laufulu, natero cipenyerere, ameneyo, posakhala wakumva wakuiwala, komatu wakucita nchito, adzakhala wodala m'kucita kwace." 
James1:26 Ngati wina adziyesera ali wopembedza Mulungu, ndiye wosamanga lilime lace, koma adzinyenga mtima wace, kupembedza kwace kwa munthuyu nkopanda pace." 
James1:27 Mapembedzedwe oyera ndi osadetsa pamaso pa Mulungu ndi Atate ndiwo: z kuceza ndi ana amasiye ndi akazi amasiye m'cisautso cao, ndi 1 kudzisungira mwini wosacitidwa mawanga ndi dziko lapansi." 
James2:1 Abate anga, musakhale naco cikhulupiriro ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, Ambuye wa ulemerero, ndi kusamala maonekedwe." 
James2:2 Pakuti akalowa m'sunagoge mwanu munthu wobvala mphete yagolidi, ndi cobvala cokometsetsa, ndipo akalowanso munthu wosauka ndi cobvala codetsa:" 
James2:3 ndipo mukapenyerera iye wobvala cokometsetsa, nimukati naye, Inu mukhale apa pabwino; ndipo mukati kwa wosaukayo, Iwe, ima uko, kapena, khala pansi pa mpando wa mapazi anga;" 
James2:4 kodi simunasiyanitsa mwa inu nokha, ndi kukhala oweruza oganizira zoipa?" 
James2:5 Mverani, abale anga okondedwa; kodi Mulungu sanasankha osauka a dziko lapansi akhale olemera ndi cikhulupiriro, ndi olowa nyumba a ufumu umene adaulonieza kwa iwo akumkonda iye?" 
James2:6 Koma inu mumanyoza munthu wosauka. Kodi sakusautsani inu acuma, nakukokerani iwowa ku mabwalo a mirandu?" 
James2:7 Kodi sacitira mwano iwowa dzina lokomali muitanidwa nalo? 
James2:8 Koma ngati mucita cikwanirire lamulolo lacifumu, monga mwa malembo, Uzikonda mnzako monga udzikonda wekha, mucita bwino:" 
James2:9 koma ngati musamala maonekedwe, mucita ucimo, ndipo mutsutsidwa ndi cilamulo monga olakwa." 
James2:10 Pakuti amene ali yense angasunge malamulo onse, koma akakhumudwa pa limodzi, iyeyu wacimwira onse." 
James2:11 Pakuti Iye wakuti, Usacite cigololo, anatinso, Usaphe. Ndipo ukapanda kucita cigololo, koma ukapha, wakhala wolakwira lamulo." 
James2:12 Lankhulani motero, ndipo citani motero, monga anthu amene adzaweruzidwa ndi lamulo la ufulu." 
James2:13 Pakuti ciweruziro ciribe cifundo kwa iye amene sanacita cifundo; cifundo cidzitamandira kutsutsana naco ciweruziro. 
James2:14 Cipindulocace nciani, abale anga, munthu akanena, Ndiri naco cikhulupiriro, koma alibe nchito? Kodi cikhulupiriroco cikhoza kumpulumutsa?" 
James2:15 Mbale kapena mlongo akakbalawausiwa, nieikamsowa cakudya ca tsiku lace," 
James2:16 ndipo wina wa inu akanena nao, Mukani ndi mtendere, muitapfunde ndi kukhuta; osawapatsa iwo zosowa za pathupi; kupindula kwace nciani?" 
James2:17 Momwemonso cikhulupiriro, cikapanda kukhala nazo nchito, cikhala cakufa m'kati mwacemo." 
James2:18 Koma wina akati, Iwe uli naco cikhulupiriro, ndipo ine ndiri nazo nchito; undionetse ine cikhulupiriro cako copanda nchito zako, ndipo ine ndidzakuonetsa iweeikhulupiriro canga coturuka m'nchito zanga." 
James2:19 Ukhulupirira iwe kuti Mulungu ali mmodzi; ucita bwino; ziwanda zikhulupiranso, ndipo zinthunthumira." 
James2:20 Koma ufuna kuzindikira kodi, munthu wopanda pace iwe, kuti cikhulupiriro copanda nchito ciri cabe?" 
James2:21 Abrabamu kholo lathu, sanayesedwa wolungama ndi nchito kodi, paja adapereka mwana wace Isake nsembe pa guwa la nsembe?" 
James2:22 Upenya kuti cikhulupiriro cidacita pamodzi ndi nchito zace, ndipo moturuka mwa nchito cikhulupiriro cidayesedwa cangwiro;" 
James2:23 ndipo anakwaniridwa malembo onenawa, Ndipo Abrahamu anakhulupirira Mulungu, ndipo kudawerengedwa kwa iye cilungamo; ndipo anachedwa bwenzi la Mulungu." 
James2:24 Mupenya kuti munthu ayesedwa wolungama ndi nchito yace, osati ndi cikhulupiriro cokha." 
James2:25 Ndipo momwemonso sanayesedwa wolungama Rahabi mkazi wa damayo ndi nchito kodi, popeza adalandira amithenga, nawaturutsa adzere njira yina?" 
James2:26 Pakuti monga thupi lopanda mzimu liri lakufa, koteronso cikhulupiriro copanda nchito ciri cakufa." 
James3:1 Musakhale aphunzitsi ambiri, abale anga, podziwa kuti tidzalangika koposa." 
James3:2 Pakuti timakhumudwa tonse pa zinthu zambiri. Munthu akapanda kukhumudwa pa mau, iye ndiye munthu wangwiro, wokhoza kumanganso thupi lonse." 
James3:3 Koma ngati tiikiraakavalo zogwirira m'kamwa mwao atimvere, tipotolozanso thupi lao Ionse," 
James3:4 Taonani, zombonso, zingakhale zazikuru zotere, nizitengedwa ndi mphepo zolimba, zipotozeka ndi tsigiro laling'ono ndithu kumene kuli konse afuna wogwira tsigiro." 
James3:5 Kotero lilimenso liri ciwalo cacing'ono, ndipo lidzikuzira zazikuru, Taonani, kamoto kakang'ono kayatsa nkhuni zambiri!" 
James3:6 Ndipo lilime ndilo moto; ngati dziko la cosalungama mwa ziwalo zathu laikika lilime, ndili lodetsa thupi lonse, niliyatsa mayendedwe a cibadwidwe, ndipo liyatsidwa ndi gehena." 
James3:7 Pakuti mtundu uli wonse wa nyama ndi wa mbalamenso, wa zokwawa, ndi wa zam'nyanja, zimazoloweretsedwa, ndipo zazoloweretsedwa ndi anthu;" 
James3:8 koma lilime palibe munthu akhoza kulizoloweretsa; liri coipa cotakataka, lodzala ndi ululu wakupha." 
James3:9 Timayamika Ambuye ndi Atate nalo; nalonso timatemberera anthu, okhala monga mwa mafanizidwe a Mulungu;" 
James3:10 mocokera m'kamwa momwemo muturuka ciyamiko ndi temberero. Abale anga, izi siziyenera kutero." 
James3:11 Kodi kasupe aturutsira pa una womwewo madzi okoma ndi owawa? 
James3:12 Kodi mkuyu ukhoza kubala azitona, abale anga, kapena mpesa kubala nkhuyu? Kotero madzi amcere sakhoza kuturutsa okoma." 
James3:13 Ndani ali wanzeru, ndi waluso mwa inu? Aonetsere ndi mayendedwe ace abwino nchito zace mu nzeru yofatsa." 
James3:14 Koma mukakhala nako kaduka kowawa, ndi cotetana m'mtima mwanu, musadzitamandira, ndipo musamanama potsutsana naco coonadi." 
James3:15 Nzeru iyi, sindiyo yotsika kumwamba, komatu iri ya padziko, ya cifuniro ca cibadwidwe, ya ziwanda." 
James3:16 Pakuti pomwe pali kaduka ndi zotetana, pamenepo pali cisokonekero ndi cocita coipa ciri conse." 
James3:17 Koma nzeru yocokera kumwamba iyamba kukhala yoyera, nikhalanso yamtendere, yaulere, yomvera bwino, yodzala cifundo ndi zipatso zabwino, yopanda tsankhu, yosadzikometsera pamaso." 
James3:18 Ndipo cipatso ca cilungamo cifesedwa mumtendere kwa iwo akucita mtendere. 
James4:1 Zicokera kuti nkhondo, zicokera kuti zolimbana mwa inu? Kodi sizicokera ku zikhumbitso zanu zocita nkhondo m'ziwalo zanu?" 
James4:2 Mulakalaka, ndipo zikusowani; mukupha, nimucita kaduka, ndipo simukhoza kupeza; mulimbana, nimucita nkhondo; mulibe kanthu, cifukwa simupempha." 
James4:3 Mupempha, ndipo simulandira, popeza mupempha koipa, kuti mukacimwaze pocita zikhumbitso zanu." 
James4:4 Akazi acigololo inu, kodi simudziwa kuti ubwenzi wa dziko lapansi uti udani ndi Mulungu? Potero, iye amene afuna kukhala bwenzi la dziko lapansi adziika mdani wa Mulungu." 
James4:5 Kodi muyesa kapena kuti malembo angonena cabe? Kodi Mzimuyo adamkhalitsa mwa ife akhumbitsa kucita nsanje? 
James4:6 Koma apatsa cisomo coposa. Potero anena malembo, Mulungu akaniza odzikuza, koma apatsa cisomo odzicepetsa." 
James4:7 Potero mverani Mulungu; koma kanizani mdierekezi, ndipo adzakuthawani inu." 
James4:8 Yandikirani kwa Mulungu, ndipo adzayandikira kwa inu, Sambani m'manja, ocimwa inu; yeretsani mitima, a mitima iwiri inu." 
James4:9 Khalani osautsidwa, lirani, lirani misozi; kuseka kwanu kusanduke kulira, ndi cimwemwe canu cisanduke cisoni." 
James4:10 Dzicepetseni pamaso pa Ambuye, ndipo adzakukwezani." 
James4:11 Musamanenerana, abale. Wonenera mbale, kapena woweruza mbale wace, anenera lamulo, naweruza lamulo: koma ngati uweruza lamulo, suliwocita lamulo, komatu woweruza." 
James4:12 Woika lamulo ndi woweruza ndiye mmodzi, ndiye amene akhoza kupulumutsa ndi kuononga; koma iwe woweruza mnzako ndiwe yani?" 
James4:13 Nanga tsono, inu akunena, Lero kapena mawa tidzapita kulowa ku mudzi wakuti wakuti, ndipo tidzagonerako ndi kutsatsa malonda, Ddi kupindula nao;" 
James4:14 inu amene simudziwa cimene cidzagwa mawa. Moyo wanu uli wotani? Pakuti muli utsi, wakuonekera kanthawi, ndi pamenepo ukanganuka." 
James4:15 Mukadanena inu, Akalola Mulungu, ndipo tikakhala ndi moyo, tidzacita kakuti kakuti." 
James4:16 Koma tsopano mudzitamandira m'kudzikuza kwanu; kudzitamandira kuli konse kotero nkoipa. 
James4:17 Potero kwa iye amene adziwa kucita bwino, ndipo sacita, kwa iye kuli cimo." 
James5:1 Nanga tsono acuma inu, lirani ndi kucema cifukwa ca masautso anu akudza pa inu," 
James5:2 Cuma canu caola ndi zobvala zanu zajiwa ndi njenjete. 
James5:3 Golidi wanu ndi siliva wanu zacita dzimbiri, ndipo dzimbiri lace lidzacita mboni zoneneza Inu ndipo zidzadya nyama yanu ngat: moto. Mwadzikundikira cuma masiku otsiriza." 
James5:4 Taonani, mphotho ya anchitowo anasenga m'minda yanu, yosungidwa ndi inu powanyenga, ipfuula; ndipo mapfuulc a osengawo adalowa m'makutu a Ambuye wa makamu." 
James5:5 Mwadyerera padziko, ndipo mwacita zokukondweretsani; mwadyetsa mitima yanu m'tsiku lakupha." 
James5:6 Munamtsutsa, munapha wolungamayo, iye sakanizainu." 
James5:7 Potero, lezani mtima, abale, kufikira kudza kwace kwa Ambuye. Taonani, wolima munda alindira cipatso cofunikatu ca dziko, ndi kuleza mtima naco kufikira cikalandira mvula ya myundo ndi masika," 
James5:8 Lezani mtima inunso, limbitsani mitima yanu; pakuti kudza kwace kwa Ambuye kuyandikira." 
James5:9 Musaipidwe wina ndi mnzace, abale, kuti mungaweruzidwe. Taonani, woweruza aima pakhomo." 
James5:10 Tengani, abale, citsanzo ca kumva zowawa ndi kuleza mtima, aneneri ameneanalankhulam'dzina la Ambuyeo" 
James5:11 Taonani tiwayesera odala opirirawo; mudamva za cipiriro ca Yobu, ndipo mwaona citsiriziro ca Ambuye, kuti Ambuye ali wodzala cikondi, ndi wacifundo." 
James5:12 Koma makamaka, abale anga, musalumbire, kungakhale kuchula mwamba kapena dziko, kapena lumbiro lina liri lonse; koma inde wanu akhale inde, ndi iai wanu akha; le iai; kuti mungagwe m'ciweruziro." 
James5:13 Kodi wina wa inu akumva zowawa? Apemphere, Kodi wina asekera? Ayimbire." 
James5:14 Pali wina kodi adwala mwa inu? Adziitanire akuru a Mpingo, ndipo apemphere pa iye, atamdzoza ndi mafuta m'dzina la Ambuye:" 
James5:15 ndipo pemphero la cikhulupiriro lidzapulumutsa wodwalayo, ndipo Ambuye adzamuukitsa; ndipo ngati adacita macimo adzakhululukidwa kwa iye." 
James5:16 Cifukwa cace mubvomerezane wina ndi mnzace macimo anu, ndipo mupempherere wina kwa mnzace kuti muciritsidwe. Pemphero la munthu wolungama likhoza kwakukuru m'macitidweace." 
James5:17 Eliya anali munthu wakumva zomwezi tizimva ife, ndipo anapemphera cipempherere kuti isabvumbe mvula; ndipo, siinagwa mvula pa dzikozaka zitatu kudza miyezi isanu ndi umodzi." 
James5:18 Ndipo anapempheranso; ndipo m'mwamba munatsika mvula, ndi dziko lidabala zipatso zace." 
James5:19 Abale anga, ngati wina wa inu asocera posiyana ndi coonadi, ndipo ambweza iye mnzace;" 
James5:20 azindikire, kuti iyeamene abweza wocimwa ku njira yace yosocera adzapulumutsa munthu kwa imfa, ndipo adzabvundikira macimo aunyinji." 
1Peter1:1 PETRO, mtumwi wa Yesu Kristu, kwa osankhidwa akukhala: alendo a cibalaliko a ku Ponto, Galatiya, Kapadokiya, Asiya, ndi Bituniya," 
1Peter1:2 monga mwa kudziwiratu kwa Mulungu Atate, m'ciyeretso ca Mzimu, cocitira cimvero, ndi kuwaza kwa mwazi wa Yesu Kristu: Cisomo, ndi mtendere zicurukire inu." 
1Peter1:3 Wodalitsika Mulungu ndiye Atate wa Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, iye amene, monga mwa cifundo cace cacikuru, anatibalanso ku ciyembekezo ca moyo, mwa kuuka kwa akufa kwa Yesu Kristu;" 
1Peter1:4 kuti tilandire colowa cosabvunda ndi cosadetsa ndi cosafota, cosungikira m'Mwamba inu," 
1Peter1:5 amene musungidwa ndi mphamvu ya Mulungu mwa cikhulupiriro, kufikira cipulumutso cokonzeka kukabvumbulutsidwa nthawi yotsiriza." 
1Peter1:6 M'menemo mukondwera, kungakhale tsopano kanthawi, ngati kuyenera, mukacitidwe cisoni ndi mayesero a mitundu mitundu," 
1Peter1:7 kuti mayesedwe a cikhulupiriro canu, ndiwo a mtengo wace woposa wa golidi amene angotayika, ngakhale ayesedwa ndi moto, akapezedwe ocitira ciyamiko ndi ulemerero ndi ulemu pa bvumbulutso la Yesu, Kristu;" 
1Peter1:8 amene mungakhale simunamuona mumkonda; amene mungakhale simumpenya tsopano, pokhulupirira, mukondwera naye ndi, cimwemwe cosaneneka, ndi ca ulemerero:" 
1Peter1:9 ndi kulandira citsiriziro ca cikhulupiriro canu, ndico cipulumutso ca moyo wanu." 
1Peter1:10 Kunena za cipulumutso ici anafunafuna nasanthula aneneri, pakunenera za cisomo cikudzerani;" 
1Peter1:11 ndi kusanthula nthawi yiti, kapena nthawi yanji Mzimu wa Kristu wokhala mwa iwo analozera, pakucitiratu umboni wa masautso a Kristu, ndi ulemerero, worsarana nao." 
1Peter1:12 Kwa iwo amene kudabvumbulutsidwa, kuti sanadzitumikira iwo okha, koma inu, ndi zinthu izi, zimene zauzidwa kwa inu tsopano, mwa iwo amene anakulalikirani Uthenga Wabwino mwa Mzimu Woyera, wotumidwa kucokera Kumwamba; zinthu izi angelo alakalaka kusuzumiramo." 
1Peter1:13 Mwa ici, podzimanga m'cuuno, kunena za mtima wanu, mukhale odzisunga, nimuyembekeze konse konse cisomo cirikutengedwa kudza naco kwa inu m'bvumbulutso la Yesu Kristu;" 
1Peter1:14 monga ana omvera osadzifanizitsanso ndi zilakolako zakale, pokhala osadziwa inu;" 
1Peter1:15 komatu monga iye wakuitana inu ali woyera mtima, khaiani inunso oyera mtima m'makhalidwe anu onse;" 
1Peter1:16 popeza kwalembedwa, Muzikhala oyera mtima, pakuti Ine ndine woyera mtima." 
1Peter1:17 Ndipo mukamuitana ngati Alate, iye amene aweruza monga mwa nchito ya yense, wopanda tsankhu, khalani ndi mantha nthawi ya cilendo canu;" 
1Peter1:18 podziwa kuti simunaomboledwa ndi zobvunda, golidi ndi siliva, kusiyana nao makhalidwe anu acabe ocokera kwa makolo anu:" 
1Peter1:19 koma 1 ndi mwazi wa mtengo wace wapatali 2 monga wa mwana wa nkhosa wopanda cirema, ndi wopanda banga, ndiwo mwazi wa Kristu:" 
1Peter1:20 3 amene anazindikirikatu lisanakhazikike dziko lapansi, koma anaonetsedwa pa citsiriziro ca nthawi," 
1Peter1:21 cifukwa ca inu amene mwa rye mukhulupirira Mulungu 4 wakwnuukitsa iye kwa akufa, ndi kumpatsa iye ulemerero; kotero kuti cikhulupiriro canu ndi ciyembekezo canu cikhale pa Mulungu." 
1Peter1:22 Popeza 5 mwayeretsa moyo wanu pakumvera coonadi kuti 6 mukakonde abale ndi cikondi cosanyenga, mukondane kweni kweni kucokera kumtima;" 
1Peter1:23 7 inu amene mudabadwanso, osati ndi mbeu yofeka, komatu yosaola, mwa mau a Mulungu amoyo ndi okhalitsa." 
1Peter1:24 Popeza, 8 Anthu onse akunga udzu, Ndi ulemerero waowonse ngad duwa la udzu. Udzuwo ungotota, ndi duwa lace lingogwa;" 
1Peter1:25 9 Koma Mau a Mulungu akhala cikhalire. Ndipo 10 mau olalikidwa kwa Inu ndi jawo. 
1Peter2:1 Momwemo pakutaya coipa conse, ndi cmyengo conse, ndi maonekedwe onyenga, ndi kadoka, ndi masiniiriro onse," 
1Peter2:2 lirani monga makanda alero mkaka woyenera, wopanda cinyengo, kuti mukakule nao kufikira cipulumutso;" 
1Peter2:3 ngati mwalawa kuti Ambuye ali wokoma mtima; 
1Peter2:4 amene pakudza kwa iye, mwala wamoyo, wokanidwatu ndi anthu, koma ndi Mulungu wosankhika, waulemu," 
1Peter2:5 inunso ngati miyala yamoyo mumangidwa nyumba ya uzimu, kun mukhale ansembe oyera mtima, akupereka nsembe zauzimu, zolandiridwa ndi Mulungu mwa Yesu Kristu," 
1Peter2:6 Cifukwa kwalembedwa m'lembo, Taona, ndiika m'Ziyoni mwala wotsiriza wa pangondya, wosankhika, wa mtengo wace; Ndipo wokhulupirira iye sadzanyazitsidwa." 
1Peter2:7 Kwa inu tsono akukhulupira, ali wa mtengo wace; koma kwa iwo osakhulupira, Mwala umene omangawo anaukana, Womwewo unayesedwa mutu wa pangondya;" 
1Peter2:8 ndipo, Mwala wakukhumudwa nao, ndi thanthwe lopunthwitsa; kwa iwo akukhumudwa ndi mau, pokhala osamvera, kumenekonso adaikidwako." 
1Peter2:9 Koma inu ndinu mbadwa yosankhika, ansembe acifumu, mtundu woyera mtima, anthu a mw ni wace, kotero kuti mukalakire zoposazo za iye amene anakuitanani muturuke mumdima, mulowe kuunika kwace kodabwitsa;" 
1Peter2:10 inu amene kale simunali anthu, koma tsopano muli anthu a Mulungu; amene kale simunalandira cifundo, koma tsopano mwalandira cifundo." 
1Peter2:11 Okondedwa, ndikudandaulirani ngati alendo ndi ogonera mudzikanize zilakolako za thupi zimene zicita nkhondo pa moyo;" 
1Peter2:12 ndipo mayendedwe anu mwa amitundu akhale okoma, kuti, m'mene akamba za inu ngati ocita zoipa, akalemekeze Mulungu pakuona nchito zanu zabwino, m'tsiku la kuyang'anira." 
1Peter2:13 Tadzigonjani kwa zoikika zonse za anthu, cifukwa ca Ambuye; ngakhale kwa mfumu, monga mutu wa onse;" 
1Peter2:14 kapena kwa akazembe, monga otumidwa ndi iye kukalanga ocira zoipa, koma kusimba ocita zabwino." 
1Peter2:15 Pakuti cifuniro ca Mulungu citere, kuti ndi kucita zabwino mukatontholetse cipulukiro ca anthu opusa;" 
1Peter2:16 monga mfulu, koma osakhala nao ufulu monga cobisira coipa, koma ngati akapolo a Mulungu." 
1Peter2:17 Citirani ulemu anthu onse. Kondani abale. Opani Mulungu, Citirani mfumu ulemu." 
1Peter2:18 Anyamata inu, gonjerani ambuye anu ndi kuopa konse, osati abwino ndi aulere okha, komanso aukali." 
1Peter2:19 Pakuti ici ndi cisomo ngati munthu, cifukwa ca cikumbu mtima pa Mulungu alola zacisoni, pakumva zowawa wosaziyenera." 
1Peter2:20 Pakuti mbiri yokoma yanji, mukapirira pocimwa ndi kubwanyulidwapo? Komatu, ngati pocita zabwino, ndi kumvako zowawa mumapirira, kumeneko ndiko cisomo pa Mulungu." 
1Peter2:21 Pakuti kudzacita ici mwaitanidwa; 1 pakutinso Kristu anamva zowawa m'malo mwanu, 2 nakusiyirani citsanzo kuti mnkalondole mapazi ace;" 
1Peter2:22 3 amene sanacita cimo, ndipo m'kamwa mwace sicinapezedwa cinyengo;" 
1Peter2:23 4 amene pocitidwa cipongwe sanabwezera cipongwe, pakumva zowawa, sanaopsa, koma 5 anapereka mlandu kwa iye woweruza kolungama;" 
1Peter2:24 6 amene anasenza macimo athu mwini yekha m'thupi mwace pamtanda, kuti ife, 7 titafa kumacimo, tikakhale ndi moyo kutsata cilungamo; 8 ameneyo mikwingwirima yace munaciritsidwa nayo." 
1Peter2:25 Pakuti 9 munalikusocera ngati nkhosa; koma rsopano mwabwera kwa 10 Mbusa ndi Woyang'anira wa moyo wanu. 
1Peter3:1 Momwemonso, akazi inu, mverani amuna anu ainu nokha; kuti, ngatinso ena samvera mau, akakodwe opanda mau mwa mayendedwe a akazi;" 
1Peter3:2 pakuona mayendedwe anu oyera ndi kuopa kwanu. 
1Peter3:3 Amene kukometsera kwanu kusakhale kwa kunja, kuluka tsitsi ndi kubvala za golidi, kapena kubvala cobvala;" 
1Peter3:4 koma kukhale munthu wobisika wamtima, m'cobvala cosaola ca mzimu wofatsa ndi wacete, ndiwo wa mtengo wace wapatali pamaso pa Mulungu." 
1Peter3:5 Pakuti koteronso kale akazi oyera mtima, akuyembekezera Mulungu, anadzikometsera okha, namvera amuna ao a iwo okha;" 
1Peter3:6 monga Sara anamvera Abrahamu, namucha iye mbuye; ameneyo mukhala ana ace ngati mucita bwino, osaopa coopsa ciri conse." 
1Peter3:7 Momwemonso amuna inu, khalani nao monga mwa cidziwitso, ndi kucitira mkazi ulemu, monga cotengera cocepa mphamvu, monganso wolowa nyumba pamodzi wa cisomo ca moyo, kuti mapemphero anu angaletsedwe." 
1Peter3:8 Cotsalira, khalani nonse a mdma umodzi, ocitirana cifundo, okondana ndi abale, acisoni, odzicepetsa:" 
1Peter3:9 osabwezera coipa ndi coipa, kapena cipongwe ndi cipongwe, koma penatu madalitso; pakuti kudzatsata ici mwaitanidwa, kuti mukalandire dalitso." 
1Peter3:10 Pakuti, iye wofuna kukonda moyo, Ndi kuona masiku abwino, Aletse lilime lace lisanene coipa, Ndi milomo yace isalankhule cinyengo;" 
1Peter3:11 j Ndipo apatuke pacoipa, nacite cabwino; Afunefune mtendere ndi kuulondola." 
1Peter3:12 Pakuti maso a Ambuye ali pa olungama, Ndi makutu ace akumva rembedzo lao; Koma nkhope ya Ambuye iri pa ocita zoipa," 
1Peter3:13 Ndipo ndani iye amene adzakucitirani coipa, ngati mucita naco cangu cinthu cabwino?" 
1Peter3:14 Komatu ngatinso mukamva zowawa cifukwa ca cilungamo, odala inu; ndipo musaope pakuwaopa iwo, kapena musadere nkhawa;" 
1Peter3:15 koma mumpatulikitse Ambuye Kristu m'mitima yanu; okonzeka nthawi zonse kucita codzikanira pa yense wakukufunsani cifukwa ca ciyembekezo ciri mwa inu, komatu ndi cifatsondi mantha;" 
1Peter3:16 ndi kukhala naco cikumbu mtima cabwino, kuti umo akunenerani, iwo akunenera konama mayendedwe anu abwino m'Kristu akacitidwe manyazi." 
1Peter3:17 Pakuti, kumva zowawa cifukwa ca kucita zabwino, ndi kumva zowawa cifukwa ca kucita zoipa, nkwabwino kumva zowawa cifukwa ca kucita zabwino, ngati citero cifuniro ca Mulungu," 
1Peter3:18 Pakuti Kristunso adamva zowawa kamodzi, cifukwa ca macimo, wolungama m'malo mwa osalungama, kuti akatifikitse kwa Mulungu; wophedwatu m'thupi, koma woparsidwa moyo mumzimu;" 
1Peter3:19 m'menemonso anapita, nalalikira mizimu inali m'ndende," 
1Peter3:20 imene inakhala yosamvera kale, pamene kuleza mtima kwa Mulungu kunalindira, m'masiku a Nowa, pokhala m'kukonzeka cingalawa, m'menemo owerengeka, ndiwo amoyo asanu ndi atatu, anapulumutsidwa mwa madzi;" 
1Peter3:21 cimenenso cifaniziro cace cikupulumutsani tsopano, ndico ubatizo, kosati kutaya kwa litsiro lace la thupi, komatu funso lace la cikumbu mtima cokoma kwa Mulungu, mwa kuuka kwa Yesu Kristu;" 
1Peter3:22 amene akhala pa dzanja lamanja la Mulungu, atalowa m'Mwamba; pali angelo, ndi maulamuliro, ndi zimphamvu, zomgonjera." 
1Peter4:1 Popeza Kristu adamva zowawa m'thupi, mudzikonzere mtima womwewo; pakuti iye amene adamva zowawa m'thupi walekana nalo cimo;" 
1Peter4:2 kuti nthawi yotsalira simukakhalenso ndi moyo m'thupi kutsata zilakolako za anthu, koma cifuniro ca Mulungu." 
1Peter4:3 Pakuti nthawi yapitayi idatifikira kucita cifuno ca amitundu, poyendayenda ife m'kukhumba zonyansa, zilakolako, maledzero, madyerero, mamwaimwa, ndi kupembedza mafano kosaloleka;" 
1Peter4:4 m'menemo ayesa ncacilendo kuti simuthamanga nao kufikira kusefukira komwe kwa citayiko, nakucitirani mwano;" 
1Peter4:5 amenewo adzamwerengera iye wokhala wokonzeka kuweruza amoyo ndi akufa. 
1Peter4:6 Pakuti cifukwa ca ici walalikidwa Uthenga Wabwino kwa iwonso adafawo, kuti akaweruzidwe monga mwa anthu m'thupi, koma akakhale ndi moyo monga mwa Mulungu mumzimu." 
1Peter4:7 Koma citsiriziro ca zinthu zonse ciri pafupi; cifukwa cace khalani anzeru, ndipo dikirani m'mapemphero;" 
1Peter4:8 koposa zonse mukhale naco cikondano ceni ceni mwa inu nokha; pakuti cikondano cikwiriritsa unyinji wa macimo; 
1Peter4:9 mucerezane wina ndi mnzace, osadandaula:" 
1Peter4:10 monga yense walandira mphatso, mutumikirane nayo, ngati adindo okoma a cisomo ca mitundu mitundu ca Mulungu;" 
1Peter4:11 akalankhula wina, alankhule ngati manenedwe a Mulungu; wina akatumikira, acite ngati mu mphamvu imene Mulungu ampatsa, kuti m'zonse Mulungu alemekezedwe mwa Yesu Kristu, amene ali nao ulemerero ndi mphamvu ku nthawi za nthawi. Amen." 
1Peter4:12 Okondedwa, musazizwe ndi mayesedwe amoto adakugwerani inu akhale cakukuyesani, ngati cinthu cacilendo cacitika nanu:" 
1Peter4:13 koma popeza mulawana ndi Kristu zowawa zace, kondwerani; kutinso pa bvumbulutso la ulemerero wace mukakondwere kwakukurukuru." 
1Peter4:14 Mukatonzedwa pa dzina la Kristu, odala inu; pakuti Mzimu wa ulemerero, ndi Mzimu wa Mulungu apuma pa inu." 
1Peter4:15 Pakuti asamve zowawa wina wa inu ngati wambanda, kapena mbala, kapena wocita zoipa, kapena ngati wodudukira;" 
1Peter4:16 koma akamva zowawa ngati Mkristu asacite manyazi; koma alemekeze Mulungu m'dzina ili. 
1Peter4:17 Cifukwa yafika nthawi kuti ciweruziro ciyambe pa nyumba ya Mulungu; komangati ciyamba ndi ife, citsiriziro ca iwo osamvera Uthenga Wabwino wa Mulungu cidzakhala ciani?" 
1Peter4:18 Ndipo ngati munthu wolungama apulumuka ndi kuyesetsa kokha kokha, munthu wosapembedza ndi wocimwa adzaoneka kuti?" 
1Peter4:19 Koteronso iwo akumva zowawa monga mwa cifuniro ca Mulungu aike moyo wao ndi kucita zokoma m'manja a Wolenga wokhulupirika. 
1Peter5:1 Akulu tsono mwa inu ndiwadandaulira, ine mkulu mnzanu ndi mboni ya zowawa za Kristu, ndinenso wolawana nao ulemerero udzabvumbulutsikawo:" 
1Peter5:2 Wetani gulu la Mulungu liri mwa inu, ndi kuliyang'anira, osati mokangamiza, koma mwaufulu, kwa Mulungu; osatsata phindu lonyansa, koma mwacangu;" 
1Peter5:3 osati monga ocita ufumu pa iwo a udindo wanu, koma okhala zitsanzo za gululo." 
1Peter5:4 Ndipo pakuonekera Mbusa wamkulu, mudzalandira korona wa ulemerero, wosafota. Momwemonso, anyamata inu, mverani akulu." 
1Peter5:5 Koma nonsenu mubvale kudzicepetsa kuti mutumikirane; pakuti Mulungu akaniza odzikuza, koma apatsa cisomo kwa odzicepetsa." 
1Peter5:6 Potero dzicepetseni pansi pa dzanja la mphamvu lao Mulungu, kuti panthawi yace akakukwezeni;" 
1Peter5:7 ndi kutaya pa iye nkhawa yanu yonse, pakuti iye asamalira inu." 
1Peter5:8 Khalani odzisungira, dikirani; mdani wanu mdierekezi, monga mkango wobuma, ayendayenda ndi kufunafuna wina akamlikwire:" 
1Peter5:9 ameneyo mumkanize okhazikika m'cikhulupiriro, podziwa kuti zowawa zomwezo zirimkukwaniridwa pa abale anu ali m'dziko." 
1Peter5:10 Ndipo Mulungu wa cisomo conse, amene adakuitanani kulowa ulemerero wace wosatha mwa Kristu, mutamva zowawa kanthawi, adzafikitsa inu opanda cirema mwini wace, adzakhazikitsa, adzalimbikitsa inu." 
1Peter5:11 Kwa iye kukhale mphamvu ku nthawi za nthawi. Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Mwa Silvano, mbale wathu wokhulupirika monga ndimayesa, ndalembera kwa inu mwacidule, ndi kudandaulira, ndi kucita umboni, kuti cisomo coona ca Mulungu ndi ici; m'cimeneci muimemo." 
1Peter5:13 Iye wa ku Babulo wosankhidwa pamodzi nanu akulankhulani; ateronso Marko mwana wanga. 
1Peter5:13 Iye wa ku Babulo wosankhidwa pamodzi nanu akulankhulani; ateronso Marko mwana wanga. 
1Peter5:14 Lankhulanani ndi cipsompsono ca cikondi. Mtendere ukhale ndi inu nonse muli mwa Kristu. 
2Peter1:1 SIMONI Petro, kapolo ndi mtumwi wa Yesu Kristu kwa iwo amene adalandira cikhulupiriro ca mtengo wace womwewo ndi ife, m'cilungamo ca Mulungu wathu ndi Mpulumutsi Yesu Kristu:" 
2Peter1:2 Cisomo kwa inu ndi mtendere zicurukitsidwe m'cidziwitso ca Mulungu ndi Yesu Ambuye wathu. 
2Peter1:3 Popeza mphamvu ya umulungu wace idatipatsa ife zonse za pamoyo ndi cipembedzo, mwa cidziwitso ca iye amene adatiitana ife ndi ulemerero ndi ukoma wace wa iye yekha;" 
2Peter1:4 mwa izi adatipatsa malonjezano a mtengo wace ndi akuru ndithu; kuti mwa izi mukakhale oyanjana nao umulungu wace, mutapulumuka ku cibvundi ciri pa dziko lapansi m'cilakolako." 
2Peter1:5 Ndipo mwa ici comwe, pakutengeraponso cangu conse, muonjezerapo ukoma pa cikhulupiriro canu, ndi paukoma cizindikiritso; ndi pacizindikiritso codziletsa;" 
2Peter1:6 ndi pacodziletsa cipiriro; 
2Peter1:7 ndi pacipiriro zipembedzo; ndi pactpembedzo cikondi ca pa abale; ndi pacikondi ca pa abale cikondi. 
2Peter1:8 Pakuti izi zikakhala ndi inu, ndipo zikacuruka, zidzacita kuti musakhale aulesi kapena opanda zipatso pa cizindikiritso ca Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:9 Pakuti iye wakusowa izi ali wakhungu, wa cimbuuzi, woiwala matsukidwe ace potaya zoipa zace zakale," 
2Peter1:10 Momwemo abale, onjezani kucita cangu kukhazikitsa maitanidwe ndi masankhulidwe anu; pakuti mukacita izi, simudzakhumudwa nthawi zonse;" 
2Peter1:11 pakuti kotero kudzaonjezedwa kwa inu kolemerera khomo lakulowa ufumu wosatha wa Ambuye wathu ndi Mpulumutsi Yesu Kristu. 
2Peter1:12 Mwa ici sindidzaleka kukukumbutsani inu nthawi zonse za izi, mungakhale muzidziwa nimukhazikika m'coonadi ciri ndi inu." 
2Peter1:13 Ndipo ndiciyesa cokoma, pokhala ine m'msasa uwu, kukutsitsimutsani ndi kukukumbutsani;" 
2Peter1:14 podziwa kuti kuleka kwa msasa wanga kuli pafupi, monganso Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu anandilangiza." 
2Peter1:15 Koma ndidzacitanso cangu kosalekeza kuti nditacoka ine, mudzakhoza kukumbukila izi," 
2Peter1:16 Pakuti sitinatsata miyambi yacabe, pamene tinakudziwitsani mphamvu ndi maonekedwe a Ambuye wathu Yesu Kristu, koma tinapenya m'maso ukulu wace." 
2Peter1:17 Pakuti analandira kwa Mulungu Atate ulemu ndi ulemerero, pakumdzera iye mao otere ocokera ku ulemerero waukuru, Uyu ndi Mwana wanga wokondedwa, amene Ine ndikondwera naye;" 
2Peter1:18 ndipo mau awa ocokera Kumwamba tidawamva ife, pokhala pamodzi ndi iye m'phiri lopatulika lija," 
2Peter1:19 Ndipo tiri nao mau a cinenero okhazikika koposa; amene mucita bwino powasamalira, monga nyali younikira m'malo a mdima, kufikira kukaca, nikauka nthanda pa mtima yanu;" 
2Peter1:20 ndi kudziwa ici poyamba, kuti palibe cinenero ca lembo citanthauzidwa pa cokha," 
2Peter1:21 pakuti kale lonse cinenero sicinadza ndi cifuniro ca munthu; koma anthu a Mulungu, ogwidwa ndi Mzimu Woyera, analankhula." 
2Peter2:1 Koma padakhalanso pakati pa anthuwo aneneri onama, monganso padzakhala aphunzitsi onama pakati pa inu, amene adzalowa nayo m'tseri mipatuko yotayikitsa, nadzakana Ambuye amene adawagula, nadzadzitengera iwo okha citayiko cakudza msanga." 
2Peter2:2 Ndipo ambiri adzatsata zonyansa zao; cifukwa ca iwo njira ya coonadi idzanenedwa zamwano. 
2Peter2:3 Ndipo m'cisiriro adzakuyesani malonda ndi mau onyenga; amene ciweruzo cao sicinacedwa ndi kale lomwe, ndipo citayiko cao siciodzera." 
2Peter2:4 Pakuti ngati Mulungu sanalekerera angelo adacimwawo, koma anawaponya kundende nawaika ku maenje a mdima, asungike akaweruzidwe;" 
2Peter2:5 ndipo sanalekerera dziko lapansi lakale, koma anasunga Nowa mlaliki wa cilungamo, ndi anzace asanu ndi awiri, pakulitengera dziko la osapembedza cigumula;" 
2Peter2:6 ndipo pakuisandutsa makara midzi ya Sodoma ndi Gomora anaitsutsa poigwetsa, ataiika citsanzo ca kwa iwo akakhala osapembedza;" 
2Peter2:7 ndipo anapulumutsa Loti wolungamayo, wolema mtima ndi mayendedwe onyansa a oipa aja" 
2Peter2:8 (Pakuti wolungamayo pokhala pakati pao, ndi kuona ndi kumva zao, anadzizunzira moyo wace wolungama tsiku ndi tsiku ndi nchito zao zosayeruzika)." 
2Peter2:9 Ambuye adziwa kupulumutsa opembedza poyesedwa iwo, ndi kusunga osalungama kufikira tsiku loweruza akalangidwe;" 
2Peter2:10 kama makamaka iwo akutsata zathupi, m'cilakolako ca zodetsa, napeputsa cilamuliro; osaopa kanthu, otsata cifuniro ca iwo eni, santhunthumira kucitira mwano akulu;" 
2Peter2:11 popeza angelo, angakhale awaposa polimbitsa mphamvu, sawaneneza kwa Ambuye mlandu wakucita mwano." 
2Peter2:12 Koma awo, ngati zamoyo zopanda nzeru, nyama zobadwa kuti zikodwe ndi kuonongedwa, akucitira mwano pa zinthu osazidziwa, adzaonongeka m'kuononga kwao," 
2Peter2:13 ocitidwa zoipa kulipira kwa cosalungama; anthu akuyesera cowakondweretsa kudyerera usana; ndiwo mawanga ndi zirema, akudyerera m'madyerero acikondi ao, pamene akudya nanu;" 
2Peter2:14 okhala nao maso odzala ndi cigololo, osakhoza kuleka ucimo, kunyengerera iwo a moyo wosakhazikika; okhala nao mtima wozolowera kusirira; ana a temberero;"
